Matthew1:1 Bugu ya lutsinga lwa Yesu Khristo, Murwa wa Dafita a re murwa wa Abrahamu asiyi:" 
Matthew1:2 Abrahamu o beba Isaka; Isaka a beba Jakopo; Jakopo a beba Juda na vhakomana vhawe na vharathu vhawe; 
Matthew1:3 Juda a beba Pheretse na Zera nga Thamara; Pheretse a beba Esromu; Esromu a beba Ramu; 
Matthew1:4 Ramu a beba Aminadaba; Aminadaba a beba Nahashoni; Nahashoni a beba Salimoni; 
Matthew1:5 Salimoni a beba Buasi nga Rahaba; Buasi a beba Obede nga Rute; Obede a beba Isai; 
Matthew1:6 Isai a beba Dafita uḽa wa khosi. Dafita a beba Solomoni nga musadzi we a vha e wa Uria; 
Matthew1:7 Solomoni a beba Rehabiamu; Rehabiamu a beba Abia; Abia a beba Asa; 
Matthew1:8 Asa a beba Josafati; Josafati a beba Joramu; Joramu a beba Uzia; 
Matthew1:9 Uzia a beba Jothamu; Jothamu a beba Ahasi; Ahasi a beba Hiskia; 
Matthew1:10 Hiskia a beba Manase; Manase a beba Amoni; Amoni a beba Josiasi; 
Matthew1:11 Josiasi a beba Jakonia na vharathu vhawe vha konou thubelwa Babele. 
Matthew1:12 Musi vho no thubelwa Babele Jakonia a beba Salathiele; Salathiele a beba Zerubabele; 
Matthew1:13 Zerubabele a beba Abiudi; Abiudi a beba Eliakimu; Eliakimu a beba Azori; 
Matthew1:14 Azori a beba Tsadoko; Tsadoko a beba Akimu; Akimu a beba Eliudu; 
Matthew1:15 Eliudu a beba Eliasere; Eliasere a beba Mathani; Mathani a beba Jakopo; 
Matthew1:16 Jakopo a beba Josefa munna wa Maria we a vha mme a Yesu ane a pfi Khristo. 
Matthew1:17 Ngauralo mirafho yoṱhe u bva kha Abrahamu u swika kha Dafita ndi 14; u bva kha Dafita u swika vha tshi thubelwa Babele ndi 14; u bva kha vhuthubwa u swika kha Mesia ndi 14. 
Matthew1:18 Mafhungo a u bebwa ha Yesu Khristo ngea: Musi Maria mme awe o fulufhedziswa Josefa, hone vha sa athu dzhena nḓuni, a wanala e muthu wa thovhela nga Muya Mukhethwa." 
Matthew1:19 Zwino Josefa munna wawe nge a vha e muvhuya o vha a sa funi u mu shonisa kha vhathu; ndi zwe a humbula u tou mu ṋenga. 
Matthew1:20 A tshi kha ḓi humbula u ita zwenezwo a lora a tshi khou vhona muruṅwa wa Muṋe washu a tshi ri, “Josefa muḓuhulu wa Dafita, u songo ofha u vhinga Maria musidzana wau; zwine a vha nazwo zwi bva kha Muya Mukhethwa." 
Matthew1:21 Nazwino u ḓo beba ṅwana wa mutukana. U mu rine ḽa Yesu, a ngauri ndi Ene ane a ḓo tshidza vhathu vhawe vhutshinyini havho.”" 
Matthew1:22 Hezwi zwoṱhe zwo itea uri hu khunyelele ḽe Muṋe washu a amba nga muporofita a tshi ri," 
Matthew1:23 “Musidzana u ḓo vha muthu wa thovhela a beba ṅwana wa mutukana. Onoyo u ḓo pfi Imanuele,” ḽine ḽa amba uri “Mudzimu u na riṋe.”" 
Matthew1:24 Josefa a tshi karuwa a ita zwenezwo zwe muruṅwa wa Muṋe washu a mu vhudza, a vhinga muselwa wawe," 
Matthew1:25 hone ho ngo mu dzhenisa nḓuni a sa athu beba ṅwana wawe. Musi mutukana o no bebwa a mu rina ḽa Yesu. 
Matthew2:1 Musi Yesu o no bebwa muḓini wa Betlehema shangoni ḽa Juda, hu tshi vhusa khosi Herude, ho ḓa vhaṱali vha zwa ṋaledzi vha tshi bva Vhubvaḓuvha, vha swika Jerusalema" 
Matthew2:2 vha vhudzisa vha ri, “U ngafhi uḽa we a bebwa e khosi ya Majuda? Ro vhona ṋaledzi yawe i tshi bva, zwino ro ḓa u mu luvha.”" 
Matthew2:3 Vhamusanda Vho-Herude vha tshi pfa zwenezwo vha tshenuwa, na muḓi woṱhe wa Jerusalema wa tshenuwa." 
Matthew2:4 Herude a kuvhanganya vhoṱhe vhotshifhe vhahulwane vha lushaka na vhaḓivhi vha Mulayo a vha vhudzisa uri Mesia u pfi u ḓo bebwa ngafhi. 
Matthew2:5 Vha mu fhindula vha ri, “U ḓo bebwa Betlehema kha ḽa Juda, ngauri muporofita o ṅwala a ri," 
Matthew2:6 “ ‘Matsina iwe Betlehema shangoni ḽa Juda, a si iwe muṱuku wa magota a Juda. Kha iwe hu ḓo bva murangaphanḓa ane a ḓo lisa vhathu vhanga vha Israele.’ ”" 
Matthew2:7 Herude a konou vhidzela vhaḽa vhaṱali tshiphirini a vha vhudzisesa tshifhinga tshe ṋaledzi ya vhonala ngatsho," 
Matthew2:8 a vha ruma Betlehema a ri, “Iyani ni yo sedzesa zwa uyo ṅwana. Musi no mu wana ni ḓe ni nnḓivhise uri na nṋe ndi kone u ya ndi mu luvhe.”" 
Matthew2:9 Musi vho no pfa maipfi a khosi vha takuwa. Iḽa ṋaledzi ye vha vhona i tshi bva ya vha endedza ya vhuya ya swika ya ima nṱha ha henefho fhethu he ṅwana a vha e hone. 
Matthew2:10 Vha tshi vhona ṋaledzi vha takala nga maanḓa. 
Matthew2:11 Vha tshi swika nḓuni ya hone vha wana ṅwana e na mme awe Maria, vha gwadama vha luvha. Ndi hone vha tshi putulula maputo avho vha ṋekedza nduvho dze vha ḓa nadzo: ndi musuku na zwioro na zwiḓolo zwi nukhelelaho." 
Matthew2:12 Zwino Mudzimu a vha sevha nga muloro uri vha songo tsha vhuelela ha Herude. Ndi zwe vha tshi humela ha havho vha bva nga iṅwe nḓila. 
Matthew2:13 Musi vhaṱali vho no ṱuwa, ha ḓa muruṅwa wa Muṋe washu a ḓisumbedza Josefa nga muloro a ri, “Dzhia ṅwana na mme awe ni shavhele Egipita, ni dzule henengei ndi vhuye ndi u vhudze. Herude u ḓo ṱoḓa ṅwana uri a mu vhulahe.”" 
Matthew2:14 Josefa a takuwa vhusiku a ṱuwa na ṅwana na mme awe vha pfulutshela Egipita," 
Matthew2:15 vha dzula henengei Herude a vhuya a fa. Hezwo zwo itea uri hu khunyelele ḽe Muṋe washu a amba nga muporofita a tshi ri, “Ndo vhidza Murwa wanga Egipita.”" 
Matthew2:16 Herude a tshi vhona uri vhaṱali vho mu tikisa luwa a sinyuwa nga maanḓa, a ruma vhathu u vhulaha vhatukana vhoṱhe vha Betlehema na mivhunduni yoṱhe ya henefho vha re na miṅwaha mivhili na vhaṱuku khavho, hu u tevhedza tshifhinga tsho ambiwaho nga vhaṱali." 
Matthew2:17 Ndi hone he ha khunyelela ḽo ambiwaho nga muporofita Jeremia a tshi ri," 
Matthew2:18 “Rama ho pfala khuwa, tshililo na mukosi muhulu. Rahele u khou lilela vhana vhawe. Ha tendi u fhumudzwa; vho fa vho fhela.”" 
Matthew2:19 Musi Herude o no fa, muruṅwa wa Muṋe washu a ḓisumbedza Josefa nga muloro henengei Egipita" 
Matthew2:20 a ri, “Takuwa u dzhie ṅwana na mme awe ni vhuelele shangoni ḽa Israele. Vhe vha vha vha tshi ṱoḓa u vhulaha ṅwana vho fa.”" 
Matthew2:21 Ndi hone Josefa a tshi takuwa a ṱuwa na ṅwana na mme awe vha vhuelela shangoni ḽa Israele. 
Matthew2:22 Hone nge a pfa uri Akhilaosi o no vha khosi ya Judia vhudzuloni ha khotsi awe Herude, a ofha u vhuelela shangoni ḽeneḽo. Mudzimu a mu eletshedza nga muloro uri a ṱutshele thungo dza Galelia." 
Matthew2:23 A tshi swika henefho a ya a dzula muḓini u no pfi Nazaretha. Zwenezwo zwo itea uri hu khunyelele ḽo ambiwaho nga vhaporofita vha tshi ri, “U ḓo pfi Munazaretha.”" 
Matthew3:1 Misi yeneyo ho ḓa Johanisi Mulovhedzi Phangani ya Judia, a ḓa na pfunzo" 
Matthew3:2 ine ya ri, “Laṱani vhuvhi haṋu; tshifhinga tsho sendela tsha uri ni vhuswe nga Mudzimu.”" 
Matthew3:3 Johanisi ndi ene we a dzula o ambiwa nga muporofita Yesaya a tshi ri, “Hu na muthu a huwelelaho sogani! U ri, ‘Lugiselani Muṋe washu nḓila, i tou tswititi, i tshimbilee!’ ”" 
Matthew3:4 Johanisi o vha o ambara nguvho ya vhukuse ha gamela, khunduni o i vhofha nga bannda ya mukumba, zwiḽiwa zwawe zwi nzie na ṋotshi dza ḓaka." 
Matthew3:5 Muḓi wa Jerusalema na shango ḽoṱhe ḽa Judia na vhathu vhoṱhe vha thungo dza Jorodani vha ḓa khae 
Matthew3:6 a vha lovhedza mulamboni wa Jorodani vha tshi bula vhutshinyi havho. 
Matthew3:7 A tshi vhona na Vhafarisei na Vhasadukei vhanzhi vho ḓa u lovhedzwa, a amba navho a ri, “Dziṋowa ndinwi! Ndi nnyi o ni sevhaho uri ni tinye khaṱhulo ya Mudzimu ine ya khou ḓa?" 
Matthew3:8 Aṋwani-ha mitshelo i sumbedzaho uri vhukuma no laṱa vhuvhi haṋu. 
Matthew3:9 Ni songo ḓifhima na amba nga tshaṋu na ri, ‘Riṋe ri vhaḓuhulu vha Abrahamu.’ A vha nṋe ndi ri, Mudzimu u na maanḓa a u itela Abrahamu vhana nga matombo haya!" 
Matthew3:10 Iṱali mbaḓo yo no ḓi dzula yo angaladzwa tsindeni ḽa muri; muri muṅwe na muṅwe une wa si aṋwe mitshelotshelo u ḓo remiwa wa kudzwa muliloni. 
Matthew3:11 “Nṋe ndi ni lovhedza nga maḓi u sumbedza uri no laṱa vhuvhi haṋu, fhedzi hu si kale hu ḓo ḓa ane a mphira kule, lune ndi si vhuye nda fanela na u mu farela navhula dzawe; Ene u ḓo ni lovhedza nga Muya Mukhethwa na nga mulilo." 
Matthew3:12 U ḓa o fara luselo lwawe. U ḓo fhefhera mavhele a a shela ḓuluni. Mungu wone u ḓo u fhisa nga mulilo u sa dzimi.” 
Matthew3:13 Ndi hone hu tshi swika Yesu a tshi bva Galelia, a ḓa Jorodani ha Johanisi uri a lovhedzwe-vho ngae." 
Matthew3:14 Johanisi a edzisa u hana a ri, “Ho vha ho fanela u lovhedzwa nṋe nga Vhone, zwino khezwi vha tshi ḓa kha nṋe!”" 
Matthew3:15 Yesu a mu fhindula a ri, “Ni songo hana hezwino: zwo ri fanela u ita hezwi uri ri khunyeledze zwoṱhe zwo tiwaho nga Mudzimu.” Ndi hone Johanisi a tshi tenda." 
Matthew3:16 Yesu a ri u lovhedzwa, a tshi bva maḓini ḽiṱaḓulu ḽa mbo ḓi vulea, Johanisi a vhona Muya wa Mudzimu a tshi tsa e kha tshivhumbeo tsha ḽiivha a kavha kha Yesu." 
Matthew3:17 Ha pfala ipfi ḽi bvaho ṱaḓulu ḽi tshi ri, “Hoyu ndi Murwa wanga muthihi fhedzi; u a ntakadza!”" 
Matthew4:1 Ndi hone Muya a tshi isa Yesu phangani uri diabolo a mu linge. 
Matthew4:2 A fhedza maḓuvha a 40 na vhusiku hao a sa ḽi tshithu, a vhuya a pfa nḓala." 
Matthew4:3 Ndi hone mulingi a tshi ḓa a amba nae a ri, “Arali nangoho u Murwa wa Mudzimu, vhudza haya matombo a shanduke a vhe vhuswa.”" 
Matthew4:4 Yesu a fhindula a ri, “Maṅwalo a ri, ‘Muthu ha tshili nga vhuswa fhedzi, u tshila na nga zwoṱhe zwi ambwaho nga Mudzimu.’ ”" 
Matthew4:5 Ndi hone diabolo a tshi mu isa muḓini mukhethwa a mu imisa kha tshiuludza tsha thembele," 
Matthew4:6 a konou amba nae a ri, “Arali nangoho u Murwa wa Mudzimu, fhufhela fhasi. Hufha Maṅwalo a tshi ri, “ ‘Mudzimu u ḓo ruma vharuṅwa vhawe uri vha u londole, vha ḓo u takula nga zwanḓa zwavho u sa ḓo khukhulwa mulenzhe nga tombo.’ ”" 
Matthew4:7 Yesu a fhindula a ri, “Ho ṅwalwa-vho ha pfi, ‘U songo linga Mudzimu Muṋe wau.’ ”" 
Matthew4:8 Diabolo a dovha a mu isa thavhani ndapfu-ndapfu, a mu sumbedza mashango oṱhe a ḽifhasi na madzanga ao," 
Matthew4:9 a ri, “Ndi ḓo u ṋea hezwi zwoṱhe arali wa tou nngwadamela wa nnduvha.”" 
Matthew4:10 Yesu a fhindula a ri, “Ṱuwa Saṱhane! Ho ṅwalwa ha pfi, ‘Gwadamela Muṋe wau Mudzimu u luvhe Ene fhedzi.’ ”" 
Matthew4:11 Ndi hone diabolo a tshi mu ṱutshela, ha ḓa vharuṅwa vha mu thakha vha mu shumela." 
Matthew4:12 Yesu a tshi pfa uri Johanisi o farwa, a ṱuwa Judia a ya Galelia." 
Matthew4:13 A pfuluwa Nazaretha a ya Kapernaumi, tsini na dzivha, thungo dza Zebuloni na Nafuthali." 
Matthew4:14 Zwo itelwa uri hu khunyelele ḽo ambiwaho nga muporofita Yesaya a tshi ri," 
Matthew4:15 “Shango ḽa Zebuloni, shango ḽa Nafuthali, nḓila ya Dzivhani, seli ha Jorodani, Galelia ḽa vhannḓa," 
Matthew4:16 vhathu vho dzulaho swiswini vho vhona tshedza tshihulu. Vho dzulaho shangoni he vha tibwa nga gole ḽa lufu, ḽo vha ṱavhela.”" 
Matthew4:17 U bva zwenezwo Yesu a thoma u ḓivhadza vhathu pfunzo ya uri, “Laṱani vhuvhi haṋu; tshifhinga tsho sendela tsha uri ni vhuswe nga Mudzimu.”" 
Matthew4:18 Huno Yesu a tshi khou tshimbila khunzikhunzini ya Dzivha ḽa Galelia a vhona vhanna vhavhili, Simoni ane ḽiṅwe a pfi Pitrosi na murathu wawe Andrisi, vha tshi khou rea khovhe dzivhani nga mambule, ngauri vho vha vhe vharei vha khovhe." 
Matthew4:19 A amba navho a ri, “Iḓani ni vhe vhafunziwa vhanga, ndi ni funzedze u fasha vhathu.”" 
Matthew4:20 Vhone vha ṱutshela mambule avho na zwenezwo, vha vha vhafunziwa vhawe." 
Matthew4:21 A tshi fhirela phanḓa a dovha a wana vhaṅwe vhavhili, Jakopo ṅwana wa Zebedia na murathu wawe Johanisi, vhe tshikepeni na khotsi avho Zebedia, vha tshi khou dzudzanya mambule avho. A vha vhidza," 
Matthew4:22 vha mbo ḓi sia tshikepe na khotsi avho vha vha vhafunziwa vhawe. 
Matthew4:23 Yesu a enda a tshi funza sinagogoni shangoni ḽoṱhe ḽa Galelia, a tshi ḓivhadza mafhungo maḓifha a muvhuso wa Mudzimu, a tshi fhodza vhalwadze vhoṱhe na vhoṱhe vha sa ḓipfi zwavhuḓi." 
Matthew4:24 Bvumo ḽawe ḽa pfala na kha ḽoṱhe ḽa Siria, ha ḓiswa khae vha re na maṱungu a tshakha-tshakha, na vhalwadze vhoṱhe, na vha na thuṅwa dza Saṱhane na vha lwalaho tshifakhole na vho omaho miraḓo, a vha fhodza." 
Matthew4:25 Ha ḓa vhathu vhanzhi-vhanzhi vha tshi bva Galelia na shangoni ḽine ḽa pfi Miḓi-ya-fumi na Jerusalema na Judia na seli ha Jorodani, vha mu tevhela." 
Matthew5:1 Yesu a tshi vhona magogo ayo a gonya thavha a dzula fhasi. Vhafunziwa vhawe vha sendela," 
Matthew5:2 a thoma u amba a vha funza a ri," 
Matthew5:3 “Mashudu vhane vha ḓivha uri a vha na tshavho, vha ḓitikaho nga Mudzimu fhedzi: muvhuso wa Mudzimu ndi wa vhenevho." 
Matthew5:4 Mashudu vha lilaho: vhane vha ḓo fhumudzwa ndi vhenevho. 
Matthew5:5 Mashudu vho vuḓaho: vhane shango ḽa ḓo vha ifa ḽavho ndi vhenevho. 
Matthew5:6 Mashudu vhane vha tama vhuvhuya ho no ḓi vha hone zwa nga nḓala na ḓora: vhane vha ḓo fushwa ndi vhenevho. 
Matthew5:7 Mashudu vha na mbilutshilidzi: vhane vha ḓo itelwa tshilidzi ndi vhenevho. 
Matthew5:8 Mashudu vha mbilu dzo ṱambaho: vhane vha ḓo vhona Mudzimu ndi vhenevho. 
Matthew5:9 Mashudu vhaladzashango: vhane vha ḓo pfi vhana vha Mudzimu ndi vhenevho. 
Matthew5:10 Mashudu vhane vha tovholelwa vhuvhuya: muvhuso wa Mudzimu ndi wa vhenevho. 
Matthew5:11 Ni na mashudu arali vhathu vha tshi ni sema, vha tshi ni tovhola, vha tshi ni pomoka vhuvhi hoṱhe nge na vha vhanga." 
Matthew5:12 “Takalani ni pembele, ngauri ngei ṱaḓulu ni ḓo wana pfufho khulu. Hufha na vhaporofita vha misi iḽa ya kale vho ḓi vha tovhola nga u ralo." 
Matthew5:13 “Inwi ni muṋo wa shango. Hone arali muṋo wa rothola u kha ḓi ḓo lungwa nga mini? A u tshee na mushumo, tshawo ndi u laṱwa nnḓa wa kandekanywa nga vhathu." 
Matthew5:14 “Inwi ni tshedza tsha shango. Muḓi wo fhaṱwaho nṱha ha thavha a u koni u dzumbama. 
Matthew5:15 Ndi nnyi-vho ane a ri u funga luvhone a lu tiba nga mvuvhelo? Ha lu vhei vhudzuloni halwo kani, uri lu vhonetshele vhoṱhe vha re henefho nḓuni?" 
Matthew5:16 Na tshaṋu tshedza kha tshi dzule tshi tshi vhonetshela vhathu nga u ralo, uri vha vhone mishumo yaṋu mivhuya vha rende Khotsi aṋu wa ṱaḓulu.”" 
Matthew5:17 “Ni songo ri ndo ḓa u thutha Mulayo na Maṅwalo a vhaporofita; a tho ngo ḓela u thutha ndo ḓela u khunyeledza. 
Matthew5:18 Zwino ipfani-ha: ḽiṱaḓulu na ḽifhasi zwi nga kha ḓi lovha, hone kha Mulayo hu nga si lovhe na ‘i’ nthihi kana kuswayo zwakwo; zwi ḓo khunyeledzwa zwoṱhe." 
Matthew5:19 “Ngauralo ane a laṱa na ṱhukhu zwayo kha ndaela idzi a funza vhathu uri vha i laṱe-vho, ndi ene ane a ḓo pfi muṱuku muvhusoni wa Mudzimu. Hone ane a i tevhedza, a funza na vhaṅwe uri vha i tevhedze, ndi ene ane a ḓo pfi muhulwane muvhusoni wa Mudzimu." 
Matthew5:20 Zwino ipfani-ha: arali vhuvhuya haṋu vhu sa fhiri ha vhaḓivhi vha Mulayo na Vhafarisei, ni nga si vhuye na dzhena muvhusoni wa Mudzimu." 
Matthew5:21 “No zwi pfa vha kale vha tshi laiwa ha pfi, ‘U songo vhulaha muthu; tsha muvhulahi ndi u haṱulwa.’" 
Matthew5:22 A vha Nṋe ndi a ni vhudza ndi ri: ane a vhuya a sinyutshela muṅwe, tshawe ndi u haṱulwa; ane a lidzela muṅwe tsaṅwa, tshawe ndi u sengiswa khoroni; ane a ri, ‘ḓabaḓaba iḽi’, tshawe ndi u kudzwa muliloni wa hele." 
Matthew5:23 Zwino-ha arali u tshi yo ṋekedza nduvho yau kha aḽiṱari, u tshi swika wa humbula uri wa hau o u fara nga mbilu," 
Matthew5:24 thoma u litsha nduvho yau henefho aḽiṱarini u ye u pfumedzane na wa hau, ndi hone u tshi ḓo kona u ṋekedza nduvho yau." 
Matthew5:25 Arali hu na muthu ane a u hwelela, pfana nae ni tshee nḓilani ni sa athu swika khoroni, uri a si u ise kha muhaṱuli, uyo a u fhirisela kha mapholisa, one a u kudza dzhele." 
Matthew5:26 Thetshelesa ndi u vhudze: u nga si vhuye wa bva u sa athu lifha; u ḓo lifha na sente ya u fhedzisela. 
Matthew5:27 “No zwi pfa hu tshi pfi, ‘U songo ita vhupombwe.’" 
Matthew5:28 A vha Nṋe ndi ni vhudza ndi ri: ane a lavhelesa musadzi lwa u mu emula o no ḓi ita vhupombwe nae mbiluni yawe. 
Matthew5:29 Ngauralo arali iṱo ḽau ḽa tshauḽa ḽi tshi u khakhisa, nongola u laṱe; ndi khwiṋe hu tshi lovha muraḓo muthihi zwawo u fhira musi muvhili woṱhe u tshi kudzwa heleni." 
Matthew5:30 Arali tshanḓa tshau tshauḽa tshi tshi u khakhisa, tumula u laṱe; ndi khwiṋe hu tshi lovha muraḓo muthihi zwawo u fhira musi muvhili woṱhe u tshi ya heleni." 
Matthew5:31 “Hu pfi, ‘Ane a ṱala musadzi wawe u fanela u mu fha vhuṱanzi ha u ṱalana.’" 
Matthew5:32 A vha Nṋe ndi a ni vhudza ndi ri: ane a ṱala musadzi wawe arali hu si nga mulandu wa vhupombwe, u mu itisa vhupombwe; na onoyo ane a vhinga musadzi o ṱalwaho u ita vhupombwe." 
Matthew5:33 “No dovha na zwi pfa vha kale vha tshi vhudzwa ha pfi, ‘U songo anela mazwifhi; zwe wa anela Mudzimu u zwi ite.’" 
Matthew5:34 A vha Nṋe ndi ni vhudza uri ni songo ana na kathihi. Ni songo ana nga ḽiṱaḓulu, ngauri ndi khuluṋoni ya Mudzimu." 
Matthew5:35 Ni songo ana nga ḽifhasi, ngauri ndi vhukando ha milenzhe yawe. Ni songo ana nga Jerusalema, ngauri ndi musanda wa Khosi Khulu." 
Matthew5:36 Na ṱhoho yaṋu ni songo ana ngayo; hufha ni sa koni u shandukisa muvhala wa luvhudzi na luthihi zwalwo lwa vha lutshena kana lurema. 
Matthew5:37 Tshaṋu nga hu vhe u fhedza nga u ri, ‘Iina’ kana ‘Hai’. Zwi no fhira zwenezwo zwi bva kha Muvhi." 
Matthew5:38 “No zwi pfa hu tshi pfi, ‘Iṱo ḽi lifhedzwa nga iṱo; iṋo ḽi lifhedzwa nga iṋo.’" 
Matthew5:39 A vha Nṋe ndi a ni vhudza ndi ri: U songo pikisa muthu muvhi. Ane a u rwa nga mulaṱela kha heḽi shama, u mu ṋekedze na ḽinwe." 
Matthew5:40 Ane a u hwelela nga mulandu wa badzhi u mu fhe na hemmbe. 
Matthew5:41 Ane a u kombetshedza u mu fhelekedza khilomitha nthihi, u mu fhelekedze mbili." 
Matthew5:42 Ane a u humbela tshithu u mu fhe; ane a funa u adzima tshiṅwe tshithu u songo mu dzima. 
Matthew5:43 “No zwi pfa hu tshi pfi, ‘U fune wa hau, swina ḽau u ḽi vhenge.’" 
Matthew5:44 A vha Nṋe ndi a ni vhudza ndi ri: funani maswina aṋu; rabelelani vha ni tovholaho; 
Matthew5:45 ndi hone ni tshi ḓo vha vhana vha Khotsi aṋu wa ṱaḓulu. Hufha Ene a tshi tshisela ḓuvha ḽawe vhavhi khathihi na vhavhuya, na vha mu thetshelesaho na vha sa mu thetshelesi a tshi vha nisela mvula vhoṱhe." 
Matthew5:46 Arali ni tshi funa vhenevho fhedzi vhane vha ni funa ni ḓo vha na pfufho-ḓe? Hufha na vhathelisi vha tshi zwi ita. 
Matthew5:47 Arali ni tshi reshana na vha haṋu fhedzi ni ita zwifhio zwi no fhira zwa vhaṅwe? Hufha na vhannḓa vha tshi zwi ita. 
Matthew5:48 Inwi ivhani vhavhuya vha si na tshiṱahe, unga Khotsi aṋu wa ṱaḓulu e muvhuya a sa ṱahedzi." 
Matthew6:1 “Ni vhone uri musi ni tshi bvisa zwifhiwa zwa vhashai ni si bvisele u vhonwa nga vhathu; arali ni tshi ita hezwo a ni tsha ḓo pfufhiwa nga Khotsi aṋu wa ṱaḓulu. 
Matthew6:2 Iwe-ha u tshi tonda vhashai u songo thoma nga u lidza lufhalafhala sa zwine vhahoi vha ita musi vha tshi tonda vhashai sinagogoni dzavho na mikotoni. U tonda havho vhashai ndi u sokou itela u khoḓwa nga vhathu fhedzi. Zwino ipfani-ha: malamba avho vho no ḓi a wana. 
Matthew6:3 Iwe-ha u tshi tonda vhashai, na tshanḓa tshau tshamonde tshi songo ḓivha zwi itwaho nga tshauḽa." 
Matthew6:4 U tonde vhashai zwi sa vhonwi nga muthu. Ndi hone Khotsi au a vhonaho zwo dzumbamaho a tshi ḓo u pfufha. 
Matthew6:5 “Na musi ni tshi rabela ni songo ita sa vhahoi vhane musi vha tshi rabela vha funa u ima sinagogoni na mikotoni uri vha vhonwe nga vhathu. Zwino ipfani-ha: malamba avho vho no ḓi a wana. 
Matthew6:6 Iwe-ha u tshi rabela, dzhena nḓuni yau u vale muṋango u rabele Khotsi au a re ho dzumbamaho. Huno Khotsi au a vhonaho zwo dzumbamaho u ḓo u pfufha." 
Matthew6:7 “Ni tshi rabela ni songo sokou andisa maipfi sa vhannḓa; vhone vha ri vha ḓo pfiwa nga u lapfisa thabelo. 
Matthew6:8 Inwi-ha ni songo fana navho. Hufha Mudzimu Khotsi aṋu a tshi ḓivha zwine na lila ni sa athu na u mu humbela. 
Matthew6:9 “Inwi-ha ni tshi rabela ni ri: “ ‘Khotsi ashu wa ṱaḓulu, dzina ḽau kha ḽi vhe ḽikhethwa," 
Matthew6:10 hu vhuse Iwe, hu itwe zwine wa funa fhano fhasi unga ngeo ṱaḓulu." 
Matthew6:11 U ri fhe ṋamusi vhuswa hashu ho ri eḓanaho. 
Matthew6:12 U ri hangwele milandu yashu, unga na riṋe ri tshi hangwela vha ri khakhelaho." 
Matthew6:13 U si tende ri tshi ungwa nga Muvhi; a tshi ri unga u ri lamulele.’ [Ngauri muvhuso ndi wau, na maanḓa, na vhugala, nga hu sa fheli.]" 
Matthew6:14 “Ndi uri arali ni tshi hangwela vhathu zwe vha ni khakhela, na inwi Khotsi aṋu wa ṱaḓulu u ḓo ni hangwela." 
Matthew6:15 Hone arali ni sa hangweli vhaṅwe, Khotsi aṋu wa ṱaḓulu na Ene a nga si ni hangwele zwe na khakha." 
Matthew6:16 “Musi ni tshi ḓidzima zwiḽiwa ni songo futa sa vhahoi. Vhone vha a sinyalala uri vhathu vha zwi vhone uri vha khou ḓidzima. Thetshelesani ndi ni vhudze: malamba avho vho no ḓi a wana. 
Matthew6:17 Iwe-ha u tshi ḓidzima, ṱamba u ḓole" 
Matthew6:18 uri vhathu vha si kone u vhona uri u khou ḓidzima, zwi vhonwe nga Khotsi au a re ho dzumbamaho. Tenda Khotsi au a vhonaho zwo dzumbamaho a tshi ḓo u pfufha." 
Matthew6:19 “Ni songo ḓikuvhanganyela lupfumo fhano fhasi, hune lwa lovha nga tsole na vhulali, mbava dza pwasha dza tswa," 
Matthew6:20 ḓikuvhanganyeleni lupfumo ngei ṱaḓulu hune lu si lovhe nga tsole na vhulali, mbava dzi si pwashe dza tswa." 
Matthew6:21 Ndi uri hune lupfumo lwau lwa vha hone, ndi hune mbilu yau ya vha hone." 
Matthew6:22 “Maṱo ndi luvhone lwa muvhili woṱhe. Arali maṱo aṋu a sa lwali, na muvhili waṋu woṱhe u ḓo vha tshedzani." 
Matthew6:23 Hone arali maṱo e si avhuḓi, izwo na muvhili woṱhe u ḓo vha swiswini. Zwino arali tshedza tshaṋu tsho no shanduka swiswi, ḽi ḓo vha swiswi ḽingafhani!" 
Matthew6:24 “A hu na ane a nga shumela vhaṋe vhavhili. A nga ḓo vhenga muṅwe a funa muṅwe; a pfa muṅwe, muṅwe a mu nyadza. A zwi tendi muthu a tshi shumela Mudzimu e phuli ya lupfumo lwa ḽino shango." 
Matthew6:25 “Ndi zwone zwine nda ri ni songo ṱolou ḽa mbilu nga zwine na lila vhutshiloni haṋu na ri ni ḓo ḽani, ni ḓo nwani, ni ḓo ambarani? Kani vhutshilo a vhu fhiri zwiḽiwa? Muvhili a u fhiri zwiambaro kani?" 
Matthew6:26 Edzonu vhona zwiṋoni: a zwi zwali mbeu, a zwi na tshine zwa kaṋa, a zwi kuvhanganyeli maḓuluni, hone Khotsi aṋu wa ṱaḓulu u ḓi zwi ṋea zwiḽiwa. Inwi a ni zwi fhiri kule naa?" 
Matthew6:27 Ndi nnyi waṋu ane nga u ḽa mbilu hawe a nga lapfisa vhutshilo hawe na nga ḓuvha ḽithihi zwaḽo? 
Matthew6:28 “Ni kha ḓi ḽelani mbilu nga zwa zwiambaro? Sedzani kualutshele kwa maluvha a phendephende: Ha shumi, ha luki tshithu." 
Matthew6:29 Hone ndi a ni vhudza ndi ri: Solomoni na madzanga awe ho ngo vhuya a ḓiṱama u swika kha ḽiṅwe ḽao. 
Matthew6:30 Arali hatsi vhune ṋamusi ha titima mudavhini matshelo ha vha ho no kudzwa tshivhasoni Mudzimu a tshi vhu ṱama nga u rali, inwi a nga kundwa ngani u ni ṱama? Fulufhelo ḽaṋu ḽo ṱukufhala hani." 
Matthew6:31 Izwo ni songo tsha ṱolou ḽa mbilu na ri ri ḓo ḽani? ri ḓo nwani? ri ḓo ambarani? 
Matthew6:32 Hezwo zwoṱhe ndi zwine zwa vhilaelwa nga vhannḓa. Hufha Khotsi aṋu wa ṱaḓulu a tshi zwi ḓivha uri hezwo zwoṱhe ni a zwi lila. 
Matthew6:33 Tsha u thoma lusani u vhuswa nga Mudzimu na u ita zwine a funa, hezwo zwiṅwe zwoṱhe ni ḓo tou ingwa." 
Matthew6:34 Izwo ni songo tsha ḽa mbilu nga zwa matshelo; ḽa matshelo ḽi ḓo ḓiḽela mbilu ḽone ḽiṋe; khombo yo livhana na musi wayo. 
Matthew7:1 “Ni songo haṱula vhaṅwe, ndi hone Mudzimu a sa nga ni haṱuli." 
Matthew7:2 Khaṱhulo ine na haṱula vhaṅwe ngayo na inwi Mudzimu u ḓo ni haṱula ngayo; muelo une na elela vhaṅwe ngawo, na inwi Mudzimu u ḓo ni elela ngawo." 
Matthew7:3 Khezwi u tshi kona u vhona lufhanza lu re iṱoni ḽa muṅwe, ngeno danda ḽi re iṱoni ḽau u sa ḽi londi?" 
Matthew7:4 Nṋa u nga amba hani na muṅwe wa ri, ‘Litshani ndi bvise lufhanza lu re iṱoni ḽaṋu,’ ngeno iwe u na danda iṱoni ḽau?" 
Matthew7:5 Muhoi ndiwe! Thoma u bvisa danda ḽi re iṱoni ḽau, ndi hone u tshi ḓo kona u vhona zwavhuḓi u tshi bvisa lufhanza lu re iṱoni ḽa muṅwe." 
Matthew7:6 “Zwikhethwa ni songo zwi ṋea dzimmbwa, dzi sa ḓo ni vutshela dza ni huvhadza; na nungu dzaṋu ni songo dzi posa nguluvhe, dzi sa ḓo sokou dzi kandekanya." 
Matthew7:7 “Ni ḓi dzula ni tshi humbela, ni ḓo ṋewa; ṱoḓani, ni ḓo wana; khokhonyani, ni ḓo vulelwa vothi." 
Matthew7:8 Ane a dzula a tshi humbela, Mudzimu u ḓo vhuya a mu fha; ane a ṱoḓa u ḓo wana; ane a khokhonya u ḓo vhuya a vulelwa vothi." 
Matthew7:9 Ndi nnyi ane ṅwana wawe a tshi mu humbela vhurotho a mu fha tombo," 
Matthew7:10 kana a tshi mu humbela khovhe a mu fha ṋowa? 
Matthew7:11 Arali inwi na vhuvhi háṋu ni tshi kona u ṋea vhana vhaṋu zwivhuya, Khotsi aṋu wa ṱaḓulu a nga kundwa ngani u ṋea zwivhuya vha mu humbelaho?" 
Matthew7:12 “Zwoṱhe zwine na funa vhaṅwe vha tshi ni ita, na inwi ni vha ite zwenezwo. Ndi hone no khunyeledza Mulayo na Maṅwalo a vhaporofita." 
Matthew7:13 “Dzhenani nga khoro tsekene; nḓila i yaho hune wa lovha yo aṱama, na khoro ya hone ndi khulwane, ndi vhanzhi vhane vha dzhena ngayo." 
Matthew7:14 Nḓila i yaho vhutshiloni ndi tsekene-tsekene, na khoro yayo ndi ṱhukhu, vhane vha i wana a si vhanzhi." 
Matthew7:15 “Thanyelani vhaporofita vha khole-khole vhane vha ḓa kha inwi vho fuka mikumba ya nngu, ngeno nga ngomu havho vhe maṱalerwa a ni pondaho." 
Matthew7:16 Ni ḓo vha ḓivha nga mitshelo yavho. A ri fuli nḓirivhe kha muunga; mahuyu ri a wana kha mutshetshete na? 
Matthew7:17 Muri wavhuḓi u aṋwa mitshelotshelo, u vhavhaho wa aṋwa mitshelo i kalakataho." 
Matthew7:18 Muri wavhuḓi a u aṋwi mitshelo i kalakataho, zwi ḓi nga muri u vhavhaho u sa aṋwi mitshelo i ḓifhaho." 
Matthew7:19 Muri muṅwe na muṅwe u sa aṋwi mitshelo i ḓifhaho u a remiwa wa kudzwa muliloni. 
Matthew7:20 Izwo-ha ni ḓo vha ḓivha nga mitshelo yavho. 
Matthew7:21 “A si uri vhoṱhe vhane vha tshi nnyamba vha ri, ‘Muṋe washu! Muṋe washu!’ vha ḓo dzhena muvhusoni wa Mudzimu, hu ḓo dzhena vhane vha ita zwine Khotsi anga wa ṱaḓulu a zwi funa." 
Matthew7:22 Ndi vhanzhi vhane vha ḓo amba na Nṋe nga heḽo ḓuvha vha ri, ‘Muṋe washu! Muṋe washu! A ro ngo porofita nga dzina ḽau naa? A ro ngo pandela thuṅwa nga dzina ḽau naa? A ro ngo ita maḓembe mahulu nga dzina ḽau naa?’" 
Matthew7:23 Nda konou amba navho nda vha fhedzela nda ri, ‘A tho ngo vhuya nda ni ḓivha; ṱuwani afha phanḓa hanga inwi vhadziautshinya!’" 
Matthew7:24 “Zwenezwo onoyo ane a pfa maipfi anga haya a ya a zwi ita, u fana na muthu wa vhuṱali ane a fhaṱa nnḓu yawe kha lutombo." 
Matthew7:25 Mvula ya na, milambo ya ḓala, maḓumbu a vhudzula, a thudza iḽa nnḓu i si we, ngauri yo vha yo tewa kha lutombo." 
Matthew7:26 Hone ane a pfa maipfi anga haya a si zwi ite, u fana na muthu wa tsilu we a fhaṱa nnḓu yawe muṱavhani;" 
Matthew7:27 mvula ya na, milambo ya ḓala, maḓumbu a vhudzula a thudza iḽa nnḓu, ya mbo fhasi huru.”" 
Matthew7:28 Musi Yesu o fhedza u amba, vhathu vha kanuka pfunzo yawe," 
Matthew7:29 ngauri o vha a sa funzi sa vhaḓivhi vha Mulayo, o vha a a tshi pfala e Muṋe wa mafhungo." 
Matthew8:1 Yesu a tshi tsa thavha a tevhelwa nga vhathu vhanzhi-vhanzhi. 
Matthew8:2 Ha ḓa munna a lwalaho vhulwadze ha lukanda vhu no kumadza muthu, a gwadamela Yesu a ri, “Muṋe wanga, hufha vhe na maanḓa a u mphodza; a thi fhodzwi-vho?”" 
Matthew8:3 Yesu a isa tshanḓa tshawe a mu kwama a ri, “Nazwino fholani zwaṋu.” A mbo ḓi fhola na zwenezwo." 
Matthew8:4 Yesu a amba nae a ri, “Ni songo vhuya na zwi vhudza muthu; ni mbo ḓi ya ha tshifhe uri a ni vhone, ni konou ṋekedza nduvho yo laedzwaho nga Mushe, uri vhu vhe vhuṱanzi ha u vha rovhedza.”" 
Matthew8:5 Musi Yesu a tshi swika Kapernaumi ha ḓa mulangagomane, onoyo a mu kwengweledza" 
Matthew8:6 a ri, “Muṋe wanga, ndi na mushumi hayani a no khou lwala o no koḓea na miraḓo; u khou tou shengela.”" 
Matthew8:7 Yesu a ri, “Ndi zwone, ndi ḓo ṱuwa na inwi nda mu fhodza.”" 
Matthew8:8 Mulangagomane a fhindula a ri, “Muṋe wanga, a tho ngo vhuya nda fanela na u vha swielela nḓuni yanga; kha vha tou amba ipfi ḽithihi fhedzi mushumi wanga a konou fhola." 
Matthew8:9 Ndi amba ngauri na nṋe ndi fhano ndi muthu a langwaho, hone ndi ḓi vha-vho na maswole a re fhasi hanga ane nda a langa. Nda vhudza uno nda ri, ‘Ṱuwa!’ u a ṱuwa; nda vhudza uḽa nda ri, ‘Iḓa!’ u a ḓa; phuli yanga nda i vhudza nda ri, ‘Ita hetshi!’ i a tshi ita.”" 
Matthew8:10 Yesu a tshi pfa zwenezwo a kanuka a amba na vhathu vha khou mu tevhelaho a ri, “Zwino ipfani-ha: na Muisraele a thi athu ṱangana nae a re na fulufhelo ḽingafha." 
Matthew8:11 Ndi zwine nda ri hu ḓo ḓa vhanzhi vha tshi bva thungo dza vhubvaḓuvha na vhukovhela, vha dzula munyanyani muvhusoni wa Mudzimu na Abrahamu na Isaka na Jakopo," 
Matthew8:12 vhaḽa vhe muvhuso wa thoma u ḓela vhone, vha laṱwa nnḓa swiswini hune vha ḓo tshema vha ita na u shenganya maṋo nga u pfa vhuṱungu.”" 
Matthew8:13 Ndi hone Yesu a tshi amba na uyo mulangagomane a ri, “Kha vha ṱuwe zwavho; nga zwi itee nga he vha fulufhela.” Mushumi a mbo ḓi fhola nga tshifhinga tshenetsho." 
Matthew8:14 Musi Yesu a tshi swika hayani ha Pitrosi a wana makhulutshisadzi wawe vhe thovhoni, muvhili u tshi tou duga woṱhe." 
Matthew8:15 A vha fara nga tshanḓa vha mbo ḓi fhola, vha konou vuwa vha mu bikela." 
Matthew8:16 Ḓuvha ḽi tshi vho kovhela vha mu ḓisela vhathu vhanzhi vhe vha vha vhe na thuṅwa dza Saṱhane, a dzi pandela nga u tou amba ipfi fhedzi, a fhodza na vhoṱhe vhe vha vha vha khou lwala." 
Matthew8:17 O zwi ita uri hu khunyelele ḽo ambiwaho nga muporofita Yesaya a tshi ri, “Ene o ḓihwesa maṱungu ashu; a hwala malwadze ashu.”" 
Matthew8:18 Yesu a tshi vhona mavhuthu o mu tangaho a vhudza vhafunziwa vhawe uri vha wetshele seli na luḽa lwa dzivha. 
Matthew8:19 Ndi hone muṅwe muḓivhi wa Mulayo a tshi ḓa khae a ri, “Vhafunzi, nṋe ndi ḓo vha tevhela hoṱhe hune vha ya.”" 
Matthew8:20 Yesu a mu fhindula a ri, “Phunguhwe dzi na milindi, na zwiṋoni zwi na zwiṱaha; a nga vha Mubebwa-nga-muthu ha na ha u siamedza ṱhoho a lala.”" 
Matthew8:21 Muṅwe-vho we a vha e mufunziwa wawe a amba nae a ri, “Kha vha litshe ndi range u swiṱa khotsi anga.”" 
Matthew8:22 Hone Yesu a mu fhindula a ri, “Inwi ni mbo ḓi ḓa zwino ni vhe mufunziwa wanga, ni litshe vhafu vha swiṱane nga tshavho.”" 
Matthew8:23 Yesu a dzhena tshikepeni, vhafunziwa vhawe vha mu tevhela." 
Matthew8:24 Ha mbo vuwa ḓumbu ḽihulu dzivhani, lwe tshikepe tsha ṱoḓou tibedzwa nga magabelo. Huno Yesu o vha o eḓela." 
Matthew8:25 Vhafunziwa vha ḓa khae vha mu vusa vha ri, “Muṋe washu, ndi hone ro lovha! Kha vha ri tshidze!”" 
Matthew8:26 Ene a vha fhindula a ri, “Ni khou ofhani, inwi ni re na fulufhelo ḽiṱuku?” Ndi hone a tshi vuwa, a kaidza maḓumbu na lwanzhe, zwa mbo ḓi dzika, ha tou dzokoto." 
Matthew8:27 Vhathu vha tshi zwi vhona vha kanuka vha ri, “Nṋa ndi muthu-ḓe uyu ane a ri u kaidza maḓumbu na magabelo zwa mu thetshelesa?”" 
Matthew8:28 Vha tshi dovha u wetshela seli, shangoni ḽa Vhagadara, Yesu a ṱangana na vhanna vhavhili vha na thuṅwa dza Saṱhane vha tshi khou bva zwaloni, vha tshi ofhisa lwe ha sa vhe na muthu ane a nga kona u fhira nga heyo nḓila." 
Matthew8:29 Vhenevho vha ṱavha mukosi vha ri, “Iwe Murwa wa Mudzimu, u ṱoḓani kha riṋe? Kani-ha wo ḓa fhano u ri shengedza tshifhinga tshi sa athu swika?”" 
Matthew8:30 Zwino nga ngei thungo ho vha hu na sambi ḽihulu ḽa nguluvhe dzi tshi khou fundudza-fundudza. 
Matthew8:31 Thuṅwa dza humbela Yesu dza ri, “Arali u tshi ri thatha kha ri ruṅwe zwashu henefho sambini ḽa nguluvhe.”" 
Matthew8:32 A dzi tendela a ri, “Iyani.” Dza mbo ḓi bva kha vhaḽa vhanna dza dzhena nguluvheni; zwi tshi ralo sambi ḽoṱhe ḽa mbo ḓi gidimela luwani dza wela dzivhani ha vha u nwela khothe." 
Matthew8:33 Vhalisa vhadzo vha shavhela muḓini, vha anḓadza zwoṱhe zwe zwa itea na zwa vhaḽa vhe vha vha vhe na thuṅwa." 
Matthew8:34 Ndi hone muḓi woṱhe u tshi bva vha ya ha Yesu, vha tshi ṱangana nae vha mu rabeledza uri a ṱuwe shangoni ḽavho." 
Matthew9:1 Yesu a dzhena tshikepeni a wetshela seli na luḽa lwa dzivha, a swika muḓini wa hawe." 
Matthew9:2 E henefho vhathu vha ḓisa munna o omaho miraḓo, o ladzwa kha hingo. Yesu a tshi vhona fulufhelo ḽavho a amba na uyo o omaho miraḓo a ri, “Rudzani mbilu ṅwananga, no hangwelwa vhutshinyi.”" 
Matthew9:3 Vhaṅwe vha vhaḓivhi vha Mulayo vha tshi zwi pfa vha ambela mbiluni dzavho vha ri, “Hoyu munna u khou tamba nga dzina ḽa Mudzimu.”" 
Matthew9:4 Yesu nga u ḓivha mihumbulo yavho a ri, “Khezwi ni tshi elekanya mavhi mbiluni dzaṋu?" 
Matthew9:5 Tshi leluwaho kha hezwi zwivhili ndi tshifhio? Ndi u ri, ‘No hangwelwa vhutshinyi haṋu,’ kana ndi u ri, ‘Takuwani ni tshimbile’?" 
Matthew9:6 Hone Nṋe ndi ḓo ni sumbedza uri Mubebwa-nga-muthu u na maanḓa a u hangwela muthu vhutshinyi fhano fhasi.” Ndi hone a tshi vhudza uḽa munna o omaho miraḓo a ri, “Takuwani zwaṋu ni hwale hingo ḽaṋu ni ye hayani.”" 
Matthew9:7 Uḽa munna a mbo ḓi takuwa a ya hayani. 
Matthew9:8 Vhathu vho kuvhanganaho vha tshi zwi vhona vha ofha, vha renda Mudzimu we a ṋea muthu maanḓa mangafhongafho." 
Matthew9:9 Yesu a tshi fhirela phanḓa a vhona muṅwe munna wa muthelisi a no pfi Matiosi o dzula ofisini yawe, a amba nae a ri, “Kha ri ṱuwe roṱhe ni vhe mufunziwa wanga.” A mbo ḓi takuwa a mu tevhela." 
Matthew9:10 Zwino musi Yesu o dzula nḓuni ya Matiosi vha tshi khou ḽa, ha ḓa vhaṅwe vhathelisi vhanzhi na vhatshinyi, vha ḽa na Yesu na vhafunziwa vhawe." 
Matthew9:11 Vhafarisei vha tshi zwi vhona vha vhudza vhafunziwa vhawe vha ri, “Nṋa mufunzi waṋu u itelani a tshi ḽa na vhathelisi na vhatshinyi?”" 
Matthew9:12 Yesu a tshi zwi pfa a vha fhindula a ri, “Vhathu vha sa lwali a vha lili ṅanga; ṅanga i lilwa nga vhalwadze." 
Matthew9:13 Iyani ni yo guda uri zwi amba mini hu tshi pfi, ‘A thi ṱoḓi dzinduvho, ndi ṱoḓa muthu a tshi vha na mbilutshilidzi.’ Nṋe a tho ngo ḓela vhavhuya, ndo ḓela vhatshinyi.”" 
Matthew9:14 Ndi hone vhafunziwa vha Johanisi vha tshi ḓa ha Yesu vha ri, “Khezwi vhafunziwa vhavho vha sa ḓidzimi, ngeno riṋe na Vhafarisei ri tshi ṱolou ḓidzima?”" 
Matthew9:15 Yesu a vha fhindula a ri, “Nṋa ni vhona unga khonani dzi nga ḓa munyanyani wa mbingano dzi tshi ḓela u lila naa? Hufha mukwasha a tshee navho! Hone hu ḓo ḓa maḓuvha ane vha ḓo dzhielwa mukwasha wavho. Ndi hone vha tshi ḓo ḓidzima." 
Matthew9:16 A hu na muthu ane a haswa tshiambaro tsha kale nga sila ḽiswa ḽi sa athu huma, ngauri ḽi tshi vho huma ḽi ḓo kherula na tshiambaro, buli ḽa endelela." 
Matthew9:17 Nahone tuvhu ḽa waini a ḽi sheliwi mikhwamani ya mukumba wa kale, nga u ofha uri mikumba i nga balea musi ḽi tshi vhila, waini ya shuluwa, na mikhwama ya tshinyala. Tuvhu ḽi sheliwa mikhwamani miswa, zwa vhulungea zwoṱhe.”" 
Matthew9:18 Yesu a tshi kha ḓi amba eneo, muṅwe muhulwane a ḓa khae a mu gwadamela a ri, “Ṅwananga wa musidzana u kha ḓi bva u tshinyala. Naho zwo ralo, nga vha ḓe vha mu vhee zwanḓa; u ḓo dovha a tshila.”" 
Matthew9:19 Yesu a takuwa a ṱuwa nae e na vhafunziwa vhawe. 
Matthew9:20 Vhe nḓilani ha ḓa musadzi we a vha o no fhedza miṅwaha ya 12 e na vhulwadze ha u ṱamba a sa gumi, a ḓa nga murahu ha Yesu a kwama shaphu ḽa nguvho yawe," 
Matthew9:21 ngauri o vha o humbula a ri, “Nangwe nda tou kwama nguvho yawe zwayo, ndi ḓo fhola.”" 
Matthew9:22 Yesu a mbo ḓi rembuluwa a mu vhona a ri, “Rudzani mbilu ṅwananga; fulufhelo ḽaṋu ḽo ni tshidza.” Uḽa musadzi a mbo ḓi fhola na zwenezwo." 
Matthew9:23 Zwino Yesu a tshi vho swika nḓuni ya uḽa muhulwane, a tshi vhona vhalidzi vha dziṋanga na vhathu vhoṱhe vho kuvhanganaho vha tshi khou ṱavha mikosi," 
Matthew9:24 a amba navho a ri, “Ibvani zwaṋu; ṅwana ho ngo fa o tou eḓela.” Vhathu vha mu nzhonzhowedza." 
Matthew9:25 Hone Yesu a vha thathela nnḓa vhoṱhe, a dzhena nḓuni a fara tshanḓa tsha musidzana uḽa o faho, musidzana a dovha a tshila." 
Matthew9:26 Zwe Yesu a ita zwa pfala shangoni ḽeneḽo ḽoṱhe. 
Matthew9:27 Yesu a tshi fhirela phanḓa a tevhelwa nga vhanna vhavhili vha mabofu vha tshi khou ṱavha mukosi vha tshi ri, “Murwa Dafita, a ri khathutshelwi-vho na?”" 
Matthew9:28 Musi a tshi dzhena nḓuni aḽa mabofu a sendela. Yesu a vha vhudzisa a ri, “Nṋa ni a tenda uri ndi na maanḓa a u ni fhodza?” Vha fhindula vha ri, “Ri a tenda Muṋe washu.”" 
Matthew9:29 Ndi hone Yesu a tshi kwama maṱo avho a ri, “Nga hu itee zwenezwo zwine na fulufhela.”" 
Matthew9:30 Maṱo avho a mbo ḓi vhona. Ndi hone Yesu a tshi vha laya o tou halifha a ri, “Ni khou vhona: hezwi zwi songo vhuya zwa ḓivhiwa nga muthu na muthihi!”" 
Matthew9:31 Hone vhone vho ri u bva henefho vha mbo ḓi yo anḓadza mafhungo ayo shangoni ḽeneḽo ḽoṱhe. 
Matthew9:32 Musi vhaḽa vha tshi khou ṱuwa ha ḓiswa ha Yesu tshimuma tshe tsha vha tshi na thuṅwa ya Saṱhane. 
Matthew9:33 A i pandela, tshimuma tsha mbo ḓi amba. Vhathu vha kanuka vha ri, “A hu athu vhuya ha vhonwa zwi no nga hezwi kha ḽa Israele.”" 
Matthew9:34 Hone Vhafarisei vha ri, “U pandela thuṅwa nga maanḓa e a ṋewa nga khosi yadzo.”" 
Matthew9:35 Yesu a mbo tshimbila na miḓi yoṱhe na dziḓorobo, a tshi enda a tshi funza sinagogoni, a tshi ḓivhadza mafhungo maḓifha a muvhuso wa Mudzimu, a tshi fhodza malwadze oṱhe na maṱungu oṱhe." 
Matthew9:36 A tshi vhona magogo a vhathu a vha pfela vhuṱungu, ngauri vho vha vha tshi fana na nngu dzi si na mulisa, dzo no hanganea dzo ṱovhowa." 
Matthew9:37 Ndi hone a tshi vhudza vhafunziwa vhawe a ri, “Khaṋo ndi khulu, vhakaṋi ndi vha si gathi." 
Matthew9:38 Humbelani-ha Muṋe wa tsimu uri a rume vhakaṋi tsimuni yawe.” 
Matthew10:1 Yesu o vhuya a vhidza vhafunziwa vhawe vha 12, a vha fha maanḓa a u pandela thuṅwa dza Saṱhane na u fhodza malwadze oṱhe na maṱungu oṱhe." 
Matthew10:2 Madzina a vhaapostola vha 12 ngea: Wa u thoma ndi Simoni ane ḽiṅwe a pfi Pitrosi, ha tevhela Andrisi murathu wawe; ha tevhela Jakopo ṅwana wa Zebedia na Johanisi murathu wawe," 
Matthew10:3 na Filipi, na Batholomio, na Thomasi, na Matiosi uḽa wa muthelisi, na Jakopo ṅwana wa Alifiosi, na Thadiosi," 
Matthew10:4 na Simoni Muhali-wa-Mudzimu, na Judasi Iskariote we a vho ḓo fheṱa Yesu." 
Matthew10:5 Vhenevho vha 12 Yesu a vha ruma o vha laya a ri, “Ni songo ṱutshela thungo dza vhannḓa; ni songo dzhena miḓini ya Vhasamaria;" 
Matthew10:6 tshaṋu ni ye ni yo ṱoḓa Vhaisraele, nngu dza Mudzimu dzo xelaho." 
Matthew10:7 Tshimbilani ni tshi ḓivhadza vhathu ni ri, ‘Tshifhinga tsho sendela tsha uri ni vhuswe nga Mudzimu.’" 
Matthew10:8 Fhodzani vhalwadze, ni vuse vhafu, ni fhodze na vha lwalaho lukanda, ni pandele na thuṅwa dza Saṱhane. No zwi ṋewa nga fhedzi, inwi-vho ni zwi ṋee vhaṅwe nga fhedzi." 
Matthew10:9 “Ni songo tshimbila no fara tshelede tshikwamani, ya musuku kana ya siliva naho i ya musina zwayo." 
Matthew10:10 Na mukhwama wa mbuvha ni songo ṱuwa nawo, na hemmbe ya vhuvhili, kana zwienda kana lubaḓa. Mushumi u fanelwa nga u vhavhalelwa." 
Matthew10:11 “Musi ni tshi swika muḓini kana ḓoroboni ṱhukhu, ni ṱoḓe o teaho u ni swielela, ni dzule henefho ni vhuye ni fhire." 
Matthew10:12 Ni tshi dzhena nḓuni ni ri, ‘Mulalo!’" 
Matthew10:13 Arali muṱa wonoyo wo tewa nga mulalo, nangoho u ḓo vha na mulalo. Arali u songo tewa, mulalo kha u humele kha inwi." 
Matthew10:14 Hune vha si ni ṱanganedze, vha si thetshelese maipfi aṋu, ni bve nḓuni yeneyo na muḓini wonoyo, ni ite na u fhufhura buse milenzheni yaṋu." 
Matthew10:15 Thetshelesani ndi ni vhudze: Nga ḓuvha ḽa khaṱhulo zwine zwa ḓo wela vhathu vha muḓi hoyo zwi ḓo vhavha u fhira na zwi no ḓo wela vha Sodoma na Gomora.” 
Matthew10:16 “Vhonani: ndi ni ruma sa nngu maṱalerwani. Zwino-ha thanyani sa dziṋowa ni ile tshimbevha sa maivha. 
Matthew10:17 Ni thanyele vhathu: vha ḓo ni khwikhwidzela khoroni dza Majuda; vha ḓo ni rwa sinagogoni dzavho," 
Matthew10:18 vha ni hwala vha yo ni hwelela kha vhavhusi na mahosi nge na vha vhanga, uri ni vhe ṱhanzi dzanga khavho na kha vhannḓa." 
Matthew10:19 Hone musi vha tshi ni hwelela ni songo ḽa mbilu nga zwine na ḓo amba. Zwine na ḓo amba ni ḓo ṋewa tshenetsho tshifhinga. 
Matthew10:20 A si inwi ni ambaho, ndi Muya wa Khotsi aṋu ane a amba e ngomu haṋu." 
Matthew10:21 “Zwi tshi ralo vhana vha munna vha ḓo hwelelana uri vha vhulahisane; khotsi u ḓo hwelela ṅwana wawe; vhana vha ḓo vutshela vhabebi vhavho vha vha vhulahisa. 
Matthew10:22 Tshakha dzoṱhe dzi ḓo ni vhenga nge na vha vhanga. Hone ane a ḓo konḓelela a sa litshi ndi ene ane a ḓo tshidzwa. 
Matthew10:23 Musi vha tshi ni tovhola muḓini uno ni shavhele kha muṅwe. Asizwi: Mubebwa-nga-muthu a tshi swika u ḓo wana ni sa athu ṱanganya miḓi ya Israele. 
Matthew10:24 “Mufunziwa ha fhiri mufunzi wawe; zwi ḓi nga mushumi a sa fhiri muṋe wawe. 
Matthew10:25 Mufunziwa nga a fushee zwawe nga u tou lingana na mufunzi wawe; mushumi a fushee nga u lingana zwawe na muṋe wawe. Arali Nṋe muṋe wa nnḓu vho nnyita Belesebulu, vha nga kundwa ngani u ralo-vho na vhafunziwa vhanga?" 
Matthew10:26 “Vhunga zwo ralo ni songo ofha: A hu na tsho tibwaho tshine tsha sa ḓo tibulwa; a hu na tshiphiri tshine tsha sa ḓo ḓihwa nga vhathu. 
Matthew10:27 Zwine nda ni vhudza swiswini inwi ni zwi ambe tshedzani; zwe nda ni hevhedza ro dzumbama ni zwi huwelele vhukati ha vhathu. 
Matthew10:28 “Ni songo ofha vhane vha ri u vhulaha muvhili vha si tsha kona u vhulaha na muya. Ofhani Mudzimu; ndi Ene ane a kona u lozwa muya wa muthu khathihi na muvhili heleni. 
Matthew10:29 “Kani-ha ṱhongola mbili a dzi rengwi nga sente? Naho zwo ralo a hu na na nthihi yadzo ine ya ḓo wela fhasi arali Khotsi aṋu a sa zwi funi. 
Matthew10:30 Zwino inwi hufha na mavhudzi a ṱhohoni dzaṋu Mudzimu o dzula o a vhala. 
Matthew10:31 Zwenezwo ni songo ofha tshithu. Hufha ni tshi fhira ṱhongola kule. 
Matthew10:32 “Ane a si ofhe u ḓibula vhathuni uri ndi wanga, na Nṋe ndi ḓo bula khoroni ya Khotsi anga wa ṱaḓulu uri uyo muthu ndi wanga." 
Matthew10:33 Hone ane a ḓo nndandula nga u ofha vhathu, Nṋe-vho ndi ḓo mu landula khoroni ya Khotsi anga wa ṱaḓulu." 
Matthew10:34 “Ni songo ri ndo ḓela u ladza shango; a tho ngo ḓela u ladza shango, ndo ḓisa pfumo!" 
Matthew10:35 Ndo ḓa “ ‘u luṱanya khotsi na ṅwana, ṅwananyana na mme, mazwale na mazwale." 
Matthew10:36 Muthu u ḓo itwa swina nga vha muṱa wawe.’ ” 
Matthew10:37 “Ane a funa khotsi kana mme awe u fhira Nṋe, ho ngo fanela u vha wanga. Ane a funa ṅwana wawe u fhira Nṋe, ho ngo fanela u vha wanga." 
Matthew10:38 Ane a sa hwale tshifhambano tshawe a ntevhela, ho ngo fanela u vha wanga." 
Matthew10:39 Ane a teledza u ṅaledza vhutshilo hawe u a ḓilozwa; ane a fela Nṋe ndi ene ane a tshila. 
Matthew10:40 “Ane a ni swielela u swielela Nṋe, ane a ntswielela u swielela o nthumaho." 
Matthew10:41 Ane a swielela muporofita nge onoyo a vha muporofita u ḓo wana pfufho ya muporofita; ane a swielela muvhuya nge onoyo a vha muvhuya u ḓo wana pfufho ya muvhuya. 
Matthew10:42 “Ane a vhuya a fha muṅwe wa havha vhaṱuku naho i khavho zwayo ya maḓi a rotholaho nga u vhona e mufunziwa wanga – thetshelesani ndi ni vhudze: ha nga kundwi u wana zwo mu fanelaho.” 
Matthew11:1 Yesu a ri u fhedza u laya vhafunziwa vhawe vha 12, a fhirela phanḓa u funza na u ḓivhadza mafhungo a Mudzimu miḓini." 
Matthew11:2 Musi Johanisi e dzhele a pfa zwe Yesu a vha a tshi ita, a ruma vhafunziwa vhawe uri vha mu vhudzise" 
Matthew11:3 vha ri, “Nṋa ndi vhone vhe vha pfi vha ḓo ḓa, kana ri lindele muṅwe zwashu?”" 
Matthew11:4 Yesu a vha fhindula a ri, “Iyani ni vhudze Johanisi zwine na zwi pfa na zwine na zwi vhona:" 
Matthew11:5 mabofu a vho vhona; zwihole zwi vho tshimbila; vha lwalaho lukanda vha khou fhodzwa; madzinganḓevhe a vho pfa; vhafu vha khou vuswa; vhashai vha khou funzwa mafhungo maḓifha. 
Matthew11:6 U na mashudu ane a sa khukhulisee nga Nṋe.” 
Matthew11:7 Vhaḽa vho no ṱuwa Yesu a thoma u amba na vhathu nga Johanisi a ri, “No vha no yo vhona mini phangani? No vha no yo vhona luṱanga lu dzinginyiswaho nga muya na?" 
Matthew11:8 Ndi ri no vha no yo vhona mini? No vha no yo vhona muthu o ambaraho nguvho dza maṱeleṱele naa? Atsina vho ambaraho nguvho dza maṱeleṱele vha wanala misanda. 
Matthew11:9 Ndi khou ri no vha no yo vhona mini? No vha ni songo ya u vhona muporofita naa? Ee! Nazwino Nṋe ndi ri no vha no yo vhona ane a fhira muporofita. 
Matthew11:10 Maṅwalo a amba ene Johanisi a tshi ri, “ ‘Muḓinḓa wanga ngoyu-ha; ndi khou mu ruma phanḓa hau uri a u lugisele nḓila.’" 
Matthew11:11 “Zwino ipfani-ha: A hu athu vhuya ha bebwa muthu ane a fhira Johanisi Mulovhedzi, ngeno Johanisi a tshi fhiriwa na nga muṱukuṱuku muvhusoni wa Mudzimu." 
Matthew11:12 “Hone tshee Johanisi Mulovhedzi a ḓa u swika zwino muvhuso wa Mudzimu u khou ḓa nga maanḓa mahulu, huno vhane vha dzhena khawo ndi vhane vha tou lwisa." 
Matthew11:13 Vhaporofita vhoṱhe vho vha vha tshi ḓi porofita, na Mulayo u tshi ralo, u vhuya u guma nga Johanisi." 
Matthew11:14 Zwino arali ni tshi nga zwi tenda, ndi khou ni vhudza ndi ri: Johanisi ndi ene Elia we a pfi u ḓo ḓa." 
Matthew11:15 A na nḓevhe kha a ḓipfele. 
Matthew11:16 “Nṋa vhathu vha musalauno ndi nga vha fanyisa na mini? Vha tou nga vhana vha vhidzelelanaho vhe makete 
Matthew11:17 vha tshi ri, “ ‘Ro ni lidzela ṋanga, na hana u tshina! Ra ni imbela lwa lufu, na hana u lila!’" 
Matthew11:18 “Johanisi o ḓa a ḓidzima, na waini a si nwe, vhone vha ri, ‘U na thuṅwa ya Saṱhane.’" 
Matthew11:19 Mubebwa-nga-muthu a ḓa; Ene o vha a tshi ḽa, a tshi nwa, vha dovha vha ri, ‘Vhonani uyu munna – u vhupangwa e vhudakwa, nahone a si u pfana hawe na vhathelisi na vhatshinyi!’ Hone vhuṱali ha Mudzimu vhu vhonala uri ndi ha ngoho nga zwine ha shuma.”" 
Matthew11:20 Ndi hone Yesu a tshi thoma u teketela miḓi ye a shuma khayo vhunzhi ha maḓembe awe, a i teketelela u sa laṱa vhuvhi hayo a ri," 
Matthew11:21 “U ḓo zwi vhona henewe Khorasini! U ḓo zwi vhona henewe Betsaida! Ngavhe maḓembe e a itwa kha inwi a vhe o itwa Tiro na Sidoni ndi musi vhathu vha hone vha tshi ḓo vha vho no laṱa vhuvhi havho kale, ndi musi vho no ambara madzanganda, vha ḓihasha milora nga u ḓisola." 
Matthew11:22 Ndi zwine nda ni vhudza nda ri: nga ḓuvha ḽa khaṱhulo ṱhamu ine na ḓo rwiwa ngayo i ḓo vhavha u fhira i no ḓo rwa Tiro na Sidoni. 
Matthew11:23 Iwe-vho Kapernaumi, u vhona unga u ḓo gagamiswa wa guma makoleni naa? Matsina u ḓo tou tsiselwa fhasi-fhasi dindini. Ngavhe maḓembe e a itwa kha inwi a vhe o itwa Sodoma, ndi musi u tshee wo ima na ṋamusi." 
Matthew11:24 Ndi zwine nda ni vhudza nda ri: nga ḓuvha ḽa khaṱhulo ṱhamu ine na ḓo rwiwa ngayo i ḓo vhavha u fhira i no ḓo rwa shango ḽa Sodoma.” 
Matthew11:25 Zwenezwo Yesu a thoma u amba a ri, “Ndi a u renda Khotsi, Iwe Muṋe wa ḽiṱaḓulu na ḽifhasi, ngauri hezwi zwithu wo zwi dzumbela vho funzwaho na vhaṱali wa zwi dzumbululela vhaṱoma." 
Matthew11:26 Iina Khotsi, iṱali wo vha wo ḓi zwi funa nga u ralo." 
Matthew11:27 “Khotsi anga o nkumedza zwithu zwoṱhe; a hu na ane a ḓivha Murwa arali e si Khotsi; nahone a hu na ane a ḓivha Khotsi arali e si Murwa, na onoyo ane Murwa a takalela u mu dzumbululela." 
Matthew11:28 “Iḓani ha Nṋe noṱhe ni lemelwaho no ziamedzwaho nga mihwalo, ndi ḓo ni rula." 
Matthew11:29 Ḓihweseni dzhogo yanga ni gude kha Nṋe; ndo vuḓa, ndi na mbilu ya u ḓiṱukufhadza; ndi hone ni tshi ḓo rudza mbilu." 
Matthew11:30 Dzhogo yanga a i gogoni, muhwalo wanga a u lemeli.”" 
Matthew12:1 Misi yeneyo Yesu a tshi khou fhira nga vhukati ha masimu a goroi nga Sabatha, vhafunziwa vhawe vha pfa nḓala vha thoma u ṱhukhula-ṱhukhula ṱhotshe dza goroi vha swoṱa vha ḽa." 
Matthew12:2 Vhafarisei vha tshi zwi vhona vha mu vhudza vha ri, “Kha vha vhone zwine vhafunziwa vhavho vha khou ita! Mulayo a u tendi zwi tshi itwa nga Sabatha.”" 
Matthew12:3 Yesu a vha fhindula a ri, “Kani-ha a ni athu vhala a Dafita na khonani dzawe musi vho farwa nga nḓala," 
Matthew12:4 a tshi dzhena nḓuni ya Mudzimu a ḽa vhurotho he ha vha ho sumelwa Mudzimu, ngeno Mulayo u sa tendi muthu a tshi ḽa musumo hoyo, na vhe vha vha vhe nae a u tendi vha tshi ḽa; hu ḽa vhotshifhe fhedzi?" 
Matthew12:5 Kani-ha a ni athu vhala Mulayoni uri nga Sabatha vhotshifhe vha a ḓi pfuka zwavho mulayo wa Sabatha thembeleni, zwi si vhe na mulandu?" 
Matthew12:6 Fhedzi ndi khou ni vhudza ndi ri: tshi fhiraho thembele tshi fhano. 
Matthew12:7 Hone ngavhe ni vhe no ḓivha uri zwi amba mini hu tshi pfi, ‘Thi ṱoḓi nduvho, ndi ṱoḓa muthu a tshi vha na mbilutshilidzi,’ ndi musi ni songo sola vhathu vha si na mulandu." 
Matthew12:8 Mubebwa-nga-muthu na yone Sabatha ndi Ene Muṋe wayo.” 
Matthew12:9 Yesu a fhirela phanḓa a dzhena sinagogoni. 
Matthew12:10 Henefho ho vha hu na munna o omaho tshanḓa. Vhafarisei vha tshi funa u hwelela Yesu vha mu vhudzisa vha ri, “Mulayo u a tenda muthu a tshi fhodzwa nga Sabatha naa?”" 
Matthew12:11 Hone Ene a vha fhindula a ri, “Ndi nnyi waṋu ane a ri nngu yawe nthihi fhedzi yo wela bidzini nga Sabatha a sa i ṋule?" 
Matthew12:12 Muthu ha fhiri nngu kani? Zwi amba uri Mulayo u a ri tendela u ita zwivhuya nga Sabatha.” 
Matthew12:13 Ndi hone Yesu a tshi amba na uyo munna o omaho tshanḓa a ri, “Onyolosani tshanḓa tshaṋu.” A mbo tshi onyolosa tsha vhuelela ngonani tsha fana na tshiṅwe." 
Matthew12:14 Zwo no ralo Vhafarisei vha mbo ḓi bva afho sinagogoni, vha yo ṱangana khoroni vha thoma u ita tshimbevha tsha u vhulaha Yesu." 
Matthew12:15 Hone Yesu nga u ḓivha uri vha khou ṱoḓa u mu vhulaha a ṱuwa afho fhethu, a tevhelwa nga vhathu vhanzhi, a vha fhodza vhoṱhe," 
Matthew12:16 a vha kaidza uri vha si vhudze muthu uri ndi Ene nnyi. 
Matthew12:17 A tshi ralo ho vha hu u khunyeledza zwo ambiwaho nga muporofita Yesaya a tshi ri," 
Matthew12:18 “Vhonani muḓinḓa wanga we nda mu nanga, mufunwa wanga ane a ntakadza. Ndi ḓo vhea Muya wanga khae, a konou ḓivhadza tshakha khaṱhulo mbuya." 
Matthew12:19 Ha nga lwi, ha nga iti phosho; a hu na ane a ḓo pfa ipfi ḽawe dzinḓilani." 
Matthew12:20 Luṱanga lwo piḓeaho ha nga lu vunḓi; luvhone lu taidzaho ha nga lu dzimi, a vhuye a ite uri vhathu vha tshile vha tshi londana." 
Matthew12:21 Vhannḓa vha ḓo lavhelela u ḓa hawe.” 
Matthew12:22 Zwenezwo vha mu ḓisela muthu wa bofu we a vha e tshimuma, e na thuṅwa ya Saṱhane. A mu fhodza, a vho kona u amba na u vhona." 
Matthew12:23 Vhathu vhoṱhe vha akhamala vha ri, “Nṋa uyu a si ene uḽa Murwa wa Dafita we a pfi u ḓo ḓa?”" 
Matthew12:24 Hone Vhafarisei vha tshi zwi pfa vha ri, “Hoyu munna u pandela thuṅwa nga maanḓa a Belesebulu khosi yadzo, a hu na zwiṅwe.”" 
Matthew12:25 Hone Yesu nga u ḓivha mihumbulo yavho a amba navho a ri, “Arali muvhuso wa ḓifhandekanya wa bva zwigwada zwivhili, zwa lwa nga tshazwo, tshawo ndi u wa. Arali muḓini kana nḓuni ha bva zwigwada zwivhili zwa lwa nga tshazwo, a zwi nga imi." 
Matthew12:26 Arali Saṱhane a tshi pandela Saṱhane zwi amba uri o no bva zwigwada zwivhili zwine zwa lwa nga tshazwo. Zwino muvhuso wawe u nga ima hani? 
Matthew12:27 “Arali Nṋe ndi tshi pandela thuṅwa nga maanḓa a Belesebulu, vhafunziwa vhaṋu vha dzi pandela nga maanḓa a nnyi? Ndi zwine vhenevho vha ḓo sumbedza uri zwine na amba a si zwone." 
Matthew12:28 “Hone vhunga zwi khagala uri Nṋe ndi pandela thuṅwa nga maanḓa a Muya wa Mudzimu, ndi tshiga tsha uri muvhuso wa Mudzimu wo swika kha inwi." 
Matthew12:29 “Ndi nnyi ane a nga sokou dzhena nḓuni ya munna wa vhuhali a kumba thundu yawe? U fanela u thoma u vhofha uyo muhali, ndi hone a tshi ḓo kona u mu ṱangula." 
Matthew12:30 “Muthu ane a sa ime na Nṋe u lwa na Nṋe; a sa kuvhanganyiho sambi na Nṋe u a ḽi fhaḓa. 
Matthew12:31 “Ndi zwine nda ni vhudza nda ri: muthu a nga hangwelwa vhutshinyi hoṱhe, naho a sasaladza Mudzimu. Hone ane a sasaladza Muya Mukhethwa a nga si hangwelwe." 
Matthew12:32 Na ane a amba Mubebwa-nga-muthu nga ḽivhi a nga kha ḓi hangwelwa. Hone ane a vhuya a nyefula Muya Mukhethwa, hu vhutshiloni vhuno, hu vhutshiloni vhu ḓaho, a nga si vhuye a hangwelwa." 
Matthew12:33 “Arali ni tshi ri muri ndi wavhuḓi, ni fanela u ḓi ralo na mitshelo yawo; arali ni tshi ri muri a si wavhuḓi, ni fanela u ḓi ralo-vho na mitshelo yawo. Hufha muri u tshi ḓivhiwa nga mitshelo yawo." 
Matthew12:34 “Dziṋowa ndinwi! Ni nga kona hani u amba zwivhuya ni vhavhi? Tshe mulomo wa amba ndi tshe mbilu ya amba. 
Matthew12:35 Muthu muvhuya u bvisa zwivhuya tshisikuni tsha mbilu yawe i re mbuya, muthu muvhi u ḓi bvisa-vho zwithu zwivhi tshisikuni tsha mbilu yawe mmbi." 
Matthew12:36 Ndi khou ni vhudza ndi ri: Nga ḓuvha ḽa khaṱhulo muthu u ḓo sengiselwa zwoṱhe zwe a sokou amba-amba. 
Matthew12:37 U ḓo vhofhololwa nga maipfi au, wa vhewa mulandu nga maipfi au.”" 
Matthew12:38 Ndi hone vhaṅwe vhaḓivhi vha Mulayo na Vhafarisei vha tshi amba nae vha ri, “Vhafunzi, kha vha ri itele maḓembe.”" 
Matthew12:39 Hone Ene a tshi vha fhindula a ri, “Vhane vha ṱoḓa maḓembe ndi vhathu vhavhi vho furalelaho Mudzimu. A vha tsha ḓo vhona maṅwe arali e si aḽa a muporofita Jonasi." 
Matthew12:40 Jonasi o fhedza maḓuvha mararu na vhusiku hao e thumbuni ya khovhe ya vhimbi, Mubebwa-nga-muthu u ḓo fhedza maḓuvha mararu na vhusiku hao e ngomu tshaloni nga u ralo." 
Matthew12:41 Nga ḓuvha ḽa khaṱhulo vhanna vha Ninive vha ḓo vuwa khathihi na vhathu vha musalauno vha vha rovhedza, ngauri vhone vho laṱa vhuvhi havho musi vho pfa Jonasi a tshi vha ḓivhadza mafhungo a Mudzimu, huno tshi fhiraho Jonasi tshi fhano." 
Matthew12:42 Nga ḓuvha ḽa khaṱhulo khosi ya musadzi i bvaho Tshipembe i ḓo ḓa khoroni u rovhedza vhathu vha musalauno, ngauri ene o tou tshimbila a zwi pfa a tshi bva vhusendekamisi a tshi yo pfa vhuṱali ha Solomoni. Zwino ipfani-ha: tshi fhiraho Solomoni tshi fhano." 
Matthew12:43 “Thuṅwa ya Saṱhane arali i tshi bva muthuni i buḓekanya masoga i tshi ṱoḓa ha u awela i si hu wane. 
Matthew12:44 Ya konou ri, ‘Ndi ḓo vhuelela nḓuni yanga ine nda bva khayo.’ I tshi swika ya wana uḽa muthu a tshi tou nga nnḓu i si na muthu, yo swielwa, na thundu dzo vhekanywa zwavhuḓi." 
Matthew12:45 Zwenezwo i mbo yo dzhia dziṅwe thuṅwa ṱhanu na mbili dza vhuhali u fhira yone, dza ḓa dza dzhena kha uyo muthu dza dzula khae, mafhungo a vho vhifha u fhira mulovha. Na kha vhathu vhavhi avha vha musalauno zwi ḓo ralo.”" 
Matthew12:46 Yesu a tshi kha ḓi amba na vhathu ha swika mme awe na vharathu vhawe, vha ima nnḓa vha tshi ṱoḓa u amba nae." 
Matthew12:47 Muṅwe a mu vhudza a ri, “Mme avho na vharathu vhavho khevho afha nnḓa vha khou ṱoḓa u amba navho.”" 
Matthew12:48 Hone Yesu a fhindula muthu o mu vhudzaho hezwo a ri, “Mme anga ndi nnyi? Vharathu vhanga ndi vhonnyi?”" 
Matthew12:49 A konou sumba vhafunziwa vhawe a ri, “Mme anga na vharathu vhanga ndi havha!" 
Matthew12:50 Ane a ita zwine Khotsi anga wa ṱaḓulu a zwi funa, ndi ene murathu wanga, ndi ene khaladzi anga, ndi ene mme anga.”" 
Matthew13:1 Nga ḽeneḽo ḓuvha Yesu a bva nḓuni, a dzula khunzikhunzini ya dzivha." 
Matthew13:2 Ha kuvhangana vhathu vhanzhi-vhanzhi vha tshi ṱoḓa u mu pfa, vha ḓala lwe a dzhena tshikepeni a dzula, a sia vhathu vhoṱhe vho ima khunzikhunzini." 
Matthew13:3 A vha vhudza zwithu zwinzhi nga zwifanyiso, a ri, “Ho vhuya ha vha na muṅwe munna we a bva a tshi yo zwala mbeu." 
Matthew13:4 A ri a tshi khou zwala iṅwe ya wela nḓilani, zwiṋoni zwa ḓa zwa i ḽa." 
Matthew13:5 Iṅwe ya wela kha lutombo he ha vha hu na mavu maṱukuṱuku. Yeneyo ya mela nga u ṱavhanya, ngauri mavu a hone o vha e si manzhi." 
Matthew13:6 Hone musi ḓuvha ḽi tshi ṱavha ḽa fhisa uyo mutomba wa mbo ḓi ṋoka, nge midzi ya vha i songo tsisa." 
Matthew13:7 Iṅwe ya wela mipfani, iyo mipfa i tshi mela ya i pwanyeledza." 
Matthew13:8 Hone iṅwe ya wela mavuni avhuḓi ya mela ya vhuya ya shela thoro; iṅwe ṱhotshe ya vha na thoro dza ḓana, iṅwe 60, iṅwe 30." 
Matthew13:9 A na nḓevhe nga a ḓipfele!” 
Matthew13:10 Vhafunziwa vhawe vha ḓa khae vha mu vhudzisa vha ri, “Ndi mini vha tshi amba navho nga zwifanyiso?”" 
Matthew13:11 A vha fhindula a ri, “Inwi no dzumbululelwa zwiphiri zwa muvhuso wa Mudzimu, hone vhaḽa a vho ngo dzumbululelwa." 
Matthew13:12 A re nazwo u ḓo dovha a engedzwa zwa ita na u fhalala, a si na u ḓo dovha a dzhielwa na zwiṱukuṱuku zwine a vha nazwo." 
Matthew13:13 Ndi zwone nda amba navho nga zwifanyiso, uri “ ‘naho vha sedza vha si vhone, naho vha thetshelesa vha si zwi pfe, vha si ṱalukanye tshithu.’ ”" 
Matthew13:14 Ndi hone hu tshi ḓo khunyelela vhuporofita ha Yesaya ha u ri, “ ‘Ni ḓo thetshelesa no thetshelesa ni si pfe; ni ḓo sedza no sedza ni si vhone." 
Matthew13:15 Ndi uri mihumbulo ya havha vhathu yo gomala, vha konyolela matanda nḓevheni, vha bonya na maṱo. Vha sa ralo maṱo avho a nga ḓo vhona, na nḓevhe dzavho dzi nga ḓo pfa, na mbilu dzavho dzi nga ḓo ṱalukanya, vha rembuluwa vha vhuelela kha Nṋe, Nṋe nda vho ḓo vha fhodza.’" 
Matthew13:16 “Hone inwi maṱo aṋu a na mashudu ngauri a a vhona, na nḓevhe dzaṋu dzi na mashudu ngauri dzi a pfa." 
Matthew13:17 Zwino ipfani-ha: ndi vhaporofita vhanzhi na vhavhuya vho tamaho u vhona zwine inwi na zwi vhona, fhedzi vha kundwa; na zwine na zwi pfa vho tama u zwi pfa, fhedzi vha kundwa." 
Matthew13:18 “Zwino ipfani zwine tshifanyiso tsha muzwali tsha amba: 
Matthew13:19 Ane a pfa mafhungo a muvhuso wa Mudzimu a si a ṱalukanye, ha ḓa Muvhi a tswa mbeu yo zwaliwaho mbiluni yawe – ndi ene ane a fanyisedzwa nga mbeu ye ya wela nḓilani." 
Matthew13:20 Ye ya ri i tshi zwalwa ya wela lukwarani zwi amba muthu ane a ri u pfa ipfi a mbo ḓi ḽi ṱanganedza nga mbilu tshena," 
Matthew13:21 hone vhunga hu si na hune ḽa nga ṱoka midzi khae, ha lengi u wa. A tshi vho ṱhuphelwa ipfi ḽa Mudzimu na u tovholelwa ḽone u mbo ḓi gunea na zwenezwo." 
Matthew13:22 He i tshi zwalwa ya wela vhukati ha mipfa, zwi amba uyo ane a ri o pfa ipfi ḽa Mudzimu ḽa pwanyeledzwa nga u vhilaela nga zwa vhutshilo na u xedzwa nga u funesa lupfumo, a si vhe na mitshelo." 
Matthew13:23 He i tshi zwalwa ya wela mavuni avhuḓi zwi amba uyo ane a ri u pfa ipfi ḽa Mudzimu a ḽi ṱalukanya, a ita na u aṋwa mitshelo. Muṅwe a aṋwa ḓana, muṅwe 60, muṅwe 30.”" 
Matthew13:24 A dovha a vha fanyisedzela nga tshiṅwe tshifanyiso a ri, “Muvhuso wa Mudzimu u fana na muthu we a zwala mbeu yavhuḓi tsimuni yawe;" 
Matthew13:25 hone musi vhathu vho eḓela ha ḓa swina ḽawe ḽa zwala mufhunga vhukati ha goroi ḽa dovha ḽa ṋenga. 
Matthew13:26 Goroi i tshi vho mela ya vhuya ya shela thoro ha konou vhonala na mufhunga. 
Matthew13:27 Ndi hone vhashumi vha muṋe wa tsimu vha tshi ḓa khae vha ri, ‘Thovhela, nṋa a vho ngo zwala mbeu yavhuḓi tsimuni yavho? Mufhunga uyu u nga vha u tshi bva ngafhi?’" 
Matthew13:28 Ene a vha fhindula a ri, ‘Hezwo zwi fanela u vha zwo itwa nga swina.’ Vhashumi vha ri, ‘Nṋa vha funa ri tshi ya ra u tupula?’" 
Matthew13:29 Ene a hana a ri, ‘Ni songo u tupula; ni nga ḓo ri ni tshi ṱahula mufhunga na tshenuwa no tupula na goroi." 
Matthew13:30 Zwi litsheni zwi aluwe zwoṱhe hu vhuye hu swike tshifhinga tsha khaṋo. Musi hu tshi swika khaṋo ndi ḓo vhudza vhakaṋi uri vha thome u kuvhanganya mufhunga vha u vhofhe madzanda uri u fhiswe, ndi hone vha tshi ḓo konou kuvhanganya goroi vha i vhea ḓuluni ḽanga.’ ”" 
Matthew13:31 A dovha a vha fanyisedzela nga tshiṅwe tshifanyiso a ri, “Muvhuso wa Mudzimu u fana na mbeu ya muhuyu ine muthu a dzhia a zwala tsimuni yawe." 
Matthew13:32 Huno naho i yone mbeu ṱhukhu kha dzoṱhe, i tshi vho mela i hula u fhira zwiṱaka zwoṱhe, wa ita muri muhulu lune na zwiṋoni zwa ḓa zwa fhaṱa zwiṱaha matavhini awo.”" 
Matthew13:33 A dovha a vha vhudza tshiṅwe tshifanyiso a ri, “Muvhuso wa Mudzimu u fana na mbilisa ine musadzi a i suka na vhukhopfu ludongo lwo ḓala, yone ya kukumusa uho vhukhopfu hoṱhe.”" 
Matthew13:34 Zwenezwo zwoṱhe Yesu o vhudza vhathu nga zwifanyiso; a hu na ḽe a vha vhudza a sa ambi nga tshifanyiso," 
Matthew13:35 hu u itela uri hu khunyelele ḽa muporofita a tshi ri, “Ndi ḓo thoma u amba, nda amba nga zwifanyiso, nda bula zwe zwa vha zwo dzumbama tshee shango ḽa tikwa.”" 
Matthew13:36 Ndi hone Yesu a tshi ri vhathu vha ṱuwe zwavho, Ene a dzhena nḓuni. Vhafunziwa vha konou ḓa khae vha mu humbela vha ri, “Kha vha ri ṱalutshedze tshifanyiso tsha mufhunga wo zwalwaho tsimuni.”" 
Matthew13:37 A vha fhindula a ri, “Ane a zwala mbeu yavhuḓi ndi Mubebwa-nga-muthu." 
Matthew13:38 Tsimu ndi shango. Mbeu yavhuḓi ndi vhalanda vha muvhuso wa Mudzimu. Mufhunga ndi vhalanda vha Muvhi. 
Matthew13:39 Swina ḽo u zwalaho ndi diabolo. Khaṋo ndi vhufhelo ha shango. Vhakaṋi ndi vharuṅwa. 
Matthew13:40 Unga mufhunga u tshi kuvhanganywa wa fhiswa nga mulilo, zwi ḓo ralo na nga ḓuvha ḽa vhufhelo ha shango:" 
Matthew13:41 Mubebwa-nga-muthu u ḓo ruma vharuṅwa vhawe, vha kuvhanganya vhakhakhisi vhoṱhe na vhaitazwivhi, vha vha bvisa muvhusoni wawe," 
Matthew13:42 vha vha posa ṋanḓoni ya mulilo. Henefho vhathu vha ḓo lila vha ita na u shenganya maṋo nga vhuṱungu. 
Matthew13:43 Nga heḽo ḓuvha vhavhuya vha ḓo penya sa ḓuvha muvhusoni wa Khotsi avho. A na nḓevhe nga a ḓipfele! 
Matthew13:44 “Muvhuso wa Mudzimu u fana na lupfumo lwo dzumbiwaho tsimuni lune muṅwe muthu a tshenuwa o lu wana, a dovha a lu dzumba henefho tsimuni, a takala lune a ya a rengisa thundu dzawe dzoṱhe a renga tsimu iyo." 
Matthew13:45 “Muvhuso wa Mudzimu wa dovha wa fana na muvhambadzi ane a enda a tshi ṱoḓa daimani dzavhuḓi," 
Matthew13:46 a ri a tshi wana iṅwe daimani ya thengo khulu a ṱuwa a yo rengisa thundu dzawe dzoṱhe a renga iyo daimani. 
Matthew13:47 “Muvhuso wa Mudzimu wa dovha wa fana na mambule ane a poswa lwanzheni ha fashwa khovhe dza tshakha-tshakha. 
Matthew13:48 Musi o ḓala, vharei vha a kokodzela khunzikhunzini vha dzula fhasi vha khethekanya dzavhuḓi vha dzi posa zwirunduni, dzi si dzavhuḓi vha dzi laṱa." 
Matthew13:49 Zwi ḓo tou ralo nga ḓuvha ḽa vhufhelo: Vharuṅwa vha ḓo ḓa vha khethekanya vhavhi na vhavhuya," 
Matthew13:50 vhavhi vha vha posa ṋanḓoni ya mulilo. Henefho vhathu vha ḓo lila vha ita na u shenganya maṋo nga vhuṱungu.” 
Matthew13:51 Ndi hone Yesu a tshi vha vhudzisa a ri, “Nṋa aya no a pfa oṱhe?” Vha fhindula vha ri, “Ro a pfa.”" 
Matthew13:52 A amba navho a ri, “Ndi zwine nda ri, ho no vha na vhaḓivhi vha Maṅwalo vhaṅwe vhane vha guda zwa u vhuswa nga Mudzimu; vhenevho vha fana na muṋe wa nnḓu ane a bvisa lupfumo luswa na lwa kale tshisikuni tshawe.”" 
Matthew13:53 Musi Yesu o fhedza zwifanyiso hezwo, a fhirela phanḓa." 
Matthew13:54 A swika muḓini wa hawe a vha funza sinagogoni yavho. Vhe vha pfa pfunzo yawe vha akhamala vha ri, “Nṋa vhuṱali uvhu na maḓembe aya o zwi wanafhi?" 
Matthew13:55 A si ene ṅwana wa uḽa muvhaḓi? Mme awe a si vhaḽa vha no pfi Vho-Maria? Vharathu vhawe a si Jakopo na Josefa na Simoni na Judasi? 
Matthew13:56 Khaladzi dzawe a ri nadzo henefhano dzoṱhe? Nṋa izwi zwithu zwoṱhe o zwi wanafhi?” 
Matthew13:57 Vha amba nga u ralo vha tshi tou mu nyefula. Hone Yesu a vha fhindula a ri, “Muporofita a nga huliswa hoṱhe-hoṱhe, fhedzi muḓini wa hawe na hayani hawe ha huliswi.”" 
Matthew13:58 A si tsha ita maḓembe manzhi henefho nge vha shaya lutendo. 
Matthew14:1 Zwenezwo khosi Herude a pfa bvumo ḽa Yesu," 
Matthew14:2 a amba na vhathu vha henefho musanda a ri, “Hoyu ndi Johanisi Mulovhedzi, o vuwa vhafuni, ndi zwine a kona u ita maḓembe mangafhangafha!”" 
Matthew14:3 Johanisi a tshi fa zwo ḓa nga nḓila hei: Herude o vha o ṱahisa Herudiasi musadzi wa mukomana wawe Filipi," 
Matthew14:4 zwino Johanisi a tshi ḓi ṱolou mu vhudza uri a zwo ngo fanela a tshi mu ṱahisa. Ndi hone Herude a tshi ri Johanisi a farwe a hoṋelwe dzhele. 
Matthew14:5 O vha a tshi funa u mu vhulaha, hone a ofha vhathu, ngauri vho vha vha tshi ḓivha Johanisi e muporofita." 
Matthew14:6 Hone ḽiṅwe ḓuvha nga munyanya wa mabebo a Herude, ṅwana wa Herudiasi wa musidzana a tshinela vhaeni, a takadza Herude" 
Matthew14:7 lwe a mu fulufhedzisa uri u ḓo mu fha tshiṅwe na tshiṅwe tshine a nga humbela, a khwaṱhisa nga muano." 
Matthew14:8 Musidzana a ḓa o funzedzwa nga mme awe a ri, “Ndo vha ndi tshi ri vha nga nṋea zwanga ṱhoho ya Johanisi Mulovhedzi zwino hafha, i ḓe i ndiloni.”" 
Matthew14:9 Iyo khumbelo ya ṱungufhadza khosi, hone a ro kundwa u hana, nge a vha o ana vhaeni vhoṱhe vha tshi zwi pfa. Ndi zwe a ri musidzana a ṋewe yone." 
Matthew14:10 A ruma vhathu dzhele uri vha yo tumula ṱhoho ya Johanisi," 
Matthew14:11 vha ḓa nayo i ndiloni vha i fha musidzana, ene a i isa ha mme awe." 
Matthew14:12 Vhafunziwa vha Johanisi vha ḓa vha dzhia tshitumbu tshawe vha tshi swiṱa, vha konou ḓa ha Yesu vha mu vhudza zwo iteaho." 
Matthew14:13 Yesu a ri u pfa hezwo a dzhena tshikepeni a ṱutshela fhethu he ha vha hu si na vhathu. Vhathu vha tshi zwi pfa vha bva miḓini yavho vha mu tevhela nga milenzhe. 
Matthew14:14 Yesu a tshi bva tshikepeni a vhona gogo ḽihulu ḽa vhathu, a vha pfela vhuṱungu, a fhodza vhalwadze vhavho." 
Matthew14:15 Ḽi tshi vho kovhela vhafunziwa vhawe vha ḓa khae vha ri, “Fhano hune ra vha hone ndi sogani nahone ḓuvha ḽo no ṱuwesa. Kha vha vhofholole gogo iḽi vha yo ḓirengela zwiḽiwa dziḓoroboni.”" 
Matthew14:16 Hone Yesu a fhindula a ri, “A vha vhuyi vha ṱuwa; vha ṋeeni zwiḽiwa vha ḽe.”" 
Matthew14:17 Vhone vha fhindula vha ri, “Riṋe a ri na tshithu fhano; ri na mikonde miṱanu ya vhurotho na khovhe mbili fhedzi.”" 
Matthew14:18 Yesu a fhindula a ri, “Zwi ḓiseni fhano.”" 
Matthew14:19 Ndi hone a tshi vhudza vhathu uri vha dzule fhasi tshiṱanzhelani, a mbo ḓi dzhia iḽa mikonde miṱanu na dziḽa khovhe mbili, a lilala a renda Mudzimu, a dzi ṅwatekanya a ṋea vhafunziwa vhawe uri vha kovhele vhathu;" 
Matthew14:20 vhoṱhe vha ḽa vha fura. Vho no ḽa vha dobela zwipeḓu zwo salaho, vha ḓadza mifaro ya 12." 
Matthew14:21 Vhe vha ḽa ndi vhanna vhane vha nga lingana 5 000, ri sa vhali vhasadzi na vhana." 
Matthew14:22 Yesu a mbo ḓi kombetshedza vhafunziwa vhawe uri vha dzhene tshikepeni vha mu range phanḓa vha wetshele seli na luḽa lwa dzivha, uri Ene a sale a tshi vhofholola vhathu." 
Matthew14:23 Musi o no onesana navho a yo rabela tshikwarani e eṱhe. Ḽi tshi kovhela o vha a tshee tshikwarani e eṱhe. 
Matthew14:24 Tshikepe tsho vha tsho no vha henengei vhukati ha dzivha, kule na khunzikhunzi, tshi tshi khou dzinginyiswa nga magabelo, ngauri tsho vha tsho livhana na muya." 
Matthew14:25 Nga maḓautsha a ḓa khavho a tshi khou tshimbila nṱha ha maḓi. 
Matthew14:26 Vhafunziwa vha tshi mu vhona a tshi khou tshimbila nṱha ha maḓi vha humbula uri ndi tshirunzi, vha tshenuwa vha ṱavha mukosi." 
Matthew14:27 Yesu a mbo ḓi amba navho a ri, “Rudzani mbilu; ndi Nṋe, ni songo ofha.”" 
Matthew14:28 Pitrosi a mu fhindula a ri, “Muṋe wanga, arali vhukuma vhe Vhone, kha vha mmbudze uri ndi ḓe khavho ndi tshi tshimbila-vho nṱha ha maḓi.”" 
Matthew14:29 Yesu a ri, “Ndi zwone, iḓani!” Pitrosi a mbo ḓi bva tshikepeni a ya ha Yesu a tshi khou tshimbila nṱha ha maḓi." 
Matthew14:30 Hone a tshi vho vhona ḓumbu a thoma u ofha. A tshi vhona a tshi vho mbwandamela a ṱavha mukosi a ri, “Muṋe wanga, kha vha ntshidze!”" 
Matthew14:31 Yesu a mbo ḓi isa tshanḓa tshawe a mu fara, a mu vhudza a ri, “Fulufhelo ḽaṋu ḽo ṱukufhala hani! Ndi mini ni tshi timatima?”" 
Matthew14:32 Vha tshi dzhena tshikepeni muya wa mbo ḓi dzika. 
Matthew14:33 Vhe vha vha vhe tshikepeni vha mbo ḓi mu gwadamela vha ri, “Vhukumakuma vha Murwa wa Mudzimu.”" 
Matthew14:34 Vha wela dzivha vha tsela Genesaretha. 
Matthew14:35 Vhathu vha henefho vha mbo ḓi vhona uri ndi Yesu, vha laedzela vhathu vhoṱhe vha miḓini ya henefho tsini, vha ḓa na vhalwadze vhoṱhe" 
Matthew14:36 vha mu humbela uri a tendele vhalwadze vha tshi tou kwama zwavho shaphu ḽa nguvho yawe; vhoṱhe vhe vha ḽi kwama vha fhola. 
Matthew15:1 Ndi hone Vhafarisei na vhaḓivhi vha Mulayo vha bvaho Jerusalema vha tshi ḓa ha Yesu, vha ri," 
Matthew15:2 “Ndi mini vhafunziwa vhavho vha tshi pfuka milayo ya vhomakhulukuku, vha tshi ḽa vha songo ṱamba zwanḓa?”" 
Matthew15:3 Ene a vha fhindula a ri, “Inwi-ha, ndi mini ni tshi pfuka ndaela ya Mudzimu nga mulandu wa zwidayo zwaṋu?" 
Matthew15:4 A thi ri Mudzimu o ri, ‘Hulisa khotsi au na mme au,’ a dovha a ri, ‘Ane a sema khotsi kana mme awe tshawe ndi u vhulawa.’" 
Matthew15:5 Hone inwi ni tshi funza ni ri arali muthu e na tshine a nga kona u farisa ngatsho khotsi awe kana mme awe, hone a ri, ‘Hei ndi nduvho ya Mudzimu,’" 
Matthew15:6 a nga litsha zwawe u hulisa khotsi awe kana mme awe. Asizwo-ha, no no pfuvhisa ipfi ḽa Mudzimu nga zwidayo zwaṋu." 
Matthew15:7 Vhahoi ndinwi! Yesaya ho ngo ni zwifhelela a tshi ni porofita a ri," 
Matthew15:8 “ ‘Vhathu avha vha nkhulisa nga milomo fhedzi, hone mbilu dzavho dzi siho kha Nṋe." 
Matthew15:9 Na u nthabela a zwi vha farisi tshithu, ngauri zwine vha funza ndi zwidayo zwazwo zwa vhathu.’ ”" 
Matthew15:10 Yesu a vhidza vhathu a vha vhudza a ri, “Thetshelesani ni ṱalukanye zwine nda amba:" 
Matthew15:11 tshine tsha kumadza muthu a si tshine tsha dzhena nga mulomo, ndi tshine tsha bva nga mulomo wawe.”" 
Matthew15:12 Ndi hone vhafunziwa vha Yesu vha tshi ḓa khae vha ri, “Nṋa vho zwi vhona uri Vhafarisei vho khukhulisea vha tshi pfa ipfi iḽo?”" 
Matthew15:13 A vha fhindula a ri, “Muri muṅwe na muṅwe u songo ṱavhiwaho nga Khotsi anga wa ṱaḓulu u ḓo tupulwa." 
Matthew15:14 Vha litsheni, vha ḓi vha mabofu vhane vha endedza mabofu. Hone arali bofu ḽi tshi endedza ḽiṅwe bofu, vha ḓo wela dindini vhuvhili havho.”" 
Matthew15:15 Pitrosi a ri, “Kha vha ri ṱalutshedze-vho tshiḽa tshifanyiso.”" 
Matthew15:16 Yesu a fhindula a ri, “Matsina na inwi ni kha ḓi kundwa u ṱalukanya naa?" 
Matthew15:17 A ni zwi ḓivhi uri tshine muthu a ḽa tshi fhirela thumbuni tsha fhelela bungani? 
Matthew15:18 Hone zwi bvaho nga mulomo zwi bva mbiluni; ndi zwone zwine zwa kumadza muthu. 
Matthew15:19 Mbiluni ya muthu ndi hone hune ha bva mihumbulo mivhi, na vhupondi, na vhupombwe ha tshakha-tshakha, na vhufobvu, na mazwifhi, na u nyefulana." 
Matthew15:20 Ndi zwone zwine zwa kumadza muthu. Hone u ḽa u songo ṱamba zwanḓa a zwi kumadzi muthu.” 
Matthew15:21 Yesu a ṱuwa henefho a ṱutshela thungo dza Tiro na Sidoni. 
Matthew15:22 Vha ṱangana na musadzi wa Mukanana wa thungo dzenedziḽa, a vha tevhela a tshi khou ḓi ṱavha mukosi a tshi ri, “Muṋe wanga, Murwa Dafita, kha vha nkhathutshele! Ṅwana wanga wa musidzana u khou tou tambula nga thuṅwa ya Saṱhane!”" 
Matthew15:23 Hone Yesu a si mu fhindule na ipfi na ḽithihi. Vhafunziwa vha vhuya vha ya khae vha mu humbela vha ri, “Nga vha mu vhudze a ṱuwe; u khou enda a tshi ri fhunga.”" 
Matthew15:24 Hone Ene a fhindula a ri, “A tho ngo rumiwa kha nngu dzo xelaho kha vhaṅwe, ndo rumiwa kha Vhaisraele fhedzi.”" 
Matthew15:25 Hone uyo musadzi a ḓi enda a tshi mu gwadamela a tshi ri, “Muṋe wanga, nga vha mpfarise!”" 
Matthew15:26 Yesu a fhindula a ri, “A zwo ngo fanela ri tshi dzhia zwiḽiwa zwa vhana ra ṋea zwibwa.”" 
Matthew15:27 Uyo musadzi a fhindula a ri, “Hufha zwibwa zwi tshi ḓi ḽa-vho matshakatshaka ane a wela fhasi a tshi bva ḓafulani ḽa vhaṋe vhazwo.”" 
Matthew15:28 Ndi hone Yesu a tshi mu fhindula a ri, “Mme a ṅwana, fulufhelo ḽaṋu ndi ḽihulu. Zwine na tama nga zwi itee.” Ṅwana wawe a mbo ḓi fhola na zwenezwo." 
Matthew15:29 Yesu a tshi ṱuwa afho a tshimbila na Dzivha ḽa Galelia, a tshi swika a gonya tshikwara a dzula fhasi." 
Matthew15:30 Ha ḓa nae magogo a vhathu vha tshi mu ḓisela zwihole na mabofu na vho huvhalaho na mbevhevhe na vhaṅwe vhanzhi, vha vha vhea milenzheni yawe, Ene a vha fhodza." 
Matthew15:31 Vhathu vhoṱhe vha kanuka vha tshi vhona mbevhevhe dzi tshi vho amba na zwihole zwi tshi vho tshimbila na mabofu a tshi vho vhona, vha renda Mudzimu wa Israele." 
Matthew15:32 Yesu a vhidza vhafunziwa vhawe a ri, “Havha vhathu ndi vha pfela vhuṱungu, ngauri ḽo no vha ḓuvha ḽa vhuraru ri navho, zwino vho no tou ita na u fhelelwa nga zwiḽiwa. A thi funi vha tshi ṱuwa na nḓala, vha nga ṋoka nḓilani.”" 
Matthew15:33 Vhafunziwa vha mu fhindula vha ri, “Zwiḽiwa zwa u fusha vhathu vhangafhangafha ri ḓo zwi wana ngafhi henefhano sogani?”" 
Matthew15:34 Yesu a vha vhudzisa a ri, “Ni na mikonde mingana?” Vha fhindula vha ri, “Ndi miṱanu na mivhili, khathihi na khovhe dzi si gathi.”" 
Matthew15:35 Yesu a vhudza vhathu uri vha dzule fhasi," 
Matthew15:36 a dzhia mikonde iḽa miṱanu na mivhili na khovhe, a livhuha Mudzimu a zwi ṅwatekanya, a ṋea vhafunziwa vhawe, vhone vha zwi kovhela vhathu." 
Matthew15:37 Vhoṱhe vha ḽa vha fura, zwipiḓa zwo salaho zwa ḓadza mifaro miṱanu na mivhili." 
Matthew15:38 Vhe vha ḽa ndi 4 000, ri tshi vhala vhanna fhedzi, ri sa vhali vhasadzi na vhana." 
Matthew15:39 Ndi hone Yesu a tshi onesa vhathu, a dzhena tshikepeni a ṱutshela thungo dza Magadani." 
Matthew16:1 Ḽiṅwe ḓuvha Vhafarisei na Vhasadukei vho ḓa vha linga Yesu, vha mu humbela uri a ite tshiga tshi no bva ha Mudzimu." 
Matthew16:2 Hone a vha fhindula a ri, “Nga madekwana ni a amba na ri, ‘Matshelo ḽi ḓo tsha zwavhuḓi, makole o tswuka.’" 
Matthew16:3 Ḽi tshi tsha ni a amba na ri, ‘Ṋamusi hu ḓo vha na maḓumbu na mvula, makole o tswuka.’ Zwa matshele ni a zwi ṱalukanya, hone zwiga zwa zwifhinga zwa Mudzimu zwi a ni kunda." 
Matthew16:4 Vhane vha ṱoḓa tshiga ndi vhathu vhavhi vho furalelaho Mudzimu; a vha nga itelwi tshiga arali tshi si tsha Jonasi.” U ralo a mbo ḓi ṱuwa a vha sia henefho. 
Matthew16:5 Vhafunziwa vha wetshela seli na luḽa lwa dzivha vho hangwa u ṱuwa na vhurotho. 
Matthew16:6 Yesu a vha vhudza a ri, “Fhaṱuwani ni thanyele mbilisa ya Vhafarisei na Vhasadukei.”" 
Matthew16:7 Vha amba nga tshavho vha ri, “A tshi ralo ndi ngauri a ro ngo ḓa na vhurotho.”" 
Matthew16:8 Yesu nga u ḓivha zwe vha vha vha tshi khou amba a ri, “Ndi mini ni tshi amba nga tshaṋu na ri a ni na vhurotho? Ni dinwa nga fulufhelo ḽiṱuku." 
Matthew16:9 A ni athu ṱalukanya naa? Kani no no hangwa zwiḽa zwa mikonde miṱanu ya vhurotho ye nda fusha ngayo vhathu vha 5 000, na uri no dobela na ḓadza mifaro mingana?" 
Matthew16:10 Kana zwiḽa zwa musi ndi tshi fusha vhathu vha 4 000 nga mikonde miṱanu na mivhili, na uri no sala ni tshi ḓadza mifaro mingana nga zwipiḓa zwo salaho?" 
Matthew16:11 Khezwi ni tshi kundwa u ṱalukanya uri a tho ngo amba zwa zwiḽiwa na kathihi, tshe nda amba ndo tou ri ni thanyele mbilisa ya Vhafarisei na Vhasadukei?”" 
Matthew16:12 Ndi hone vha tshi zwi pfa uri matsina o vha a sa khou amba mbilisa ya vhurotho, o vha a tshi khou amba pfunzo ya Vhafarisei na Vhasadukei." 
Matthew16:13 Ḽiṅwe ḓuvha musi Yesu o swika thungo dza Khisaria wa Filipi a vhudzisa vhafunziwa vhawe a ri, “Nṋa vhathu vha tshi nnyamba Nṋe Mubebwa-nga-muthu vha ri ndi Nṋe nnyi?”" 
Matthew16:14 Vha fhindula vha ri, “Vhaṅwe vha ri ndi Vhone Johanisi Mulovhedzi, vhaṅwe vha ri ndi Vhone Elia; hafhu hu ḓi dovha ha vha na vhaṅwe vhane vha ri ndi Vhone Jeremia kana muṅwe wa vhaporofita vha kale.”" 
Matthew16:15 Yesu a konou vha vhudzisa a ri, “Inwi-ha ni ri mini? Ni ri ndi Nṋe nnyi?”" 
Matthew16:16 Ha fhindula Simoni ane ḽiṅwe a pfi Pitrosi a ri, “Ndi Vhone Mesia, Murwa wa Mudzimu a tshilaho.”" 
Matthew16:17 Yesu a mbo ri, “Ni na mashudu Simoni ṅwana wa Jonasi; a si muthu wa ṋama o ni dzumbululelaho hezwo, ndi Khotsi anga wa ṱaḓulu." 
Matthew16:18 Zwino ndi khou ni vhudza ndi ri: ni vho pfi Pitrosi, huno ndi ḓo fhaṱa tshivhidzo tshanga kha tombo heḽi; na hele yone iṋe i nga si tshi kunde." 
Matthew16:19 Ndi ḓo ni fha khii dza muvhuso wa Mudzimu; na tshine na iledza fhano shangoni tshi ḓo vha tsho iledzwa na ngei ṱaḓulu; tshine na tendela fhano shangoni tshi ḓo vha tsho tendelwa na ngei ṱaḓulu.” 
Matthew16:20 O no ralo a mbo laya vhafunziwa uri vha songo vhuya vha vhudza muthu uri ndi Ene Mesia. 
Matthew16:21 U bva zwenezwo Yesu a thoma u ṱalutshedza vhafunziwa vhawe uri u fanela u ya Jerusalema a tambudzwa zwihulu nga vhahulwane vha lushaka na vhotshifhe vhahulwane na vhaḓivhi vha Mulayo, a vhulawa, a vuswa nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuraru." 
Matthew16:22 Ndi hone Pitrosi a tshi mu vhidzela thungo a thoma u mu kaidza a ri, “Hai nandi Muṋe wanga, hezwo zwi songo vhuya zwa itea!”" 
Matthew16:23 Hone Yesu a rembuluwa a lavhelesa Pitrosi a ri, “Nṱutshele, Saṱhane ndiwe! U khou ṱoḓa u nkhakhisa! A u londi zwa Mudzimu, u londa zwa vhathu!”" 
Matthew16:24 Ndi hone Yesu a tshi vhudza vhafunziwa vhawe a ri, “Arali muthu a tshi funa u vha mufunziwa wanga, nga a ḓihangwe a hwale tshifhambano tshawe, a ntevhele." 
Matthew16:25 Muthu ane a tata u ṅaledza vhutshilo hawe u a ḓilozwa, hone ane a ḓo fela Nṋe ndi ene ane a ḓo tshila." 
Matthew16:26 Nṋa muthu zwi ḓo mu farisani arali a tshi wana zwithu zwoṱhe shangoni a fhedza nga u lovha tshoṱhe? A nga bvisa mini tsha u rengulula vhutshilo hawe? 
Matthew16:27 Mubebwa-nga-muthu u khou ḓa e kha vhugala ha Khotsi awe e na vharuṅwa vhawe; ndi hone a tshi ḓo ṋea muṅwe na muṅwe nga he a shuma ngaho. 
Matthew16:28 “Zwino ipfani-ha: hu na vhaṅwe vho imaho hafha vhane vha sa ḓo fa vha sa athu vhona Mubebwa-nga-muthu a tshi ḓa e muvhusoni wawe.” 
Matthew17:1 Ho no fhela maḓuvha maṱanu na ḽithihi Yesu a ṱuwa na Pitrosi na Jakopo na murathu wawe Johanisi, a gonya navho thavha ndapfu vhe nga tshavho;" 
Matthew17:2 tshivhumbeo tshawe tsha mbo ḓi shanduka vha tshi zwi vhona, tshifhaṱuwo tshawe tsha thoma u penya sa ḓuvha, zwiambaro zwawe zwa tshena sa tshedza." 
Matthew17:3 Zwenezwo ha bvelela Mushe na Elia, vhafunziwa vha vha vhona vha tshi khou amba na Yesu." 
Matthew17:4 Pitrosi a tshi zwi vhona a amba na Yesu a ri, “Muṋe washu, ro ita zwone ra ḓa fhano. Arali vha tshi funa nga vha litshe ndi fhaṱe thumba tharu fhano: iṅwe i ḓo vha yavho, iṅwe ya vha ya Mushe, iṅwe ya Elia.”" 
Matthew17:5 Musi a tshi kha ḓi amba ha alama gole ḽi penyaho ḽa vha tiba, ha mbo pfala ipfi ḽi bvaho kha gole ḽi tshi ri, “Hoyu ndi Murwa wanga muthihi fhedzi; u a ntakadza; ni mu thetshelese.”" 
Matthew17:6 Vhafunziwa vha tshi pfa ipfi iḽo vha wa nga zwifhaṱuwo vha dzhenwa nga nyofho khulu. 
Matthew17:7 Ndi hone Yesu a tshi sendela a vha dzinginyisa a ri, “Takuwani; ni songo ofha.”" 
Matthew17:8 Vha tshi lilala vha vhona Yesu o sala e eṱhe, vhaḽa vha si tsheeho." 
Matthew17:9 Musi vha tshi vho tsa thavha Yesu a vha laya a ri, “Ni songo vhuya na vhudza muthu zwe na vhona, Mubebwa-nga-muthu a vhuya a vuwa vhafuni.”" 
Matthew17:10 Vhafunziwa vha mu vhudzisa vha ri, “Khezwi vhaḓivhi vha Mulayo vha tshi ri hu fanela u ranga u ḓa Elia?”" 
Matthew17:11 Yesu a fhindula a ri, “Nangoho Elia u a ḓa uri a lugise zwoṱhe." 
Matthew17:12 Hone ndi khou ni vhudza ndi ri: Elia o no ḓi ḓa vha si mu ṱalukanye, vha ita zwine vha funa ngae. Sa zwenezwo na Mubebwa-nga-muthu u fanela u tambudzwa ngavho.”" 
Matthew17:13 Ndi hone vha tshi zwi pfa uri matsina a tshi ralo o vha a tshi khou amba Johanisi Mulovhedzi. 
Matthew17:14 Vha tshi vho dovha u sendela tsini ha magogo ha ḓa muṅwe munna a mu gwadamela 
Matthew17:15 a ri, “Muṋe wanga, kha vha khathutshele ṅwana wanga! O rwiwa nga ṅwedzi, u khou tou tambula; u ṱolou wela muliloni na maḓini." 
Matthew17:16 Zwino ndo mu ḓisa ha vhafunziwa vhavho, fhedzi vha kundwa u mu fhodza.”" 
Matthew17:17 Yesu a fhindula a ri, “Hee inwi ni sa fulufheli Mudzimu, vhadzia-u-xela! Ndi ḓo vha na inwi u swika lini? Ndi kha ḓi ḓo ni konḓelela u swika lini? Ḓisani uyo muṱhannga kha Nṋe!”" 
Matthew17:18 Yesu a mbo ḓi kaidza thuṅwa ya bva khae, u bva zwenezwo ṅwana a mbo ḓi vha o fhola." 
Matthew17:19 Ndi hone vhafunziwa vha tshi ḓa ha Yesu vhe nga tshavho vha ri, “Riṋe ro kundwa u pandela iḽa thuṅwa?”" 
Matthew17:20 A vha fhindula a ri, “Ndi ngauri lutendo lwaṋu ndi luṱukusa. Thetshelesani ndi ni vhudze: ngavhe ni vhe na lutendo lune lwa tou lingana zwalwo na mbeu ya muhuyu, no vha ni tshi nga kona u vhudza thavha hei na ri, ‘Sudzulutshela ngei!’ ya sudzuluwa. A hu na tshe tsha vha tshi tshi nga ni kunda.”" 
Matthew17:21  
Matthew17:22 Musi vho dovha vha kuvhangana Galelia Yesu a vhudza vhafunziwa vhawe a ri, “Mubebwa-nga-muthu u ḓo kumedzwa vhathu," 
Matthew17:23 vha mu vhulaha, a dovha a vuswa nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuraru.” A tshi ralo zwa vha pfisa vhuṱungu nga maanḓa." 
Matthew17:24 Vha tshi swika Kapernaumi vhathelisi vha muthelo wa thembele vha ḓa ha Pitrosi vha mu vhudzisa vha ri, “Nṋa mufunzi waṋu ha theli muthelo wa thembele naa?”" 
Matthew17:25 A fhindula a ri, “Vha a thela.” A tshi vho dzhena nḓuni Yesu a mbo mu vhudzisa a sa athu amba a ri, “Inwi ni zwi vhona hani Simoni? Mahosi a shango vha thelisa vhafhio muthelo? Vha bvisisa vhafhio lutho? Vha thelisa vha havho kana vhatsinda?”" 
Matthew17:26 Pitrosi a ri, “Vha thelisa vhatsinda.” Yesu a ri, “Ahaa, izwo vha havho a vha theliswi." 
Matthew17:27 Naho zwo ralo, uri ri si vha khukhulise, sokonu ya dzivhani ni pose tshilazwulo ni fashe khovhe ine ya ḽela lwa u thoma. Ni tshi ṱolela mulomoni wayo ni ḓo wana yo khuba masheleni mavhili; a dzhieni ni yo nthelela, na inwi ni ḓithelele.”" 
Matthew18:1 Zwenezwo vhafunziwa vha Yesu vha ḓa khae vha vhudzisa vha ri, “A re muhulwane muvhusoni wa Mudzimu a nga vha e nnyi?”" 
Matthew18:2 Yesu a vhidza ṅwana muṱuku a mu imisa vhukati havho 
Matthew18:3 a ri, “Zwino ipfani-ha: na sa ḓiṱukufhadza na fana na vhana, ni nga si vhuye na dzhena muvhusoni wa Mudzimu." 
Matthew18:4 Ndi zwone, ane a ḓiṱukufhadza a fana na uyu ṅwana, ndi ene ane a ḓo vha muhulwane muvhusoni wa Mudzimu." 
Matthew18:5 Ane a ṱanganedza ṅwana muthihi a tshi itela Nṋe, u ṱanganedza Nṋe." 
Matthew18:6 Ane a khakhisa muṅwe wa havha vhaṱoma vha mpfulufhelaho, ṱhamu yawe i ḓo fhira zwa musi o tou vhofhelelwa zwawe guyo mukuloni a poswa lwanzheni he lwa ita dzivha." 
Matthew18:7 “Shango ḽi tambula hani nga zwikhakhisi! Zwikhakhisi zwone zwi fanela u vha hone, fhedzi ane zwa ḓa ngae u ḓo zwi pfa." 
Matthew18:8 “Ndi zwine nda ri: arali tshanḓa tshau kana mulenzhe wau u tshi ita uri u furalele Mudzimu, u tumule u u laṱe kule. Ndi khwiṋe u dzhena vhutshiloni u tshihole kana u tshi ṱudza, u fhira u poswa muliloni u sa dzimiwi u na zwanḓa zwivhili na milenzhe mivhili."
