Matthew18:9 Arali iṱo ḽau ḽi tshi ita uri u furalele Mudzimu, ḽi nongole u ḽi pose kule. Ndi khwiṋe u dzhena vhutshiloni u na iṱo ḽithihi, u fhira u poswa muliloni wa hele u na maṱo mavhili." 
Matthew18:10 “Ni vhone ni sa ḓo nyadza muṅwe wa havha vhaṱuku. Ḓivhani uri vharuṅwa vhavho ngei ṱaḓulu vhane vha vha tsireledza vha dzula vhe tsini-tsini na Khotsi anga wa ṱaḓulu. 
Matthew18:11  
Matthew18:12 “Ni zwi vhona hani? Arali muthu e na nngu dza ḓana, ha xela iṅwe yadzo, ha sii dziḽa dza 99 henefho zwikwarani a yo ṱoḓa iḽa yo xelaho?" 
Matthew18:13 Thetshelesani ndi ni vhudze: a i wana u takalela yone u fhira dziḽa dza 99 dzi songo xelaho. 
Matthew18:14 Sa zwenezwo Khotsi aṋu wa ṱaḓulu ha funi na muthihi wa havha vhaṱuku a tshi lovha. 
Matthew18:15 “Arali wa hau a tshi khakha, iya u mu sumbedze vhukhakhi hawe ni vhavhili fhedzi. Arali a tshi u pfa, aiwaa, wo mu tshidza nga u mu vhuedzedza nḓilani." 
Matthew18:16 Arali a sa pfi, hone-ha u vhuelele u na muṅwe kana vhavhili uri hu vhe na ṱhanzi mbili kana tharu, ipfi ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe ḽi vhe na vhuṱanzi ho khwaṱhaho." 
Matthew18:17 Arali na vhenevho a sa vha pfa u vhudze tshivhidzo. Arali na tshivhidzo a sa tshi pfi, izwo-vho u mu ite sa wannḓa kana muthelisi mudzia-u-ṱangula vhathu." 
Matthew18:18 Zwino ipfani-ha: zwine na zwi iledza fhano shangoni zwi ḓo vha zwo iledzwa na ngei ṱaḓulu; zwine na zwi tendela fhano shangoni zwi ḓo vha zwo tendelwa na ngei ṱaḓulu. 
Matthew18:19 “Dovhani ni thetshelese ndi ni vhudze: arali vhavhili vhaṋu vha tshi langana u humbela tshithu kha Mudzimu, vha ḓo fhiwa nga Khotsi anga wa ṱaḓulu;" 
Matthew18:20 ngauri he ha kuvhangana vhavhili kana vhararu nga dzina ḽanga, na Nṋe ndi ḓo vha navho.”" 
Matthew18:21 Ndi hone Pitrosi a tshi ḓa khae a mu vhudzisa a ri, “Muṋe wanga, wa hashu a tshi dzula a tshi nkhakhela ndi nga mu hangwela kangana? Ndi nga mu hangwela nda ita kaṱanu-na-kavhili?”" 
Matthew18:22 Yesu a fhindula a ri, “Nṋe ndi ri u songo mu hangwela kaṱanu-na-kavhili fhedzi, u mu hangwela kaṱanu-na-kavhili fhedzi, u mu hangwele kaṱanu-na-kavhili zwi tshi vhaliwa lwa 70." 
Matthew18:23 “Ndi zwine nda fanyisedza muvhuso wa Mudzimu nga muthu wa khosi we a ṱoḓa u vhalelana milandu na vhashumi vhawe. 
Matthew18:24 A tshi thoma u vhala vha mu ḓisela muṅwe we a vha o ḽa mulandu wawe wa dzimilioni nnzhi dza dzirannda. 
Matthew18:25 A tshi wanala a si na tsha u lifha, muṋe wawe a ri a rengiswe khathihi na musadzi wawe na vhana na thundu dzawe dzoṱhe, a lifhe." 
Matthew18:26 Mushumi uyo a mbo ḓi gwadama fhasi a luvha a ri, ‘Vha songo mphelela mbilu, ndi ḓo lifha zwoṱhe.’" 
Matthew18:27 Ndi hone muṋe wawe a tshi mu khathutshela mbilu, a mu hangwela mulandu wawe a mu litsha a ṱuwa." 
Matthew18:28 “Hone uyo mushumi a tshi bva henefho a mbo ḓi ṱangana na muṅwe mushumi ngae we a mu pamba dziranndanyana; a mbo ḓi mu fara nga mukulo a mu tshipa a ri, ‘Lifha mulandu wanga!’" 
Matthew18:29 Mushumi uyo a mbo ḓi gwadama fhasi a mu rabeledza a ri, ‘Vha songo mphelela mbilu, ndi ḓo lifha!’" 
Matthew18:30 Uyo muṅwe a hana, a mbo ṱuwa a mu posa dzhele a vhuye a lifhe mulandu." 
Matthew18:31 “Vhashumi ngae vha tshi vhona zwo iteaho zwa vha dina zwihulu vha ya ha muṋe wavho vha mu toololela zwoṱhe. 
Matthew18:32 Khosi ya mbo ḓi vhidzisa uyo mushumi ya mu vhudza ya ri, ‘Mushumi muvhi ndiwe! Hufha nṋe ndo u hangwela mulandu uḽa woṱhe nge wa nthabeledza!" 
Matthew18:33 Nṋa yo vha i si pfanelo naa, iwe u tshi khathutshela-vho mushumi nga iwe unga nṋe ndo u khathutshela?’" 
Matthew18:34 Ya sinyuwa nga maanḓa ya mu kumedza vhatambudzi uri vha mu tambudze a vhuye a lifhe mulandu woṱhe. 
Matthew18:35 Na Khotsi anga wa ṱaḓulu u ḓo ni ita nga u ralo arali na sa hangwelana nga mbilu yoṱhe.” 
Matthew19:1 Musi Yesu o fhedza u amba eneo a ṱuwa Galelia a ṱutshela thungo dza Judia seli ha Jorodani. 
Matthew19:2 A tevhelwa nga vhathu vhanzhi-vhanzhi, a vha fhodza malwadze avho henefho." 
Matthew19:3 Vhaṅwe Vhafarisei vha ḓa ha Yesu vha tshi ri vha mu fashe vha ri, “Nṋa munna u a tendelwa u sokou ṱala musadzi wawe nga zwidandu zwi si na mushumo naa?”" 
Matthew19:4 A vha fhindula a ri, “Nṋa a ni athu vhala uri o vha sikaho u thomani o vha sika vhe munna na musadzi?" 
Matthew19:5 Ndi zwe a ri, ‘Munna u ḓo ṱutshela khotsi awe na mme awe a vhofhekana na musadzi wawe, vhuvhili havho vha vha ṋama nthihi.’" 
Matthew19:6 Ngauralo a vha tshee vhavhili, vho no vha ṋama nthihi. Zwino zwo vhofhekanywaho nga Mudzimu, muthu a songo zwi fhandekanya.”" 
Matthew19:7 Vha mu fhindula vha ri, “Khezwi Mushe o ri tendela uri munna a nga fha musadzi wawe luṅwalo lwa u ṱala a konou litshana nae a ṱuwa?”" 
Matthew19:8 A vha fhindula a ri, “Mushe a tshi vhuya a ni tendela u ṱala vhasadzi ndi nge a vhona ni sa pfi, hone u rangani zwithu zwi tshi sikwa zwo vha zwi songo ralo." 
Matthew19:9 A vha Nṋe ndi ri: arali musadzi a songo thoma u khakhela munna nga vhupombwe, munna a mu ṱala a dzea muṅwe, onoyo munna u ita vhupombwe.”" 
Matthew19:10 Vhafunziwa vha tshi pfa a tshi ralo vha ri, “Arali zwa munna na musadzi zwo ralo ndi khwiṋe muthu a si na musadzi.”" 
Matthew19:11 A vha fhindula a ri, “Hezwo a si vhoṱhe vhane vha zwi kona, zwi konwa nga vhe vha tou fhiwa nga Mudzimu." 
Matthew19:12 Hu na vhe vha tou bebwa vho luvhedzwa, ha vha na vho luvhedzwaho nga vhathu; ha dovha ha vha na vhaṅwe vhe vha tou ḓiilisa uri vha kone u shumela muvhuso wa Mudzimu vha sa thithisei. Ane a zwi kona kha a zwi ite.”" 
Matthew19:13 Ndi hone vhaṅwe vha tshi ḓisa vhana vhaṱuku ha Yesu uri a vha vhee zwanḓa a vha rabelele, hone vhafunziwa vha vha kaidza." 
Matthew19:14 Hone Yesu a amba a ri, “Litshani vhana vha ḓe ha Nṋe. Ni songo vha dzivhisa; vhane vha ḓo dzhena muvhusoni wa Mudzimu ndi vha no nga vhenevha.”" 
Matthew19:15 U ralo a vha vhea zwanḓa a konou fhirela phanḓa. 
Matthew19:16 Ha ḓa muṅwe munna a amba na Yesu a ri, “Vhafunzi, ndi ite tshivhuya tshifhio uri ndi wane vhutshilo vhu sa gumi?”" 
Matthew19:17 Yesu a fhindula a ri, “Ni mmbudziselani nga zwivhuya? Muvhuya ndi muthihi fhedzi. Hone arali ni tshi tama u dzhena vhutshiloni, tevhedzani ndaela dza Mudzimu.”" 
Matthew19:18 A vhudzisa a ri, “Vha amba dzifhio?” Yesu a fhindula a ri, “Ndi amba dzine dza ri, ‘U songo vhulaha; u songo ita vhupombwe; u songo tswa; u songo zwifhelela muṅwe;" 
Matthew19:19 u hulise khotsi au na mme au; funa vhaṅwe unga iwe muṋe.’ ” 
Matthew19:20 Muṱhannga uyo a fhindula a ri, “Hezwo zwoṱhe ndo zwi tevhedza. Zwino hu tshee ho ṱahela mini?”" 
Matthew19:21 Yesu a fhindula a ri, “Arali ni tshi funa u vha muvhuya o khunyelelaho, tshimbilani ni yo rengisa zwoṱhe zwine na vha nazwo, ni kovhele tshelede vhashai; lupfumo lwaṋu ni ḓo lu wana ṱaḓulu. No no ita zwenezwo ni ḓe ni vhe mufunziwa wanga.”" 
Matthew19:22 Muṱhannga a tshi pfa ipfi heḽo a ṱuwa o ṱungufhala, ngauri o vha o pfuma nga maanḓa." 
Matthew19:23 Ndi hone Yesu a tshi vhudza vhafunziwa vhawe a ri, “Thetshelesani ndi ni vhudze; mupfumi zwi ḓo mu konḓela u dzhena muvhusoni wa Mudzimu." 
Matthew19:24 Ndi khou dovha nda khwaṱhisa nda ri: u dzhena ha mupfumi muvhusoni wa Mudzimu zwi ḓo konḓa u fhira gamela i tshi edzisa u fhira nga buli ḽa ṋeleṱe.” 
Matthew19:25 Vhafunziwa vha tshi pfa heḽo vha kanuka nga maanḓa vha ri, “Arali zwo ralo hu nga tshidzwa nnyi-ha?”" 
Matthew19:26 Yesu a vha lavhelesa a fhindula a ri, “Hezwo vhathu a vha zwi koni, hone Mudzimu u kona zwoṱhe.”" 
Matthew19:27 Ndi hone Pitrosi a tshi amba na Yesu a ri, “Kha vha dzou vhona riṋe: ro ṱutshela zwoṱhe ra vha vhafunziwa vhavho; ri ḓo wana mini-ha?”" 
Matthew19:28 Yesu a vha vhudza a ri, “Zwino ipfani-ha: inwi vhe na ntevhela na vha vhafunziwa vhanga, musi zwoṱhe zwo no sikwa nga huswa, musi Mubebwa-nga-muthu a tshi dzula kha khuluṋoni yawe vhugalani hawe, na inwi ni ḓo dzula kha khuluṋoni dza 12 ni tshi vhusa matsinde a 12 a Israele." 
Matthew19:29 Nahone muṅwe na muṅwe ane a ṱutshela nnḓu yawe kana vharathu vhawe kana khaladzi dzawe kana khotsi awe kana mme awe kana vhana vhawe kana masimu awe hu u itela Nṋe, u ḓo wana zwi no fhira kule izwo zwe a ṱutshela, a dovha a wana na vhutshilo vhu sa gumi." 
Matthew19:30 Hone vhanzhi vhane ṋamusi vha vha vhahulwane vha vho ḓo vha vhone vhaṱuku; vhane vha vha vhaṱuku vha vho ḓo vha vhone vhahulwane. 
Matthew20:1 “Ndi zwine nda ri muvhuso wa Mudzimu u fana na muṋe wa tsimu we a bubela u yo thola vhashumi vha u shuma tsimuni yawe. 
Matthew20:2 A langana na vhashumi uri u ḓo vha fha malamba a ḓuvha nga ḓuvha, a konou vha rumela tsimuni." 
Matthew20:3 Nga tshifhinga tsha 9 a dovha a bva a ṱangana na vhaṅwe vha sa athu wana mushumo vho ima khoroni," 
Matthew20:4 a amba navho a ri, ‘Na inwi iyani tsimuni, ndi ḓo ni fha malamba eneo e a ni fanela.’" 
Matthew20:5 Nangoho vha ya. A dovha a ita zwenezwo nga tshifhinga tsha 12, a dovha nga tshifhinga tsha vhuraru." 
Matthew20:6 A tshi dovha u bva nga tshifhinga tsha vhuṱanu a ṱangana na vhaṅwe vho ḓiimela henefho, a amba navho a ri, ‘Khezwi no sokou ima fhano ḓuvha ḽoṱhe ni sa shumi?’" 
Matthew20:7 Vha fhindula vha ri, ‘Hufha hu si na we a ri thola.’ A vha vhudza a ri, ‘Na inwi iyani tsimuni!’" 
Matthew20:8 Musi ḽo no kovhela muṋe wa tsimu a vhudza mukoma wawe a ri, ‘Vhidzani vhashumi ni vha fhe malamba avho; ni thome nga vhe vha ḓela murahu ni fhedzisele nga vha u thoma.’" 
Matthew20:9 Vhaḽa vhe vha thoma nga tshifhinga tsha vhuṱanu vha ḓa vha wana a ḓuvha ḽoṱhe. 
Matthew20:10 Musi hu tshi ḓa vhaḽa vha u thoma vha humbula uri vha ḓo hola manzhi, hone na vhone vha fhiwa malamba eneo." 
Matthew20:11 Vha tshi wana yone vha gungulela muṋe wa tsimu 
Matthew20:12 vha ri, ‘Hufha avha vha u fhedzisela vho shuma awara nthihi fhedzi, zwino vha vha fha hani zwithihi na riṋe vhe ra shuma ḓuvha ḽoṱhe ra tambula nga ḓuvha?’" 
Matthew20:13 Muṋe wa tsimu a amba na muṅwe wavho a ri, ‘Hee khonani, a hu na he nda ni khakhela. A ro ngo pfana eneo malamba naa?" 
Matthew20:14 Dzhiani-ha malamba aṋu ni ye hayani. Nṋe ndi khou tou funa u fha hoyu wa u fhedzisela zwine zwa fana na zwaṋu. 
Matthew20:15 Kani a thi na pfanelo ya u ita zwine nda funa nga zwi re zwanga? Kani-ha ni vho ita vivho nga u vhona vhuthu hanga?’ 
Matthew20:16 “Nga u ralo vhane ṋamusi vha vha vha u ranga vha vho ḓo vha vhone tsaleli, vhane vha vha tsaleli vha vho ḓo vha vhone vha u ranga.”" 
Matthew20:17 Yesu e nḓilani ya u ya Jerusalema a vhidzela vha 12 thungo, a vha vhudza a ri," 
Matthew20:18 “Ri khou gonya Jerusalema. Henengei Mubebwa-nga-muthu u ḓo kumedzwa vhotshifhe vhahulwane na vhaḓivhi vha Mulayo. Vha ḓo mu haṱulela lufu 
Matthew20:19 vha konou mu kumedza vhannḓa uri vha tambe ngae vha mu rwe nga mboma vha fhedze nga u mu vhamba kha tshifhambano. Hone nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuraru u ḓo vuswa.” 
Matthew20:20 Ndi hone musadzi wa Zebedia a tshi ḓa ha Yesu e na vhana vhawe vhavhili vha vhatuka, Jakopo na Johanisi, a gwadama phanḓa hawe a ri, “Ndo vha ndi na khumbelo.”" 
Matthew20:21 Yesu a fhindula a ri, “Vha khou ṱoḓa u humbela mini?” A ri, “Nga vha mpfulufhedzise uri vhana vhanga avha vhavhili vha ḓo dzula navho muvhusoni wavho, muṅwe thungo ya tshauḽa muṅwe thungo ya tshamonde.”" 
Matthew20:22 Yesu a fhindula a ri, “A ni tsha ḓivha na tshine na humbela. Tshinwelo tshine Nṋe nda pfi ndi nwe inwi ni nga kona u tshi nwa naa?” Vha ri, “Ri nga kona.”" 
Matthew20:23 Yesu a fhindula a ri, “Nangoho tshinwelo tshanga ni ḓo tshi nwa-vho. Hone uri hu ḓo dzula nnyi kha tshauḽa kana kha tshamonde tshanga, a zwi langiwi nga Nṋe; zwi ḓo fhiwa avho vhe Khotsi anga a vha lugisela.”" 
Matthew20:24 Vhaḽa vhaṅwe vhafunziwa vha fumi vha tshi pfa khumbelo ya avho mukomana na murathu zwa vha dina. 
Matthew20:25 Ndi hone Yesu a tshi vha vhidza a ri, “Ni a zwi ḓivha uri vhavhusi vha dzitshakha vha a dzi langa nga tshiṱuhu, vhahulwane vhadzo vha ṱongisa maanḓa avho." 
Matthew20:26 Hone hezwo a si zwone zwine zwa itea kha inwi. Ane a funa u pfi muhulwane kha inwi, nga a vhe ene mushumeli waṋu;" 
Matthew20:27 ane a funa u vha wa u ranga, nga' ḓiite phuli yaṋu noṱhe," 
Matthew20:28 unga na Mubebwa-nga-muthu a songo ḓa u shumelwa, o ḓa u shumela vhaṅwe na uri a fe a vhe tshipfumelo tsha u vhofholola vhanzhi.”" 
Matthew20:29 Vha tshi bva Jeriko, Yesu a tevhelwa nga gogo ḽihulu." 
Matthew20:30 Zwino henefho nḓilani ho vha ho dzula mabofu mavhili. Vha tshi pfa hu tshi pfi Yesu u khou fhira vha ṱavha mukosi vha ri, “Muṋe washu Murwa wa Dafita, nga vha ri pfele vhuṱungu!”" 
Matthew20:31 Vhathu vha vha kaidza uri vha fhumule, u ralo ha tou vha u vha ṱuṱuwedza u ṱavha mukosi vha ri, “Muṋe washu Murwa wa Dafita, a vha ri pfeli zwashu vhuṱungu?”" 
Matthew20:32 Yesu a ima a vha vhidzisa a ri, “Nṋa ndi mini tshine na funa ndi tshi ni itela?”" 
Matthew20:33 Vha mu fhindula vha ri, “Muṋe washu, ri lila uri ri kone u vhona-vho.”" 
Matthew20:34 Yesu a vha pfela vhuṱungu a kwama maṱo avho, kathihi fhedzi vha mbo ḓi kona u vhona; vha mu tevhela." 
Matthew21:1 Musi vha tshi vho sendela Jerusalema, vha tshi vho swika Bethefage, Thavhani ya Miolivi, Yesu a ruma vhafunziwa vhavhili" 
Matthew21:2 a vha vhudza a ri, “Iyani muḓini u re hafho phanḓa. Hu ḓo ri ni tshi kha ḓi tou dzhena khawo na wana donngi ya tsadzi yo hungwaho i na donngana. Ni i vhofholole ni i ḓise fhano." 
Matthew21:3 Arali na vhudziswa uri ni khou zwi itelani, ni ri, ‘Thovhele u na mushumo nadzo; u ḓo dzi vhuisa hu si kale.’ ”" 
Matthew21:4 Zwenezwo zwo itea uri hu khunyelele ḽo ambiwaho nga muporofita a tshi ri," 
Matthew21:5 “Vhudzani musidzana Tsioni ni ri, ‘Khosi yaṋu asiyi i khou ḓa u ni dalela; khosi yo vuḓaho, yo namelaho donngi, yo namela donngana, ṅwana wa donngi.’ ”" 
Matthew21:6 Vhafunziwa vha mbo ya vha ita zwenezwo zwe Yesu a vha laedza. 
Matthew21:7 Vha ḓisa iḽa donngi na ṅwana wayo, vha kapea zwiambaro zwavho khadzo, Ene a konou namela." 
Matthew21:8 Vhunzhi ha gogo ha adza zwiambaro gondoni, vhaṅwe vha rema matavhi a miri vha tshi a ala-vho nḓilani." 
Matthew21:9 Vhathu vhe vha vha vhe phanḓa hawe na vhe vha vha vhe murahu vha thoma u huvha mihuvho vha tshi ri, “Hosiana! Murwa' Dafita asuyu! Nga hu rendwe a ḓaho nga dzina ḽa Muṋe washu! Nga hu rendwe Waṱaḓuluṱaḓulu!”" 
Matthew21:10 Yesu a tshi dzhena Jerusalema muḓi woṱhe wa tou dzinginyea nga bvumo ḽawe vhathu vha tshi ri, “Nṋa a nga vha e nnyi onoyu?”" 
Matthew21:11 Ḽiḽa gogo ḽa fhindula ḽa ri, “Ndi uḽa muporofita, Yesu wa Nazaretha kha ḽa Galelia.”" 
Matthew21:12 Yesu a dzhena muṱani wa thembele a thoma u pandela vhoṱhe vhe vha vha vha tshi khou renga na vhe vha vha vha tshi khou rengisa zwithu zwavho henefho, a mbo thenukanya maḓafula a vhatshintshi vha tshelede na zwidulo zwa vharengisi vha maivha," 
Matthew21:13 a vha vhudza a ri, “Maṅwalo a ri, ‘Nnḓu yanga i ḓo pfi nnḓu ya thabelo,’ zwino inwi no no i shandula ‘bako ḽa mavemu!’ ”" 
Matthew21:14 Ndi hone hu tshi ḓa mabofu na zwihole ha Yesu henefho thembeleni, a vha fhodza." 
Matthew21:15 Vhotshifhe vhahulwane na vhaḓivhi vha Maṅwalo vha tshi vhona maḓembe e a ita, vha tshi pfa na vhana vha tshi khou huvha mihuvho henefho thembeleni vha tshi ri, “Hosiana! Murwa wa Dafita asuyu!” vha dinalea" 
Matthew21:16 vha amba na Yesu vha ri, “Nṋa vha khou zwi pfa zwine avha vhana vha khou amba?” Yesu a vha fhindula a ri, “Ndi khou vha pfa. Nṋa matsiko a ni athu vhala Maṅwaloni hune ha pfi, ‘Ndi ḓo ita uri milomo ya vhaṱoma na vhushie i nthende’?”" 
Matthew21:17 Ndi hone a tshi vha sia henefho a ṱuwa Jerusalema a ya Bethania a lala hone. 
Matthew21:18 Nga matshelo Yesu a tshi vhuelela Jerusalema a farwa nga nḓala. 
Matthew21:19 A vhona muhuyu wo ima henefho tsini ha nḓila u woṱhe, a ya khawo u yo ṱoḓa mahuyu, a si wane tshithu, a wana u na maṱari fhedzi. Ndi hone a tshi amba nawo a ri, “A u tsha ḓo aṋwa fuyu na lini na lini!” Muhuyu wa mbo ḓi oma na zwenezwo." 
Matthew21:20 Vhafunziwa vha tshi zwi vhona vha kanuka vha ri, “Nṋa zwo ḓa hani muhuyu u tshi oma na zwenezwo?”" 
Matthew21:21 Yesu a vha fhindula a ri, “Zwino ipfani-ha: arali ni na lutendo, ni sa timatimi, a ni nga iti zwi no nga hezwi zwa muhuyu fhedzi; ni ḓo tou amba na thavha hei na ri, ‘Takuwa u ḓipose lwanzheni!’ zwa ralo." 
Matthew21:22 Na zwoṱhe zwine na ḓo humbela nga thabelo ni tshi fulufhela ni ḓo fhiwa.” 
Matthew21:23 Yesu a dzhena muṱani wa thembele a funza vhathu. Ndi hone vhotshifhe vhahulwane na vhahulwane vha lushaka vha tshi ḓa khae vha ri, “Nṋa ni tshi ita nga u ralo zwi bva kha nnyi? Ndi nnyi o ni fhaho maanḓa a u zwi ita?”" 
Matthew21:24 Yesu a vha fhindula a ri, “Imani ndi ni vhudzise-vho mbudziso. Arali na i fhindula ndi ḓo kona u ni vhudza-vho uri zwi bva kha nnyi ndi tshi ita nga u ralo." 
Matthew21:25 Mbudziso yanga asiyi: Zwiḽa Johanisi a tshi lovhedza zwo vha zwi tshi bva kha nnyi? Kha Mudzimu kana kha vhathu?” Vhone vha thoma u zwi amba nga tshavho vha ri, “Nṋa ri nga tou ri mini? Arali ra ri, ‘Kha Mudzimu,’ u ḓo ri, ‘Zwino-ha na kundwa ngani u tenda pfunzo yawe?’" 
Matthew21:26 Zwino-vho ra ri, ‘Kha vhathu,’ ri ofha magogo haya ngauri vha ḓivha Johanisi e muporofita.”" 
Matthew21:27 Ndi hone vha tshi sokou fhindula Yesu vha ri, “A ri ḓivhi.” Ene a konou vha fhindula a ri, “Izwo-ha Nṋe-vho a thi nga ni vhudzi uri ndi tshi ita hezwi zwithu zwi bva kha nnyi." 
Matthew21:28 “Inwi ni zwi vhona hani? Ho vhuya ha vha na muṅwe munna we a vha e na vhana vhavhili vha vhatuka. A ya ha wa u thoma a ri, ‘Ṅwananga, iyani ni yo shuma tsimuni ya minḓirivhe ṋamusi.’" 
Matthew21:29 Muṱhannga a fhindula a ri, ‘A thi funi.’ Hone a sala a tshi ḓisola a ya." 
Matthew21:30 Ndi hone khotsi avho a tshi ya ha wa vhuvhili a mu vhudza zwenezwiḽa. Muṱhannga a fhindula a ri, ‘Ndi zwone muṋe wanga,’ hone a sala a si tsha ya." 
Matthew21:31 Zwino kha havha vhavhili ndi nnyi we a ita zwine khotsi awe a zwi funa?” Vhaḽa vha fhindula vha ri, “Ndi uḽa wa u thoma.” Yesu a vha vhudza a ri, “Thetshelesani ndi ni vhudze: vhathelisi vhadzia-u-ṱangula vhathu, na dziphombwe, vha ḓo dzhena muvhusoni wa Mudzimu inwi ni sa athu." 
Matthew21:32 Hufha Johanisi o ḓa u ni sumbedza nḓila-nḓila ni si mu tende, hone vhathelisi na dziphombwe vho tenda zwe a amba, inwi na zwi vhona, ni si sale ni tshi ḓisola na zwi tenda." 
Matthew21:33 “Tshiṅwe tshifanyiso asitshi: Ho vhuya ha vha na muṋe wa tsimu we a lima minḓirivhe a i vhiela nga mutsheṱo, a kora bonḓelo ḽa u sukela nḓirivhe kha lutombo, a ita na u fhaṱa ḓingo ḽilapfu ḽa u linda tsimu. O no ralo a i hirisa kha vhalimi a pfulutshela shangoni ḽiṅwe." 
Matthew21:34 Musi tshifhinga tsha u fula nḓirivhe tshi tshi swika a ruma vhashumi kha vhahiri uri vha yo dzhia mukovhe wawe. 
Matthew21:35 Vhalimi vhone vha fara vhashumi vhaḽa, muṅwe vha mu likita, muṅwe vha mu vhulaha, muṅwe vha mu kanḓa nga matombo." 
Matthew21:36 A dovha a ruma vhaṅwe vha no fhira vhaḽa vha u thoma, na vhone vha vha ita zwenezwo." 
Matthew21:37 A fhedza nga u ruma ṅwana wawe wa mutuka a ri, ‘Ndi vhona uri ṅwananga vha ḓo mu teledza.’" 
Matthew21:38 Hone vhaḽa vhalimi vha tshi vhona ṅwana wawe vha amba nga tshavho vha ri, ‘Hoyu ndi ene muḽaifa. Iḓani noṱhe ri mu vhulahe, ndi hone tsimu iyi i tshi ḓo vha ifa ḽashu!’" 
Matthew21:39 Vha fara uḽa muṱhannga vha mu kudza nnḓa ha tsimu ya minḓirivhe vha mu vhulaha. 
Matthew21:40 Zwino muṋe wa tsimu a tshi vhuya, vhaḽa vhalimi u ḓo vha itani?”" 
Matthew21:41 Vha fhindula vha ri, “Zwigevhenga zwiḽa nandi? U ḓo vha vhulaha nga nḓila i ofhisaho, iyo tsimu a i ṋea vhaṅwe vhalimi, vhane vha ḓo mu ṋea mukovhe wawe nga tshifhinga.”" 
Matthew21:42 Yesu a vha vhudza a ri, “Kani a ni athu vhuya na vhala Maṅwaloni fhaḽa hu no pfi, “ ‘Tombo ḽe ḽa laṱwa nga vhafhaṱi ḽa pfi a ḽi na mushumo, ḽo vho ḓo vha ḽone thikho ya tshifhaṱo! Hezwo zwo itwa nga Muṋe washu; vhonani uri zwi kanukisa hani!’" 
Matthew21:43 “Ndi zwine nda khou ni vhudza nda ri ni ḓo dzhielwa muvhuso wa Mudzimu wa fhiwa lushaka lune lwa aṋwa mitshelo yawo. [ 
Matthew21:44 Ane a wela kha tombo iḽo u ḓo vunḓekana; hu ḓi nga ane ḽa mu wela, ḽi a mu pwaṱukanya.”]" 
Matthew21:45 Vhotshifhe vhahulwane na Vhafarisei vha tshi pfa zwifanyiso zwawe vha mbo ḓi zwi pfa uri u khou amba vhone," 
Matthew21:46 vha vho linga uri a farwe, hone vha ofha gogo ḽa vhathu, ngauri gogo ḽo vha ḽi tshi ri Yesu ndi muporofita." 
Matthew22:1 Yesu a dovha a amba na vhathu nga zwifanyiso, a vha hanelela a ri," 
Matthew22:2 “Muvhuso wa Mudzimu u fana na muthu wa khosi o itelaho ṅwana wawe wa mutuka munyanya wa mbingano. 
Matthew22:3 A ruma vhaḓinḓa vhawe u yo vhidza vho vhidzwaho, vhone vha landula." 
Matthew22:4 A dovha a ruma vhaṅwe vhaḓinḓa a ri, ‘Vhudzani vho vhidzwaho ni ri: Ndo no lugisa munyanya wanga, na dziphulu na mbohwana dzo nonaho ndo no ṱhavha; zwoṱhe zwo dzula zwo luga. Iḓani-ha munyanyani!’" 
Matthew22:5 Hone vho vhidzwaho vha si ḓe, muṅwe a ya tsimuni yawe, muṅwe a ya mushumoni wawe." 
Matthew22:6 Vhaṅwe vha levhela vhaḓinḓa vhawe vha vha fara vha vha vhulaha. 
Matthew22:7 Khosi ya sinyuwa nga maanḓa, ya ruma mmbi dzayo u yo vhulaha dziḽa phondi na u fhisa muḓi wadzo." 
Matthew22:8 “Ndi hone khosi i tshi vhudza vhaḓinḓa vhayo ya ri, ‘Munyanya ndo lugisa, vho vhidzwaho vha ro vha vha songo fanelwa." 
Matthew22:9 Iyani-ha magondoni ni sokou vhidza muṅwe na muṅwe ane na tshenuwa no ṱangana nae.’ 
Matthew22:10 Nangoho vhaḽa vhaḓinḓa vha ya dzinḓilani vha vhidza vhoṱhe vhe vha ṱangana navho, vhavhi na vhavhuya, vhoṱhe. Nnḓu ya ḓala vho vhidzwaho munyanyani." 
Matthew22:11 “Musi khosi i tshi ḓa u sedza vho dzulaho zwiḽiwani a vhona muṅwe munna henefho a songo ambaraho zwiambaro zwa munyanya. 
Matthew22:12 A mu vhudzisa a ri, ‘Hee, khonani, nṋa zwo ḓa hani ni tshi sokou ḓa fhano munyanyani ni songo ambara zwiambaro zwa munyanya?’ Uḽa a kundwa ḽa u fhindula." 
Matthew22:13 Ndi hone khosi i tshi vhudza vhashumi vhayo ya ri, ‘Mu vhofheni milenzhe na zwanḓa ni mu pose ngei nnḓa swiswini. Henefho vha ḓo lila, vha ita na u shenganya maṋo nga vhuṱungu.’" 
Matthew22:14 “Ho vhidzwa vhanzhi; ho ro nangiwa vha si gathi.” 
Matthew22:15 Ndi hone Vhafarisei vha tshi yo ita vhukwila ha u mu fasha arali a tshi nga amba ipfi ḽi songo ḓaho. 
Matthew22:16 Vha ruma vhaṅwe vha vhafunziwa vhavho khathihi na vhaṅwe vha ḽihoro ḽa Herude. Vhenevho vha mu vhudzisa vha ri, “Vhafunzi, ri a zwi ḓivha uri vhone vha munna a fulufhedzeaho, tshavho ndi u funza nḓila yone-yone ine Mudzimu a funa vhathu vha tshi tshila ngayo; vha tshi amba a vha thomi u sedza uri ndi nnyi, ngauri a vha ṱaluli muthu." 
Matthew22:17 Zwino vhone vha zwi vhona hani? Nga vha dzou ri vhudza: Nṋa Mulayo washu u a ri tendela ri tshi thela muthelo wa Khisara kana a u ri tendeli?” 
Matthew22:18 Hone Yesu nga u ḓivha vhukwila havho a amba navho a ri, “Vhadziamuhoyo ndinwi, ni nndingelani?" 
Matthew22:19 Ntsumbedzeni tshelede ine na thela ngayo ndi i vhone.” Ndi hone vha tshi mu sumbedza sheleni. 
Matthew22:20 A vha vhudzisa a ri, “Nṋa iyi ṱhoho na dzina iḽi ndi zwa nnyi?”" 
Matthew22:21 Vha fhindula vha ri, “Ndi zwa Khisara.” Yesu a ri, “Ahaa, izwo Khisara mu fheni zwi re zwawe; Mudzimu ni mu fhe-vho zwi re zwawe.”" 
Matthew22:22 Vha tshi pfa phindulo yawe vha kanuka, vha mu litsha vha ṱuwa." 
Matthew22:23 Ḽeneḽo ḓuvha vhaṅwe Vhasadukei vha ḓa ha Yesu (ndi vhaḽa vha no ri u vuwa ha vhafu a huho), vha mu vhudzisa" 
Matthew22:24 vha ri, “Vhafunzi, Mushe o ri arali muthu a tshi fa a si na ṅwana, murathu wawe u fanela a dzhia musadzi wawe uri a bebele mukomana vhana." 
Matthew22:25 Zwino, hafhano ha hashu ho vha hu na vhaṱhannga vhaṱanu na vhavhili, vhana vha munna. Wa tanzhe a dzea, a vhuya a fa a sa athu vha na ṅwana, a siela murathu musadzi wawe." 
Matthew22:26 Na onoyo a fa nga u ralo a si na ṅwana, na wa vhuraru zwa ḓi ralo, na a tevhelaho, zwa vhuya zwa ṱanganya vhoṱhe vhuṱanu na vhuvhili havho." 
Matthew22:27 Ha fhedza nga u fa na uḽa musadzi. 
Matthew22:28 Zwino musi vhafu vha tshi vuswa, musadzi uyo u ḓo vha wa nnyi kha havha vhaṱanu na vhavhili? Hufha vhoṱhe o vha musadzi wavho?”" 
Matthew22:29 Yesu a vha fhindula a ri, “Nṋa no tou xela tshingafhani, ngauri hu Maṅwalo, hu maanḓa a Mudzimu, a ni a ḓivhi." 
Matthew22:30 Musi vhafu vha tshi vuswa vha ḓo nga vharuṅwa vha ngei ṱaḓulu; zwa u dzea na u dzewa a zwi nga vhi hone. 
Matthew22:31 “Kha a u vuswa ha vhafu ndi ri: Nṋa a ni athu vhala fhaḽa hune Mudzimu a ri," 
Matthew22:32 ‘Ndi Nṋe Mudzimu wa Abrahamu, na wa Isaka, na wa Jakopo’? Zwino hufha Mudzimu e si Mudzimu wa vho faho, e Mudzimu wa vha tshilaho.”" 
Matthew22:33 Magogo a tshi pfa pfunzo yawe a akhamala. 
Matthew22:34 Vhafarisei vha tshi pfa uri Yesu o kunda Vhasadukei, na vhone vha kuvhangana vha mu langana;" 
Matthew22:35 muṅwe wavho we a vha e muḓivhi wa Mulayo a mu vhudzisa mbudziso ya u mu fasha a ri," 
Matthew22:36 “Yone ndaela khulwane ya Mulayo woṱhe ndi ifhio?” 
Matthew22:37 Yesu a mu fhindula a ri, “ ‘Funa Muṋe wau Mudzimu nga mbilu yoṱhe, nga zwoṱhe zwine wa vha zwone, nga ṱhalukanyo yau yoṱhe.’" 
Matthew22:38 Ndi yone ndaela khulwane ya u ranga. 
Matthew22:39 I tevhelaho ine ya fana nayo khei: ‘Funa muṅwe unga iwe muṋe.’ 
Matthew22:40 Ndaela idzi mbili dzi katela Mulayo woṱhe na Maṅwalo a vhaporofita.” 
Matthew22:41 Musi Vhafarisei vho no kuvhangana Yesu a vha vhudzisa mbudziso 
Matthew22:42 a ri, “Zwa Mesia inwi ni ri mini ngazwo? Ni vhona unga ndi Murwa wa nnyi?” Vha mu fhindula vha ri, “Ndi wa Dafita.”" 
Matthew22:43 Yesu a konou ri, “Hufha Dafita o amba ó ḓala Muya Mukhethwa a ri Mesia ndi Muṋe wawe, zwiḽa a tshi ri," 
Matthew22:44 “ ‘Muṋe washu o amba na Muṋe wanga a ri: Dzula hafha thungo ya tshauḽa tshanga, ri vhuse roṱhe, ndi vhuye ndi ite maswina au vhukando ha milenzhe yau.’" 
Matthew22:45 “Asizwo-ha: arali Dafita ene muṋe a tshi mu ita Muṋe wawe zwi nga ḓa hani uri Mesia a vhe murwa wawe?” 
Matthew22:46 A hu na na muthihi we a kona u fhindula Yesu na ipfi na ḽithihi, nahone u bva heḽo ḓuvha a hu tshee na we a edzisa u mu vhudzisa mbudziso." 
Matthew23:1 Ndi hone Yesu a tshi amba na magogo khathihi na vhafunziwa vhawe 
Matthew23:2 a ri, “Vhaḓivhi vha Maṅwalo na Vhafarisei vho ima vhuimoni ha Mushe." 
Matthew23:3 Itani-ha zwoṱhe zwine vha ni vhudza, ni zwi tevhedze, hone vhone vhaṋe ni songo vha edzisa; vha vhea milayo ine vhone vhaṋe vha si tevhedze." 
Matthew23:4 Vha vhofha maputo a lemelaho vha hwesa vhathu, ngeno vhone vhaṋe vha sa a kwami na nga munwe zwawo." 
Matthew23:5 Zwoṱhe zwine vha ita vha itela u vhonwa nga vhathu fhedzi: ṱhohoni dzavho na zwanḓani vha vhofha mabannda mahulwane ane khao vha ṅwala vese dza Bivhili, kha badzhi dzavho vha rungelela mashaphu malapfulapfu." 
Matthew23:6 Vha nanga madzulo a phanḓa minyanyani na sinagogoni. 
Matthew23:7 Vha funa u loshwa khoroni na u pfi ‘Vhafunzi!’ 
Matthew23:8 Fhedzi inwi ni songo tenda u pfi ‘Vhafunzi’; mufunzi waṋu ndi muthihi, inwi noṱhe ni tou vha vharathu na vhakomana." 
Matthew23:9 Na u ita muthu, ‘Khotsi’ fhano shangoni ni songo zwi ita; Khotsi aṋu ndi muthihi, ndi wa ṱaḓulu." 
Matthew23:10 Ni songo tenda u pfi ‘Vharangaphanḓa’; murangaphanḓa waṋu ndi muthihi, ndi Mesia." 
Matthew23:11 Ane a vha muhulwane waṋu nga a vhe ene mushumeli waṋu; 
Matthew23:12 ngauri ane a ḓihudza u ḓo ṱukufhadzwa; ane a ḓiṱukufhadza u ḓo huliswa. 
Matthew23:13 “Ni ḓo zwi vhona inwi vhaḓivhi vha Maṅwalo na Vhafarisei; vhahoi ndinwi! Ni khielela vhathu nnḓa ha muvhuso wa Mudzimu. Inwi vhaṋe a ni dzheni, na dovha na dzivhisa vhane vha funa u dzhena." 
Matthew23:14  
Matthew23:15 “Ni ḓo zwi vhona inwi vhaḓivhi vha Maṅwalo na Vhafarisei; vhahoi ndinwi! Ni wela lwanzhe na buḓekanya mashango ni tshi ṱoḓa muthu muthihi ane na nga mu rembulusela kha lutendo lwaṋu; matsiko u ralo ha vha u mu ita muthu o fanelaho hele u fhira inwi kavhili. 
Matthew23:16 “Ni ḓo zwi vhona inwi vhane ngeno ni mabofu na endedza vhaṅwe; ni ri arali muthu a tshi ana nga nnḓu ya Mudzimu a zwi na mushumo, hone arali a tshi ana nga musuku u re nḓuni ya Mudzimu ndi hone o ḓivhofha." 
Matthew23:17 Matsilu o pofulaho ndinwi. Matsina tshihulwane ndi tshifhio? Ndi musuku kana ndi nnḓu ya Mudzimu ine ya ita na musuku uri u vhe mukhethwa? 
Matthew23:18 Na dovha na ri arali muthu a tshi ana nga aḽiṱari a zwi na mushumo, fhedzi arali a tshi ana nga nduvho i re khayo, ndi hone o ḓivhofha." 
Matthew23:19 Mabofu ndinwi! Matsina tshihulwane ndi tshifhio? Ndi nduvho kana ndi aḽiṱari ine ya ita na nduvho uri i vhe khethwa? 
Matthew23:20 Ngauralo ane a ana nga aḽiṱari u ana ngayo na nga tshiṅwe na tshiṅwe tshi re khayo. 
Matthew23:21 Zwi ḓi nga ane a ana nga nnḓu ya Mudzimu u ana ngayo na nga Mudzimu ane a dzula khayo. 
Matthew23:22 Zwi ḓi nga ane a ana nga ḽiṱaḓulu u ana nga khuluṋoni ya Mudzimu a dovha a ana na nga Ene Mudzimu o dzulaho khayo. 
Matthew23:23 “Ni ḓo zwi vhona, inwi vhaḓivhi vha Mulayo na Vhafarisei; vhahoi ndinwi! Ni bvisa tsha fumi tsha miroho ya nngu na muxe na luṋonya, na litsha u khunyeledza tshihulwane tsha Mulayo: a ni tsha londana, a ni na mbilutshilidzi, a ni fulufhedzei. Matsina ndi zwone zwe na vha no fanela u zwi ita, na zwiḽa zwiṅwe ni si zwi litshe." 
Matthew23:24 Ni endedza vhaṅwe ngeno inwi ni mabofu, inwi vhane na miṋa vhunyunyu ngeno gamela ni tshi mila nayo." 
Matthew23:25 “Ni ḓo zwi vhona inwi vhaḓivhi vha Maṅwalo na Vhafarisei; vhahoi ndinwi! Ni ṱanzwa khavho na ndilo nga nnḓa, ngeno ngomu zwo fara zwe na zwi wana nga vhuvemu na tseḓa." 
Matthew23:26 Vhafarisei, mabofu ndinwi, thomani u ṱanzwa khavho ngomu hayo, ndi hone na nnḓa i sa ḓo vha na tshika." 
Matthew23:27 “Ni ḓo zwi vhona inwi vhaḓivhi vha Maṅwalo na Vhafarisei; vhahoi ndinwi! Ni fana na zwalo zwo nakiswaho: zwi naka nga nnḓa, ngeno ngomu zwo ḓala marambo a vho faho na tshika." 
Matthew23:28 Na inwi no ralo: vhathu vha tshi ni vhona ni nga ni vhavhuya, ngeno ngomu haṋu vhu vhufhura fhedzi na vhuvhi." 
Matthew23:29 “Ni ḓo zwi vhona inwi vhaḓivhi vha Maṅwalo na Vhafarisei; vhahoi ndinwi! Ni vusa matombo a zwalo zwa vhaporofita, na ṱama zwalo zwa vhavhuya," 
Matthew23:30 na ri, ‘Ngavhe hu vhe riṋe vhe ra tshila misi ya vhomakhulukuku ndi musi ri songo shulula-vho malofha a vhaporofita sa vhone.’" 
Matthew23:31 Ni tshi ralo ha vha u ḓiambulula uri ni vhana vha vho vhulahaho vhaporofita. 
Matthew23:32 Ndi zwone, ṱhaphudzani-ha zwe vhokhotsi aṋu vha siedza." 
Matthew23:33 Dziṋowa ndinwi, ni maḓana a mavuluvulu, khaṱhulo ya u poswa heleni ni ḓo i ponyoka hani-ha?" 
Matthew23:34 Ndi zwine nda ri ndi ḓo ni rumela vhaporofita na vhaṱali na vhaḓivhi vha Maṅwalo. Vhaṅwe vhavho ni ḓo vha vhulaha, vhaṅwe na vha vhamba zwifhambanoni, vhaṅwe na vha rwa nga nnzi sinagogoni dzaṋu na vha tovhola vha bva kha uno muḓi vha shavhela kha uḽa," 
Matthew23:35 hu u itela uri malofha oṱhe a vhavhuya o shululwaho fhano fhasi a vhilwe kha inwi, u bva kha Abele we a vha a si na mulandu, u swika kha Zakaria ṅwana wa Berekia we na mu vhulaha vhukati ha nnḓu ya Mudzimu na aḽiṱari." 
Matthew23:36 Zwino ipfani-ha: oṱhe a ḓo vhiliwa kha vhathu vha musalauno. 
Matthew23:37 “Hee iwe Jerusalema! Ndi amba Jerusalema, hewe une we u vhulaha vhaporofita, vhaḓinḓa vha Mudzimu vho rumiwaho kha inwi na vha kanḓa nga matombo! Nṋa ndi kangana ndi tshi ri ndi kuvhatedze vhana vhau vhoṱhe sa khuhu i tshi kuvhatedza khukhwana dzayo nga phapha, hone iwe u si tende!" 
Matthew23:38 Zwino ndi hone-ha no ṅaledzelwa nnḓu yaṋu; Mudzimu o i ṱutshela. 
Matthew23:39 Ndi a ni vhudza ndi ri, a ni tsha ḓo mmbona hu vhuye hu ḓe musi une na ḓo ri, ‘Nga hu rendwe a ḓaho nga dzina ḽa Muṋe washu!’ ”" 
Matthew24:1 Yesu a tshi bva thembeleni vhafunziwa vhawe vha ḓa khae vha mu sumbedza zwifhaṱo zwa thembele. 
Matthew24:2 Hone Ene a vha vhudza a ri, “A thi ri izwi zwifhaṱo ni khou zwi vhona? Zwino ipfani-ha: fhano a hu na tombo na ḽithihi ḽine ḽa ḓo sala ḽo dzula kha ḽiṅwe; oṱhe a ḓo piḓimulwa.”" 
Matthew24:3 Yesu a ya a dzula fhasi Thavhani ya Miolivi, vhafunziwa vha ḓa khae vhe vhoṱhe vha mu vhudzisa vha ri, “Nga vha dzou ri vhudza uri zwine vha amba zwi ḓo itea lini; vha ri vhudze na tshiga tshine ra ḓo vhona ngatsho uri u vhuya havho na vhufhelo ha shango zwo sendela.”" 
Matthew24:4 Yesu a vha fhindula a ri, “Ni dzule no thanya uri ni si fhurwe;" 
Matthew24:5 hu ḓo ḓa vhanzhi vha ri ndi vhone Nṋe, muṅwe na muṅwe wavho a tshi ri, ‘Ndi nṋe Mesia.’ Vha tshi ralo vha ḓo xedza vhathu vhanzhi." 
Matthew24:6 Ni ḓo pfa mikosi ya nndwa yo ṱangana, na mavharivhari a nndwa dzi no khou ḓa. Zwi tshi ralo ni songo tshenuwa. Ndi pfanelo uri zwi itee, hone zwi sa ambi uri vhufhelo ha shango ndi hone ho swika." 
Matthew24:7 “Tshakha dzi ḓo shandukelana; mivhuso i ḓo vutshelana. Hu ḓo wa nḓala ha vha na midzinginyo ya shango hoṱhe-hoṱhe. 
Matthew24:8 Hezwi zwoṱhe ndi tshiga tsha uri Mesia u nḓilani, unga u ḓa ha muthu muswa hu tshi rangwa phanḓa nga vhuṱungu ha u beba." 
Matthew24:9 “Ndi hone vha tshi ḓo ni kumedza u tambudzwa, vha ita na u ni vhulaha. Tshakha dzoṱhe dzi ḓo ni vhenga nge na vha vhanga." 
Matthew24:10 Ndi hone vhanzhi vha tshi ḓo gunea vha fheṱana vha vhengana; 
Matthew24:11 ha ḓa na vhaporofita vhanzhi vha khole-khole vha xedza vhanzhi. 
Matthew24:12 Huno ngauri vhuvhi vhu ḓo ḓi ṋaṋa vhu tshi ya, lufuno lwa vhanzhi lu ḓo fhungudzea." 
Matthew24:13 Hone ane a ḓo konḓelela a sa litshi, ndi ene ane a ḓo tshidzwa." 
Matthew24:14 Mafhungo maḓifha haya a muvhuso wa Mudzimu a ḓo ranga u ḓivhadzwa mashangoni oṱhe uri tshakha dzoṱhe dzi pfe vhuṱanzi hawo, ha konou ḓa vhufhelo.”" 
Matthew24:15 “Musi ni tshi vhona ‘Vhuṱudzi vhu ḓisaho mutshinyalo’ ho ambiwaho nga muporofita Daniele ho imiswa fhethu hukhethwa (muvhali nga a pfesese)," 
Matthew24:16 vha re Judia vha shavhele zwikwarani. 
Matthew24:17 Muthu a re kha ṱhanga ya nnḓu yawe a songo ri u tsa a lenga-lenga nga u dzhena nḓuni uri a thome u goda thundu yawe. 
Matthew24:18 A re tsimuni a songo tsha lenga-lenga nga u humela hayani a yo dzhia nguvho yawe. 
Matthew24:19 Musi zwi tshi itea, vho vhifhaho mivhilini na vha mamisaho zwi ḓo vha konḓela." 
Matthew24:20 Itonu rabela uri hezwo zwithu zwi si itee vhuriha kana nga Sabatha. 
Matthew24:21 Maṱhupho a misi iyo a ḓo fhira oṱhe o no vhuyaho a vha hone u bva tshee shango ḽa sikwa u swika zwino. Nahone zwine zwa nga zwone a zwi nga dovhi zwa vha hone. 
Matthew24:22 Mudzimu ayo maḓuvha o a fhungudza. Ngavhe a si tou ralo ndi musi hu si na na ane a ḓo tshidzwa; hone u ḓo a fhungudza a tshi itela vhanangiwa. 
Matthew24:23 “Zwenezwo arali ni tshi pfa muthu a tshi ri, ‘Vhonani Mesia khoyu!’ kana a tshi ri, ‘Vhonani khouḽaa!’ ni songo tenda." 
Matthew24:24 Hu ḓo bvelela vhomesia vha khole-khole na vhaporofita vha khole-khole; vha ḓo ita maḓembe mahulu na zwimangadzo uri arali zwo vha zwi tshi konadzea vha xedze na vho nangwaho nga Mudzimu. 
Matthew24:25 Tenda ndo dzula ndo ni vhudza. 
Matthew24:26 Izwo arali vha ni vhudza vha ri, ‘Mesia u henengei sogani!’ ni songo vhuya na ya u vhona. Arali vha ri, ‘Asuyu, u fhano pfamoni!’ ni songo vhuya na tenda;" 
Matthew24:27 Mubebwa-nga-muthu a tshi vhuya u ḓo tou nga lupenyo lwa mvula lune lu tshi vhenge, lwa vhonetshela u bva vhubvaḓuvha u swika vhukovhela." 
Matthew24:28 “Hune ha vha na tshitumbu ndi hone hune maanga a kuvhangana hone.” 
Matthew24:29 “Hu ḓo ri ayo maḓuvha a maṱhupho a tshi fhela, ḓuvha ḽa dzima na ṅwedzi wa swifhala, nga ngeno ṋaledzi dzi tshi khou wa, zwi re lutomboni zwa vilingana." 
Matthew24:30 “Ndi hone tshiga tsha Mubebwa-nga-muthu tshi tshi ḓo vhonala lutomboni, tshakha dzoṱhe dza ḽifhasi dzi ḓo ṱavha mukosi nga nyofho dzi tshi vhona Mubebwa-nga-muthu a tshi ḓa o namela makole e na maanḓa na vhugala vhuhulu." 
Matthew24:31 U ḓo ruma vharuṅwa vhawe vha lidza phalaphala, vha kuvhanganya vhanangiwa vhawe vha tshi bva khuḓani nṋa dza shango u bva vhusendekamisi u swika vhusendekamisi." 
Matthew24:32 “Ḓifunzeni nga muhuyu: musi ni tshi vhona thavhi dzawo dzi tshi thoma u khuba maḓi dza ṱuma lurere, ni mbo ḓi ḓivha uri tsho limuwa." 
Matthew24:33 Na zwenezwo zwi ḓo ḓi tou ralo: zwithu izwo zwi tshi itea, ndi hone ni tshi ḓo ḓivha uri tshifhinga tsho swika." 
Matthew24:34 Thetshelesani ndi ni vhudze: hezwi zwithu zwi ḓo itea vhathu vha no khou tshila zwino vha sa athu fhelela vhoṱhe u fa. 
Matthew24:35 “Ḽiṱaḓulu na ḽifhasi zwi ḓo lovha, maipfi anga one ha nga weli fhasi." 
Matthew24:36 “Hone a hu na a ḓivhaho uri iḽo ḓuvha kana tshifhinga tshazwo tshi ḓo swika lini. Hu vharuṅwa ngei ṱaḓulu, hu Murwa, a vha zwi ḓivhi, a zwi ḓivhaho ndi Khotsi e eṱhe." 
Matthew24:37 “Zwa musi Mubebwa-nga-muthu a tshi vhuya zwi ḓo tou fana na zwiḽa zwa misi ya Nua. 
Matthew24:38 Zwiḽa hu sa athu ḓa muḓalo wa maḓi vhathu vho vha vha tshi ḓiḽela vha tshi ḓinwela, hu tshi dzewa, ha vhuya ha swika ḓuvha ḽe Nua a dzhena tshikepeni," 
Matthew24:39 vha si zwi londe ha vhuya ha ḓa muḓalo wa maḓi wa vha kumba vhoṱhe. Musi Mubebwa-nga-muthu a tshi vhuya zwi ḓo ḓi tou ralo. 
Matthew24:40 “Nga heḽo ḓuvha vhavhili vha ḓo vha vha tshi khou shuma tsimuni nthihi; muṅwe wavho a dzhiwa, muṅwe a siwa." 
Matthew24:41 Vhasadzi vhavhili vha ḓo vha vha tshi khou sinḓisana mutulini muthihi; muṅwe wavho a dzhiwa, muṅwe a siwa." 
Matthew24:42 Dzulani-ha no fhaṱuwa, ngauri a ni ḓivhi uri Muṋe waṋu u ḓo vhuya lini." 
Matthew24:43 “Kani a ni ḓivhi uri arali muṋe wa nnḓu o dzula o zwi ḓivha uri fobvu ḽi ḓo thukhutha nḓuni yawe nga tshifhinga tsha uri, o vha a sa ḓo yo lala, o vha a tshi ḓo i linda uri i si vhuye ya thukhuthwa." 
Matthew24:44 Na inwi ni fanela u dzula no ḓilugisa nga u ralo; Mubebwa-nga-muthu u ḓo swika ni songo lavhelela. 
Matthew24:45 “Zwino mukoma wa vhuṱali a fulufhedzeaho ndi ḓo ri ndi nnyi? Ndi amba ane muṋe wawe a ḓo mu ita ene mulangi wa zwoṱhe zwa muṱani wawe, uri a ṋee vhathu zwiḽiwa nga tshifhinga tshazwo?" 
Matthew24:46 U na mashudu mukoma ane muṋe wawe a tshi vhuya, a wana a tshee khazwo." 
Matthew24:47 Thetshelesani ndi ni vhudze: hoyo muthu muṋe wawe u ḓo mu ita mukoma kha zwoṱhe zwi re zwawe. 
Matthew24:48 “Hone arali uyo mushumi e muvhi, a ambela mbiluni yawe a ri, ‘Hufha muṋe wanga a tshi khou lenga u vhuya,’" 
Matthew24:49 a thoma u fara vhashumi ngae a tshi vha rwa, a tshi ḓiḽela a tshi kambiwa," 
Matthew24:50 u ḓo tshenuwa muṋe wawe o vhuya musi a songo lavhelela, nga tshifhinga tshine a si vhuye a tshi ḓivha," 
Matthew24:51 a mu fhandula nga vhukati ha vha u mu baḓekanya na vhahoi. Henefho hu ḓo vha na zwililo, vhathu vha shenganya maṋo nga vhuṱungu." 
Matthew25:1 “Zwenezwo muvhuso wa Mudzimu ri nga u fanyisa na vhasidzana vha fumi vhe vha dzhia mbone dzavho vha yo ṱanganedza mukwasha. 
Matthew25:2 Vhaṱanu vhavho vho vha vhe matsilu ngeno vhaṱanu vho vha vho ṱalifha. 
Matthew25:3 Musi vha matsilu vha tshi dzhia mbone dzavho a vho ngo tsha dzhia na mapfura," 
Matthew25:4 ngeno vho ṱalifhaho vho dzhia mbone dzavho khathihi na midzio ya mapfura. 
Matthew25:5 Mukwasha a lenga u swika, vhoṱhe vha vhuya vha kumedza vha eḓela." 
Matthew25:6 “Vhukati ha vhusiku ha ṱavhiwa mukosi ha pfi, ‘Mukwasha ngoyu o swika! Ibvani ni mu ṱanganedze!’" 
Matthew25:7 Vhaḽa vhasidzana vhoṱhe vha mbo ḓi vuwa vha funga mbone dzavho. 
Matthew25:8 Vhaḽa vha matsilu vha humbela vho ṱalifhaho vha ri, ‘Na ri fha-vho mapfura mbone dzashu dzi tshi khou dzima.’" 
Matthew25:9 Vho ṱalifhaho vha fhindula vha ri, ‘Aiwa, khamusi ri si vhe na mapfura o eḓanaho riṋe na inwi; ndi khwiṋe ni tshi ya ha vharengisi na yo ḓirengela.’" 
Matthew25:10 “Musi vha tshee vho yo renga, mukwasha a mbo swika; zwenezwo vhaḽa vhe vha vha vho ḓilugisa vha dzhena nae munyanyani wa mbingano, vothi ḽa mbo hoṋwa." 
Matthew25:11 “Ngavhuya vhaḽa vhaṅwe vhasidzana vha swika-vho vha ri, ‘Muṋe washu, muṋe washu, nga vha ri vulele!’" 
Matthew25:12 Mukwasha a fhindula a ri, ‘Hee inwi, a thi ni ḓivhi!’" 
Matthew25:13 Zwino-ha, dzulani no fhaṱuwa, a ni ḓivhi ḓuvha na tshifhinga." 
Matthew25:14 “Muvhuso wa Mudzimu wa dovha wa fana na muthu we a fara lwendo. Musi a sa athu takuwa a vhidza vhashumi vhawe a vha kumedza thundu yawe; 
Matthew25:15 muṅwe a mu fha thalennde ṱhanu, muṅwe mbili, muṅwe nthihi, muṅwe na muṅwe a tshi fhiwa nga u kona hawe. Ndi hone a tshi takuwa." 
Matthew25:16 Uḽa mushumi we a kumedzwa thalennde ṱhanu a mbo ḓi ya a dzi shumisa a dzi bindulisa dziṅwe ṱhanu. 
Matthew25:17 Uḽa o kumedzwaho mbili a ita zwenezwo a dzi bindulisa dziṅwe mbili. 
Matthew25:18 Uḽa o wanaho nthihi a ya a bwa dindi a dzumba iyo tshelede ya muṋe wawe khaḽo. 
Matthew25:19 “Zwino ho no fhela maḓuvha manzhi muṋe wa vhaḽa vhashumi a vhuya, a thoma u vhalelana navho tshelede." 
Matthew25:20 Ha sendela uḽa o fhiwaho thalennde ṱhanu a dzi ḓisa khathihi na dziḽa dziṅwe ṱhanu a ri, ‘Muṋe wanga, vho nkumedza thalennde ṱhanu; zwino ndo vha bindulela dziṅwe ṱhanu asidzi.’" 
Matthew25:21 Muṋe wawe a mu fhindula a ri, ‘A u vhoni-ha mushumi wanga wavhuḓi a fulufhedzeaho! Vhunga wo fulufhedzea kha hezwi zwiṱuku ndi ḓo u kumedza na zwiṅwe zwihulwane. Iḓa ri takale roṱhe!’" 
Matthew25:22 Ndi hone hu tshi sendela na uḽa o fhiwaho thalennde mbili a ri, ‘Muṋe wanga, vho nkumedza thalennde mbili, zwino ndo vha bindulela dziṅwe mbili asidzi.’" 
Matthew25:23 Muṋe wawe a mu fhindula a ri, ‘A u vhoni-ha mushumi wanga wavhuḓi a fulufhedzeaho! Vhunga wo fulufhedzea kha hezwi zwiṱuku ndi ḓo u kumedza na zwiṅwe zwihulwane. Iḓa ri takale roṱhe!’" 
Matthew25:24 “Uḽa o fhiwaho thalennde nthihi na ene a sendela a ri, ‘Muṋe wanga, ndo zwi ḓivha uri vha na tshiṱuhu; vha kaṋa he vha si lime, vha ḓifulela mitshelo he vha si sime muri." 
Matthew25:25 Ndi zwe nda ofha ngazwo, nda sokou ya nda dzumba tshelede yavho mavuni. Thundu yavho asiyi.’" 
Matthew25:26 Muṋe wawe a fhindula a ri, ‘Mushumi a sa ḓivhalei! Mubva ndiwe! Hufha wo zwi ḓivha uri ndi kaṋa he ndi si lime, nda ḓifulela mitshelo he ndi si sime muri." 
Matthew25:27 Khezwi u songo vhea tshelede banngani zwayo, uri musi ndi tshi vhuya ndi wane i na nzwalelo." 
Matthew25:28 Mu dzhieleni-ha thalennde ni fhe hoyu a re na fumi. 
Matthew25:29 Ane a vha na zwawe u ḓo engedzwa uri a vhe na zwinzhi; hone a si na u ḓo dzhielwa na zwiṱukuṱuku zwine a vha nazwo. 
Matthew25:30 Mushumi hoyu a sa ḓivhalei ni mu pose ngei nnḓa swiswini. Henefho hu ḓo vha na zwililo, vha shenganya maṋo nga vhuṱungu.’" 
Matthew25:31 “Musi Mubebwa-nga-muthu a tshi vhuya e vhugalani hawe e na vharuṅwa vhoṱhe, ndi hone a tshi ḓo dzula kha khuluṋoni yawe ya vhugala." 
Matthew25:32 Tshakha dzoṱhe dzi ḓo kuvhanganywa khoroni yawe. Ndi hone a tshi ḓo khethekanya vhathu sa mulisa a tshi khethekanya nngu na mbudzi. 
Matthew25:33 U ḓo khadela nngu thungo ya tshanḓa tshauḽa, mbudzi a dzi khadela thungo ya tshamonde." 
Matthew25:34 Ndi hone Khosi i tshi ḓo amba na vhaḽa vha re thungo ya tshanḓa tshauḽa ya ri, ‘Iḓani inwi no shudufhadzwaho nga Khotsi anga, ni dzhene muvhusoni we na lugiselwa wone u bva tshee shango ḽa tewa." 
Matthew25:35 Ndo vhuya nda pfa nḓala inwi na mpha zwiḽiwa; nda pfa ḓora na mpha maḓi; ndo vha ndo kovhelelwa inwi na ntswielela; 
Matthew25:36 ndo vha ndi na tsiku inwi na ntshavhedza; ndi tshi lwala na ḓa na nṱola; musi ndi dzhele na ḓi ḓa u mmbona.’ 
Matthew25:37 “Ndi hone vhavhuya vhaḽa vha tshi ḓo mu fhindula vha ri, ‘Muṋe washu, ndi lini he ra wana vhe na nḓala ra vha ṋea zwiḽiwa kana vhe na ḓora ra vha ṋea maḓi?" 
Matthew25:38 Ndi lini he ra wana vho kovhelelwa ra vha swielela, kana vhe na tsiku ra vha shavhedza?" 
Matthew25:39 Ndi lini he ra wana vha tshi lwala kana vhe dzhele ra ḓa u vha ṱola?’ 
Matthew25:40 “Ndi hone Khosi i tshi ḓo vha fhindula ya ri, ‘Thetshelesani ndi ni vhudze: ndi ri zwenezwiḽa zwe na zwi itela muṅwe wa havha vharathu vhanga vha nyadzeaho, no zwi itela Nṋe.’" 
Matthew25:41 “A konou ḓo amba-vho na vhaḽa vha thungo ya tshanḓa tshamonde a ri, ‘Nṱutsheleni inwi no teketelwaho nga Mudzimu ni ye muliloni wo vhaselwaho diabolo na vharuṅwa vhawe." 
Matthew25:42 Ndo vhuya nda pfa nḓala ni si mphe zwiḽiwa; nda pfa ḓora ni si mphe maḓi; 
Matthew25:43 ndo vha ndo kovhelelwa ni si ntswielele, ndi na tsiku ni si ntshavhedze, ndi tshi lwala na musi ndi dzhele ni si ḓe na nṱola.’" 
Matthew25:44 “Ndi hone vha tshi ḓo mu fhindula-vho vha ri, ‘Muṋe washu, ndi lini he ra vha wana vhe na nḓala naho vhe na ḓora kana vho kovhelelwa kana vhe na tsiku kana vha tshi khou lwala naho vhe dzhele ri si vha londe?’" 
Matthew25:45 “Ndi hone a tshi ḓo vha fhindula a ri, ‘Thetshelesani ndi ni vhudze: henefhaḽa he na litsha u zwi itela muṅwe wa havha vha nyadzeaho, ḓivhani uri na Nṋe a no ngo nnyitela.’" 
Matthew25:46 Zwenezwo ndi hone vha tshi ḓo ṱuwa vha ya tshengeloni i sa gumi, vhavhuya vha tshi ya vhutshiloni vhu sa gumi.”" 
Matthew26:1 Musi Yesu o fhedza u amba maipfi ayo oṱhe a amba na vhafunziwa vhawe a ri," 
Matthew26:2 “Ḓivhani uri hu tshee ho sala maḓuvha mavhili hu tshi ḽiwa vhuṱambo ha Paseka. Ndi hone Mubebwa-nga-muthu a tshi ḓo kumedzwa uri a vhambiwe tshifhambanoni.” 
Matthew26:3 Zwenezwo vhotshifhe vhahulwane na vhahulwane vha lushaka vha kuvhangana khoroni ya tshifhe muhulu we a vha a tshi pfi Khayafasi," 
Matthew26:4 vha vhamba maano a u fara Yesu nga vhukwila uri vha mu vhulahe. 
Matthew26:5 Hone vha ri, “Ri songo mu fara vhuṱamboni; vhathu vha nga ḓo ri vutshela.”" 
Matthew26:6 Yesu o vha e Bethania nḓuni ya Simoni uḽa wa u lwala vhulwadze ha lukanda. 
Matthew26:7 Ha ḓa muṅwe musadzi o fara tshiḓolo tshi nukhelelaho nga khambana ya alibastere. Itsho tshiḓolo tsho vha tshi tsha mutengo muhulu. Uyo musadzi a mbo ḓi shululela tshiḓolo kha ṱhoho ya Yesu. 
Matthew26:8 Vhafunziwa vhawe vha tshi zwi vhona vha vhilaela vha ri, “Nṋa u itani a tshi tambisa itshi tshiḓolo?" 
Matthew26:9 Khezwi tshi songo rengiswa nga tshelede nnzhi ya ṋewa zwayo vhashai?” 
Matthew26:10 Hone Yesu a ḓivha zwine vha amba. Ndi hone a tshi fhindula a ri, “Ni songo ṱolou dina hoyu musadzi. Kani ho ngo nnyitela zwavhuḓi?" 
Matthew26:11 Vhashai ni ḓo ḓi dzula ni navho misi yoṱhe, hone Nṋe a ni nga vhi na Nṋe misi yoṱhe." 
Matthew26:12 Hoyu musadzi a tshi ḓodza muvhili wanga mapfura aya ho vha u nndugisela ḓuvha ḽa u swiṱwa hanga. 
Matthew26:13 Zwino ipfani-ha: zwe hoyu musadzi a nnyita a zwi nga hangwiwi; dzina ḽawe ḽi ḓo pfala-vho hoṱhe-hoṱhe hune mafhungo maḓifha aya a ḓo anḓadzwa hone shangoni ḽoṱhe.” 
Matthew26:14 Ndi hone hu tshi takuwa muṅwe wa vha 12 a no pfi Judasi Iskariote, a ya ha vhotshifhe vhahulwane" 
Matthew26:15 a ri, “Ni ḓo mpha vhugai arali nda ni kumedza Ene?” Vha langana nae uri vha ḓo mu fha maseṱha a 30." 
Matthew26:16 U bva zwenezwo Judasi a mbo ḓi thoma u ṱoḓa tshifhinga tsha u vha sumbedza hune vha nga wana Yesu. 
Matthew26:17 Nga ḓuvha ḽa u thoma ḽa vhuṱambo ha Vhurotho vhu si na mbilisa vhafunziwa vha ḓa ha Yesu vha mu vhudzisa vha ri, “Vhafunzi, vha funa ri tshi yo vha lugisela ngafhi tshilalelo tsha Paseka?”" 
Matthew26:18 Yesu a fhindula a ri, “Dzhenani muḓini ni ye ha mukene ni mu vhudze ni ri, ‘Vhafunzi vha ri: Tshifhinga tshanga tsho sendela; ndi khou ṱoḓa u ḽa Paseka na vhafunziwa vhanga nḓuni yavho.’ ”" 
Matthew26:19 Vhafunziwa vha mbo ya vha ita zwenezwo zwe Yesu a vha laedza, vha konou lugisa tshilalelo tsha Paseka." 
Matthew26:20 Nga madekwana Yesu a dzula zwiḽiwani na vha 12. 
Matthew26:21 Musi vha tshi khou ḽa, Yesu a ri, “Zwino ipfani-ha: muṅwe waṋu henefha u ḓo mpheṱa.”" 
Matthew26:22 Zwa vha dina, vha thoma u mu vhudzisa nga muthihi nga muthihi vha ri, “Kani Muṋe wanga vha khou amba nṋe?”" 
Matthew26:23 A fhindula a ri, “Ane a ḓo mpheṱa ndi a thothaho na Nṋe fhano." 
Matthew26:24 Zwe Maṅwalo a tela Mubebwa-nga-muthu zwi ḓo ṱuwa zwi tshi itea, hone hoyo ane a ḓo mu fheṱa u ḓo zwi vhona. Onoyo u ḓo ita na u ḓisola zwe a vhuya a bebwa.”" 
Matthew26:25 Judasi, we a sala a tshi mu fheṱa a mbo vhudzisa a ri, “Kani a nga vha e nṋe Vhafunzi?” Yesu a fhindula a ri, “Ndi zwenezwo.”" 
Matthew26:26 Musi vha tshi khou lalela, Yesu a dzhia vhurotho, a livhuha Mudzimu a konou vhu ṅwatekanya a ṋea vhafunziwa vhawe a tshi ri, “Ṱanganedzani ni ḽe; hoyu ndi muvhili wanga.”" 
Matthew26:27 O no ralo a dzhia tshinwelo, a livhuha Mudzimu a vha ṋea a ri, “Inwani ngatsho noṱhe." 
Matthew26:28 Haya ndi malofha anga ane a shululelwa vhathu vhanzhi uri vha hangwelwe vhutshinyi; malofha anga haya ndi a u khwaṱhisa mulanga wa Mudzimu. 
Matthew26:29 Zwino ipfani-ha: u bva ṋamusi a thi tsha ḓo dovha nda nwa waini ndi vhuye ndi i nwe na inwi nga huswa nga heḽo ḓuvha muvhusoni wa Khotsi anga.” 
Matthew26:30 Ndi hone vha tshi imba luimbo vha konou ya Thavhani ya Miolivi. 
Matthew26:31 Ndi hone Yesu a tshi vha vhudza a ri, “Vhusiku honovhu noṱhe ni ḓo nndaṱa, ngauri ho ṅwalwa ha pfi, “ ‘Ndi ḓo vhulaha mulisa, nngu dza sambi dza balangana.’" 
Matthew26:32 “Hone musi ndo no vuswa vhafuni hu ḓo ranga Nṋe u ya Galelia, inwi na konou tevhela.”" 
Matthew26:33 Ndi hone Pitrosi a tshi amba na Yesu a ri, “Naho vhoṱhe vha tshi nga vha laṱa, nṋe ndi nga si vhuye nda vha laṱa.”" 
Matthew26:34 Yesu a mu fhindula a ri, “Litshani ndi ni vhudze: hu ḓo ri vhusiku ha ṋamusi mukukulume u sa athu lila, na vha no no landula kararu na ri a ni nnḓivhi.”" 
Matthew26:35 Pitrosi a dovha a khwaṱhisa a ri, “Nangwe nda tou pfi ndi fe navho, ndi nga si vhuye nda ri a thi vha ḓivhi!” Na vhaḽa vhaṅwe vhafunziwa vhoṱhe vha ḓi ralo-vho." 
Matthew26:36 Ndi hone Yesu a tshi ṱuwa na vhafunziwa vha ya fhethu hu no pfi Getsemani. Vha tshi swika a vha vhudza a ri, “Salani henefha, Nṋe ndi kha ḓi ya fhaḽa u rabela.”" 
Matthew26:37 A ṱuwa na Pitrosi na vhana vhavhili vha Zebedia, a ṱungufhala o tou hanganea." 
Matthew26:38 A amba navho a ri, “Mbilu yanga i vhavha lune nda tou nga ndi sa fa. Dzulani henefha ri tshesisane.”" 
Matthew26:39 A fhirela phanḓanyana a ḓiposa fhasi a wa nga tshifhaṱuwo a rabela a ri, “Khotsi anga, arali zwi tshi konadzea itshi tshinwelo a tshi mpfuki zwanga naa? Naho ndi tshi ralo hu songo itwa zwine Nṋe nda zwi funa, nga hu itwe zwi funwaho nga Iwe.”" 
Matthew26:40 A tshi vhuya, a wana vhaḽa vhafunziwa vho eḓela, a amba na Pitrosi a ri, “Ni tou kundwa na u pandela khofhe na Nṋe awara nthihi zwayo na?" 
Matthew26:41 Fhaṱuwani ni rabele uri ni si ungwe. Mbiluni ni a zwi funa; ni ro kundwa nge na vha vhathu vha ṋama.” 
Matthew26:42 A dovha a yo rabela a ri, “Khotsi anga, arali zwi sa konei uri tshinwelo itshi tshi mpfuke, nga hu itwe zwine Iwe wa funa.”" 
Matthew26:43 A tshi vhuya a ḓi wana vho dovha vha eḓela, ngauri maṱo avho o vha a tshi khou lemela nga khofhe." 
Matthew26:44 A vha sia henefho a dovha a yo rabela lwa vhuraru, a ḓi amba maipfi eneaḽa." 
Matthew26:45 A tshi vhuya kha vhafunziwa a vha vhudza a ri, “Nṋa ni tshee no eḓela zwaṋu no ḓiawetshela? Tshikhathi tshazwo tsho swika. Zwino Mubebwa-nga-muthu ndi hone o kumedzwa zwanḓani zwa vhatshinyi." 
Matthew26:46 Takuwani ri ṱuwe; uḽa muthu we a mpheṱa asuyu o swika.” 
Matthew26:47 Musi a tshi kha ḓi amba ha mbo bvelela Judasi, we a vha e muṅwe wa vha 12, e na tshigwada tshihulwane tsho hwala mapanga na dzithonga, tsho rumiwa nga vhotshifhe vhahulwane na vhahulwane vha lushaka." 
Matthew26:48 Tshiḽa tshifheṱi tsho vha tsho dzula tsho vha vhudza tsha ri, “Ane nda ḓo mu resha nga u tou mu kuvhatedza, ndi ene. Ni mu fare.”" 
Matthew26:49 Judasi e u swika a mbo ḓi ya ha Yesu a ri, “Ri a vusa Vhafunzi!” a tshi ralo a mu kuvhatedza." 
Matthew26:50 Hone Yesu a mu fhindula a ri, “Hee khonani, itani tshe na ḓela tshone!” Vhaḽa vha mbo ḓi sendela vha fara Yesu." 
Matthew26:51 Muṅwe wa vhaḽa vhe vha vha vhe na Yesu a mbo ḓi ṱomola banga ḽawe a tshi ri a reme phuli ya tshifhe muhulu, a i tumula nḓevhe." 
Matthew26:52 Yesu a amba nae a ri, “Vhuedzedzani banga ḽaṋu tshilandani tshaḽo; vhoṱhe vhane vha rema vhaṅwe nga banga vha ḓo vhulawa-vho ngaḽo." 
Matthew26:53 Kani ni vhona unga zwi a nkunda u humbela Khotsi anga a mbo ḓi nthumela mmbi dza vharuṅwa dzi fhiraho 12? 
Matthew26:54 Hone arali nda ralo Maṅwalo a nga khunyeledzwa hani a tshi ri ndi fanela u itwa zwenezwi?” 
Matthew26:55 Zwenezwo Yesu a amba na tshigwada tshiḽa tsha vhathu a ri, “No tou vhuya na bva no hwala mapanga na dzithonga ni tshi ḓa u fara Nṋe nda nga ndi ḽivemu naa? Hufha ḓuvha ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe ndo vha ndi tshi ṱwa thembeleni ndi tshi funza vhathu; no kundwa ngani u mpfara?" 
Matthew26:56 Hone izwi zwoṱhe zwo itea uri hu khunyelele Maṅwalo a vhaporofita.” Zwi tshi ralo vhafunziwa vhawe vhoṱhe vha mu ṱutshela vha shavha. 
Matthew26:57 Vhe vha vha vho fara Yesu vha mbo ṱuwa nae vha mu isa ha Khayafasi tshifhe muhulu. Henefho ho vha ho no kuvhangana vhaḓivhi vha Mulayo na vhahulwane vha lushaka. 
Matthew26:58 Pitrosi a tevhela Yesu nga kule vha vhuya vha swika khoroni ya tshifhe muhulu, a dzhena-vho, a dzula fhasi na vhalindi uri a vhone uri zwi ḓo gumafhi." 
Matthew26:59 Vhotshifhe vhahulwane na vhanna vha khoro vha ṱoḓa vhuṱanzi ha u zwifha ha u hwesa Yesu mulandu uri a vhulawe," 
Matthew26:60 hone ha si wanale, naho ho ḓa ṱhanzi nnzhi dza u zwifha. Ha vhuya ha ḓa ṱhanzi mbili" 
Matthew26:61 dza ṱanzilela dza ri, “Hoyu muthu o amba a ri u ḓo thutha nnḓu ya Mudzimu a dovha a i fhaṱa ya fhela nga maḓuvha mararu.”" 
Matthew26:62 Ha vhuya ha takuwa tshifhe muhulu a vhudzisa Yesu a ri, “Nṋa a hu na ḽine na ḓifhindulela-vho? A ni khou pfa zwine havha vha khou ni hwelela ngazwo?”" 
Matthew26:63 Yesu a si fhindule tshithu. Ndi hone tshifhe muhulu a tshi mu anisa a ri, “Ndi ni anisa nga Mudzimu a tshilaho ndi ri ni ri vhudze arali e inwi Mesia, Murwa wa Mudzimu.”" 
Matthew26:64 Yesu a mu fhindula a ri, “Ndi zwenezwo. Nazwino ndi ni vhudza ndi ri: Noṱhe ni ḓo vhona ‘Mubebwa-nga-muthu a tshi ḓa e kha gole o dzula thungo ya tshauḽa tsha Ramaanḓaoṱhe vha tshi vhusa vhoṱhe.’ ”" 
Matthew26:65 Tshifhe muhulu a mbo kherukanya zwiambaro zwawe a ri, “Asuyu u khou tamba nga Mudzimu! Ri kha ḓi ṱoḓa dziṅwe ṱhanzi dza mini? Hufha no tou mu pfa nga nḓevhe dzaṋu a tshi khou tamba nga Mudzimu!" 
Matthew26:66 Vha hashu, ni ri mini?” Vha fhindula vha ri, “U na mulandu, nga a vhulawe!”" 
Matthew26:67 Ndi hone vha tshi mu pfela mare khofheni vha mu sinḓa nga mavili 
Matthew26:68 vha ri, “Hee Mesia, ri porofitele uri ndi nnyi o u rwaho!”" 
Matthew26:69 Zwino Pitrosi o vha a tshee o dzula ngei nnḓa khoroni. Muṅwe mushumi wa musidzana a ḓa khae a ri, “Na vhone vho vha vhe na hoyu Yesu wa Galelia.”" 
Matthew26:70 Pitrosi a hanedza vhoṱhe vha tshi khou mu pfa a ri, “Ayo thi a ḓivhi!”" 
Matthew26:71 Pitrosi a takuwa o livha getheni, a dovha a vhonwa nga muṅwe musidzana, uyo a vhudza vho imaho henefho a ri, “Na onoyu munna o vha e na Yesu wa Nazaretha.”" 
Matthew26:72 Pitrosi a dovha a hanedza a tou ana a ri, “Uyo munna thi mu ḓivhi!”" 
Matthew26:73 Hu si kale vha ḓa vha vhudza Pitrosi vha ri, “Ni songo hanedza uri ni muṅwe ngavho, hufha na kuambele kwaṋu ku tshi ni dzumbulula.”" 
Matthew26:74 Pitrosi a vhuya a tou ana a ri, “Arali ndi tshi khou zwifha Mudzimu kha a nthwe. Hoyu munna ndi ri a thi mu ḓivhi!” A tshi tou ralo mukukulume wa vha u a lila." 
Matthew26:75 Pitrosi a mbo elelwa zwiḽa zwe Yesu a amba a tshi ri, “Hu ḓo ri mukukulume u sa athu lila na vha no no nndandula kararu.” A mbo ḓi bva, a thoma u lila lu ṱungufhadzaho." 
Matthew27:1 Nga matshelonitsheloni vhotshifhe vhahulwane vhoṱhe na vhahulwane vha lushaka vha vha na khoro vha luka vhukwila ha u vhulahisa Yesu. 
Matthew27:2 Vha vhofha Yesu nga dzigeḓane vha ṱuwa nae vha mu kumedza muvhusi Pilato. 
Matthew27:3 Judasi, uḽa o mu fheṱaho, a tshi pfa uri Yesu o haṱulwa, a ḓisola, a vhuedzedza aḽa maseṱha a 30 ha vhotshifhe vhahulwane na vhahulwane vha lushaka," 
Matthew27:4 a ri, “Ndo tshinya nga u fheṱa muthu a si na mulandu.” Vha fhindula vha ri, “Ayo a si mafhungo ashu, ndi aṋu.”" 
Matthew27:5 A mbo laṱa iḽa tshelede henefho nḓuni ya Mudzimu a ṱuwa, a ya a ḓinembeledza." 
Matthew27:6 Vhotshifhe vhahulwane vha dobela iḽa tshelede vha ri, “Iyi tshelede a ro ngo tendelwa u i longa bogisini ḽa mitendelo ngauri yo renga malofha.”" 
Matthew27:7 Vha funzedzana vha langana uri vha ḓo renga ngayo tsimu ya muvhumbi wa dzikhali, uri hu vhe hone hune ha ḓo swiṱwa vhatsinda." 
Matthew27:8 Ndi zwine na ṋamusi tsimu iyo ya kha ḓi pfi “Yamalofha”. 
Matthew27:9 Ha mbo vha u khunyeledza zwo ambiwaho nga muporofita Jeremia a tshi ri, “Vho dzhia maseṱha a 30, wone mutengo we Vhaisraele vha langana uri vha ḓo mu renga ngawo," 
Matthew27:10 vha renga ngao tsimu ya muvhumbi wa dzikhali. Ndi zwone zwe Muṋe washu a nndaedza.” 
Matthew27:11 Yesu a imiswa phanḓa ha muvhusi, uyo a mu vhudzisa a ri, “Nṋa inwi ni khosi ya Majuda?” Yesu a mu fhindula a ri, “Vha khou amba ḽavho naa?”" 
Matthew27:12 Vhotshifhe vhahulwane na vhahulwane vha lushaka vha mu pomoka zwithu zwinzhi, hone a si fhindule tshithu." 
Matthew27:13 Pilato a mu vhudzisa a ri, “Nṋa a ni pfi uri vha khou ni pomoka zwithu zwingafhani?”" 
Matthew27:14 Yesu a si tsha mu fhindula na ipfi na ḽithihi; muvhusi a wana zwi tshi mu kanukisa. 
Matthew27:15 Zwino nga Paseka iṅwe na iṅwe muvhusi o vha a tshi ḓi vhofhololela vhathu tshivhotshwa tshe vha vha vha tshi tshi humbela. 
Matthew27:16 Nga honoho vhuṱambo ho vha hu na tshiṅwe tshivhotshwa tshe tsha vha tshi tshi ḓivhea hoṱhe-hoṱhe ḽi ḽivemu, tshi no pfi Yesu Barabasi." 
Matthew27:17 Pilato a tshi vhona vho kuvhangana a vha vhudzisa a ri, “Ni funa ndi tshi ni vhofhololela nnyi? Yesu a no pfi Barabasi kana Yesu a no pfi Mesia?”" 
Matthew27:18 A tshi ralo ndi uri o vha a tshi zwi ḓivha uri vha tshi mu kumedza Yesu vho vha vha tshi itwa nga vivho. 
Matthew27:19 Zwino Pilato a tshee o dzula tshidzuloni tsha khaṱhulo mufumakadzi wawe a mu laedzela a ri, “Hoyu ha na tshe a khakha, vha songo mu ita tshithu. Ndo mu lora madekwe nda tambula zwinzhi.”" 
Matthew27:20 Hone vhotshifhe vhahulwane na vhahulwane vha lushaka vho vha vho no rumeledza vhathu uri vha humbele Barabasi, Yesu a vhulawe." 
Matthew27:21 Zwino muvhusi a tshi dovha u vha vhudzisa a ri, “Kha avha vhavhili ni funa ndi tshi ni vhofhololela ufhio?” Vhone vha fhindula vha ri, “Barabasi!”" 
Matthew27:22 Pilato a vha vhudzisa a ri, “Uyu Yesu a no pfi Mesia ndi iteni ngae?” Vha amba mazha vha ri, “Nga' vhambiwe kha tshifhambano!”" 
Matthew27:23 Pilato a vhudzisa a ri, “O tshinyani?” A tshi ralo vhone vha tou ṋaṋa u zhamba vha ri, “Nga' vhambiwe kha tshifhambano!”" 
Matthew27:24 Pilato a tshi vhona uri a zwi tsha farisa tshithu, zwi tou vusa mufhirifhiri, a dzhia maḓi a ṱamba zwanḓa mavhuthu a tshi zwi vhona a ri, “A thi na mulandu kha malofha a uyu munna; ni ḓo ḓifhindulela inwi vhaṋe.”" 
Matthew27:25 Vhathu vhoṱhe vha fhindula vha ri, “Mulandu wa malofha awe nga u vhe washu na vhana vhashu!”" 
Matthew27:26 Ndi hone a tshi vha vhofhololela Barabasi, a ita uri Yesu a rwiwe, a konou mu kumedza uri a vhambiwe kha tshifhambano." 
Matthew27:27 Maswole a muvhusi a dzhia Yesu a dzhena nae nḓuni ya khaṱhulo, a tou tangwa nga gomane yoṱhe." 
Matthew27:28 Vha mu bvula zwiambaro vha mu ambadza phuraphura. 
Matthew27:29 Vha luka na khare ya mipfa vha mu ambadza kha ṱhoho, vha mu farisa luṱanga nga tshanḓa tshauḽa, vha mu gwadamela vha mu losha muhoyo vha ri, “Khosi ya Majuda nga i lalame!”" 
Matthew27:30 Vha mu pfela mare, vha dovha vha dzhia luḽa luṱanga vha mu rwa kha ṱhoho." 
Matthew27:31 Musi vho no fhedza u mu kolela nga u ralo vha mu bvula phuraphura vha mu ambadza nguvho dzawe, vha konou bva nae vha yo mu vhamba kha tshifhambano." 
Matthew27:32 Vha tshi khou bva vha ṱangana na munna a no bva Kirene a no pfi Simoni, vha mu kombetshedza u hwala tshifhambano tsha Yesu." 
Matthew27:33 Vha tshi swika fhethu hu no pfi Golgotha (zwine zwa amba uri “Fhethu hu no nga dethele ḽa muthu”)," 
Matthew27:34 vha mu ṋea mushonga wa u dzidzivhadza wa waini yo ṱanganaho na ndulu, hone a tshi i thetshela a hana u nwa." 
Matthew27:35 Ndi hone vha tshi mu vhamba kha tshifhambano, vha konou kovhekana nguvho dzawe nga u tou ita mamvaṱe." 
Matthew27:36 Vha dzula fhasi henefho vha mu linda. 
Matthew27:37 Vho vha vho ombela na luṅwalo lwa mulandu wawe nga nṱha ha ṱhoho yawe. Lwo vha lu tshi ri, “Hoyu ndi Yesu khosi ya Majuda.”" 
Matthew27:38 Vha mu vhamba na mavemu mavhili, ḽiṅwe ḽi thungo ya tshauḽa, ḽiṅwe tshamonde." 
Matthew27:39 Vhafhiri vha gondo vha tshi mu vhona vha dzungudza dziṱhoho vha mu holedza 
Matthew27:40 vha ri, “A si iwe we wa ri u nga thutha nnḓu ya Mudzimu wa dovha wa i fhaṱa nga maḓuvha mararu. Itsa-ha afho kha tshifhambano u ḓitshidze arali u Murwa wa Mudzimu!”" 
Matthew27:41 Na vhotshifhe vhahulwane na vhaḓivhi vha Mulayo na vhahulwane vha lushaka vha mu kolela vha ri," 
Matthew27:42 “O vha a tshi kona u tshidza vhaṅwe, zwino u ḓitshidza zwi vho mu kunda! Hufha e khosi ya Vhaisraele, nga a tse-ha kha tshifhambano zwino, ri tende uri ndi ene." 
Matthew27:43 O ḓitika nga Mudzimu; Mudzimu nga a mu lamulele zwino arali a tshi mu funa. Hufha o amba a ri, ‘Ndi Murwa wa Mudzimu!’ ”" 
Matthew27:44 Vhaḽa vhe vha vha vho vhambiwa nae na vhone vha ḓi mu holedza nga u ralo. 
Matthew27:45 Masiari tshivhangalala shango ḽoṱhe ḽa mbo ḓi tibwa nga swiswi ha fhela awara tharu zwo ḓi ralo. 
Matthew27:46 Nga tshifhinga tsha vhuraru Yesu a ṱavha mukosi a ri, “Eli, Eli, lama sabaxthani?” Ndi u ri, “Mudzimu wanga, Mudzimu wanga, wo nndaṱelani?”" 
Matthew27:47 Vhaṅwe vhe vha vha vho ima henefho vha tshi pfa a tshi ralo vha ri, “Ipfani u vho vhidza Elia!”" 
Matthew27:48 Muṅwe wavho a mbo ḓi gidima a dzhia tshiponnzhi a tshi mbwandamedza kha waini yo vhiluluwaho a tshi ṱoma kha thanda a konou tshi isa mulomoni wa Yesu uri a swiswine; 
Matthew27:49 hone vhaṅwe vha ri, “Mu litsheni ri vhone arali Elia a tshi ḓo ḓa a mu tshidza.”" 
Matthew27:50 Hone Yesu a ṱavha mukosi ha mbo ḓi vha u welela. 
Matthew27:51 Lupila lwe lwa vha lwo tsira Hukhethwakhethwa lwa mbo ḓi kheruwa nga vhukati u bva nṱha u swika fhasi, shango ḽa dzinginyea, matombo a fhanduwa." 
Matthew27:52 Zwalo zwa mbo vulea, mivhili ya vhathu vhanzhi vha Mudzimu vho ri siaho ya vuwa," 
Matthew27:53 musi Yesu o no vuwa vhafuni vha bva zwaloni vha dzhena muḓini mukhethwa vha vhonwa nga vhathu vhanzhi. 
Matthew27:54 Mulangagomane na vhaṅwe vhe vha vha vha tshi khou linda Yesu vha tshi pfa mudzinginyo, na u vhona zwoṱhe zwo iteaho, vha ofha nga maanḓa vha ri, “Nangoho uyu muthu o vha e Ene Murwa wa Mudzimu!”" 
Matthew27:55 Henefho ho vha hu na vhasadzi vhanzhi vho ima fhaḽa kulenyana vho lavhelesa; ndi vhaḽa vhe vha ḓa na Yesu a tshi bva Galelia vha tshi khou mu shumela. 
Matthew27:56 Vhaṅwe vhavho ndi Maria Magadalina, na Maria mme a Jakopo na Josefa, na mme a Jakopo na Johanisi, musadzi wa Zebedia." 
Matthew27:57 Musi ḽi tshi vho kovhela ha ḓa munna o pfumaho wa Arimathia a no pfi Josefa. Na ene o vha e mufunziwa wa Yesu. 
Matthew27:58 A ya ha Pilato a humbela tshitumbu tsha Yesu, Pilato a ri vha mu fhe." 
Matthew27:59 Josefa a tshi dzhia a tshi pombedza nga lukhaha," 
Matthew27:60 a tshi swiṱa tshaloni tshawe tshe tsha vha tsho korwa kha tombo, tshi sa athu swiṱwa muthu. O no ralo a dzhia tombo ḽihulu a ḽi kungulusela mulomoni wa tshalo a tshi tiba ngaḽo a ṱuwa." 
Matthew27:61 Hezwi a tshi khou swiṱa Yesu, na Maria Magadalina na uḽa muṅwe Maria vho vha vho dzula henefho tsini ha tshalo." 
Matthew27:62 Ḽi tshi tou tsha nga Sabatha vhotshifhe vhahulwane na Vhafarisei vha kuvhangana vha ya ha Pilato vha mu vhudza 
Matthew27:63 vha ri, “Muṋe washu, ri kha ḓi elelwa zwe uḽa mudzia-u-xedza-vhathu a vhuya a amba musi a tshi kha ḓi tshila a ri, ‘Ndi ḓo vuwa nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuraru.’" 
Matthew27:64 Kha vha rume vhathu uri vha yo linda tshalo u swika nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuraru, uri vhafunziwa vhawe vha sa ḓo ḓa vha mu tswa vha ḓo konou vhudza vhathu uri o vuwa vhafuni, ha vho vha u xedza vhathu u fhira zwiḽa zwa u ranga.”" 
Matthew27:65 Pilato a vha fhindula a ri, “Ndi zwone, vhalindi khevha; ṱuwani navho ni linde tshalo nga hune na kona.”" 
Matthew27:66 Vha mbo ya vha tiba tshalo nga tombo, vha ḽi shatela uri ḽi si kunguluswe nga muthu, vha sia vhalindi vha tshi linda." 
Matthew28:1 Musi Sabatha yo fhela, ḽi tshi tou tsha nga Swondaha, ha ḓa Maria Magadalina na uḽa muṅwe Maria u ṱolela tshalo." 
Matthew28:2 Ha tsa muruṅwa wa Muṋe washu a bva ṱaḓulu, ha mbo vha na mudzinginyo muhulu wa shango, uyo muruṅwa a ḓa a kungulusa ḽiḽa tombo a dzula khaḽo." 
Matthew28:3 O vha a tshi penya sa lupenyo, zwiambaro zwawe zwo tshena sa mahaḓa." 
Matthew28:4 Vhalindi vha tshalo vha farwa nga nyofho vha tetemela vha tou nga vha sa fa. 
Matthew28:5 Muruṅwa a amba na vhasadzi a ri, “Inwi ni songo ofha tshithu; ndi ḓivha uri ni khou ṱoḓa Yesu we a vhambiwa." 
Matthew28:6 Ha tsheeho fhano; o vuwa sa zwe a amba. Iḓani ni vhone afho he a vha o ladzwa hone. 
Matthew28:7 Gidimani-ha ni yo ḓivhadza vhafunziwa vhawe uri o vuwa vhafuni. Ni ri, ‘Yesu o ni ranga phanḓa, o ya Galelia, ni ḓo ṱangana nae henengei.’ Khezwo no zwi pfa.”" 
Matthew28:8 Vhasadzi avho vha mbo ḓi ṱuwa tshaloni nga u gidima vhe na nyofho na dakalo fulu; vha gidima vha yo ḓivhadza vhafunziwa vhawe. 
Matthew28:9 Vhe nḓilani, vha vhona Yesu o no ima henefho phanḓa havho a vha resha a ri, “Mulalo!” Vha mbo ḓi ya khae vha farelela milenzhe yawe vha mu gwadamela." 
Matthew28:10 Yesu a vha vhudza a ri, “Ni songo ofha; iyani ni yo ḓivhadza vharathu vhanga uri vha ye Galelia; ri ḓo ṱangana henengei.”" 
Matthew28:11 Avho vhasadzi vha tshee nḓilani vhaṅwe vha vhaḽa vhalindi vha dzhena muḓini vha ḓivhadza vhotshifhe vhahulwane zwoṱhe zwo iteaho. 
Matthew28:12 Vhotshifhe vha mbo kuvhangana na vhahulwane vha lushaka vha luka vhukwila, vha ṋea maswole tshelede nnzhi" 
Matthew28:13 vha ri, “Ni vhudze vhathu uri vhafunziwa vhawe vho ḓa vhusiku no eḓela vha mu tswa." 
Matthew28:14 Arali zwa swika kha muvhusi riṋe ri ḓo ni ambela. Inwi ni songo ḽa mbilu.” 
Matthew28:15 Maswole vha ṱanganedza iḽa tshelede vha amba zwenezwo zwe vha funzedzwa. Majuda na ṋamusi vha kha ḓi vhudzana mafhungo eneo. 
Matthew28:16 Vhafunziwa vha 11 vha ya Galelia vha swika thavhani iḽa ye Yesu a vha laedza. 
Matthew28:17 Vha mu wana henefho, vha luvha; hone vhaṅwe vhavho vho vha vha tshi kha ḓi timatima." 
Matthew28:18 Ndi hone Yesu a tshi sendela a amba navho a ri, “Ndo ṋewa maanḓa oṱhe ngei ṱaḓulu na fhano fhasi." 
Matthew28:19 Iyani-ha ni ite tshakha dzoṱhe vhafunziwa vhanga. Ni vha lovhedze vha vhe vha Khotsi na Murwa na Muya Mukhethwa. 
Matthew28:20 Ni vha gudise u tevhedza zwoṱhe zwe nda ni laya. Nṋe muṋe ndi ḓo vha na inwi misi yoṱhe u swika zwi tshi guma.” 
Mark1:1 Haya ndi mafhungo maḓifha a Yesu Khristo Murwa wa Mudzimu. 
Mark1:2 O thoma nga he zwa ṅwalwa buguni ya muporofita Yesaya hu tshi pfi, “Muḓinḓa wanga ngoyu-ha; ndi khou mu ruma phanḓa hau uri a u lugisele nḓila." 
Mark1:3 Ndi a huwelelaho sogani. U ri, ‘Lugiselani Muṋe washu nḓila, i tou tswititi, i tshimbilee.’ ”" 
Mark1:4 Ndi zwe Johanisi Mulovhedzi a ḓa sogani a tshi ḓivhadza mafhungo a Mudzimu a uri vhathu vha laṱe vhuvhi havho vha lovhedzwe, Mudzimu a vha hangwele vhutshinyi havho." 
Mark1:5 Shango ḽoṱhe ḽa Judia na muḓi woṱhe wa Jerusalema wa ya u mu thetshelesa, vha bula vhutshinyi havho, a konou vha lovhedza mulamboni wa Jorodani." 
Mark1:6 Johanisi o vha o ambara nguvho ya vhukuse ha gamela, khunduni o i vhofha nga bannda ya mukumba, zwiḽiwa zwawe zwi nzie na ṋotshi dza ḓaka." 
Mark1:7 A vha vhudza a ri, “Hu si kale hu ḓo ḓa ane a mphira kule, lune ndi si vhuye nda fanela na u kotama nda vhofholola navhula dzawe." 
Mark1:8 Nṋe ndi ni lovhedza nga maḓi, hone Ene u ḓo ni lovhedza nga Muya Mukhethwa.”" 
Mark1:9 Misi iyo Yesu a ṱuwa Nazaretha, shangoni ḽa Galelia, a yo lovhedzwa nga Johanisi mulamboni wa Jorodani." 
Mark1:10 Musi Yesu a tshi bva maḓini, kathihi fhedzi a vhona lutombo lu tshi fhanduwa, Muya Mukhethwa a tshi khou tsela khae e kha tshivhumbeo tsha ḽiivha." 
Mark1:11 Ha pfala ipfi ḽi bvaho ṱaḓulu ḽi tshi ri, “U Murwa wanga muthihi fhedzi, u a ntakadza.”" 
Mark1:12 Muya a mbo ḓi mu hwala a mu isa sogani. 
Mark1:13 Henengei a fhedza maḓuvha a 40 e vhukati ha zwivhanda, Saṱhane a tshi khou mu linga. Zwo no ralo ha ḓa vharuṅwa vha mu shumela." 
Mark1:14 Musi Johanisi o no hoṋelwa dzhele Yesu a ya Galelia u ḓivhadza mafhungo maḓifha a Mudzimu 
Mark1:15 a ri, “Tshifhinga ndi tshone, ni ḓo ṱuwa ni tshi vhuswa nga Mudzimu. Laṱani-ha vhuvhi haṋu ni tende mafhungo maḓifha.”" 
Mark1:16 Huno Yesu a tshi khou tshimbila khunzikhunzini ya Dzivha ḽa Galelia, a vhona vharei vha khovhe vhavhili, Simoni na murathu wawe Andrisi, vha tshi khou rea khovhe nga mambule;" 
Mark1:17 a amba navho a ri, “Iḓani ni vhe vhafunziwa vhanga, ndi ni funze u vha vhafashi vha vhathu.”" 
Mark1:18 Vhone vha ṱutshela mambule avho na zwenezwo, vha vha vhafunziwa vhawe." 
Mark1:19 A tshi fhirela phanḓa, a wana Jakopo ṅwana wa Zebedia e na Johanisi murathu wawe, hu hone vha tshi khou dzudzanya mambule avho tshikepeni tshavho." 
Mark1:20 Yesu a vha vhidza, vha mbo ḓi sia khotsi avho na vhashumi tshikepeni vha vha vhafunziwa vhawe." 
Mark1:21 Vha swika muḓini wa Kapernaumi. Nga Sabatha Yesu a dzhena sinagogoni a funza. 
Mark1:22 Vhathu vha kanuka pfunzo yawe, ngauri o vha a sa funzi sa vhaḓivhi vha Mulayo, a tshi tou pfala e Ene Muṋe wa mafhungo." 
Mark1:23 Zwenezwo muṅwe munna we a vha e na thuṅwa ya Saṱhane, a ṱavha mukosi a ri," 
Mark1:24 “U ṱoḓani fhano Iwe Yesu wa Nazaretha? Kani-ha ndi hone wo ḓa u ri lozwa? Iwe ndi a u ḓivha: U muḓinḓa mukhethwa wa Mudzimu.” 
Mark1:25 Yesu a i kaidza a ri, “Fhumula iwe, u bve kha hoyu muthu!”" 
Mark1:26 Iyo thuṅwa ya khwiḓukanya uyo munna, ya ṱavha mukosi muhulu ha mbo ḓi vha u bva hayo." 
Mark1:27 Zwa akhamadza vhathu vhoṱhe lwe vha thoma u vhudzisana vha ri, “Nṋa ndi mini izwi? Kani ndi yone pfunzo ntswa i no tou vha na maanḓa mangafha? Henefha hune a kaidza na thuṅwa dza mu pfa!”" 
Mark1:28 Zwi tshi ralo bvumo ḽa Yesu ḽa mbo ḓi pfala hoṱhe-hoṱhe shangoni ḽa Galelia. 
Mark1:29 U bva henefho sinagogoni ha vha u ya hayani ha Simoni na Andrisi vhe na Jakopo na Johanisi. 
Mark1:30 Makhulutshisadzi wa Simoni vho vha vho rwelwa fhasi nga biso, muvhili woṱhe u tshi tou duga. Yesu a mbo vhudzwa eneo mafhungo." 
Mark1:31 A ya a mu fara nga tshanḓa a mu vusa, a mbo ḓi fhola a vha bikela." 
Mark1:32 Nga madekwana ḽi tshi vho swifhala, vha ḓisa vhalwadze vhoṱhe ha Yesu, na vha na thuṅwa dza Saṱhane." 
Mark1:33 Muḓi woṱhe wa kuvhangana muṱani wonoyo. 
Mark1:34 Yesu a fhodza vhanzhi vha malwadze o fhambanaho, a pandela na thuṅwa nnzhi kha vhathu. Huno vhunga dzo vha dzi tshi ḓivha uri ndi Ene nnyi, ho ngo vhuya a dzi tendela dzi tshi zwi bula." 
Mark1:35 Nga matshelo Yesu a fhinduwa hu tshee vhusiku a yo rabela sogani. 
Mark1:36 Simoni na vhaḽa vhaṅwe vha bva vha yo mu ṱoḓa. 
Mark1:37 Vha tshi mu wana vha ri, “Vhathu vhoṱhe vha khou vha lila.”" 
Mark1:38 Yesu a mbo ri, “Hafhu ri kha ḓi ḓo dzhena na kha miṅwe miḓi henefhano, ndi vha ḓivhadze-vho mafhungo maḓifha, vhunga ndo ḓela zwone.”" 
Mark1:39 Ndi zwe Yesu a ṱanganya ḽoṱhe ḽa Galelia, a tshi ri u funza sinagogoni, a dovha a pandela na thuṅwa dza Saṱhane." 
Mark1:40 Ha ḓa munna khae a lwalaho vhulwadze ha lukanda vhu kumadzaho; onoyo a gwadama a mu losha a ri, “Muṋe wanga, hufha vhe na maanḓa a u mphodza; a thi fhodzwi-vho?”" 
Mark1:41 Yesu a mu pfela vhuṱungu, a isa tshanḓa tshawe a mu kwama a ri, “Na zwino, fholani zwaṋu.”" 
Mark1:42 A mbo ḓi fhola na zwenezwo, a sala o tou swoto." 
Mark1:43 Yesu a mu pandela a tshi amba o tou halifha a ri," 
Mark1:44 “Ni a vhona, ni songo vhuya na zwi vhudza muthu, tshaṋu ni mbo ḓi ya ha tshifhe uri a ni vhone, ni konou ṋekedza tshipfumelo tshe ra laedzwa nga Mushe, tshi vhe hone vhuṱanzi kha nnyi na nnyi ha uri no fhola.”" 
Mark1:45 Hone uyo munna u ṱuwa henefho ha mbo ḓi vha u thoma u anḓadza ayo mafhungo, lwe Yesu zwa vho mu konḓela u tshimbila vhathuni; a vho tou dzula masogani; hone na henefho vhathu vha ḓi mu tevhela vha tshi bva thungo dzoṱhe." 
Mark2:1 Ho no fhela maḓuvha a si gathi Yesu a vhuelela Kapernaumi, zwa mbo ḓi pfala uri u hayani." 
Mark2:2 Huno ha kuvhangana vhathu vhanzhi, na muṱani hu si vhe na vhupfelo ha mare. Yesu o vha a tshi vha ḓivhadza mafhungo maḓifha." 
Mark2:3 Zwenezwo ha ḓa vhathu vha tshi ḓisa munna o omaho miraḓo, o hwalwa nga vhanna vhaṋa." 
Mark2:4 Vhenevho vha kundwa nḓila ya u mu fhirisela ha Yesu, nga u ḓala ha vhathu. Ndi hone vha tshi phula ṱhanga u livhana na he Yesu a vha e hone. Nga buli ḽeneḽo vha tsisa uyo munna e kha hingo." 
Mark2:5 Yesu a tshi vhona fulufhelo ḽavho, a amba na o omaho miraḓo, a ri, “Ṅwananga, no hangwelwa vhutshinyi haṋu.”" 
Mark2:6 Vhaḓivhi vha Mulayo vhe vha vha vho dzula henefho vha elekanya vha ri," 
Mark2:7 “Nṋa uyu muthu u itelani a tshi tamba nga dzina ḽa Mudzimu? Ndi nnyi ane a kona u hangwela muthu vhutshinyi arali e si Mudzimu fhedzi?” 
Mark2:8 Yesu a mbo ḓi ḓivha zwine vha elekanya, a ri, “Ni elekanyelani zwo raloho?" 
Mark2:9 Tshi sa konḓi kha izwi zwivhili ndi tshifhio? Ndi u vhudza uyu muthu o omaho miraḓo uri, ‘No hangwelwa vhutshinyi haṋu,’ kana ndi u ri, ‘Takuwani ni hwale hingo ḽaṋu ni tshimbile’?”" 
Mark2:10 Ndi hone Yesu a tshi amba na munna o omaho miraḓo a ri, “Takuwani ni hwale hingo ḽaṋu ni ye hayani,” u ralo ha vha u sumbedza uri Mubebwa-nga-muthu u na maanḓa fhano fhasi a u hangwela muthu vhutshinyi." 
Mark2:11  
Mark2:12 Uyo munna a peta hingo ḽawe maṱoni avho, a ḽi dzhia a ḓitshimbilela. Vhoṱhe vha akhamala zwihulu, vha khoḓa Mudzimu vha ri, “Ha, zwa u rali a ri athu vhuya ra zwi vhona!”" 
Mark2:13 Yesu a dovha a ya khunzikhunzini ya Dzivha ḽa Galelia. Gogo ḽoṱhe ḽa ḓa khae, a ḽi funza." 
Mark2:14 Musi a tshi khou fhira a vhona muṅwe munna we a vha a tshi pfi Livi, ṅwana wa Alifiosi, e ofisini yawe ya muthelo. Ndi hone Yesu a tshi amba nae a ri, “Kha ri ṱuwe roṱhe ni vhe mufunziwa wanga.” Livi a mbo ḓi taku, a mu tevhela." 
Mark2:15 Musi Yesu e muḓini wa Livi, Ene na vhafunziwa vhawe vho ḽa na vhathelisi vhanzhi na vhatshinyi, ngauri iṱali vha no mu tevhela vho vha vho no ḓi vha vhanzhi." 
Mark2:16 Vhaṅwe vhaḓivhi vha Maṅwalo vhe vha vha vhe Vhafarisei vha ri u vhona Yesu a tshi khou ḽa na vhatshinyi na vhathelisi, vha vhudzisa vhafunziwa vhawe vha ri, “Nṋa u ita zwithu-ḓe a tshi ḽa na vhathu vho tou raliho?”" 
Mark2:17 Yesu a tshi vha pfa a ri, “A sa lwali ha lili ṅanga; ṅanga i lilwa nga mulwadze. Nṋe a tho ngo ḓela vhavhuya, ndo ḓela vhone vhatshinyi.”" 
Mark2:18 Muṅwe musi vhafunziwa vha Johanisi Mulovhedzi na Vhafarisei vho vha vha tshi khou ḓidzima; zwino vhaṅwe vhathu vha ḓa vha vhudzisa Yesu vha ri, “Khezwi vhafunziwa vhavho vha sa ḓidzimi, ngeno vha Johanisi Mulovhedzi na vha Vhafarisei vha tshi ḓidzima?”" 
Mark2:19 Yesu a fhindula a ri, “Nṋa zwi a itea uri khonani dza mukwasha dzi ḓidzime zwiḽiwa mukwasha a tshee nadzo naa? A zwi itei." 
Mark2:20 Hone hu ḓo ḓa maḓuvha ane vha ḓo dzhielwa mukwasha wavho, ndi hone vha tshi ḓo ḓidzima." 
Mark2:21 “A hu na muthu ane a haswa tshiambaro tsha kale nga sila ḽiswa ḽi sa athu huma, ngauri musi tshi tshi kuvhiwa, tshihaswa tshi vho ḓo mamula na tshiambaro, buli ḽa endelela." 
Mark2:22 Nahone tuvhu ḽa waini a ḽi sheliwi mikhwamani ya mukumba wa kale, nga u ofha uri i nga balea musi ḽi tshi vhila, waini ya shuluwa, na mikhwama ya tshinyala. Tuvhu ḽi shelwa mikhwamani miswa!”" 
Mark2:23 Ḽiṅwe ḓuvha nga Sabatha Yesu o vha a tshi khou buḓekanya nga vhukati ha masimu a goroi. Vhafunziwa vhawe vha ḓi tshimbila nae, vha thoma u ṱhukhula-ṱhukhula ṱhotshe dza goroi." 
Mark2:24 Ndi hone Vhafarisei vha tshi amba na Yesu vha ri, “Kha vha vhone zwine vhafunziwa vhavho vha khou ita nga Sabatha; Mulayo a u tendi!”" 
Mark2:25 Yesu a vha fhindula a ri, “Kani fhaḽa hu no amba a musi Abiathara e tshifhe muhulu a no ngo vhuya na hu vhala? Ndi amba a musi Dafita na khonani dzawe vhe na nḓala," 
Mark2:26 vha tshi dzhena nḓuni ya Mudzimu vha ḽa vhurotho he ha vha ho sumelwa Mudzimu, Mulayo u sa tendi muthu a tshi ḽa musumo hoyo, arali vhe si vhotshifhe fhedzi – huno-ha Dafita o ri u ḽa hoho vhurotho, a ita na u ṋea khonani dzawe!”" 
Mark2:27 Yesu a fhedza mafhungo nga u ri, “Sabatha yo itelwa muthu, a si muthu o itelwaho Sabatha." 
Mark2:28 Ngauralo Mubebwa-nga-muthu, na yone Sabatha ndi Ene Muṋe wayo.”" 
Mark3:1 Muṅwe musi Yesu a dovha a dzhena sinagogo. Henefho ho vha hu na munna o omaho tshanḓa. 
Mark3:2 Ha dovha ha vha na vhaṅwe vhathu vho lalelaho Yesu uri vha vhone arali a tshi ḓo fhodza uyo muthu nga Sabatha uri vha kone u mu hwelela. 
Mark3:3 Yesu a mbo amba na uyo munna o omaho tshanḓa a ri, “Iḓani ni ime ngeno phanḓa.”" 
Mark3:4 Ndi hone a tshi vhudzisa vhaḽa vhathu a ri, “Ndi zwifhio zwine Mulayo wa ri tendela u ita nga Sabatha? Ndi u tonda, kana ndi u vhaisa naa? Ndi u tshidza muthu, kana ndi u mu lozwa naa?” Vhone vha sokou ṅo." 
Mark3:5 Yesu a vha sedza vhoṱhe o sinyuwa, o tou ṱungufhala nga u vhona vho omisa ṱhoho dzavho. Ndi hone a tshi amba na uyo munna o omaho tshanḓa a ri, “Onyolosani tshanḓa tshaṋu.” A mbo tshi onyolosa tsha vhuelela ngonani." 
Mark3:6 Zwo no ralo Vhafarisei vha mbo ḓi bva afho sinagogo, vha yo ṱangana khoroni na vha tshigwada tsha Herude, vha thoma u luka maano a u vhulaha Yesu." 
Mark3:7 Yesu na vhafunziwa vhawe vha mbo ṱuwa vho livha Dzivhani ḽa Galelia, a tevhelwa nga mavhuthu a bvaho Galelia, na a Judia" 
Mark3:8 na Jerusalema na Idumia na seli ha Jorodani, na thungo dza Tiro na Sidoni, vha ḓa khae nge vha pfa zwe a ita," 
Mark3:9 vha ḓala lwe Yesu a vhuya a vhudza vhafunziwa vhawe uri vha dzule vho mu lugisela tshikepe, nga u ofha uri vhathu vha nga ḓo mu pwanyeledza." 
Mark3:10 O vha o no fhodza vhathu vhanzhi; ha vho ḓa vhalwadze vhoṱhe vha tshi tou pwanyeledzana uri vha mu kwame. 
Mark3:11 Vha re na thuṅwa dza Saṱhane vho vha vha tshi ri u mu vhona vha wa henefho phanḓa hawe vha tshi zhamba vha tshi ri, “Iwe u Murwa wa Mudzimu!”" 
Mark3:12 Hone Yesu a ḓi dzi kaidza o tou khwaṱhisa uri dzi si bule uri ndi Ene nnyi. 
Mark3:13 Ndi hone Yesu a tshi gonya thavhani a vhidza vhane a funa, vha ḓa khae." 
Mark3:14 A nanga vha 12 a ri vha pfi Vhaapostola. A vha nanga uri vha dzule nae na u vha ruma u yo ḓivhadza mafhungo maḓifha 
Mark3:15 a vha ṋee maanḓa a u pandela thuṅwa dza Saṱhane. 
Mark3:16 Madzina a vhenevho vhaapostola vha 12 khea: Ndi Simoni, we Yesu a ri nga a pfi Pitrosi;" 
Mark3:17 na Jakopo ṅwana wa Zebedia, na Johanisi murathu wawe, vhe Yesu a ri nga vha pfi Buanerigisi, ḽine ḽa amba uri “Vhanna vha vhuhali sa nḓadzi”;" 
Mark3:18 na Andrisi, na Filipi, na Batholomio, na Matiosi, na Thomasi, na Jakopo ṅwana wa Alifiosi, na Thadiasi, na Simoni Muhali-wa-Mudzimu," 
Mark3:19 na Judasi Iskariote, we a vho ḓo fheṱa Yesu." 
Mark3:20 Yesu a ya hayani. Ha dovha ha kuvhangana vhathu vhanzhi-vhanzhi, lwe Yesu na vhafunziwa vhawe vha kundwa na tshifhinga tsha u ḽa." 
Mark3:21 Musi vha hawe vha tshi zwi pfa, vha mbo ḓi bva uri vha yo mu dzhia, ngauri ho vha hu tshi vho pfi o ṱangana ṱhoho." 
Mark3:22 Vhaṅwe vhaḓivhi vha Mulayo vha bvaho Jerusalema vho vha vha tshi ri, “O dzhenwa nga Belesebulu!” vha dovha vha ri, “Maanḓa aya a u pandela thuṅwa dza Saṱhane o a ṋewa nga yone khosi yadzo.”" 
Mark3:23 Zwi tshi ralo Yesu a vha vhidza, a thoma u vha fanyisedzela a ri, “Nṋa no no vhuya na pfa hu tshi pfi Saṱhane o pandela Saṱhane?" 
Mark3:24 Arali shango ḽa ḓifhandekanya ḽa bva zwigwada zwivhili tshiṅwe tshi tshi lwa na tshiṅwe, ḽi a tshinyala." 
Mark3:25 Arali muṱani ha bva zwigwada zwivhili zwa lwa nga tshazwo, muṱa wonoyo ndi hone wo pwashea." 
Mark3:26 Vhunga zwo ralo, na muvhuso wa Saṱhane arali wa bva zwigwada zwivhili tshiṅwe tshi tshi lwa na tshiṅwe, u nga si khwaṱhe, u a fhalala." 
Mark3:27 “A hu na ane a nga sokou dzhena nḓuni ya muhali a kumba thundu yawe. U fanela u thoma u vhofha uyo muhali, ndi hone a tshi ḓo kona u mu ṱangula." 
Mark3:28 “Zwino ipfani-ha: Vhathu vha nga hangwelwa vhutshinyi havho hoṱhe, na musi vho tamba nga dzina ḽa Mudzimu." 
Mark3:29 Hone ane a vhuya a nyefula Muya Mukhethwa, onoyo a nga si vhuye a hangwelwa na kathihi, ngauri o ita tshivhi tshi sa hangwelwi.”" 
Mark3:30 Yesu a tshi vhuya a amba hezwo ndi nge vhaṅwe vha vha vha tshi ḓi ri, “U na thuṅwa ya Saṱhane.”" 
Mark3:31 Ha mbo swika mme a Yesu na vharathu vhawe, vha ima nnḓa vha isa fhungo ḽa uri vha khou mu ṱoḓa." 
Mark3:32 Vhathu vhe vha vha vho dzula na Yesu vha amba nae vha ri, “Mme avho na vharathu vhavho na dzikhaladzi khevho afho nnḓa, vha khou vha ṱoḓa.”" 
Mark3:33 Yesu a ri, “Mme anga ndi nnyi? Vharathu vhanga ndi vhonnyi?”" 
Mark3:34 A lavhelesa vhathu vho dzulaho nae a ri, “Mme anga na vharathu vhanga ndi havha!" 
Mark3:35 Ane a ita zwine Mudzimu a zwi funa, ndi ene murathu wanga; ndi ene khaladzi anga; ndi ene mme anga.”" 
Mark4:1 Yesu a dovha a funza e khunzikhunzini ya Dzivha ḽa Galelia. Vhathu vha kuvhanganela u mu pfa, vha ḓala lwe a vhuya a dzhena tshikepeni a dzula. Tshikepe tshone tsho vha tshi maḓini, vhathu vho ima khunzikhunzini." 
Mark4:2 Yesu a vha funza zwithu zwinzhi nga zwifanyiso. A tshi khou funza o ri," 
Mark4:3 “Thetshelesani mafhungo aya: Ho vhuya ha vha na muṅwe munna we a bva a tshi yo zwala mbeu. 
Mark4:4 Musi a tshi khou zwala, iṅwe ya wela nḓilani, zwiṋoni zwa ḓa zwa i ḽa."
