Mark4:5 Iṅwe ya wela kha lutombo he ha vha hu na mavu maṱukuṱuku. Yeneyo ya mela nga u ṱavhanya, ngauri mavu a hone o vha e si manzhi." 
Mark4:6 Hone musi ḓuvha ḽi tshi bva, ḽa fhisa uyo mutomba vhunga midzi yo vha i songo dzhena fhasi, wa mbo ḓi ṋoka." 
Mark4:7 Iṅwe ya wela mipfani, iyo mipfa i tshi mela ya i pwanyeledza i si pakate." 
Mark4:8 Hone iṅwe ya wela mavuni avhuḓi, ya mela, ya aluwa, ya vhuya ya shela thoro; iṅwe ṱhotshe ya vha na thoro dza 30, iṅwe ya vha na 60, iṅwe ya vha na ḓana.”" 
Mark4:9 Yesu a mbo ri, “A na nḓevhe nga a ḓipfele!”" 
Mark4:10 Musi vhe nga tshavho, vha 12 na vhaṅwe vhafunziwa vha Yesu vha mu humbela u ṱalutshedzwa aḽa a zwifanyiso." 
Mark4:11 A vha fhindula a ri, “Inwi no dzumbululelwa tshiphiri tsha muvhuso wa Mudzimu, hone vhaḽa vha si vhaṅwe nga riṋe vha vhudzwa mafhungo aya nga zwifanyiso," 
Mark4:12 hu u itela uri “ ‘naho vho sedza vha si vhone; naho vho thetshelesa vha si zwi pfe, uri vha sa ḓo rembuluwa, Mudzimu a vho ḓo vha hangwela!’ ”" 
Mark4:13 Ndi hone Yesu a tshi vha vhudzisa a ri, “Arali itshi tshifanyiso ni sa tshi pfi, zwiṅwe zwine zwa kha ḓi ḓa ni ḓo zwi pfa hani?" 
Mark4:14 Tshifanyiso itshi tshi amba hezwi: Tshine muzwali a zwala ndi ipfi ḽa Mudzimu. 
Mark4:15 Hune a tshi zwala ya wela nḓilani, zwi amba avho vhane vha ri vha kha ḓi bva u pfa ipfi ḽa Mudzimu, Saṱhane a mbo ḓi ḓa a tswa mbilu dzavho." 
Mark4:16 Hune a tshi zwala ya wela kha lutombo, zwi amba avho vhane vha ri u pfa ipfi ḽa Mudzimu vha mbo ḓi ḽi ṱanganedza nga mbilu tshena," 
Mark4:17 hone vhunga hu si na hune ḽa nga ṱoka midzi khavho, a vha lengi u wa; vha tshi vho tambudzelwa ipfi ḽa Mudzimu na u tovholelwa ḽone vha mbo ḓi ḽi furalela na zwenezwo." 
Mark4:18 Hune a tshi zwala ya wela mipfani, zwi amba avho vhane vha ri vho pfa ipfi ḽa Mudzimu" 
Mark4:19 ḽa pwanyeledzwa nga u vhilaela nga zwa vhutshilo na u xedzwa nga u funesa lupfumo na u tama zwithu zwa tshakha-tshakha, vha si vhe na mitshelo." 
Mark4:20 Hune i tshi zwalwa ya wela mavuni avhuḓi, zwi amba avho vhane vha ri u pfa ipfi ḽa Mudzimu vha ḽi ṱanganedza, vha vhuya vha aṋwa mitshelo. Vhaṅwe vhavho vha aṋwa 30, vhaṅwe 60, vhaṅwe ḓana.”" 
Mark4:21 Yesu a dovha a vha vhudzisa a ri, “Kani-ha luvhone lu ḓela u tibwa nga mvuvhelo kana u vhewa fhasi ha mmbete? Kani a lu vhewi vhudzuloni halwo?" 
Mark4:22 A hu na tsho dzumbwaho tshine tsha sa ḓo dzumbululwa; nahone a hu na na tshiphiri tshine tsha sa ḓo bvela khagala. 
Mark4:23 “A na nḓevhe kha a ḓipfele!” 
Mark4:24 Yesu a vha vhudza a ri, “Thetshelesani zwavhuḓi! Muelo une na elela vhaṅwe ngawo, na inwi Mudzimu u ḓo ni elela-vho ngawo, nahone u tshi vho fhira uḽa we inwi na ela ngawo." 
Mark4:25 Muthu a na zwawe u ḓo dovha a engedzwa zwiṅwe, hone a si na tshawe u ḓo dovha a dzhielwa na zwiṱukuṱuku zwine a vha nazwo.”" 
Mark4:26 Yesu a tshi isa phanḓa a ri, “Muvhuso wa Mudzimu u fana na muthu o zwalaho mbeu tsimuni yawe." 
Mark4:27 Vhusiku u a ḓieḓetshela, nga matsheloni a ḓivutshela zwawe, nga ngei mutomba u tshi khou runga, wa aluwa, ene a sa ḓivhi tshi u medzaho." 
Mark4:28 Ndi mavu one aṋe ane a itisa uri goroi i aluwe i vhuye i rumbuwe: tsha u thoma hu vhonala mutomba, wa vhuya wa rumbuwa ha vhuya ha bvelela ṱhotshe yo shelaho thoro;" 
Mark4:29 musi goroi yo no vhibva vhathu vha konou bva na segere u yo tshea ngauri tshifhinga tsha khaṋo tshi vha tsho swika.” 
Mark4:30 Yesu a ri, “Nṋa muvhuso wa Mudzimu ri ḓo u fanyisa na mini? Ri ḓo wana tshifanyiso-ḓe tsha u u ṱalutshedza?" 
Mark4:31 U fana na mbeu ya muhuyu, ine ya vha yone mbeu ṱhukhusa." 
Mark4:32 Muthu u a i zwala; musi i tshi mela ya vho vha muri muhuluhulu u na matavhi o hulaho lune na zwiṋoni zwa vhuya zwa ḓa zwa fhaṱa zwiṱaha khawo.” 
Mark4:33 Yesu o vha a tshi ḓi funza ipfi ḽa Mudzimu nga zwifanyiso zwinzhi zwi fanaho na zwenezwi; a tshi tou vha vhudza zwine vha kona u zwi ṱalukanya fhedzi. 
Mark4:34 Ho ngo vhuya a amba navho nga iṅwe nḓila arali hu si nga zwifanyiso; a konou ṱalutshedza vhafunziwa vhawe zwoṱhe vhe nga tshavho. 
Mark4:35 Ḓuvha ḽeneḽo nga madekwana Yesu a vhudza vhafunziwa vhawe a ri, “Nga ri wetshele seli ha dzivha.”" 
Mark4:36 Vha mbo sia gogo ḽa vhathu; vhafunziwa vha dzhena tshikepeni tshenetsho tshe Yesu a vha o no vha khatsho, tsha ṱuwa na zwiṅwe zwikepe zwe zwa vha zwi henefho." 
Mark4:37 Ha vuwa ḓumbu ḽihulu, maḓi a thoma u dzhena tshikepeni a vhuya a nga a sa tshi ḓadza." 
Mark4:38 Yesu o vha o eḓela nga murahu o siamela. Vhafunziwa vha mu vusa vha ri, “Vhafunzi, nṋa a vha vhuyi vha zwi londa ri tshi khou ṱoḓa u lovha?”" 
Mark4:39 Yesu a vuwa, a kaidza ḓumbu na magabelo uri zwi dzike, nangoho zwa mbo ḓi dzika, ha tou dzokoto." 
Mark4:40 Ndi hone Yesu a tshi amba na vhafunziwa vhawe a ri, “No tshenuswa ngani? Kani ni tshee vhathu vha si na fulufhelo?”" 
Mark4:41 Hone vhone vha farwa nga nyofho khulu, vha thoma u vhudzisana nga tshavho vha tshi ri, “Ndi muthu-ḓe hoyu ane a kaidza ḓumbu na lwanzhe, zwa mu thetshelesa?”" 
Mark5:1 Zwo no ralo vha wetshela seli ha Dzivha ḽa Galelia, vho livha shangoni ḽa Vhagerasini." 
Mark5:2 Yesu a tshi tou bva tshikepeni ha ḓa munna a na thuṅwa dza Saṱhane a tshi bva zwaloni. 
Mark5:3 Hayani hawe ho vha ho no vha henefho zwaloni. Ho vha hu si tshee na we a vha a tshi nga kona u dzula o mu vhofha nga dzitsimbi," 
Mark5:4 ngauri lwo vha lwo no vha lunzhi vha tshi mu vhofha milenzhe na zwanḓa nga dzitsimbi, ene a fhedza nga u ṱhukhukanya idzo tsimbi, dza milenzheni a tshi dzi kandekanya. O vha e na maanḓa lwe ha vha hu si na ane a nga mu kona." 
Mark5:5 O vha a tshi tendeleka zwaloni na zwikwarani vhusiku na masiari, a tshi zhamba a tshi ḓitshetshekanya nga matombo." 
Mark5:6 Musi a tshi vhona Yesu a tshee kulenyana, a mu gidimela a ḓa a mu gwadamela" 
Mark5:7 a tshi khou ṱavha mukosi muhulu a tshi ri, “Iwe Yesu, Murwa wa Mudzimu wa ṱaḓuluṱaḓulu! U ṱoḓani kha nṋe? Nga Mudzimu, u songo ntshengedza!”" 
Mark5:8 A tshi ralo Yesu o vha a tshi vho ri thuṅwa dzi bve khae. 
Mark5:9 Ndi hone Yesu a tshi mu vhudzisa a ri, “Ni pfi nnyi?” Uyo munna a fhindula a ri, “Ndi pfi Mmbi, ngauri ri tou vha vhanzhi-vhanzhi!”" 
Mark5:10 A ḓi isa phanḓa a tshi kwengweledza Yesu uri a si pandele thuṅwa idzo shangoni iḽo. 
Mark5:11 Henefho tsini-tsini ho vha hu na sambi ḽihuluhulu ḽa nguluvhe dzi tshi khou fundudza-fundudza bamani. 
Mark5:12 Thuṅwa dza humbela Yesu dza ri, “Kha ri thathelwe zwashu afho nguluvheni, ri tendelwe u dzhena khadzo.”" 
Mark5:13 Yesu a dzi tendela, dza mbo ḓi bva kha uyo munna dza dzhena kha nguluvhe. Zwi tshi ralo idzo nguluvhe dzoṱhe dza mbo ḓi gidimela luwani dza wela dzivhani, ha vha u nwela khothe. Sambi iḽo ḽo vha ḽi tshi nga swika 2 000." 
Mark5:14 Vhalisa vhadzo vha shavha, vha yo anḓadza mafhungo ayo muḓini na mivhunduni ya henefho. Vhathu vha bva u yo vhona zwo iteaho." 
Mark5:15 Vha tshi swika ha Yesu vha vhona uyo munna we a vha e na thuṅwa nnzhi o dzula henefho nae o no ambara zwiambaro, nahone o no vha muthu-muthu; vhoṱhe vha farwa nga nyofho." 
Mark5:16 Vhe vha zwi vhona vha hanelela vhathu zwe zwa itea kha uyo munna we a vha e na thuṅwa, na zwe zwa itea kha nguluvhe." 
Mark5:17 Ndi hone vha tshi rabeledza Yesu uri a ṱuwe shangoni ḽavho. 
Mark5:18 Yesu a tshi vho dzhena tshikepeni uyo munna we a vha e na thuṅwa a mu humbela a ri, “Ndo vha ndi tshi ri ndi nga ṱuwa-vho navho!”" 
Mark5:19 Hone Yesu a si mu tendele, a tou mu vhudza a ri, “Humelani kha vha haṋu, ni vha vhudze zwoṱhe zwe Muṋe washu a ni tonda na uri o ni itela tshilidzi tshingafhani.”" 
Mark5:20 Zwi tshi ralo uyo munna a ṱuwa, a buḓekanya shango ḽi no pfi Miḓi-ya-fumi a tshi enda a tshi ḓivhadza vhathu zwe Yesu a mu itela, vhoṱhe vhe vha zwi pfa vha kanuka." 
Mark5:21 Yesu a dovha a wetshela seli na luḽa wa dzivha, khunzikhunzini yaḽo, ha ḓa vhathu vhanzhi-vhanzhi." 
Mark5:22 Henefho ha ḓa muṅwe muhulwane wa sinagogo we a vha a tshi pfi Jairosi, a ri u vhona Yesu a mu gwadamela" 
Mark5:23 a mu humbela nga zwanḓa zwivhili a ri, “Ṅwananyana wanga u khou lwala lune u fa na u tshila tsha vha tshithu tshithihi. Ndi khou tou vha humbela uri vha ḓe vha mu vhee zwanḓa a fhole, a si fe!”" 
Mark5:24 Yesu a mbo ḓi takuwa a ṱuwa nae. Na vhaṅwe vhathu vhanzhi-vhanzhi vha ṱuwa nae vha tshi tou mu pwanyeledza thungo dzoṱhe. 
Mark5:25 Zwino ho vha hu na muṅwe musadzi we a vha o no fhedza miṅwaha ya 12 e na vhulwadze ha u ṱamba a sa gumi. 
Mark5:26 O vha o no tambula nga u ṱanganya dziṅanga ha sokou vha u tambisa tshelede yawe yoṱhe, a sa vhuyi a vha khwiṋe, vhulwadze vhu tshi ḓi hulela vhu tshi ya." 
Mark5:27 O vha o pfa a Yesu. Ndi hone a tshi ḓa khae nga murahu a tshi tou vhanyuludza vhathu, a kwama nguvho yawe" 
Mark5:28 a tshi ri, “Naho nda nga tou kwama nguvho yawe ndi ḓo fhola.”" 
Mark5:29 U bva ha malofha ha mbo ḓi kaṱuwa na zwenezwo, a tou ḓipfa na ene muṋe uri o fhola." 
Mark5:30 Yesu a ri u pfa uri maanḓa awe o bva a shuma zwiṅwe, a rembuluwa henefho vhukati ha gogo a vhudzisa a ri, “Ndi nnyi we a kwama nguvho yanga?”" 
Mark5:31 Ndi hone vhafunziwa vhawe vha tshi mu fhindula vha ri, “Hufha vha tshi khou zwi vhona uri vho tangiwa nga vhathu vhanzhi-vhanzhi, vha kha ḓi vhuya vha vhudziselani uri vho kwamiwa nga nnyi?”" 
Mark5:32 Hone Yesu a ḓi sedza thungo dzoṱhe uri a vhone we a mu kwama. 
Mark5:33 Musadzi a tshi vhona zwo iteaho khae a ḓa phanḓa ha Yesu a tshi tou tetemela nga nyofho, a gwadama a mu vhudza ngoho yo ḓalaho." 
Mark5:34 Yesu a amba nae a ri, “Ṅwananga, fulufhelo ḽaṋu ḽo ni fhodza, tshimbilani zwaṋu no rudza mbilu, ni dzule no takala.”" 
Mark5:35 Musi Yesu a tshi kha ḓi ralo ha mbo ḓi swika vhaḓinḓa vha bvaho muḓini wa Jairosi, vha amba nae vha ri, “Ṅwananyana wavho o no ḓi ri sia; vha kha ḓi ṱolou dinelani Vhafunzi?”" 
Mark5:36 Yesu a sa vhuye a ḓidina nga zwe vha vha vha tshi khou amba, a amba na Jairosi a ri, “Vha songo ofha tshithu, tshavho nga hu vhe u fulufhela Mudzimu.”" 
Mark5:37 A tshi fhirela phanḓa a si tende vhathu vhaṅwe vha tshi ṱuwa nae, a ṱuwa na Pitrosi na Jakopo na murathu wawe Johanisi fhedzi." 
Mark5:38 Vha tshi swika muḓini wa Jairosi Yesu a wana ho sokou vuwa bonyongo, vhaṅwe vha tshi khou zhamba, vhaṅwe vha tshi ṱavha mikosi." 
Mark5:39 Yesu a dzhena nḓuni a ri, “Ndi bonyongo ḽani-ha iḽi? Ni khou lilelani? Hufha ṅwana uyu a songo fa o tou eḓela.”" 
Mark5:40 Vha thoma u mu sea, Ene a mbo ḓi vha thathela nnḓa vhoṱhe, a vhidza khotsi a ṅwana na mme a ṅwana khathihi na vhafunziwa vhawe vhararu, vha dzhena he ṅwana a vha o lala hone." 
Mark5:41 A mu fara nga tshanḓa a ri, “Talitha kumi!” – zwine zwa amba uri, “Musidzana, ndi ri vuwani!”" 
Mark5:42 A mbo ḓi vuwa na zwenezwo a thoma u tshimbila-tshimbila. O vha e musidzana wa miṅwaha ya 12. Vhathu vha tshi zwi vhona vha akhamala. 
Mark5:43 Yesu a vha laya o tou khwaṱhisa uri vha si vhuye vha zwi vhudza muthu, a konou ri, “Nga a fhiwe zwiḽiwa.”" 
Mark6:1 Yesu a mbo ṱuwa afho na vhafunziwa vhawe, a humela muḓini wa hawe." 
Mark6:2 Nga Sabatha a mbo thoma u funza sinagogo. Vhathu vhanzhi vha tshi mu pfa vha akhamala. Vha vhudzisana nga tshavho vha ri, “Nṋa zwithu izwi o zwi wanafhi? Ndi vhuṱali-ḓe uvhu he a ṋewa ha u kona u ita zwingafhangafha?" 
Mark6:3 Kani na zwino a si ene uḽa muvhaḓi ane ra mu ḓivha e ṅwana wa Maria? A si ene mukomana wa Jakopo na Jose na Judasi na Simoni? Khaladzi dzawe a ri nadzo henefhano?” Vha amba nga u ralo vha tshi tou mu sathula. 
Mark6:4 Yesu a konou amba navho a ri, “Muporofita u huliswa hoṱhe-hoṱhe, fhedzi ha hawe na mashakani na muṱani wa hawe ha huliswi.”" 
Mark6:5 Henefho Yesu a si kone u ita maḓembe, a tou vhea vhalwadze vha si gathi zwanḓa a vha fhodza." 
Mark6:6 A kanuka a tshi vhona vha tshi mu landula. Yesu a mbo ḓi tshimbila na miḓi ya henefho tsini a tshi enda a tshi funza vhathu. 
Mark6:7 A vhidza vha 12, a vha ṋea maanḓa a u pandela thuṅwa dza Saṱhane a konou vha ruma nga vhavhili-vhavhili," 
Mark6:8 a vha laya a ri, “Ni songo vhuya na ṱuwa na tshithu musi ni tshi fara lwendo; ni tou fara lubaḓa fhedzi; arali i mbuvha, kana mukhwama, kana tshelede, ni songo vhuya na ṱuwa nazwo." 
Mark6:9 Ni ambare thovho, hone ni songo vhuya na ṱuwa na hemmbe dzi no swika mbili." 
Mark6:10 Na dzhena muṱani ni dzule henefho he na thoma u swielelwa ni vhuye ni fhirele phanḓa. 
Mark6:11 Arali ni tshi dzhena huṅwe vha si ni takalele, vha si ni thetshelese, ni mbo ḓi ṱuwa, ni ite na u fhufhura buse milenzheni yaṋu, vhu vhe vhuṱanzi ha uri zwi kha vhone.”" 
Mark6:12 Ndi hone vhafunziwa vha tshi ṱuwa vha yo ḓivhadza vhathu uri vha laṱe vhuvhi havho. 
Mark6:13 Vha pandela thuṅwa nnzhi kha vhathu, vha moṋa vhalwadze vhanzhi nga mapfura, vha fhola." 
Mark6:14 Bvumo ḽa Yesu ḽo ḓo swika-vho na nḓevheni dza khosi Herude, vhunga iṱali ḽo vha ḽo no ḓi pfala hoṱhe-hoṱhe – vhaṅwe vhathu vho vha vha tshi vho ri, “Ndi Johanisi Mulovhedzi we a vha o fa; o vuwa. Ndi zwine a kona ngazwo u ita zwithu zwingafhangafha.”" 
Mark6:15 Vhaṅwe vha ri, “Hoyu ndi Elia.” Vhaṅwe-vho nga fhaḽa vhe, “Ndi muporofita a fanaho na vhaḽa vha misi iḽa ya kale.”" 
Mark6:16 Herude a tshi zwi pfa a ri, “Ndi Johanisi we nda mu tumula ṱhoho. O vuwa vhafuni!”" 
Mark6:17 A tshi mu vhulaha zwo vha zwo ḓa nga nḓila hei: Herude o vha o ṱahisa Herudiasi musadzi wa mukomana wawe Filipi, zwino Johanisi a tshi ḓi ṱolou mu vhudza uri a zwo ngo fanela a tshi ṱahisa mmane wawe. Herude a vhuya a amba nga tsha vhukoma a ri Johanisi a fariwe a hoṋelwe dzhele." 
Mark6:18  
Mark6:19 Herudiasi o vha o no fara Johanisi nga mbilu, a tshi ṱoḓa na u mu vhulaha, hone a ro kundwa" 
Mark6:20 ngauri Herude o vha a tshi mu ofha, nga u ḓivha uri ndi munna muvhuya o ḓikumedzaho Mudzimu. O vha a tshi tou ita na u mu tsireledza, nahone a tshi ḓi takalela u mu thetshelesa, naho zwine Johanisi a amba zwo vha zwi tshi mu tshenusa." 
Mark6:21 Hone Herudiasi o fhedza nga u wana nḓila ya u vhulaha Johanisi. Ho vha hu na munyanya wa mabebo a Herude, ene Herude o ramba magota awe oṱhe, na vhalangammbi, na vhaḓivhalea vha shango ḽa Galelia." 
Mark6:22 Ṅwananyana wa Herudiasi a ḓa a tshina phanḓa ha Herude na vhaeni vhawe, a tou vha takadza. Khosi ya konou amba nae ya ri, “Ambani tshine na funa. Ndi ḓo ni ṋea.”" 
Mark6:23 A dovha a tou ana a khwaṱhisa a ri, “Ndi ni fulufhedzisa uri ndi ḓo ni ṋea tshiṅwe na tshiṅwe tshine na humbela, naho hu u ni fhandulela shango ḽanga nga vhukati!”" 
Mark6:24 Musidzana a mbo ḓi bva, a ya ha mme awe a vhudzisa a ri, “Ndi humbele mini?” Mme awe a fhindula a ri, “Humbelani ṱhoho ya Johanisi Mulovhedzi.”" 
Mark6:25 Musidzana a mbo ḓi ṱavhanya u gidimela ha khosi a ri, “Ndo vha ndi tshi khou ri vha nga nṋea zwanga ṱhoho ya Johanisi Mulovhedzi zwino, i ḓe i ndiloni.”" 
Mark6:26 Iyo khumbelo ya ṱhavha khosi nga maanḓa, hone a ro kundwa u hana, nge a vha o ana vhaeni vhoṱhe vha tshi zwi pfa." 
Mark6:27 A mbo ḓi ruma ḽiswole uri ḽi ḓise ṱhoho ya Johanisi; ḽa ya dzhele ḽa mu tumula ṱhoho; 
Mark6:28 ḽa ḓa nayo i ndiloni, ḽa i ṋea uḽa musidzana, ene a i ṋea mme awe." 
Mark6:29 Musi vhafunziwa vha Johanisi vha tshi pfa zwo itwaho, vha ḓa vha dzhia tshitumbu tshawe, vha yo tshi swiṱa." 
Mark6:30 Vhaapostola vha tshi vhuya, vha hanelela Yesu zwoṱhe zwe vha ita na zwe vha funza." 
Mark6:31 Ho vha hu na vhathu vhanzhi, vhaṅwe vha tshi bva, vhaṅwe vha tshi dzhena, lwe Yesu na vhafunziwa vhawe vha kundwa na tshifhinga tsha u ḽa. Yesu a vhuya a amba navho a ri, “Nga ri ṱuwe nga tshashu uri ni wane tshifhinga tsha u awelanyana fhethu hu si na vhathu.”" 
Mark6:32 Vha mbo ḓi dzhena tshikepeni nga tshavho, vha ya fhethu hu si na vhathu." 
Mark6:33 Musi vha tshi ṱuwa vha vhonwa nga vhathu vhanzhi, vha vha ḓivha, vha gidima vha tshi bva miḓini yoṱhe, vha tshi ya afho he Yesu na vhafunziwa vhawe vha vha vho livha hone, vha swika Ene a sa athu." 
Mark6:34 Yesu a tshi bva tshikepeni a vhona gogo ḽihulu ḽa vhathu, a vha pfela vhuṱungu nge a vhona vha tshi tou nga nngu dzi si na mulisa. A mbo ḓi vha funza zwithu zwinzhi." 
Mark6:35 Nga mathabama vhafunziwa vhawe vha ḓa khae vha ri, “Fhano hune ra vha hone ndi sogani nahone ḓuvha ḽo no ṱuwesa." 
Mark6:36 Kha vha vhofholole vhathu vha yo ḓirengela zwiḽiwa miḓini na miḓanani ya fhano tsini.” 
Mark6:37 Yesu a vha fhindula a ri, “Vha ṋeeni zwiḽiwa inwi vhaṋe.” Vha mu vhudzisa vha ri, “Kani-ha vha khou ṱoḓa ri tshi yo renga vhurotho ha maseṱha a 200, vha ḽe hone?”" 
Mark6:38 Yesu a vha vhudzisa a ri, “Ni na mikonde mingana? Iyani ni sedze.” Musi vho no ya vha sedza vha ḓa vha mu vhudza vha ri, “Ndi miṱanu, na khovhe mbili.”" 
Mark6:39 Ndi hone Yesu a tshi vhudza vhafunziwa vhawe uri vha dzudze vhathu kha tshiṱanzhela nga zwigwada. 
Mark6:40 Nangoho vhathu vha dzula fhasi vho ita zwigwada zwa ḓana ḓana na zwa mahumi maṱanu maṱanu. 
Mark6:41 Yesu a mbo ḓi dzhia iyo mikonde miṱanu na khovhe mbili a lilala a livhuha Mudzimu, a ṅwatekanya iyo mikonde a tshi ṋea vhafunziwa vhawe uri vha kovhele vhathu, a dovha a vha kovhela idzo khovhe mbili;" 
Mark6:42 muṅwe na muṅwe a ḽa a fura. 
Mark6:43 Vhafunziwa vha ḓadza mifaro ya 12 nga zwipeḓu zwo salaho zwa vhurotho na khovhe. 
Mark6:44 Kha vhe vha ḽa izwo zwiḽiwa, vhanna fhedzi vho vha vhe 5 000." 
Mark6:45 Yesu a mbo ḓi kombetshedza vhafunziwa vhawe uri vha dzhene tshikepeni vha mu range phanḓa vho livha Betsaida seli ha dzivha, uri Ene a thome u vhofholola vhathu." 
Mark6:46 Musi o no onesana navho a yo rabela tshikwarani. 
Mark6:47 Musi lu tshi vho swifhala tshikepe tsho vha tsho no vha vhukatikati ha dzivha, Yesu o sala nnḓa e eṱhe." 
Mark6:48 Nga maḓautsha a vhona vhafunziwa vhawe vha tshi khou kakarika na tshikepe, ngauri vho vha vho livhana na muya. Ndi hone a tshi ḓa khavho a tshi khou tshimbila nṱha ha maḓi, a tshi nga u ḓo fhira henefho." 
Mark6:49 Vhoṱhe vha tshi mu vhona a tshi khou tshimbila nṱha ha maḓi, vha humbula uri ndi tshirunzi, vha tshenuwa vha ṱavha mukosi. Yesu a mbo ḓi amba navho a ri, “Rudzani mbilu; ndi Nṋe, ni songo ofha!”" 
Mark6:50  
Mark6:51 A dzhena henefho tshikepeni, muya wa dzika. Vhafunziwa vhone vho vha vho akhamala, vho no xelelwa na nga muhumbulo." 
Mark6:52 Hafhu na zwiḽa zwa mikonde ya vhurotho vho vha vha songo ṱalukanya uri zwi ambani, vho vha vha tshee swiswini." 
Mark6:53 Vha wela dzivha vha tsela kha ḽa Genesaretha, vha vhofha tshikepe." 
Mark6:54 Musi vha tshi bva tshikepeni vhathu vha mbo ḓi ri, “Yesu khoyu!”" 
Mark6:55 Vha balangana na shango, vha hwala na vhalwadze kha mahingo vha vha isa afho he vha vha vha tshi pfa e hone." 
Mark6:56 Hoṱhe he Yesu a ya, ḓoroboni na miḓini, na miḓanani, vhathu vho vha vha tshi isa vhalwadze vhavho vanḓani, vha mu humbela uri vhalwadze vhavho vha tou kwama zwavho shaphu ḽa nguvho yawe, vhoṱhe vhe vha ḽi kwama vha fhola." 
Mark7:1 Vhaṅwe vhaḓivhi vha Mulayo vha bvaho Jerusalema, na Vhafarisei, vha kuvhanganela Yesu;" 
Mark7:2 vha vhona vhafunziwa vhawe vha tshi khou ḽa zwiḽiwa vha songo ṱamba zwanḓa – ndi uri vho vha vha songo ṱamba nga maitele a vhomakhulukuku. 
Mark7:3 Ndi uri Majuda vhoṱhe, zwihulu vhone Vhafarisei, vho vha vha tshi tevhedza zwidayo zwa vhomakhulukuku wavho; a vha koni u ḽa arali vha songo ṱamba zwanḓa nga nḓila yazwo," 
Mark7:4 nahone a vha ḽi tshiḽiwa tshi bvaho makete arali tshi songo ranga u ṱanzwiwa. Hu tshee na zwiṅwe zwidayo zwinzhi zwa vhomakhulukuku wavho zwine vha zwi tevhedza, sa kuṱanzwele kwa zwinwelo na kwa dzikhali na kwa dzigeḓela na kwa mimbete." 
Mark7:5 Ndi hone Vhafarisei na vhaḓivhi vha Mulayo vha tshi vhudzisa Yesu vha ri, “Ndi mini vhafunziwa vhavho vha sa tevhedzi ndayo dza vhomakhulukuku washu, vha tshi ḽa vha songo ṱamba?”" 
Mark7:6 Yesu a vha fhindula a ri, “Ṋowa dzenedzi! Yesaya ha ni zwifheleli a tshi ni porofita unga ho ṅwalwa ha pfi, “ ‘Mudzimu u ri: Havha vhathu vha nkhulisa nga milomo fhedzi, hone mbilu dzavho dzi siho kha Nṋe." 
Mark7:7 Na u nthabela a zwi vha farisi tshithu, ngauri vha tshi funza zwidayo zwa vhathu, vha ri ndi Mulayo wa Mudzimu!’" 
Mark7:8 “Na inwi ni ralo: ni litsha Mulayo wa Mudzimu, na fara zwidayo zwa vhathu.”" 
Mark7:9 A tshi isa phanḓa a ri, “A ni koni zwone u laṱa Mulayo wa Mudzimu uri ni kone u nambatela zwidayo zwaṋu!" 
Mark7:10 Hufha Mushe o laya a ri, ‘Hulisa khotsi au na mme au,’ a dovha a ri, ‘Ane a sema khotsi kana mme tshawe ndi u vhulawa.’" 
Mark7:11 Hone inwi ni tshi funza ni ri arali muthu e na tshithu tshine a nga kona u vhavhalela khotsi awe kana mme awe ngatsho, hone a ri, ‘Hei ndi korobani,’ (ndi uri: Ndi nduvho ya Mudzimu)," 
Mark7:12 onoyo muthu a ni tsha mu tendela u vhavhalela khotsi awe kana mme awe. 
Mark7:13 Ndi hone u laṱa ipfi ḽa Mudzimu, ni tshi laya vhathu uri vha tevhedze zwidayo zwa vhomakhulukuku waṋu. Hu tshee na zwiṅwe zwidayo zwinzhi zwi no nga zwenezwo.”" 
Mark7:14 Yesu a dovha a vhidza vhathu a ri, “Noṱhe thetshelesani zwine nda amba uri ni kone u ṱalukanya!" 
Mark7:15 A hu na na tshithu tshine muthu a ri o tshi ḽa tsha mu kumadza. Tshine tsha mu kumadza ndi tshine tsha bva khae. [ 
Mark7:16 A na nḓevhe kha a pfe!]” 
Mark7:17 A sia vhathu nnḓa a dzhena nḓuni; vhafunziwa vhawe vha tevhela vha mu vhudzisa nga tshiḽa tshifanyiso. 
Mark7:18 Yesu a ri, “Matsina na inwi a ni koni u ṱalukanya? A ni zwi ṱalukanyi naa uri tshine tsha dzhena nga mulomo a tshi koni u kumadza muthu," 
Mark7:19 hufha tshi sa yi mbiluni, tshi tshi ya thumbuni, tsha dovha tsha bva nga nḓila yatsho.” (A tshi ralo o vha a tshi amba uri zwiḽiwa zwoṱhe zwi nga ḓi ḽiwa.)" 
Mark7:20 A tshi isa phanḓa a ri, “Zwi bvaho kha muthu ndi zwone zwine zwa kumadza muthu," 
Mark7:21 ngauri mbiluni ya muthu ndi hone hune ha bva mihumbulo mivhi ine ya ḓisa vhufevhi, na vhufobvu, na vhupondi," 
Mark7:22 na vhupombwe ha tshakha-tshakha, na nyemulo, na vhuvhi hoṱhe, na vhufhura, na vhuvhuḓu, na vivho, na u nyefula vhaṅwe, na u ḓihudza, na hone vhutsilu." 
Mark7:23 Hezwi zwithu zwivhi zwoṱhe zwi bvaho mbiluni ndi zwone zwi kumadzaho.” 
Mark7:24 Ndi hone Yesu a tshi takuwa a livha thungo dza Tiro, a dzhena nḓuni uri hu si vhe na ane a ḓivha uri u henefho, hone vhathu vha ḓi fhedza vho zwi ḓivha." 
Mark7:25 Muṅwe musadzi we a vha e na ṅwanyana o dzhenwaho nga thuṅwa ya Saṱhane a tshi pfa hu tshi pfi Yesu u henefho, a mbo ḓi ḓa a gwadama phanḓa hawe." 
Mark7:26 Uyo musadzi o vha e si Mujuda, o vha e Mufinikia wa Siria. A humbela Yesu uri a pandele thuṅwa kha ṅwana wawe." 
Mark7:27 Yesu a tshi fhindula a ri, “A zwo ngo fanela ri tshi dzhia zwiḽiwa zwa vhana ra ṋea zwibwanana vhana vha sa athu fura.”" 
Mark7:28 Uyo musadzi a fhindula a ri, “Muṋe wanga, hufha na zwibwanana zwi re fhasi ha ṱafula zwi tshi ḓi ḽa-vho matshakatshaka o wiswaho nga vhana.”" 
Mark7:29 Yesu a ri, “Ni amba zwone. Iyani zwaṋu hayani, thuṅwa yo bva kha ṅwana waṋu.”" 
Mark7:30 Ene a tshi swika hayani a wana ṅwana wawe o eḓela mmbeteni, nangoho thuṅwa yo bva." 
Mark7:31 Yesu a mbo ṱuwa shangoni ḽa Tiro, a buḓekanya ḽa Sidoni o livha Dzivhani ḽa Galelia, a fhira nga shangoni ḽa Miḓi-ya-fumi." 
Mark7:32 Vhaṅwe vhathu vha mu ḓisela dzinganḓevhe ḽa mbevhevhe vha humbela uri Yesu a mu vhee zwanḓa. 
Mark7:33 Yesu a mbo mu vhidzela thungo, a dzhenisa minwe yawe nḓevheni dza uyo munna, a pfela mare kha munwe a ṋanga lulimi lwawe ngawo." 
Mark7:34 A lilala, a fhihamelwa a ri, “Efata,” zwine zwa amba uri, “Nḓevhe dzaṋu kha dzi vulee!”" 
Mark7:35 Nḓevhe dza uyo munna dza mbo ḓi thoma u pfa, na lulimi lwawe lwa vhofholowa, a thoma u amba zwavhuḓi." 
Mark7:36 Yesu a vha laya vhoṱhe uri vha si zwi vhudze muthu, u ralo ha tou vha u vha vhudza uri vha zwi anḓadze hoṱhe-hoṱhe." 
Mark7:37 Vhoṱhe vhe vha zwi pfa vha akhamala zwihulu vha ri, “Vhonani, zwoṱhe zwine a ita zwi a naka. Madzinganḓevhe u ita uri a pfe; mbevhevhe u ita uri dzi ambe.”" 
Mark8:1 Hu sa athu fhela maḓuvha mangana ha dovha ha kuvhangana vhathu vhanzhi. Yesu a tshi vhona hu si na zwiḽiwa a vhidza vhafunziwa vhawe, a ri," 
Mark8:2 “Havha vhathu ndi vha pfela vhuṱungu; ḽo no vha ḓuvha ḽa vhuraru ri navho, zwino vho no tou ita na u fhelelwa nga zwiḽiwa." 
Mark8:3 Arali nda ri vha ye mahayani vha songo ḽa, vha ḓo ṋoka nḓilani, ngauri vhaṅwe vhavho vha bva kule.”" 
Mark8:4 Vhafunziwa vhawe vha mu vhudzisa vha ri, “Ndi ngafhi henefhano sogani hune muthu a nga wana zwiḽiwa zwa u fusha mavhuthu mangafhangafha?”" 
Mark8:5 Yesu a vha vhudzisa a ri, “Ni na mikonde mingana ya vhurotho?” Vhone vha fhindula vha ri, “Ri na miṱanu na mivhili.”" 
Mark8:6 A vhudza gogo uri ḽi dzule fhasi, a konou dzhia mikonde iḽa miṱanu na mivhili, a livhuha Mudzimu a i ṅwatekanya, a ṋea vhafunziwa vhawe uri vha kovhele vhathu; vhone vha ita nga u ralo." 
Mark8:7 Hafhu vho vha vhe na zwikovhe zwi si gathi. Yesu a dovha a livhuha Mudzimu a tshi itela dzenedzo khovhe, a konou vhudza vhafunziwa vhawe uri vha kovhele vhathu." 
Mark8:8 Vhathu vhe vha vha vhe henefho vho vha vha tshi ṱoḓou swika 4 000, hone vhoṱhe vho ḽa vha fura. Musi vhafunziwa vhawe vha tshi doba zwipeḓu zwo salaho, vha ḓadza mifaro miṱanu na mivhili. Yesu a onesana na vhathu," 
Mark8:9  
Mark8:10 a dzhena tshikepeni na vhafunziwa vhawe, vha ya thungo dza Dalamanutha." 
Mark8:11 Vhaṅwe Vhafarisei vha ḓa ha Yesu vha thoma u ṱaṱa khani nae, vha ita na u humbela uri a ite maḓembe a no bva kha Mudzimu, hone tshi tshikwekwe tsha u mu fasha." 
Mark8:12 Yesu a fhihamelwa nga u pfa zwi tshi tou mu kula nungo, a vha vhudza a ri, “Khezwi inwi vhathu vha musalauno ni tshi ḓi humbela u itelwa maḓembe? Zwino ipfani-ha: a ni nga vhuyi na bva no itelwa maḓembe ane na a lila!”" 
Mark8:13 A mbo ḓi vha furalela, a dzhena tshikepeni a wetshela seli na luḽa lwa dzivha." 
Mark8:14 Vhafunziwa vho vha vho hangwa u bva na vhurotho ho vha eḓanaho, vho tou dzhena na mukonde muthihi fhedzi tshikepeni." 
Mark8:15 Yesu a vha vhudza a ri, “Thanyelani mbilisa ya Vhafarisei na ya Herude.”" 
Mark8:16 Vhone vha thoma u hanedzana nga tshavho vha ri, “U amba ngauri a ri na vhurotho.”" 
Mark8:17 Yesu nga u ḓivha zwe vha vha vha tshi khou amba a vhudzisa a ri, “Khezwi no tou oma kha ḽa u ri a ni na vhurotho? Nṋa na ṋamusi a ni athu ḓivha? Ni tshee vhomushaanzhele? Matsina ni tshee no oma dziṱhoho?" 
Mark8:18 Hufha maṱo ni nao – kani-ha nazwino ndi mafanedza maṱo a nzie? Hufha nḓevhe ni nadzo – kani-ha dzo dzinga? A ni tsha elelwa zwiḽa 
Mark8:19 zwa musi ndi tshi ṅwatekanya mikonde miṱanu nda kovhela vhathu vha 5 000? Ni tshi doba zwipeḓu zwo salaho no ḓadza mifaro mingana?” Vhone vha fhindula vha ri, “Ro ḓadza ya 12.”" 
Mark8:20 Yesu a dovha a vha vhudzisa a ri, “Zwiḽa ndi tshi ṅwatekanya mikonde miṱanu na mivhili nda kovhela vhathu vha 4 000, ni tshi doba zwipeḓu zwo salaho no ḓadza mifaro mingana?” Vhona vha fhindula vha ri, “Ro ḓadza miṱanu na mivhili.”" 
Mark8:21 Yesu a konou vha vhudzisa a ri, “Naho zwo ralo, a ni athu ṱalukanya tshithu naa?”" 
Mark8:22 Vha tshi swika Betsaida vhaṅwe vhathu vha ḓisa munna wa bofu ha Yesu, vha humbela uri a tou mu kwama zwawe." 
Mark8:23 Yesu a fara uyo munna wa bofu nga tshanḓa vha bva afho muḓini. Vho no swika ngei nnḓa a pfela mare maṱoni a uyo munna a mu vhea zwanḓa, a konou mu vhudzisa a ri, “Ni khou vhuya na vhona tshithu naa?”" 
Mark8:24 Uḽa munna a takusa maṱo a ri, “Ndi khou vhona vhathu; vha tou nga miri; vha khou tshimbila-tshimbila.”" 
Mark8:25 Yesu a dovha a vhea zwanḓa zwawe kha maṱo awe. Ndi hone uḽa munna a tshi tou donola maṱo a dovha a kona u vhona – a tou vhona na tshi re kule zwavhuḓivhuḓi. 
Mark8:26 Yesu a mu vhudza a ri, “Iyani hayani; ni songo tsha fhira nga afho muḓini.”" 
Mark8:27 Ndi hone Yesu na vhafunziwa vhawe vha tshi livha miḓini ya Khisaria wa Filipi. Vhe nḓilani Yesu a vha vhudzisa a ri, “Edzonu mmbudza: Nṋa vhathu vha tshi amba vha ri ndi Nṋe nnyi?”" 
Mark8:28 Vhafunziwa vha fhindula vha ri, “Vhaṅwe vha ri ndi Vhone Johanisi Mulovhedzi; vhaṅwe vha ri ndi Vhone Elia; vhaṅwe vha ri vha muṅwe wa vhaporofita vha kale.”" 
Mark8:29 Yesu a konou vha vhudzisa a ri, “Inwi-ha ni ri mini; ni ri ndi Nṋe nnyi?” Pitrosi a fhindula a ri, “Ndi Vhone Mesia.”" 
Mark8:30 Yesu a mbo ḓi vha laya a ri vha songo vhuya vha zwi vhudza muthu. 
Mark8:31 Ndi hone Yesu a tshi thoma u funza vhafunziwa vhawe uri Mubebwa-nga-muthu u fanela u tambudzwa zwihulu, a landulwa nga vhahulwane vha lushaka na nga vhotshifhe vhahulwane na nga vhaḓivhi vha Mulayo, a vhulawa, a dovha a vuwa vhafuni nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuraru." 
Mark8:32 Haya mafhungo Yesu a tou a vhea khagala-khagala. Ndi hone Pitrosi a tshi mu vhidzela thungo a thoma u sola nyambo yawe. 
Mark8:33 Yesu a mbo rembuluwa a livhana na vhafunziwa vhawe, a konou kaidza Pitrosi a ri, “Nṱutshele Saṱhane ndiwe! A u londi zwa Mudzimu, u londa zwa vhathu.”" 
Mark8:34 Ndi hone Yesu a tshi vhidza vhafunziwa vhawe khathihi na gogo ḽoṱhe, a vha vhudza a ri, “Arali muthu a tshi funa u vha mufunziwa wanga, tshawe nga a ḓihangwe, a hwale tshifhambano tshawe, a ntevhele." 
Mark8:35 Ndi uri muthu ane a tata u ṅaledza vhutshilo hawe u a ḓilozwa. Hone ane a ḓo fela Nṋe kana a fela mafhungo maḓifha, ndi ene ane a ḓo tshila." 
Mark8:36 Nṋa muthu zwi ḓo mu farisani u fuwa shango ḽoṱhe, a fhedza a lovha tshoṱhe?" 
Mark8:37 A nga bvisa mini tsha u rengulula vhutshilo hawe? 
Mark8:38 Arali muthu e na vhathu havha vhavhi vho shandukelaho Mudzimu a shona u ḓibaḓekanya na Nṋe na pfunzo yanga, Mubebwa-nga-muthu na Ene u ḓo shona u ḓibaḓekanya nae musi a tshi vhuya na vharuṅwa vhakhethwa e vhugalani ha Khotsi.”" 
Mark9:1 A tshi ralo o vha a tshi amba uri, “Zwino ipfani-ha: Hu na vhaṅwe henefha vhane vha sa ḓo fa vha sa athu vhona Mudzimu a tshi vhusa vhathuni nga maanḓa mahulu.”" 
Mark9:2 Ho no fhela maḓuvha maṱanu na ḽithihi Yesu a ṱuwa na Pitrosi na Jakopo na Johanisi a gonya navho thavha ndapfu vhe nga tshavho; a shanduka vha tshi zwi vhona," 
Mark9:3 zwiambaro zwawe zwa thoma u penya, zwa tshena lune ha si vhuye ha vha na muthihi fhano shangoni ane a nga kona u zwi kuvha zwa tshena nga u ralo." 
Mark9:4 Ndi hone vhaḽa vhafunziwa vhararu vha tshi vhona Elia na Mushe vha tshi khou amba na Yesu. 
Mark9:5 Pitrosi a vhuya a bva mulomo a ri, “Vhafunzi, ro ita zwone ra ḓa fhano. Kha vha litshe ri fhaṱe thumba tharu; iṅwe i ḓo vha yavho, iṅwe ya vha ya Mushe iṅwe ya Elia.”" 
Mark9:6 A tshi ralo ndi uri o vha a si tsha ḓivha zwine a nga amba, ngauri vho vha vho no tshenuwa nga maanḓa." 
Mark9:7 Ha mbo alama gole ḽa vha tiba nga murunzi waḽo, ha pfala ipfi ḽi tshi bva khaḽo ḽa ri, “Hoyu ndi Ene Murwa wanga muthihi fhedzi; ni mu pfe!”" 
Mark9:8 Vha tshi posa maṱo ngei na ngei, vha vhona vho no sala na Yesu fhedzi, vhaḽa vhaṅwe vha si tsheeho." 
Mark9:9 Vha tshi vho tsa thavha Yesu a vha laya a ri, “Zwe na vhona ṋamusi ni songo vhuya na vhudza muthu, muthu Mubebwa-nga-muthu a sa athu vuswa vhafuni.”" 
Mark9:10 Vha tenda zwe a vha laya, hone vha thoma u amba nga tshavho vha ri, “Nṋa a tshi ri ‘u ḓo vuwa vhafuni’ u ambani?”" 
Mark9:11 Ndi hone vha tshi vhudzisa Yesu vha ri, “Khezwi vhaḓivhi vha Mulayo vha tshi ri hu fanela u thoma u ḓa Elia?”" 
Mark9:12 Yesu a fhindula a ri, “Nangoho hu fanela u thoma u ḓa Elia uri a lugise zwoṱhe. Naho zwo ralo, khezwi Maṅwalo a tshi ri Mubebwa-nga-muthu u fanela u tambudzwa zwihulu na u nyadziwa?" 
Mark9:13 Nṋe ndi ri Elia o no ḓi ḓa, hone vhathu vha mu ita nga u kona, nga he Maṅwalo a vha o amba ngaho.”" 
Mark9:14 Musi vha tshi dovha u ṱangana na vhaṅwe vhafunziwa vha wana ho no vha na gogo ḽihulu, vhaṅwe vhaḓivhi vha Mulayo vha tshi khou ṱaṱa khani na vhafunziwa." 
Mark9:15 Musi vhathu vha tshi vhona Yesu vha kanuka nga maanḓa, vha gidima vha yo mu ṱanganedza." 
Mark9:16 Yesu a vha vhudzisa a ri, “Ni khou ṱaṱa khani ya mini?”" 
Mark9:17 Muṅwe munna e vhukati ha gogo a fhindula a ri, “Vhafunzi, ndo ḓisa muṱhanngana wanga kha Vhone ngauri o dzhenwa nga thuṅwa ya Saṱhane, ha tsha kona u amba." 
Mark9:18 Musi thuṅwa i tshi vhinuwa i mu posa fhasi, a thoma u phukhula bulo a lumanya maṋo ha mbo ḓi vha u oma muvhili woṱhe. Ndo humbela vhafunziwa vhavho uri vha pandele thuṅwa iyo, hone vha kundwa.”" 
Mark9:19 Yesu a mbo amba navho a ri, “Hee inwi ni sa fulufheli Mudzimu! Nṋa ndi ḓo vha na inwi u swika lini? Nṋa ndi ḓo ni konḓelela u swika lini? Ḓisani uyo muṱhannga kha Nṋe!”" 
Mark9:20 Vha mbo ḓisa uyo muṱhannga khae, iyo thuṅwa ya ri u vhona Yesu ya mbo ḓi dzhenisa uyo muṱhannga tshifakhole, a wela fhasi a vhumbuluwa a tshi tou phukhula na bulo." 
Mark9:21 Yesu a vhudzisa khotsi a muṱhannga a ri, “Ndi tshifhinga tshingafhani zwo mu fara?” Khotsi a ṅwana a fhindula a ri, “U bva hanani hawe." 
Mark9:22 Ndi kanzhi thuṅwa i tshi linga u mu vhulaha nga u mu posa muliloni kana maḓini. Nga vha ri pfele vhuṱungu vha ri farise arali vha tshi zwi kona!” 
Mark9:23 Yesu a ri, “Ni ri ‘Ndi tshi kona’! Zwoṱhe zwi a konadzea kha muthu a re na lutendo.”" 
Mark9:24 Khotsi a ṅwana a tou ambela nṱha a ri, “Lutendo ndi nalwo, hone kha vha khwaṱhise hune lwa ṱahela.”" 
Mark9:25 Yesu a tshi vhona uri gogo ḽi ḓi hula ḽi tshi ya a kaidza thuṅwa a ri, “Iwe thuṅwa i no dzingisa nḓevhe na u ita muthu tshimuma, ndi ri u mbo ḓi bva kha muṱhannga uyu nahone u songo tsha dovha wa vhuya khae!”" 
Mark9:26 Thuṅwa ya mbo ḓi zhamba, ya khwiḓukanya uyo muṱhannga a fa zwifakhole, ha mbo ḓi vha u bva hayo. Muṱhannga a sala o tou ṅwavha sa mufu, vhathu vhanzhi vha ri o fa." 
Mark9:27 Hone Yesu a mu fara nga tshanḓa a mu takusa, uyo muṱhannga a ima." 
Mark9:28 Musi Yesu o no dzhena nḓuni e na vhafunziwa vhawe fhedzi, vha mu vhudzisa vha ri, “Ndi mini riṋe ro kundwa u pandela iḽa thuṅwa?”" 
Mark9:29 Yesu a tshi fhindula a ri, “Thuṅwa dzi no nga sa hei dzi nga si pandelwe nga tshiṅwe tshithu arali i si thabelo.”" 
Mark9:30 Vha tshi bva henefho vha fhirela phanḓa nga u tou buḓekanya ḽa Galelia. Yesu Ene o vha a sa funi uri vhathu vha ḓivhe hune a vha hone," 
Mark9:31 ngauri o vha a tshi khou funza vhafunziwa vhawe a tshi ri, “Mubebwa-nga-muthu u ḓo kumedzwa vhathu, vha mu vhulaha, nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuraru hone u ḓo vuwa vhafuni.”" 
Mark9:32 Hone vhone vha sa pfe uri iḽo ipfi ḽawe ḽi amba mini, vha dovha vha ofha na u mu vhudzisa." 
Mark9:33 Vha swika Kapernaumi, musi vho no dzhena nḓuni Yesu a vha vhudzisa a ri, “No vha ni tshi khou ṱaṱisana nga mini nḓilani?”" 
Mark9:34 Vhone vha sokou fhumula, ngauri vho vha vho enda vha tshi khou ṱaṱa khani nga uri muhulwane khavho ndi nnyi." 
Mark9:35 Yesu a dzula fhasi, a vhidza vha 12 a vha laya a ri, “Ane a ṱoḓa u vha muhulwane u fanela u ḓiita muṱuku kha vhoṱhe, a vhe mushumeli wa vhoṱhe.”" 
Mark9:36 Ndi hone a tshi dzhia ṅwana a mu imisa phanḓa havho, a mu kuvhatedza a ri," 
Mark9:37 “Ane a ṱanganedza muṅwe wa vhana havha a tshi itela Nṋe, u ṱanganedza Nṋe; ane a nṱanganedza ha ṱanganedzi Nṋe fhedzi, u ṱanganedza na o nthumaho.”" 
Mark9:38 Johanisi a ri, “Vhafunzi, ro vhona muthu we a vha a tshi khou pandela thuṅwa ya Saṱhane nga dzina ḽavho, hone riṋe ra edzisa u mu dzivhisa vhunga e si muṅwe nga riṋe.”" 
Mark9:39 Yesu a ri, “Ni songo mu dzivhisa; a hu na ane a ri o ita maḓembe nga dzina ḽanga, a mbo ḓi dovha a nnyefula." 
Mark9:40 Ane a si lwe na riṋe u ima na riṋe. 
Mark9:41 Zwino ipfani-ha: Ane a vhuya a ni ṋea maḓi a u nwa nge na vha vha Mesia ha nga kundwi u wana pfufho yawe. 
Mark9:42 “Ane a khakhisa muṅwe wa havha vhaṱoma vha mpfulufhelaho, ṱhamu yawe i ḓo fhira zwa musi o tou vhofhelelwa zwawe guyo mukuloni a poswa lwanzheni." 
Mark9:43 Ndi zwine nda ri, arali tshanḓa tshau tshi tshi ita uri u shandukele Mudzimu, tshi tumule. Ndi khwiṋe u wana vhutshilo vhu sa gumi u na tshanḓa tshithihi, u fhira u ya heleni muliloni u sa dzimi u na zwanḓa zwivhili. [" 
Mark9:44 Henengei mbungu dzi vha ḽaho a dzi fi, na mulilo wa hone a u dzimi.]" 
Mark9:45 Arali mulenzhe wau u tshi ita uri u shandukele Mudzimu, u tumule! Ndi khwiṋe u wana vhutshilo vhu sa gumi u na mulenzhe muthihi, u fhira u poswa heleni u na milenzhe mivhili. [" 
Mark9:46 Henengei mbungu dzi vha ḽaho a dzi fi, na mulilo wa hone a u dzimi.]" 
Mark9:47 Arali iṱo ḽau ḽi tshi ita uri u shandukele Mudzimu, ḽi nongole! Ndi khwiṋe u dzhena muvhusoni wa Mudzimu u na iṱo ḽithihi, u fhira u poswa heleni u na maṱo mavhili." 
Mark9:48 Henengei mbungu dzi vha ḽaho a dzi fi, na mulilo wa hone a u dzimi." 
Mark9:49 “Unga nduvho thembeleni i tshi kumululwa nga muṋo, nga u ralo u tambula haṋu ndi mulilo une wa ni kumulula ni konou vhulungea." 
Mark9:50 Muṋo ndi tshithu tshavhuḓi, hone wa vhuya wa fhela vhuhali hawo u sa tsha dunga, u nga dovha wa dungiswa ngani? Ivhani vho lungwaho nga inwi vhaṋe, ni pfane nga tshaṋu.”" 
Mark10:1 Ndi hone Yesu a tshi ṱuwa afho fhethu a ya shangoni ḽa Judia, a wela mulambo wa Jorodani; ha dovha ha ḓa magogo khae, Ene a ḓi vha funza sa misi." 
Mark10:2 Vhaṅwe Vhafarisei vha mu ḓela vha tshi ri vha a mu fasha vha ri, “Kha vha dzou ri vhudza: Mulayo wa hashu u a tenda munna a tshi ṱala musadzi wawe naa?”" 
Mark10:3 Yesu a vha fhindula a ri, “Mulayo wa Mushe u ri mini?”" 
Mark10:4 Vhone vha fhindula vha ri, “Mushe o ri tendela uri munna a nga ṅwala luṅwalo lwa u ṱala musadzi wawe a konou litshana nae a ṱuwa.”" 
Mark10:5 Yesu a amba navho a ri, “Mushe a tshi vhuya a ni vhetshela hoyu mulayo, ndi nge a vhona no oma ṱhoho," 
Mark10:6 hone u rangani ha zwithu, misi iḽa Mudzimu a tshi sika zwoṱhe, ho pfi, ‘Mudzimu o vha ita vhe munna na musadzi.’" 
Mark10:7 Ndi zwine munna a ḓo ṱutshela khotsi na mme a vhofhekana na musadzi wawe," 
Mark10:8 vhuvhili havho vha vha ṋama nthihi. Ngauralo a vha tshee vhavhili, vho no vha ṋama nthihi." 
Mark10:9 Zwino zwo vhofhekanywaho nga Mudzimu, muthu a songo zwi fhandekanya.”" 
Mark10:10 Musi vha tshi humela nḓuni vhafunziwa vha vhudzisa Yesu nga ayo mafhungo a u ṱalana. 
Mark10:11 A vha fhindula a ri, “Munna ane a ṱala musadzi a dzea muṅwe, u khakhela musadzi wawe nga vhupombwe;" 
Mark10:12 na kha musadzi zwo ralo; arali a ṱala munna wawe a dzewa nga muṅwe o ita vhupombwe.” 
Mark10:13 Vhaṅwe vhathu vha ḓisa vhana ha Yesu uri a vha vhee zwanḓa, hone vhafunziwa vha vha kaidza." 
Mark10:14 Yesu a tshi zwi vhona a dinalea, a vhudza vhafunziwa vhawe a ri, “Litshani vhana vha ḓe kha Nṋe. Ni songo vha dzivhisa, ngauri vhane vha ḓo dzhena muvhusoni wa Mudzimu ndi vha no nga vhenevha." 
Mark10:15 Zwino ipfani-ha: Ane a si tende u vhusiwa nga Mudzimu sa ṅwana, ha nga dzheni muvhusoni wawe na kathihi.”" 
Mark10:16 A mbo ḓi kuvhatedza avho vhana, a vha vhea zwanḓa a vha shudufhadza." 
Mark10:17 Yesu a kha ḓi ri u a dovha u dzhena nḓilani ha mbo bvelela muṅwe munna a tshi khou gidima, a ḓa a wa nga magona phanḓa hawe a humbela a ri, “Nandi mufunzi muvhuya, uri ndi wane vhutshilo vhu sa gumi ndi fanela u ita mini?”" 
Mark10:18 Yesu a mu fhindula a ri, “Khezwi ni tshi nnyita muvhuya? A hu na muthu a re muvhuya; muvhuya ndi Mudzimu e eṱhe.”" 
Mark10:19 A konou ri, “Zwino milayo ya u ri, ‘U songo vhulaha muthu; u songo ita vhupombwe; u songo tswa; u songo zwifhelela muṅwe; u songo fhura; u fanela u hulisa khotsi au na mme au’ hufha ni tshi i ḓivha!”" 
Mark10:20 Uyo munna a ri, “Vhafunzi, milayo iyo yoṱhe ndo i tevhedza, u bva hanani hanga.”" 
Mark10:21 Yesu a mu takalela, a mu lavhelesa a ri, “Ho tou sala tshithu tshithihi fhedzi tshine na fanela u tshi ita: tshimbilani ni yo rengisa zwoṱhe zwine na vha nazwo, tshelede ni kovhele vhashai; lwaṋu lupfumo ni ḓo lu wana ṱaḓulu. Nó no ita zwenezwo ni ḓe ni vhe mufunziwa wanga.”" 
Mark10:22 Uyo munna a tshi pfa izwo a kunamisa tshifhaṱuwo a ṱuwa o ṱungufhala, ngauri o vha o pfuma nga maanḓa." 
Mark10:23 Yesu a lavhelesa vhafunziwa vhawe, a konou amba navho a ri, “Zwi konḓa hani uri mupfumi a dzhene muvhusoni wa Mudzimu!”" 
Mark10:24 Vhafunziwa haya maipfi a vha kanukisa, hone Yesu a dovha a ri, “Vhananga, zwi konḓa hani u dzhena muvhusoni wa Mudzimu!" 
Mark10:25 Muthu o pfumaho, u dzhena muvhusoni wa Mudzimu zwi mu konḓela u fhira musi gamela i tshi edzisa u fhira nga buli ḽa ṋeleṱe.”" 
Mark10:26 A tshi ralo vhafunziwa vhawe vha tou ṋaṋa u akhamala, vha vho vhudzisana nga tshavho vha ri, “Zwino hu nga kha ḓi tshidzwa nnyi?”" 
Mark10:27 Yesu a vha lavhelesa a vha fhindula a ri, “Hezwi vhathu zwi a vha kunda, fhedzi kha Mudzimu ndi zwiṱuku, Ene u kona zwoṱhe.”" 
Mark10:28 Ndi hone Pitrosi a tshi amba a ri, “Kha vha dzou vhona riṋe: ro ṱutshela zwoṱhe ra vha vhafunziwa vhavho.”" 
Mark10:29 Yesu a ri, “Izwo ndi zwone, zwino ipfani-ha: Ane a ṱutshela nnḓu yawe kana vhakomana vhawe kana khaladzi dzawe kana mme awe kana khotsi awe kana vhana vhawe kana masimu awe a tshi itela Nṋe na mafhungo maḓifha," 
Mark10:30 u ḓo wana zwinzhi tshifhinga tshi tshee tshenetshi: u ḓo fhiwa nnḓu na vhakomana na khaladzi na vhomme na vhana na masimu kaḓana, naho a tshi ḓo vha a tshi khou tovholwa, huno nga tshifhinga tshi ḓaho u ḓo wana vhutshilo vhu sa gumi." 
Mark10:31 Hone vhanzhi vhane ṋamusi vha vha vhahulwane vha vho ḓo vha vhone vhaṱuku; vhane vha vha vhaṱuku vha ḓo vha vhone vhahulwane.” 
Mark10:32 Vho vha vhe nḓilani vho livha Jerusalema, Yesu e phanḓa, vhafunziwa vhó tshenuwa, na vho salaho murahu vhó farwa nga nyofho. Ndi hone Yesu a tshi dovha a vhidzela vha 12 thungo, a vha vhudza zwine zwa ḓo mu wela." 
Mark10:33 A ri, “Vhonani, ri khou gonya Jerusalema. Henengei Mubebwa-nga-muthu u ḓo kumedzwa vhotshifhe vhahulwane na vhaḓivhi vha Mulayo. Vha ḓo mu haṱulela lufu vha konou mu kumedza vhatsinda." 
Mark10:34 Vhenevho vha ḓo tamba ngae vha mu pfela mare vha mu rwa nga mboma vha fhedza nga u mu vhulaha. Hone nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuraru u ḓo vuwa vhafuni.” 
Mark10:35 Ndi hone Jakopo na Johanisi vhana vha Zebedia vha tshi ḓa ha Yesu vha ri, “Vhafunzi, ri khou humbela.”" 
Mark10:36 Yesu a vha vhudzisa a ri, “Ni ṱoḓa mini?”" 
Mark10:37 Vhone vha tshi fhindula vha ri, “Musi vha tshi ḓo dzula kha khuluṋoni yavho ya vhugala, ri tama uri vha ri tendele u dzula navho, muṅwe a dzule thungo ya tshauḽa muṅwe thungo ya tshamonde.”" 
Mark10:38 Yesu a ri, “A ni tsha ḓivha na tshine na humbela. Tshinwelo tsha maṱhupho tshine Nṋe nda ḓo nwa inwi ni nga kona u tshi nwa naa? Ndovhedzo ya dambudzo ine nda ḓo lovhedzwa ngayo inwi ni nga kona u lovhedzwa-vho ngayo naa?”" 
Mark10:39 Vhone vha fhindula vha ri, “Hezwo ri nga kona u zwi ita.” Yesu a konou ri, “Nangoho tshinwelo tshine Nṋe nda ḓo nwa na inwi ni ḓo tshi nwa-vho, nahone ni ḓo lovhedzwa-vho nga ndovhedzo ine Nṋe nda ḓo lovhedzwa ngayo." 
Mark10:40 Hone uri hu ḓo dzula nnyi thungo ya tshauḽa kana tshamonde tshanga, a zwi langiwi nga Nṋe, hu ḓo dzula avho vhe Mudzimu a vha lugisela.”" 
Mark10:41 Vhaḽa vhaṅwe vhafunziwa vha fumi vha tshi zwi pfa vha sinyutshela Jakopo na Johanisi. 
Mark10:42 Ndi hone Yesu a tshi vha kuvhanganya a ri, “Ni zwi ḓivha zwavhuḓi uri kha dzitshakha vhane vha pfi vhavhusi vha dzi langa nga tshiṱuhu, vhahulwane vhadzo vha ṱongisa maanḓa avho." 
Mark10:43 Hone kha inwi a zwo ngo ralo. Ane a funa vhuhulwane, nga a vhe ene a shumelaho vhaṅwe;" 
Mark10:44 ane a funa u vha wa phanḓa, nga a ḓiite phuli yaṋu noṱhe." 
Mark10:45 Na Mubebwa-nga-muthu ho ngo ḓa u shumelwa; o ḓa u shumela vhaṅwe na u fa uri a vhe tshipfumelo tsha u vhofholola vhanzhi.” 
Mark10:46 Yesu a swika Jerikho na vhafunziwa vhawe. Musi vha tshi vho ṱuwa vhe na gogo ḽihulu, vha wana bofu ḽi no pfi Bartimiosi ṅwana wa Timiosi, o dzula tsini ha nḓila a tshi khou humbela zwifhiwa." 
Mark10:47 A tshi tou pfa uri a no khou fhira ndi Yesu wa Nazaretha, a thoma u ṱavha mukosi a ri, “Yesu Murwa wa Dafita, a thi khathutshelwi-vho naa?”" 
Mark10:48 Vhanzhi vha mu kaidza vha ri a fhumule, ha tou vha uri a ṋaṋe u ṱavha mukosi a ri, “Murwa wa Dafita, a thi khathutshelwi-vho naa?”" 
Mark10:49 Yesu a ima a ri, “Mu vhidzeni.” Ndi hone vha tshi vho vhidza uyo munna wa bofu vha ri, “Kha vha rudze mbilu vha takuwe, vha khou vha vhidza.”" 
Mark10:50 Uyo munna a posa dzhasi ḽawe kule, a thamuwa a ya ha Yesu." 
Mark10:51 Yesu a mu vhudzisa a ri, “Ni lila ngani?” Uyo munna wa bofu a fhindula a ri, “Vhafunzi, ndi lila uri ndi vhone.”" 
Mark10:52 Yesu a mu vhudza a ri, “Tshimbilani zwaṋu, fulufhelo ḽaṋu ḽo ni fhodza.” A mbo ḓi vhona na zwenezwo; a ṱuwa na Yesu." 
Mark11:1 Musi vha tshi vho sendela Jerusalema, vhó no swika Bethefage na Bethania, Thavhani ya Miolivi, Yesu a mbo ḓi ruma vhafunziwa vhavhili" 
Mark11:2 a vha laya a ri, “Iyani muḓini u re hafho phanḓa. Hu ḓo ri ni tshi kha ḓi tou dzhena khawo, na wana donngana yo hungwaho i sa athu vhuya ya namelwa. Ni i hungulule ni i ḓise fhano." 
Mark11:3 Arali na vhudziswa uri ni khou zwi itelani, ni ri, ‘I khou ṱoḓwa nga muṋe wayo; u ḓo i vhuisa hu si kale.’ ”" 
Mark11:4 Nangoho vha ya vha wana donngana i mukotoni, yo hungwa tsini ha vothi ḽa nnḓu, vha i hungulula." 
Mark11:5 Vhaṅwe vho imaho henefho vha vha vhudzisa vha ri, “Ni khou ita zwithu-ḓe ni tshi hungulula iyo donngana?”" 
Mark11:6 Vhone vha fhindula nga he Yesu a vha vhudza ngaho, avho vhanna vha vha litsha vha ṱuwa nayo." 
Mark11:7 Vha tshi swikisa iyo donngana ha Yesu vha kapea zwiambaro khayo, Ene a namela." 
Mark11:8 Mavhuthu a ala zwiambaro zwao gondoni, vhaṅwe vha tshi khou rema matavhi a miri masimuni, vha tshi a adza-vho gondoni." 
Mark11:9 Vhathu vhe vha vha vhe phanḓa hawe na vhe vha vha vhe murahu vha thoma u huvha mihuvho vha ri, “Hosiana! Nga hu rendwe a ḓaho nga dzina ḽa Muṋe washu!" 
Mark11:10 Mashudu muvhuso u ḓaho wa khotsi ashu Dafita! Nga hu rendwe Waṱaḓuluṱaḓulu!” 
Mark11:11 Yesu a tshi dzhena Jerusalema a fhirela thembeleni, a sedza zwoṱhe; hone vhunga ḓuvha ḽo vha ḽo no ḓi ṱuwesa, a bva a ya Bethania na vha 12." 
Mark11:12 Nga matshelo musi vha tshi khou vhuya Bethania, Yesu a farwa nga nḓala." 
Mark11:13 A vhona fhaḽa kulenyana hu na muhuyu, wo tou swifhala. A mbo ḓi ya khawo a tshi khou ṱoḓa mahuyu, hone a tshi swika a vhona e maṱari fhedzi, vhunga iṱali tsho vha tshi si tshifhinga tsha mahuyu." 
Mark11:14 Yesu a teketela uyo muhuyu a ri, “A hu tsha ḓo dovha ha ḽiwa fuyu ḽau lini na lini!” A tshi ralo vhafunziwa vhawe vho vha vho ḓi thetshelesa." 
Mark11:15 Musi vha tshi swika Jerusalema, Yesu a ya thembeleni, a thoma u pandela vhoṱhe vhe vha vha vha tshi khou renga na vhe vha vha vha tshi khou rengisa zwithu zwavho henefho, a mbo thenukanya ṱafula dza vhatshintshi vha tshelede na zwidulo zwa vharengisi vha maivha," 
Mark11:16 a sa tendele na muthu na muthihi a tshi hwala tshithu a fhira nga muṱani wa thembele. 
Mark11:17 O no ralo a konou funza vhathu a ri, “Nṋa a ho ngo ṅwalwa Maṅwaloni ha pfi, ‘Nnḓu yanga i ḓo pfi nnḓu ya thabelo ya tshakha dzoṱhe’ naa? Zwino inwi no no i shandula ‘bako ḽa mavemu.’ ”" 
Mark11:18 Ayo mafhungo a swika nḓevheni dza vhotshifhe vhahulwane na vhaḓivhi vha Mulayo, vha thoma u ṱoḓa nḓila ya u vhulaha Yesu; ngauri vho vha vha tshi mu ofha nge vha vhona vhathu vhanzhi vha tshi kanuka pfunzo yawe." 
Mark11:19 Nga madekwana Yesu na vhafunziwa vhawe vha ṱuwa afho muḓini. 
Mark11:20 Nga matshelo hu tshee nga matshelonitsheloni, vha tshi khou fhira nga yeneyo nḓila vha vhona uḽa muhuyu wo no fa woṱhe u bva midzini." 
Mark11:21 Pitrosi a tshi elelwa zwiḽa zwa mulovha a amba na Yesu a ri, “Kha vha vhone Vhafunzi, uḽa muri we vha u teketela wo puta.”" 
Mark11:22 Yesu a amba navho a ri, “Ni a vhona, arali ni tshi fulufhela Mudzimu" 
Mark11:23 ni sa timatimi mbiluni dzaṋu, ni tshi tou fulufhela uri zwine na amba zwi ḓo itea, ni nga amba na hetshi tshikwara, na ri, ‘Takuwa u ḓipose lwanzheni!’ zwa itea." 
Mark11:24 Ndi zwone zwine nda ni vhudza uri musi ni tshi humbela tshithu nga thabelo, fulufhelani uri no no ḓi tshi wana. Ni ḓo vhona ni tshi ṋewa tshiṅwe na tshiṅwe." 
Mark11:25 Musi no ima ni tshi khou rabela, vhathu vhoṱhe vhe na vha no vha fara nga mbilu ni vha hangwele zwoṱhe zwe vha ni tshinya; ndi hone na Khotsi aṋu wa ngei ṱaḓulu a tshi ḓo ni hangwela vhutshinyi haṋu.” [" 
Mark11:26 Hone arali inwi ni sa vha hangweli, Khotsi aṋu wa ngei ṱaḓulu na Ene ha nga ni hangweli vhutshinyi haṋu.]" 
Mark11:27 Vha dovha vha dzhena Jerusalema. Huno Yesu a tshi khou ḓitshimbilela thembeleni, vhotshifhe vhahulwane na vhaḓivhi vha Mulayo na vhahulwane vha lushaka vha ḓa khae" 
Mark11:28 vha mu vhudzisa vha ri, “Nṋa ni tshi ita nga u ralo zwi bva kha nnyi? Ndi nnyi o ni fhaho maanḓa a u zwi ita?”" 
Mark11:29 Yesu a vha fhindula a ri, “Litshani ndi thome u ni vhudzisa mbudziso nthihi fhedzi. Arali na fhindula ndi hone ndi tshi ḓo ni vhudza uri zwi bva kha nnyi ndi tshi ita nga u ralo." 
Mark11:30 Edzonu mmbudza: Zwiḽa Johanisi a tshi lovhedza zwo vha zwi tshi bva kha nnyi? Kha vhathu kana kha Mudzimu? Mphinduleni.” 
Mark11:31 Vhone vha thoma u a suka nga tshavho vha ri, “Nṋa ri nga tou ri mini? Arali ra fhindula ra ri, ‘Kha Mudzimu,’ u ḓo ri, ‘Zwino-ha na kundwa ngani u tenda zwe a amba?’" 
Mark11:32 Hu ḓi nga arali ra ri, ‘Kha vhathu...’ ” – vha dovha vha ofha u ralo nga u ofha vhathu, ngauri muṅwe na muṅwe o vha a tshi ḓivha Johanisi e muporofita." 
Mark11:33 Ndi zwe vha tshi fhindula Yesu vha sokou ri, “A ri ḓivhi.” A konou ri, “Izwo-ha na Nṋe a thi nga ambi uri ndi tshi ita hezwi zwithu zwi bva kha nnyi!”" 
Mark12:1 Ndi hone Yesu a tshi thoma u amba navho nga zwifanyiso a ri, “Ho vhuya ha vha na muṅwe munna we a lima minḓirivhe, a fhaṱa luhura lwa mutsheṱo, a bwa na dindi ḽa bonḓelo, a fhaṱa na ḓingo ḽilapfu ḽa u linda tsimu. O no ralo a hirisa iyo tsimu, ene a pfulutshela kha ḽiṅwe shango." 
Mark12:2 Musi tshifhinga tsha u fula nḓirivhe tshi tshi swika, muṋe wa tsimu a ruma mushumi kha vhalimi uri a yo mu dzhiela mukovhe wawe." 
Mark12:3 Vhahiri vhone vha fara uyo muḓinḓa, vha mu likita, vha fhedza nga u mu pandela a huma fhedzi." 
Mark12:4 Muṋe wa tsimu a ruma muḓinḓa wa vhuvhili. Na ene vhalimi vha mu kovhola, vha ita na u tamba ngae." 
Mark12:5 A tshi ruma wa vhuraru vha mu vhulaha. Na vhanzhi vhe vha tevhela vha ḓi vha ita zwenezwo, vhaṅwe vha tshi vha rwa, vhaṅwe vha tshi tou vha vhulaha," 
Mark12:6 ha vhuya ha sala ṅwana wawe muthihi fhedzi wa mutuka, ene mufunwa. A fhedza nga u ruma onoyo ṅwana ha vhalimi, nge a ri, ‘Ndi vhona uri ṅwananga vha ḓo mu teledza.’" 
Mark12:7 Hone avho vhalimi vha amba nga tshavho vha ri, ‘Hoyu ndi ene muḽaifa. Iḓani ri mu vhulahe; ndi hone tsimu iyi i tshi ḓo vha ifa ḽashu!’" 
Mark12:8 Vha mu fara vha mu vhulaha, tshitumbu tshawe vha tshi kudza nnḓa ha tsimu ya minḓirivhe.”" 
Mark12:9 Yesu a vha vhudzisa a ri, “Zwino muṋe wa tsimu u ḓo itani? Ha nga ḓo ḓa a vha vhulaha, iyo tsimu a i ṋea vhaṅwe vhalimi naa?" 
Mark12:10 Kani a ni athu vhala fhaḽa hune ha pfi, “ ‘Tombo ḽe ḽa laṱwa nga vhafhaṱi ḽa pfi a ḽi na mushumo, ḽo vha ḽone thikho ya tshifhaṱo." 
Mark12:11 Hezwo zwo itwa nga Muṋe washu; vhonani uri zwi kanukisa hani!’ ” 
Mark12:12 Vharangaphanḓa vha Majuda nga u ḓivha uri itshi tshifanyiso tshi amba vhone vha vho ṱoḓa nḓila ya u fara Yesu, hone nge vha ofha gogo ḽa vhathu vha mu litsha o ralo vha ṱuwa." 
Mark12:13 Ha mbo ruṅwa vhaṅwe Vhafarisei na vhaṅwe vha ḽihoro ḽa Herude uri vha ye ha Yesu vha mu fashe nga zwine a amba. 
Mark12:14 Vha swika khae vha ri, “Vhafunzi, ri a zwi ḓivha uri vhone vha munna a fulufhedzeaho; vha tshi amba a vha thomi u sedza uri hu na nnyi; a vha ṱaluli muthu; tshavho ndi u funza nḓila yone-yone ine Mudzimu a funa vhathu vha tshi tshila ngayo. Kha vha ri vhudze-vho: Nṋa zwo tendelwa u thela muthelo wa Khisara naa? Ro fanela u thela kana a ro ngo fanela naa?”" 
Mark12:15 Yesu a tshi zwi vhona uri hu khou itwa vhukwila a fhindula a ri, “Ni nndingelani? Edzonu ḓisa sheleni ndi i vhone.”" 
Mark12:16 Vho no i ḓisa a vhudzisa a ri, “Nṋa iyi ṱhoho na dzina iḽi ndi zwa nnyi?” Vhone vha tshi fhindula vha ri, “Ndi zwa Khisara.”" 
Mark12:17 Ndi hone Yesu a tshi ri, “Ahaa, Khisara mu ṋeeni zwi re zwawe, na Mudzimu ni mu ṋee zwi re zwawe.” A tshi ralo vha kanuka." 
Mark12:18 Ha dovha ha ḓa Vhasadukei ha Yesu – ndi vhaḽa vha no ri u vuwa ha vhafu a huho – vha ri," 
Mark12:19 “Vhafunzi, Mushe o ri siela mulayo une wa ri, ‘Arali munna a tshi fa a sia musadzi wawe a sa athu vha na ṅwana, murathu wawe u fanela u mu dzhia uri a bebele mukomana.’" 
Mark12:20 Zwino ho vhuya ha vha na vhaṅwe vhaṱhannga vhaṱanu na vhavhili, vhana vha munna. Wa tanzhe a dzea hone a fa a sa athu vha na ṅwana;" 
Mark12:21 iyo tshilikadzi a dzhiwa nga a mu tevhelaho, na ene a ḓi fa a si na ṅwana. Na kha wa vhuraru zwa ḓi ralo," 
Mark12:22 zwa ḓi vha wela-vho; vhoṱhe vhuṱanu na vhuvhili havho vha dzhia onoyo musadzi, vha fhedza nga u fa vha si na vhana. Tshilikadzi iyo na yone ya fhedza nga u fa." 
Mark12:23 Zwino-ha musi vhafu vhoṱhe vha tshi vuwa nga ḓuvha ḽa u vuwa ha vhafu, u ḓo vha musadzi wa nnyi? Hufha vhoṱhe vhuṱanu na vhuvhili havho o vha musadzi wavho!”" 
Mark12:24 Yesu a vha fhindula a ri, “Nṋa no tou xela tshingafhani! Hone na tsho ni xedzaho ni a tshi ḓivha naa? Ndi uri hu Maṅwalo a ni a ḓivhi, hu maanḓa a Mudzimu a ni a ḓivhi," 
Mark12:25 ngauri musi vhafu vha tshi vuwa vha ḓo nga vharuṅwa vha ngei ṱaḓulu; zwa u dzea na u dzewa a zwi nga vhi hone. 
Mark12:26 Kha zwa u vuwa ha vhafu ndi ri: A ni athu vhuya na vhala fhaḽa Buguni ya Mushe hune ha amba nga tshiṱaka tshi tshi duga? Ndi ralo nge henefho ha vha hone he ha ṅwalwa upfi, ‘Mudzimu o vhudza Mushe a ri: Ndi Nṋe Mudzimu wa Abrahamu, Mudzimu wa Isaka, Mudzimu wa Jakopo.’" 
Mark12:27 Zwino hufha Mudzimu e si Mudzimu wa vho faho, e wa vha tshilaho. Ni a zwi vhona-ha uri no tou xela tshoṱhe!”" 
Mark12:28 Henefho ho vha hu na muḓivhi wa Mulayo we a vha o ḓi thetshelesa zwiḽa Yesu a tshi khou amba na Vhasadukei. A tshi vhona uri Yesu o fhindula Vhasadukei zwavhuḓi, ene a ḓa-vho na yawe mbudziso a ri, “Nṋa mulayo u fhiraho yoṱhe ndi ufhio?”" 
Mark12:29 Yesu a fhindula a ri, “Une wa fhira yoṱhe khoyu: ‘Thetshelesa Israele: Muṋe washu Mudzimu ndi Muṋe washu e eṱhe." 
Mark12:30 Funa Mudzimu Muṋe wau nga mbilu yau yoṱhe, nga zwoṱhe zwine wa vha zwone, nga ṱhalukanyo yau yoṱhe, nga maanḓa au oṱhe!’" 
Mark12:31 Une wa tevhela asuyu: ‘Funa muṅwe unga iwe muṋe.’ A hu tshee na muṅwe mulayo une wa fhira yenei mivhili.” 
Mark12:32 Muḓivhi wa Mulayo a ri, “Izwo zwi a pfala Vhafunzi! Vho amba zwone vha tshi ri, ‘Mudzimu ndi muthihi, a hu na muṅwe.’" 
Mark12:33 Zwenezwo-ha muthu u fanela u funa Mudzimu nga mbilu yawe yoṱhe, na nga ṱhalukanyo yawe yoṱhe, na nga maanḓa awe oṱhe, nahone u fanela u funa vhaṅwe unga ene muṋe. U tevhedza heyo milayo mivhili zwi fhira u ḓisa zwiṱhavhelo zwa u fhiswa na u ṋekedza Mudzimu nduvho.”" 
Mark12:34 Yesu a tshi vhona uri o fhindula tshihulwane a mu vhudza a ri, “Hu tshee ho tou salanyana uri ni dzhene muvhusoni wa Mudzimu.” Ho ri u itea zwenezwo ha sa tsha dovha ha vha na we a vhuya a linga u vhudzisa Yesu mbudziso." 
Mark12:35 Musi Yesu a tshi khou funza thembeleni a vhudzisa a ri, “Nṋa vhaḓivhi vha Mulayo vha amba mini vha tshi ri Mesia u ḓo vha muḓuhulu wa Dafita?" 
Mark12:36 Hufha Dafita o amba o ḓala Muya Mukhethwa a ri, “ ‘Muṋe wa vhoṱhe o amba na Muṋe wanga a ri: Dzula hafha thungo ya tshauḽa tshanga ri vhuse roṱhe, ndi vhuye ndi ite maswina au vhukando ha milenzhe yau.’" 
Mark12:37 “Asizwo-ha, zwi nga ḓa hani uri Mesia a vhe muḓuhulu wa Dafita? Hufha Dafita ene muṋe a tshi mu amba a tshi tou ri ‘Muṋe wanga.’ ” Vhathu vhanzhi-vhanzhi vho vha vha tshi khou ḓiphiṋa nga u thetshelesa Yesu." 
Mark12:38 A tshi khou vha funza a ri, “Ni thanyele vhaḓivhi vha Mulayo, vhane vha funesa u tshimbila vho ambara phuraphura, na u loshiwa vanḓani," 
Mark12:39 vhadzia-u-nanga zwidzulo zwa phanḓa sinagogoni na vhuṱamboni. 
Mark12:40 Vha lapfisa thabelo dzavho vha tshi itela u vhonwa nga vhathu, ngeno vha tshi ḽa thundu dza dzitshilikadzi vha fhedza. Ṱhamu ine vha ḓo i wana a i nga vhavhi zwone!”" 
Mark12:41 Yesu a dzula thembeleni, tsini ha bogisi ḽa zwifhiwa, a tshi khou lavhelesa vhathu vha tshi khou longa tshelede dzavho. Ha ḓa vhanzhi vho pfumaho vha longa tshelede nnzhi." 
Mark12:42 Ha swika na muthu wa tshilikadzi we a vha e mushai vhukuma; onoyo a longa-vho masente mavhili. 
Mark12:43 Ndi hone Yesu a tshi vhidza vhafunziwa vhawe a vha vhudza a ri, “Thetshelesani ndi ni vhudze: Tshilikadzi iyi yo bvisa u fhira vhoṱhe." 
Mark12:44 Ndi uri vhaḽa vho ṱusa kha lupfumo lwavho, hu uri ene o bvisa zwoṱhe zwe a vha e nazwo – zwenezwo zwiṱukuṱuku zwe a vha a tshi ḓo ḽa.”" 
Mark13:1 Yesu a tshi tou bva thembeleni muṅwe wa vhafunziwa a amba nae a ri, “Vhafunzi, kha vha dzou vhona uri matombo aya ndi mangafhani na uri zwifhaṱo izwi zwo naka hani!”" 
Mark13:2 Yesu a tshi mu fhindula a ri, “A thi ri izwi zwifhaṱo zwihuluhulu ni khou zwi vhona? A hu na tombo na ḽithihi ḽine ḽa ḓo sala ḽo dzula nṱha ha ḽiṅwe, oṱhe a ḓo piḓimulwa.”" 
Mark13:3 Yesu o vha o dzula Thavhani ya Miolivi o livhana na thembele, ha ḓa Pitrosi na Jakopo na Johanisi na Andrisi vha tshi ṱoḓa u amba nae vhe vhoṱhe." 
Mark13:4 Vha mu vhudzisa vha ri, “Kha vha ri vhudze uri zwine vha amba zwi ḓo itea lini; vha ri vhudze na tshiga tshine ra ḓo vhona ngatsho uri zwo sendela.”" 
Mark13:5 Yesu a thoma u vha funza a ri, “Ni vhone uri ni si fhurwe nga vhathu." 
Mark13:6 Hu ḓo ḓa vhathu vhanzhi vha tshi ri ndi vhone Nṋe, muṅwe na muṅwe wavho a tshi ri, ‘Ndi nṋe Mesia!’ Vha tshi ralo vha ḓo xedza vhathu vhanzhi." 
Mark13:7 Arali ni tshi pfa mikosi ya nndwa yo ṱangana kana ni tshi pfa mafhungo a nndwa dzi no khou ḓa, ni songo tshenuwa. Hezwo zwone zwi fanela u thoma u ḓa, hone zwi sa ambi uri vhufhelo ho no mbo ḓi swika." 
Mark13:8 Tshakha dzi ḓo bva pfumo dza lwa; mivhuso i ḓo vutshelana. Hu ḓo vha na midzinginyo minzhi shangoni, ha wa na nḓala. Vhuṱungu hovhu ndi tshiga tsha uri Mesia u nḓilani, unga u ḓa ha muthu muswa hu tshi rangwa phanḓa nga vhuṱungu ha u beba." 
Mark13:9 “A vha inwi dzulani no fhaṱuwa, ngauri vha ḓo ni fara vha ni isa khoroni; ni ḓo rwiwa sinagogoni; ni ḓo sengiswa nga magota na mahosi hu u ṱhuphelwa Nṋe, ha ḓo vha hu hone u ni vulela nḓila ya u vha ṱhanzi dzanga khavho;" 
Mark13:10 ngauri zwo fanela uri mafhungo maḓifha a thome u ḓivhadzwa tshakha dzoṱhe. 
Mark13:11 Musi vha tshi ni fara vha ni isa khoroni ni songo ḽa mbilu na ri ri ḓo ri mini; tshifhinga tshazwo tshi tshi swika ni ḓo amba zwine Mudzimu a ni funzedza, vhunga iṱali maipfi ane na ḓo amba a sa nga vhi aṋu, a tshi ḓo tou bva ha Muya Mukhethwa." 
Mark13:12 Muthu u ḓo kumedza ṅwana wa khotsi awe uri a vhulawe, na khotsi a kumedza ṅwana wawe. Vhana vha ḓo shandukela vhabebi vhavho vha vha vhulahisa." 
Mark13:13 Vhathu vhoṱhe vha ḓo ni vhenga nge na vha vhanga. Hone ane a ḓo konḓelela a sa litshi ndi ene ane a ḓo tshidzwa. 
Mark13:14 “Musi ni tshi vhona ‘Vhuṱudzi vhu ḓisaho mutshinyalo’ ho imiswa fhethu hu songo mu fanelaho” (muvhali nga a pfesese), “vha re Judia vha shavhele zwikwarani." 
Mark13:15 Muthu a re kha ṱhanga ya nnḓu yawe a songo tsha fhedza tshifhinga nga u tsa a dzhena nḓuni uri a dzhie thundu dzawe. 
Mark13:16 A re tsimuni a songo tsha humela hayani u yo dzhia nguvho yawe. 
Mark13:17 Musi zwi tshi itea vho vhifhaho muvhilini na vha mamisaho zwi ḓo vha vhifhela. 
Mark13:18 Ni tou rabela uri zwithu izwi zwi si itee vhuriha! 
Mark13:19 U tambula ha misi iyo hu ḓo fhira hoṱhe ho no vhuyaho ha vha hone, tshee Mudzimu a sika shango, na ṋamusi. Nahone zwine zwa nga zwone a zwi nga dovhi zwa vha hone." 
Mark13:20 Hone Mudzimu ayo maḓuvha o a fhungudza. Ngavhe a si tou ralo, ndi musi hu si na ane a ḓo ponyoka a tshila; hone o a fhungudza a tshi itela vhe a vha nanga." 
Mark13:21 “Zwenezwo arali ni tshi pfa muthu a tshi ri, ‘Vhonani Mesia khoyu!’ kana a tshi ri, ‘Vhonani khouḽaa!’ ni songo tenda." 
Mark13:22 Hu ḓo bvelela vhomesia vha khole-khole na vhaporofita vha khole-khole; vha ḓo ita maḓembe na zwimangadzo uri arali zwo vha zwi tshi konadzea vha xedze na vho nangwaho nga Mudzimu. 
Mark13:23 Dzulani no fhaṱuwa! A vha Nṋe tenda ndo dzula ndo ni vhudza zwoṱhe.” 
Mark13:24 “Musi ayo maḓuvha a vhuṱungu o no fhela, ḓuvha ḽi ḓo dzima na ṅwedzi wa swifhala," 
Mark13:25 nga ngeno ṋaledzi dzi tshi khou wa, zwi re lutomboni zwa vilingana." 
Mark13:26 “Zwenezwo vha ḓo vhona Mubebwa-nga-muthu a tshi ḓa e kha gole e na maanḓa mahulu na vhugala. 
Mark13:27 U ḓo ruma vharuṅwa khuḓani nṋa dza shango uri vha kuvhanganye vho nangwaho nga Mudzimu, u bva vhusendekamisi u swika vhusendekamisi." 
Mark13:28 “Ḓifunzeni nga muhuyu; musi ni tshi vhona thavhi dzawo dzi tshi thoma u khuba maḓi dza ṱuma lurere, ni mbo ḓi ḓivha uri tsho limuwa." 
Mark13:29 Zwenezwo na zwone zwi ḓo ḓi tou ralo: zwithu izwi zwi tshi itea ndi hone ni tshi ḓo ḓivha uri tshifhinga tsho swika. 
Mark13:30 Zwino ipfani-ha: zwithu izwi zwoṱhe zwi ḓo itea vhathu vha no khou tshila zwino vha sa athu fhelela vhoṱhe u fa. 
Mark13:31 Ḽiṱaḓulu na ḽifhasi zwi ḓo lovha, maipfi anga one ha nga weli fhasi." 
Mark13:32 “Hone a hu na a ḓivhaho uri iḽo ḓuvha kana tshifhinga tshazwo tshi ḓo swika lini. Hu vharuṅwa ngei ṱaḓulu, he Murwa, a vha zwi ḓivhi, a zwi ḓivhaho ndi Khotsi e eṱhe." 
Mark13:33 Dzulani no fhaṱuwa! A ni ḓivhi uri zwi ḓo vha zwa lini. 
Mark13:34 Zwi ḓo tou nga muthu ane a tshi fara lwendo a sia vhashumi vhawe vho fara mushumo, muṅwe na muṅwe o fara wawe, a vhudza mulindamuṋango uri a dzule o fhaṱuwa." 
Mark13:35 Thanyani-ha ngauri a ni ḓivhi uri Muṋe wa muḓi u ḓo vhuya lini – a nga ḓi vhuya nga madekwana, a nga ḓi vhuya vhukati ha vhusiku, a nga ḓi vhuya nga maremamutsho, a nga ḓi vhuya ḓuvha ḽi tshi bvisa mulomo!" 
Mark13:36 Zwino arali a sokou tshenuwa o vhuya ha nga ḓo wana no eḓela naa? 
Mark13:37 Zwine nda vhudza inwi ndi zwine nda vhudza vhoṱhe, ndi ri: fhaṱuwani!”" 
Mark14:1 Musi ho sala maḓuvha mavhili hu tshi vha na vhuṱambo ha Paseka na ha Vhurotho vhu si na mbilisa, vhotshifhe vhahulwane na vhaḓivhi vha Mulayo vho vha vha tshi khou ṱoḓa nḓila ya u fara Yesu nga vhukwila uri vha mu vhulahe." 
Mark14:2 Vho vha vho ri, “Ri songo mu fara vhuṱamboni; vhathu vha nga ḓo ri vutshela.”" 
Mark14:3 Yesu o vha e Bethania nḓuni ya Simoni uḽa wa u lwala lukanda. Musi a tshi khou ḽa ha ḓa muṅwe musadzi o fara mapfura a u nukhelela nga khambana ya munyaka. Ayo mapfura o vha a tshi bva kha muri une wa pfi munadi, nahone o vha e a mutengo muhulu. A pwasha iyo khambana a shela mapfura kha ṱhoho ya Yesu." 
Mark14:4 Vhaṅwe vhe vha vha vhe henefho vha dinalea vha amba nga tshavho vha ri, “Nṋa u itani a tshi tambisa mapfura nga u rali?" 
Mark14:5 Enea mapfura ane a rengwa nga muholo wa ṅwaha woṱhe! Khezwi a songo rengiswa, tshelede ya ṋewa zwayo vhashai.” Vha ralo vha tshi sasaladza uyo musadzi." 
Mark14:6 Ndi hone Yesu a tshi ri, “Hoyu musadzi mu litsheni, ni songo ṱolou mu dina. Hufha o nnyitela zwivhuya." 
Mark14:7 Vhashai vha ḓo ḓi dzula vhe hone misi yoṱhe. Arali ni tshi funa u vha tonda ni ḓo ḓi vha tonda tshifhinga tshiṅwe na tshiṅwe. Hone Nṋe a ni nga vhi na Nṋe misi yoṱhe. 
Mark14:8 Hoyu musadzi o ita nga hune a kona ngaho uri a dzule o lugisela muvhili wanga ḓuvha ḽa u swiṱwa hanga. 
Mark14:9 Zwino ipfani-ha: Huṅwe na huṅwe hune mafhungo maḓifha a ḓo anḓadzwa shangoni ḽoṱhe, dzina ḽa hoyu musadzi ḽi ḓo pfala-vho hu tshi humbulwa zwe a nnyitela.”" 
Mark14:10 Ndi hone Judasi Iskariote, muṅwe wa vhafunziwa vha 12, a tshi ya ha vhotshifhe vhahulwane uri a fheṱe Yesu." 
Mark14:11 Vha takala zwihulu vha tshi pfa zwine a amba, vha ita na u fulufhedzisa uri vha ḓo mu pfufha. Judasi a mbo thoma u ṱoḓa tshifhinga tsho teaho tsha u vha sumbedza hune Yesu a vha hone." 
Mark14:12 Nga ḓuvha ḽa u thoma ḽa vhuṱambo ha Vhurotho vhu si na mbilisa, ḽine ha ṱhavhiwa ngwana dza Paseka, vhafunziwa vha Yesu vha mu vhudzisa vha ri, “Vhafunzi, vha funa ri tshi yo vha lugisela ngafhi tshilalelo tsha Paseka?”" 
Mark14:13 Ndi hone Yesu a tshi ruma vhavhili vhavho, a vha laya a ri, “Dzhenani hafho Jerusalema; ni ḓo ṱangana na munna o hwala mvuvhelo ya maḓi. Ni mu tevhele" 
Mark14:14 a vhuye a dzhene nḓuni, ni konou amba na muṋe wa muḓi ni ri, ‘Vhafunzi vha khou vhudzisa iḽa kamara ine vha nga ḽela khayo Paseka na vhafunziwa vhavho.’" 
Mark14:15 Uyo u ḓo konou ni sumbedza kamara khulwane ya tshitizi yo swielwaho, ho dzulaho ho vhekanywa zwoṱhe zwine zwa ṱoḓea. Henefho ndi hone hune na ḓo ri lugisela.”" 
Mark14:16 Vhaḽa vhafunziwa vha ṱuwa, vha dzhena muḓini, vha wana zwoṱhe zwe Yesu a amba zwo tou ralo; vha konou lugisa Paseka." 
Mark14:17 Nga madekwana Yesu a ḓa na vha 12. 
Mark14:18 Musi vha tshi khou lalela, Yesu a ri, “Zwino ipfani-ha: muṅwe waṋu ane a khou ḽa na Nṋe henefha u ḓo mpheṱa.”" 
Mark14:19 Vha dinalea, vha thoma u mu vhudzisa nga muthihi nga muthihi vha tshi ri, “Kani Vhafunzi vha khou amba nṋe?”" 
Mark14:20 Yesu a fhindula a ri, “Ndi muṅwe henefha kha inwi vha 12 ane nda khou thotha nae." 
Mark14:21 Mubebwa-nga-muthu u ḓo fa nga he zwa ṅwalwa, hone hoyo ane a ḓo mu fheṱa u ḓo zwi vhona. Onoyo u ḓo vhuya a ri, ‘Ndo bebelwani?’ ”" 
Mark14:22 Musi vha tshi khou ḽa, Yesu a dzhia vhurotho, a renda Mudzimu a konou vhu ṅwatekanya a ṋea vhafunziwa vhawe a tshi ri, “Ṱanganedzani, hoyu ndi muvhili wanga.”" 
Mark14:23 O no ralo a dzhia tshinwelo, a livhuha Mudzimu a vha ṋea, vha nwa ngatsho vhoṱhe," 
Mark14:24 a ri, “Haya ndi malofha anga ane a ḓo shululelwa vhathu vhanzhi, ndi a u khwaṱhisa mulanga wa Mudzimu." 
Mark14:25 Zwino ipfani-ha: A thi tsha ḓo dovha nda nwa waini ndi vhuye ndi i nwe nga huswa nga heḽo ḓuvha muvhusoni wa Mudzimu.” 
Mark14:26 Ndi hone vha tshi imba luimbo, vha konou ya Thavhani ya Miolivi." 
Mark14:27 Yesu a amba na vhafunziwa vhawe a ri, “Noṱhe ni ḓo nndaṱa, nga he ha ṅwalwa hu tshi pfi, “ ‘Ndi ḓo vhulaha mulisa, nngu dza balangana.’" 
Mark14:28 “Hone musi ndo no vuswa vhafuni ndi ḓo ya Galelia, inwi na konou ḓo tevhela.”" 
Mark14:29 Ndi hone Pitrosi a tshi ri, “Naho vhoṱhe vha tshi nga vha laṱa, nṋe ndi nga si vha laṱe.”" 
Mark14:30 Yesu a mu fhindula a ri, “Zwino ipfani-ha: mukukulume u sa athu lila luvhili vhusiku ha ṋamusi, ni ḓo vha no no landula kararu na ri a ni nnḓivhi.”" 
Mark14:31 Pitrosi a fhindula a tou khwaṱhisa tshoṱhe a ri, “Nangwe hu tshi tou pfi ndi fe navho, ndi nga si vhuye nda vha landula!” Na vhaḽa vhaṅwe vhafunziwa vhoṱhe vha ḓi ralo-vho." 
Mark14:32 Musi vha tshi swika fhethu hu no pfi Getsemani, Yesu a vhudza vhafunziwa vhawe a ri, “Salani henefha, ndi kha ḓi ya u rabela.”" 
Mark14:33 A ṱuwa na Pitrosi na Jakopo na Johanisi, a ṱungufhala o tou hanganea," 
Mark14:34 a amba navho a ri, “Mbilu yanga i vhavha lune nda nga ndi sa fa. Dzulani henefha, ni songo eḓela.”" 
Mark14:35 A fhirela phanḓanyana a ḓiposa fhasi, a humbela Mudzimu uri arali zwi tshi konadzea a si welwe nga dambudzo iḽo." 
Mark14:36 A rabela a ri, “Baba Muṋe wanga, Iwe Mukonazwoṱhe, itshi tshinwelo a tshi mpfuki zwanga naa? Hone hu songo itwa zwine Nṋe nda funa, kha hu itwe zwi funwaho nga Iwe.”" 
Mark14:37 A tshi vhuya, a wana vhaḽa vhafunziwa vhararu vho eḓela, a amba na Pitrosi a ri, “Simoni, no eḓela naa? Ni tou kundwa na u pandela khofhe awara nthihi zwayo naa?" 
Mark14:38 Fhaṱuwani ni rabele, uri ni si ungwe. Mbiluni ni a zwi funa, ni ro kundwa nge na vha vhathu vha ṋama.”" 
Mark14:39 A dovha a yo rabela a tshi khou ḓi amba eneaḽa. 
Mark14:40 A tshi vhuya a ḓi wana vho dovha u eḓela, ngauri maṱo avho o vha a tshi khou lemela nga khofhe, vha si tsha ḓivha uri vha nga fhindula vha ri mini." 
Mark14:41 A tshi vhuya khavho lwa vhuraru a ri, “Nṋa ni tshee no eḓela zwaṋu no ḓiawetshela? Zwo itea. Tshikhathi tshazwo tsho swika. Zwino Mubebwa-nga-muthu ndi hone o kumedzwa zwanḓani zwa vhatshinyi." 
Mark14:42 Takuwani ri ṱuwe, uḽa muthu we a mpheṱa o swika.”" 
Mark14:43 Musi Yesu a tshi kha ḓi amba, ha mbo bvelela Judasi, we a vha e muṅwe wa vha 12, e na tshigwada tsho hwalaho mapanga na dzithonga, tsho rumiwaho nga vhotshifhe vhahulwane na vhaḓivhi vha Mulayo na vhahulwane vha lushaka." 
Mark14:44 Tshiḽa tshifheṱi tsho vha tsho dzula tsho vha vhudza tsha ri, “Ane nda ḓo mu resha nga u tou mu kuvhatedza, ndi ene. Ni mu fare ni ṱuwe nae o lindwa.”" 
Mark14:45 Judasi u swika a mbo ḓi ya ha Yesu a ri, “Vhafunzi vhanga!” A tshi ralo a mu kuvhatedza." 
Mark14:46 Vha mbo ḓi fara Yesu. 
Mark14:47 Hone muṅwe wa vhe vha vha vho ima henefho a bvisa banga a tshi ri u rema phuli ya tshifhe muhulu, hone a vho sokou i tumula nḓevhe." 
Mark14:48 Yesu a amba navho a ri, “Ni tou vhuya na bva no hwala mapanga na dzithonga ni tshi ḓa u fara Nṋe nda nga ndi ḽivemu naa?" 
Mark14:49 Hufha ḓuvha ḽiṅwe wa ḽiṅwe ndo vha ndi tshi ḓi funza thembeleni ni hone; no kundwa ngani u mpfara? Hone kha ri litshe hu khunyelele zwe Maṅwalo a amba.” 
Mark14:50 Zwi tshi ralo vhafunziwa vhawe vhoṱhe vha mu ṱutshela vha shavha. 
Mark14:51 Ho vha hu na muṅwe muṱhannga wa muhali a tshi khou tevhela Yesu o tou kanyela luvhemba. Vha tshi mu fara 
Mark14:52 a sutuka a vha sia nalwo a shavha e fhedzi. 
Mark14:53 Vha isa Yesu ha tshifhe muhulu; vhoṱhe vhotshifhe vhahulwane na vhahulwane vha lushaka na vhaḓivhi vha Mulayo vha kuvhangana henefho. 
Mark14:54 Pitrosi a tevhela Yesu nga kule a vhuya a dzhena khoroni ya tshifhe muhulu. A tshi swika henefho a dzula na vhalindi a ḓiorela mulilo. 
Mark14:55 Vhotshifhe vhahulwane na vhanna vha khoro vha linga u wana vhuṱanzi ha u hwesa Yesu mulandu uri a vhulawe, hone ha si wanale," 
Mark14:56 ngauri naho ṱhanzi nnzhi dzo mu pomoka, zwo vhonala uri vhuṱanzi havho a vhu anḓani." 
Mark14:57 Vhaṅwe vha tshi takuwa vha mu pomoka vha ri," 
Mark14:58 “Riṋe ro tou mu pfa a tshi zuwa a tshi ri, ‘Ndi ḓo thutha hei nnḓu ya Mudzimu yo fhaṱwaho nga vhathu nda imisa iṅwe nga maḓuvha mararu, i songo fhaṱwaho nga vhathu!’ ”" 
Mark14:59 Na henefho vhuṱanzi havho vhu si anḓane. 
Mark14:60 Tshifhe muhulu a vhuya a tou ima phanḓa ha khoro a vhudzisa Yesu a ri, “Nṋa a hu na ḽine na ḓifhindulela ngaḽo kha zwine avha vhathu vha ri no zwi ita?”" 
Mark14:61 Yesu a sokou fhumula a si fhindule tshithu. Tshifhe muhulu a dovha a mu vhudzisa a ri, “Ndi inwi Mesia Murwa wa Murendwa naa?”" 
Mark14:62 Yesu a ri, “Ndi Nṋe. Noṱhe ni ḓo vhona ‘Mubebwa-nga-muthu o dzula thungo ya tshauḽa tsha Ramaanḓa vha vhusa vhoṱhe. U ḓo vhuya e kha gole.’ ”" 
Mark14:63 Tshifhe muhulu a kherukanya phuraphura yawe a ri, “Nṋa ri kha ḓi ṱoḓa dziṅwe ṱhanzi dza mini?" 
Mark14:64 Hufha no tou mu pfa nga dzaṋu nḓevhe a tshi tamba nga dzina ḽa Mudzimu. Vha hashu, ni ri mini ngazwo?” Vhoṱhe vha amba vha ri, “U na mulandu, kha a vhulawe!”" 
Mark14:65 Vhaṅwe vha mbo ḓi thoma u mu pfela mare, vha mu khurumedza tshifhaṱuwo, vha mu sinḓa nga mavili vha tshi ri, “Porofita uri wo rwiwa nga nnyi!” Nga ngeno vhalindi vha vha vha a mu ṱanganedza nga mipama." 
Mark14:66 Musi Pitrosi a tshee o dzula ngei fhasi khoroni ha ḓa muṅwe wa vhashumi vha tshifhe muhulu vha vhasidzana. 
Mark14:67 A tshi vhona Pitrosi a tshi khou ora mulilo a tou mu sedzesa a ri, “Na vhone vho vha vhe na Yesu wa Nazaretha.”" 
Mark14:68 Pitrosi a hanedza a ri, “Ayo a thi a ḓivhi; na zwine na khou amba a thi zwi pfi!” A tshi ralo a bva a ya lufherani; [mukukulume wa vha u a lila.]" 
Mark14:69 Uḽa musidzana a dovha a mu vhona henefho, a vhudza vhaṅwe vho imaho henefho a ri, “Hoyu munna ndi muṅwe wavho.”" 
Mark14:70 Pitrosi a dovha a hanedza. Hu sa athu fhela tshifhinga tshingafhani vhaṅwe vha dovha vha amba na Pitrosi vha ri, “Ni songo vhuya na hanedza uri ni muṅwe wavho, hufha na inwi ni Mugalelia.”" 
Mark14:71 Pitrosi a vhuya a tou ana a ri, “Arali ndi tshi khou zwifha Mudzimu kha a nthwe. Hoyu munna ane na khou mu amba ndi ri a thi mu ḓivhi!”" 
Mark14:72 A tshi tou ralo mukukulume wa vha u a lila lwa vhuvhili. Pitrosi a mbo elelwa zwiḽa zwe Yesu a amba a tshi ri, “Hu ḓo ri mukukulume u sa athu lila luvhili na vha no no hanedza kararu na ri a ni nnḓivhi.” Pitrosi a pfa o tou fhelelwa, a thoma u lila." 
Mark15:1 Nga matshelonitsheloni vhotshifhe vhahulwane na vhahulwane vha lushaka na vhaḓivhi vha Mulayo na khoro yoṱhe vha mbo ḓi kuvhangana vha langana, vha vhofha Yesu nga dzigeḓane vha mu isa ha Pilato." 
Mark15:2 Pilato a mu vhudzisa a ri, “Nṋa inwi ni khosi ya Majuda?” Yesu a mu fhindula a ri, “Vha amba zwone.”" 
Mark15:3 Vhotshifhe vhahulwane vha pomoka Yesu zwithu zwinzhi," 
Mark15:4 lwe Pilato a vhuya a tou dovha a mu vhudzisa a ri, “Nṋa a ni fhinduli ni tshi khou pfa vha tshi khou ni hwelela nga mafhungo mangafhangafha?”" 
Mark15:5 Yesu a si tsha fhindula na ipfi na ḽithihi; Pilato a wana zwi tshi mu kanukisa. 
Mark15:6 Nga vhuṱambo vhuṅwe na vhuṅwe ha Paseka, Pilato o vha a tshi ḓi vhofholola muṅwe wa zwivhotshwa we a humbelwa nga vhathu." 
Mark15:7 Zwino ho vha hu na vhaṅwe vhanna vhe vha vha vho fariwa nge vha vutshela muvhuso vha ita na u vhulaha vhathu. Kha vhenevho ho vha hu na muṅwe we a vha a tshi pfi Barabasi. 
Mark15:8 Musi vhathu vho sendela uri Pilato a vha itele zwine a ḓi vha itela," 
Mark15:9 ene a vha vhudzisa a ri, “Nṋa ni funa ndi tshi ni vhofhololela khosi ya Majuda naa?”" 
Mark15:10 Pilato a tshi ralo ndi uri o vha a tshi zwi ḓivha uri vhotshifhe vhahulwane vha tshi mu kumedza Yesu vho vha vha tshi itwa nga vivho. 
Mark15:11 Hone vhotshifhe vhahulwane vha ṱuṱuwedza vhathu uri Pilato a vha vhofhololele Barabasi zwawe hu si Yesu. 
Mark15:12 Pilato a dovha a amba na vhathu a ri, “Zwino ni khou ri uyu ane na ri ndi khosi ya Majuda ndi iteni ngae?”" 
Mark15:13 Vhone vha zhamba vha ri, “Kha a vhambiwe kha tshifhambano!”" 
Mark15:14 Pilato a vha vhudzisa a ri, “Nṋa o tshinyani?” A tshi ralo vhone vha tou ṋaṋa u zhamba vha ri, “Kha a vhambiwe kha tshifhambano!”" 
Mark15:15 Pilato a tshi ṱoḓa u vha takadza a mbo vha vhofhololela Barabasi. O no ralo a ri Yesu a rwiwe nga mboma, a konou mu kumedza maswole uri a vhambiwe kha tshifhambano." 
Mark15:16 Maswole vha dzhia Yesu vha dzhena nae nḓuni ya khaṱhulo, a tou tangwa nga gomane yoṱhe." 
Mark15:17 Vha mu ambadza phuraphura ya muvhala mutswuku, vha ita na khare ya mipfa vha mu ambadza kha ṱhoho" 
Mark15:18 vha mu kumela vha ri, “Khosi ya Majuda nga i lalame!”" 
Mark15:19 Vha tshi ralo vha mu rwa kha ṱhoho nga luṱanga, vha mu pfela mare vha ita na u mu gwadamela vha mu luvha nga u hoya." 
Mark15:20 Musi vho no fhedza u mu kolela vha mu bvula iḽa nguvho tswuku vha dovha vha mu ambadza nguvho dzawe vha konou bva nae vha yo mu vhamba kha tshifhambano. 
Mark15:21 Vhe nḓilani vha ṱangana na muṅwe munna a tshi khou ḓa muḓini, vha mu kombetshedza u hwala tshifhambano tsha Yesu. (Uyo munna o vha e Simoni wa Kirene, khotsi a Alekzannda na Rufasi)." 
Mark15:22 Vha isa Yesu fhethu hu no pfi Golgotha, ndi u ri, “Fhethu hu no nga dethele ḽa muthu”." 
Mark15:23 Henefho vha edzisa u mu nwisa waini yo ṱanganaho na mishonga i vhavhaho, hone Yesu a hana." 
Mark15:24 Ndi hone vha tshi mu vhamba kha tshifhambano, vha konou kovhekana nguvho dzawe nga u tou ita mamvaṱe." 
Mark15:25 Vha tshi mu vhamba tsho vha tshi tshikhathi tsha 9 nga matsheloni. 
Mark15:26 Henefho kha tshifhambano ho vha hu na luṅwalo lwa u ḓivhisa mulandu wawe lu tshi ri, “Khosi ya Majuda”." 
Mark15:27 Vha mu vhamba na mavemu mavhili, ḽiṅwe thungo ya tshauḽa ḽiṅwe ya tshamonde. [" 
Mark15:28 Zwi tshi ralo ho ḓo khunyelela aḽa a uri, “O baḓekanywa na vhatshinyi.”]" 
Mark15:29 Vhafhiri vha gondo vha tshi zwi vhona vha dzungudza ṱhoho vha mu holedza vha ri, “Koṱo! Ndi iwe we wa ri u nga thutha nnḓu ya Mudzimu wa dovha wa i fhaṱa nga maḓuvha mararu!" 
Mark15:30 Idzou tsa-ha afho kha tshifhambano u ḓitshidze!” 
Mark15:31 Na vhotshifhe vhahulwane na vhaḓivhi vha Mulayo vha amba nga tshavho vha tshi mu kolela vha ri, “O vha a tshi konela u tshidza vhaṅwe, zwino u ḓitshidza zwi vho mu kunda!" 
Mark15:32 Kha ri mu vhone-ha Mesia wa hone Khosi ya Vhaisraele a tshi tsa kha tshifhambano zwino, ndi hone ri tshi ḓo mu tenda.” Vhaḽa vhe vha vha vho vhambwa nae na vhone vha ḓi mu sema-vho." 
Mark15:33 Masiari tshivhangalala nga awara ya 12 shango ḽoṱhe ḽa tibwa nga swiswi, ya vhuya ya rwa tsha vhuraru zwo ḓi ralo." 
Mark15:34 Nga tshifhinga tsha vhuraru Yesu a ṱavha mukosi a ri, “Eloi, Eloi, lama sabaxthani?” Ndi uri, “Mudzimu wanga, Mudzimu wanga, wo nndaṱelani?”" 
Mark15:35 Vhaṅwe vhe vha vha vhe henefho vha tshi pfa a tshi ralo vha ri, “Ipfani u vho vhidza Elia!”" 
Mark15:36 Muṅwe wavho a mbo ḓi gidima a ḓa o fara tshiponnzhi, a tshi mbwandamedza kha waini i vhavhaho a tshi ṱoma kha luṱanga a konou tshi isa mulomoni wa Yesu uri a swiswine, a ri, “Imani ri vhone arali Elia a tshi ḓo ḓa a mu tsisa kha tshifhambano!”" 
Mark15:37 Yesu a ṱavha mukosi ha mbo ḓi vha u welela. 
Mark15:38 Lupila lwa Hukhethwakhethwa lwa mbo ḓi kheruwa nga vhukati u bva nṱha u swika fhasi. 
Mark15:39 Mulangagomane we a vha o ima henefho phanḓa ha Yesu a tshi vhona kufele kwawe a amba a ri, “Nangoho hoyu muthu ndi Murwa wa Mudzimu.”" 
Mark15:40 Henefho ho vha hu na vhaṅwe vhasadzi vho ima fhaḽa kulenyana vho lavhelesa. Vhaṅwe vhavho ndi Maria Magadalina na Salume, na Maria mme a Jakopo muṱuku na Josiasi." 
Mark15:41 Vhenevho ndi vhe vha vha vha tshi khou ḓi mu tevhela zwiḽa a tshee Galelia vha tshi enda vha tshi mu shumela. Na vhaṅwe vhasadzi vhanzhi vhe vha bva nae Jerusalema vho vha vhe henefho. 
Mark15:42 Musi ḽi tshi vho kovhela nga ḓuvha ḽa u ḓilugisa, hu tshi tou pfi Sabatha ndi ya matshelo," 
Mark15:43 Josefa wa Arimathia a luma mbilu a ya ha Pilato u humbela tshitumbu tsha Yesu. Uyo Josefa o vha e muraḓo wa khoro a huliswaho nga vhathu, we na ene a vha o dzula o lindela u ḓa ha muvhuso wa Mudzimu." 
Mark15:44 Pilato zwa mu kanukisa a tshi pfa uri Yesu o no fa. Ndi hone a tshi vhidza mulangagomane a mu vhudzisa uri Yesu hu nga vha hu kale o fa naa. 
Mark15:45 Musi o no pfa vhuṱanzi ha mulangagomane a konou vhudza Josefa uri tshitumbu a nga ḓi tshi dzhia zwawe. 
Mark15:46 Josefa a renga sila ḽitshena, a tsisa tshitumbu tsha Yesu a tshi putela ngaḽo a konou mu swiṱa tshaloni tshe tsha vha tsho korwa kha tombo. O no ralo a dzhia tombo a ḽi kungulusela mulomoni wa tshalo." 
Mark15:47 Maria Magadalina na Maria mme a Josiasi vho vha vho lavhelesa, vha zwi vhona uri Yesu o swiṱwa ngafhi." 
Mark16:1 Sabatha yó no fhira, Maria Magadalina na Salume na Maria mme a Jakopo vha renga mishonga ya u ḓodza tshitumbu tsha Yesu." 
Mark16:2 Nga Swondaha nga matshelonitsheloni, ḓuvha ḽi tshi kha ḓi tou bva u bvisa mulomo, vha ya tshaloni." 
Mark16:3 Vhe nḓilani vha amba nga tshavho vha ri, “Nṋa ane a nga ri kungulusela tombo ḽa bva mulomoni wa tshalo ndi nnyi?”" 
Mark16:4 Ndi uri ḽo vha ḽi tombo ḽihulwane nga maanḓa. Musi vha tshi sedza vha vhona tombo ḽo no ḓi kunguluswa. 
Mark16:5 Vha tshi dzhena ngomu tshaloni vha vhona muṱhannga o dzula thungo ya tshauḽa tshavho o ambara phuraphura tshena; vha akhamala. 
Mark16:6 Uyo muṱhannga a ri, “Ni songo akhamala. A thi ri ni khou ṱoḓa Yesu wa Nazaretha we a vhambiwa tshifhambanoni? Ha tsheeho fhano; o vuwa. A ni vhoni na afho he a vha o ladzwa hone?" 
Mark16:7 Iyani ni yo ḓivhadza vhafunziwa haya mafhungo, na ene Pitrosi, ni vha vhudze ni ri, ‘Yesu o ni ranga phanḓa, o ya Galelia, ni ḓo ṱangana nae henengei unga o ni vhudza!’ ”" 
Mark16:8 U pfa zwenezwo ha mbo ḓi vha u bva tshaloni nga u gidima vha tshi tou tetemela nga nyofho. Aya mafhungo vha si ende vha tshi a vhudza muthu, ngauri vho vha vha tshi kha ḓi ofha. [Ṱhanzi nnzhi-nnzhi dza kale-kale dzi ri Bugu ya Markosi i guma henefha, hone hu kha ḓi vha na dziṅwe ṱhanzi dzi re na tshipiḓa hetshi tshi tevhelaho.] [" 
Mark16:9 Musi Yesu o no vuwa vhafuni nga Swondaha, hu tshee nga matshelonitsheloni, a thoma u ḓisumbedza Maria Magadalina, uḽa we a vhuya a pandela thuṅwa dza 7 dza Saṱhane khae." 
Mark16:10 U bva henefho Maria a yo vhudza vhaḽa vhe vha vha vha tshi tshimbila na Yesu, a wana vho ṱungufhala vha tshi khou lila." 
Mark16:11 Vha tshi pfa a tshi ri Yesu u a tshila na uri Maria o mu vhona, vha si vhuye vha tenda." 
Mark16:12 Zwo no ralo Yesu a ḓisumbedza vhaṅwe vhafunziwa vhavhili tshivhumbeo tshawe tshó shanduka. Vhone vho vha vhe nḓilani vha tshi khou bva Jerusalema. 
Mark16:13 Ndi hone vhafunziwa avho vha tshi huma vha yo vhudza vhaṅwe, hone vhone vha si tende." 
Mark16:14 Lwa u fhedzisela Yesu a dovha a ḓisumbedza vhafunziwa vha 11 vha tshi khou ḽa. A vha kaidza u sa tenda havho na u omisa havho dziṱhoho lwe vha vhuya vha hanedza na vhe vha tou mu vhona uri o vuwa vhafuni. 
Mark16:15 A amba navho a ri, “Iyani mashangoni oṱhe ni yo ḓivhadza mafhungo maḓifha kha zwivhumbwa zwoṱhe." 
Mark16:16 Ane a a tenda a lovhedzwa u ḓo tshidzwa. Ane a si a tende u ḓo laṱwa. 
Mark16:17 Vhane vha mpfulufhela vha ḓo vha na maḓembe haya: Vha ḓo pandela thuṅwa dza Saṱhane nga dzina ḽanga; vha ḓo amba nga nyambo dzisili; 
Mark16:18 naho vha doba maṋowa kana vha ḽa tshiganame a vha nga fi; na vhalwadze vha ḓo fhola musi vha tshi vha vhea zwanḓa.” 
Mark16:19 Musi Yesu Muṋe washu o no fhedza u amba navho, a takulelwa ṱaḓulu a ya a dzula thungo ya tshanḓa tshauḽa tsha Mudzimu vha vhusa vhoṱhe." 
Mark16:20 Vhafunziwa vhawe vha ya u anḓadza ipfi ḽawe thungo dzoṱhe, Muṋe washu a vha navho hoṱhe he vha ya a tshi vha ṋea maanḓa a u ita maḓembe a u khwaṱhisa ipfi ḽawe.]" 
Luke1:1 Thifilosi muṋe wanga, Ho no ḓi vha na vhanzhi vhe vha edzisa u ṅwala dzibugu nga zwe zwa itea vhukati hashu."
