Luke1:2 Vho ṅwala eneaḽa e ra vhudzwa nga vhe vha tou zwi vhona u bva mathomoni azwo, vha vhuya vha vha vhaanḓadzi vha mafhungo maḓifha." 
Luke1:3 Ndi hone muṋe wanga, nṋe-vho ndi tshi konou sedzulusa ayo mafhungo nga vhuronwane u bva he a thoma, nda zwi vhona uri zwo fanela ndi tshi vha ṅwalela bugu ine ya a hanelela yo tou dzudzanywaho zwavhuḓi." 
Luke1:4 Hezwi ndi khou zwi itela uri na vhone vha kone u ḓivha uri mafhungo haya e vha funzwa ndi ngoho vhukuma. 
Luke1:5 Misi Herude e khosi shangoni ḽa Judia ho vha hu na muṅwe tshifhe wa tshigwada tsha Abia we a vha a tshi pfi Zakaria. Musadzi wawe na ene o vha e wa lutsinga lwa Aroni, a tshi pfi Elisabethe." 
Luke1:6 Vhoṱhe vhuvhili havho vho vha vha tshi tshila vhutshilo vhu takadzaho Mudzimu, vha tshi tevhedza milayo yoṱhe na maipfi a Muṋe washu vha sa solisei." 
Luke1:7 Hone vho vha vha si na ṅwana ngauri Elisabethe o vha e muumba, nahone vhuvhili havho vho vha vho no vha vhathu vha maḓuvha." 
Luke1:8 Ḽiṅwe ḓuvha Zakaria o vha e ene tshifhe nḓuni ya Mudzimu nga tshifhinga tshe tsha vha tsho telwa tshigwada tshawe. 
Luke1:9 O vha o tou nangwa nga madeṅwa hu tshi tevhedzwa kuitele kwa vhotshifhe, uri a vhe ene ane a dubisela Mudzimu zwioro kha aḽiṱari. Ndi zwe a vha o dzhena nḓuni ya Mudzimu," 
Luke1:10 vhathu vhoṱhe vho sala muṱani wa thembele vha tshi khou rabela nga tshifhinga tsha u dubisa zwioro. 
Luke1:11 Ha ḓa muruṅwa wa Muṋe washu a ḓisumbedza ene, a vhonala o ima thungo ya tshauḽa tsha aḽiṱari ya zwioro." 
Luke1:12 Zakaria a tshi vhona uyo muruṅwa a tshenuwa o dzhenwa nga nyofho. 
Luke1:13 Ndi hone uyo muruṅwa a tshi amba nae a ri, “U songo ofha Zakaria. Thabelo yau yo pfiwa. Nazwino Elisabethe musadzi wau u ḓo u bebela ṅwana wa mutukana; u mu rine dzina ḽi no pfi Johanisi." 
Luke1:14 Iwe u ḓo takala lwa u takala; vhanzhi vha ḓo pembelela u bebwa hawe. 
Luke1:15 U ḓo vha muthu muhulwane phanḓa ha Mudzimu. Ha nga nwi waini na zwi kambaho; u ḓo bebwa o ḓala Muya Mukhethwa. 
Luke1:16 Vhanzhi vha lushaka lwa Israele u ḓo vha humisela ha Mudzimu Muṋe wavho. 
Luke1:17 U ḓo vha muḓinḓa wa Mudzimu, a re na Muya Mukhethwa na maanḓa a Muporofita Elia. U ḓo pfumedzanya vhabebi na vhana vhavho; vhadzia-u-sa-pfa u ḓo ita uri vha vhe vhavhuya, uri vhathu vha dzule vho lindela Muṋe wavho.”" 
Luke1:18 Zakaria a vhudzisa uyo muruṅwa a ri, “Nṋa ndi ḓo zwi ḓivha hani uri zwine wa khou amba ndi zwone? Ndi amba ngauri nṋe ndo no ḓi vha mukalaha, na musadzi wanga o no vha mukegulu!”" 
Luke1:19 Muruṅwa a fhindula a ri, “Ndi nṋe Gabriele mukoma a ṱwaho na Mudzimu; ndo rumiwa u ḓa u u vhudza mafhungo haya maḓifha." 
Luke1:20 Zwino-ha ngauri a wo ngo tenda zwe nda u vhudza, a u tsha ḓo kona u amba hu vhuye hu itee zwe nda amba; u itea hone zwi ḓo itea nga tshifhinga tshazwo.”" 
Luke1:21 Zwi tshi khou ralo vhathu vho vha vho ḓi lindela Zakaria vha tshi vho kanuka uri u khou lengiswa nga mini nḓuni ya Mudzimu. 
Luke1:22 Ene a tshi bvela nnḓa o vha a sa tsha kona u amba na vhathu, vhone vha zwi vhona uri o vhona bono musi e nḓuni ya Mudzimu. Zwino nge a kundwa u amba nga mulomo a vho tou amba navho nga zwanḓa." 
Luke1:23 Musi tshifhinga tshawe tsha u shuma thembeleni tshi tshi fhela, Zakaria a humela hayani." 
Luke1:24 Hú songo fhela tshifhinga tshingafhani Elisabethe musadzi wawe a vha muthu wa thovhela, a fhedza miṅwedzi miṱanu o ḓidzumba," 
Luke1:25 a tshi ri, “Zwino ndi hone Mudzimu o nnyitela vhuthu; o fhedza huḽa u ṱolou sewa hanga.”" 
Luke1:26 Musi zwi tshi vho ita miṅwedzi miṱanu na muthihi Elisabethe e muthu wa thovhela, Mudzimu a mbo ruma muruṅwa Gabriele kha muṅwe muḓi wa Galelia une wa pfi Nazaretha" 
Luke1:27 u isa fhungo kha muṅwe musidzana we a vha o fulufhedziswa munna a no pfi Josefa, muḓuhulu wa khosi Dafita. Onoyo musidzana o vha a tshi pfi Maria." 
Luke1:28 Muruṅwa a ḓa khae a ri, “Mulalo Maria! Mashudu au ndi mahulu; Muṋe washu u na iwe.”" 
Luke1:29 Maria a tshi pfa ayo maipfi a akhamala, a ḓivhudzisa mbiluni uri zwi nga vha zwi tshi amba mini." 
Luke1:30 Ndi hone muruṅwa a tshi ri, “U songo ofha Maria; Mudzimu o u tonda zwihulu." 
Luke1:31 U ḓo vha muthu wa thovhela wa beba ṅwana wa mutukana; u mu ire dzina ḽa Yesu. 
Luke1:32 U ḓo vha muhulwane lune a ḓo tou pfi Murwa wa Waṱaḓuluṱaḓulu. Mudzimu Muṋe washu u ḓo mu ambadza vhuhosi ha Dafita makhulukuku wawe. 
Luke1:33 U ḓo vha khosi ya zwiḓuhulu zwa Jakopo misi yoṱhe; muvhuso wawe a u nga gumi!” 
Luke1:34 Ndi hone Maria a tshi amba na muruṅwa a ri, “Hufha nṋe ndi sa athu vhuya nda ḓivha muthu wa munna, zwino zwine vha khou amba zwi nga itea hani?”" 
Luke1:35 Muruṅwa a tshi mu fhindula a ri, “Muya Mukhethwa u ḓo ḓa kha iwe; maanḓa a Waṱaḓuluṱaḓulu a ḓo kavha kha iwe. Ndi zwine uyo ṅwana a ḓo tou pfi Mukhethwa, Murwa wa Mudzimu." 
Luke1:36 Vhona zwe zwa itea kha shaka ḽau Elisabethe. O vha a tshi pfi ndi muumba, hone zwino vhona, zwi vho ita miṅwedzi miṱanu na muthihi e muthu wa thovhela naho o no tou vha mukegulu wa maḓuvha," 
Luke1:37 ngauri a hu na tshithu tshine Mudzimu a sa tshi kone.” 
Luke1:38 Maria a ri, “Ndi mulanda wa Muṋe washu! Zwine wa ri zwi ḓo itea kha nṋe kha zwi itee.” Ndi hone muruṅwa a tshi ṱuwa." 
Luke1:39 Hu sa athu vhuya ha fhela tshifhinga tshingafhani Maria a ṱuwa a livha muḓini muṅwe u re thavhani dza Judia. 
Luke1:40 A tshi swika a dzhena nḓuni ya Zakaria, a vusa Elisabethe." 
Luke1:41 Elisabethe a ri u pfa Maria a tshi mu vusa, ṅwana a re muvhilini wawe a thoma u tamba-tamba. Elisabethe a mbo ḓi ḓala Muya Mukhethwa," 
Luke1:42 a fhululedza a ri, “Mashudu aṋu a fhira a vhasadzi vhoṱhe! Na ṅwana ane na ḓo mu beba o shudufhala!" 
Luke1:43 Nṋa zwi nga ḓa hani vha hashu ndi tshi tou vhuya nda dalelwa-vho nga mme a Muṋe wanga? 
Luke1:44 Ndi ralo nge ha ri zwenezwi ni tshi tou nthesha nda sokou pfa zwenezwi zwe nda hwala zwi tshi tamba nga dakalo. 
Luke1:45 Ni na mashudu inwi nge na tenda uri ipfi ḽe Muṋe washu a ni vhudza a ḽi nga weli fhasi!” 
Luke1:46 Maria a ri, “Mbilu yanga i khoḓa Muṋe wanga." 
Luke1:47 Muya wanga u takalela Mudzimu Mutshidzi wanga. 
Luke1:48 O humbula-vho nṋe mulanda wawe muṱukuṱuku! U thoma ṋamusi ndi ḓo ḓi pfi wa mashudu nga mirafho yoṱhe," 
Luke1:49 ngauri Ramaanḓa o ntonda zwihulu. Dzina ḽawe ndi ḽikhethwa; 
Luke1:50 vhoṱhe vha mu ofhaho u vha itela tshilidzi u bva kha murafho zwa ya kha murafho. 
Luke1:51 O ri u angaladza tshanḓa tshawe tsha maanḓa, a balanganya vhoṱhe vha mbilu dza u ḓihudza." 
Luke1:52 U bvisa vha maanḓa vhuhosini hao, a hulisa tsiwana." 
Luke1:53 Vha re na nḓala u vha fusha nga zwavhuḓi, vhapfumi u vha humisa vha si na tshithu." 
Luke1:54 Zwe a fulufhedzisa vhomakhulukuku washu o zwi ita; a ḓi ḓa a phalala muḓinḓa wawe Israele. Ho ngo hangwa u lilisa Abrahamu, na vhaḓuhulu wawe misi yoṱhe!”" 
Luke1:55  
Luke1:56 Maria a dzula na Elisabethe miṅwedzi ine ya ṱoḓou swika miraru, a konou humela hayani." 
Luke1:57 Musi tshifhinga tsha uri Elisabethe a vhofholowe tshi tshi swika, a beba ṅwana wa mutukana." 
Luke1:58 Vhahura vhawe na mashaka awe vha tshi pfa uri Muṋe washu o mu tonda zwingafhani vha takala nae nga maanḓa. 
Luke1:59 Nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuṱanu-na-vhuraru ṅwana ó bebiwa, vha ḓa u mu fumbisa. Vha ri vha ṱoḓa u mu ira dzina ḽa khotsi awe Zakaria," 
Luke1:60 hone mme awe a hanedza a ri, “Hai, hoyu u pfi Johanisi.”" 
Luke1:61 Vhone vha fhindula vha ri, “Hufha hu si na wa haṋu ane a vha na dzina iḽo!”" 
Luke1:62 Ndi hone vha tshi thoma u amba na khotsi awe nga zwanḓa vha tshi vhudzisa uri u funa ṅwana a tshi pfi nnyi. 
Luke1:63 Zakaria a humbela baphathi ḽa u ṅwalela khaḽo, a ṅwala a ri, “U pfi Johanisi.” Vhoṱhe vha kanuka." 
Luke1:64 A tshi kha ḓi tou ralo, Zakaria a mbo ḓi dovha a kona u amba, a thoma u renda Mudzimu." 
Luke1:65 Vhahura vhawe vhoṱhe vha dzhenwa nga nyofho; haya mafhungo oṱhe a pfala hoṱhe thavhani dza Judia. 
Luke1:66 Vhoṱhe vhe vha zwi pfa vha thoma u elekanya vha ḓivhudzisa vha ri, “Nṋa uyu ṅwana u ḓo tou vha mini?” Vha ralo nge zwa vha zwi tshi tou vhonala uri Mudzimu u nae." 
Luke1:67 Khotsi awe Zakaria a ḓala Muya Mukhethwa a porofita a ri," 
Luke1:68 “Kha hu rendwe Muṋe washu, Mudzimu wa Israele! Ngauri o ḓa u tonda vhathu vhawe a vha rengulula," 
Luke1:69 a ri vusela Mutshidzi wa maanḓa, ane a vha muḓuhulu wa Dafita mushumeli wawe." 
Luke1:70 Asia-ha e a a bula tsha kale na kale nga milomo ya vhaporofita vhawe vhakhethwa: 
Luke1:71 O fulufhedzisa uri u ḓo ri tshidza kha maswina ashu, na kha vhoṱhe vha ri vhengaho." 
Luke1:72 O ri u ḓo khathutshela vhomakhulukuku washu, u ḓo dzula a tshi elelwa mulanga wawe mukhethwa." 
Luke1:73 O fulufhedzisa makhulukuku washu Abrahamu ó khwaṱhisa, a ana uri u ḓo ri lamukisa kha maswina ashu, uri ri kone u mu luvha ri sa ofhi tshithu," 
Luke1:74  
Luke1:75 rí vhakhethwa, ri tshi ita zwine Ene a zwi funa maḓuvha oṱhe a vhutshilo hashu." 
Luke1:76 Inwi ṅwananga ni ḓo tou pfi muporofita wa Waṱaḓuluṱaḓulu. Ni ḓo fhira phanḓa ha Muṋe washu ni tshi mu lugisela nḓila," 
Luke1:77 ni tshi ḓivhadza vhathu vhawe uri vha ḓo tshidzwa nga u hangwelwa vhutshinyi havho; 
Luke1:78 ngauri Mudzimu washu u na mbilutshilidzi, u ḓo ri ṱavhisela ḓuvha ḽi bvaho ṱaḓulu," 
Luke1:79 ḽa vhonetshela vhoṱhe vhane vha dzula swiswini na dunzini ḽa lufu, ra endedzwa nḓilani ya mulalo.”" 
Luke1:80 Ṅwana uyo a aluwa, a khwaṱha na muyani, a dzula sogani u swika ḓuvha ḽe a bvela khagala vhukati ha lushaka lwa Israele." 
Luke2:1 Misi yeneyo khisara Agostosi a bvisa ndaela ya uri vhathu vhoṱhe nga shango vha vhaliwe. 
Luke2:2 Musi u vhaliwa hohu ha u thoma hu tshi vha hone ndi musi Khwiriniasi e muvhusi wa Siria. 
Luke2:3 Muṅwe na muṅwe a yo ḓiṅwalisa ha hawe. 
Luke2:4 Josefa na ene a ṱuwa muḓini wa Nazaretha shangoni ḽa Galelia a ya Judia, muḓini wa Dafita u no pfi Betlehema. A tshi vhuya a ya Betlehema ndi uri na ene Josefa o vha e muḓuhulu wa Dafita." 
Luke2:5 A tshi ya u ḓiṅwalisa a ṱuwa na Maria muselwa wawe we a vha e muthu wa thovhela. 
Luke2:6 Vhe henefho Betlehema tshifhinga tshawe tsha u vhofholowa tsha swika; 
Luke2:7 a beba ṅwana wawe wa mutukana wa tanzhe, a mu putela nga masila a mu ladza mukungwani, ngauri nnḓu ya vhaeni yo vha yo no ḓala." 
Luke2:8 Henefho shangoni ḽeneḽo ho vha hu na vhalisa vho bva mathaga, vha tshi lisa nngu vha tshi lala ḓakani." 
Luke2:9 Muruṅwa wa Muṋe washu a ima vhukati havho, vha vhonetshelwa nga lupenyo lwa Mudzimu, vha farwa nga nyofho khulu." 
Luke2:10 Hone muruṅwa a amba navho a ri, “Ni songo ofha! Ndi fhano ndo ni ḓela na fhungo ḽavhuḓi ḽa dakalo fulu ḽi re ḽa lushaka lwoṱhe." 
Luke2:11 Vhusiku ha ṋamusi no bebelwa Mutshidzi fhaḽa muḓini wa Dafita, Ene Mesia Muṋe washu!" 
Luke2:12 Tshiga tshine na ḓo mu ḓivha ngatsho khetshi: Ni ḓo wana ṅwana o pombedzwa nga masila o ladzwa mukungwani.” 
Luke2:13 Ndi hone henefho tsini ha muruṅwa hu tshi mbo ḓi bvelela mmbi khulu ya vharuṅwa vha ṱaḓulu vha tshi khou renda Mudzimu vha tshi ri," 
Luke2:14 “Nga hu rendwe Mudzimu a re ṱaḓulu-ṱaḓulu! Na fhano shangoni vhane a vha takalela vha vhe na mulalo.” 
Luke2:15 Musi vharuṅwa vha tshi vha ṱutshela vha tshi vhuelela ṱaḓulu, vhalisa vha amba nga tshavho vha ri, “Kha ri ye Betlehema ri yo vhona hezwo zwithu zwo iteaho zwe ra vhudzwa nga Muṋe washu.”" 
Luke2:16 Nangoho vha mbo ḓi vhilula, vha wana Josefa na Maria, na ṅwana o ladzwa mukungwani." 
Luke2:17 Vhalisa vha tshi wana zwo tou ralo vha vhudza Josefa na Maria zwe muruṅwa a amba nga ṅwana. 
Luke2:18 Vhoṱhe vhe vha pfa zwe vhalisa vha amba, vha kanuka." 
Luke2:19 Maria ene haya mafhungo oṱhe a a vhulunga mbiluni yawe, a ḓi dzula a tshi a humbula." 
Luke2:20 Vhalisa vha huma vha tshi khou renda Mudzimu vha tshi mu khoḓela zwe vha zwi pfa na zwe vha zwi vhona; ngauri zwe muruṅwa a amba zwo vha zwo tou ralo. 
Luke2:21 Nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuṱanu-na-vhuraru, tshifhinga tsha uri ṅwana a fumbe tshi tshi swika, vha mu ira dzina ḽi no pfi Yesu, ḽiḽa ḽe a irwa nga muruṅwa a sa athu vha hone muvhilini wa mme awe." 
Luke2:22 Ha swika tshifhinga tsha uri Josefa na Maria vha tevhedze zwe zwa tiwa kha Mulayo wa Mushe zwa vhuṱambo ha u kumululwa. Ndi hone vha tshi dzhia ṅwana vha ya nae Jerusalema u yo mu sumela Mudzimu," 
Luke2:23 vha tshi tevhedza zwo ṅwalwaho kha Mulayo wa Muṋe washu hu no pfi, “Tanzhe ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe ḽa tshiduna ndi ḽa Mudzimu.”" 
Luke2:24 Ndi zwe vha ita na u isa musumo vha tshi tevhedza zwo ambiwaho nga Mulayo wa Muṋe washu hu tshi pfi, “Hu iswe zwiivhamuronzhe zwivhili kana mafhondo mavhili a maivha.”" 
Luke2:25 Henefho Jerusalema ho vha hu tshi dzula muṅwe muthu we a vha a tshi pfi Simioni, munna muvhuya we a vha a tshi ofha Mudzimu. O vha e na Muya Mukhethwa, o ḓi dzula o lindela ḓuvha ḽine Mudzimu a ḓo fhumudza Vhaisraele ngaḽo." 
Luke2:26 Ene Muya o vha o no mu dzumbululela uri ha nga fi a sa athu vhona Mesia wa Muṋe washu. 
Luke2:27 Zwino ḽiṅwe ḓuvha Muya Mukhethwa a mu isa thembeleni. Musi vhabebi vha Yesu vha tshi mu ḓisa thembeleni vha tshi tevhedza zwe Mulayo wa amba," 
Luke2:28 Simioni a mbo ḓi ṱanganedza ṅwana a mu angaḓedza a livhuha Mudzimu a ri," 
Luke2:29 “Zwino-ha Muṋe wanga, zwe wa mpfulufhedzisa zwo itea, u nga ḓi litsha mulanda wau a ṱuwa o rudza mbilu." 
Luke2:30 Hufha ane wa ri tshidza ngae ndo tou mu vhona nga maṱo anga," 
Luke2:31 wo mu vhetshela tshakha dzoṱhe. 
Luke2:32 Ndi Ene tshedza tsha u vhonetshela na dziṅwe tshakha, tsha ṋea vhathu vhau vha Israele thendo.”" 
Luke2:33 Khotsi na mme awe vha tshi pfa zwine Simioni a amba nga ṅwana, vha akhamala." 
Luke2:34 Simioni a vha shudufhadza a konou amba na Maria mme a ṅwana a ri, “Hoyu ṅwana o nangiwa nga Mudzimu uri a vhe tshiwisi na tshivusi tsha vhathu vhanzhi vha Israele; u ḓo vha tshiga tsha Mudzimu tshine tsha ḓo landulwa nga vhathu." 
Luke2:35 Zwi tshi ralo ndi hone hu tshi ḓo dzumbuluwa zwiphiri zwi re khanani dza vhanzhi. A vha iwe vhuṱungu vhu ḓo u rumbula mbilu zwa tou nga i khou rungwa nga pfumo.” 
Luke2:36 Na muporofita muṅwe-vho o vha e hone, wa musadzi we a vha a tshi pfi Ana, ṅwana wa Fanuele, wa tsinde ḽa Ashere. O vha o no vha mukegulu wa miṅwaha ya 84, o fhedza miṅwaha ya 7 e na munna, hone zwino o vha o no vha tshilikadzi. O vha a sa ṱuwi thembeleni, a tshi ṱwa a tshi luvha Mudzimu vhusiku na masiari, a tshi ḓidzima, a tshi rabela." 
Luke2:37  
Luke2:38 Zwino nga tshenetsho tshifhinga a vha u a swika khavho, a livhuha Mudzimu; a enda a tshi amba na vhoṱhe vhe vha vha vho lindela Mudzimu a tshi lamulela Jerusalema, a vha ṱalutshedza nga ṅwana." 
Luke2:39 Musi vho no khunyeledza zwoṱhe zwo tiwaho nga Mulayo wa Muṋe washu, vha humela Galelia muḓini wa havho wa Nazaretha." 
Luke2:40 Ṅwana a aluwa a vha na nungo na vhuṱali vhuhulu, na Mudzimu a mu itela vhuthu." 
Luke2:41 Ṅwaha muṅwe na muṅwe vhabebi vha Yesu vho vha vha tshi ya Jerusalema nga vhuṱambo ha Paseka. 
Luke2:42 Musi Yesu e na miṅwaha ya 12 vha ḓi ya vhuṱamboni sa misi. 
Luke2:43 Musi maḓuvha a vhuṱambo o no fhela, vha fara lwendo lwa u humela hayani, Yesu a sala Jerusalema vhabebi vhawe vha sa zwi ḓivhi," 
Luke2:44 vha tshi ḓi ri u na vhaṅwe. Vha tshimbila ḓuvha ḽoṱhe vha tshi khou mu ṱoḓa mashakani na kha khonani dzavho," 
Luke2:45 hone vha si mu wane, vha vhuya vha tou humela Jerusalema vha tshi mu ṱoḓa." 
Luke2:46 Nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuraru vha konou mu wana thembeleni o dzula na vhafunzi vha Majuda a tshi khou vha thetshelesa, a tshi ita na u vhudzisa dzimbudziso." 
Luke2:47 Vhoṱhe vhe vha mu pfa vha kanuka ṱhalukanyo yawe na phindulo dzawe. 
Luke2:48 Musi vhabebi vhawe vha tshi mu vhona vha akhamala, mme awe vha ri, “Ṅwananga, ni ri itani? Tshee nṋe na muṋe waṋu ra ṱolou tambula ri tshi khou ni ṱoḓa!”" 
Luke2:49 Ene a fhindula a ri, “Vho nṱoḓelani huṅwe? A vha zwi ḓivhi uri ndi fanela u vha nḓuni ya Khotsi anga?”" 
Luke2:50 Hone vhone vha si kone u ṱalukanya uri a tshi ralo u amba mini. 
Luke2:51 Ndi hone Yesu a tshi humela navho Nazaretha, a dzula a tshi vha thetshelesa. Mme awe vhone vha vhulunga zwithu zwoṱhe hezwo mbiluni yavho." 
Luke2:52 Yesu Ene a aluwa, na vhuṱali hawe vhu tshi ḓi hulela vhu tshi ya, na u takalelwa hawe nga Mudzimu na vhathu zwa ḓi hulela zwi tshi ya." 
Luke3:1 Ipfi ḽa Mudzimu ḽa ḓa ha Johanisi ṅwana wa Zakaria e sogani nga ṅwaha wa 15 wa muvhuso wa khisara Tiberiosi, muvhusi wa Judia e Pontio Pilato, Herude e gota ḽa Galelia, mukomana wawe Filipi e gota ḽa Ithuria na Thrakhonithisi, ḽa Abilene e Lisaniasi, vhotshifhe vhahulu vhe Anasi na Khayafasi." 
Luke3:2  
Luke3:3 Ndi hone Johanisi a tshi tshimbila na shango ḽoṱhe ḽi re tsini na mulambo wa Jorodani a tshi enda a tshi ḓivhadza vhathu a tshi ri, “Rembuluwani ni lovhedzwe, Mudzimu a ḓo konou ni hangwela vhutshinyi haṋu.”" 
Luke3:4 Hezwi zwo itea nga he muporofita Yesaya a vha o ṅwala buguni yawe a tshi ri, “Hu na muthu a huwelelaho sogani! U ri, ‘Lugiselani Muṋe washu nḓila, i tou tswititi, i tshimbilee!" 
Luke3:5 Miedzi yoṱhe i ḓo ḓadzwa mavu, dzithavha na zwikwara zwi ḓo itwa midavhi, ho kombamaho hu ḓo onyoloswa; nḓila dzo vhifhaho dzi ḓo tshimbilea;" 
Luke3:6 tshakha dzoṱhe dzi ḓo vhona uri Mudzimu u tshidza hani vhathu!’ ” 
Luke3:7 Johanisi a amba na vhathu vhe vha ḓa khae uri vha lovhedzwe a ri, “Dziṋowa ndi inwi! Ndi nnyi o ni sevhaho uri ni tinye khaṱhulo ya Mudzimu ine ya khou ḓa?" 
Luke3:8 Aṋwani-ha mitshelo i sumbedzaho uri vhukuma no rembuluwa. Ni litshe u ṱolou amba nga tshaṋu ni tshi ri, ‘Riṋe ri vhana vha Abrahamu.’ A vha nṋe ndi ri, Mudzimu u na maanḓa a u itela Abrahamu vhana nga matombo haya!" 
Luke3:9 Iṱali mbaḓo yo no ḓi dzula yo angaladzwa tsindeni ḽa muri; muri muṅwe na muṅwe une u si aṋwe mitshelo yavhuḓi u ḓo remiwa wa kudzwa muliloni.” 
Luke3:10 A tshi ralo vhathu vha mu vhudzisa vha ri, “Zwino ri iteni-ha?”" 
Luke3:11 Ene a vha fhindula a ri, “Ane a vha na hemmbe mbili kha a ṋee iṅwe uḽa a si na; ane a vha na zwiḽiwa kha a ḽe na vhaṅwe.”" 
Luke3:12 Ha ḓa-vho na vhathelisi uri vha lovhedzwe. Vhenevho vha mu vhudzisa vha ri, “Vhafunzi, riṋe-vho ri iteni?”" 
Luke3:13 A tshi vha fhindula a ri, “Ni songo thelisa na fhirisa ndinganyo.”" 
Luke3:14 Ndi hone hu tshi vhudzisa-vho na maswole a ri, “Riṋe-vho, ri iteni?” Ene a tshi vha fhindula a ri, “Ni songo dzhia tshelede ya muthu nga swili kana nga vhufhura; tshaṋu nga hu vhe u fushea nga miholo yaṋu.”" 
Luke3:15 A tshi ralo ha tou vha u vusa dzangalelo ḽa vhathu; vha thoma u ḓivhudzisa mbiluni dzavho uri uyu Johanisi ndi ene Mesia naa! 
Luke3:16 Johanisi a tshi vha fhindula a ri, “Nṋe ndi ni lovhedza nga maḓi zwao, hone hu khou ḓa ane a mphira kule lune ndi si vhuye nda fanela na u kotama nda vhofholola thambo dza navhula dzawe. Ene u ḓo tou ni lovhedza nga Muya Mukhethwa na nga mulilo." 
Luke3:17 U ḓa o fara luselo lwawe; u ḓo fhefhera mavhele a konou a shela ḓuluni. Mungu wone u ḓo u fhisa nga mulilo u sa dzimi!” 
Luke3:18 Johanisi a ḓi funza vhathu mafhungo maḓifha a tou vha kwengweledza nga nḓila dzo fhambanaho. 
Luke3:19 Zwino ene Johanisi o vha a tshi ḓi kaidza khosi Herude nge a ṱahisa Herudiasi musadzi wa mukomana wawe, na nge a ḓi ita vhuṅwe vhukhakhi vhunzhi." 
Luke3:20 Hone Herude a vho tou phapha mbulu kha iṅwe, a fara Johanisi a mu kudza dzhele." 
Luke3:21 Misi iḽa vhathu vhoṱhe vha tshi lovhedzwa, na Yesu a ḓa a lovhedzwa-vho. O no lovhedzwa, a tshi khou rabela, lutombo lwa vulea," 
Luke3:22 Muya Mukhethwa a tsa e kha tshivhumbeo tsha ḽiivha a kavha khae. Ha pfala ipfi ḽi bvaho ṱaḓulu ḽi tshi ri, “U Murwa wanga muthihi fhedzi; u a ntakadza!”" 
Luke3:23 Musi Yesu a tshi thoma mushumo wa u funza o vha a tshi vho swika kha miṅwaha ya 30. Vhathu vhone vho vha vha tshi mu ita ṅwana wa Josefa. Josefa o vha e ṅwana wa Eli," 
Luke3:24 ṅwana wa Mathathi, wa Livi, wa Malaki, wa Janai, wa Josefa," 
Luke3:25 wa Mathathiasi, wa Amusi, wa Nahumi, wa Esele, wa Nagai," 
Luke3:26 wa Maathi, wa Mathathiasi, wa Simei, wa Josekhe, wa Joda," 
Luke3:27 wa Johanani, wa Resa, wa Zerubabele, wa Salathiele, wa Neri," 
Luke3:28 wa Malaki, wa Adi, wa Khosamu, wa Elemadamu, wa Eri," 
Luke3:29 wa Joshua, wa Eliesere, wa Jorimu, wa Mathathi, wa Livi," 
Luke3:30 wa Simioni, wa Juda, wa Josefa, wa Jonamu, wa Eliakimu," 
Luke3:31 wa Melia, wa Mina, wa Mathatha, wa Nathani, wa Dafita," 
Luke3:32 wa Isai, wa Obede, wa Buasi, wa Salimoni, wa Nahashoni," 
Luke3:33 wa Aminadaba, wa Adimini, wa Arini, wa Esromu, wa Pheretse, wa Juda," 
Luke3:34 wa Jakopo, wa Isaka, wa Abrahamu, wa Thera, wa Nahoro," 
Luke3:35 wa Serugu, wa Riu, wa Phelege, wa Ebere, wa Shela," 
Luke3:36 wa Khainani, wa Ariphakhadi, wa Semu, wa Nua, wa Lamekhe," 
Luke3:37 wa Methushaele, wa Enokho, wa Jarede, wa Mahalalele, wa Khainani," 
Luke3:38 wa Enosi, wa Sethe, wa Adamu. Adamu uyo-ha o vha e ṅwana wa Mudzimu." 
Luke4:1 Yesu a mbo ḓi ṱuwa mulamboni wa Jorodani o ḓala Muya Mukhethwa. Ene Muya a mu endedza sogani," 
Luke4:2 Yesu a fhedza maḓuvha a 40 a sa ḽi tshithu a tshi khou lingwa nga diabolo. Musi ayo maḓuvha a tshi fhela a farwa nga nḓala. 
Luke4:3 Ndi hone diabolo a tshi amba na Yesu a ri, “Arali nangoho u Murwa wa Mudzimu, vhudza heḽi tombo ḽi shanduke ḽi vhe vhuswa.”" 
Luke4:4 Yesu a fhindula a ri, “Maṅwalo a ri, ‘Muthu ha tshili nga vhuswa fhedzi.’ ”" 
Luke4:5 Ndi hone diabolo a tshi isa Yesu nṱha ha thavha, kathihi fhedzi a mu sumbedza mashango oṱhe a ḽifhasi a ri," 
Luke4:6 “Ndi ḓo u kumedza haya mashango oṱhe na madzanga ao; zwoṱhe zwi zwanḓani zwanga, ndi zwi ṋea ane nda funa." 
Luke4:7 Zwino arali wa tou nngwadamela, hezwi zwithu zwoṱhe zwi ḓo vha zwau.”" 
Luke4:8 Yesu a fhindula a ri, “Ho ṅwaliwa upfi, ‘Gwadamela Muṋe wau Mudzimu u luvhe Ene fhedzi!’ ”" 
Luke4:9 Ndi hone diabolo a tshi mu isa Jerusalema a mu imisa kha tshiuludza tsha thembele a konou amba nae a ri, “Arali nangoho u Murwa wa Mudzimu fhufhela fhasi u henefha," 
Luke4:10 hufha Maṅwalo a tshi ri, “ ‘Mudzimu u ḓo vhudza vharuṅwa vhawe vha u tsireledza," 
Luke4:11 a ri vha ḓo tou u takula nga zwanḓa uri u si khukhulwe nga tombo.’ ” 
Luke4:12 Yesu a tshi mu fhindula a ri, “Mudzimu o amba a ri, ‘U songo linga Mudzimu Muṋe wau.’ ”" 
Luke4:13 Musi diabolo o no fhedza milingo yawe, a litsha Yesu a ri, “Ndi ḓo mu wana ngavhuya.”" 
Luke4:14 Zwenezwo Yesu a humela Galelia e na maanḓa a Muya Mukhethwa. Thungo dzoṱhe ho vha hu tshi vho pfala dzina ḽawe fhedzi. 
Luke4:15 O vha a tshi ya a tshi funza na sinagogoni dza Majuda, vhathu vhoṱhe vha tshi mu khoḓa." 
Luke4:16 Ndi hone Yesu a tshi ya Nazaretha fhaḽa he a alutshela hone. Nga Sabatha a ya sinagogoni sa misi. A takuwa uri a vhale Maṅwalo. 
Luke4:17 Vha mu ṋekedza bugu ya muporofita Yesaya, a i petulula a wana fhaḽa ho ṅwaliwaho upfi," 
Luke4:18 “Muya wa Muṋe washu u kha Nṋe. O nnḓodza uri ndi funze vha si na tshavho mafhungo maḓifha, ndi ḓivhadze uri mathubwa a ḓo vhofhololwa, mabofu a swinguluswa, uri ndi lamulele vho kandeledzwaho," 
Luke4:19 ndi ḓivhadze u ḓa ha ṅwaha wa u tshidzwa nga Muṋe washu!” 
Luke4:20 U ralo Yesu a peta iḽa bugu, a i ṋea mulavhelesi wa sinagogo, a dzula fhasi uri a funze. Vhathu vhoṱhe vhe vha vha vhe nḓuni vha mu lavhelesa." 
Luke4:21 Yesu a thoma u vha funza a ri, “Ṋamusi haya mafhungo a ambwaho nga Maṅwalo o khunyelela zwenezwi ni tshi a pfa a tshi khou vhalwa.”" 
Luke4:22 Vhoṱhe vha takalela zwe a amba, vha kanuka na u ḓifha ha pfunzo yawe. Vha ri, “Nṋa a si ṅwana wa Josefa uyu naa?”" 
Luke4:23 Yesu a amba navho a ri, “Ndi a zwi ḓivha uri ni ḓo thoma u mmbudza uri, ‘Mudengu ḓidengule!’ na dovha na ri, ‘Zwe ra pfa hu tshi pfi wo ita ngei Kapernaumi zwi ite-vho na fhano ha hau.’" 
Luke4:24 Zwino ipfani-ha, ndi ri muporofita ha huliswi ha hawe." 
Luke4:25 Ndi ngoho uri ho vha hu na tshilikadzi nnzhi misi ya muporofita Elia zwiḽa gole ḽi tshi tswuka ḽa fhedza miṅwaha miraru na hafu ha vhuya ha tou wa nḓala khulu shangoni ḽoṱhe. 
Luke4:26 Hone Elia ho ngo vhuya a rumiwa na kha muthihi wavho, o rumiwa ngei kha uḽa wa Tsariphathi fhedzi, kha ḽa Sidoni." 
Luke4:27 Na misi ya muporofita Elisha ho vha hu na vhanzhi vha lwalaho lukanda shangoni ḽa Israele, hone hu si fhodzwe na muthihi wavho, ha tou fhodzwa Naamani wa Musiria.”" 
Luke4:28 Vhathu vhoṱhe vhe vha vha vhe sinagogoni vha tshi pfa a tshi ralo vha sinyuwa nga maanḓa. 
Luke4:29 Vha mbo ḓi takutshedza vha pandela Yesu muḓini vha mu isa muṱumbani wa tshikwara tshe muḓi wavho wa vha wo fhaṱwa khatsho, vha tshi ri vha mu khurumedzele luwani." 
Luke4:30 Hone Ene a vhanyuludza nga vhukati a ḓiṱutshela. 
Luke4:31 Ndi hone Yesu a tshi tsela muḓini wa Kapernaumi shangoni ḽa Galelia, a ḓi funza vhathu nga Sabatha." 
Luke4:32 Vhoṱhe vha kanuka kufunzele kwawe ngauri o vha a tshi pfala e Muṋe wa mafhungo. 
Luke4:33 Henefho sinagogoni ho vha hu na muṅwe munna we a vha e na thuṅwa ya Saṱhane, onoyo a ṱavha mukosi a ri," 
Luke4:34 “U ṱoḓani kha riṋe Iwe Yesu wa Nazaretha? Kani-ha wo ḓa u ri lozwa? Iwe ndi a u ḓivha: U muḓinḓa mukhethwa wa Mudzimu!” 
Luke4:35 Yesu a i kaidza a ri, “Fhumula u bve kha hoyo muthu!” Iyo thuṅwa ya mbo ḓi wisela uḽa munna fhasi vhathu vha tshi zwi vhona, ya bva khae i songo vhuya ya mu ita tshithu." 
Luke4:36 Vhoṱhe vha akhamala vha thoma u amba nga tshavho vha ri, “Nṋa ndi mini izwi? Onoyu muthu a re na maanḓa a u kaidza thuṅwa dza mu thetshelesa!”" 
Luke4:37 Bvumo ḽa Yesu ḽa thoma u pfala shangoni ḽeneḽo ḽoṱhe. 
Luke4:38 U bva henefho sinagogoni ha vha u livha hayani ha Simoni. Makhulutshisadzi wa Simoni vho vha vho farwa nga biso, muvhili u tshi tou duga woṱhe. Vha havho vha ḓa vha lilela Yesu." 
Luke4:39 Ene a takuwa a yo ima tsini ha mmbete wavho, a kaidza biso ḽa mbo ḓi fhola na zwenezwo, vha mbo ḓi bikela vhaeni." 
Luke4:40 Ḓuvha ḽi tshi vho kovhela, vhoṱhe vhe vha vha vhe na vhalwadze vha malwadze a tshakha-tshakha vha vha ḓisa ha Yesu; Ene a vha vhea zwanḓa vhoṱhe, a vha fhodza." 
Luke4:41 Na thuṅwa dza bva kha vhanzhi dzi tshi khou ṱavha mukosi dzi tshi ri, “Ndi Iwe Murwa wa Mudzimu!” Yesu a dzi kaidza, a sa dzi tendele dzi tshi bula uri ndi Ene nnyi ngauri iṱali dzo vha dzi tshi zwi ḓivha uri ndi Ene Mesia." 
Luke4:42 Nga matsheloni Yesu a bva a ya sogani. Hone vhathu vha thoma u mu ṱoḓa, musi vho mu wana vha si tsha tenda a tshi ṱuwa." 
Luke4:43 Ene a vha vhudza a ri, “Ndo fanela u ya nda funza mafhungo maḓifha a muvhuso wa Mudzimu na kha miṅwe miḓi, vhunga zwi zwone zwe Mudzimu a nthumela zwone.”" 
Luke4:44 Ndi hone a tshi ya u funza sinagogoni dza Judia. 
Luke5:1 Ḽiṅwe ḓuvha Yesu ó ima khunzikhunzini ya Dzivha ḽa Genesaretha, vhathu vha ḓa vha tshi tou pwanyeledzana vha tshi fhenḓa nḓila uri vha pfe ipfi ḽa Mudzimu." 
Luke5:2 A tshi lavhelesa a vhona zwikepe zwivhili zwo imiswa henefho khunzikhunzini, vharei vha khovhe vha tshee vho ya u bvisa tshika kha mambule avho." 
Luke5:3 Tshiṅwe tsha zwenezwo zwikepe tsho vha tshi tsha Simoni; Yesu a dzhena khatsho a mu humbela uri a ri sendelinyana vhukati ha dzivha. Ndi hone a tshi thoma u funza vhathu o dzula tshikepeni. 
Luke5:4 Yesu o no fhedza a amba na Simoni a ri, “Edzonu sendedza itshi tshikepe vhukati ha dzivha ni farisane u ṱharamudza mambule uri ni kone u fasha khovhe.”" 
Luke5:5 Simoni a fhindula a ri, “Muṋe wanga, ro kakarika vhusiku hoṱhe ri si fashe tshithu, hone vhunga ho amba vhone ri a rea.”" 
Luke5:6 Vha mbo mbwandamedza mambule maḓini vha fasha khovhe nnzhi-nnzhi lwe mambule a vhuya a tou nga a sa kheruwa. 
Luke5:7 Khonani dzavho dzo vha dzi tshikepeni tshiḽa tshiṅwe. Vha mbo ḓi vha vhidza nga zwanḓa uri vha ḓe vha vha farise. Vha tshi ḓa vha ḓadza izwo zwikepe vhuvhili hazwo zwa nga zwi sa ṋupela. 
Luke5:8 Simoni ane ḽiṅwe a pfi Pitrosi a tshi vhona zwo iteaho a mbo ḓi gwadama a losha Yesu a ri, “Kha vha nṱutshele Muṋe washu; ndi mutshinyi!”" 
Luke5:9 Simoni a tshi ralo ndi nge ene na vhoṱhe vhe a vha e navho vha akhamala vha tshi vhona uri vho fasha khovhe nngafhani. 
Luke5:10 Na dziḽa khonani dza Simoni, Jakopo na Johanisi vhana vha Zebedia, vha akhamala-vho. Yesu a konou amba na Simoni a ri, “Ni songo ofha, u bva ṋamusi ni vho ḓo vha vhafashi vha vhathu.”" 
Luke5:11 Vhone vha ri u bvisela zwikepe zwavho khunzikhunzini vha ṱutshela zwoṱhe vha vha vhafunziwa vhawe. 
Luke5:12 Ḽiṅwe ḓuvha Yesu o vha e kha muṅwe muḓi he ha vha hu na muṅwe munna a lwalaho vhulwadze ha lukanda vhu kumadzaho, ho no tou phapha muvhili woṱhe. Onoyo a tshi vhona Yesu, a gwadama a losha, a mu humbela a ri, “Muṋe wanga, hufha vhe na maanḓa a u mphodza; a thi fhodzwi-vho?”" 
Luke5:13 Yesu a isa tshanḓa tshawe, a mu kwama a ri, “Ndi zwone, fholani!” A mbo ḓi fhola na zwenezwo." 
Luke5:14 Yesu a konou mu laya a ri, “Ni songo vhuya na zwi vhudza muthu, ni mbo ḓi ya ha tshifhe uri a ni vhone, ni konou ṋekedza tshipfumelo tsho laedzwaho nga Mushe, vhu vhe vhuṱanzi ha u vha rovhedza.”" 
Luke5:15 Hone bvumo ḽa Yesu ḽa ḓi hula ḽi tshi ya, vhathu vhanzhi-vhanzhi vha ḓa u mu thetshelesa na u fhodzwa malwadze avho." 
Luke5:16 Hone Ene o vha a tshi ḓi ita a tshi ṋenga a yo rabela sogani. 
Luke5:17 Ḽiṅwe ḓuvha Yesu a tshi khou funza, Muṋe washu a mu ṋea maanḓa mahulu a u fhodza vhathu. Henefho ho vha ho dzula vhaṅwe Vhafarisei na vhaḓivhi vha Mulayo vha bvaho miḓini yoṱhe ya Galelia na Judia na Jerusalema." 
Luke5:18 Ha ḓa vhaṅwe vhanna vho hwala munna o omaho miraḓo nga hingo, vha edzisa u mu dzhenisa nḓuni uri vha mu vhee phanḓa ha Yesu." 
Luke5:19 Hone nga u ḓalesa ha vhathu vha kundwa nḓila ya u mu dzhenisa ngayo; ndi zwe vha vho tou mu hwalela nṱha ha ṱhanga, vha phula buli kha zwilethi zwo fulelaho vha mu tsisela vhukati ha vhathu phanḓa ha Yesu e kha hingo." 
Luke5:20 Yesu a tshi vhona fulufhelo ḽavho a vhudza uyo munna o omaho miraḓo a ri, “Wa hashu, no hangwelwa vhutshinyi haṋu.”" 
Luke5:21 Vhaḓivhi vha Mulayo na Vhafarisei vha elekanya vha ri, “Nṋa ndi muthu-ḓe onoyu ane a tamba nga dzina ḽa Mudzimu? Ndi nnyi ane a kona u hangwela muthu vhutshinyi arali e si Mudzimu fhedzi?”" 
Luke5:22 Yesu nga u ḓivha zwine vha elekanya, a amba navho a ri, “Khezwi ni tshi humbula zwithu zwo raloho?" 
Luke5:23 Tshi sa konḓi kha izwi zwivhili ndi tshifhio? Ndi u ri, ‘No hangwelwa vhutshinyi haṋu’ kana ndi u ri, ‘Takuwani ni tshimbile’?" 
Luke5:24 Hone Nṋe ndi ḓo ni sumbedza uri Mubebwanga-muthu u na maanḓa fhano fhasi a u hangwela muthu vhutshinyi.” Ndi hone a tshi vhudza uyo munna o omaho miraḓo a ri, “Takuwani zwaṋu ni hwale hingo ḽaṋu ni ye hayani.”" 
Luke5:25 Uyo munna a mbo ḓi takuwa vhathu vhoṱhe vha tshi zwi vhona, a doba hingo ḽe a vha o lala khaḽo, a ya hayani a tshi khou renda Mudzimu." 
Luke5:26 Vhathu vhoṱhe vha akhamala vha renda Mudzimu, vha dzhenwa nga nyofho, vha amba nga tshavho vha ri, “Ṋamusi ro vhona zwi sa athu vhonwa!”" 
Luke5:27 Yesu a tshi ṱuwa henefho a vhona muṅwe muthelisi we a vha a tshi pfi Livi o dzula ofisini yawe. Yesu a amba nae a ri, “Kha ri ṱuwe roṱhe ni vhe mufunziwa wanga.”" 
Luke5:28 Livi a takuwa a sia zwoṱhe a mu tevhela. 
Luke5:29 Ndi hone Livi a tshi itela Yesu tshimima tshihulu nḓuni yawe, ha ḓa na vhaṅwe vhathelisi vhanzhi-vhanzhi khathihi na vhaṅwe vhathu, vha ḽa navho." 
Luke5:30 Vhaṅwe Vhafarisei na vhaḓivhi vha Mulayo vha tshigwada tshavho vha thoma u gungulela vhafunziwa vhawe vha ri, “Khezwi ni tshi ḽa na u nwa na vhathelisi na vhatshinyi?”" 
Luke5:31 Yesu a konou vha fhindula a ri, “Vhathu vha sa lwali a vha lili ṅanga; ṅanga i lilwa nga vhalwadze." 
Luke5:32 Nṋe a tho ngo ḓela vhavhuya, ndo ḓela vhatshinyi uri vha laṱe vhuvhi havho.”" 
Luke5:33 Vhone vha amba nae vha ri, “Vhafunziwa vha Johanisi vha ṱolou ḓidzima na u rabela, na vha Vhafarisei vha ḓi ita nga u ralo; zwino vhavho vho tou ita hani vhane tshavho ha sokou vha u ḽa na u nwa?”" 
Luke5:34 Yesu a fhindula a ri, “Nṋa ni vhona unga ni nga dzivhisa khonani dza mukwasha u ḽa zwiḽiwa munyanyani naa? Hufha mukwasha a tshee navho." 
Luke5:35 Hone ḓuvha ḽi ḓo ḓa ḽine vha ḓo dzhielwa mukwasha wavho, ndi hone vha tshi ḓo ḓidzima.”" 
Luke5:36 Yesu a vha vhudza na hetshi tshifanyiso, “A hu na muthu ane a kherula tshihaswa kha tshiambaro tshiswa a haswa nguvho ya kale ngatsho. A ralo u ḓo vha o sokou tshinya itsho tshiambaro ngeno sila ḽiswa na nguvho ya kale zwi sa vhuyi zwa tendelana." 
Luke5:37 Nahone tuvhu ḽa waini a ḽi sheliwi mikhwamani ya mukumba wa kale, nga u ofha uri mikhwama i nga balea musi ḽi tshi vhila, waini ya shuluwa, na mikhwama ya tshinyala." 
Luke5:38 Tuvhu ḽi shelwa mikhwamani miswa! 
Luke5:39 Hu ḓi nga muthu o no ḓowelaho waini ya kale, ha tsha funa ntswa; u ḓo ḓi ri, ‘Hu ḓifha ya kale!’ ”" 
Luke6:1 Ḽiṅwe ḓuvha nga Sabatha Yesu o vha a tshi khou buḓekanya vhukati ha masimu a goroi. Vhafunziwa vhawe vha thoma u ṱhukhula-ṱhukhula ṱhotshe dza goroi vha tshi swoṱa nga zwanḓa vha tshi ḽa. 
Luke6:2 Ndi hone vhaṅwe Vhafarisei vha tshi vhudzisa vha ri, “Khezwi ni tshi ita zwine zwa lwa na mulayo wa Sabatha?”" 
Luke6:3 Yesu a tshi fhindula a ri, “Kani-ha a ni athu vhala zwiḽa zwa musi Dafita na khonani dzawe vho farwa nga nḓala?" 
Luke6:4 Ndi amba zwiḽa zwa musi a tshi dzhena nḓuni ya Mudzimu a dzhia vhurotho he ha vha ho no sumelwa Mudzimu, ngeno mulayo u sa tendi muthu a tshi ḽa musumo hoyo arali vhe si vhotshifhe fhedzi – hone vhonani zwe Dafita a ita: o ri u ḽa uho vhurotho a vhuya a ṋea na khonani dzawe.”" 
Luke6:5 U fhedza mafhungo Yesu a ri, “Mubebwa-nga-muthu na yone Sabatha ndi Ene Muṋe wayo.”" 
Luke6:6 Ḽiṅwe ḓuvha nga Sabatha Yesu a dzhena sinagogoni, a funza. Henefho ho vha hu na munna o holefhalaho tshanḓa tshauḽa." 
Luke6:7 Zwino ha vha hu na vhaṅwe vhaḓivhi vha Mulayo na Vhafarisei vhe vha vha vho dzula vho lalela Yesu uri vha vhone arali a tshi ḓo fhodza muthu nga Sabatha uri vha kone u mu hwelela. 
Luke6:8 Hone Yesu o vha a tshi ḓivha zwe vha vha vha tshi khou zwi humbula, a mbo vhidza uyo munna o holefhalaho tshanḓa a ri, “Iḓani ni ime ngeno phanḓa ha vhathu.” Uyo munna a takuwa a yo ima phanḓa." 
Luke6:9 Yesu a vha vhudzisa a ri, “Ndi zwifhio zwine mulayo wa tenda nga Sabatha? Ndi u tonda kana ndi u vhaisa naa? Ndi u tshidza muthu kana ndi u mu vhulaha?”" 
Luke6:10 A tshi ralo a vha lavhelesa vhoṱhe, a konou amba na uyo munna a ri, “Onyolosani tshanḓa tshaṋu.” Ene a mbo tshi onyolosa, tsha vhuelela ngonani." 
Luke6:11 Hone vhone vha sinyuwa lwe vha pfa na ṱhoho dzi tshi tou rema, vha thoma u luka maano a zwine vha nga ita Yesu." 
Luke6:12 Misi iyo Yesu a yo rabela thavhani, a fhedza vhusiku hoṱhe a tshi khou rabela Mudzimu." 
Luke6:13 Ḽi tshi tsha a vhidza vhafunziwa vhawe, a konou ta vha 12 a ri vha pfi vhaapostola." 
Luke6:14 Madzina a vhenevho vhaapostola vha 12 ngea: ndi Simoni (we Yesu a ri u pfi Pitrosi), na murathu wawe Andrisi, na Jakopo, na Johanisi, na Filipi, na Batholomio," 
Luke6:15 na Matiosi, na Thomasi, na Jakopo ṅwana wa Alifiosi, na Simoni a no pfi Muhali-wa-Mudzimu," 
Luke6:16 na Judasi ṅwana wa Jakopo, na Judasi Iskariote we a vho ḓo fheṱa Yesu." 
Luke6:17 Musi Yesu a tshi tsa navho thavha, a ima fhethu ho itaho mudavhi. Henefho ho vha hu na vhafunziwa vhawe vha re na tshivhalo na gogo ḽihulu ḽa vhathu, vhaṅwe vhavho vha tshi bva hoṱhe kha ḽa Judia na Jerusalema, vhaṅwe vha tshi bva thungo dza Tiro na Sidoni tsini ha lwanzhe." 
Luke6:18 Vhathu vhenevho vho vha vho ḓa u pfa Yesu a tshi funza khathihi na u fhodziwa malwadze avho. Na vhe vha vha vha tshi tambudzwa nga thuṅwa dza Saṱhane vha ḓa vha fhodzwa. 
Luke6:19 Vhathu vhoṱhe vho vha vha tshi tama uri vha mu kwame, ngauri khae ho vha hu tshi bva maanḓa e a vha fhodza vhoṱhe." 
Luke6:20 Yesu a lavhelesa vhafunziwa vhawe a ri, “Mashudu inwi ni si na tshaṋu; muvhuso wa Mudzimu ndi waṋu!" 
Luke6:21 Mashudu inwi ni na nḓala; ni ḓo fushwa! Mashudu inwi ni lilaho zwino; ni ḓo takala! 
Luke6:22 Ni na mashudu arali vhathu vha tshi ni vhenga, vha tshi ni landula, vha tshi ni sema, vha tshi ni shata tshika nge na vha vha Mubebwa-nga-muthu!" 
Luke6:23 “Zwi tshi ralo inwi ni takale ni pembele ngauri ngei ṱaḓulu ni ḓo wana pfufho khulu. Hufha na vhaporofita vhomakhulukuku wavho vho ḓi vha ita zwenezwo! 
Luke6:24 “Hone ni ḓo zwi vhona inwi no pfumaho zwino, ngauri no no ḓi ḓiphiṋa kale!" 
Luke6:25 Ni ḓo zwi vhona inwi vhane zwino na ḽa na fura; ni ḓo fa nga nḓala! Ni ḓo zwi vhona inwi ni takalaho zwino; ni ḓo lila na tou honḓa! 
Luke6:26 Ni ḓo zwi vhona inwi ni khoḓwaho nga vhathu vhoṱhe; na vhomakhulukuku wavho vho ḓi khoḓa vhaporofita vha khole-khole nga u ralo.” 
Luke6:27 “Ndi vhudza inwi vhathetshelesi ndi ri: “Funani maswina aṋu, tondani vha ni vhengaho," 
Luke6:28 shudufhadzani vha ni teketelaho, ni rabelele vha ni tambudzaho." 
Luke6:29 “Arali muthu a ni rwa nga mpama, mu ṋekedzeni na luṅwe luṱaha; arali muthu a ni dzhiela badzhi yaṋu, mu litsheni a dzhie na hemmbe." 
Luke6:30 Arali muthu a ni humbela tshithu ni mu ṋee, muthu a dzhia tshithu tshaṋu ni songo tsha tshi vhila." 
Luke6:31 Zwine na funa vhaṅwe vha tshi ni ita, na inwi ni vha ite-vho zwenezwo." 
Luke6:32 Arali ni tshi funa vha ni funaho fhedzi, ni tshee no fanela u pfufhiwa shuu? Hufha na vhatshinyi vha tshi ḓi funa vha vha funaho-vho!" 
Luke6:33 Arali na tevhedza ḽa uri mutondi u tonda mutondi ngae, ni tshee no fanela u pfufhiwa shuu? Hufha na vhatshinyi vha tshi ḓi ralo-vho?" 
Luke6:34 Arali ni tshi hadzima avho fhedzi vhane na ḓivha uri vha ḓo lifha, ni tshee no fanela u pfufhiwa shuu? Hufha na vhatshinyi vha tshi ḓi hadzimana nga u ḓivha uri vha ḓo ḓi dovha vha lifhelana!" 
Luke6:35 Inwi funani maswina aṋu. Musi ni tshi tonda vhathu kana ni tshi vha hadzima tshithu ni songo ima kha ḽa uri u fha ndi u fhahea; tenda Mudzimu a tshi ḓo ni ṋea pfufho khulu; ni ḓo tou vha vhana vha Waṱaḓuluṱaḓulu; hufha Ene a tshi ḓi tonda na vha sa livhuhi na vhavhi. 
Luke6:36 Na inwi khathutshelanani unga Khotsi aṋu a tshi ni khathutshela. 
Luke6:37 “Ni songo haṱula vhaṅwe, ndi hone Mudzimu a sa nga ni haṱuli; ni songo laṱa vhaṅwe, ndi hone Mudzimu a sa nga ni laṱi; hangwelani vhaṅwe, ndi hone Mudzimu a tshi ḓo ni hangwela." 
Luke6:38 Ṋeani vhaṅwe, ndi hone Mudzimu a tshi ḓo ni ṋea-vho; u ḓo ni ṋea muelo wo ḓalaho, o u sungusedza a u gadela wa ita muṱumba a konou ni ṋea. Muelo une na elela vhaṅwe ngawo na inwi Mudzimu u ḓo ni elela ngawo.”" 
Luke6:39 Ndi hone Yesu a tshi vha fanyisedzela a ri, “Hu na bofu ḽine ḽa nga sumbedza ḽiṅwe nḓila vhuvhili havho vha sa wele dindini naa?" 
Luke6:40 Mufunziwa ha fhiri mufunzi wawe; a nga tou ri musi a tshi vuledza pfunzo dzawe, a lingana nae zwawe." 
Luke6:41 “Khezwi ni tshi kona u sedza lufhanza lu re iṱoni ḽa murathu waṋu ngeno danda ḽi re iṱoni ḽaṋu ni sa ḽi londi? 
Luke6:42 Nṋa u nga amba hani na murathu wau wa ri, ‘Murathu, litshani ndi ṱomole lufhanza lu re iṱoni ḽaṋu,’ ngeno danda ḽi re iṱoni ḽau u sa ḽi londi? Ṋowa ndi iwe! Thoma u bvisa danda ḽi re iṱoni ḽau, ndi hone u tshi ḓo kona u vhona zwavhuḓi u tshi ṱomola lufhanza lu re iṱoni ḽa murathu wau." 
Luke6:43 “Muri wavhuḓi a u aṋwi mitshelo i vhavhaho; zwi ḓi nga muri u vhavhaho u sa aṋwi mitshelo i ḓifhaho. 
Luke6:44 Muri muṅwe na muṅwe ri u ḓivha nga mitshelo yawo; kani-ha mahuyu ni a fula kha muunga? Nḓirivhe dzi a fulwa kha luanakha kani? 
Luke6:45 Muthu muvhuya u bvisa zwithu zwivhuya zwi re tshisikuni tsha mbilu yawe, na muthu muvhi u ḓi bvisa-vho zwithu zwivhi zwi re tshisikuni tsha mbilu yawe. Tshe mulomo wa amba ndi tshe mbilu ya amba." 
Luke6:46 “Khezwi ni tshi ri ni tshi amba na Nṋe na sokou ri ‘Muṋe washu! Muṋe washu!’ ngeno ni sa iti zwine nda amba? 
Luke6:47 Muṅwe na muṅwe ane a ri u ḓa kha Nṋe a pfa zwine nda amba, a ya a zwi ita, ndi ḓo ni vhudza uri u fana na nnyi:" 
Luke6:48 U fana na muthu we a ri a tshi fhaṱa nnḓu a tou bwa vhukuma a tea kha lutombo. Mulambo wa ḓa wo ḓala wo tou pha, wa thudza iḽa nnḓu, fhedzi i sa vhuye ya dzinginyea, vhunga yo fhaṱwa ya khwaṱha." 
Luke6:49 Hone ane a ri u pfa zwine nda amba a si zwi ite, u fana na muthu ane a sokou fhaṱa nnḓu kha muṱavha a songo bwa na muteo; musi mulambo u tshi ḓa wo ḓala wa i thudza ya mbo ḓi fhasi huru.”" 
Luke7:1 Musi Yesu o fhedza u vhudza vhathu mafhungo ayo oṱhe, a fhirela Kapernaumi." 
Luke7:2 Henefho ho vha hu na mulangagomane wa Muroma, we a vha e na phuli ye a vha a tshi i takalela tshoṱhe. Yeneyo phuli yo vha i tshi khou lwala, u fa na u sa fa tshi tshithu tshithihi." 
Luke7:3 Musi mulangagomane a tshi tou pfa nga Yesu, a ruma vhaṅwe vhahulwane vha Majuda uri vha mu humbele a ḓe a fhodze phuli yawe." 
Luke7:4 Avho vhaḓinḓa vha tshi swika ha Yesu, vha mu humbela nga zwanḓa zwivhili vha ri, “Vhafunzi, hoyu muthu zwo mu fanela vha tshi mu farisa;" 
Luke7:5 u funa lushaka lwa hashu; na sinagogo yashu ndi ene o ri fhaṱelaho nga tshelede yawe.” 
Luke7:6 Yesu a huma navho; hone musi a tshi tou swika tsini ha muḓi, mulangagomane a rumela khonani dzawe na ipfi ḽi no ri, “Hu pfi Muṋe wanga a songo tsha ṱolou ḓinetisa, ngauri a tho ngo vhuya nda fanela na u mu swielela nḓuni yanga." 
Luke7:7 Ndi zwe na u ḓa khae nda vhona zwi songo vhuya zwa mpfanela. Kha a sokou amba ipfi ḽithihi fhedzi; phuli yanga i ḓo fhola. 
Luke7:8 Ndi amba ngauri nṋe ndi fhano ndi muthu a langwaho, hone ndi ḓi vha-vho na maswole ane nda a langa. Nda vhudza uno nda ri, ‘Ṱuwa!’ u a ṱuwa; nda vhudza uḽa nda ri, ‘Iḓa!’ u a ḓa; phuli yanga nda i vhudza nda ri, ‘Ita hetshi!’ i a ita.”" 
Luke7:9 Yesu a tshi pfa zwenezwo a kanuka, a rembuluwa a lavhelesa gogo ḽi khou mu tevhelaho a ri, “Ndi a ni vhudza ndi ri, na kha lushaka lwa Israele a thi athu ṱangana na muthu a re na lutendo lungafha.”" 
Luke7:10 Avho vhaḓinḓa vha tshi humela hayani vha wana iḽa phuli yo fhola. 
Luke7:11 Nga matshelo Yesu a ya muḓini wa Naini e na vhafunziwa vhawe na gogo ḽihulu. 
Luke7:12 Musi a tshi swika khoroni a ṱangana na vhathu vho hwala tshitumbu tsha muṱhannga we a vha e ene ṅwana muthihi fhedzi wa mme awe wa tshilikadzi, vho tangiwa nga vhathu vhanzhi vha henefho muḓini." 
Luke7:13 Musi Muṋe washu a tshi vhona tshilikadzi iyo a khathuwa mbilu, a amba nae a ri, “Ni songo lila.”" 
Luke7:14 A sendela a fara hingo ḽa mufu, vhahwali vhaḽo vha ima. Ndi hone a tshi amba na mufu a ri, “Muṱhannga, ndi ri vuwani!”" 
Luke7:15 Mufu a mbo ḓi vuwa a dzula, a thoma u amba. Yesu a mu kumedza mme awe." 
Luke7:16 Vhathu vhoṱhe vha farwa nga nyofho, vha khoḓa Mudzimu vha ri, “Ho bvelela muporofita muhulu kha riṋe; Mudzimu o vhavhalela vhathu vhawe!”" 
Luke7:17 Zwenezwo zwe Yesu a ita zwa pfala shangoni ḽoṱhe ḽa Judia zwa swika na mashangoni oṱhe o ṋekanaho masakha naḽo. 
Luke7:18 Zwino na Johanisi vhafunziwa vhawe vha mu vhudza-vho zwe Yesu a ita. Ndi hone ene a tshi vhidza vhavhili vhavho," 
Luke7:19 a vha ruma ha Muṋe washu uri vha vhudzise vha ri, “Nṋa ndi vhone vhe vha pfi vha ḓo ḓa kana ri ḓi lindela muṅwe zwashu?”" 
Luke7:20 Vhaḽa vhaḓinḓa vha tshi swika ha Yesu vha ri, “Vhafunzi, Johanisi Mulovhedzi o ri ruma khavho uri ri vhudzise arali vhe vhone vhe vha pfi vha ḓo ḓa, uri arali zwi songo ralo ri lindele muṅwe zwashu.”" 
Luke7:21 Zwenezwo Yesu o vha a tshi khou fhodza vhathu vhanzhi vha sa ḓipfi zwavhuḓi na vha tambudzwaho nga malwadze, a tshi pandela na thuṅwa dza Saṱhane kha vhanzhi, na u swingulusa mabofu manzhi." 
Luke7:22 Ndi hone a tshi fhindula avho vhaḓinḓa a ri, “Iyani ni vhudze Johanisi zwe na tou vhona nga aṋu maṱo na zwe na tou pfa nga dzaṋu nḓevhe: mabofu a vho vhona; zwihole zwi vho tshimbila; vha lwalaho malwadze a lukanda a kumadzaho vha khou fhodzwa; madzinganḓevhe a vho pfa; vhafu vha khou vuswa; vha si na tshavho vha khou funzwa mafhungo maḓifha." 
Luke7:23 U na mashudu ane a sa gunee.” 
Luke7:24 Vhaḓinḓa vha Johanisi vho no ṱuwa, Yesu a thoma u amba na vhathu nga Johanisi a ri, “No vha no yo vhona mini sogani? No vha no yo vhona luṱanga lu dzinginyiswaho nga muya naa?" 
Luke7:25 Ndi ri no vha no yo vhona mini? No vha no yo vhona muthu o ambaraho nguvho dza maṱeleṱele naa? Atsina vhonani-ha, vha ambaraho nguvho dza u ḓiṱongisa na vha ḽaho zwiṋu vha wanala pfamoni dza mahosi." 
Luke7:26 Ndi khou ri no vha no yo vhona mini? Ho vha hu si u yo vhona muporofita naa? Ee! Nazwino Nṋe ndi ri no vha no yo vhona ane a fhira muporofita. 
Luke7:27 Maṅwalo a amba ene Johanisi a tshi ri, “ ‘Muḓinḓa wanga ngoyu-ha; ndi khou mu ruma phanḓa hau uri a u lugisele nḓila.’" 
Luke7:28 “Ndi a ni vhudza ndi ri: Kha vhathu vhoṱhe vho bebwaho nga musadzi a hu na we a vhuya a fhira Johanisi. Nangwe zwo ralo, Johanisi u fhiriwa na nga muṱukuṱuku muvhusoni wa Mudzimu.” (" 
Luke7:29 Vhathu vhoṱhe khathihi na vhathelisi vhe vha vha vho lovhedzwa nga Johanisi vha tshi zwi pfa vha tenda uri Mudzimu ha khakhi. 
Luke7:30 Hone Vhafarisei na vhaḓivhi vha Mulayo vho vha vho landula zwe Mudzimu a vha lugisela nga u hana u lovhedzwa nga Johanisi.) 
Luke7:31 Yesu a tshi isa phanḓa a ri, “Nṋa vhathu vha musalauno ndi nga vha fanyisa na mini? Vha tou nga mini naa?" 
Luke7:32 Vha tou nga vhana vhe vanḓani vha tshi khou vhidzelelana vha tshi ri, “ ‘Ro ni lidzela ṋanga, na hana u tshina! Ra ni imbela lwa lufu, na hana u lila!’" 
Luke7:33 “Ndi tshi ralo ndi uri Johanisi Mulovhedzi o ḓa, a ḓidzima, na waini a sa nwe, inwi na ri, ‘U na thuṅwa ya Saṱhane.’" 
Luke7:34 Mubebwa-nga-muthu a ḓa; Ene o vha a tshi ḽa, a tshi nwa, na dovha na ri, ‘Vhonani uyu munna – u vhupangwa, e vhudakwa, nahone a si u pfana hawe na vhathelisi na vhatshinyi.’" 
Luke7:35 Hone vhuṱali ha Mudzimu vhu vhonala uri ndi ha ngoho kha avho vhane vha vhu ṱanganedza.” 
Luke7:36 Muṅwe Mufarisei o vhuya a humbela uri Yesu a ye a ḽe nae ha hawe. Nangoho Yesu a ya nḓuni ya onoyo Mufarisei a dzula zwiḽiwani. 
Luke7:37 Henefho muḓini wonoyo ho vha hu na muṅwe musadzi we a vha a tshi tshila vhutshilo vhu nengisaho. Onoyo a tshi pfa uri Yesu u khou ḽa nḓuni ya uyo Mufarisei a ḓa na khambana ya munyaka yo ḓala tshiḓolo tsha u nukhelela 
Luke7:38 a ḓa a ima murahu ha Yesu milenzheni yawe, a thoma u lila a tshi rothisela miṱodzi yawe khayo, a i phumula nga mavhudzi awe, a ita na u i khisa a konou i ḓodza tshiḽa tshiḓolo tsha u nukhelela." 
Luke7:39 Uyo Mufarisei we a vhidza Yesu a tshi zwi vhona, a ambela mbiluni a ri, “Ngavhe hoyu muthu a vhe muporofita vhukuma o vha a tshi ḓo zwi ḓivha uri uyu musadzi ane a khou mu kwama ndi muthu-ḓe na uri vhutshilo hawe ho tou ita hani, ngauri ndi mutshinyi.”" 
Luke7:40 Yesu a mbo ḓi ri, “Vho-Simoni!” Simoni a ri, “Vhafunzi vhanga!”" 
Luke7:41 Yesu a ri, “Ho vha hu na vhaṅwe vhanna vhavhili vhe vha pamba tshelede kha muhadzimisi, muṅwe maseṱha a 500, muṅwe 50." 
Luke7:42 Vhuvhili havho vha vho kundwa u lifha. Ndi hone uyo muhadzimisi a tshi thutha milandu yavho vhoṱhe. Zwino kha avho vhavhili, ane a ḓo mu funa u fhira muṅwe ndi ufhio?”" 
Luke7:43 Simoni a fhindula a ri, “Nṋe ndi vhona unga ndi hoyo we a hangwelwa mulandu muhulwane.” Yesu a ri, “Vho amba zwone.”" 
Luke7:44 A tshi ralo a rembuluwa a sedza uyo musadzi, a amba na Simoni a ri, “Musadzi uyu vha khou mu vhona? Nṋe ndo ḓa nḓuni yavho, hone a vho ngo nṋea maḓi a u ṱamba milenzhe, hone ene o i ṱanzwa nga miṱodzi yawe, a ita na u i phumula nga mavhudzi awe." 
Luke7:45 Vhone a vho ngo nṱanganedza nga u nkuvhatedza, hone ene tshee nda swika ha litshi u khisa milenzhe yanga." 
Luke7:46 Vhone a vho ngo vhuya vha nnḓodza mapfura ṱhohoni, hone ene o ḓodza milenzhe yanga nga tshiḓolo tshi nukhelelaho." 
Luke7:47 Ndi zwine nda ri, lufuno lungafho lwe a ita lu sumbedza uri o hangwelwa vhutshinyi hawe vhunzhi-vhunzhi. Hone o hangwelwaho vhutshinyi vhuṱuku, na lufuno u sumbedza luṱuku.”" 
Luke7:48 Ndi hone Yesu a tshi vhudza uyo musadzi a ri, “No hangwelwa vhutshinyi haṋu.”" 
Luke7:49 Vhaṅwe vho dzulaho zwiḽiwani vha tshi pfa zwenezwo, vha thoma u ambela mbiluni vha ri, “Nṋa uyu ndi ene nnyi ane a nga ita na u hangwela muthu vhutshinyi?”" 
Luke7:50 Yesu Ene a vhudza uyo musadzi a ri, “Lutendo lwaṋu lwo ni tshidza; ṱuwani zwaṋu no rudza mbilu.”" 
Luke8:1 Ngavhuya Yesu a enda a tshi ḓivhadza mafhungo maḓifha a muvhuso wa Mudzimu miḓini na dziḓoroboni. O ralo e na vha 12 
Luke8:2 khathihi na vhaṅwe vhasadzi vhe a pandela thuṅwa dza Saṱhane khavho, a ita na u vha fhodza vha tshi lwala; ndi Maria Magadalina we ha vhuya ha pandelwa thuṅwa ṱhanu na mbili khae," 
Luke8:3 na Johana musadzi wa Khuza gota ḽa Herude, na Susana, ha dovha ha vha na vhaṅwe vhanzhi vhe na vhone vha vha vha tshi farisa Yesu na vhafunziwa vhawe nga thundu dzavho." 
Luke8:4 Zwenezwo Yesu a tshi khou tshimbila nga u ralo a tevhelwa nga vhathu vhanzhi muḓini muṅwe na muṅwe, vha vhuya vha tou vha gogo ḽihulu. Vhenevho Yesu a vha funza nga tshifanyiso a ri," 
Luke8:5 “Ho vhuya ha vha na muṅwe munna we a bva a tshi yo zwala mbeu. A tshi khou zwala, iṅwe ya wela nḓilani ya kandekanywa, na zwiṋoni zwa i ḽa." 
Luke8:6 Iṅwe ya wela lukwarani; musi mutomba u tshi runga, wa ṋoka nge wa shaya murongwe." 
Luke8:7 Iṅwe ya wela mipfani, zwa aluwa zwoṱhe, hone mipfa ya pwanyeledza mutomba." 
Luke8:8 Hone iṅwe mbeu ya wela mavuni avhuḓi, ya aluwa ya pakata, iṅwe na iṅwe ya vha na thoro dza ḓana.” A tshi ralo a takusa ipfi a ri, “A na nḓevhe kha a ḓipfele!”" 
Luke8:9 Vhafunziwa vha Yesu vha mu vhudzisa zwine itsho tshifanyiso tsha amba. 
Luke8:10 Ene a vha fhindula a ri, “Inwi no dzumbululelwa zwo dzumbamaho zwa muvhuso wa Mudzimu; hone kha vhaṅwe zwi tou ḓa nga zwifanyiso hu u itela uri “ ‘naho vho sedza vha si vhone; naho vho thetshelesa vha si ṱalukanye.’" 
Luke8:11 “Tshifanyiso itshi tshi amba hezwi: Mbeu ndi ipfi ḽa Mudzimu. 
Luke8:12 Yo welaho nḓilani zwi amba avho vhathu vhane vha ri vho pfa ipfi ḽa Mudzimu, Saṱhane a ḓa a tupula ipfi mbiluni dzavho uri vha sa ḓo ḽi tenda vha tshidzwa." 
Luke8:13 Yo welaho kha lukwara zwi amba avho vhane vha ri u pfa ipfi ḽa Mudzimu, vha ḽi ṱanganedza nga mbilu tshena, hone vhunga hu si na hune ḽa nga ṱoka midzi khavho, vha tou tenda tshifhinganyana; hu tshi ḓa tshifhinga tsha u lingwa nga Saṱhane vha a gunea." 
Luke8:14 Hune a tshi zwala ya wela mipfani zwi amba avho vhane vha ri vho pfa ipfi ḽa Mudzimu, zwi tshi ya phanḓa ḽa pwanyeledziwa nga u vhilaela zwa vhutshilo na lupfumo na madakalo a vhutshilo, vha si vhe na mitshelo." 
Luke8:15 Hune i tshi zwalwa ya wela mavuni avhuḓi zwi amba avho vhane vha ri u pfa ipfi ḽa Mudzimu nga mbilu nthihi yo ṱambaho, vha ḽi vhulunga vha sa fheli mbilu, vha vhuya vha aṋwa mitshelo." 
Luke8:16 “Ndi nnyi ane a ri o funga luvhone a lu tiba nga nkho kana a lu vhea fhasi ha mmbete naa? Ha lu vhei vhudzuloni halwo uri lu vhonetshele vha dzhenaho nḓuni? 
Luke8:17 A hu na tsho dzumbiwaho tshine tsha sa ḓo dzumbululwa, a hu na tshiphiri tshine tsha sa ḓo ḓivhiwa nga vhathu tsha bvela khagala." 
Luke8:18 “Sedzani-ha nḓila ine na thetshelesa ngayo: a re nazwo u ḓo dovha a engedzwa, a si na u ḓo dovha a dzhielwa na zwiṱukuṱuku zwine a ri u nazwo.”" 
Luke8:19 Zwenezwo ha swika mme a Yesu na vharathu vhawe, hone vha si kone u swika khae nga u ḓalesa ha vhathu." 
Luke8:20 Ha swika ipfi khae ḽa uri, “Mme avho na vharathu vhavho vho ima afho nnḓa vha khou ṱoḓa u amba navho.”" 
Luke8:21 Yesu a tshi fhindula a ri, “Mme anga na vharathu vhanga ndi avho vhane vha ri u pfa ipfi ḽa Mudzimu vha ita zwine ḽa amba.”" 
Luke8:22 Ḽiṅwe ḓuvha Yesu a dzhena tshikepeni na vhafunziwa vhawe, a amba navho a ri, “Nga ri wetshele seli na luḽa lwa dzivha.” Vha takuwa." 
Luke8:23 Vha tshi khou wela Yesu a farwa nga khofhe. Ha vuwa ḓumbu ḽihulu henefho dzivhani, maḓi a thoma u ḓadza tshikepe, u fa na u tshila tsha vha tshithu tshithihi." 
Luke8:24 Vhafunziwa vha ḓa vha mu vusa vha ri, “Muṋe washu! Muṋe washu! Ndi hone ro lovha!” Yesu a vuwa a kaidza ḓumbu na magabelo a vhuhali ha mbo ḓi ri ṅo, ha dzika." 
Luke8:25 Ndi hone Yesu a tshi amba navho a ri, “Lutendo lwaṋu lu ngafhi?” Hone vhone vho vha vho farwa nga nyofho na ganuko vha thoma u vhudzisana nga tshavho vha ri, “Nṋa ndi muthu-ḓe uyu ane a ri u kaidza ḓumbu na magabelo zwa mu thetshelesa?”" 
Luke8:26 Zwo no ralo vha wetshela shangoni ḽa Vhagerasini ḽo livhanaho na Galelia. 
Luke8:27 Musi Yesu a tshi tou bva tshikepeni, a ṱangana na muṅwe munna wa henefho muḓini we a vha e na thuṅwa dza Saṱhane. O vha o no ḓi vha maḓuvha a sa tsha vhuya a ambara zwiambaro, na hayani a si tsha dzula, a tshi dzula zwaloni." 
Luke8:28 A tshi vhona Yesu a zhamba, a wa nga magona phanḓa hawe, a ṱavha mukosi a ri, “Iwe Yesu Murwa wa Mudzimu wa ṱaḓuluṱaḓulu! U khou ṱoḓani kha nṋe? Ndi khou tou humbela nga zwanḓa zwivhili ndi ri u songo ntshengedza.”" 
Luke8:29 A tshi ralo ndi nge Yesu a vha o no ri thuṅwa dzi bve khae. (Lwo vha lwo no ḓi vha lunzhi thuṅwa dzi tshi ri dzo vuwa a tou lindwa o vhoxwa zwanḓa na milenzhe nga tsimbi, hone ene a dzi ṱhukhukanya, thuṅwa dza mu livhisa sogani.)" 
Luke8:30 Ndi hone Yesu a tshi mu vhudzisa a ri, “Ni pfi nnyi?” Ene a fhindula a ri, “Ndi pfi Mmbi.” A tshi ralo ndi nge thuṅwa dze dza vha dzi khae dza vha dzi nnzhi-nnzhi." 
Luke8:31 Ndi hone dzi tshi kwengweledza Yesu uri a si dzi thathele dindini. 
Luke8:32 Zwino henefho ho vha hu na sambi ḽihulu ḽa nguluvhe dzi tshi khou fundudza-fundudza bamani. Thuṅwa dza kwengweledza Yesu uri a dzi tendele dzi dzhene zwadzo kha idzo nguluvhe. Ene a dzi tendela. 
Luke8:33 Ndi hone dzi tshi mbo ḓi bva kha uyo munna dza dzhena kha nguluvhe, sambi ḽoṱhe ḽa mbo ḓi livha luwani, ḽa godimela dzivhani, ḽa nwela khothe." 
Luke8:34 Vhalisa vhadzo vha tshi zwi vhona vha shavha vha yo anḓadza mafhungo ayo muḓini na mivhunduni ya henefho. 
Luke8:35 Vhathu vha bva vha tshi yo vhona zwo iteaho. Vha tshi swika kha Yesu vha vhona uḽa munna we a bviswa thuṅwa o dzula henefho tsini ha Yesu, o ambara zwiambaro nahone o no vha muthu-muthu; vha farwa nga nyofho." 
Luke8:36 Vhe vha zwi vhona vha anetshela vhaṅwe uri uḽa munna we a vha e na thuṅwa o fhodzwa hani. 
Luke8:37 Hone vhathu vhoṱhe vha shango ḽa Vhagerasini vha mbo humbela Yesu uri a ṱuwe shangoni ḽavho, ngauri vho vha vho dzhenwa nga nyofho khulu. Ene a dzhena tshikepeni uri a humele murahu." 
Luke8:38 Zwino uḽa munna we a bviswa thuṅwa a ri, “Ndo vha ndi tshi ri ndi nga ṱuwa-vho navho.” Hone Yesu a mu dzivhisa a ri," 
Luke8:39 “Humelani kha vha haṋu, ni vha vhudze uri Mudzimu o ni tonda zwingafhani.” Uyo munna a ṱuwa, a enda a tshi ḓivhadza vhoṱhe afho muḓini zwe Yesu a mu itela." 
Luke8:40 Musi Yesu a tshi humela seli vhathu vha mu ṱanganedza vhunga vho vha vho dzula vho mu lindela. 
Luke8:41 Ndi hone hu tshi ḓa muhulwane wa sinagogo, we a vha a tshi pfi Jairosi, a wa nga magona phanḓa ha Yesu a mu humbela uri a ḓe nḓuni yawe," 
Luke8:42 ngauri ṅwana wawe muthihi fhedzi o vha a tshi khou ṱoḓou fa. Onoyo ṅwana o vha e musidzana wa miṅwaha ine ya nga swika 12. Vhathu vha ṱuwa nae vha tshi tou mu pwanyeledza thungo dzoṱhe. 
Luke8:43 Zwino khavho ho vha hu na muṅwe musadzi we a vha o no fhedza miṅwaha ya 12 e na vhulwadze ha u ṱamba a sa gumi. [O vha o no tambisa tshelede yawe yoṱhe nga dziṅanga], hu si na na muthihi ane a kona u mu fhodza." 
Luke8:44 Uyo musadzi a ḓa nga murahu ha Yesu, a kwama lupendelo lwa nguvho yawe, u bva ha malofha ha mbo ḓi kaṱuwa na zwenezwo." 
Luke8:45 Yesu a vhudzisa a ri, “Ndi nnyi we a nkwama?” Vhoṱhe vha ḓilandulela. Pitrosi a ri, “Vhafunzi, hufha vho tou tangiwa nga vhathu vhanzhi-vhanzhi vha tshi khou vha pwanyeledza?”" 
Luke8:46 Hone Yesu a ri, “Hu na we a nkwama; ndo pfa maanḓa anga a tshi bva a shuma.”" 
Luke8:47 Musadzi uḽa a tshi vhona uri zwe a ita a zwo ngo dzumbama, a ḓa a tshi tou tetemela nga nyofho, a gwadama phanḓa hawe, a amba zwe a mu kwamela zwone vhathu vhoṱhe vha tshi zwi pfa; a amba na uri o mbo ḓi tou fholela henefho." 
Luke8:48 Ndi hone Yesu a tshi mu vhudza a ri, “Ṅwananga, lutendo lwaṋu lwo ni fhodza, tshimbilani zwaṋu no rudza mbilu.”" 
Luke8:49 Musi Yesu a kha ḓi tou ralo ha mbo ḓi swika muḓinḓa a bvaho muḓini wa Jairosi, a ri, “Ṅwana wavho o ri sia, vha kha ḓi ṱolou dinelani Vhafunzi?”" 
Luke8:50 Yesu a tshi pfa zwenezwo a ri, “Vha songo ofha tshithu, tshavho nga hu vhe u fulufhela Mudzimu; u ḓo vuwa.”" 
Luke8:51 Musi vha tshi swika muḓini wa Jairosi, Yesu a si tendele muṅwe muthu a tshi dzhena nae nḓuni arali vhe si Pitrosi na Johanisi na Jakopo na vhone khotsi na mme a ṅwana." 
Luke8:52 A wana vhaṅwe vha tshi khou lila vha tshi ṱavha mukosi. Ene a amba navho a ri, “Fhumulani; ho ngo fa o tou eḓela.”" 
Luke8:53 Hone vhone vha thoma u mu nzhonzhowedza, ngauri vho vha vha tshi zwi ḓivha uri o fa." 
Luke8:54 Yesu a mu fara nga tshanḓa a ri, “Musidzana, ndi ri vuwa!”" 
Luke8:55 Muya wawe wa vhuya khae, a mbo ḓi vuwa na zwenezwo. Yesu a konou vha vhudza uri vha mu fhe zwiḽiwa." 
Luke8:56 Vhabebi vhawe vha akhamala. Yesu a vha laya a ri, “Vha songo vhuya vha zwi vhudza muthu.”" 
Luke9:1 Yesu a kuvhanganya vha 12 a vha fha maanḓa, a vha tendela u pandela thuṅwa dzoṱhe dza Saṱhane na u fhodza malwadze." 
Luke9:2 Ndi hone a tshi vha ruma u yo ḓivhadza a muvhuso wa Mudzimu na u fhodza vhalwadze," 
Luke9:3 a amba navho a ri, “Ni songo vhuya na ṱuwa na tshithu musi ni tshi fara lwendo, naho lu lubaḓa kana u mukhwama wa u fara thundu, kana zwiḽiwa kana tshelede; na hemmbe dzi songo swika mbili." 
Luke9:4 Na dzhena muṱani ni dzule henefho he na swielelwa ni vhuye ni fhirele phanḓa. 
Luke9:5 Arali ni tshi dzhena huṅwe vha si ni takalele, ni mbo ḓi ṱutshela muḓi uyo, ni ite na u fhufhura buse ḽi re milenzheni yaṋu, uri vhu vhe vhuṱanzi ha uri zwi kha vhone.”" 
Luke9:6 Ndi hone vhafunziwa vha tshi takuwa, vha buḓekanya miḓi vha tshi funza mafhungo maḓifha na u fhodza vhalwadze." 
Luke9:7 Haya mafhungo oṱhe o ḓo swika-vho na kha khosi Herude, hone a tou mu ḓaḓisa nge vhaṅwe vhathu vha vha vha tshi ri, “Ndi Johanisi Mulovhedzi we a vha o fa, zwino o vuwa!”" 
Luke9:8 Vhaṅwe nga fhaḽa vha ri, “Ndi Elia, o vhuya,” vhaṅwe-vho vha ri, “Ndi muṅwe wa vhaporofita vha misi iḽa ya kale, o vuwa.”" 
Luke9:9 Herude a ri, “Hufha Johanisi ndo mu tumula ṱhoho, zwino uyu ane nda vho pfa a tshi ambiwa ndi nnyi?” Ndi hone a tshi thoma u ṱoḓa nḓila ya u vhonana na Yesu." 
Luke9:10 Vhaḽa vhaapostola vha tshi vhuya, vha anetshela Yesu zwoṱhe zwe vha ita. A ṱuwa navho vhe nga tshavho vha livha muḓini u no pfi Betsaida." 
Luke9:11 Vhathu vhone vha ri u zwi pfa vha mu tevhela. Ene a vha ṱanganedza a vha vhudza mafhungo a muvhuso wa Mudzimu, a ita na u fhodza vha lwalaho." 
Luke9:12 Musi ḽi tshi vho kovhela vha 12 vha ḓa khae vha ri, “Kha vha vhofholole vhathu vha yo ḓiṱodela madzulo na zwiḽiwa miḓini na miḓanani ya fhano tsini, ngauri afha ri sogani.”" 
Luke9:13 Yesu a fhindula a ri, “Vha ṋeeni zwiḽiwa inwi vhaṋe.” Hone vhone vha fhindula vha ri, “Ri tou vha na mikonde miṱanu fhedzi ya vhurotho na khovhe mbili! Kani vha ṱoḓa ri tshi yo rengela mavhuthu enea oṱhe zwiḽiwa?”" 
Luke9:14 (Henefho ho vha hu na vhathu vhane vha nga vha 5 000 hu tshi vhaliwa vhanna fhedzi.) Ndi hone Yesu a tshi vhudza vhafunziwa vhawe a ri, “Dzudzani vhathu nga zwigwada-zwigwada zwa vhathu vha 50 tshiṅwe na tshiṅwe.”" 
Luke9:15 Vha ita nga u ralo, vha dzudza vhathu vhoṱhe fhasi." 
Luke9:16 Yesu a dzhia iḽa mikonde miṱanu na khovhe mbili, a lilala a zwi shudufhadza, a thoma u zwi ṅwatekanya a tshi fha vhafunziwa uri vha kovhele vhathu." 
Luke9:17 Vhoṱhe vha ḽa vha fura, ha vhuya ha sala zwipeḓu zwe vhafunziwa vha tshi zwi dobela zwa ḓadza mifaro ya 12." 
Luke9:18 Ḽiṅwe ḓuvha Yesu a tshi khou rabela e eṱhe, na vhafunziwa vhawe vhe henefho, a vha vhudzisa a ri, “Nṋa vhathu vha tshi nnyamba vha ri ndi Nṋe nnyi?”" 
Luke9:19 Vhone vha fhindula vha ri, “Vha ri vha Johanisi Mulovhedzi; vhaṅwe vha ri vha Elia; hafhu hu ḓi dovha ha vha na vhaṅwe vhane vha ri vha muṅwe wa vhaporofita vha misi iḽa ya kale we a vha o fa; o vuwa!”" 
Luke9:20 Yesu a konou vha vhudzisa a ri, “Inwi-ha ni ri mini? Ni ri ndi Nṋe nnyi?” Ha fhindula Pitrosi a ri, “Vha Mesia wa Mudzimu!”" 
Luke9:21 Yesu a vha laya a tou ombedzela uri vha songo vhuya vha zwi vhudza muthu," 
Luke9:22 a konou ri, “Mubebwa-nga-muthu o fanela u tambudzwa zwihulu, a landulwa nga vhahulwane vha lushaka na nga vhotshifhe vhahulwane na nga vhaḓivhi vha Mulayo, a vhulawa, a vuswa vhafuni nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuraru.”" 
Luke9:23 Ndi hone Yesu a tshi amba na vhathu vhoṱhe a ri, “Arali muthu a tshi funa u vha mufunziwa wanga, tshawe nga a ḓihangwe, ḓuvha ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe a ḓi hwala tshifhambano tshawe, a ntevhele." 
Luke9:24 Muthu ane a teledza u ṅaledza vhutshilo hawe u a ḓilozwa, hone ane a ḓo fela Nṋe, ndi ene ane a ḓo tshila." 
Luke9:25 “Nṋa muthu zwi ḓo mu farisani u fuwa shango ḽoṱhe, a fhedza a lovha tshoṱhe?" 
Luke9:26 Arali muthu a shona u ḓibaḓekanya na Nṋe na pfunzo yanga, Mubebwa-nga-muthu u ḓo shona u ḓibaḓekanya nae musi a tshi vhuya e kha vhugala hawe na ha Khotsi awe na ha vharuṅwa vhakhethwa." 
Luke9:27 Zwino ipfani-ha: Hu na vhaṅwe henefha vhane vha sa ḓo fa vha sa athu vhona Mudzimu a tshi vhusa vhathu.” 
Luke9:28 Hó no fhela vhege Yesu ó amba ayo maipfi, a ṱuwa na Pitrosi na Johanisi na Jakopo a ya thavhani u rabela." 
Luke9:29 Musi a kha ḓi rabela, tshifhaṱuwo tshawe tsha shanduka, na zwiambaro zwawe zwa tshena lwa u tou kombodza." 
Luke9:30 Zwenezwo ha bvelela vhanna vhavhili, Mushe na Elia, vha tshi penya lu kombodzaho. Vha vhonala vha tshi khou amba na Yesu nga lwendo lwawe lune a ḓo vuledza Jerusalema hu si kale." 
Luke9:31  
Luke9:32 Zwi tshi khou ralo Pitrosi na khonani dzawe vho vha vho tou ya nga khofhe, hone vha tshi karuwa vha vhona vhugala ha Yesu, vha vhona na vhaḽa vhanna vhavhili vho imaho nae." 
Luke9:33 Musi vhaḽa vhanna vha tshi vho ṱuwa henefho, Pitrosi a amba na Yesu a ri, “Muṋe wanga, ro ita zwone ra ḓa fhano. Kha vha litshe ri fhaṱe thumba tharu; iṅwe i ḓo ha yavho, iṅwe ya vha ya Mushe, iṅwe ya Elia.” A ralo a sa ḓivhi tshine a amba." 
Luke9:34 Musi a tshi kha ḓi amba, ha mbo alama gole ḽa vha tibedza nga murunzi waḽo; vhafunziwa vhawe vha tou dzhenwa nga nyofho." 
Luke9:35 Ha pfala ipfi kha gole ḽa ri, “Hoyu ndi Ene Murwa wanga we nda dzula ndo mu ta – ni mu thetshelese!”" 
Luke9:36 Ipfi ḽi tshi fhumula ha vha ho no tou sala Yesu e eṱhe. Vhafunziwa misi yeneyo vha si vhuye vha vhudza na muthu na muthihi zwe vha zwi vhona. 
Luke9:37 Nga matshelo vho no tsa thavha, ha ḓa gogo ḽihulu u ṱanganedza Yesu." 
Luke9:38 Muṅwe munna henefho kha gogo a ṱavha mukosi a ri, “Vhafunzi, ndi tou vha humbela nga zwanḓa zwivhili uri vha ḓe vha vhone-vho zwi re na ṅwananga muthihi fhedzi." 
Luke9:39 Musi thuṅwa ya Saṱhane i tshi vuwa, i mu posa fhasi a tshi khou ṱavha mukosi, a rwelwa fhasi nga tshifakhole, a thoma u phukhula bulo nga mulomo, ya konou ri i tshi vho thoyoyo, ya tou ṋaṋa u mu khwiḓukanya, i sa funi u mu awedza." 
Luke9:40 Ndo humbela vhafunziwa vhavho uri vha i pandele, hone vha kundwa.”" 
Luke9:41 Yesu a tshi fhindula a amba na avho vhathu a ri, “Yowee, inwi vhathu vha musalauno, ni dinwa nga u shaya lutendo, vhadzia-u-xela! Ndi ḓo vha na inwi u swika lini? Nṋa ndi ḓo ni konḓelela u swika lini?” A konou amba na uḽa munna a ri, “Ḓisani mutukana waṋu fhano.”" 
Luke9:42 Musi mutukana a tshi tou ri u ḓa ha Yesu thuṅwa ya mu posa fhasi nga tshifakhole. Huno Yesu a kaidza iyo thuṅwa, a fhodza uyo mutukana a konou mu fha khotsi awe." 
Luke9:43 Vhathu vhoṱhe vha kanuka vha tshi vhona vhuhulu ha maanḓa a Mudzimu. Musi vhoṱhe vha tshi kha ḓi kanuka zwoṱhe zwe Yesu a ita, Ene a amba na vhafunziwa vhawe a ri," 
Luke9:44 “Ipfi ḽine nda ḓo ni vhudza zwino ni ḽi dzhenise mbiluni: Mubebwa-nga-muthu u ḓo kumedzwa zwanḓani zwa vhathu.” 
Luke9:45 Hone vhone vha si ṱalukanye zwe a amba; Mudzimu o vha o zwi dzumba vha kundwa u zwi ṱalukanya, vha dovha vha ofha na u mu vhudzisa." 
Luke9:46 Ho vhuya ha vuwa khani kha vhafunziwa vha Yesu ya uri muhulwane wavho a nga vha e nnyi. 
Luke9:47 Yesu a tshi vhona zwi re dzimbiluni dzavho a dzhia ṅwana a mu imisa phanḓa havho 
Luke9:48 a ri, “Ane a ṱanganedza uyu ṅwana a tshi itela Nṋe, u ṱanganedza Nṋe, huno ane a ṱanganedza Nṋe, u ṱanganedza na o nthumaho. Ane a ḓiita muṱukuṱuku kha noṱhe, onoyo u ḓo vha ene muhulwane.”" 
Luke9:49 Johanisi a ri, “Muṋe wanga, ro vhona muthu a tshi khou pandela thuṅwa ya Saṱhane nga dzina ḽavho, huno riṋe ra mu dzivhisa vhunga e si muṅwe nga riṋe.”" 
Luke9:50 Yesu a ri, “Ni songo vhuya na mu dzivhisa; a sa lwi na inwi u ima na inwi.”" 
Luke9:51 Musi maḓuvha a tshi vho sendela a uri Yesu a dzhiwe a ye ṱaḓulu, a ḓiimisela u ya Jerusalema." 
Luke9:52 Ndi hone a tshi ruma vhaḓinḓa vha mu ranga phanḓa uri vha dzhene kha muṅwe muḓi wa Vhasamaria vha mu lugisele zwo fanelaho. 
Luke9:53 Hone vhathu vha wonoyo muḓi vha si mu ṱanganedze, nge vha vhona uri o livha Jerusalema." 
Luke9:54 Vhafunziwa vhawe Jakopo na Johanisi vha tshi zwi vhona, vha amba nae vha ri, “Muṋe washu, khezwi vha sa ri ri vhidze mulilo u bve ṱaḓulu u ḓe u vha fhedze vhoṱhe?”" 
Luke9:55 Yesu Ene a rembuluwa a vha lavhelesa, a vha kaidza," 
Luke9:56 vha konou fhirela kha muṅwe muḓi. 
Luke9:57 Vha tshi khou fhira, muṅwe munna a amba na Yesu a ri, “Nṋe ndi ḓo vha tevhela hoṱhe hune vha ya.”" 
Luke9:58 Yesu a tshi mu fhindula a ri, “Phunguhwe dzi na milindi, na zwiṋoni zwi na zwiṱaha; Mubebwa-nga-muthu Ene ha na ha u siamedza ṱhoho a lala.”" 
Luke9:59 A tshi ṱangana na muṅwe munna a ri, “Iḓani ni vhe mufunziwa wanga.” Hone uyo a ri, “Kha vha litshe ndi thome u yo swiṱa khotsi anga.”" 
Luke9:60 Yesu a ri, “Litshani vhafu vha swiṱane. Inwi iyani u ḓivhadza zwa muvhuso wa Mudzimu.”" 
Luke9:61 Muṅwe-vho a ri, “Nṋe ndi ḓo ṱuwa navho Vhafunzi, hone kha vha litshe ndi thome u yo onesana na vha hashu.”" 
Luke9:62 Yesu a mu vhudza a ri, “Ane a ri o fara dzembe ḽa phulu a ḓi dzula o lavhelesa murahu, ha na tshine a nga shuma muvhusoni wa Mudzimu.”" 
Luke10:1 Ndi hone Muṋe washu a tshi ta vhaṅwe vha 72, a vha ruma nga vhavhili-vhavhili uri vha mu range phanḓa, vha ye miḓini yoṱhe na hoṱhe he a vha a tshi khou ṱoḓa u ya hone." 
Luke10:2 A amba navho a ri, “Zwikaṋwa ndi zwinzhi, hone vhakaṋi ndi vha si gathi. Humbelani-ha Muṋe wa tsimu uri a rume vhashumi masimuni awe." 
Luke10:3 Tshimbilani; tshi re hone ndi a ni ruma zwa nga muthu a tshi khadela ngwana vhukati ha maṱalerwa. 
Luke10:4 “Ni songo vhuya na fara tshipatshi tsha tshelede naho u mukhwama kana navhula zwadzo; nahone ni songo fhedza tshifhinga nga u resha muthu nḓilani. 
Luke10:5 Muṱani muṅwe hune na dzhena ni thome nga u ri, ‘Mulalo!’" 
Luke10:6 Arali henefho hu na mudziamulalo, u resha haṋu hu ḓo mu ḓisela mulalo; arali muthu o raloho a siho, mulalo u ḓo humela kha inwi vhaṋe." 
Luke10:7 Ni dzule henefho muṱani wonoyo, ni ḽe ni nwe zwenezwo zwine vha ni ṋea; mushumi o fanela u ṋewa malamba awe. Ni songo fhiruludza na bva khawo na ya kha muṅwe." 
Luke10:8 Arali na ri ni tshi dzhena muḓini vhathu vha henefho vha ni ṱanganedza, ni ḽe zwine vha ni avhela;" 
Luke10:9 ni fhodze na vhalwadze vhane vha vha henefho, ni konou vha vhudza ni ri, ‘Zwino ndi hone tshifhinga tsho sendela tsha uri ni vhuswe nga Mudzimu.’" 
Luke10:10 Arali na ri ni tshi dzhena muḓini vhathu vha henefho vha si ni ṱanganedze, ni bvele nnḓa zwiṱaraṱani ni ri," 
Luke10:11 ‘Ri khou tou fhufhura na buse ḽa muḓini wa haṋu ḽi re kha milenzhe yashu uri ni vhone uri zwi kha inwi; hone ni zwi ḓivhe uri muvhuso wa Mudzimu wo no tou vha tsini-tsini!’ 
Luke10:12 A vha Nṋe ndi ri nga ḓuvha ḽa khaṱhulo ṱhamu ine Mudzimu a ḓo rwa ngayo uyo muḓi i ḓo vhavha u fhira na i no ḓo rwa Sodoma. 
Luke10:13 “U ḓo zwi vhona iwe Khorazini! U ḓo zwi vhona iwe Betsaida! Ngavhe maḓembe e a itwa kha inwi a vhe o itwa Tiro na Sidoni ndi musi vhathu vha iyo miḓi vha tshi ḓo vha vho no rembuluwa kale, vho vha vha tshi ḓo vha vho no ambara madzanganda, vha tshi khou ḓimbulumbudza milorani nga u ḓisola." 
Luke10:14 Nga ḓuvha ḽa khaṱhulo ṱhamu ine na ḓo rwiwa ngayo i ḓo vhavha u fhira na i no ḓo rwa Tiro na Sidoni. 
Luke10:15 Iwe-vho Kapernaumi, u vhona unga u ḓo huliswa wa swika makoleni naa? Matsina zwiḽa, u ḓo tou tsiselwa fhasi-fhasi dindini.”" 
Luke10:16 A dovha a amba na vhafunziwa vhawe a ri, “Ane a thetshelesa inwi u thetshelesa Nṋe; hone ane a ni landula u landula Nṋe; huno uyo ane a landula Nṋe u landula o nthumaho.”" 
Luke10:17 Vhaḽa vha 72 vha vhuya vho tou takala, vha ri, “Muṋe washu, thuṅwa dza Saṱhane na dzone dzi a ri pfa musi ri tshi dzi kaidza nga dzina ḽavho.”" 
Luke10:18 Yesu a konou amba navho a ri, “Ndo vhona Saṱhane a tshi wa unga nḓadzi i tshi bva makoleni." 
Luke10:19 Inwi ndo ni fha maanḓa a u kandekanya dziṋowa na dziphame, na u kunda maanḓa oṱhe a swina, hu si vhe na tshine tsha ni ita tshithu." 
Luke10:20 Tshi re hone ni songo sokou takadzwa nga u kona u pandela thuṅwa dza Saṱhane, takalani nge madzina aṋu a ṅwalwa ṱaḓulu.”" 
Luke10:21 Zwenezwo a amba o ḓadzwa dakalo nga Muya Mukhethwa, a ri, “Ndi a u renda Khotsi, Iwe Muṋe wa ḽiṱaḓulu na ḽifhasi, ngauri hezwi zwithu wo zwi dzumbela vho funzwaho na vha vhuṱali wa zwi dzumbululela vhaṱoma. Iina Khotsi, iṱali wo vha wo ḓi zwi funa nga u ralo." 
Luke10:22 “Zwithu zwoṱhe Khotsi anga o zwi kumedza Nṋe; a hu na ane a ḓivha Murwa arali e si Khotsi; nahone a hu na ane a ḓivha Khotsi arali e si Murwa, na onoyo ane Ene Murwa a takalela u mu dzumbululela.”" 
Luke10:23 Ndi hone a tshi rembuluwa a lavhelesa vhafunziwa vhawe a ri, “Vha na mashudu vhe vha vhona nga maṱo zwine inwi na zwi vhona." 
Luke10:24 Ndi vhaporofita vhanzhi na mahosi manzhi o tamaho u vhona zwine inwi na zwi vhona, hone vha kundwa; na zwine na zwi pfa vho ḓi funa u zwi pfa, hone vha kundwa.”" 
Luke10:25 Ha mbo takuwa muṅwe muḓivhi wa Mulayo a mu vhudzisa hu u mu linga a ri, “Vhafunzi, ndi fanela u ita tshithu-ḓe uri ndi fhiwe vhutshilo vhu sa gumi?”" 
Luke10:26 Yesu a mu vhudzisa-vho a ri, “Nṋa Mulayoni ho ṅwaliwa upfi mini? Ni tshi vhala ni ri mini?”" 
Luke10:27 Uyo munna a tshi fhindula a ri, “Hu pfi, ‘Funa Muṋe washu Mudzimu wau nga mbilu yoṱhe, nga zwoṱhe zwine wa vha zwone, nga nungo dzoṱhe, nga ṱhalukanyo yoṱhe; funa wa hau unga iwe muṋe.’ ”" 
Luke10:28 Yesu a mu fhindula a ri, “Ni amba zwone. Itani zwenezwo, ndi hone ni tshi ḓo tshila.”" 
Luke10:29 Hone uyo munna a tshi ṱoḓa u ḓiṱamba, a ri, “Nṋa hone wa hanga ndi nnyi?”" 
Luke10:30 Yesu a fhindula a ri, “Muṅwe munna o vhuya a fara lwendo a tshi bva Jerusalema a tshi tsela Jerikho. Nḓilani a tshenuwa o wela zwanḓani zwa mavemu; a mu ṱangula zwiambaro, a mu rwa, a mu sia o dzidzivhala." 
Luke10:31 Zwa ṱangana na muṅwe tshifhe o fara gondo ḽeneḽo, a ri a tshi vhona yeneyo khuvhabvu, a bva nga thungo." 
Luke10:32 Muṅwe Mulivi a tshi swika-vho henefho, na ene a ri u mu vhona a ḓi fhira nga thungo." 
Luke10:33 Hone muṅwe Musamaria we a vha o fara nḓila yeneyo, a mbo ḓi ṱangana na uyo muthu. “A tshi mu vhona a khathuwa mbilu." 
Luke10:34 A ya khae a ṱanzwa mbonzhe dzawe nga waini, a dzi ḓodza mapfura a dzi pomba; a konou mu namedza kha mbelesa yawe a mu isa nḓuni ya vhaeni, a mu onga henefho." 
Luke10:35 Nga matshelo a bvisa maseṱha mavhili a ṋea muṋe wa nnḓu ya vhaeni a ri, ‘Vha sale vha tshi mu onga. Arali tshelede ya ṱahela, ndi ḓo i vhumba ndi tshi vhuya.’" 
Luke10:36 Zwino inwi ni vhona unga ri nga ri uyo o welaho zwanḓani zwa mavemu u ḓo ri wa hawe ndi ufhio kha avho vhararu?” 
Luke10:37 Muḓivhi wa Mulayo a fhindula a ri, “Ndi uyo we a mu pfela vhuṱungu.” Ndi hone Yesu a tshi ri, “Na inwi tshimbilani ni yo ita nga u ralo.”" 
Luke10:38 Musi vhe lwendoni, vha swika muḓini, muṅwe musadzi a no pfi Marita a mu swielela muṱani wa hawe." 
Luke10:39 Zwino Marita o vha e na murathu wawe a no pfi Maria. Onoyo Maria a ya a dzula milenzheni ya Muṋe washu a tshi khou thetshelesa zwine a funza. 
Luke10:40 Marita ene o vha e khakhathini ya u bikela vhaeni. A ḓa a ri, “Muṋe wanga, vha vhona zwi zwone zwenezwi zwine murathu wanga a nndaṱedza nda shuma ndi ndoṱhe? Kha vha mu vhudze a ḓe a mpfarise.”" 
Luke10:41 Muṋe washu a tshi fhindula a ri, “Nṋa zwino ndi mini Marita? Khezwi ni tshi ṱolou ḽa mbilu na u ḓidina nga zwithu zwinzhi-zwinzhi!" 
Luke10:42 Zwi ṱoḓeaho a zwi gathi, tshililelwa tshone tshi tshithihi. Hoyu Maria o nanga tshone tsha khwiṋe, ndi mukovhe une a sa ḓo vhuya a dzhielwa nga muthu.”" 
Luke11:1 Muṅwe musi Yesu o vha a tshi khou rabela huṅwe fhethu. Musi o no fhedza, muṅwe wa vhafunziwa vhawe a mu humbela a ri, “Muṋe washu, nga vha ri funze u rabela, u ḓi nga na Johanisi o funza vhafunziwa vhawe.”" 
Luke11:2 Yesu a ri, “Ni tshi rabela ni tou ri, “ ‘Khotsi, dzina ḽau kha ḽi vhe ḽikhethwa, hu vhuse Iwe." 
Luke11:3 U ḓi ri fha vhuswa ha ḓuvha ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe. 
Luke11:4 U ri hangwele vhutshinyi hashu, vhunga na riṋe ri tshi hangwela vha ri khakhelaho. U si tende ri tshi ungiwa nga Muvhi.’ ”" 
Luke11:5 A konou amba navho a ri, “Nṋa arali muṅwe waṋu a nga ya ha khonani yawe vhukati ha vhusiku a ri, ‘Khonani yanga, ndi khou humbela u fariswa nga mikonde miraru ya vhurotho;" 
Luke11:6 ho tshenuwa ho dzhena mueni, zwino a thi na na tshini tshine a nga ḽa!’" 
Luke11:7 – nṋa uyo a nga kona u fhindula e ngomu nḓuni a ri, ‘Nṋe ni songo ṱolou nndina hafha ni tshi khou vhona ndo no vala na vothi, nṋe na vhananga ro no lala; ndi nga si vuwe nda ni fha.’" 
Luke11:8 Nṋe ndi ri naho a sa itwi nga ḽa vhukonani u ḓo vuwa a mu fha zwine a zwi lila nga u vhona u sivhelela hawe. 
Luke11:9 Ndi zwine nda ri: Ni ḓi dzula ni tshi humbela, ni ḓo ṋewa; ṱoḓani, ni ḓo wana; khokhonyani, ni ḓo vulelwa." 
Luke11:10 “Ndi uri ane a humbela, Mudzimu u ḓo mu fha; a ṱoḓaho u ḓo wana; nahone ane a khokhonya u ḓo vulelwa." 
Luke11:11 Ndi nnyi waṋu vhokhotsi a vhana ane ṅwana wawe a tshi mu humbela khovhe a nga mu fha ṋowa," 
Luke11:12 kana a tshi mu humbela gumba a mu ṋea phame? 
Luke11:13 Arali inwi na vhuvhi haṋu ni tshi kona u ṋea vhana vhaṋu zwivhuya, Khotsi aṋu wa ṱaḓulu u ḓo kundwa ngani u ṋea Muya Mukhethwa vha mu humbelaho?”" 
Luke11:14 Yesu o vhuya a pandela thuṅwa ya tshimuma kha muṅwe munna, yone ya ri u bva, munna uyo a vho amba, vhathu vha kanuka." 
Luke11:15 Hone vhaṅwe vha ri, “U pandela thuṅwa nga maanḓa a Belesebulu khosi yadzo.”" 
Luke11:16 Vhaṅwe-vho vha tshi mu linga vha mu humbela uri a ite tshiga tshi sumbaho uri maanḓa awe a bva ha Mudzimu. 
Luke11:17 Yesu nge a ḓivha zwine vha elekanya, a amba navho a ri, “Arali muvhuso wa ḓifhandekanya wa bva zwigwada zwivhili, zwa lwa nga tshazwo, tshawo ndi u wa; zwi ḓi nga muṱani, arali ha bva zwigwada zwivhili zwa lwa nga tshazwo, muṱa wonoyo ndi hone wo pwashea." 
Luke11:18 Zwo ralo na kha muvhuso wa Saṱhane, arali wa fhandekana wa bva zwigwada zwivhili zwine zwa lwa nga tshazwo, u nga ima hani? Ndi amba ngauri ni ri ndi pandela thuṅwa nga maanḓa a Belesebulu." 
Luke11:19 Zwino arali Nṋe ndi tshi pandela thuṅwa nga maanḓa a Belesebulu, vhafunziwa vhaṋu vha dzi pandela nga maanḓa a nnyi? Ndi zwine vhenevho vha ḓo sumbedza uri zwine na amba a si zwone." 
Luke11:20 “Hone vhunga zwi khagala uri Nṋe ndi pandela thuṅwa nga maanḓa a Mudzimu, ndi tshiga tsha uri muvhuso wa Mudzimu wo swika kha inwi." 
Luke11:21 “Arali munna wa vhuhali a fara mafumo a linda nnḓu yawe, thundu yawe a hu na hune ya nga ya." 
Luke11:22 Hu nga tou thoma u ḓa a re na vhuhali u mu fhira, a lwa nae a mu kunda, a dzhia na aḽa mafumo e a vha o ḓitika ngao a konou kovhela vhathu thundu ye a thuba." 
Luke11:23 “Muthu ane a sa ime na Nṋe u lwa na Nṋe, a sa kuvhanganyiho sambi na Nṋe u a ḽi fhaḓa." 
Luke11:24 “Thuṅwa ya Saṱhane arali i tshi bva muthuni, i buḓekanya masoga i tshi ṱoḓa ha u awela hone. Musi yo kundwa i a amba ya ri, ‘Ndi ḓo vhuelela nḓuni yanga ine nda bva khayo!’" 
Luke11:25 I tshi swika i wana uyo muthu a tshi tou nga sa nnḓu yo swielwaho, ya thundu dzo vhekanywaho zwavhuḓi." 
Luke11:26 Zwenezwo i mbo yo dzhia dziṅwe thuṅwa ṱhanu na mbili dza vhuhali u fhira yone; dza ḓa dza dzhena kha uyo muthu dza dzula khae, mafhungo a vho vhifha u fhira zwiḽa mulovha.”" 
Luke11:27 A tshi tou ralo muṅwe musadzi a vhidzelela e vhukati ha gogo a ri, “Ha, musadzi we a beba vhone a vha mamisa, u na mashudu!”" 
Luke11:28 Yesu Ene a fhindula a ri, “Mashudu mahulwane a na onoyo muthu ane a ri u pfa ipfi ḽa Mudzimu a ita zwine ḽa amba.”" 
Luke11:29 Musi vhathu vha tshi vho tou ita tshikhuvhugu vho tanga Yesu, Ene a isa phanḓa nga u ri, “Vhathu vha musalauno vha tou vha vhavhi vhukuma; vha humbela u itelwa maḓembe, hone a vha tsha ḓo vhona maṅwe arali e si aḽa a Jonasi." 
Luke11:30 Mubebwa-nga-muthu u ḓo vha tshiga kha vha musalauno zwa nga zwiḽa Jonasi e tshiga kha vhathu vha Ninive. 
Luke11:31 “Nga ḓuvha ḽa khaṱhulo khosi ya mufumakadzi i bvaho tshipembe i ḓo ḓa khoroni u rovhedza vhathu vha musalauno, ngauri ene o tou tshimbila a zwi pfa a tshi bva vhusendakamisi a tshi yo pfa vhuṱali ha Solomoni. Nṋe ndi ri: a fhiraho Solomoni u fhano." 
Luke11:32 Nga ḽeneḽo ḓuvha vha Ninive vha ḓo ḓa khoroni u rovhedza vhathu vha musalauno, ngauri vhone vho ri u pfa pfunzo ya Jonasi vha rembuluwa. Nṋe ndi ri: a fhiraho Jonasi u fhano." 
Luke11:33 “Ndi nnyi ane a ri u funga luvhone a lu dzumba tshisikuni kana a lu tiba nga nkho naa? Ha lu vhei vhudzuloni halwo kani uri lu vhonetshele vha no dzhena nḓuni? 
Luke11:34 Na maṱo aṋu o ralo; ndi luvhone lwa muvhili woṱhe. Arali maṱo aṋu a sa lwali, na muvhili waṋu woṱhe u ḓo vha tshedzani. Hone arali e si kwao, izwo na muvhili waṋu u ḓo vha swiswini." 
Luke11:35 Zwino ni vhone uri tshedza tshi re kha inwi tshi si shanduke swiswi. 
Luke11:36 Zwino arali muvhili waṋu woṱhe u na tshedza, hu si na na huṱukuṱuku hune wa vha na swiswi, u ḓo penya woṱhe zwa tou nga zwiḽa luvhone lu tshi ni vhonetshela.”" 
Luke11:37 A tshi tou fhedza u amba, muṅwe Mufarisei a mu humbela uri a yo ḽa nae ha hawe; nangoho vha swika vha thoma u ḽa." 
Luke11:38 Tshe tsha kanukisa Mufarisei ndi nge Yesu a ḽa a songo ṱamba zwanḓa. 
Luke11:39 Ndi hone Muṋe washu a tshi ri, “Inwi Vhafarisei, ni ṱanzwa khavho na ndilo nga nnḓa hu uri mbiluni dzaṋu ndi tseḓa fhedzi na vhuvhi!" 
Luke11:40 Matsilu ndinwi, nṋa Mudzimu we a sika nga nnḓa a si onoyo we a sika na nga ngomu?" 
Luke11:41 Hone khezwi ni sa ṋei vhashai zwi re khavhoni na ndiloni dzaṋu; ndi hone ni tshi ḓo wana hu si tshee na tshi na tshika. 
Luke11:42 “Ni khou ḓiṱulela khombo inwi Vhafarisei! Ni bvisa tshafumi kha lugu na muxe na miṅwe miroho ya tshakha-tshakha, hone a ni londani, a ni funi Mudzimu, ngeno zwi zwone zwine na fanela u zwi ita, na zwiḽa zwiṅwe ni si zwi litshe." 
Luke11:43 “Ni ḓiṱulela khombo inwi Vhafarisei! Ni funesa u dzudzwa ha khwiṋe sinagogoni, na u reshwa nga u huliswa vanḓani." 
Luke11:44 Ea izwi! Hufha ni tshi nga zwalo zwo no kanganyedzeaho zwine vhathu vha tshimbila khazwo vha ḓikumadza vha sa zwi ḓivhi.” 
Luke11:45 Zwenezwo muṅwe wa vhaḓivhi vha Mulayo a ri, “Vha a ḓivha vhafunzi, vha tshi ralo vha khou sema na riṋe?”" 
Luke11:46 Yesu a fhindula a ri, “Na inwi vhaḓivhi vha Mulayo ni ḓo zwi vhona! Ni takadzwa nga u hwesa vhaṅwe mihwalo i lemelaho ngeno inwi vhaṋe ni sa vhuyi na funa na u i kwama na nga munwe zwawo." 
Luke11:47 Ee, vhukuma zwi ḓo ni vhifhela. Ni ṱama zwalo zwa vhaporofita, vhenevhaḽa vhaporofita vhe vhomakhulukuku waṋu vha vha vhulaha." 
Luke11:48 Arali ni tshi ralo zwi sumbedza uri ni khou pfumbisa zwe vhomakhulukuku waṋu vha ita, ngauri vhone vho vha vha u vhulaha, inwi ni vha u ṱama zwalo." 
Luke11:49 Vhuṱali ha Mudzimu iṱali ho vha ho no ḓi zwi amba ha ri, ‘Ndi ḓo vha rumela vhaporofita na vhaapostola, vhone vha ḓo tovhola vhaṅwe, vha ita na u vha vhulaha.’" 
Luke11:50 Hezwi zwi amba uri malofha a vhaporofita vhoṱhe e a shululwa tshee shango ḽa sikwa, a ḓo vhiliwa kha vhathu vha musalauno –" 
Luke11:51 u bva kha malofha a Abele u vhuya u swika nga a Zakaria we a vhulawa vhukati ha aḽiṱari na nnḓu ya Mudzimu. Ee, ndi hone ndo amba; oṱhe a ḓo vhiliwa kha vhathu vha musalauno!" 
Luke11:52 “Ni ḓo zwi vhona inwi vhaḓivhi vha Mulayo! No ṱuwa na khii ya nḓivho, zwino hu vho ri inwi a no ngo dzhena, na vhaḽa vhane vhe ri a dzhena, ni a vha dzivhisa.”" 
Luke11:53 Yesu a tshi ṱuwa henefho vhaḓivhi vha Mulayo na Vhafarisei vho vha vho no mu fara nga mbilu, vha thoma u mu ṱokonya nga u mu vhudzisa tshino na tshiḽa." 
Luke11:54 U ralo ho vha hu u mu rea fhedzi uri khamusi u ḓo tshenuwa o amba tshiṅwe tshi songo ḓaho. 
Luke12:1 Nga tshifhinga tshenetsho ho kuvhangana vhathu vhanzhi-vhanzhi, ha sala hu si na na vhupfelo ha mare, Yesu a thoma nga u amba na vhafunziwa vhawe a ri, “Sendelani kule na mbilisa ya Vhafarisei – ndi amba vhuṋowa havho." 
Luke12:2 A hu na tsho tibwaho tshine tsha sa ḓo tibulwa, a hu na tsho dzumbwaho tshine tsha sa ḓo ḓihwa nga vhathu." 
Luke12:3 Zwoṱhe zwe na amba swiswini zwi ḓo pfala tshedzani; na zwe na hevhedza ni maguḓani zwi ḓo tou huwelelwa vhathuni. 
Luke12:4 “Ndi a ni vhudza inwi khonani dzanga ndi ri, ni songo ofha vhane vha ri u vhulaha muvhili vha sa tsha vha na tshiṅwe tshine vha nga kha ḓi kona u tshi ita." 
Luke12:5 Nṋe ndi ḓo ni vhudza ane na fanela u mu ofha: Ofhani Uyo ane a ri o no vhulaha, a dovha a vha na maanḓa a u kudza muthu heleni. Onoyo ndi Ene ane nda ri ni mu ofhe!" 
Luke12:6 “Kani-ha ṱhongola ṱhanu a dzi rengiswi nga sennde mbili? Naho zwo ralo a hu na na nthihi yadzo ine Mudzimu a vhuya a i hangwa. 
Luke12:7 Zwino inwi hufha na mavhudzi a ṱhohoni dzaṋu Mudzimu o dzula o a vhala! Zwino-ha ni songo ofha tshithu; inwi ni fhira ṱhongola kule.
