Luke12:8 “Ndi a ni vhudza ndi ri: muthu muṅwe na muṅwe ane a si ofhe u bula vhathuni uri ndi wanga, na Mubebwa-nga-muthu u ḓo bula khoroni ya Mudzimu uri onoyo ndi wawe;" 
Luke12:9 hone ane a nndandula vhathuni, na Nṋe ndi ḓo mu landula khoroni ya Mudzimu." 
Luke12:10 Muthu ane a amba Mubebwa-nga-muthu nga ḽo vhifhaho, a nga hangwelwa, hone ane a nyefula Muya Mukhethwa ha nga hangwelwi." 
Luke12:11 “Musi vha tshi ni hwelela zwivhidzoni zwa Majuda kana kha vhavhusi kana vhahulwane, ni songo ḽa mbilu na ri ni ḓo ri mini ni tshi fhindula," 
Luke12:12 ngauri Muya Mukhethwa ndi Ene ane a ḓo ni funzedza zwine na ḓo amba zwenezwo vha tshi ni sengisa.” 
Luke12:13 Muṅwe muthu henefho vhukati ha gogo a amba na Yesu a ri, “Vhafunzi, a vha vhudzi-vho mukomana wanga a kovhekana na nṋe ifa ḽa hashu?”" 
Luke12:14 Yesu a mu fhindula a ri, “Munnawe, nṋa ndo vhewa nga nnyi uri ndi vhe muhaṱuli wa mafhungo aṋu na mukovhekanyi wa ifa ḽa haṋu?”" 
Luke12:15 A konou amba na vhathu a ri, “Ni thanyele u funesa lupfumo. Vhutshilo ha muthu a vhuho kha u anda ha thundu yawe.”" 
Luke12:16 A vha vhudza tshifanyiso a ri, “Ho vha hu na muṅwe muthu wa mupfumi we a vhibvisa mavhele manzhi-manzhi tsimuni yawe." 
Luke12:17 Uyo munna a thoma u ḓivhudzisa a ri, ‘Nṋa ndi ḓo tou zwi ita hani ndi si na hune nda nga vhulunga hone mavhele anga?’" 
Luke12:18 A fhedza nga u ri, ‘Ahaa, ndi ḓo tou thutha maḓulu anga nda fhaṱa maṅwe mahulwane ane nda ḓo vhulungela khao mavhele anga na thundu yanga." 
Luke12:19 Ndi hone ndi tshi ḓo konou amba mbiluni nda ri: U na thundu nnzhi-nnzhi ine wa ḓo ḽa miṅwaha na miṅwaha. Zwino-ha ḓiawetshele zwau, u ḽe, u nwe wo takala.’" 
Luke12:20 A tshi kha ḓi tou ralo Mudzimu a vha a tshi amba nae a ri, ‘Tsilu ndiwe, a u zwi ḓivhi uri vhusiku honovhu o u ṋeaho vhutshilo u ḓo vhu vhila? Zwino iyo thundu ye wa vha u tshi khou ḓi i vhulunga u swika zwino i ḓo ḽiwa nga nnyi?’" 
Luke12:21 Zwo ralo na kha muthu ane a ḓikhokhela lupfumo lwa shango ngeno a songo pfuma zwa Mudzimu.” 
Luke12:22 A konou amba na vhafunziwa vhawe a ri, “Ndi zwone zwine nda ri ni songo ṱolou ḽa mbilu nga zwine na lila vhutshiloni haṋu na ri ri ḓo ḽani? ri ḓo ambarani?" 
Luke12:23 Kani vhutshilo a vhu fhiri zwiḽiwa? Muvhili a u fhiri zwiambaro kani? 
Luke12:24 Edzonu sedza mahunguvhu: ha limi, ha na tshine a kaṋa; ha na zwiṱaṱari na maḓulu, naho zwo ralo Mudzimu u ḓi a ṋea zwiḽiwa. Zwino inwi a ni fhiri zwiṋoni kule naa?" 
Luke12:25 Ndi nnyi waṋu ane nga u ḽa mbilu hawe a nga lapfisa vhutshilo hawe naho hu nga ḓuvha ḽithihi zwaḽo naa? 
Luke12:26 Zwino arali ni tshi tou kundwa nga izwi zwithu zwiṱukuṱuku, ni kha ḓi vhuya na ḽelani mbilu nga izwi zwiṅwe?" 
Luke12:27 Lavhelesani kualutshele kwa maluvha a phendephende. Ha shumi, ha koni u ḓiitela zwiambaro. Hone ndi a ni vhudza ndi ri: Solomoni na madzanga áwe ho ngo vhuya a ḓiṱama unga ḽiṅwe ḽao." 
Luke12:28 Arali hatsi vhune ṋamusi ha titima mudavhini, matshelo ha vha ho no kudzwa tshivhasoni, Mudzimu a tshi vhu ṱama nga u rali, inwi a nga kundwa ngani u ni ṱama? Ni dinwa nga lutendo luṱuku!" 
Luke12:29 Ni songo dzula ni tshi humbula zwine na fanela u ḽa na u nwa na ṱolou ḽa mbilu. 
Luke12:30 Hezwo ndi zwithu zwine zwa vhilaelwa nga vhannḓa; arali e inwi Khotsi aṋu u a ḓivha uri ni a zwi lila. 
Luke12:31 Tsha khwiṋe lwelani u vhuswa nga Mudzimu, hezwo zwiṅwe ni ḓo tou ingwa." 
Luke12:32 “Asizwo-ha inwi kuṱambi kwanga, ni songo ofha tshithu, Khotsi aṋu o ḓiimisela u ni ita maḽaifa muvhusoni wawe." 
Luke12:33 Rengisani thundu yaṋu, tshelede ni tonde ngayo vhashai. Ḓiṱoḓeleni zwipatshi zwi sa ṱahali, zwa lupfumo lu sa fheli lwa ngei ṱaḓulu; hune ha sa ḓo vhuya ha sendela fobvu kana ha dzhena tshifheṱi." 
Luke12:34 Hu re na lupfumo lwau ndi hune na mbilu yau ya vha hone. 
Luke12:35 “Vhofhani dzi khwaṱhe, ni dzule no funga mbone dzaṋu;" 
Luke12:36 ni nge vhathu vho lindelaho u vhuya ha muṋe wavho hayani a tshi bva munyanyani, uri a tshi tou khokhonya vha mbo ḓi mu vulela." 
Luke12:37 Vha na mashudu vhalanda vhane muṋe wavho a tshi vhuya, a wana vha songo eḓela; Nṋe ndi ri u ḓo ganya zwiambaro zwawe a vha dzudza ḓafulani, a vha kanzwa." 
Luke12:38 Vha ḓo vha na mashudu arali a ri a tshi ḓa vhukati ha vhusiku kana nga maḓautsha a ḓi wana vho fhaṱuwa. 
Luke12:39 Kani a ni ḓivhi uri arali muṋe wa nnḓu o dzula o zwi ḓivha uri fobvu ḽi ḓo ḓa lini, a nga linda nnḓu yawe uri i si dzhenwe?" 
Luke12:40 Na inwi ni dzule no ḓilugisa; Mubebwa-nga-muthu u ḓo ḓa ni songo humbula.” 
Luke12:41 Ndi hone Pitrosi a tshi mu vhudzisa a ri, “Muṋe wanga, nṋa itsho tshifanyiso tshi khou amba riṋe fhedzi kana vhathu vhoṱhe?”" 
Luke12:42 Muṋe washu a mu fhindula a ri, “Zwino mukoma a fulufhedzeaho wa vhuṱali ri ḓo ri ndi nnyi? Ndi amba ane muṋe wawe a ḓo mu ita ene mulangi wa zwoṱhe zwa muṱani wawe, uri a ṋee vhathu zwiḽiwa nga tshifhinga tshazwo?" 
Luke12:43 U na mashudu mushumi ane muṋe wawe a tshi vhuya, a wana a tshi kha ḓi ita nga u ralo." 
Luke12:44 Nṋe ndi ri: hoyo muthu muṋe wawe u ḓo mu ita mukoma kha zwoṱhe zwi re zwawe. 
Luke12:45 Hone arali uyo mushumi a nga amba nga mbilu a ri, ‘Hufha muṋe wanga a tshi khou lenga u vhuya,’ a thoma u fara vhashumi ngae vha vhanna na vha vhasadzi a tshi vha rwa, a tshi ḓiḽela a tshi kambiwa," 
Luke12:46 u ḓo tshenuwa muṋe wawe o vhuya musi a songo humbula, nga tshifhinga tshine a si vhuye a tshi ḓivha, a mu itela tshiṱuhu tshihulu ha vha u mu baḓekanya na vha sa fulufhedzei." 
Luke12:47 Mushumi ane a ḓivha zwine muṋe wawe a zwi ṱoḓa, hone a si zwi ite, a si dzule o ḓilugisa, u ḓo wana ṱhamu nnzhi;" 
Luke12:48 hone mushumi ane a sa ḓivhe zwine muṋe wawe a ṱoḓa, a vho ita zwo eḓanwaho nga ṱhamu, u ḓo wana ṱhamu dzi si gathi. We a ṋewa zwinzhi, hu ḓo ṱoḓwa zwinzhi khae; we a kumedzwa zwinzhi, hu ḓo ḓi vhilwa zwinzhi khae.”" 
Luke12:49 “Ndo ḓa u funga shango nga mulilo! Ngavhe khavhu yawo i vhe yo no ḽi ṱanganya ndo vha ndi tshi ḓo takala hani! 
Luke12:50 Hu na ndovhedzo ine nda fanela u thoma u lovhedzwa ngayo, hone mbilu yanga i swa hani zwi sa athu khunyelela." 
Luke12:51 Kani ni vhona unga Nṋe ndo ḓela u ladza shango? Aiwa, Nṋe ndo ḓisa mufhirifhiri." 
Luke12:52 U bva ṋamusi vhathu vhe vhaṱanu muḓini vha ḓo fhiriṱana, vhavhili vha ima nga ngeno vhararu vha ima nga ngei, vha lwa." 
Luke12:53 Vha ḓo fhiriṱana, “ ‘Khotsi u ḓo vutshela ṅwana na ṅwana a vutshela khotsi; mme u ḓo vutshela ṅwananyana wawe na ṅwananyana a vutshela mme; mazwale u ḓo vutshela mazwale.’ ”" 
Luke12:54 Yesu a tshi amba-vho na mavhuthu a ri, “Musi ni tshi vhona gole ḽi tshi takuwa vhukovhela, ni mbo ḓi ri, ‘Hu ḓo na mvula ya tshirulu,’ nangoho zwa ralo." 
Luke12:55 Arali hu na muya wa tshipembe na ri, ‘Ḽi ḓo fhisa fhasi ha tou duga,’ nangoho zwa ḓi ralo." 
Luke12:56 Ṋowa ndinwi! Khezwi ni tshi kona u ṱalukanya zwa matshele; zwino u ṱalukanya tshifhinga itshi zwi ni kunda ngani? 
Luke12:57 “Ni itwa ngani ni sa koni u vhona uri zwine na fanela u ita ndi zwifhio? 
Luke12:58 Musi ni tshi khou ya khoroni na o ni hwelelaho, lusani u pfumedzana nae ni tshee nḓilani uri a sa ḓo ni isa ha muhaṱuli, uyo a ni kumedza mapholisa, one a ni kudza dzhele," 
Luke12:59 hune ni sa ḓo vhuya na bva ni sa athu lifha, na lifha na sennde ya u fhedzisela.”" 
Luke13:1 Zwenezwo vhaṅwe vhathu vhe vha vha vhe henefho vha vhudza Yesu zwe Pilato a ita a tshi vhulaha Vhagalelia musi vha tshi khou ṱhavhela Mudzimu dzinduvho, a ṱanganya malofha avho na a nduvho dzavho." 
Luke13:2 Yesu a tshi vha fhindula a ri, “Ni vhona unga avho Vhagalelia vha tshi vhulawa nga u ralo ndi nge vha vha vhe vhone vhatshinyi u fhira vhathu vhoṱhe vha Galelia naa?" 
Luke13:3 Na kathihi! Ndi ri, na sa rembuluwa ni ḓo lovha noṱhe u fana navho." 
Luke13:4 Ni ri mini nga vhaḽa vha 18 vha Silomu vhe vha zhakiwa nga mutsheṱo wa vha vhulaha? Ni vhona unga ndi vhone vhe vha khakhela Mudzimu u fhira vhaṅwe vha dzulaho Jerusalema naa? 
Luke13:5 Na kathihi! Nṋe ndi ri: na sa rembuluwa ni ḓo lovha noṱhe u fana navho.” 
Luke13:6 Yesu a konou vha vhudza tshifanyiso a ri, “Muṅwe munna o vhuya a vha na muhuyu tsimuni yawe ya minḓirivhe. Ḽiṅwe ḓuvha a bva a tshi ri u yo fula mahuyu, hone a si wane na ḽithihi." 
Luke13:7 Ndi hone a tshi amba na mushumi wawe wa henefho tsimuni a ri, ‘Vhonani miṅwaha yo no vha miraru zwino ndi tshi ḓi ḓa u ṱoḓa mahuyu kha hoyu muhuyu hone ndi si wane na ḽithihi. U remeni! Zwi farisani u tshi sokou vhivha tsimu!’" 
Luke13:8 Hone uyo mushumi a ri, ‘Kha vha vhe vho u litsha ṋaṅwaha fhedzi muṋe wanga. Ndi ḓo bwa ndi tshi mona nawo nda ita na u u shela mupfudze." 
Luke13:9 Arali ṅwakani wa aṋwa, aiwaa; hone arali wa sa aṋwa vha ḓo u rema zwavho.’ ”" 
Luke13:10 Ḽiṅwe ḓuvha Yesu o vha a tshi khou funza huṅwe sinagogoni nga Sabatha. 
Luke13:11 Zwino henefho ho vha hu na muṅwe musadzi we a vha o no fhedza miṅwaha ya 18 a tshi lwadzwa nga thuṅwa ya Saṱhane. O vha a tshi vho tou dzula o gogovhala a sa koni na u onyolowa na zwiṱukuṱuku. 
Luke13:12 Yesu a tshi mu vhona, a mu vhidza a amba nae a ri, “Khaladzi, vhulwadze haṋu ho fhola!”" 
Luke13:13 A ralo a mu vhea zwanḓa, uyo musadzi a mbo ḓi onyolowa e tswititi, a renda Mudzimu." 
Luke13:14 Muhulwane wa tshivhidzo a sinyuwa nge Yesu a fhodza muthu nga Sabatha; a amba na vhathu a ri, “Hu na maḓuvha maṱanu na ḽithihi ane ra fanela u shuma ngao; iḓani nga eneo maḓuvha ni fhodzwe, hu si nga Sabatha!”" 
Luke13:15 Muṋe washu a tshi mu fhindula a ri, “Dziṋowa ndinwi! Ndi nnyi waṋu henefha ane nga Sabatha a si vule kholomo yawe kana donngi yawe a i isa u nwa maḓi?" 
Luke13:16 Zwino-ha muḓuhulu wa Abrahamu we a vha o vhoxwa nga Saṱhane miṅwaha ya 18 ngoyu; a zwo ngo fanela naa a tshi vhofhololwa kha mbofho iyi naho hu nga Sabatha?” 
Luke13:17 A tshi ralo maswina awe oṱhe a sala o shona, vhathu vhoṱhe vhone vha takalela zwi kanukisaho zwoṱhe zwe Yesu a ita." 
Luke13:18 Yesu a ri, “Nṋa muvhuso wa Mudzimu u fana na mini; ndi nga tou u fanyisa na tshithu-ḓe?" 
Luke13:19 U fana na mbeu ya muhuyu ye muthu a i dzhia a i zwala tsimuni yawe; ya mela ya vha muri muhulu une na zwiṋoni zwa ḓa zwa fhaṱa zwiṱaha matavhini awo.” 
Luke13:20 Yesu a dovha a amba a ri, “Muvhuso wa Mudzimu ndi ḓo u fanyisa na mini?" 
Luke13:21 U fana na mbilisa ine musadzi a i suka na vhukhopfu sambelo ḽo ḓala; yone ya kukumusa uho vhukhopfu hoṱhe.” 
Luke13:22 Yesu a buḓekanya dziḓorobo na miḓi a tshi enda a tshi funza o ḓi livha Jerusalema. 
Luke13:23 Ndi hone muṅwe muthu a tshi mu vhudzisa a ri, “Muṋe wanga, nṋa hu ḓo tou tshidzwa vhathu vha si gathi?” Yesu a amba na vhathu a ri," 
Luke13:24 “Lusani nga nungo dzoṱhe uri ni dzhene nga muṋango musekene; ngauri ndi a ni vhudza ndi ri: vhathu vhanzhi vha ḓo edzisa u dzhena vha kundwa. 
Luke13:25 Muṋe wa nnḓu a vhuya a takuwa a hoṋa vothi, inwi ni ḓo ri no sala nnḓa ni tshi thoma u khokhonya ni tshi ri, ‘A vha ri vuleli-vho Muṋe washu!’ Ene a fhindula a ri, ‘A thi ḓivhi hune na bva hone.’" 
Luke13:26 Zwenezwo inwi ni ḓo fhindula na ri, ‘Hufha ro vha ri tshi ḽa ri tshi nwa navho, vha tshi ita na u funza muḓini wa hashu!’" 
Luke13:27 Ndi hone Ene a tshi ḓo dovha a ni fhindula a ri, ‘Ndi ri a thi ḓivhi hune na bva hone. Ṱuwani hafha phanḓa hanga noṱhe inwi vhaitazwivhi!’" 
Luke13:28 Hu ḓo vha na zwililo na u shenganya maṋo musi ni tshi vhona Abrahamu na Isaka na Jakopo na vhaporofita vhoṱhe vhe muvhusoni wa Mudzimu inwi hone no siwa nnḓa! 
Luke13:29 Vhathu vha ḓo vha hone munyanyani muvhusoni wa Mudzimu vha tshi bva vhubvaḓuvha na vhukovhela na devhula na tshipembe. 
Luke13:30 Vhane vha vha vhone vhaṱuku zwino, vha vho ḓo vha vhone vhahulwane; vhane vha vha vhone vhahulwane vha vho ḓo vha vhone vhaṱuku.”" 
Luke13:31 Nga tshenetsho tshifhinga vhaṅwe Vhafarisei vha ḓa ha Yesu vha ri, “Kha vha mbo ḓi ṱuwa fhano vha fhirele phanḓa; Herude u khou ṱoḓa u vha vhulaha.”" 
Luke13:32 Yesu a tshi vha fhindula a ri, “Iyani ni yo vhudza hoyo Sankambe ni ri, ‘Ṋamusi na matshelo ndi kha ḓi pandela thuṅwa dza Saṱhane na u fhodza vhathu, mbamatshelo ndi hone ndi tshi ḓo khunyeledza mushumo wanga.’" 
Luke13:33 Naho zwo ralo ndo fanela u fhirela phanḓa ṋamusi na matshelo na mbamatshelo, ngauri a zwo ngo fanela muporofita a tshi vhulahelwa huṅwe fhethu arali hu si Jerusalema." 
Luke13:34 “Jerusalema! Nandi Jerusalema! Iwe ane wa vhulaha vhaporofita, vhaḓinḓa vhe Mudzimu a vha ruma ha iwe wa vha kanḓa nga matombo! Ndi lungana ndi tshi ri ndi kuvhatedze vhana vhau vhoṱhe sa khuhu i tshi kuvhatedza khukhwana dzayo nga phapha dzayo, hone iwe u si tende?" 
Luke13:35 Zwino-ha no ṅaledzwa thembele yaṋu; ndi ri a ni tsha ḓo mmbona ha vhuya ha swika musi une na ḓo ri, ‘Nga hu rendwe a ḓaho nga dzina ḽa Muṋe washu!’ ”" 
Luke14:1 Muṅwe musi nga Sabatha Yesu a ṱuwa na muṅwe murangaphanḓa wa Vhafarisei u yo ḽa nae ha hawe, huno vhathu vho vha vho dzula vho mu lalela uri vha vhone zwine a ḓo ita," 
Luke14:2 ngauri henefho phanḓa hawe ho vha hu na muṅwe munna we a vha o zwimba muvhili woṱhe. 
Luke14:3 Huno Yesu a vhudzisa vhaḓivhi vha Mulayo na Vhafarisei a ri, “Nṋa Mulayo u a tenda muthu a tshi fhodzwa nga Sabatha kana a u tendi naa?”" 
Luke14:4 Vhone vha sokou fhumula. Ndi hone Yesu a tshi fhodza uyo muthu, a mu litsha a ṱuwa." 
Luke14:5 A konou amba navho a ri, “Ndi nnyi waṋu ane ṅwana wawe kana kholomo yawe yo wela bidzini a si ṱavhanye u i bvisa naho hu nga Sabatha?”" 
Luke14:6 Hone vhone iḽo fhungo ḽa vha somela. 
Luke14:7 Yesu a tshi vhona vhaeni vha tshi nanga vhudzulo ha phanḓa, a vha fanyisedzela a ri," 
Luke14:8 “Arali na vhidziwa munyanyani, ni songo dzula vhudzuloni ha phanḓa; zwi nga kha ḓi itea uri hu vhe ho vhidziwa na a fhiraho inwi," 
Luke14:9 huno we a ni vhidza vhuvhili haṋu a vho ḓo amba na inwi a ri, ‘Kha vha takuwe zwavho vha sendelele avha.’ Inwi na vho ḓo ya u dzula kha vhudzulo ha murahurahu no farwa nga ṱhoni." 
Luke14:10 Tsha khwiṋe dzulani vhudzuloni ha murahurahu, uri o ni vhidzaho a tshi dzhena a kone u ḓo tou amba na inwi a ri, ‘Takuwani khonani yanga, ni ḓe ngeno phanḓa.’ Ndi hone ni tshi ḓo huliswa vhaeni vhoṱhe vha tshi zwi vhona." 
Luke14:11 Ane a ḓihudza u ḓo ṱukufhadzwa, ane a ḓiṱukufhadza u ḓo huliswa.”" 
Luke14:12 Ndi hone Yesu a tshi amba na muṋe wa muḓi a ri, “Musi ni na tshiswiṱulo kana tshilalelo, ni songo vhidza khonani dzaṋu kana vharathu vhaṋu, naho e mashaka kana vhahura vha vhapfumi, ngauri vha nga ḓo ni vhidza-vho na vho ḓo vha no ima kha ḽa uri mutondi u tonda mutondi ngae." 
Luke14:13 Musi ni na tshimima, vhidzani vha si na tshavho na zwihole, na vha sa koni u tshimbila, na mabofu," 
Luke14:14 ndi hone ni tshi ḓo vha na mashudu, vhunga vhenevho vha sa koni u ni vhidza-vho. Inwi ni ḓo tou pfufhiwa nga Mudzimu musi vhavhuya vhoṱhe vha tshi vuwa vhafuni.”" 
Luke14:15 Muṅwe wa vho dzulaho nae zwiḽiwani a tshi pfa zwenezwo a amba na Yesu a ri, “U na mashudu ane a ḓo vhidziwa munyanya muvhusoni wa Mudzimu.”" 
Luke14:16 Yesu a amba nae a ri, “Ho vhuya ha vha na muṅwe munna we a ri a tshi khou lugisa munyanya a vhidza vhathu vhanzhi." 
Luke14:17 Nga ḓuvha ḽa munyanya a ruma muḓinḓa wawe uri a yo laledza vho vhidzwaho a ri, ‘Iḓani, zwoṱhe zwo lugiswa!’" 
Luke14:18 Hone vhone vhoṱhe vha ḓibvula sa vho langanaho. Wa u thoma a ri, ‘Ndo renga tsimu; ndi fanela u i tandula. Nga vha mpfarele, zwi ḓo nkunda.’" 
Luke14:19 Muṅwe-vho a ri, ‘Ndo renga phulu dza dzhogo ṱhanu, ndi kha ḓi yo dzi gudisa; zwi ḓo nkunda.’" 
Luke14:20 Muṅwe nga fhaḽa a ri, ‘Ndi kha ḓi bva u vhinga, zwenezwo ndi nga si kone u ḓa.’" 
Luke14:21 Uyo muḓinḓa a huma a yo vhudza muṋe wawe zwe zwa itea. Muṋe wa muḓi a sinyuwa nga maanḓa a amba na muḓinḓa wawe a ri, ‘Gidimelani zwiṱaraṱani na nḓilani dza muḓi, ni vhuye na vhashai na zwihole na mabofu na vha sa koni u tshimbila.’" 
Luke14:22 Hu si kale uyo muḓinḓa a dovha a vhuya a ri, ‘Ndo ita zwe vha amba, hone vhudzulo vhu tshee hone.’" 
Luke14:23 Ndi hone muṋe wawe a tshi amba nae a ri, ‘Iyani magondoni na dzinḓilani ni kombetshedze vhathu vha ḓe uri nnḓu yanga i ḓale." 
Luke14:24 Hone vhaḽa vhe nda vha vhidza vha hana, ndi ri a hu na na muthihi wavho ane a ḓo vhuya a thetshela tsha munyanya wanga!’ ”" 
Luke14:25 Ho vha hu na gogo ḽihulu ḽi tshi khou tshimbila na Yesu. Ene a rembuluwa, a vha lavhelesa a ri," 
Luke14:26 “Ane a ri a tshi ḓa ha Nṋe a si vhenge khotsi awe na mme awe, na musadzi wawe na vhana vhawe, na vharathu vhawe na khaladzi dzawe, a sa ite na u ḓivhenga ene muṋe, onoyo ha koni u vha mufunziwa wanga." 
Luke14:27 Ane a sa hwale tshifhambano tshawe a ntevhela, ha koni u vha mufunziwa wanga." 
Luke14:28 “Ndi nnyi waṋu ane a tshi ṱoḓa u fhaṱa mutsheṱo mulapfu, a si thome u dzula fhasi a anganya uri a vhone arali e na tshelede yo eḓanaho u fhedza mushumo?" 
Luke14:29 A sa ralo u ḓo ri o no tea a vho kundwa u fhedza uyo mutsheṱo, vha zwi vhonaho vha vho ḓo mu sea" 
Luke14:30 vha ri, ‘Vhonani munna o thoma mutsheṱo zwino u vho kundwa u u fhedzisa!’" 
Luke14:31 “Kana ndi ifhio khosi ine ya ri yo bvelwa pfumo nga iṅwe khosi i re na vhanna vha 20 000, yone i na vha 10 000 fhedzi, i si thome u dzula fhasi ya rekanya uri i vhone arali i tshi nga kona u livhana na iḽa iṅwe khosi?" 
Luke14:32 Arali a vhona uri a nga si kone, u ḓo ruma vhaḓinḓa uri vha yo ṱangana na iḽa khosi musi i tshee kule, vha pfumedzane." 
Luke14:33 Ndi zwone zwine nda ri, a hu na na muthihi waṋu ane a nga vha mufunziwa wanga arali a sa furaleli zwoṱhe zwine a vha nazwo." 
Luke14:34 “Muṋo ndi tshithu tshavhuḓi, hone wa vhuya wa fhela vhuhali hawo wa si tsha dunga, u nga dovha wa dungiswa ngani?" 
Luke14:35 A wo ngo tsha lugela u nyora mavu naho hu a ṱanganywa na mupfudze; tshawo ndi u laṱwa. A na nḓevhe kha a ḓipfele.” 
Luke15:1 Ha ḓi ḓa vhathelisi vhanzhi na vhatshinyi vha tshi ḓa u thetshelesa Yesu a tshi funza. 
Luke15:2 Vhafarisei na vhaḓivhi vha Mulayo vha thoma u gungula vha ri, “Muthu uyu u konana na vhatshinyi, a ita na u ḽa navho!”" 
Luke15:3 Ndi hone Yesu a tshi vha vhudza tshifanyiso hetshi a ri," 
Luke15:4 “Nṋa arali muṅwe waṋu e na nngu dza ḓana, a xedza nthihi yadzo u ita mini? Ha sii dza 99 pfuloni a yo ṱoḓa iḽa nthihi yo xelaho a vhuya a i wana naa?" 
Luke15:5 Musi o i wana, u i hwala mahaḓani awe o takala." 
Luke15:6 A tshi swika hayani a ramba khonani dzawe na vhahura vhawe, a vha vhudza a ri, ‘Ndi takala hani vha hashu ndó wana nngu yanga ye ya vha yo xela. Iḓani ri pembele!’" 
Luke15:7 Na ngei ṱaḓulu zwo tou ralo; musi mutshinyi muthihi a tshi rembuluwa hu vha na dakalo ḽihulu u fhira hu tshi sokou vha na vhavhuya vha 99 vhane u rembuluwa vha si tsha hu lila. 
Luke15:8 “Kana ri fanyise nga musadzi a re na masheleni a fumi; arali a xedza sheleni nthihi yao u ita mini? Ha fungi luvhone na, a swiela na nnḓu, a tshi ṱoḓa a tshi tou sedzesa a vhuya a i wana naa?" 
Luke15:9 Musi o i wana u vhidza khonani dzawe na vhahura, a vha vhudza a ri, ‘Ndi takala hani vha hashu ndó wana sheleni yanga ye ya vha yo xela. Iḓani ri pembele!’" 
Luke15:10 Ndi tshi tou ni vhudza-vho, na ṱaḓulu zwo tou ralo. Vharuṅwa vha Mudzimu vha tou pembela musi mutshinyi muthihi o rembuluwa.”" 
Luke15:11 Yesu a dovha a ri, “Ho vhuya ha vha na muṅwe munna we a vha e na vhana vhavhili vha vhatuka." 
Luke15:12 Murathu a amba nae a ri, ‘Muṋe wanga, nṋe nga vha mphe mukovhe wanga wa thundu.’ Ndi hone uyo munna a tshi kovhekanya vhana vhawe thundu yawe." 
Luke15:13 Hu sa athu fhela maḓuvha manzhi murathu a rengisa thundu yawe a dzhia tshelede a ṱuwa. A ya shangoni ḽa kule-kule, a tambisa tshelede yawe nga vhuhwarahwara." 
Luke15:14 Iḽa tshelede yo no fhela, ha mbo wa nḓala khulu shangoni ḽeneḽo, huno na ene a thoma u tambula." 
Luke15:15 Ndi hone a tshi yo ḓifuwisa kha muṅwe muthu wa ḽeneḽo shango, a wana mushumo wa u lisa nguluvhe." 
Luke15:16 A tama na u tou ḽa zwawe mbeu dza miri dzi ḽiwaho nga nguluvhe, huno na dzone a si fhiwe." 
Luke15:17 Ndi hone a tshi vho dzivhuluwa, a ambela mbiluni a ri, ‘Vhashumi vha khotsi anga vha na zwiḽiwa zwinzhi zwine vha ḽa vha ita na u laṱa, nṋe fhano ndi tshi khou fa nga nḓala!" 
Luke15:18 Ndi tou ndo ṱuwa zwino nda ya ha khotsi anga nda swika nda ri: Muṋe wanga, ndo khakhela Waṱuḓulu na vhone;" 
Luke15:19 a tho ngo tsha fanela na u tou pfi ṅwana wavho; ndi khou humbela uri vha tou nṱanganedza zwanga ndi vhe muṅwe wa vhashumi vhavho.’ 
Luke15:20 Ndi hone a tshi mbo ḓi takuwa a ya ha khotsi awe. “Khotsi awe vha mu vhona a tshee kule. Mbilu ya mukalaha ya khathuwa, a mbo ḓi gidima a swika a mu kuvhatedza." 
Luke15:21 Ṅwana a amba na khotsi awe a ri, ‘Muṋe wanga, ndo khakhela Waṱaḓulu na vhone; a tho ngo tsha fanela na u tou pfi ṅwana wavho.’" 
Luke15:22 Hone khotsi vha vhidza vhashumi vhavho vha ri, ‘Ṱavhanyani ni ḓise tshiambaro tsho nakaho ni mu ambadze, ni mu ambadze na rinngi na navhula." 
Luke15:23 Ni konou dzhia mbohwana yo noniswaho ni i ṱhavhe, ri ite vhuṱambo." 
Luke15:24 Ṅwana wanga hoyu o vha o fa, zwino u a tshila; o vha o xela, zwino o wanala.’ Vhuṱambo ha mbo ḓi ṱangana." 
Luke15:25 “Hezwo zwoṱhe zwi tshi khou itea, mukomana o vha e masimuni. Huno a tshi vhuya a tshi vho sendela tsini ha nnḓu a pfa yo ṱangana hu tshi ri u imba, he u tshina." 
Luke15:26 Ndi hone a tshi vhidza muṅwe mushumi a mu vhudzisa a ri, ‘Nṋa ndi mini izwo?’" 
Luke15:27 Mushumi a fhindula a ri, ‘Murathu waṋu o vhuya, zwino khotsi aṋu vho takala nge a vhuya o takala, ndi tshi amba zwino na mbohwana yo noniswaho yo no ḓi wa nga luṋanga.’" 
Luke15:28 Mukomana a sinyuwa lwe a si fune na u dzhena afho nḓuni. Ndi hone khotsi awe a tshi bva a mu kwengweledza. 
Luke15:29 Ene a amba na khotsi awe a ri, ‘Hufha nṋe ndo vha shumela miṅwaha minzhi-minzhi ndi tshi tou nga phuli, ndi sa pfuki na tshithihi tshe vha amba. Naho zwo ralo ndi mini tshe vha vhuya vha mpha-vho? Ndi amba na mbudzana zwayo ya u tou ri ndi ḽe-vho na khonani dzanga ro takala." 
Luke15:30 Zwino uyu ṅwana wavho we a tambisa thundu yavho na dziphombwe u tou bvelele vha mbo ḓi mu ṱhavhela kholomo yo noniswaho!’ 
Luke15:31 Khotsi awe a mu fhindula a ri, ‘Ṅwananga, inwi hufha ni na nṋe misi yoṱhe; nahone zwoṱhe zwine nda vha nazwo zwi zwaṋu!" 
Luke15:32 Riṋe ro vha ro fanela u takala ra pembela, ngauri uyu murathu waṋu o vha o fa, zwino o vuwa; o vha o xela, zwino o wanala.’ ”" 
Luke16:1 Yesu a amba na vhafunziwa vhawe a ri, “Muṅwe mupfumi o vha e na mukoma wawe. Ha pfala uri mukoma uyo u khou mu tambisela thundu." 
Luke16:2 Ndi hone a tshi mu vhidza a amba nae a ri, ‘Nṋa ndi mafhungo-ḓe ane nda pfa nga inwi? Iḓani ni ḓifhindulele zwe na shuma; a thi tsha funa ni tshi vha mukoma wanga.’" 
Luke16:3 Ndi hone uyo mukoma a tshi amba nga mbilu a ri, ‘Nṋa zwino ndi nga tou ita hani vhunga muṋe wanga a tshi khou mpandela mushumoni? Nungo dza u shuma nga zwanḓa a thi na, zwino u tshila nga u tou humbela-vho, ndi a shona!" 
Luke16:4 Ahaa, ndi a ḓivha zwine nda ḓo ita uri ndi tshi pandelwa mushumoni ndi vhe ndi na khonani dzine dza nga ntswielela.’" 
Luke16:5 Ndi hone a tshi vhidza vhathu vhoṱhe nga muthihi nga muthihi vhe vha vha vha tshi khou koloda muṋe wawe. A amba na wa u thoma a ri, ‘Zwiḽa vhone vha koloda muṋe wanga vhugai?’" 
Luke16:6 Uyo a fhindula a ri, ‘Zwikumbu zwi na ḓana zwa mapfura a muolivi.’ Mukoma a amba nae a ri, ‘Vhuṱanzi ha mulandu wavho ngovhu; kha vha mbo ḓi dzula fhasi vha ṅwale 50.’" 
Luke16:7 A konou amba na muṅwe a ri, ‘Vhone-vho, wavho mulandu ndi mungafhani?’ Ene a fhindula a ri, ‘Masaga a 1 000 a goroi.’ Mukoma a amba nae a ri, ‘Vhuṱanzi ngovhu; nga vha ṅwale 800.’" 
Luke16:8 Muṋe wa thundu a tshi vhona u thanya ha uyo mukoma a sa fulufhedzei a zwi khoḓa; iṱali vhathu vha ḽino shango vho thanya kha mafhungo avho u fhira vha re na tshedza tsha Mudzimu.” 
Luke16:9 Yesu a dovha a ri, “Ndi zwine nda ri: ḓiwaneleni dzikhonani nga lupfumo lwa ḽino shango, uri musi lu tshi ḓo fhelelwa nga mushumo dzi kone u ni swielela ngei hayani ha lini na lini." 
Luke16:10 “A fulufhedzeaho kha zwiṱuku u ḓo fulufhedzea na kha zwihulwane; a sa fulufhedzei kha zwiṱuku, na kha zwihulwane ha fulufhedzei." 
Luke16:11 Nṋa arali no kundwa u fulufhedzea kha zwa lupfumo lwa ḽino shango, ndi nnyi ane a nga kha ḓi ni kumedza lupfumo vhukuma?" 
Luke16:12 Arali ni songo kona u fulufhedzea kha thundu i re ya muṅwe, yaṋu vhukuma ni ḓo i fhiwa nga nnyi?" 
Luke16:13 “A hu na mushumi ane a kona u vha na vhaṋe vhavhili. A nga vhenga muṅwe a funa muṅwe, a pfa zwa muṅwe, zwa muṅwe a zwi nyadza. A ni koni u shumela Mudzimu ni phuli dza lupfumo lwa ḽino shango.”" 
Luke16:14 Vhafarisei vha tshi pfa aya mafhungo oṱhe vha mu holedza, ngauri vho vha vhe vhathu vha funesaho tshelede." 
Luke16:15 Yesu a amba a ri, “Ndi inwi vhadzia-u-ḓiita vhavhuya maṱoni a vhathu, hone Mudzimu a tshi ḓivha zwi re mbiluni dzaṋu; ngauri zwine vhathu vha vhona zwi zwone zwihulwane, Mudzimu u a zwi nengwa." 
Luke16:16 “Mulayo wa Mushe na Maṅwalo a vhaporofita zwo shuma u guma nga Johanisi Mulovhedzi; u bva afho muvhuso wa Mudzimu u vho ḓivhadzwa e mafhungo maḓifha, huno muṅwe na muṅwe u dzhena nga u tou lwisa." 
Luke16:17 Ḽiṱaḓulu na ḽifhasi zwi nga lovha, hone Mulayo u ḓo dzula u hone; na kuswayo na kuthihi zwakwo ku nga si lovhe." 
Luke16:18 “Munna ane a ṱala musadzi wawe a dzea muṅwe u ita vhupombwe. Zwi ḓi nga munna ane a dzea musadzi o ṱaliwaho, na ene u ita vhupombwe.”" 
Luke16:19 “Ho vhuya ha vha na muṅwe munna wa mupfumi we a vha a tshi ambara zwiambaro zwa mutengo muhulu zwa maṱeleṱele, a tshi ḓiphiṋa nga madzanga misi yoṱhe." 
Luke16:20 Ha dovha ha vha na mushai a no pfi Lazaro, we a vha e na zwilonda zwo phaphaho muvhili woṱhe. Onoyo o vha a tshi ḓi iswa henefho muṋangoni wa nnḓu ya mupfumi." 
Luke16:21 O vha a tshi lila u tou kanzwiwa zwawe nga zwipeḓu zwe zwa vha zwi tshi wa musi mupfumi a tshi khou ḽa. Zwilonda zwawe zwo vha zwi tshi ṋanzwiwa nga mmbwa. 
Luke16:22 Musi uyo muthu wa mushai a tshi fa, vharuṅwa vha ḓa vha mu takula vha yo mu dzudza, a ḓisendeka nga Abrahamu. Mupfumi na ene a fa a vhulungwa." 
Luke16:23 Musi a tshi khou pfa vhuṱungu heleni, a tshi takusa maṱo a vhona Abrahamu fhaḽa kule na Lazaro o ḓisendeka ngae." 
Luke16:24 Ndi hone a tshi vhidzelela a ri, ‘Muṋe wanga Abrahamu! Kha ndi pfelwe vhuṱungu hu ruṅwe Lazaro uri a tou ṋanga munwe wawe maḓini a ḓe a rothodze lulimi lwanga; ndi khou shengela khavhuni hei!’" 
Luke16:25 Abrahamu ene a ri, ‘Ṅwananga, a thi ri ni kha ḓi elelwa uri zwiḽa ni tshi kha ḓi tshila no vha ni sa shayi tshivhuya, ngeno Lazaro a tshi khou tambula? Zwino-ha ene u vho ḓiphiṋa fhano, inwi ngeno ni tshi khou shengela." 
Luke16:26 Hu si izwo fhedzi; hu dovha ha vha na govha ḽihulu ḽo aṱamaho vhukati hashu na inwi, lune wa nga ngeno a sa kone u pfukela ngeo kha inwi; zwo ralo na kha wa ngeo hu na inwi, ha koni u pfukela ngeno hu na riṋe.’" 
Luke16:27 Mupfumi a ri, ‘Zwi a pfala Muṋe wanga; ndi vho tou humbela nga zwanḓa zwivhili uri vha rume Lazaro ngei muḓini wa hashu." 
Luke16:28 Henengei ndi na vharathu vhaṱanu; a ye a vha sevhe uri vha si ḓe-vho fhano fhethu ha tshengelo.’ 
Luke16:29 Abrahamu a ri, ‘Hufha vhe na Maṅwalo a Mushe na a vhaporofita; nga vha thetshelese one.’" 
Luke16:30 Mupfumi a fhindula a ri, ‘Eneo fhedzi naa khotsi anga Abrahamu? Arali hu tshi nga tou ya ane a bva vhafuni ndi hone vha tshi ḓo rembuluwa.’" 
Luke16:31 “Abrahamu ene a fhindula a ri, ‘Arali vha sa pfa Maṅwalo a Mushe na a vhaporofita, nangwe ha tou vuwa we a vha o fa, a vha nga mu pfi.’ ”" 
Luke17:1 Yesu a amba na vhafunziwa vhawe a ri, “Zwikhukhuliso zwone zwi nga si kundwe u vha hone; hone u ḓo zwi vhona hoyo ane zwa ḓa ngae!" 
Luke17:2 Ane a khakhisa muṅwe wa havha vhaṱuku, ṱhamu yawe i ḓo fhira zwa musi o tou vhofhelelwa zwawe guyo mukoloni a poswa lwanzheni." 
Luke17:3 “Ivhani na nzhele! Arali murathu wau a u khakhela, u mu kaidze. Arali u tshi ralo a ḓisola, u mu hangwele." 
Luke17:4 Arali a u khakhela luṱanu na luvhili nga ḓuvha hone a ḓi ḓa kha iwe luṱanu na luvhili a tshi ri, ‘Ndo laṱa,’ u fanela u ḓi mu hangwela.”" 
Luke17:5 Vhaapostola vha amba na Muṋe washu vha ri, “Kha vha ri engedze lutendo.”" 
Luke17:6 Muṋe washu a tshi vha fhindula a ri, “Ngavhe ni vhe ni na lutendo lune lwa tou lingana na mbeu ya muhuyu, no vha ni tshi nga vhudza hoyu murebeila na ri, ‘Tupuwa u yo ḓiṱavha lwanzheni!’ na wana wo no tupuwa." 
Luke17:7 “Ndi nnyi waṋu henefha ane a nga ri e na mushumi wawe wa u lima kana wa u lisa nngu, a ri uyo mushumi a tshi vhuya a amba nae a ri, ‘Dzulani zwaṋu fhasi ni ḽe’?" 
Luke17:8 Tshaṋu a si u sokou amba nae na ri, ‘Nndugiseleni zwiḽiwa ni ambare zwavhuḓi ni zwi ḓise, ndi thome ndi ḽe, ndi nwe, ndi hone na inwi ni tshi ḓo kona u ḽa na nwa’?" 
Luke17:9 Nṋa mushumi ó ita zwe a vhudzwa u a vhuya a livhuhiwa naa? 
Luke17:10 Na inwi musi no khunyeledza zwoṱhe zwe Mudzimu a ni vhudza, ni sokou ri, ‘Riṋe a ri na tshe ra shuma; ro tou ita zwo ri fanelaho.’ ”" 
Luke17:11 Musi Yesu a tshee lwendoni lwa u ya Jerusalema, a bva nga vhukati ha Samaria na Galelia." 
Luke17:12 Musi a kha ḓi tou ri u a dzhena kha muṅwe muḓi, a ṱangana na vhathu vha fumi vha re na vhulwadze ha lukanda vhu kumadzaho, vha ri vho ima fhaḽa kulenyana" 
Luke17:13 vha vhidzelela vha ri, “Yesu Muṋe washu, a ri khathutshelwi zwashu naa?”" 
Luke17:14 Yesu a tshi vha vhona a amba navho a ri, “Iyani ha vhotshifhe vha ni vhone.” Vhe nḓilani vha fhola." 
Luke17:15 Muṅwe wavho a tshi vhona uri o fhola, a mbo ḓi huma a tshi khou ṱavha mukosi a tshi renda Mudzimu." 
Luke17:16 A ḓa a ḓiposa fhasi milenzheni ya Yesu, a mu livhuha. Uyo munna o vha e Musamaria." 
Luke17:17 Yesu a ri, “Hufha ho fhodzwa vha fumi, zwino vhaḽa vhaṅwe vha 9 vha ngafhi?" 
Luke17:18 Khezwi hu si na o vhuyaho uri a livhuhe Mudzimu, arali e si uyu mutsinda!”" 
Luke17:19 A amba nae a ri, “Takuwani zwaṋu ni ṱuwe; lutendo lwaṋu lwo ni fhodza.”" 
Luke17:20 Vhaṅwe Vhafarisei vho vhuya vha vhudzisa Yesu uri muvhuso wa Mudzimu u ḓo ḓa lini, Ene a fhindula a ri, “Muvhuso wa Mudzimu u tshi ḓa muthu a nga si u vhone nga maṱo na u sedza hani." 
Luke17:21 A hu na ane a ḓo tou ri, ‘Asuyu!’ kana ane a ri, ‘Asuuḽa!’ ngauri muvhuso wa Mudzimu wo no ḓi vha vhukati haṋu.”" 
Luke17:22 Ndi hone a tshi amba na vhafunziwa a ri, “Hu ḓo ḓa tshifhinga tshine na ḓo ṱuvha u vhona ḓuvha ḽithihi zwaḽo ḽa Mubebwa-nga-muthu, hone ni si ḽi vhone." 
Luke17:23 Hu ḓo vha na vhane vha ḓo ni vhudza vha ri, ‘U hafhaḽaa!’ kana vha ri, ‘U ngeno!’ Hone inwi ni songo vhuya na ya; ni songo vha tevhela;" 
Luke17:24 Mubebwa-nga-muthu nga ḓuvha ḽawe u ḓo tou nga lupenyo lune lu tshi ri vhenge lutomboni, lwa vhonetshela u bva vhusendakamisi u guma vhusendekamisi." 
Luke17:25 Hone o fanela u thoma u tambudzwa zwinzhi, a vhuye a tou landulwa nga vhenevha vhathu vha musalauno." 
Luke17:26 Zwa misi ya Mubebwa-nga-muthu zwi ḓo tou fana na zwiḽa zwa misi ya Nua. 
Luke17:27 Ho vha hu tshi ḽiwa, hu tshi nwiwa, hu tshi dzewa, ha vhuya ha swika ḓuvha ḽe Nua a dzhena tshikepeni, maḓi mahulu a mbo ḓa a vha lozwa vhoṱhe." 
Luke17:28 Zwi ḓo tou vhuya zwi zwa misi iḽa ya Loto. Ho vha hu tshi ḽiwa, hu tshi nwiwa, hu tshi rengwa hu tshi rengiswa, hu tshi liṅwa, hu tshi fhaṱwa." 
Luke17:29 Ho ḓo ri ḓuvha ḽe Loto a ṱutshela muḓi wa Sodoma, Mudzimu a nisa mulilo na matombo a dugaho, ha vha u vha lozwa vhoṱhe." 
Luke17:30 Na nga ḓuvha ḽa u dzumbuluwa ha Mubebwa-nga-muthu zwi ḓo ḓi tou ralo. 
Luke17:31 “Ane a ḓo vha e muṱani nga ḽeneḽo ḓuvha a songo tsha vhuya a dzhena nḓuni u yo dzhia thundu yawe, na a re tsimuni a songo tsha humela hayani." 
Luke17:32 Kani-ha no hangwa zwa musadzi wa Loto! 
Luke17:33 Ane a tata u ṅaledza vhutshilo hawe u a ḓilozwa, ane a fa ndi ene ane a ḓo tshila." 
Luke17:34 Vhusiku honoho vhavhili vha ḓo vha vhulaloni vhuthihi, muṅwe wavho a dzhiwa, muṅwe wavho a dzhiwa, muṅwe a siwa." 
Luke17:35 Vhasadzi vhavhili vha ḓo vha vha tshi khou sinḓisana mutulini muthihi; muṅwe wavho a dzhiwa, muṅwe a siwa.”" 
Luke17:36 Ndi hone vhafunziwa vha tshi mu vhudzisa vha ri, “Hu ḓo vha hu ngafhi Muṋe washu?” Yesu a vha fhindula a ri, “Hune ha vha na tshitumbu ndi hune maanga a kuvhangana hone.”" 
Luke17:37  
Luke18:1 Yesu a tshi ṱoḓa u vha funza uri vha fanela u dzula vha tshi rabela vha sa kulei nungo, a vha vhudza tshifanyiso hetshi" 
Luke18:2 a ri, “Muḓini muṅwe ho vhuya ha vha na muṅwe muhaṱuli we a vha a sa ofhi Mudzimu, na muthu a sa londi." 
Luke18:3 Zwino muḓini wonoyo ho vha hu na muṅwe musadzi wa tshilikadzi; onoyo o vha a tshi ḓi ya ha muhaṱuli a tshi ri, ‘Kha vha nndamulele-vho kha swina ḽanga.’" 
Luke18:4 Ha fhela tshifhinga uyo muhaṱuli a sa zwi londi, hone a guma nga u elekanya a ri, ‘Nangwe ndi sa ofhi Mudzimu, na muthu ndi sa londi," 
Luke18:5 hone vhunga hei tshilikadzi i tshi ṱolou nnzindela, ndi ḓo vhuya nda sokou i lamulela ngauri nda sa ralo i ḓo ḓi ṱolou nnzindela, ya ḓo vhuya ya nndina!’ ”" 
Luke18:6 Muṋe washu a konou ri, “Edzonu pfa zwine muhaṱuli wa mbilu mmbi a amba!" 
Luke18:7 Zwino Mudzimu Ene vhanangiwa vhawe vhane vha mu ṱavhela mukosi vhusiku na masiari, a nga kundwa ngani u vha lamulela, naho a vha lengelela?" 
Luke18:8 Nṋe ndi ri u ḓo ṱavhanya u vha lamulela. Hone Mubebwa-nga-muthu a tshi vhuya u ḓo wana shangoni hu tshi kha ḓi vha na lutendo naa?” 
Luke18:9 Na vha u ḓifhima uri vhone ndi vhavhuya, vha tshi nyadza vhaṅwe, Yesu a vha vhudza tshifanyiso hetshi a ri," 
Luke18:10 “Vhaṅwe vhanna vhavhili, Mufarisei na muthelisi, vho vhuya vha gonya thembeleni u yo rabela." 
Luke18:11 Mufarisei a ḓa a ima henefho, a rabelela mbiluni a ri, ‘Ndi a u livhuha Mudzimu ngauri a thi fani na vhaṅwe vhathu: ho dzula mavemu, vha songo lugaho, dziphombwe, nangwe e hoyu muthelisi, a thi fani nae." 
Luke18:12 Ndi ḓidzima luvhili nga vhege, ndi bvisa tshafumi kha zwoṱhe zwine nda wana.’" 
Luke18:13 Muthelisi ene a ima nga kulenyana a tshi tou tata na u lilala, a sokou ḓirwa khana nga u ḓisola a tshi ri, ‘Yawee Mudzimu, a thi hangwelwi-vho na, nṋe mutshinyi!’ ”" 
Luke18:14 Yesu a ri, “Ndi a ni vhudza ndi ri, we a ya hayani o hangwelwa ndi muthelisi, e si Mufarisei. Vhoṱhe vhane vha ḓihudza vha ḓo ṱukufhadzwa, vhane vha ḓiṱukufhadza vha ḓo huliswa.”" 
Luke18:15 Vhaṅwe vhathu vha vho ita na u ḓisa vhana ha Yesu uri a vha vhee zwanḓa. Vhafunziwa vha tshi zwi vhona vha vha kaidza. 
Luke18:16 Yesu Ene a vhidza avho vhana uri vha ḓe khae a ri, “Litshani vhana vha ḓe ha Nṋe; ni songo vha dzivhisa, ngauri muvhuso wa Mudzimu ndi wa vha no nga vhenevha." 
Luke18:17 Zwino ipfani-ha: ane a si tende u vhusiwa nga Mudzimu unga ṅwana, ha nga dzheni muvhusoni wawe na kathihi.”" 
Luke18:18 Muṅwe wa vhahulwane vha Majuda a mu vhudzisa a ri, “Nandi vhone mufunzi muvhuya, uri ndi wane vhutshilo vhu sa fheli ndi fanela u ita mini?”" 
Luke18:19 Yesu a mu fhindula a ri, “Khezwi ni tshi nnyita muvhuya? A hu na muthu a re muvhuya; muvhuya ndi Mudzimu e eṱhe." 
Luke18:20 Zwino milayo ya uri, ‘U songo ita vhupombwe; u songo vhulaha muthu; u songo tswa; u songo zwifhelela muṅwe; u hulise khotsi au na mme au’ hufha ni tshi i ḓivha?”" 
Luke18:21 Munna uyo a fhindula a ri, “Heyo yoṱhe ndo i tevhedza u bva hanani.”" 
Luke18:22 Yesu a tshi pfa zwenezwo a ri, “Ho tou sala tshithihi fhedzi tshine na fanela u tshi ita: rengisani zwoṱhe zwine na vha nazwo, ni kovhele vhashai tshelede; lwaṋu lupfumo ni ḓo lu wana ṱaḓulu. No no ita zwenezwo, ni ḓe ni vhe mufunziwa wanga.”" 
Luke18:23 Munna uyo a tshi pfa izwo a ṱungufhala, ngauri o vha o pfuma zwihulu." 
Luke18:24 Yesu a tshi vhona uri o ṱungufhala a ri, “Zwi konḓa hani uri vhapfumi vha dzhene muvhusoni wa Mudzimu!" 
Luke18:25 Muthu o pfumaho u dzhena muvhusoni wa Mudzimu zwi mu konḓela u fhira musi gamela i tshi edzisa u fhira nga buli ḽa ṋeleṱe.” 
Luke18:26 Vhathu vhe vha pfa a tshi ralo vha ri, “Zwino hu kha ḓi ḓo tshidzwa nnyi-ha?”" 
Luke18:27 Yesu a fhindula a ri, “Zwine vhathu zwa vha kunda, Mudzimu a zwi mu kundi.”" 
Luke18:28 Ndi hone Pitrosi a tshi ri, “Kha vha dzou vhona riṋe, ro ṱutshela zwoṱhe zwe ra vha ri nazwo ra vha vhafunziwa vhavho.”" 
Luke18:29 Yesu a ri, “Zwino ipfani-ha: muthu ane a ṱutshela nnḓu yawe kana musadzi kana vharathu kana vhabebi kana vhana vhawe a tshi itela muvhuso wa Mudzimu," 
Luke18:30 Mudzimu ha nga litshi u mu ṋea zwi no fhira kule zwiḽa zwe a ṱutshela. U ḓo mu ṋea musi a tshee fhano shangoni; huno musi ndi tshi vhuya u ḓo mu ṋea na vhutshilo vhu sa gumi.” 
Luke18:31 Yesu a vhidzela vha 12 thungo a amba navho a ri, “Ḓivhani uri ri khou gonya Jerusalema. Henengei hu ḓo itea zwoṱhe zwe vhaporofita vha ṅwala vha tshi amba Mubebwa-nga-muthu uri:" 
Luke18:32 U ḓo kumedzwa vhannḓa. Vhenevho vha ḓo tamba ngae vha mu tambudza, vha tshi mu pfela na mare." 
Luke18:33 Vha ḓo mu rwa nga mboma, vha fhedza nga u mu vhulaha. Hone nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuraru u ḓo vuwa vhafuni.”" 
Luke18:34 Vhafunziwa ayo mafhungo a vho ngo kona u a ṱalukanya ngauri o vha a tshee o vha dzumbama, huno vha si ḓivhe uri Yesu a tshi ralo u amba mini." 
Luke18:35 Musi Yesu a tshi vho sendela Jerikho, ha vha uri muṅwe munna wa bofu o dzula tsini ha nḓila a tshi khou humbela zwifhiwa." 
Luke18:36 Onoyo a tshi pfa hu tshi khou fhira gogo ḽihulu a vhudzisa uri hu khou itea mini. 
Luke18:37 Vha mu vhudza vha ri, “Hu khou fhira Yesu wa Nazaretha.”" 
Luke18:38 Ene a vhidzelela a ri, “Yesu Murwa wa Dafita, a thi khathutshelwi zwanga naa?”" 
Luke18:39 Vhathu vhe vha vha vhe phanḓa vha mu kaidza uri a fhumule, fhedzi ha tou vha hone a tshi ṋaṋa u ṱavha mukosi a tshi ri, “Murwa wa Dafita, a thi khathutshelwi zwanga naa?”" 
Luke18:40 Yesu a ima a ri uyo munna wa bofu a ḓiswe. A tshi swika Yesu a mu vhudzisa a ri," 
Luke18:41 “Ni funa ndi tshi ni itela mini?” Ene a ri, “Muṋe wanga, ndi tama u vhona.”" 
Luke18:42 Ndi hone Yesu a tshi amba nae a ri, “Nazwino fholani ni vhone; lutendo lwaṋu lwo ni fhodza.”" 
Luke18:43 Kathihi fhedzi a mbo ḓi kona u vhona; a renda Mudzimu a tshi khou tevhela Yesu. Vhathu vhoṱhe vha tshi zwi vhona vha renda Mudzimu. 
Luke19:1 Yesu a dzhena Jerikho a fhira nga vhukati hawo. 
Luke19:2 Henefho ho vha hu na muhulwane wa vhathelisi, o pfumaho, ane a pfi Zakia." 
Luke19:3 Onoyo o vha a tshi tama u vhona uri Yesu ndi ufhio, a ro kundwa nge vhathu vha vha vho ḓalesa, na ene a dovha a vha mupfufhi." 
Luke19:4 Ndi hone a tshi gidimela phanḓa a gonya muhuyulukuse uri a kone u vhona Yesu ngauri o vha a tshi khou ḓa u fhira nga henefho. 
Luke19:5 Yesu a tshi swika henefho a lavhelesa nṱha a amba na Zakia a ri, “Zakia, ṱavhanyani ni tse; ṋamusi ndi mueni waṋu.”" 
Luke19:6 Zakia a ṱavhanya a tsa, a mu ṱanganedza nga dakalo ḽihulu." 
Luke19:7 Vhathu vhoṱhe vhe vha zwi vhona vha gungula vha ri, “Vhonani o yo dalela mutshinyi!”" 
Luke19:8 Zakia a takuwa a amba na Muṋe washu a ri, “Muṋe wanga, ndi ḓo kovhela vhashai hafu ya thundu yanga; huno arali hu na muṅwe we nda dzhia tshithu tshawe nga vhufhura, ndi ḓo mu lifhela tsho andiswa luṋa.”" 
Luke19:9 Ndi hone Yesu a tshi mu vhudza a ari, “Ṋamusi hoyu muṱa wo tshidzwa, vhunga iṱali na uyu e ṅwana wa Abrahamu." 
Luke19:10 Nahone Mubebwa-nga-muthu o ḓa u ṱoḓa vho xelaho uri a vha tshidze.” 
Luke19:11 Vhathu vha tshi kha ḓi thetshelesa zwenezwo, Yesu a isa phanḓa nga u vha vhudza tshifanyiso; ngauri o vha o no vha tsini ha Jerusalema, vhathu vha tshi humbula uri muvhuso wa Mudzimu ndi hone u tsini-tsini na u swika." 
Luke19:12 A ri, “Muṅwe mukololo o vhuya a ya shangoni ḽa kule uri a vhumbwe khosi a konou vhuya hayani." 
Luke19:13 Hone a sa athu ṱuwa a vhidza vhaṅwe vhashumi vhawe vha fumi, muṅwe na muṅwe a mu ṋea ḽingwende ḽa musuku, a vha vhudza a ri, ‘Ni sale ni tshi ḽi bindulisa u swika ndi tshi vhuya!’" 
Luke19:14 Zwino vhathu vha shangoni ḽa hawe vho vha vha tshi mu vhenga; o no ṱuwa vha ruma vhaḓinḓa uri vha swike vha ri, ‘Hoyo munna a ri vhuyi ra funa a tshi ri vhusa.’" 
Luke19:15 “Musi a tshi vhuya hayani o no vhumbwa khosi, a vhidzisa vhaḽa vhashumi vhawe vhe a vha fha tshelede uri a pfe zwe vha bindula." 
Luke19:16 Wa u thoma a ḓa a ri, ‘Muṋe wanga, ḽiḽa ḽingwende ḽavho ḽo vhuisa maṅwe a fumi.’" 
Luke19:17 Muṋe wawe a ri, ‘A u vhoni-ha mushumi wanga wavhuḓi! Vhunga wo fulufhedzea kha izwi zwiṱukuṱuku ndi ḓo u ita gota ḽa miḓi ya fumi.’" 
Luke19:18 Wa vhuvhili a ḓa a ri, ‘Muṋe wanga, ḽiḽa ḽingwende ḽavho ḽo vhuisa maṅwe maṱanu.’" 
Luke19:19 Na onoyo muṋe wawe a amba nae a ri, ‘Iwe ndi ḓo u ita gota ḽa miḓi miṱanu.’" 
Luke19:20 Ndi hone hu tshi ḓa muṅwe a ri, ‘Muṋe wanga, tshelede yavho khei; ndo vha ndo i puta nga dugu nda i dzumba" 
Luke19:21 nge nda vha ofha, vhunga vhe muthu wa tshiṱuhu; vha vhila mavhoḓa a tshelede ye vha si i vhee, vha kaṋa he vha si lime.’" 
Luke19:22 Muṋe wawe a ri, ‘Mushumi a sa ḓivhalei ndiwe! Eneo maipfi au ndi ḓo u haṱula ngao! Hufha u tshi ri u nnḓivha ndi muthu wa tshiṱuhu; ndi vhila mavhoḓa a tshelede ye nda si vhee, ndi kaṋa he nda si lime!" 
Luke19:23 Zwino khezwi u songo tou vhea tshelede yanga banngani uri ndi tshi vhuya ndi i dzhie yo no dzwala?’ 
Luke19:24 A konou vhudza vhe vha vha vho ima henefho a ri, ‘Mu dzhieleni heyo tshelede ni fhe uḽa a re na fumi ḽa bonndo!’" 
Luke19:25 Vha mu fhindula vha ri, ‘Muṋe washu, hufha o no ḓi vha na fumi ḽoṱhe!’" 
Luke19:26 Muṋe wavho a tshi fhindula a ri, ‘Nṋe ndi ri ane a vha na zwawe u ḓo engedzwa; hone a si na tshawe u ḓo dzhielwa na zwiṱukuṱuku zwine a vha nazwo." 
Luke19:27 A vha aḽa maswina anga e a vha a sa funi ndi tshi vha khosi yao, a ḓiseni fhano ni a vhulahe ndi tshi zwi vhona!’ ”" 
Luke19:28 Yesu o no ralo a fhirela phanḓa a gonya Jerusalema. 
Luke19:29 A tshi sendela tsini na Bethefage na Bethania, Thavhani ya Miolivi, a ruma vhafunziwa vhavhili" 
Luke19:30 a ri, “Iyani muḓini hoyo u re afho phanḓa. Ni ḓo ri ni tshi tou dzhena na wana donngana yo vhoxwaho i sa athu vhuya ya namelwa nga muthu; ni i vhofholole ni i ḓise." 
Luke19:31 Arali na vhudziswa uri, ‘Ndi mini ni tshi i vhofholola?’ ni fhindule ni ri, ‘Muṋe washu u a i ṱoda!’ ”" 
Luke19:32 Avho vhaḓinḓa vha ṱuwa, nangoho vha wana zwoṱhe zwo tou ralo." 
Luke19:33 Musi vha tshi kha ḓi vhofholola donngana yeneyo, vhaṋe vhayo vha vha vhudzisa vha ri, “Ndi mini ni tshi vhofholola iyo donngana?”" 
Luke19:34 Vhone vha fhindula vha ri, “Muṋe washu u a i ṱoḓa.”" 
Luke19:35 Vha tshi ralo vha i isa ha Yesu, vha konou kapea nguvho dzavho khayo, vha mu namedza." 
Luke19:36 A tshi khou tshimbila vhathu vha adza nguvho dzavho gondoni. 
Luke19:37 Musi a tshi vho sendela Jerusalema, fhaḽa hune gondo ḽa tsa na Thavha ya Miolivi, gogo ḽoṱhe ḽa vhafunziwa vhawe vha thoma u pembela na u ṱavha mikosi vha tshi renda Mudzimu vha tshi takalela maḓembe oṱhe e vha a vhona." 
Luke19:38 Vha ri, “Nga hu rendwe Khosi i ḓaho nga dzina ḽa Muṋe washu! Makoleni hu vhe na mulalo. Thendo i ye ha Mudzimu ṱaḓulu-ṱaḓulu.”" 
Luke19:39 Ndi hone vhaṅwe vha Vhafarisei vhe vha vha vhe vhukati ha gogo vha tshi amba na Yesu vha ri, “Vhafunzi, kha vha kaidze vhafunziwa vhavho!”" 
Luke19:40 Yesu a fhindula a ri, “Ndi a ni vhudza ndi ri: Arali avha vha fhumula, matombo a ḓo vha one a no fhululedza.”" 
Luke19:41 Musi a tshi vho sendela tsini ha muḓi, a tshi u vhona, a u lilela a ri," 
Luke19:42 “Ngavhe vhukuma ṋamusi wo vha u tshi ḓivha zwine zwa ḓisa mulalo; zwino zwo ro u dzumbama. 
Luke19:43 Hu ḓo ḓa tshifhinga tshine maswina au a ḓo u govhela, o tou u tangela ngomu, a u zhakeledza a tshi bva thungo dzoṱhe." 
Luke19:44 Vha ḓo u thutha ha sala hu si tshee na na tombo na ḽithihi ḽi re nṱha ha ḽiṅwe, vhana vhau vha ḓo devhekanywa, ngauri a wo ngo ṱalukanya tshifhinga tshe Mudzimu a ḓa u u lamulela ngatsho!”" 
Luke19:45 Yesu a dzhena muṱani wa thembele a pandela vhathu vhe vha vha vha tshi khou rengisa henefho," 
Luke19:46 a tshi ri, “Ho ṅwalwa upfi: ‘Nnḓu yanga i ḓo vha nnḓu ya thabelo,’ zwino inwi no no i shandula ‘bako ḽa mavemu.’ ”" 
Luke19:47 Yesu a ḓi funza thembeleni ḓuvha ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe. Vhotshifhe vhahulwane na vhaḓivhi vha Mulayo na vhahulwane vha lushaka vho vha vha tshi ḓi ṱoda u mu vhulaha," 
Luke19:48 hone vha si wane tshine vha nga ita, ngauri vhathu vhoṱhe vho vha vha tshi mu thetshelesa, vha sa funi u fhirwa nga ipfi na ḽithihi." 
Luke20:1 Ḽiṅwe ḓuvha Yesu a tshi khou funza vhathu thembeleni a tshi ḓivhadza mafhungo maḓifha, vhotshifhe vhahulwane na vhaḓivhi vha Mulayo khathihi na vhahulwane vha lushaka vha ḓa" 
Luke20:2 vha amba nae vha ri, “Edzonu ri vhudza: nṋa ni tshi ita nga u ralo zwi bva kha nnyi? Ndi nnyi o ni fhaho maanḓa a u zwi ita?”" 
Luke20:3 Yesu a fhindula a ri, “Imani ndi ni vhudzise-vho mbudziso asiyi: Edzonu mmbudza:" 
Luke20:4 Zwiḽa Johanisi a tshi lovhedza zwo vha zwi tshi bva kha nnyi? Kha vhathu kana kha Mudzimu?” 
Luke20:5 Vhone vha thoma u amba nga tshavho vha ri, “Nṋa ri nga tou ri mini? Arali ra ri, ‘Kha Mudzimu,’ u ḓo ri, ‘Zwino-ha na kundwa ngani u tenda pfunzo yawe?’" 
Luke20:6 Zwino-vho ra ri, ‘Kha vhathu,’ heḽi gogo ḽoṱhe ḽi ḓo ri kanḓa nga matombo, ngauri vha ḓivha Johanisi e muporofita.”" 
Luke20:7 Ndi hone vha tshi fhindula vha ri a vha ḓivhi. 
Luke20:8 Yesu a amba navho a ri, “Izwo-ha na Nṋe a thi nga ni vhudzi uri ndi tshi ita hezwi zwithu zwo bva kha nnyi.”" 
Luke20:9 Ndi hone Yesu a tshi vha anetshela tshifanyiso hetshi a ri, “Muṅwe munna o vhuya a lima tsimu ya minḓirivhe, a konou i hirisa vhalimi, ene a pfulutshela shangoni ḽiṅwe a fhedza maḓuvha e henengei." 
Luke20:10 Musi tshifhinga tsha u fula nḓirivhe tshi tshi swika a ruma mushumi wawe kha avho vhalimi uri a yo dzhia mukovhe wawe wa khaṋo. Vhalimi vhone vha likita uyo muḓinḓa vha fhedza nga u mu pandela a si na tshithu. 
Luke20:11 A dovha a ruma muṅwe mushumi; na ene vha mu rwa vha tou tamba ngae vha mu pandela a si na tshithu. 
Luke20:12 A dovha a ruma mushumi wa vhuraru; na ene vha mu huvhadza vha mu pandela. 
Luke20:13 Ndi hone muṋe wa tsimu a tshi ri, ‘Nṋa ndi nga tou ita hani naa? Ndi ḓo ruma ṅwananga muthihi wa mutuka; ene khamusi vha ḓo mu teledza!’" 
Luke20:14 Vhaḽa vhalimi vha tshi vhona uyo ṅwana vha amba nga tshavho vha ri, ‘Hoyu ndi ene muḽaifa. Kha ri mu vhulahe uri tsimu i mbo ḓi vha yashu!’" 
Luke20:15 Nangoho vha mbo ḓi mu hwalela nnḓa ha tsimu vha mu vhulaha.” Yesu a konou vhudzisa a ri, “Nṋa avho vhalimi muṋe wa tsimu u ḓo vha itani?" 
Luke20:16 Ha nga ḓo ḓa a vha vhulaha, iyo tsimu a i ṋea vhaṅwe naa?” Vhathu vha tshi pfa ayo mafhungo vha amba vha ri, “Hezwo a zwi nga vhuyi zwa itea!”" 
Luke20:17 Yesu a vha lavhelesa a vha vhudzisa a ri, “Nṋa zwiḽa hu tshi ṅwalwa ha pfi, “ ‘Tombo ḽe ḽa vha ḽo laṱwa nga vhafhaṱi ḽa pfi a ḽi na mushumo, ḽo vha ḽone thikho ya tshifhaṱo,’ “hu ambiwa mini naa?" 
Luke20:18 Ane a wela kha tombo iḽo u ḓo vunḓekana; hu ḓi nga ane ḽa mu wela, ḽi a mu pwaṱukanya.”" 
Luke20:19 Vhaḓivhi vha Mulayo na vhotshifhe vhahulwane vha zwi pfa uri tshifanyiso itsho tshi amba vhone, ndi zwe vha ṱoḓa u fara Yesu na zwenezwo, vha ro ofha vhathu." 
Luke20:20 Ndi hone vha tshi vho tou dzula vho lindela uri tshifhinga tshi ḓo vhuya tsha swika. Vha ruma zwifheṱi ha Yesu zwa ya zwi tshi nga vhathu kwavho uri zwi mu fashe nga zwine a amba, uri vha kone u mu fara vha mu kumedze muvhusi." 
Luke20:21 Zwifheṱi zwenezwo zwa amba nae zwa ri, “Vhafunzi, ri a zwi ḓivha uri zwine vhone vha amba na zwine vha funza ndi zwone. Ri ḓivha na uri a vha ṱaluli muthu, tshavho ndi u funza nḓila yone-yone ine Mudzimu a funa vhathu vha tshi tshila ngayo." 
Luke20:22 Kha vha dzou ri vhudza-vho: Nṋa zwo tendelwa u thela muthelo wa Khisara kana a zwongo tendelwa?” 
Luke20:23 Yesu Ene a tshi vhona vhukwila havho, a vha vhudza a ri," 
Luke20:24 “Edzonu ntsumbedza sheleni afho. Nṋa iyi ṱhoho na dzina ḽi re khayo ndi zwa nnyi?” Vha fhindula vha ri, “Ndi zwa Khisara.”" 
Luke20:25 Yesu a ri, “Ahaa, izwo Khisara mu fheni zwi re zwawe; Mudzimu ni mu fhe zwi re zwawe.”" 
Luke20:26 Ha vha u kundwa havho u mu fasha henefho vhukati ha vhathu, vha vho sokou fhumula vho akhamadzwa nga phindulo yawe." 
Luke20:27 Vhaṅwe Vhasadukei vha ḓa ha Yesu (ndi vhaḽa vha no ri u vuwa ha vhafu a huho) vha mu vhudzisa vha ri," 
Luke20:28 “Vhafunzi, Mushe o ri siela mulayo une wa ri, ‘Arali munna a fa a si na ṅwana a sia musadzi, musadzi uyo kha a sale na murathu wawe uri a bebele mukomana.’" 
Luke20:29 Zwino ho vhuya ha vha na vhaṅwe vhaṱhannga vhaṱanu na vhavhili, vhana vha munna. Mukomana khavho a dzea musadzi, a fa a si na ṅwana." 
Luke20:30 A mu tevhelaho a sala na iyo tshilikadzi, huno na kha ene zwa ḓi ralo," 
Luke20:31 musadzi a sala na wa vhuraru. Zwa ḓi ralo kha vhoṱhe vhuṱanu na vhuvhili havho vha tshi ḓi fa vha si na ṅwana nae. 
Luke20:32 Ha vhuya ha fa na ene musadzi. 
Luke20:33 Zwino musi vhafu vha tshi vuwa musadzi uyo u ḓo vha wa nnyi? Hufha vhoṱhe vhuṱanu na vhuvhili havho o vha musadzi wavho!” 
Luke20:34 Yesu a vha fhindula a ri, “Fhano shangoni vhathu vha a dzea, vha dzewa," 
Luke20:35 hone vhane vha ḓo wanala vho fanelwa nga u vuwa vhafuni kha vhutshilo vhu ḓaho, a vha tsha ḓo dzea, a vha tsha ḓo dzewa," 
Luke20:36 hufha vha tshi ḓo vha vha sa tsha fa, vha tshi vho nga vharuṅwa, vhe vhana vha Mudzimu nge a vha vusa vhafuni." 
Luke20:37 “Zwino kha zwa u vuswa ha vhafu, na ene Mushe u a ri sumbedza uri vha a vuswa. Ndi fhaḽa hune a amba nga tshiṱaka tsha muunga tshi tshi duga a tshi ri, ‘Muṋe washu ndi Mudzimu wa Abrahamu, na wa Isaka, na wa Jakopo.’" 
Luke20:38 Zwino-ha Mudzimu a si wa vho faho, ndi wa vha tshilaho, ngauri vha re nae, vhoṱhe vha a tshila.”" 
Luke20:39 Vhaṅwe vhaḓivhi vha Mulayo vha ri, “Vho amba zwone Vhafunzi!”" 
Luke20:40 Vhoṱhe vha vho tata u ḓi ṱolou mu vhudzisa dzimbudziso. 
Luke20:41 Yesu a amba navho a ri, “Nṋa hu khou ambelwafhi hu tshi pfi Mesia u ḓo vha muḓuhulu wa Dafita?" 
Luke20:42 Hufha Dafita ene muṋe a tshi amba Buguni ya Dziphisalema a tshi ri, “ ‘Muṋe wa vhoṱhe o amba na Muṋe wanga a ri: Dzula hafha thungo ya tshauḽa tshanga, ri vhuse roṱhe," 
Luke20:43 ndi vhuye ndi ite maswina au vhukando ha milenzhe yau.’ 
Luke20:44 “Asizwo-ha, zwi nga itea hani uri Mesia a vhe muḓuhulu wa Dafita? Hufha Dafita ene muṋe a tshi mu amba a tshi tou ri, ‘Muṋe wanga’?”" 
Luke20:45 Yesu a konou amba na vhafunziwa vhawe vhathu vhoṱhe vha tshi zwi pfa, a ri," 
Luke20:46 “Ni thanyele vhaḓivhi vha Mulayo vhane vha funesa u tshimbila vho ambara phuraphura na u loshwa vanḓani, vhadzia-u-nanga-madzulo a phanḓa sinagogoni na zwimimani." 
Luke20:47 Vha lapfisa thabelo dzavho vha tshi itela u vhonwa nga vhathu, ngeno vha tshi ḽa thundu dza tshilikadzi vha fhedza. Ṱhamu ine vha ḓo i wana i ḓo vhavhesa.”" 
Luke21:1 Yesu a tshi lavhelesa a vhona vhapfumi vha tshi khou longa zwifhiwa zwavho bogisini ḽa zwifhiwa. 
Luke21:2 Huno a vhona na iṅwe tshilikadzi i si na tshayo i tshi bvisa masennde mavhili. 
Luke21:3 Yesu a ri, “Zwino ipfani-ha: tshilikadzi hei i si na tshayo yo bvisa zwi no fhira zwa vhaṅwe vhoṱhe;" 
Luke21:4 vhaṅwe vho tou ṱusa kha lupfumo lwavho, hu uri uyu musadzi, na vhushai háwe, o bvisa zwoṱhe zwe a vha o fanela u ḽa zwone.”" 
Luke21:5 Vhaṅwe vho vha vha tshi khou amba nga thembele, vha tshi sumbedzana matombo avhuḓi e ya fhaṱwa ngao, na nduvho dza u i ṱama dze vhathu vha bvisa. Ndi hone Yesu a tshi ri," 
Luke21:6 “Hu ḓo ḓa tshifhinga tshine hezwi zwoṱhe zwine na zwi vhona zwa ḓo thuthekanywa hu si sale na tombo na ḽithihi nṱha ha ḽiṅwe.” 
Luke21:7 Vha mu vhudzisa vha ri, “Vhafunzi, kha vha ri vhudze uri zwine vha amba zwi ḓo itea lini, na tshiga tshine ra ḓo vhona ngatsho uri zwo sendela.”" 
Luke21:8 Yesu a ri, “Ni dzule no fhaṱuwa uri ni si xedzwe; hu ḓo ḓa vhanzhi vha tshi ri ndi vhone Nṋe, muṅwe na muṅwe a tshi ri ndi ene Khristo, kana vha ri, ‘Tshifhinga tsho swika.’ Inwi ni songo vha tevhela." 
Luke21:9 Musi ni tshi pfa mikosi ya dzinndwa na mifhirifhiri ni songo farwa nga nyofho; hezwo zwone zwi fanela u thoma u ḓa, hone zwi sa ambi uri vhufhelo ha shango ndi hone ho swika.”" 
Luke21:10 A dovha a ri, “Tshakha dzi ḓo bva pfumo dza lwa; na mivhuso i ḓo vutshelana." 
Luke21:11 Hu ḓo vha na midzinginyo mihulu ya shango na dzinḓala na dwadze hoṱhe-hoṱhe; hu ḓo vha na zwi ofhisaho na maṱula mahulu kha lutombo. 
Luke21:12 Hone musi hezwo zwithu zwi sa athu itea, vha ḓo ni fara, vha ḓo ni tovhola, Majuda vha ḓo ni sengisa sinagogoni dzavho vha ni valela dzhele. Ni ḓo hwelelwa kha mahosi na magota nge na vha vhanga," 
Luke21:13 ha ḓo vha hu hone u ni vulela nḓila ya u vha ṱhanzi dzanga. 
Luke21:14 Zwine na fanela u dzula no elekanya mbiluni ndi u sa ḽa mbilu na ri ni ḓo fhindula hani," 
Luke21:15 ngauri ndi Nṋe ane a ḓo ni ṋea maipfi na vhuṱali ha sa ḓo vha na swina ḽine ḽa nga kona u ni pikisa kana u ni hanedza. 
Luke21:16 Ni ḓo fheṱwa nga vhabebi na nga vhe na bebwa navho na nga mashaka, na dzikhonani, vhaṅwe vhaṋu vha vhulawa." 
Luke21:17 Vhathu vhoṱhe vha ḓo ni vhenga nge na vha vhanga. 
Luke21:18 Naho zwo ralo ndi ri na luvhudzi na luthihi ṱhohoni dzaṋu a lu nga lovhi. 
Luke21:19 Na ima no khwaṱha ni sa fheli mbilu, ndi hone ni tshi ḓo tshidzwa." 
Luke21:20 “Musi ni tshi vhona Jerusalema u tshi khou tangwa nga dzimmbi, ni mbo ḓi ḓivha uri hu si kale u ḓo thuthekanywa." 
Luke21:21 Zwenezwo vha re Judia vha shavhele dzithavhani, vha re muḓini wonoyu vha bve, vha re nnḓa vha songo tsha dzhena." 
Luke21:22 Ndi wone musi une Mudzimu a ḓo lifhedza Israele ngawo uri hu khunyelele zwoṱhe zwine Maṅwalo a amba. 
Luke21:23 Maḓuvha eneo vho vhifhaho muvhilini na vha mamisaho zwi ḓo vha vhifhela nga maanḓa. Hu ḓo vha na u tambula huhulu fhano shangoni, huno ṱhamu ya Mudzimu i ḓo rwa vhathu avho." 
Luke21:24 Vhaṅwe vha ḓo ḽiwa nga pfumo, vhaṅwe vha thubiwa vha itwa dziphuli mashangoni oṱhe, Jerusalema u ḓo kandekanywa nga vhannḓa tshifhinga tshe vha ṋewa tsha vhuya tsha fela." 
Luke21:25 “Hu ḓo vha na maṱula kha ḓuvha na kha ṅwedzi na ṋaledzi. Hu ḓo vha na u hanganea na u ḓaḓa ha dzitshakha fhano shangoni nga u ofha magabelo a lwanzhe na u unga halwo. 
Luke21:26 Vhanna vha ḓo ṋoka nga u ofha zwine zwa ḓo wela shango ḽoṱhe, ngauri zwi re lutomboni zwi ḓo thudziwa zwa bva nḓilani dzazwo." 
Luke21:27 Zwenezwo vha ḓo vhona Mubebwa-nga-muthu a tshi ḓa e kha gole e na maanḓa na vhugala vhuhulu. 
Luke21:28 Musi zwenezwo zwi tshi thoma u itea, inwi takuwani ni lavhelele; u vhofhololwa haṋu hu ḓo vha hu tsini.”" 
Luke21:29 Ndi hone Yesu a tshi vha fanyisela a ri, “Kha ri fanyise nga muhuyu na miri miṅwe yoṱhe." 
Luke21:30 Na vhona i tshi ṱuma lurere ni mbo ḓi ḓivha uri tsho limuwa. 
Luke21:31 Na zwenezwo zwi ḓo ḓi tou ralo: zwithu izwo zwi tshi itea ndi hone ni tshi ḓo ḓivha uri muvhuso wa Mudzimu u tsini. 
Luke21:32 “Zwino ipfani-ha: zwoṱhe zwi ḓo itea vhathu vha tshilaho zwino vha sa athu fa. 
Luke21:33 Ḽiṱaḓulu na shango zwi ḓo lovha, maipfi anga one ha nga weli fhasi." 
Luke21:34 “Ni thanyele u rongomedzwa nga vhupangwa na nga vhudakwa na u ṱolou ḽa mbilu nga zwa vhutshilo vhuno, na tshenuwa ḓuvha heḽo ḽo swika," 
Luke21:35 ḽa nga mulavhu, ḽa fasha vhathu vhoṱhe vha dzulaho shangoni." 
Luke21:36 Dzulani no fhaṱuwa ni tshi rabela, uri ni wane nungo dza u ponyoka zwoṱhe zwenezwo zwine zwa ḓo bvelela, na u ima phanḓa ha Mubebwa-nga-muthu nga ḓuvha ḽa khaṱhulo.”" 
Luke21:37 Nga maḓuvha eneo Yesu o vha a tshi funza thembeleni nga masiari, nga madekwana a tshi bva muḓini a ya thavhani ine ya pfi Yamiolivi, a lala hone." 
Luke21:38 Nga matsheloni vhathu vhoṱhe vho vha vha tshi bubela thembeleni u pfa a tshi amba. 
Luke22:1 Ha sendela tshifhinga tsha vhuṱambo vhu no pfi Paseka, ha Vhurotho vhu si na mbilisa." 
Luke22:2 Vhotshifhe vhahulwane na vhaḓivhi vha Mulayo vho vha vha tshi khou ṱoḓa nḓila ya u vhulaha Yesu nga tshiphiri ngauri vho vha vha tshi ofha vhathu. 
Luke22:3 Zwenezwo Saṱhane a dzhena kha Judasi a no pfi Iskariote, muṅwe wa vha 12." 
Luke22:4 Onoyo a ṱuwa a yo sola na vhotshifhe vhahulwane na vhalangi vha vhalindathembele uri ene a nga vha sumbedza nḓila ya u fara Yesu. 
Luke22:5 Vhone vha takala, vha ita na u fulufhedzisa uri vha ḓo mu ṋea tshelede." 
Luke22:6 Judasi a tendelana navho a dzula o lindela tshifhinga tshine a nga fheṱa Yesu ngatsho vhathu vha sa zwi ḓivhi. 
Luke22:7 Ha swika ḓuvha ḽa vhuṱambo ha Vhurotho vhu si na mbilisa ḽine ha fanela u ṱhavhiwa ngwana dza Paseka. 
Luke22:8 Yesu a ruma Pitrosi na Johanisi a ri, “Iyani u ri lugisela Paseka, ri i ḽe.”" 
Luke22:9 Vhone vha mu vhudzisa vha ri, “Ndi ngafhi hune vha funa ri tshi i lugisa hone?”" 
Luke22:10 Ene a ri, “Vhonani, ni ḓo ri u dzhena afho Jerusalema na ṱangana na munna o hwala mvuvhelo ya maḓi. Ni mu tevhele nḓuni ine a dzhena khayo," 
Luke22:11 ni ambe na muṋe wa muṱa ni ri, ‘Vhafunzi vha khou vhudzisa iḽa kamara ine vha nga ḽela khayo Paseka na vhafunziwa vhavho.’" 
Luke22:12 Ene u ḓo ni sumbedza kamara khulwane ya tshitizi yo lugiswaho; ni i lugise henefho.” 
Luke22:13 Vha tshi ya vha wana zwe Yesu a amba zwo tou ralo, vha mbo lugisa Paseka." 
Luke22:14 Tshifhinga tshi tshi swika Yesu a lalela na vhaapostola. 
Luke22:15 A amba navho a ri, “Ndo tama hani u ḽa Paseka iyi na inwi ndi sa athu tambudzwa!" 
Luke22:16 Ndi a ni vhudza ndi ri, a thi tsha ḓo dovha nda i ḽa zwi vhuye zwi khunyelele muvhusoni wa Mudzimu.”" 
Luke22:17 Ndi hone Yesu a tshi dzhia tshinwelo a livhuha Mudzimu a konou ri, “Dzhiani ni nwe ni tshi tou sielisana," 
Luke22:18 ngauri ndi a ni vhudza ndi ri, a thi tsha ḓo dovha nda nwa waini u bva zwino muvhuso wa Mudzimu u vhuye u ḓe.”" 
Luke22:19 A konou dzhia na vhurotho, a livhuha Mudzimu a vhu ṅwatekanya a vha ṋea a tshi khou ri, “Hoyu ndi muvhili wanga [une wa khou kumedzwa hu u itela inwi. Ni ḓi ita hezwi, hu vhe u nnyelelwa.”" 
Luke22:20 A ḓi ralo na musi a tshi vha ṋea tshinwelo vho no ḽa tshilalelo; a ri, “Tshinwelo itshi ndi malofha anga ane a khou shululelwa inwi, a khwaṱhisa mulanga muswa.]" 
Luke22:21 “Huno vhonani! Muthu ane a ḓo mpheṱa u ḓi vha-vho henefhano zwiḽiwani na Nṋe. 
Luke22:22 Mubebwa-nga-muthu u ḓo fara nḓila ye Mudzimu a mu dzudzanyela, hone ane a mu fheṱa u ḓo zwi vhona!”" 
Luke22:23 Ndi hone vha tshi thoma u vhudzisana nga tshavho uri a nga vha e nnyi wavho a no ḓo ita zwo raloho. 
Luke22:24 Zwino ha vuwa khani vhukati ha vhafunziwa ya uri ane a nga pfi muhulwane khavho a nga vha e nnyi. 
Luke22:25 Yesu a amba navho a ri, “Mahosi a dzitshakha ndi one a no langa vhathu nga tshiṱuhu, vhavhusi vha ri ri pfi vhafuwi." 
Luke22:26 Kha inwi a zwo ngo ralo; muhulwane kha inwi nga a nge ene muṱuku; a re murangaphanḓa a vhe mushumeli. 
Luke22:27 Nṋa hone muhulwane ndi ufhio? Ndi uyo o dzulaho zwiḽiwani kana ndi a no khou ḓisa zwiḽiwa? A si o dzulaho zwiḽiwani kani? Huno vhonani-ha, Nṋe ndi khou nga mushumeli waṋu." 
Luke22:28 Ndi inwi vhe na konḓelela na Nṋe kha u tambula hanga," 
Luke22:29 ndi ni ita maḽaifa a vhuhosi honoho he nda ṋewa nga Khotsi," 
Luke22:30 ni ḓo ḽa muthathe na Nṋe muvhusoni wanga, na dzula kha khuluṋoni ni tshi vhusa matsinde a 12 a Israele." 
Luke22:31 “Simoni! Simoni! Vhonani! Mudzimu o tendela Saṱhane u ni fhefhera noṱhe sa goroi. 
Luke22:32 Nṋe-ha Simoni ndo ni rabelela uri ni si gunee. Huno inwi musi no no vhuya kha Nṋe ni khwaṱhise vharathu vhaṋu.” 
Luke22:33 Pitrosi a fhindula a ri, “Muṋe wanga, nṋe ndo ḓiimisela u valelwa dzhele na u fa navho!”" 
Luke22:34 Yesu a fhindula a ri, “Ndi tshi tou ni vhudza Pitrosi, mukukulume u sa athu lila vhusiku ha ṋamusi ni ḓo vha no no landula luraru na ri a ni nnḓivhi.”" 
Luke22:35 Zwenezwo Yesu a vha vhudzisa a ri, “Nṋa tshiḽa tshifhinga ndi tshi ni ruma ni si na tshipatshi na mukhwama na navhula no vhuya na lila tshithu naa?” Vhone vha fhindula vha ri, “Na tshithihi.”" 
Luke22:36 Yesu a amba navho a ri, “Hone zwino ane a vha na tshipatshi kana mukhwama u fanela u tshimbila nazwo; huno na a si na banga nga a tou rengisa badzhi yawe a ḽi renge." 
Luke22:37 Ndi a ni vhudza ndi ri: he ha ṅwalwa ha pfi, ‘O baḓekanywa na vhavhi’, zwo fanela u khunyelela kha Nṋe, ngauri zwe zwa ṅwalwa zwi tshi amba Nṋe zwi khou khunyelela.”" 
Luke22:38 Vhone vha ri, “Muṋe washu, ri na mapanga mavhili ngea!” Ene a fhindula a ri, “Mafhungo ayo kha ri a litshe.”" 
Luke22:39 Yesu a bva a ya Thavhani ya Miolivi sa misi; vhafunziwa vhawe vha bva nae. 
Luke22:40 Vha tshi swika henefho a amba navho a ri, “Rabelani uri ni si ungwe.”" 
Luke22:41 Ene a mbo ḓi vha sia henefho a swika hune muthu a tshi posa tombo ḽa swika, a gwadama a rabela a ri," 
Luke22:42 “Khotsi anga, arali zwi tshi konea uri tshinwelo itshi ndi si tshi nwe, a tshi mphiri zwanga naa? Naho ndi tshi ralo, hu songo itwa zwine Nṋe nda funa, hu itwe zwi funwaho nga Iwe.”" 
Luke22:43 [A vhona muruṅwa a tshi bva ṱaḓulu a tshi ḓa u mu khwaṱhisa. 
Luke22:44 A rabela o tou fhelela nga u pfa vhuṱungu, biko ḽawe ḽa rothela mavuni ḽi tshi nga marotha a malofha.]" 
Luke22:45 O no rabela a vhuelela ha vhafunziwa, a wana vho eḓela vho tou ṋoka nga u ṱungufhala." 
Luke22:46 A amba navho a ri, “No eḓela! Vuwani ni rabele uri ni sa ḓo xedzwa nga Saṱhane.”" 
Luke22:47 A tshi kha ḓi amba ha mbo swika tshigwada tsho rangwa phanḓa nga muṅwe wa vha 12, uḽa Judasi. Onoyo a ri u swika a mbo ḓi ya kha Yesu a mu kuvhatedza." 
Luke22:48 Hone Yesu a amba nae a ri, “A, Judasi, ni vhuya na tou swika kha u fheṱa Mubebwa-nga-muthu nga u tou mu kuvhatedza naa?”" 
Luke22:49 Khonani dza Yesu dzi tshi vhona zwine zwa ṱoḓa u itea dza ri, “Muṋe washu, a si khwiṋe ri tshi vha dzhena nga mapanga?”" 
Luke22:50 Muṅwe wavho a rema mushumi wa tshifhe muhulu nga banga a mu tumula nḓevhe ya tshauḽa. 
Luke22:51 Hone Yesu a ri, “Litshani zwa nndwa.” A konou kwama nḓevhe ya munna uyo a mu fhodza." 
Luke22:52 Yesu a mbo ḓi amba na vhotshifhe vhahulwane na vhalangi vha vhalindathembele na vhahulwane vha lushaka vhe vha vha vho ḓa u mu fara a ri, “Ni tou vhuya na ḓa no hwala mapanga na dzithonga nda nga ndi ḽivemu?" 
Luke22:53 Hufha ndo vha ndi tshi ṱwa na inwi thembeleni ḓuvha ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe; no kundwa ngani u mpfara? Tshino-ha ndi tshifhinga tshaṋu tsha musi hu tshi vhusa swiswi.” 
Luke22:54 Ndi hone vha tshi fara Yesu vha ṱuwa nae vha mu isa muṱani wa tshifhe muhulu, Pitrosi ene a tshi khou tevhela nga kule." 
Luke22:55 Vha vhasa mulilo muṱani vha ora, na Pitrosi a ḓa a dzula navho." 
Luke22:56 Muṅwe mushumi wa musidzana a tshi mu vhona nga tshedza tsha mulilo a mu sedzesa a ri, “Hoyu na ene ndi muṅwe ngae.”" 
Luke22:57 Pitrosi ene a hanedza a ri, “Khaladzi, nṋe hoyo muthu a thi vhuyi nda mu ḓivha.”" 
Luke22:58 Hu si kale muṅwe munna a mu vhona-vho a ri, “Na inwi ni muṅwe ngavho!” Pitrosi a ri, “Wa hashu, nṋe a thi muṅwe ngavho lini!”" 
Luke22:59 Ho no fhela tshifhinga tshine tsha nga vha awara muṅwe munna na ene a amba o tou khwaṱhisa a ri, “Vhukuma hoyu munna ndi muṅwe ngae, hufha e Mugalelia?”" 
Luke22:60 Pitrosi a ri, “Wa hashu, nṋe a thi ḓivhi uri ni khou amba mini.” A tshi kha ḓi ralo mukukulume wa vha u a lila." 
Luke22:61 Muṋe washu a rembuluwa a ṱanganya maṱo na Pitrosi, ha vha hu hone Pitrosi a tshi elelwa zwe Muṋe washu a mu vhudza a tshi ri, “Mukukulume u sa athu vhuya wa lila vhusiku ha ṋamusi ni ḓo vha no no landula luraru na ri a ni nnḓivhi.”" 
Luke22:62 Pitrosi a bvela nnḓa a lila lu ṱungufhadzaho. 
Luke22:63 Vhanna vhe vha vha vho linda Yesu vha tamba ngae vha tshi ita na u mu likita. 
Luke22:64 Vha mu thivha maṱo vha konou ri, “Porofita-ha, ndi nnyi o u rwaho?”" 
Luke22:65 Vha mu sema na nga maṅwe maṱamba manzhi. 
Luke22:66 Nga matshelonitsheloni ha mbo dzula khoro ya vhahulwane vha lushaka na vhotshifhe vhahulwane na vhaḓivhi vha Mulayo, Yesu a ḓiswa phanḓa havho," 
Luke22:67 vha amba nae vha ri, “Arali ni Mesia, ri vhudzeni.” Ene a fhindula a ri, “Arali nda ri, ‘Ndi Nṋe,’ a ni nga tendi;" 
Luke22:68 hu ḓi nga nda ni vhudzisa mbudziso, a ni nga fhinduli." 
Luke22:69 Hone u bva zwino Mubebwa-nga-muthu u vho ḓo dzula thungo ya tshauḽa tsha Mudzimu Ramaanḓa a vhusa nae.” 
Luke22:70 Vhoṱhe vha ri, “Izwo zwi amba uri ni Murwa wa Mudzimu?” Ene a vha fhindula a ri, “Inwi ni amba zwone; ndi Nṋe.”" 
Luke22:71 Vhone vha ri, “Ri kha ḓi ṱoḓa ṱhanzi dza mini, hufha zwe a amba ro tou ḓipfela nga roṱhe?”" 
Luke23:1 Ndi hone khoro yoṱhe i tshi takuwa vha isa Yesu ha Pilato; 
Luke23:2 vha thoma u mu hwelela vha tshi ri, “Hoyu munna ro mu wana a tshi khou fhiriṱanya vhathu vha hashu, a tshi vha dzivhisa na u thela muthelo wa Khisara, a tshi ḓiita Mesia, u ralo ha vha u ḓiita khosi.”" 
Luke23:3 Pilato a mu vhudzisa a ri, “Nṋa inwi ni khosi ya Majuda?” Ene a fhindula a ri, “Vha amba zwone.”" 
Luke23:4 Pilato a amba na vhotshifhe vhahulwane na gogo ḽoṱhe a ri, “Nṋe hoyu muthu a thi vhoni mulandu wawe.”" 
Luke23:5 Vhone vha tou oma kha ḽa uri, “U khou fhiriṱanya vhathu vhoṱhe kha ḽa Judia nga pfunzo yawe. O thoma Galelia, zwino o no swika na fhano.”" 
Luke23:6 Pilato a tshi pfa zwenezwo a vhudzisa a ri, “Nṋa uyu muthu ndi wa Galelia?”" 
Luke23:7 A tshi pfa uri Yesu u bva shangoni ḽa Herude a mu fhirisela khae, ngauri na ene Herude o vha e Jerusalema nga tshifhinga tshenetsho." 
Luke23:8 Herude a tshi vhona Yesu a takala nga maanḓa, ngauri o vha o no pfa ngae huno hu kale a tshi tama u mu vhona. O vha a tshi ri khamusi u ḓo vhona Yesu a tshi ita maḓembe." 
Luke23:9 Ndi zwe a vhudzisa Yesu tshino na tshiḽa, hone Ene a si mu fhindule." 
Luke23:10 Vhotshifhe vhahulwane na vhaḓivhi vha Mulayo vho vha vho ima henefho vha tshi khou mu hwelela vho tou tandisa tsinga. 
Luke23:11 Herude na maswole awe vha tamba nga Yesu vha tshi tou mu nyadza vha mu ambadza phuraphura ya maṱeleṱele, vha mu humisela ha Pilato." 
Luke23:12 U thomani Pilato na Herude vho vha vhe maswina, hone u bva ḓuvha ḽeneḽo vha vho anḓana." 
Luke23:13 Pilato a kuvhanganya vhotshifhe vhahulwane na vhahulwane vha lushaka na vhathu vhoṱhe," 
Luke23:14 a vha vhudza a ri, “Uyu muthu no mu ḓisa ha nṋe na ri u khou fhiriṱanya vhathu. Nṋe ndo mu sengisa ni tshi zwi pfa, hone a thi wani e na mulandu na muthihi kha zwoṱhe zwe na mu hwelela." 
Luke23:15 Hu ḓi nga Herude, na ene o wana a si na mulandu, ndi zwone zwe a mu humisela kha riṋe. A hu na tshe hoyu muthu a ita tsho eḓanwaho nga lufu." 
Luke23:16 Nazwino ndi ḓo tou ri a rwiwe nga nnzi nda konou mu vhofholola.” 
Luke23:17 [Nga Paseka Pilato o vha o fanela u ḓi vha vhofhololela muthu muthihi.] 
Luke23:18 Gogo ḽoṱhe ḽi tshi tou pfa Pilato a tshi ralo, ḽa zhamba mazha ḽa ri, “Kha a vhulawe, ri vhofhololelwe Barabasi!”" 
Luke23:19 (Barabasi onoyo o vha o farelwa mufhirifhiri we wa vuwa henefho Jerusalema, ha vhulawa na muthu.)" 
Luke23:20 Pilato a dovha a amba navho a tshi tama u vhofholola Yesu. 
Luke23:21 Vhone vha zhamba vha ri, “Kha a vhambiwe! Kha a vhambiwe kha tshifhambano!”" 
Luke23:22 Pilato a amba navho lwa vhuraru a ri, “Nṋa o tshinyani? Nṋe ndi vhona a si na mulandu wo eḓanwaho nga lufu! Ndi ḓo ri a wane nnzi ndi mu vhofholole.”" 
Luke23:23 Vhone vha tou ṋaṋa u zhamba vha tshi ḓi ri a vhambiwe, Pilato a vhuya a neta," 
Luke23:24 a vho sokou haṱula uri hu itwe nga he vha humbela ngaho. 
Luke23:25 A vhofholola we vha vha vho tou oma kha u mu humbela, uḽa we a vha o hoṋelwa dzhele nga mulandu wa mufhirifhiri na vhupondi, a vha kumedza Yesu uri vha ite zwine vha funa ngae." 
Luke23:26 Musi vha tshi khou ṱuwa nae vha fara muṅwe munna a no pfi Simoni wa Kirene a tshi khou dzhena muḓini, vha mu hwesa tshifhambano a tevhela Yesu." 
Luke23:27 A tevhelwa nga gogo ḽihulu ḽe khaḽo ha vha hu na vhasadzi vhe vha vha vha tshi khou mu lilela vha tshi tou ḓiṱhukukanya. 
Luke23:28 Yesu a rembuluwa a amba navho a ri, “Inwi vhasadzi vha Jerusalema! Ni songo lilela nṋe; ḓilileleni inwi vhaṋe ni lilele na vhana vhaṋu." 
Luke23:29 Ḓivhani uri hu ḓo ḓa maḓuvha ane vhathu vha ḓo ri, ‘Vha na mashudu vha re vhaumba, vha ṋowa dzi songo vhuyaho dza fara, na maḓamu a songo vhuyaho a mamisa!’" 
Luke23:30 Ndi hone “ ‘vha tshi ḓo amba na thavha vha ri: Ri zhakeni! Vha amba na zwikwara vha ri: Ri tibeni!’ 
Luke23:31 “Ndi uri arali thanda nṋu vha tshi tou i rali, yo omaho zwi ḓo tou ngani-ha?”" 
Luke23:32 Ha dzhiwa na vhaṅwe vhanna vhavhili vha zwigevhenga uri vha yo vhambiwa na Yesu. 
Luke23:33 Vha tshi swika fhethu hune ha pfi Dethele vha vhamba Yesu kha tshifhambano, na vhaḽa vhatshinyi vhavhili vha pfalwo; muṅwe thungo ya tshauḽa tshawe, muṅwe thungo ya tshamonde. [" 
Luke23:34 Yesu a ri, “Khotsi anga, vha hangwele; a vha ḓivhi zwine vha khou zwi ita.”] Vha kovhekana nguvho dzawe nga u tou ita madeṅwa." 
Luke23:35 Vhathu vha ima vha tshi khou lavhelesa, vhahulwane vha lushaka vhone vha tshi tou ita na u mu nzhonzhowedza vha tshi ri, “Hufha vhaṅwe o vha tshidza; kha a ḓitshidze-vho arali e ene Mesia, munangiwa wa Mudzimu.”" 
Luke23:36 Maswole na vhone vha mu ṋea waini yo vhiluluwaho vha tshi khou mu kolela 
Luke23:37 vha tshi ri, “Arali vhe vhone khosi ya Majuda muhali, kha vha ḓitshidze!”" 
Luke23:38 Nga nṱha ha ṱhoho yawe ho vha ho ṅwalwa upfi, “Hoyu ndi khosi ya Majuda.”" 
Luke23:39 Muṅwe wa zwiḽa zwigevhenga zwo vhambiwaho a mu holedza a ri, “Hufha u Mesia – ḓitshidze-ha u tshidze na riṋe!”" 
Luke23:40 Hone uḽa muṅwe a mu kaidza a ri, “Matsina na Mudzimu a ni mu ofhi? Hufha na inwi no haṱulwa u fana na onoyu?" 
Luke23:41 Hone riṋe zwo ri fanela, ri khou tou wana ṱhamu ya mishumo yashu. A vha uyu ha na tshe a tshinya.”" 
Luke23:42 A konou amba na Yesu a ri, “Yesu, vha nkhumbule-vho musi vha tshi dzhena vhuhosi!”" 
Luke23:43 Yesu a amba nae a ri, “Zwino ipfani-ha: ṋamusi ni ḓo vha na Nṋe Pharadisoni.”" 
Luke23:44 Masiari tshivhangalala nga 12 ḓuvha ḽa dzima, shango ḽoṱhe ḽe nzwii u swika nga tsha vhuraru tsha masiari. Sila ḽa lupila ḽe ḽa vha ḽi nḓuni ya Mudzimu ḽa kheruwa nga vhukati ḽa bva mbemba mbili." 
Luke23:45  
Luke23:46 Zwo no ralo Yesu a vhidzelela nga ipfi ḽihulu a ri, “Khotsi, muya wanga ndi u kumedza zwanḓani zwau!” A ri u ralo a dzama." 
Luke23:47 Mulangagomane a tshi vhona zwo iteaho a renda Mudzimu a ri, “Nangoho uyu muthu o vha e muvhuya!”" 
Luke23:48 Na vhathu vhanzhi-vhanzhi vhe vha vha vho kuvhanganela u tou vhona, vha tshi vhona zwo iteaho vha humela mahayani vha tshi khou ḓirwa dzikhana nga u pfa vhuṱungu." 
Luke23:49 Khonani dza Yesu khathihi na vhaḽa vhasadzi vhe vha vha vha tshi khou ḓi tshimbila nae u bva Galelia vho vha vho ima kule vha tshi khou vhona zwithu hezwo zwoṱhe. 
Luke23:50 Henefho ho vha hu na muṅwe munna a no pfi Josefa we a vha a tshi bva kha muṅwe muḓi wa Judia u no pfi Arimathia. Onoyo o vha e muthu muvhuya a pfaho Mudzimu, o dzulaho o lindela u ḓa ha muvhuso wa Mudzimu. Ndi zwe naho o vha e muraḓo wa khoro a si pfane na zwe vha langana na zwe vha ita." 
Luke23:51  
Luke23:52 A ya ha Pilato a mu humbela tshitumbu tsha Yesu. 
Luke23:53 A konou tshi fhahulula a tshi putela nga lukhaha lwavhuḓi a mu swiṱa tshaloni tsho korwaho kha tombo tshe tsha vha tshi sa athu swiṱa muthu. 
Luke23:54 Ḽo vha ḽi ḓuvha ḽa u lugisela Sabatha, yone i tshi vho ṱoḓou thoma." 
Luke23:55 Vhasadzi vhe vha ḓa na Yesu a tshi bva Galelia, vha tevhela vha ya u vhona tshalo na kuswiṱelwe kwa Yesu;" 
Luke23:56 vha konou humela hayani u lugisa mishonga na zwiḓolo zwa mufu. Nga Sabatha vha awela hu u tevhedza Mulayo. 
Luke24:1 Nga matshelonitsheloni a Swondaha vhaḽa vhasadzi vha bubela tshaloni na iḽa mishonga ye vha lugisa. 
Luke24:2 Vha wana tombo ḽe ḽa vha ḽo vala tshalo ḽo kunguluswa. 
Luke24:3 Vha tshi dzhena vha wana tshitumbu tsha Muṋe washu Yesu tshi si tsheeho. 
Luke24:4 Vha tshee vho hanganea, vha tshenuwa henefho tsini havho ho no ima vhanna vhavhili vho ambara zwiambaro zwi penyaho." 
Luke24:5 Vha kotamisa zwifhaṱuwo nga nyofho, hone avho vhanna vha vha vhudza vha ri, “A tshilaho ni mu ṱoḓelani vhafuni?" 
Luke24:6 Haho fhano; o vuwa. Kani-ha no hangwa zwiḽa zwe a ni vhudza a tshee Galelia 
Luke24:7 uri Mubebwa-nga-muthu o fanela u kumedzwa zwanḓani zwa vhatshinyi, a vhambiwa kha tshifhambano a konou vuwa nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuraru?”" 
Luke24:8 Ha vha hu hone vhasadzi vha tshi elelwa zwiḽa zwe a amba! 
Luke24:9 Vha ṱuwa tshaloni, vha hanelela ayo mafhungo oṱhe vhafunziwa vha 11 na vhaṅwe ngavho vhoṱhe." 
Luke24:10 Avho vhasadzi vho vha vhe Maria Magadalina na Johana na Maria mme a Jakopo. Na vhaṅwe vhe vha vha vhe navho vha vhudza vhaapostola eneo mafhungo. 
Luke24:11 Vhaapostola vhone vha pfa zwine vhasadzi vha amba e mafhafhaḓo, vha si tende. [" 
Luke24:12 Pitrosi ene a takuwa a gidimela tshaloni a kotama a ṱolela, a vhona luḽa lukhaha fhedzi. A konou humela hayani a tshi kha ḓi kanuka zwo iteaho.]" 
Luke24:13 Musi wonoyo vhavhili vhavho vho vha vhe nḓilani ya u ya muḓini wa Emausi, hu re khilomitha dza 11 u bva Jerusalema," 
Luke24:14 vha tshi khou tshimbila vha tshi amba nga tshavho nga zwoṱhe zwe zwa itea. 
Luke24:15 Vha tshi kha ḓi amba vhe kha mihani yeneyo, Yesu Ene muṋe a sendela a tshimbila navho," 
Luke24:16 vhone vha si mu ḓivhe, ngauri maṱo avho o vha o tsirwa." 
Luke24:17 Yesu a vha vhudza a ri, “Nṋa ndi afhio ane na khou enda ni tshi hanelelana one?” Vhone vha mbo ḓi ima vho tou ṱungufhala." 
Luke24:18 Muṅwe wavho ane a pfi Kleopasi ndi hone a tshi mu vhudzisa a ri, “Nṋa vha tou vha vhone mueni vhe vhoṱhe fhano Jerusalema vha sa ḓivhi zwe zwa itea maḓuvha eneano?”" 
Luke24:19 Yesu a vhudzisa a ri, “Nṋa ndi zwifhio?” Vhone vha fhindula vha ri, “Ri khou amba zwe zwa itea kha Yesu wa Nazaretha, muporofita we a ḓisumbedza kha zwe a shuma na zwe a amba phanḓa ha Mudzimu na vhathu vhoṱhe e na maanḓa." 
Luke24:20 Onoyo, vhotshifhe vhahulwane na vhahulwane vha lushaka lwa hashu vho mu kumedza uri a haṱulelwe lufu, vha mu vhamba kha tshifhambano." 
Luke24:21 Riṋe ro vha ro fulufhela uri ndi Ene we a pfi u ḓo vhofholola Israele. Zwino khezwi, ḽo no ḓi vha ḓuvha ḽa vhuraru tshee zwa itea." 
Luke24:22 Naho zwo ralo, vhaṅwe vhasadzi vha re vhaṅwe nga riṋe vho ri akhamadza. Vho bubela tshaloni" 
Luke24:23 vha wana tshitumbu tshawe tshi siho; vha vhuya vha tshi ri vhudza uri vho vhona bono ḽa vharuṅwa vhe vha ri u a tshila. 
Luke24:24 Vhaṅwe vhashu vha tshi ya tshaloni vha wana zwiḽa zwe vhasadzi vha amba zwo tou ralo, hone Ene vha si mu vhone.”" 
Luke24:25 Ndi hone Yesu a tshi vha kaidza a ri, “Nṋa ni tou vha matsilu-ḓe lune mbilu dzaṋu dza konḓa u tenda zwoṱhe zwe vhaporofita vha amba!" 
Luke24:26 Kani-ha a ho ngo pfi Mesia o fanela u ranga u tambula nga u ralo a konou dzhena vhugalani hawe?” 
Luke24:27 Ndi hone a tshi vha ṱalutshedza zwi re Maṅwaloni oṱhe zwine zwa amba Ene, u ranga nga a Mushe u swika kha a vhaporofita vhoṱhe." 
Luke24:28 Vhó no vha tsini ha muḓi we vha vha vha tshi khou ya khawo, Yesu a ita unga u a fhira." 
Luke24:29 Vhone vha si fune na u zwi pfa, vha ri, “Hufha ḽi tshi vho kovhela, ḽa ṋamusi tshifa ḽo fhela; vhone vha tou eḓela fhano!” Nangoho a dzhena navho henefho." 
Luke24:30 Musi o dzula navho zwiḽiwani, a dzhia vhurotho a livhuha; a konou vhu ṅwatekanya a vha kanzwa." 
Luke24:31 Ha vha hu hone vha tshi bonyolowa vha vho mu ḓivha, hone Ene a mbo ḓi ri ṋeleṋele." 
Luke24:32 Vha amba nga tshavho vha ri, “Ndi zwe ra pfa mbilu dzashu dzi tshi tou swa zwiḽa ri nḓilani a tshi khou ri ṱalutshedza Maṅwalo!”" 
Luke24:33 Vha mbo ḓi takuwa na zwenezwo vha humela Jerusalema. Henengei vha wana vhaḽa vha 11 vho kuvhangana na vhaṅwe ngavho," 
Luke24:34 vha pfa vha tshi ri, “Nangoho Muṋe washu o vuwa. O ḓisumbedza Simoni!”" 
Luke24:35 Ndi hone na avho vhavhili vha tshi vho vha anetshela zwe zwa itea vhe nḓilani na uri vho ḓo mu ḓivha musi a tshi khou ṅwatekanya vhurotho. 
Luke24:36 Vha tshi kha ḓi hanelela eneo, Muṋe washu nga eṱhe a vha o no ima vhukati havho, a amba navho a ri, “Mulalo u vhe na inwi.”" 
Luke24:37 Vha tshenuwa vha tou tetemela vha tshi ri vha khou vhona tshirunzi. 
Luke24:38 Ene a amba navho a ri, “Nṋa ni khou tshenuswa ngani? Khezwi ni tshi timatima mbiluni dzaṋu?" 
Luke24:39 Vhonani zwanḓa zwanga na milenzhe khezwi; ndi Nṋe vhukuma. Mphuphuledzeni ni pfe: Hufha ndi na muvhili wa ṋama na marambo; tshirunzi tshi nazwo naa?” [ 
Luke24:40 A tshi ralo a vha sumbedza zwanḓa na milenzhe yawe.] 
Luke24:41 A tshi vhona vha sa athu tenda zwavhuḓi nge vha hulelwa nga dakalo na ganuko, a vha vhudzisa a ri, “Nṋa a ni na zwiḽiwanyana afha?”" 
Luke24:42 Vhone vha mu ṋea tshipiḓa tsha khovhe yo ṱhaṱhiwaho. 
Luke24:43 A mbo ḓi tshi dzhia a ḽa vha tshi zwi vhona. 
Luke24:44 A dovha a amba navho a ri, “Izwi-ha ndi zwenezwiḽa zwe nda ni vhudza ndi tshee na inwi. Zwoṱhe zwo ṅwalwaho Mulayoni wa Mushe na Maṅwaloni a vhaporofita na kha Dziphisalema zwi tshi amba Nṋe zwo fanela u khunyelela.”" 
Luke24:45 A konou vha dzivhulusa uri vha ṱalukanye Maṅwalo. 
Luke24:46 A vha vhudza a ri, “Ndi zwone zwe zwa ṅwaliwa upfi Mesia o fanela u tambudzwa a vuwa vhafuni nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuraru." 
Luke24:47 A vha Ene ane a ni ruma u ḓivhadza tshakha dzoṱhe uri vha rembuluwe vha kone u hangwelwa vhutshinyi. Ni thome Jerusalema. 
Luke24:48 Ndi inwi vhane na fanela u ṱanzilela hezwi zwithu. 
Luke24:49 Huno Nṋe ndi ḓo ni rumela tshe Khotsi anga a ni fulufhedzisa. Zwino inwi ni dzule fhano Jerusalema ni vhuye ni ṋewe ayo maanḓa a bvaho ṱaḓulu.” 
Luke24:50 A bva navho o vha ranga phanḓa u vhuya u sendela tsini ha Bethania. Henefho a imisa zwanḓa zwawe a vha shudufhadza. 
Luke24:51 A tshi khou vha shudufhadza a mbo ḓi ṱuwa khavho a takulelwa ṱaḓulu. 
Luke24:52 Vhone vha mu gwadamela vha konou humela Jerusalema vhe na dakalo fulu. 
Luke24:53 Vha ḓi ṱwa thembeleni vha tshi renda Mudzimu. 
John1:1 U rangani ha zwoṱhe Ipfi o vha e hone, huno Ipfi o vha e na Mudzimu, nahone e Ene Mudzimu." 
John1:2 Ene o vha e na Mudzimu u rangani. 
John1:3 Zwithu zwoṱhe zwo vha hone ngae; a hu na na tshithihi tshe tshi si vhe hone ngae. 
John1:4 O vha e Ene vhutshilo, huno vhutshilo honoho tsho vha tshi tshone tshedza tshi vhonetshelaho vhathu." 
John1:5 Tshedza tshi vhonetshela swiswini, hone swiswi a ḽo ngo vhuya ḽa tshi dzima." 
John1:6 Ho vhuya ha vha na muṅwe munna a no pfi Johanisi ó rumiwa nga Mudzimu. 
John1:7 Onoyo o ḓa e ṱhanzi uri a ṱanziele nga tshedza uri vhoṱhe vha tende nga vhuṱanzi hawe. 
John1:8 O vha e si ene tshedza, o vha o tou ḓela u ṱanziela tshedza." 
John1:9 Tshone tshedza vhukuma tshi vhonetshelaho vhathu vhoṱhe ho vha hu hone tshi tshi khou ḓa shangoni. 
John1:10 O vha e fhano shangoni, huno naho shango ḽo vha hone ngae, a ḽo ngo mu ḓivha." 
John1:11 O ḓa shangoni ḽawe, hone vha hawe vha si mu ṱanganedze." 
John1:12 Hone vhoṱhe vhe vha mu ṱanganedza vha mu fulufhedza, o vha ṋea pfanelo ya u vha vhana vha Mudzimu," 
John1:13 vhá songo tsha tou bebwa nga malofha kana nga u tamana ha vhathu zwavho kana nga u funa ha munna, vho tou bebwa nga Mudzimu Ene muṋe." 
John1:14 Ipfi a vha muthu wa ṋama, a dzula na riṋe, ra vhona vhugala hawe, vhune Khotsi a ṋea Murwa wawe muthihi fhedzi, e na vhuthu vhuhulu, na u fulufhedzea tshoṱhe." 
John1:15 Johanisi ndi ṱhanzi yawe. O ṱanziela nga u tou huwelela a ri, “Uyu-ha ndi Ene we nda vha ndi tshi khou amba Ene zwiḽa ndi tshi ri, ‘Onoyo ane a ntevhela u a mphira, ngauri o vha e hone nṋe ndi sa athu bebwa.’ ”" 
John1:16 O ḓi ri itela vhuthu roṱhe a ḓi dovha na u dovha, zwi tshi bva tshisikuni tshawe tsho ḓalaho vhuthu." 
John1:17 Mulayo Mudzimu o u ṋea vhathu nga tshanḓa tsha Mushe; vhuthu hawe na ngoho yawe zwa ḓa nga Yesu Khristo. 
John1:18 A hu na na muthihi o no vhuyaho a vhona Mudzimu; we a ita uri vhathu vha mu ḓivhe ndi Mubebwa-e-eṱhe, Mudzimu ngae, ane a vha tsini-tsini ha Khotsi." 
John1:19 Vhuṱanzi ha Johanisi Mulovhedzi khovhu ha musi Majuda vha Jerusalema vho ruma vhotshifhe na Vhalivi uri vha mu vhudzise uri ene ndi ene nnyi. 
John1:20 O bula a sa dzumbi a ri, “Nṋe a si nṋe Mesia.”" 
John1:21 Vhone vha mu vhudzisa vha ri, “Zwino ri ḓo ri ndi vhone vhonnyi-ha? Kani ndi vhone Vho-Elia zwavho?” “Na onoyo a thi ene.” “Kani ndi vhone uḽa Muporofita we a pfi u ḓo ḓa?” Ene a ri, “Hai.”" 
John1:22 “Zwino ri ḓo ri ndi vhone vhonnyi-ha? Ri fanela u ḓivha uri ri ḓo swika ngei ha vho ri rumaho ra vha vhudza mini. Vhone vhaṋe vha tshi ḓiamba vha ri ndi vhone vhonnyi?” 
John1:23 Ene a fhindula nga maipfi a muporofita Yesaya a ri, “Ndi nṋe ipfi ḽa muhuweleli a re sogani, ḽi ri, ‘Lugiselani Muṋe washu nḓila i tou tswititi!’ ”" 
John1:24 Vhaṅwe vha avho vhaḓinḓa vho vha vha tshi bva ha Vhafarisei; 
John1:25 vhone vha vhudzisa vha ri, “Zwino arali vhe si vhone Mesia kana Elia kana ene muporofita khezwi vha tshi lovhedza?”" 
John1:26 Johanisi a fhindula a ri, “Nṋe ndi khou lovhedza nga maḓi zwao, fhedzi henefha vhukati haṋu hu na muṅwe ane ni si mu ḓivhe." 
John1:27 Ene u khou ntevhela, naho zwo ralo a zwo ngo mpfanela na u pfuṋulula thambo dza navhula dzawe.”" 
John1:28 Hezwo zwoṱhe zwo itea Bethania seli ha mulambo wa Jorodani; ndi hone he Johanisi a vha a tshi khou lovhedza hone. 
John1:29 Nga matshelo Johanisi a vhona Yesu a tshi khou ḓa khae, a ri, “Khoyu-ha Ene Ngwana ya Mudzimu, o hwalaho vhutshinyi ha shango!" 
John1:30 Uyu ndi Ene we nda vha ndi tshi khou mu ṱanziela zwiḽa ndi tshi ri, ‘Hu na muṅwe munna ane a khou ntevhela; naho zwo ralo u a mphira; Ene o vha e hone nṋe ndi sa athu bebwa!’" 
John1:31 Ndo vha ndi sa ḓivhi uri u ḓo vha ufhio, naho zwo ralo, nṋe u lovhedza nga maḓi ho vha hu u itela uri Vhaisraele vha mu ḓivhe.”"
