John1:32 Johanisi a dovha a ṱanzilela a ri, “Ndo vhona Muya Mukhethwa a tshi tsa nga tshivhumbeo tsha ḽiivha a tshi bva ṱaḓulu a kavha khae." 
John1:33 Na nṋe ndo vha ndi sa mu ḓivhi, hone Mudzimu, Ene we a nthuma uri ndi lovhedze nga maḓi, o mmbudza a ri, ‘Ane wa ḓo vhona Muya a tshi tsela khae a dzula tshoṱhe khae, onoyo ndi Ene ane a ḓo lovhedza vhathu nga Muya Mukhethwa.’" 
John1:34 Hezwo nṋe ndo tou zwi vhona, zwino ndi ṱanzilela ndi ri ndi Ene Murwa wa Mudzimu.”" 
John1:35 Nga matshelo Johanisi o vha e henefhaḽa e na vhaṅwe vhafunziwa vhawe vhavhili. 
John1:36 A vhona Yesu a tshi khou fhira, a ri, “Khoyu-ha Ene Ngwana ya Mudzimu.”" 
John1:37 Avho vhafunziwa vhavhili vha tshi pfa a tshi ralo vha mbo ḓi tevhela Yesu. 
John1:38 Yesu a tshi rembuluwa a vhona vha tshi khou mu tevhela, a vha vhudzisa a ri, “Nṋa ni khou ṱoḓa mini?” Vhone vha fhindula vha ri, “Rabi, nṋa vha dzula ngafhi?” (Rabi ndi u ri Vhafunzi)." 
John1:39 Ene a fhindula a ri, “Iḓani ni hu vhone.” Ndi hone vha tshi ṱuwa nae vha yo vhona hune a dzula hone, vha ita na u ṱwa nae ḓuvha ḽoṱhe. (Izwo zwithu zwo itea henefha nga 4 masiari.)" 
John1:40 Muṅwe wa vhenevho vhavhili vhe vha ri u pfa Johanisi vha tevhela Yesu, ndi Andrisi murathu wa Simoni, Simoni ane ḽiṅwe a pfi Pitrosi." 
John1:41 U ṱuwa henefho Andrisi a mbo ḓi wana mukomana wawe Simoni, a mu vhudza a ri, “Riṋe ro wana Mesia.” (Mesia ndi u ri “Mutiwa-nga-Mudzimu”.)" 
John1:42 Ndi hone vha tshi ḓisa Simoni ha Yesu. Yesu a mu lavhelesa a ri, “Ndi inwi Simoni ṅwana wa Johanisi. Zwino ni vho ḓo pfi Khefasi.” (Khefasi zwi fana na u ri Pitrosi, vhuvhili hazwo zwi amba uri “Tombo”.)" 
John1:43 Nga matshelo Yesu a vhona uri ndi khwiṋe a tshi ya Galelia. A wana Filipi a mu vhudza a ri, “Kha ri ṱuwe roṱhe ni vhe mufunziwa wanga.”" 
John1:44 (Filipi o vha a tshi dzula muḓini wa Betsaida, henefho he ha vha hu tshi dzula Andrisi na Pitrosi.)" 
John1:45 Filipi ene a wana Nathaniele a mu vhudza a ri, “Riṋe ro wana uḽa we Mushe Buguni ya Mulayo a ṅwala ngae, uḽa we na vhaporofita vha mu amba vha tshi ṅwala. Ndi Yesu ṅwana wa Josefa wa Nazaretha.”" 
John1:46 Nathaniele a ri, “Nṋa hafhu Nazaretha hu nga vhuya ha bva-vho tshithu tshivhuya?” Filipi a ri, “Itonu ḓa ni vhone.”" 
John1:47 Yesu a tshi vhona Nathaniele a tshi khou ḓa khae a ri, “Muisraele vhukuma ngoyu-ha, muthu a si na vhufhura!”" 
John1:48 Nathaniele a vhudzisa a ri, “Nṋa vha nnḓivhela ngafhi?” Yesu a fhindula a ri, “Ndo ni vhona ni fhasi ha muhuyu Filipi a sa athu ni vhidza.”" 
John1:49 Nathaniele a ri, “Vhafunzi, vhone vha Murwa wa Mudzimu! Ndi vhone Khosi ya Israele!”" 
John1:50 Yesu a ri, “Nṋa ni vho tenda nge nda ri ndo ni vhona ni tshi kha ḓi vha fhasi ha muhuyu? Ni kha ḓi ḓo vhona zwihulu zwi fhiraho izwo kule.”" 
John1:51 A vha vhudza a ri, “Zwino ipfani-ha: ni ḓo vhona ḽiṱaḓulu ḽo vulea, vharuṅwa vha Mudzimu vha tshi gonya vha tshi tsela kha Mubebwa-nga-muthu!”" 
John2:1 Ho no fhela maḓuvha mavhili ha vha na munyanya wa mbingano muḓini wa Kana vunduni ḽa Galelia. Mme a Yesu na vhone vho vha vhe hone," 
John2:2 huno na Ene Yesu na vhafunziwa vhawe vho vha vho vhidzwa. 
John2:3 Musi waini yo no fhela, mme a Yesu vha mu vhudza vha ri, “Vhathu vho fhelelwa nga waini.”" 
John2:4 Yesu a fhindula a ri, “Vhomme, hezwi a si zwashu. Tshifhinga tshanga a tshi athu swika.”" 
John2:5 Mme awe vhone vha mbo ḓi amba na vhashumi vha ri, “Tshiṅwe na tshiṅwe tshine a nga ni vhudza ni tshi ite.”" 
John2:6 Zwino henefho ho vha hu na nkho ṱhanu na nthihi dza matombo dze dza vha dzi tshi fara maḓi a u ḓikumulula nga maitele a Tshijuda. Nkho iṅwe na iṅwe yo vha i tshi ḓala nga litha dzine dza nga lingana 80 u swika dza 120. 
John2:7 Yesu a vhudza vhashumi a ri, “Ḓadzani nkho idzi nga maḓi.” Vhone vha dzi ḓadza dza tou pha." 
John2:8 A konou amba navho a ri, “Zwino ikaninyana ni yo ṋea mutshimbidza-mushumo.” Vhone vha ita nga u ralo." 
John2:9 Uḽa mutshimbidzamushumo a thetshela aḽa maḓi e a vha o no shanduka waini a sa ḓivhi na uri i bva ngafhi; vhashumi vhe vha ka maḓi ndi vhone vhe vha vha vha tshi zwi ḓivha. Ndi hone a tshi vhidza mukwasha 
John2:10 a mu vhudza a ri, “Muṅwe na muṅwe u thoma u fha vhathu waini i ḓifhaho, ha ḓo konou ri musi vho no ḓitakalela a konou bvisa waini zwayo. Matsina inwi waini i ḓifhaho no vha no i vhea u swika zwino!”" 
John2:11 Enea maḓembe Yesu o a ita muḓini wa Kana vunduni ḽa Galelia tsha vha tshiga tsha u thoma. Henefho ndi hone he a sumbedza vhugala hawe, na vhafunziwa vhawe vha mu fulufhela." 
John2:12 Ngavhuya Yesu na mme awe na vharathu vhawe khathihi na vhafunziwa vhawe vha tsela muḓini wa Kapernaumi vha dzula hone maḓuvha a si gathi. 
John2:13 Tshifhinga tsha vhuṱambo ha Majuda vhu no pfi Paseka tshi tshi vho sendela, Yesu a gonya Jerusalema." 
John2:14 Henefho a wana vharengisi vha kholomo na nngu na maivha khathihi na vhatshintshi vha tshelede vho dzula maḓafulani avho muṱani wa thembele. 
John2:15 Yesu a luka tshimebi nga nnzi, a thoma u khadela zwiḽa zwifuwo nnḓa – nngu na kholomo na zwoṱhe, a thenukanya na maḓafula a vhatshintshi vha tshelede, a hasekanya tshelede dzavho kule." 
John2:16 Vhanna vhe vha vha vha tshi khou rengisa maivha a vha vhudza a ri, “A bviseleni nnḓa hangei, nnḓu ya Khotsi anga ni songo i ita nnḓu ya mabindu.”" 
John2:17 Vhafunziwa vhawe vha elelwa fhaḽa Maṅwaloni hu no pfi, “Ndo no tou fhelela nga mbilu i tshi swela nnḓu yau.”" 
John2:18 Majuda vha dovha vha ya khae vha mu vhudzisa vha ri, “Nṋa ni nga ri sumbedza tshiga-ḓe tsha u sumbedza uri nangoho ni na pfanelo ya u ita hezwo zwithu?”" 
John2:19 Yesu a fhindula a ri, “Thuthani hei nnḓu ya Mudzimu; Nṋe nga maḓuvha mararu ndi ḓo vha ndo no i vusa.”" 
John2:20 Vhone vha vhudzisa vha ri, “Ni ḓo i fhaṱa nga maḓuvha mangana? Mararu? Yenei nnḓu yo fhedzaho miṅwaha ya 46 i tshi fhaṱiwa?”" 
John2:21 Hone Yesu a tshi ri “nnḓu ya Mudzimu” o vha a tshi khou amba muvhili wawe. 
John2:22 Musi o no vuswa vhafuni, vhafunziwa vhawe vho ḓo elelwa zwe a vhuya a amba, vha mbo ḓi tenda Maṅwalo, vha tenda na maipfi awe." 
John2:23 Musi Yesu e Jerusalema nga tshifhinga tsha vhuṱambo ha Paseka, vhanzhi vho mu fulufhela vha tshi vhona zwiga zwa maḓembe ane a ita." 
John2:24 Hone Ene a si ḓidzumbululele vhone tshoṱhe, ngauri o vha a tshi ḓivha vhathu vhoṱhe zwavhuḓi." 
John2:25 O vha a sa lili u vhudzwa zwa muthu; o vha a tshi kona u ḓivha nga eṱhe zwi re mbiluni ya muthu. 
John3:1 Zwino ho vha hu na muṅwe munna wa tshigwada tsha Vhafarisei a no pfi Ṋegodima. O vha e muṅwe wa vhahulwane vha Majuda. 
John3:2 Onoyo o vhuya a ya ha Yesu vhusiku a ri, “Vhafunzi vhanga, ri a zwi ḓivha uri vhone vho tou ruṅwa nga Mudzimu u ḓa u funza vhathu, ngauri a hu na muthu ane a nga kona u ita haya maḓembe ane vhone vha ita arali Mudzimu a si nae.”" 
John3:3 Yesu a fhindula a ri, “Zwino kha vha pfe-ha: a hu na muthu ane a nga kona u vhona muvhuso wa Mudzimu arali a songo tou thoma a bebwa nga huswa, zwi tshi bva ṱaḓulu.”" 
John3:4 Ṋegodima a fhindula a ri, “Nṋa zwi nga itea hani uri muthu a dovhe a bebwe o no ḓi vha mukalaha? Kani-ha zwi a konadzea uri a vhuelele muvhilini wa mme awe a bebwe lwa vhuvhili?”" 
John3:5 Yesu a ri, “Zwino kha vha dzou pfa: a hu na ane a ḓo dzhena muvhusoni wa Mudzimu arali a sa athu bebwa zwi tshi bva kha maḓi na Muya Mukhethwa." 
John3:6 Muthu wa ṋama u beba muthu wa ṋama ngae; Muya ndi Ene a bebaho muthu lwa muya. 
John3:7 Vha songo kanuka ndi tshi ri inwi ni fanela u tou bebwa nga huswa. 
John3:8 Muya u vhudzula u tshi ya hune wa funa. U unga hawo muthu u a hu pfa, hone ha ḓivhi hune wa bva na hune wa ya. Zwo ralo na kha muṅwe na muṅwe o bebwaho nga Muya.”" 
John3:9 Ṋegodima a vhudzisa a ri, “Nṋa zwenezwo zwi nga konadzea hani?”" 
John3:10 Yesu a mu fhindula a ri, “Nṋa vhone izwi vha kundwa ngani u zwi ḓivha ngeno vhe vhone mufunzi wa Israele?" 
John3:11 Zwino kha vha dzou pfa-ha: riṋe ri amba tshine ra tshi ḓivha nahone ri ṱanzilela zwe ra tou vhona; hone inwi a no ngo ṱanganedza vhuṱanzi hashu. 
John3:12 Nṋa arali ni sa tendi ndi tshi ni vhudza zwa fhano shangoni, nda ni vhudza zwa ṱaḓulu ni ḓo tenda hani?" 
John3:13 A hu na muthu o no gonyaho ṱaḓulu arali e si onoyo we a tou tsa a tshi bva hone, ndi amba Ene Mubebwa-nga-muthu." 
John3:14 “U nga Mushe o imisela ṋowa nṱha sogani yó fhahewa kha thanda, na Mubebwa-nga-muthu o fanela u ḓo imiselwa nṱha nga u ralo," 
John3:15 uri muṅwe na muṅwe ane a mu fulufhela a vhe na vhutshilo vhu sa gumi nga Ene. 
John3:16 Mudzimu shango o ḽi funa zwihulu lwe a vhuya a kumedza Murwa wawe muthihi fhedzi, uri muṅwe na muṅwe ane a mu fulufhela a si lovhe, tshawe hu vhe u wana vhutshilo vhu sa gumi." 
John3:17 Mudzimu a tshi ruma Murwa shangoni o vha a sa khou itela u haṱula shango, ho vha hu uri a tshidze shango ngae." 
John3:18 “Ane a mu ṱanganedza ha nga haṱulwi; ane a mu landula, Ene o no ḓi haṱulwa nge a landula Murwa muthihi fhedzi wa Mudzimu." 
John3:19 Ndi uri mafhungo a khaṱhulo o tou rali: Tshedza tsho ḓa shangoni, vhathu vhone vha takalela swiswi u fhira tshedza nge mishumo yavho ya vha i mivhi." 
John3:20 Ndi uri vhaitazwivhi vha vhenga tshedza nahone a vha ḓi khatsho, ngauri vha ofha uri mishumo yavho i nga ḓo vhonololwa;" 
John3:21 ane a ita zwi re zwone, ene u a ḓa tshedzani, uri hu vhonale uri zwe a ita o zwi ita zwi tshi bva ha Mudzimu.”" 
John3:22 Ngavhuya Yesu a ṱuwa na vhafunziwa vhawe vha ya vunduni ḽa Judia, zwa ita maḓuvha vhe henefho, a tshi khou lovhedza." 
John3:23 Johanisi na ene o vha a tshi khou lovhedza Ainoni hune hu si vhe kule-kule na Salimu, ngauri ho vha ho ḓala maḓi henefho. Vhathu vho vha vha tshi khou ḓi ya khae henefho a tshi vha lovhedza." 
John3:24 (Nga tshifhinga itsho Johanisi o vha a sa athu kudzwa dzhele.) 
John3:25 Zwino ha vuwa khani vhukati ha vhafunziwa vha Johanisi na muṅwe Mujuda vha sa anḓani kha zwa mulayo wa u ḓikumulula. 
John3:26 Ndi hone vha tshi ya ha Johanisi vha mu vhudza vha ri, “Vhafunzi, vha kha ḓi humbula uḽa munna we vha vha vhe nae zwiḽa ri ngei seli ha Jorodani? Ri amba uḽa we vha mu ṱanziela. Zwino onouḽa munna u khou lovhedza-vho nahone vhathu vhoṱhe vha vho khunyelela khae!”" 
John3:27 Johanisi a fhindula a ri, “A hu na muthu ane a nga sokou wana tshithu arali a songo tou tshi fhiwa nga Mudzimu." 
John3:28 Inwi vhaṋe ni dziṱhanzi dza zwiḽa ndi tshi ri, ‘Nṋe a si nṋe Mesia, nṋe tshanga ndi tou vha muthu o rumiwaho u ḓivhadza u ḓa hawe.’" 
John3:29 Muselwa ndi wa mukwasha; khonani ya mukwasha tshayo i takadzwa nga maanḓa nga u pfa ipfi ḽa mukwasha, yone yo ḓiimela zwayo yo thetshelesa. Nṋe na ḽanga dakalo ḽo tou ralo; ndi hone zwino ḽo khunyelela." 
John3:30 Ene u fanela u ḓi hula a tshi ya, nṋe ngeno ndi tshi ḓi ṱukufhala.”" 
John3:31 A khou ḓaho a tshi bva ṱaḓulu ndi Ene a re muhulwane kha zwoṱhe, hone wa ḽino shango ndi wa shango, na zwine a amba ndi zwa fhano shangoni. A bvaho ṱaḓulu ndi muhulwane kha zwoṱhe." 
John3:32 Ene u ṱanzilela zwe a tou zwi vhona na zwe a tou zwi pfa, hu ro sa vha na ane a tenda vhuṱanzi hawe." 
John3:33 Hone we a tenda vhuṱanzi hawe o khwaṱhisa uri Mudzimu u a fulufhedzea. 
John3:34 O ruṅwaho nga Mudzimu ndi Ene a ambaho maipfi a Mudzimu, ngauri Mudzimu u mu ṋea Muya wawe nga vhuḓalo." 
John3:35 Khotsi u funa Murwa; o mu kumedza zwoṱhe. 
John3:36 Ane a fulufhela Murwa u na vhutshilo vhu sa gumi, hone ane a sa mu pfe ha nga tshili; ṱhamu ya Mudzimu a i mu ṱutsheli." 
John4:1 Vhafarisei vha zwi pfa uri vhathu vhe Yesu a vha a tshi khou vha wana a tshi vha lovhedza vho vha vha tshi vho fhira vha Johanisi. 
John4:2 (A si uri Yesu Ene muṋe o vha a tshi lovhedza; ho vha hu tshi lovhedza vhafunziwa vhawe.) 
John4:3 Yesu a tshi pfa zwenezwo a ṱuwa Judia a vhuelela Galelia. 
John4:4 Huno nḓila ye a fara ya ita uri a fhire nga Samaria. 
John4:5 E lwendoni lwonolwo a ḓi swika muḓini wa Sikhara kha ḽa Samaria u re tsini na iḽa tsimu ye Jakopo a ṋea ṅwana wawe Josefa. 
John4:6 Henefho ho vha hu na bidzi ḽa Jakopo. Zwino Yesu nge a vha o neta nga lwendo, a mbo awela henefho. Ḓuvha zwenezwo ḽo vha ḽi vhukati ha ṱhoho." 
John4:7 Musi vhafunziwa vha tshee vho dzhena muḓini u yo renga zwiḽiwa, ha sala hu tshi swika muṅwe musadzi wa Musamaria u ka maḓi. Yesu a amba nae a ri, “A vha nkeli-vho maḓi nda nwa?”" 
John4:8  
John4:9 Musadzi a fhindula a ri, “Hufha vhe Mujuda, nṋe ndi Musamaria, vha nga nkhumbela hani maḓi?” (Ndi uri Majuda na Vhasamaria a vha shumiselani midzio.)" 
John4:10 Yesu a mu fhindula a ri, “Arali vho vha vha tshi ḓivha zwine Mudzimu a kona u ṋea muthu, na uri a no khou vha humbela maḓi ndi nnyi, vho vha vha tshi ḓo vha vhe vhone vha no khou mu humbela, Ene a vha ṋea maḓi a ṋeaho muthu vhutshilo.”" 
John4:11 Musadzi a ri, “Muṋe wanga, hufha vha si na na tsha u ka nahone bidzi ḽo tsisa, zwino ayo maḓi a ṋeaho muthu vhutshilo vha ḓo a wanafhi?" 
John4:12 Kani-ha vhone vha fhira makhulukuku washu Jakopo we a ri ṋea iḽi bidzi? Ndi amba ngauri ene o vha a tshi nwa khaḽo na vhana vhawe na thakha yawe.” 
John4:13 Yesu a ri, “Muthu ane a nwa haya maḓi u ḓo ḓi dovha a pfa ḓora," 
John4:14 hone ane a nwa ane Nṋe nda mu fha one ha tsha ḓo dovha a pfa ḓora lini na lini. Ndi uri maḓi ane nda mu ṋea a ḓo vha tshisima tshi no gubunyea maḓi a ṋeaho muthu vhutshilo vhu sa gumi.” 
John4:15 Musadzi a ri, “Muṋe wanga, a thi fhiwi-vho zwanga eneo maḓi uri ndi si tsha ḓo dovha nda pfa ḓora nda si tsha ṱolou ḓa fhano u ka maḓi!”" 
John4:16 Yesu a ri, “Kha vha yo vhidza munna wavho vha vhuye nae fhano.”" 
John4:17 Musadzi a ri, “A thi na munna.” Yesu a ri, “Vha amba zwone vha tshi ri munna a vha na." 
John4:18 Vhó rali hufha vho no ḓi vha musadzi wa vhanna vhaṱanu. Huno uyo ane vha vha nae zwino, a si munna wavho vhukuma. Vho tou mmbudza yone ngoho.”" 
John4:19 Musadzi uyo a ri, “Muṋe wanga, ndi khou zwi vhona uri vhone vha muporofita." 
John4:20 Zwino vhomakhulukuku washu vho vha vha tshi rabela Mudzimu thavhani hei, hone inwi Majuda ni ri Mudzimu u rabelwa Jerusalema.”" 
John4:21 Yesu a ri, “Vhone musadzi, kha vha tende zwine nda amba: Hu khou ḓa tshifhinga tshine Mudzimu Khotsi na si tsha ḓo mu rabela hafha thavhani hei kana Jerusalema." 
John4:22 Inwi Vhasamaria ni sokou rabela tshine na si tshi ḓivhe. Riṋe Majuda ri rabela tshine ra tshi ḓivha, ngauri na u tshidzwa ha vhathu hu ḓa nga Majuda." 
John4:23 Hone hu ḓo ḓa tshifhinga – na zwino tsho no ḓi swika – tshine vha rabelaho Mudzimu Khotsi lwa ngoho vha ḓo fanela u mu rabela zwi tshi tou bva mbiluni vhe kha ngoho. Khotsi u funa vhathu vha tshi mu rabela nga u ralo. 
John4:24 Mudzimu ndi Muya, huno vha mu rabelaho vha fanela u mu rabela zwi tshi tou bva mbiluni vhe kha ngoho.”" 
John4:25 Musadzi a ri, “Ndi a zwi ḓivha uri Mesia u ḓo ḓa; onoyo ndi Ene ane a ḓo ri ḓivhadza zwoṱhe.” (Mesia ndi uri Khristo.)" 
John4:26 Yesu a ri, “Onoyo Mesia ndi Nṋe a ambaho navho.”" 
John4:27 Zwenezwo vhafunziwa vhawe vha vha vha a vhuya. Vha kanuka nga u vhona a tshi khou amba na muthu wa musadzi, hone hu si vhe na we a vhudzisa uyo musadzi a ri, “Nṋa vha khou ṱoḓani?” kana a vhudzisa Yesu a ri, “Vha khou amba mini nae?”" 
John4:28 Uyo musadzi a sia mvuvhelo yawe henefho a vhuelela muḓini, a vhudza vhathu a ri," 
John4:29 “Iḓani ni vhone munna we a mmbudza zwoṱhe zwe nda vhuya nda zwi ita. Nṋa a nga vha izwi e si Ene Mesia?” 
John4:30 Vha mbo ḓi bva muḓini vha ya fhaḽa hu re na Yesu. 
John4:31 Vhafunziwa vhone vho vha vha tshi khou humbela Yesu vha tshi ri, “Vhafunzi, a vha thomi u ṅwata zwavho?”" 
John4:32 Ene a fhindula a ri, “Nṋe ndi na zwine nda ḽa zwine inwi na si zwi ḓivhe.”" 
John4:33 A tshi ralo vhafunziwa vha thoma u vhudzisana nga tshavho vha ri, “Nṋa hu nga vha hu na muthu o mu ḓiselaho zwiḽiwa kani?”" 
John4:34 Yesu a ri, “Zwanga zwiḽiwa ndi u ita zwine o nthumaho a zwi funa na u khunyeledza mushumo we a mpha." 
John4:35 Hufha ni na murero u no ri, ‘Miṅwedzi ho sala miṋa, wa vhuṱanu ndi mavhuyahaya.’ Zwino Nṋe ndi khou ri lavhelesani zwavhuḓi masimuni: Mavhele o vhibva o tou imela u kaṋiwa!" 
John4:36 Munna ane a khou kaṋa u vho wana malamba nahone u kuvhanganya khaṋo a i isa vhutshiloni vhu sa gumi; ngauralo hu ane a zwala, hu ane a kaṋa, vha ḓo takala vhoṱhe." 
John4:37 Murero a wo ngo zwifha u tshi ri, ‘A zwi ḽiwi vhalimi.’" 
John4:38 Ndo ni ruma u kaṋa tsimu ye ni si i lime; vhaṅwe vho lima vha bva mabiko, inwi hone ni vho sokou ḓa u kaṋa zwe vhaḽa vha shuma.”" 
John4:39 Vhasamaria vhanzhi muḓini wonoyo vha tenda Yesu nge uḽa musadzi a ṱanzilela a tshi ri, “O mmbudza zwoṱhe zwe nda vhuya nda zwi ita.”" 
John4:40 Ndi zwe vha tshi ḓa ha Yesu vha vho mu rabeledza uri a si fhire, nangoho a dzula navho maḓuvha mavhili." 
John4:41 Ho dovha ha ḓi vha na vhaṅwe vhanzhi vhe vha tenda nge vha tou pfa pfunzo ya Yesu Ene muṋe. 
John4:42 Vhenevho vha vhudza uyo musadzi vha ri, “Zwino a ri tsha tenda nga zwiḽa zwe na tou ri vhudza, ri tenda nge ra tou ḓipfela nga roṱhe a tshi funza; nahone ri vho ḓivha uri vhukuma ndi Ene Mutshidzi wa shango.”" 
John4:43 Hó no fhela ayo maḓuvha mavhili Yesu a fhirela Galelia 
John4:44 vhunga iṱali Ene muṋe o vha o no ri, “Muporofita ha huliswi shangoni ḽa hawe.”" 
John4:45 A tshi swika Galelia, vhathu vha henefho vha mu ṱanganedza, ngauri na vhone vho vha vho ya Jerusalema nga vhuṱambo ha Paseka vha vhona zwoṱhe zwe a ita henengei." 
John4:46 Ndi hone Yesu a tshi vhuelela muḓini wa Kana kha ḽa Galelia, fhaḽa he a vhuya a shandukisa maḓi a vha waini. Zwino Kapernaumi ho vha hu na muṅwe mukoma we a vha e na ṅwana wa mutukana a no lwala." 
John4:47 Onoyo a tshi pfa uri Yesu o swika Galelia a tshi bva Judia, a ḓa a mu humbela uri a ye Kapernaumi a fhodze ṅwana wawe, ngauri o vha a tshi vho ṱoḓou fa." 
John4:48 Yesu a mu vhudza a ri, “A hu na na muthihi waṋu ane a nga vhuya a tenda arali a songo thoma u vhona zwiga na maḓembe.”" 
John4:49 Uyo munna a ri, “Muṋe wanga, nga ri ṱuwe roṱhe, ṅwananga a sa ḓo vhuya a fa!”" 
John4:50 Yesu a mu fhindula a ri, “Kha vha tshimbile zwavho, ṅwana wavho o fhola.” Uyo munna a tenda eneo maipfi a Yesu a ṱuwa." 
John4:51 A tshee nḓilani vhashumi vhawe vha mu ṱanganedza nga fhungo ḽi no ri, “Muṱhanngana wavho o fhola!”" 
John4:52 Ene a vha vhudzisa tshifhinga tshe ṅwana wawe a vha khwiṋe ngatsho. Vhone vha ri, “Ho vha hu mulovha nga masiari vhulwadze vhu tshi mu ṱutshela.”" 
John4:53 Khotsi a ṅwana a mbo ḓi ḓivha uri tshifhinga itsho ndi tshenetshiḽa tshe Yesu a ri, “Ṅwana wavho u a tshila.” Ene na muṱa wawe woṱhe vha mbo ḓi fulufhela Yesu." 
John4:54 Enea ndi one maḓembe a vhuvhili e Yesu a ita musi o no vhuelela Galelia a tshi bva Judia, tsha vha tshiga." 
John5:1 Hu sa athu fhela tshifhinga tshilapfu ha vha na vhuṱambo ha Majuda, Yesu a gonya Jerusalema." 
John5:2 Zwino Jerusalema hu na isha ḽi re na maguḓa maṱanu, henefho tsini ha khoro i no pfi Khoro ya Nngu. Ḽeneḽo isha nga luambo lwa Majuda ḽi pfi Bethesda." 
John5:3 Maguḓani eneo ho vha ho lala vhalwadze vhanzhi, hu tshi ri mabofu, he zwihole, na vho omaho miraḓo. [Vho vha vho lindela maḓi a tshi seluwa," 
John5:4 ngauri muruṅwa wa Muṋe washu o vha a tshi ḓi ḓa a dzhena ishani ḽeneḽo a ritha maḓi, huno mulwadze wa u thoma u dzhena maḓini o vha a tshi fhola naho e na vhulwadze vhufhio.]" 
John5:5 Henefho ho vha hu na muṅwe munna we a vha o no fhedza miṅwaha ya 38 a tshi lwala. 
John5:6 Yesu a mu vhona o lala henefho, a ḓivha uri muthu uyo ho no fhela miṅwaha a tshi lwala. A amba nae a ri, “Ni a funa u fhola naa?”" 
John5:7 Uyo mulwadze a fhindula a ri, “Muṋe wanga, ndi kundwa wa u nkhwalela maḓini musi a tshi seluwa; ndi tshi kha ḓi ri ndi a dzhena, muṅwe u vha o no dzhena kale.”" 
John5:8 Yesu a ri, “Takuwani ni hwale thovho yaṋu ni tshimbile.”" 
John5:9 Kathihi fhedzi uḽa munna a mbo ḓi fhola, a doba thovho yawe, a tshimbila. Ḽo vha ḽi ḓuvha ḽa Sabatha." 
John5:10 Vhahulwane vha lushaka vha vhudza uyo munna o fhodzwaho vha ri, “Ṋamusi ndi Sabatha, Mulayo a u tendi ni tshi hwala thovho yaṋu.”" 
John5:11 Ene a fhindula a ri, “Munna we a mphodza ndi ene we a ri ndi hwale thovho yanga ndi tshimbile.”" 
John5:12 Vha mu vhudzisa vha ri, “Nṋa ndi nnyi onoyo we a ri ni hwale thovho yaṋu ni tshimbile?”" 
John5:13 Zwino uyo munna we a fhodzwa o vha a sa ḓivhi we a mu fhodza, ngauri ho vha hu na vhathu vhanzhi henefho, Yesu a xela-xela vhukati havho." 
John5:14 Ngavhuya Yesu a ṱangana nae thembeleni, a mu vhudza a ri, “Vhonani zwino no fhola, ni mbo ḓi laṱa vhutshinyi haṋu uri ni sa vho ḓo ḓelwa nga zwi fhiraho zwiḽa.”" 
John5:15 Ndi hone uyo munna a tshi mbo ḓi ya a vhudza vhahulwane vha Majuda uri we a mu fhodza ndi Yesu. 
John5:16 Vhone vha mbo ḓi thoma u sala Yesu murahu nge a ḓi zwi ita nga Sabatha. 
John5:17 Yesu a vha vhudza a ri, “Khotsi anga u shuma tshifhinga tshoṱhe, na Nṋe ndi dzula ndi tshi shuma.”" 
John5:18 A tshi ralo vhahulwane vha Majuda vha vho tou ṋaṋa kha ḽa uri vha a mu vhulaha; ngauri o thoma a nyadza Sabatha, a vho dovha a ri Mudzimu ndi Khotsi awe vhukuma, ha vha u ḓieḓanyisa na Mudzimu." 
John5:19 Yesu a vha vhudza a ri, “Zwino ipfani-ha: Murwa ha koni u ita tshithu nga eṱhe; u ita zwenezwo fhedzi zwine a vhona Khotsi awe a tshi ita. Murwa u ita zwenezwo zwine Khotsi a ita," 
John5:20 ngauri Khotsi u funa Murwa nahone u mu sumbedza zwoṱhe zwine Ene a ita. U kha ḓi ḓo mu itisa zwihulu zwi fhiraho hezwi, inwi na ḓo sala no kanuka." 
John5:21 Ndi uri unga Khotsi a tshi vusa vhafu vha dovha vha tshila, na Murwa u ṋea vhutshilo onoyo ane a funa u mu ṋea." 
John5:22 Nahone Khotsi ha haṱuli muthu, maanḓa oṱhe a u haṱula o a kumedza Murwa" 
John5:23 uri vhoṱhe vha hulise Murwa nga hune vha hulisa Khotsi ngaho. A sa hulisi Murwa u nyadza Khotsi we a mu ruma. 
John5:24 “Zwino ipfani-ha: ane a thetshelesa maipfi anga, a tenda zwa we a nthuma, u na vhutshilo vhu sa gumi. Onoyo ha tsha haṱulwa, o bva lufuni a pfukela vhutshiloni." 
John5:25 Thetshelesani ndi ni vhudze: Hu ḓo ḓa tshifhinga – na zwino tsho no ḓi swika – tshine vhafu vha ḓo pfa ipfi ḽa Murwa wa Mudzimu, huno vhenevho vhane vha ḽi pfa vha ḓo tshila." 
John5:26 Vhunga Khotsi e Muṋe wa vhutshilo, o ita uri na Murwa a vhe Muṋe wa vhutshilo." 
John5:27 O kumedza Murwa maanḓa a u haṱula, ngauri Murwa ndi Ene Mubebwa-nga-muthu." 
John5:28 Hezwi zwi songo ni kanukisa; tshifhinga tshi khou ḓa tshine vhafu vha ḓo pfa ipfi ḽawe 
John5:29 vha bva zwaloni zwavho; vho itaho zwivhuya vha ḓo vuwa vha tshila, hone vho itaho zwivhi vha ḓo vutshela u laṱwa." 
John5:30 “Nṋe a thi koni u ita tshithu nga ndoṱhe; ndi haṱula nga hune Mudzimu a ri ndi haṱule ngaho. Ndi tshi haṱula a thi na tshiṱalula, ngauri a thi iti zwine nda funa Nṋe muṋe, ndi ita zwi funwaho nga we a nthuma." 
John5:31 “Arali nda nga tou ḓiṱanzilela Nṋe muṋe, zwine nda amba zwi nga si kone u ṱanganedzwa vhu vhuṱanzi ha ngoho." 
John5:32 Hone ane a nṱanzilela u hone, huno ndi a ḓivha uri vhuṱanzi hawe ndi ha ngoho." 
John5:33 Hufha inwi vhaṋe no ḓi vhuya na ruma vhaḓinḓa vhaṋu ha Johanisi, ene a ḓi ṱanzilela o imela ngoho!" 
John5:34 U ralo ndi sa ambi uri Nṋe ndi lila vhuṱanzi ha muthu; ndi itela uri inwi ni tshidzwe. 
John5:35 Johanisi o vha luvhone lune lwa duga lu tshi vhonetshela, inwi na fhedza tshifhinganyana ni tshi kha ḓi takalela u vhonetshelwa ngae." 
John5:36 Huno-ha Nṋe ndi na vhuṱanzi vhune ha fhira ha Johanisi: Mishumo ine nda ita ndi tshi khunyeledza zwe nda laedzwa nga Khotsi anga, ndi yone i nṱanzilelaho ya sumbedza uri ndi Ene o nthumaho." 
John5:37 Na Ene Khotsi we a nthuma u a nṱanzilela. Inwi a ni athu vhuya na pfa ipfi ḽawe, na tshifhaṱuwo tshawe a ni athu tshi vhona," 
John5:38 na ipfi ḽawe a ni ḽi vhulungi mbiluni dzaṋu; hufha ni sa tendi ipfi ḽa onoyo we Khotsi a mu ruma. 
John5:39 Ni fhenḓa Maṅwalo ni tshi ri ni ḓo wana vhutshilo vhu sa gumi khao, ngeno eneo Maṅwalo a tshi amba Nṋe!" 
John5:40 Naho zwo ralo, a ni funi u ḓa kha Nṋe na wana vhutshilo." 
John5:41 “A thi khou lila u khoḓwa nga vhathu. 
John5:42 Ndi u tou ri inwi ndi a ni ḓivha; mbiluni dzaṋu u funa Mudzimu a zwiho. 
John5:43 Nṋe ndo ḓa ndó rumiwa nga Khotsi anga, inwi na si nṱanganedze, hone ha ḓa muṅwe o tou ḓiḓisa, ni ḓo ṱanganedza ene." 
John5:44 Vha no nga inwi ni nga tenda hani mafhungo a Mudzimu? Hufha ni tshi funa u khoḓana nga tshaṋu ni sa funi u khoḓwa nga Ene a re Mudzimu e eṱhe! 
John5:45 Hone ni songo vhona unga Nṋe ndi ḓo ni hwelela ha Khotsi anga; ane a ni hwelela ndi Mushe, onoyo ane na pikisa ene." 
John5:46 Ngavhe ni vhe no tenda zwe Mushe a amba ndi musi no tenda na zwanga; hufha ene o ṅwala nga Nṋe. 
John5:47 Zwino vhunga ni sa tendi zwe a ṅwala, maipfi anga ni nga a tenda hani?”" 
John6:1 Ngavhuya Yesu a wetshela seli ha Dzivha ḽa Galelia, ḽine nga ḽiṅwe dzina ḽa pfi Dzivha ḽa Tiberiasi." 
John6:2 A tevhelwa nga gogo ḽihulu vhunga vho vha vha tshi vhona maḓembe awe a tshi fhodza vhalwadze. 
John6:3 Yesu a gonya thavha a dzula fhasi na vhafunziwa vhawe. 
John6:4 Nga itsho tshifhinga vhuṱambo ha Majuda ha Paseka ho vha ho no vha tsini. 
John6:5 Yesu a tshi sedza a vhona hu tshi khou ḓa gogo ḽihulu, a amba na Filipi a ri, “Nṋa zwiḽiwa ri nga zwi rengafhi zwine ra nga fha havha vhathu vha ḽa?”" 
John6:6 A tshi ralo ho vha hu u ṱoḓa u tou pfa uri Filipi u ḓo ri mini, ngauri Ene o vha o no ḓivha zwine a ḓo ita." 
John6:7 Filipi a fhindula a ri, “Naho hu nga rengwa vhurotho ha maseṱha a no fhira 200, muṅwe na muṅwe a nga tou wana kugaku vha ḓi ṱahela.”" 
John6:8 Muṅwe mufunziwa wawe a no pfi Andrisi, murathu wa Simoni Pitrosi, a ri," 
John6:9 “Hu na muṅwe mutukana hafha a re na mikonde miṱanu ya vhurotho ha baḽi na khovhe mbili dza u sevha. Zwino zwenezwo zwi nga vhuya zwa ita mini kha vhathu vhangafhangafha?” 
John6:10 Yesu a ri, “Vhudzani vhathu vha dzule fhasi.” (Ndi uri ho vha hu na tshiṱanzhela tshinzhi.) Nangoho vhathu vha dzula fhasi. Vhanna vho vha vha tshi nga swika 5 000." 
John6:11 Yesu a dzhia vhurotho, a livhuha Mudzimu, a kovhela avho vhathu vho dzulaho fhasi. Na dziḽa khovhe a ḓi dzi ita nga u ralo, vhathu vhoṱhe vha ḽa vha fura." 
John6:12 Musi vhoṱhe vho no fura, Yesu a vhudza vhafunziwa vhawe a ri, “Dobelani zwipeḓu zwo salaho, uri hu si tambiswe tshithu.”" 
John6:13 Vha tshi dobela vha ḓadza mifaro ya 12 nga zwe zwa sala kha iḽa mikonde miṱanu ya bali vhathu vho no ḽa. 
John6:14 Vhathu vha tshi vhona maḓembe e Yesu a ita vha thoma u ri, “Vhukuma hoyu ndi onouḽa muporofita we a pfi u ḓo ḓa shangoni.”" 
John6:15 Yesu nga u ḓivha uri vhathu vha vho ṱoḓa u mu dzhia vha mu vhumba khosi nga khombekhombe, a dovha a humela thavhani e eṱhe." 
John6:16 Nga madekwana vhafunziwa vhawe vha tsela dzivhani. 
John6:17 Vha dzhena tshikepeni vha wetshela seli vha livha Kapernaumi. Ḽa vhuya ḽa swifhala, Yesu a sa athu swika khavho." 
John6:18 Ha vuwa ḓumbu ha vha na magabelo mahulu. 
John6:19 Musi vho no tshimbila khilomitha dzi ṱoḓaho u ita ṱhanu, vha vhona Yesu a tshi khou tshimbila nṱha ha maḓi, a tshi vho swika tsini ha tshikepe, vha tshenuwa." 
John6:20 Ene a amba navho a ri, “Ndi Nṋe, ni songo ofha.”" 
John6:21 Vha tshi kha ḓi ri vha mu dzhenisa tshikepeni, ha vha hu uri tsho no ḓi swika khunzikhunzini he vha vha vho livha hone." 
John6:22 Nga matshelo vhaḽa vhathu vhe vha vha vho sala seli ha dzivha vha vhona henefho ho no tou sala tshikepe tshithihi fhedzi. Hone vho vha vha tshi zwi ḓivha uri Yesu ho ngo ṱuwa na vhafunziwa vhawe, vho ṱuwa vhe vhoṱhe." 
John6:23 Zwino ha swika zwiṅwe zwikepe zwi bvaho Tiberiasi, zwa ḓa zwa ima fhaḽa he vhathu vha ḽa zwiḽiwa Yesu ó no livhuha." 
John6:24 Vhathu vha tshi vhona uri Yesu na vhafunziwa vhawe a vhaho, vha mbo ḓi namela zwikepe zwenezwo vha livha Kapernaumi vha tshi khou mu ṱoḓa." 
John6:25 Vhathu vha tshi wana Yesu seli ha dzivha vha mu vhudzisa vha ri, “Vhafunzi, nṋa vho ḓa lini fhano?”" 
John6:26 Yesu a vha fhindula a ri, “Zwino ipfani-ha: a ni khou nṱoḓa nge na vhona maḓembe anga, ni nṱoḓa nge na ḽa vhuswa na fura." 
John6:27 Matsina ni songo lusa u wana zwiḽiwa zwine zwa sina; lusani u wana zwiḽiwa zwi sa sini, zwi tshidzaho muthu tshoṱhe. Zwenezwo zwiḽiwa ni ḓo ṋewa nga Mubebwa-nga-muthu, ngauri ndi Ene we Khotsi a re Ene Mudzimu a mu hwesa maanḓa a u zwi ita.”" 
John6:28 Vhone vha vhudzisa vha ri, “Nṋa ri nga itani uri ri dzule ri tshi ita mishumo ine Mudzimu a i funa?”" 
John6:29 Yesu a vha fhindula a ri, “Ndi mushumo muthihi fhedzi une a funa ni tshi ita: Ndi u ṱanganedza we a mu ruma.”" 
John6:30 Vhone vha ri, “Zwino vhone vha nga si ri sumbedze tshiga tsha maanḓa avho uri ri kone u vha tenda? Vha nga ita mini ra vhona?" 
John6:31 Vhomakhulukuku washu vho ḽa mana sogani. Ndi zwine na Maṅwaloni ha pfi, ‘O vha fusha nga vhuswa vhu bvaho ṱaḓulu.’ ”" 
John6:32 Yesu a ri, “Zwino ipfani-ha: Matsina a si Mushe we a ni ṋea vhuswa vhukuma vhu bvaho ṱaḓulu, ane a ḓi ni fusha nga vhuswa vhukuma vhu bvaho ṱaḓulu ni Khotsi anga." 
John6:33 Vhuswa vhune Mudzimu a ṋea vhathu ndi uyo ane a tsa a tshi bva ṱaḓulu a ṋea shango vhutshilo.” 
John6:34 Vhathu vha mu humbela vha ri, “Muṋe washu, kha ri ḓi fhiwa zwashu honoho vhuswa misi yoṱhe.”" 
John6:35 Yesu a vha vhudza a ri, “Vhuswa vhu tshidzaho ndi Nṋe; ane a ḓa ha Nṋe ha tsha ḓo dovha a farwa nga nḓala, ane a mpfulufhela ha tsha ḓo dovha a pfa ḓora." 
John6:36 Zwino Nṋe ndi ri, u mmbona no no ḓi mmbona, hone a ni mpfulufheli." 
John6:37 Muṅwe na muṅwe we Khotsi a nkumedza u ḓo ḓa kha Nṋe; ane a ḓa kha Nṋe a thi nga mu pandeli," 
John6:38 vhunga ndi tshi tsa ndi tshi bva ṱaḓulu ndi songo ḓela u ita zwine Nṋe nda funa, ndó ḓela u ita zwine zwa funwa nga o nthumaho." 
John6:39 Zwine we a nthuma a funa ndi tshi ita ngezwi: Ha funi ndi tshi xedza na muthihi kha vhe a mpha, u funa ndi tshi vha vusa vhafuni nga ḓuvha ḽa vhufhelo." 
John6:40 Zwine Khotsi anga a funa ndi uri vhoṱhe vhane vha vhona Murwa vha mu fulufhela, vha vhe na vhutshilo vhu sa fheli, Nṋe nda ḓo konou vha vusa vhafuni nga ḓuvha ḽa vhufhelo.”" 
John6:41 Zwenezwo Majuda vha thoma u mu gungulela nge a ri, “Ndi Nṋe vhuswa vhu bvaho ṱaḓulu.”" 
John6:42 Vha mbo ḓi ri, “Nṋa uyu muthu a si Yesu ṅwana wa Josefa? Khotsi awe na mme awe hufha ri tshi vha ḓivha! Zwino u vho amba hani a tshi ri u bva ṱaḓulu?”" 
John6:43 Yesu a vha fhindula a ri, “Litshani u ṱolou ṅuṅuna nga tshaṋu." 
John6:44 A hu na ane a kona u ḓa kha Nṋe arali a songo tou kokodzwa nga Khotsi we a nthuma; huno onoyo Nṋe ndi ḓo mu vusa nga ḓuvha ḽa vhufhelo. 
John6:45 Hufha vhaporofita vha tshi ṅwala vho ri, ‘Vhoṱhe vha ḓo tou funzwa nga Mudzimu!’ Zwino muṅwe na muṅwe ane a thetshelesa Khotsi, a dovha a funzwa ngae, u ḓa ngeno kha Nṋe." 
John6:46 Hezwi a zwi ambi uri hu na muthu o no vhonaho Khotsi; o mu vhonaho ndi muthihi fhedzi: ndi a bvaho ha Mudzimu. 
John6:47 Zwino ipfani-ha: a mpfulufhelaho u na vhutshilo vhu sa gumi. 
John6:48 Ndi Nṋe vhuswa vhu tshidzaho. 
John6:49 Vhomakhulukuku waṋu vho ḽa mana sogani vha fhedza vha ḓi fa. 
John6:50 Hone vhuswa vhu bvaho ṱaḓulu ndi vhune muthu a ri u vhu ḽa a sa tsha fa. 
John6:51 Ndi Nṋe honoho vhuswa vhu tshidzaho he ha tou tsa vhu tshi bva ṱaḓulu. Arali muthu a ḽa vhuswa honoho u ḓo tshila lini na lini. Vhuswa vhune nda ḓo mu ṋea ndi muvhili wanga une nda u kumedzela shango uri ḽi kone u tshila.” 
John6:52 Ḽeneḽo fhungo ḽa vusa khani khulu vhukati ha Majuda; vha hanedzana vha ri, “Nṋa uyu muthu a nga kona hani u ri ṋea muvhili wawe ra u ḽa?”" 
John6:53 Yesu a vha vhudza a ri, “Zwino ipfani-ha: Na sa ḽa muvhili wa Mubebwa-nga-muthu, na nwa na malofha awe, a ni nga koni u vha na vhutshilo kha inwi." 
John6:54 Ane a ḽa muvhili wanga, a nwa na malofha anga, u na vhutshilo vhu sa fheli, nahone Nṋe ndi ḓo mu vusa vhafuni nga ḓuvha ḽa vhufhelo." 
John6:55 Muvhili wanga ndi zwone zwiḽiwa vhukuma, malofha anga ndi tshone tshinwiwa vhukuma." 
John6:56 Ane a ḽa muvhili wanga a nwa na malofha anga, u dzula e kha Nṋe, na Nṋe ndi khae." 
John6:57 Nṋe ndi tshila nga Khotsi a tshilaho we a nthuma; sa zwenezwo ane a nndya u ḓo tshila-vho nga Nṋe. 
John6:58 Uvhu-ha ndi hone vhuswa vhu bvaho ṱaḓulu, a vhu fani na vhuḽa he vhomakhulukuku waṋu vha ḽa vha fhedza vha ḓi fa. Hovhu, ane a vhu ḽa u ḓo tshila nga hu sa fheliho.”" 
John6:59 Haya ndi maipfi e Yesu a amba a tshi khou funza sinagogoni Kapernaumi. 
John6:60 Vhanzhi vha vhafunziwa vhawe vha tshi pfa a tshi ralo vha ri, “Pfunzo hei i konḓa nga maanḓa; i nga ṱanganedzwa nga nnyi?”" 
John6:61 Naho a songo vhudzwa nga muthu Yesu o ḓi zwi ḓivha uri vhafunziwa vhawe vha khou gungula nga haya mafhungo, ndi zwe a vha vhudza a ri, “Kani-ha aya mafhungo a vho ṱoḓa u ni ṅalisa?" 
John6:62 Zwino ni ḓo tou zwi ita hani ni tshi vhona Mubebwa-nga-muthu a tshi dovha a gonya a vhuelela he a vha e hone? 
John6:63 Tshine tsha tshidza muthu ndi Muya wa Mudzimu; muthu nga eṱhe ha na tshine a kona. Maipfi e nda amba na inwi a ni ṋea onoyo Muya, a ni ṋea vhutshilo;" 
John6:64 vhaṅwe vhaṋu vha ro sa a tenda.” (Yesu o vha o ḓi zwi ḓivha na u bva mathomoni uri vhane vha sa mu fulufhele ndi vhafhio, na uri ane a ḓo mu fheṱa ndi nnyi.)" 
John6:65 A dovha a ri, “Ndi zwe ndi tshi ni vhudza nda ri a hu na ane a nga ḓa kha Nṋe arali a songo thoma u koniswa nga Khotsi anga.”" 
John6:66 U bva zwenezwo vhafunziwa vhanzhi vha mu shandukela vha si tsha tshimbila nae. 
John6:67 Ndi hone Yesu a tshi amba na vha 12 a ri, “Nṋa inwi-vho ni khou ṱoḓa u ṱuwa kani?”" 
John6:68 Simoni Pitrosi a fhindula a ri, “Muṋe washu, ri ḓo ṱuwa ra ya ha nnyi, hufha vhe vhone vha na maipfi a tshidzaho tshoṱhe?" 
John6:69 Zwino riṋe ro no vha fulufhela, ri vho zwi ḓivha uri ndi vhone Mukhethwa a bvaho ha Mudzimu.”" 
John6:70 Yesu a tshi vha fhindula a ri, “Nṋa a tho ngo ni nanga ni 12? Huno-ha, muṅwe waṋu ndi diabolo.”" 
John6:71 A tshi ralo o vha a tshi khou amba Judasi murwa wa Simoni Iskariote; onoyo naho o vha e muṅwe wa vha 12, o vha e ene we a vho ḓo mu fheṱa." 
John7:1 Ngavhuya Yesu a thoma u tshimbila na ḽa Galelia. O vha a sa funi u tshimbila Judia, ngauri vhahulwane vha Majuda vho vha vha tshi khou ṱoḓa nḓila ya u mu vhulaha." 
John7:2 Musi vhuṱambo ha Majuda ha Mishasha ho no vha tsini," 
John7:3 vharathu vha Yesu vha mu vhudza vha ri, “Khefha ni sa ṱuwi fhano na ya Judia uri vhafunziwa vhaṋu vha kone u vhona-vho mishumo ine na ita?" 
John7:4 Arali muthu a tshi funa u ḓivhea ha dzumbi mishumo yawe. Vhunga ni tshi khou ita zwithu zwingafhangafha, itani uri shango ḽoṱhe ḽi ni ḓivhe!”" 
John7:5 (Hafhu na vhone vharathu vhawe vho vha vha sa mu tendi.) 
John7:6 Yesu a ri, “Nṋe tshifhinga tshanga a tshi athu swika; kha inwi a hu tou vha na tshifhinga." 
John7:7 Inwi shango a ḽi koni u ni vhenga; Nṋe ḽi a mmbenga ngauri ndi dzula ndi tshi vha kaidza uri mishumo yavho ndi mivhi. 
John7:8 Inwi iyani zwaṋu vhuṱamboni. Nṋe vhuṱamboni vhuno a thi yi; tshifhinga tshanga a tshi athu swika.” 
John7:9 A ri u fhindula nga u ralo a mbo ḓi sala Galelia. 
John7:10 Musi vharathu vhawe vho no ya vhuṱamboni na Yesu a ya, e eṱhe a sa vhonwi nga muthu." 
John7:11 Vhahulwane vha Majuda vho vha vha tshi khou ḓi mu ṱoḓa henengei vhuṱamboni vha tshi vhudzisa vha tshi ri, “Nṋa uḽa munna u ngafhi?”" 
John7:12 Vhathu vho vha vha tshi khou mu sola nga tshavho, vhaṅwe vha tshi ri, “Ndi muvhuya,” vhaṅwe vha tshi ri, “A si muvhuya, u xedza vhathu.”" 
John7:13 Hone a ho ngo vha na we a tou mu amba khagala, ngauri vho vha vha tshi ofha vhahulwane vha Majuda." 
John7:14 Musi vhuṱambo ho ṱangana Yesu a ya thembeleni a thoma u funza. 
John7:15 Vhahulwane vha Majuda vha kanuka nga maanḓa vha ri, “Nṋa uyu munna khezwi a tshi tou ḓivha Maṅwalo nga u rali ngeno na u funzwa a songo ngo vhuya a funzwa?”" 
John7:16 Yesu a tshi fhindula a ri, “Nṋe pfunzo ine nda funza a si yanga ndi ya o nthumaho." 
John7:17 Ane a ḓiimisela u ita zwine Mudzimu a funa u ḓo zwi ḓivha uri zwine nda funza a si zwanga, ndi zwa Mudzimu." 
John7:18 Ane a amba zwawe u ṱoḓa uri hu huliswe ene; ane a ṱoḓa uri hu huliswe o mu rumaho ndi ene ane a fulufhedzea, ha na vhufhura." 
John7:19 Nṋa a thi ri Mushe o ni ṋea Mulayo? Zwino khezwi hu si na na muthihi waṋu ane a u tevhedza? Ndi amba ngauri ni vho funa u mmbulaha!” 
John7:20 Vhathu vha fhindula vha ri, “Ndi nnyi ane a khou funa u ni vhulaha? No tou dzhenwa nga thuṅwa ya Saṱhane.”" 
John7:21 Yesu a tshi fhindula a ri, “Ndo ri u ita maḓembe luthihi na vhilaela noṱhe." 
John7:22 A thi ri Mushe o ni ṋea mulayo wa u fumbisa vhana (naho zwi songo thomiwa nga Mushe, zwo thomiwa nga vhomakhulukuku). Asizwi, na nga Sabatha inwi ni a ḓi fumbisa muthu." 
John7:23 Zwino arali muthu a tshi kona u fumbiswa nga Sabatha uri hu si pfukiwe Mulayo wa Mushe, Nṋe khezwi ni tshi ntsinyutshela nge nda fhodza muthu tshoṱhe nga Sabatha?" 
John7:24 Litshani u ṱavhanyedza u haṱula muthu, ni haṱule ni tshi tevhedza zwi re zwone.”" 
John7:25 Vhaṅwe vhathu vha Jerusalema vha ri, “Nṋa uyu munna a si uḽa ane vha khou ṱoḓa u mu vhulaha?" 
John7:26 Zwino khezwi a tshi khou ḓi amba vhukati ha vhathu hu si na ane a mu hanedza! Kani-ha na zwino vhahulwane vha a ḓivha uri vhukuma ndi Ene Mesia? 
John7:27 Tshi dinaho ndi uri uyu ri a ḓivha hune a bva hone, hu uri Mesia a tshi ḓa, a hu na ane a ḓo ḓivha uri u bva ngafhi.”" 
John7:28 Huno Yesu a tshi khou funza thembeleni a vhidzelela a ri, “Ndi zwone zwauri ni a nnḓivha na uri ni ḓivha na hune nda bva hone. Naho zwo ralo, a tho ngo sokou ḓa nga ndoṱhe. We a nthuma u a fulufhedzea. Onoyo inwi a ni mu ḓivhi," 
John7:29 a no mu ḓivha ndi Nṋe, ngauri ndi bva khae nahone ndi Ene o nthumaho.”" 
John7:30 Zwenezwo vha vho ṱoḓa u mu fara, hone hu si vhe na we a vhuya a mu kwama, ngauri tshifhinga tshawe tsho vha tshi sa athu swika." 
John7:31 Hone vhanzhi kha gogo ḽeneḽo vha mu fulufhela vha ri, “Kani Mesia a tshi ḓa u kha ḓi ḓo ita maṅwe maḓembe a fhiraho e uyu a ita?”" 
John7:32 Vhafarisei vha tshi pfa gogo ḽi tshi khou hevhedzana enea mafhungo, vhone na vhotshifhe vhahulwane vha mbo ruma vhalindathembele uri vha yo fara Yesu." 
John7:33 Yesu Ene a ri, “Ndi kha ḓi ḓo vha na inwi tshifhinganyana, ndi hone ndi tshi ḓo humela ha o nthumaho." 
John7:34 Ni ḓo nṱoḓa ni si nngwane, ngauri hune nda vha hone inwi ni nga si kone u swika.”" 
John7:35 Vhahulwane vha Majuda vha amba nga tshavho vha ri, “Nṋa a nga vha a tshi khou ṱoḓa u yafhi hune riṋe ra si tsha ḓo mu wana? Kani u ṱoḓa u ya kha Majuda o balanganaho na shango a funza Magiriki?" 
John7:36 Ri amba ngauri u ri, ‘Ni ḓo nṱoḓa ni si nngwane,’ a dovha a ri, ‘Hune nda vha hone inwi ni nga si kone u swika.’ A tshi ralo u amba mini?”" 
John7:37 Ḓuvha ḽa u fhedza vhuṱambo ḽo vha ḽi ḽone ḽihulwane. Nga ḽeneḽo ḓuvha Yesu a ima a vhidzelela a ri, “A na ḓora kha a ḓe kha Nṋe a nwe." 
John7:38 Hafhu Maṅwalo a ri, ‘A fulufhelaho Nṋe hu ḓo ela milambwana ya maḓi a tshidzaho a tshi bva khae’!”" 
John7:39 A tshi ralo ho vha hu u amba Muya we vha mu fulufhelaho vha vha vha tshi ḓo mu ṱanganedza hu si kale. Misi iyo Muya o vha a sa athu ḓa, ngauri Yesu o vha a sa athu ya vhugalani hawe." 
John7:40 Vhaṅwe vhathu henefho kha gogo ḽeneḽo vha tshi pfa a tshi ralo vha ri, “Nangoho hoyu munna ndi onouḽa Muporofita we a pfi u ḓo ḓa.”" 
John7:41 Vhaṅwe vha ri, “U tou vha Ene Mesia.” Hone ha ḓi vha na vhaṅwe vha no ri, “Mesia a nga bva Galelia naa?" 
John7:42 Hufha Maṅwalo a tshi ri Mesia u ḓo vha muḓuhulu wa Dafita, nahone u ḓo bebwa Betlehema, henefho he Dafita a vha a tshi dzula hone!”" 
John7:43 Ha mbo ḓi vha u fhambana ha gogo tshilwelwa e Ene Yesu. 
John7:44 Vhaṅwe vhavho vha vho funa u mu fara, hone hu si vhe na we a vhuya a mu kwama." 
John7:45 Vhaḽa vhalindathembele vha tshi vhuelela khoroni ya vhotshifhe vhahulwane na Vhafarisei, vhone vha vha vhudzisa vha ri, “Nṋa ndi mini ni songo vhuya nae?”" 
John7:46 Vhalindathembele vha fhindula vha ri, “Riṋe a ri athu vhuya ra pfa muthu ane a amba sa hoyo munna!”" 
John7:47 Vhafarisei vha ri, “Khezwi hu tshi vho nga na inwi o no ni fhura?" 
John7:48 Ni khou vhona kha vhahulwane vha lushaka na kha Vhafarisei hu na nnyi a no mu tenda? 
John7:49 Gogo heḽi ḽi itwa nga u sa ḓivha Mulayo wa Mushe; ḽo teketelwa nga Mudzimu!” 
John7:50 Na Ṋegodima, uḽa we a vhuya a dalela Yesu o vha e muṅwe wavho. Ene a amba navho a ri," 
John7:51 “Nṋa Mulayo washu u a tenda ri tshi sokou haṱula muthu a songo thoma a sengiswa ha wanala uri o tshinyani?” 
John7:52 Vhone vha fhindula vha ri, “Mathina na vhone vho no vha Mugalelia? Kha vha fhenḓe Maṅwalo, vha ḓo wana uri a hu na muporofita a no bva Galelia.”" 
John8:1 [Vhathu vhoṱhe vha humela hayani, Yesu Ene a ya Thavhani ya Miolivi." 
John8:2 Nga matshelo, hu tshee nga matshelonitsheloni, a vhuelela thembeleni. Vhathu vhoṱhe vha kuvhangana u mu pfa, Ene a dzula fhasi a thoma u vha funza." 
John8:3 Vhaḓivhi vha Mulayo na Vhafarisei vha ḓisa muṅwe musadzi we a vha o fariwa e kha vhupombwe, vha mu imisa phanḓa ha vhathu." 
John8:4 Vha vhudza Yesu vha ri, “Vhafunzi, hoyu musadzi o wanedzwa a tshi khou ita vhupombwe." 
John8:5 Zwino Mushe kha Mulayo washu o ri laya uri musadzi o raliho u fanela u tou kanḓwa nga matombo a fa. Vhone zwino vha zwi vhona hani?” 
John8:6 Vha tshi ralo tsho vha tshi tshikwekwe tsha uri vha kone u mu hwelela zwavhuḓi. Yesu Ene a kotama a thoma u ṅwala-ṅwala fhasi nga munwe. 
John8:7 Vhone vhó ḓi ima vha tshi khou mu vhudzisa, a kotamuluwa a vha vhudza a ri, “A sa athu vhuyaho a pfuka Mulayo wa Mudzimu, nga a vhe ene a no thoma u mu kovhola.”" 
John8:8 A dovha a kotama a ṅwala-ṅwala fhasi. 
John8:9 Vha tshi tou pfa zwenezwo vhahulwane vha mbo ḓi vha vhone vha u thoma u ṱuwa nga muthihi nga muthihi, na vhaṅwe vha ḓi ralo vha vhuya vha sia Yesu e eṱhe, na uyo musadzi o ḓi sokou ima henefhaḽa." 
John8:10 Yesu a tshi kotamuluwa, a amba na uyo musadzi a ri, “Vhone musadzi, vhaḽa vhathu vha ngafhi? A hu na na muthihi we a vha haṱula?”" 
John8:11 Uyo musadzi a fhindula a ri, “A hu tshee na na muthihi Muṋe wanga.” Yesu a ri, “Na Nṋe a thi vha haṱuli. Kha vha tshimbile zwavho, hone u bva zwino vha laṱe vhutshinyi havho.”]" 
John8:12 Yesu a dovha u amba na vhathu a ri, “Nṋe ndi tshedza tsha shango. Ane a vha mufunziwa wanga ha nga tshimbili swiswini, u ḓo vha na tshedza tshi re vhutshilo.”" 
John8:13 Vhafarisei vha amba nae vha ri, “Vhunga ni tshi khou tou ḓiṱanzilela inwi muṋe, zwine na amba a zwi na vhuṱanzi.”" 
John8:14 Yesu a fhindula a ri, “Aiwa, matsina naho ndi tshi khou ḓiṱanzilela Nṋe muṋe, zwine nda amba zwi na vhuṱanzi ngauri ndi a ḓivha hune nda bva na hune nda ya. Inwi hune nda bva na hune nda ya a ni hu ḓivhi." 
John8:15 Inwi ni haṱula ni tshi sedza tshifhaṱuwo; Nṋe a thi haṱuli muthu. 
John8:16 Naho ndo vha ndi tshi nga ri ndi a haṱula, khaṱhulo yanga yo vha i tshi ḓo vha ya ngoho, ngauri a thi ndoṱhe, ndi na Mudzimu Khotsi o nthumaho." 
John8:17 Kha Mulayo waṋu ho ṅwaliwa upfi arali vhuṱanzi ha vhathu vhavhili ha anḓana, zwine vha amba zwo khwaṱha." 
John8:18 Zwino na Nṋe ndi na ṱhanzi mbili: Ya u thoma ndi Nṋe muṋe; ya vhuvhili ndi Khotsi anga o nthumaho.” 
John8:19 Vhone vha mu vhudzisa vha ri, “Nṋa khotsi aṋu vha ngafhi?” Yesu a fhindula a ri, “Inwi hu Nṋe a ni nnḓivhi, hu Khotsi anga a ni mu ḓivhi. Arali Nṋe no vha ni tshi nnḓivha ndi musi na Khotsi anga ni tshi ḓo vha ni tshi mu ḓivha.”" 
John8:20 Mafhungo ayo oṱhe Yesu o a amba musi a tshi khou funza thembeleni, fhethu he ha vha hu tshi dzula zwibogisi zwa zwifhiwa. Hone hu si vhe na we a mu fara, ngauri tshifhinga tshawe tsho vha tshi sa athu swika." 
John8:21 Yesu a dovha a vha vhudza a ri, “Nṋe ndi ḓo ṱuwa, na sala ni tshi nndila, na fhedza nga u fela vhutshinyini haṋu. Hune Nṋe nda khou ya hone inwi ni nga si ntevhele.”" 
John8:22 Vhahulwane vha Majuda ndi hone vha tshi ri, “A tshi ri, ‘Hune Nṋe nda khou ya hone inwi ni nga si ntevhele,’ kani u ṱoḓa u ḓivhulaha?”" 
John8:23 Yesu a fhindula a ri, “Inwi ni vha fhano fhasi; Nṋe ndi bva ṱaḓulu. Hayani haṋu ndi fhano shangoni, hone kha Nṋe a zwo ngo ralo." 
John8:24 Ndi zwe nda ni vhudza nda ri ni ḓo fela vhutshinyini haṋu. Nangoho ni ḓo fela vhutshinyini haṋu arali ni sa tendi uri ‘Ndi ane nda vha Ene’.” 
John8:25 Vhone vha mu vhudzisa vha ri, “Ni ri ni nnyi?” Yesu a fhindula a ri, “Ndi zwenezwiḽa zwe nda ni vhudza u bva mathomoni." 
John8:26 Hu tshee na zwinzhi zwe nda vha ndi tshi nga zwi amba nda ni haṱula ngazwo. Hone zwino shango ndi khou tou ḽi vhudza fhedzi zwe nda pfa nga o nthumaho; huno Ene u a fulufhedzea.” 
John8:27 Vhone vha si kone u pfa uri u khou vha vhudza nga Khotsi. 
John8:28 Ndi hone Yesu a tshi vha vhudza a ri, “Musi no no imisela Mubebwa-nga-muthu nṱha ndi hone ni tshi ḓo ḓivha uri ‘Ndi ane nda vha Ene’; na ḓivha na uri a hu na tshine nda sokou ita nga ndoṱhe; ndi amba zwenezwo zwine Khotsi a ri ndi zwi ambe." 
John8:29 Zwino we a nthuma u na Nṋe; ha nndaṱedzi, ngauri ndi dzula ndi tshi ita zwine zwa mu takadza.”" 
John8:30 Vhanzhi vhe vha pfa Yesu a tshi amba eneo mafhungo vha mu tenda. 
John8:31 Ndi hone Yesu a tshi amba na Majuda vhe vha mu tenda a ri, “Arali inwi ni tshi futelela u tevhedza zwine nda amba, ndi hone ni tshi ḓo vha vhafunziwa vhanga vhukuma;" 
John8:32 ni ḓo ḓivha ngoho; huno ngoho i ḓo ni vhofholola.” 
John8:33 Vhone vha fhindula vha ri, “Riṋe ri vhaḓuhulu vha Abrahamu; a ri athu vhuya ra vha phuli dza muthu. Zwino ni tshi ri ri ḓo vhofhololwa, ni khou amba mini?”" 
John8:34 Yesu a vha vhudza a ri, “Thetshelesani ndi ni vhudze: Muthu ane a endela u tshinya o no vha phuli ya hone vhutshinyi." 
John8:35 Phuli i nga si vhe wa muṱani tshoṱhe, hone ṅwana ndi wa hayani misi yoṱhe." 
John8:36 Zwino arali na tou vhofhololwa nga Murwa, ndi hone ni tshi ḓo vha no vhofhololwa vhukuma." 
John8:37 Zwauri ni vhaḓuhulu vha Abrahamu ndi a zwi ḓivha. Zwino hufha ni tshi vho ṱoḓa u mmbulaha? Zwi amba uri a ni funi u ṱanganedza maipfi anga. 
John8:38 Nṋe ndi amba zwe Khotsi anga a tou ntsumbedza; inwi ni ita zwe na vhudzwa nga khotsi aṋu.” 
John8:39 Vhone vha fhindula vha ri, “Khotsi ashu ndi Abrahamu.” Yesu a ri, “Arali nangoho no vha ni vhana vha Abrahamu ndi musi ni tshi ḓo ita zwe ene a vha a tshi ita." 
John8:40 Zwino khezwi ni tshi khou ṱoḓa u mmbulaha, ngeno Nṋe ndi tshi khou ni vhudza ngoho ye nda tou pfa nga Mudzimu. Kani Abrahamu zwo raliho o vhuya a zwi ita?" 
John8:41 Inwi no tou dzhia khotsi aṋu.” Vha fhindula vha ri, “Riṋe a ro ngo bebwa nga vhupombwe; a ri na muṅwe khotsi arali e si Ene Mudzimu.”" 
John8:42 Yesu a vha vhudza a ri, “Arali nangoho Mudzimu o vha e Khotsi aṋu ndi musi ni tshi ḓo mpfuna, ngauri ndi bva ha Ene ni tshi mmbona ndi fhano. Hafhu a tho ngo tou ḓiḓisa, Ene ndi Ene we a nthuma." 
John8:43 Ni a ḓivha uri ndi mini zwine nda amba ni sa zwi pfi? Ndi uri a ni funi u ṱanganedza pfunzo yanga. 
John8:44 Inwi ni vhana vha khotsi aṋu diabolo; ni funa u ita zwine khotsi aṋu a tama. Ene o ḓi vha mupondavhathu u bva henengei mathomoni. Ho ngo vhuya a kona u ima kha ngoho; tshawe o ḓi vha mazwifhi. Musi a tshi zwifha u khou tou ita zwo mu fanelaho, ngauri ndi muzwifhi; ndi ene khotsi a mazwifhi." 
John8:45 Nṋe ndi amba ngoho, ndi zwine na si tende zwine nda amba." 
John8:46 Ndi nnyi waṋu ane a nga nthovhedza a ri ndo vhuya nda tshinya tshiṅwe tshithu-vho? Zwino arali ndi tshi amba ngoho ndi mini ni sa tendi? 
John8:47 Ane a bva ha Mudzimu u thetshelesa maipfi a Mudzimu. Inwi a ni bvi ha Mudzimu; ndi zwine na si fune u thetshelesa.” 
John8:48 Majuda vha fhindula Yesu vha ri, “Ri tshi ri ni Musamaria, ni na thuṅwa ya Saṱhane, ro vha ri sa khou amba zwone?”" 
John8:49 Yesu a fhindula a ri, “A thi na thuṅwa; Nṋe ndi hulisa Khotsi anga, hone inwi ni a nnyadza." 
John8:50 A si uri ndi tshi ralo ndi u ṱoḓa u huliswa Nṋe muṋe. Ane a funa ndi tshi huliswa u hone; khaṱhulo i zwanḓani zwawe. 
John8:51 Zwino thetshelesani ndi ni vhudze: Ane a ita zwine nda amba, ha nga thetsheli lufu na kathihi.”" 
John8:52 Majuda vha mu vhudza vha ri, “Zwino ndi hone ro zwi vhona uri vhukuma ni na thuṅwa! Hufha Abrahamu o ḓi fa, na vhaporofita vho ḓi fa; zwino ni nga amba hani na ri, ‘Ane a ita zwine nda amba ha nga thetsheli lufu na kathihi’?" 
John8:53 Kani-ha ni vho ḓiita muhulwane kha khotsi ashu Abrahamu? Ri amba ngauri hu ene, hu vhaporofita, vhoṱhe vho ḓi fa. Nṋa matsina ni vho ḓiita nnyi?”" 
John8:54 Yesu a ri, “Arali ndi nga ḓihulisa Nṋe muṋe, khuliso yeneyo i ḓo vha i si khuliso ya tshithu. Ane a nkhulisa ndi Khotsi anga – onoyo ane inwi na ri ndi Mudzimu waṋu," 
John8:55 ngeno ni sa vhuyi na mu ḓivha; Nṋe hone ndi a mu ḓivha. Arali ndi tshi ri a thi mu ḓivhi, ndi ḓo vha ndi tshi vho zwifha sa inwi. Huno zwino ndi a mu ḓivha nahone ndi khunyeledza zwine a amba." 
John8:56 “Khotsi aṋu Abrahamu o pembela ó lavhelela u ḓa hanga; nangoho a ri u zwi vhona a takala.” 
John8:57 Majuda vha ri, “Ni sa athu vhuya na vha na miṅwaha ya 50 na vha ni tshi vho ri no vhona Abrahamu!”" 
John8:58 Yesu a fhindula a ri, “Zwino ipfani-ha: Abrahamu a sa athu bebiwa, ndi ḓi vha ane nda vha ene.”" 
John8:59 Vha mbo ḓi doba matombo vha tshi ri vha mu kovhole ngao, hone Ene a ngalangala ha mbo ḓi vha u bva thembeleni." 
John9:1 Musi Yesu a tshi khou ḓitshimbilela a vhona munna we a bebwa e bofu. 
John9:2 Vhafunziwa vhawe vha mu vhudzisa vha ri, “Vhafunzi, uyu muthu a tshi bebwa e bofu, hu nga vha ho tshinya nnyi? Ho tshinya ene muṋe kana ho tshinya vhabebi vhawe?”" 
John9:3 Yesu a fhindula a ri, “Vhupofu ha hoyu muthu a ho ngo bva kha vhutshinyi ha ene muṋe kana ha vhabebi vhawe; ho vha u itela fhedzi uri Mudzimu a sumbedze vhathu maanḓa awe khae." 
John9:4 Riṋe tshashu ndi u futelela u ita mushumo wa o nthumaho ḽi tshi kha ḓi vha masiari; zwenezwino ḓuvha ḽi a kovhela, muthu a si tsha ḓo kona u shuma tshithu." 
John9:5 Zwino ndi tshee fhano shangoni ndi Nṋe tshedza tsha shango.” 
John9:6 Yesu a ri u ralo a mbo pfela mare fhasi a suka matope ngao a a ḓodza kha maṱo a uyo munna wa bofu; 
John9:7 a konou mu vhudza a ri, “Tshimbilani ni yo ṱamba khofheni ishani ḽa Silomu.” (Silomu ndi uri “Muḓinḓa”.) Ndi hone uyo munna a tshi ṱuwa a yo ṱamba khofheni, a vhuya a tshi vho vhona." 
John9:8 Vhahura vhawe, na vhaṅwe vhathu vhe vha vha vha tshi ḓi mu vhona zwiḽa a tshi kha ḓi tshila nga u humbela, vha vhudzisana vha ri, “Nṋa uyu munna a si onouḽa we a vha a tshi ṱwa o dzula a tshi khou humbela zwifhiwa?”" 
John9:9 Vhaṅwe vha ri, “Ndi ene.” Vhaṅwe vha ri, “A si ene; vha tou fana.” Hone ene muṋe wazwo a ri, “Ndi nṋe.”" 
John9:10 Vha mu vhudzisa vha ri, “Nṋa zwo ḓa hani ni tshi vho vhona?”" 
John9:11 A fhindula a ri, “Uḽa munna a no pfi Yesu o tou suka matope a nnḓodza kha maṱo a ri, ‘Tshimbilani ni yo ṱamba khofheni Silomu.’ Nangoho nṋe nda ya; ndi tshi tou fhedza u ṱamba nda wana ndi tshi vho kona u vhona.”" 
John9:12 Vha vhudzisa vha ri, “Nṋa onoyo munna u ngafhi?” Ene a fhindula a ri, “A thi ḓivhi.”" 
John9:13 Ndi hone vha tshi ṱuwa na uyo munna we a vha e bofu vha mu isa ha Vhafarisei. 
John9:14 Hafhu zwiḽa Yesu a tshi suka matope a swingulusa bofu iḽo yo vha i Sabatha. 
John9:15 Zwino Vhafarisei na vhone vha vhudzisa uyo munna uri nṋa zwo ḓa hani a tshi vho kona u vhona. Ene a vha vhudza a ri, “O tou dzhia matopenyana a nnḓodza kha maṱo; nṋe nda ya nda ṱamba khofheni nda wana ndi tshi vho kona u vhona.”" 
John9:16 Vhaṅwe Vhafarisei vha ri, “Muthu we a ita zwithu izwo a nga si vhe a tshi bva ha Mudzimu; hufha a sa tevhedzi mulayo wa Sabatha!” Hone vhaṅwe vha ri, “Nṋa muthu wa mutshinyi a nga kona hani u ita maḓembe mangafhangafha?” Vha tshi ralo ha mbo ḓi vha u fhandekana havho." 
John9:17 Ndi hone vha tshi vho tou dovha vha vhudzisa uyo munna vha ri, “Zwino inwi ni ri mini ngae? Ri amba ngauri ndi inwi we na swinguluswa!” Ene a fhindula a ri, “Nṋe ndi ri ndi muporofita.”" 
John9:18 Vhahulwane vha Majuda vhone vho vha vha sa funi u tenda uri uyo munna o vha e bofu o tou swinguluswa; vha vhuya vha tou vhidza vhabebi vhawe 
John9:19 vha vha vhudzisa vha ri, “Nṋa uyu ndi ṅwana waṋu? Zwino ni tshi ri o bebwa e bofu zwo ḓo ḓa hani uri a kone u vhona?”" 
John9:20 Vhabebi vhawe vha fhindula vha ri, “Riṋe tshine ra ḓivha ndi uri ndi ṅwana washu na uri o bebwa e bofu." 
John9:21 Hone uri o swinguluswa hani a si zwine ra zwi ḓivha; hu ḓi nga muthu o mu swingulusaho, na Ene a ri mu ḓivhi. Hufha ene muṋe e munna; mu vhudziseni, u ḓo ḓifhindulela!”" 
John9:22 Vhabebi vhawe vha tshi vhuya vha ralo ndi uri vho vha vha tshi ofha vhahulwane vha Majuda, vhunga vhenevho vho vha vho no ḓi vhofha ḽa uri ane a vhuya a bula ḽa uri Yesu ndi Mesia u ḓo thathiwa sinagogoni yavho." 
John9:23 Ndi zwe vha tshi fhindula vha ri, “Hufha ene muṋe e munna. Mu vhudziseni!”" 
John9:24 Vha dovha vha vhidza uyo munna vha mu vhudzisa vha ri, “Ambani ngoho phanḓa ha Mudzimu! Riṋe ri ḓivha uri hoyo munna ndi mutshinyi.”" 
John9:25 Ene a fhindula a ri, “Nṋe zwauri ndi mutshinyi kana a si mutshinyi a thi zwi ḓivhi; tshine nda ḓivha ndi uri ndo bebwa ndi bofu, hone zwino ndi vho vhona.”" 
John9:26 Vhone vha dovha vha vhudzisa vha ri, “Nṋa o tou ni ita mini? O ni swingulusa hani?”" 
John9:27 Ene a fhindula a ri, “Hufha ndo no ḓi ni vhudza ni si thetshelese! Zwino ni kha ḓi ṱoḓa u dovha na zwi pfela mini? Kani-ha na inwi ni vho ṱoḓa u vha vhafunziwa vhawe?”" 
John9:28 Vhone vha thoma u mu sema vha ri, “Mufunziwa wawe ndi enenwi; riṋe ri vhafunziwa vha Mushe." 
John9:29 Riṋe ri ḓivha uri Mudzimu o amba na Mushe, a vha uyo muthu a ri ḓivhi na hune a bva hone.”" 
John9:30 Uyo munna a ri, “Zwi a kanukisa! O ntswingulusa, hone inwi a ni ḓivhi hune a bva hone!" 
John9:31 Roṱhe ri ḓivha uri Mudzimu ha pfi thabelo dza mutshinyi; u pfa dza vhane vha mu hulisa vha ita zwine Ene a funa. 
John9:32 Zwino tshee shango ḽa sikiwa a ri athu vhuya ra zwi pfa zwa muthu we a swingulusa muthu we a tou bebwa e bofu. 
John9:33 Arali hoyu munna o vha a sa bvi ha Mudzimu o vha a sa ḓo kona tshithu.” 
John9:34 Vha fhindula vha ri, “Inwi we na tou bebelwa vhutshinyini na alutshela khaho, riṋe ni nga vhuya na ri funza mini-vho.” U ralo vha mbo ḓi mu tumula tshivhidzoni." 
John9:35 Yesu a zwi pfa uri vho tumula uyo munna tshivhidzoni. A tshi mu wana a mu vhudzisa a ri, “Nṋa Mubebwa-nga-muthu ni a mu fulufhela naa?”" 
John9:36 Ene a ri, “Kha vha mmbudze uri ndi nnyi Muṋe wanga, uri ndi kone u mu fulufhela!”" 
John9:37 Yesu a ri, “No no ḓi mu vhona; ndi Nṋe ane a khou amba na inwi.”" 
John9:38 Uyo munna a ri, “Ndi a fulufhela Muṋe wanga!”, u ralo a mbo ḓi gwadama phanḓa hawe." 
John9:39 Yesu a ri, “Tshe Nṋe nda ḓela tshone fhano shangoni ndi u haṱula; mabofu a ḓo swinguluwa; vha vhonaho vha ḓo pofula.”" 
John9:40 Vhaṅwe Vhafarisei vhe vha vha vhe nae henefho vha tshi pfa a tshi ralo vha ri, “Ni songo vha ni tshi khou ṱoḓa u ri na riṋe ri mabofu.”" 
John9:41 Yesu a fhindula a ri, “Arali no vha ni mabofu ndi musi ni si na mulandu; zwino ni ri ni a vhona, ndi zwine na ḓi dzula ni na mulandu ngazwo." 
John10:1 “Zwino ipfani-ha: Muthu ane a sia u dzhena tshitumbani tsha nngu nga muṋango, tshawe ha vha u fhufhela nga huṅwe, onoyo ndi fobvu, ndi ḽivemu." 
John10:2 Ane a dzhena nga muṋango ndi Ene mulisa wa nngu. 
John10:3 Onoyo, mulindamuṋango u a mu vulela, mulisa a vhidza nngu dzawe nga madzina, dzone dza mu pfa, a bva nadzo." 
John10:4 Musi o no bvisa nngu dzawe dzoṱhe, u dzi ranga phanḓa, dzone dza mu tevhela, ngauri dzi ḓivha ipfi ḽawe." 
John10:5 Muṅwe muthu dzi nga si vhuye dza mu tevhela; dzi ḓo tou mu shavha ngauri a dzi ḓivhi ipfi ḽawe.” 
John10:6 Yesu a tshi vha vhudza tshifanyiso itsho, vhone a vho ngo ṱalukanya zwine a amba." 
John10:7 Yesu a dovha a ri, “Zwino ipfani-ha: muṋango wa tshitumba tsha nngu ndi Nṋe." 
John10:8 Vhoṱhe vhomesia vhe vha ḓa ndi sa athu ḓa ndi mafobvu na mavemu; ndi zwe nngu dza si kone u vha thetshelesa. 
John10:9 “Muṋango ndi Nṋe. Ane a dzhena nga Nṋe u ḓo tshidzwa; u ḓo dzhena a tshi bva a wana pfulo. 
John10:10 Tsha fobvu ndi u dzhenela u tswa na u vhulaha na u tshinyekanya fhedzi. Nṋe tshe nda ḓela tshone ndi uri vhathu vha vhe na vhutshilo nga vhuḓalo. 
John10:11 “Ndi Nṋe mulisa wa ndele. Mulisa wa ndele u kumedza vhutshilo hawe a tshi itela nngu dzawe. 
John10:12 Muswiswiwa ene a si mulisa wa vhukuma, ngauri nngu a si dzawe; a tshi vhona maṱalerwa a tshi ḓa u a shavha a dzi sia; maṱalerwa a sala a tshi fara dziḽa nngu a dzi balanganya." 
John10:13 Muswiswiwa u a shavha ngauri ene u lavhelesa malamba fhedzi, nngu ha dzi londi." 
John10:14 Nṋe ndi mulisa wa ndele. Unga Khotsi a tshi nnḓivha na Nṋe ndi tshi mu ḓivha, nngu dzanga ndi dzi ḓivha nga u ralo, na dzone dzi nnḓivha nga u ralo. Hafhu ndi kumedza vhutshilo hanga ndi tshi itela nngu dzanga." 
John10:15  
John10:16 “Ndi tshee na dziṅwe nngu dzanga dzi sa athu dzhena kha tshino tshitumba. Na dzenedzo ndi fanela u dzi ḓisa; dzi ḓo pfa ipfi ḽanga, dza vha sambi ḽithihi ḽi re na Mulisa muthihi." 
John10:17 “Ndi zwone zwine Khotsi anga a mpfunela zwone, ngauri ndi kumedza vhutshilo hanga uri ndi dovhe ndi vhu wane." 
John10:18 A si uri vhutshilo hanga ndi khou tou dzhielwa nga muṅwe. Nṋe muṋe ndi tou vhu kumedza ndi tshi zwi funa. Ndi na maanḓa a u vhu kumedza, nda dovha nda vha na maanḓa a u vhu dzhiulula, ngauri ndo tou laiwa nga Khotsi anga uri ndi ite zwenezwo.”" 
John10:19 Ayo maipfi a dovha a vusa phambano vhukati ha Majuda. 
John10:20 Vhathu vhanzhi vho vha vha tshi vho ri, “Ni kha ḓi vhuya na ṱolou ḓidinelani nga u mu thetshelesa? O kavhiwa nga thuṅwa ya Saṱhane hoyu muthu! U khou penga!”" 
John10:21 Hone vhaṅwe vha ri, “Muthu a na thuṅwa a nga vhuya a amba nga u tou rali? Nṋa kani-ha thuṅwa i a kona u swingulusa mabofu?”" 
John10:22 Zwino Jerusalema ha mbo swika tshifhinga tsha vhuṱambo ha u elelwa zwa musi thembele i tshi dovha u kumedzwa Mudzimu. Zwenezwo ho vha vhu vhuriha. 
John10:23 Musi Yesu a tshi khou tshimbila thembeleni, Lukumbini lwa Solomoni," 
John10:24 Majuda vha mu tanga vha ri, “Nṋa ni ḓo litsha lini u ṱwa no ri tikisa luwa? Arali e inwi Mesia itani u amba zwi pfale.”" 
John10:25 Yesu a fhindula a ri, “Hufha ndo no ḓi ni vhudza na si tende! Mishumo ine nda i ita nga dzina ḽa Khotsi anga i a nṱanzilela;" 
John10:26 hone inwi a ni tendi ngauri a ni nngu dzanga. 
John10:27 Nngu dzanga dzone dzi thetshelesa ipfi ḽanga; ndi a dzi ḓivha nahone dzi a ntevhela. 
John10:28 Ndi dzi ṋea vhutshilo vhu sa fheli, a dzi nga vhuyi dza fa, nahone a hu na ane a ḓo dzi thuba dzi na Nṋe." 
John10:29 Zwe Khotsi anga a mpha zwi fhira zwoṱhe; a hu na ane a nga kona u zwi dzhavhula tshanḓani tshawe. 
John10:30 Nṋe na Khotsi ri tshithu tshithihi.” 
John10:31 Majuda vha mbo ḓi dovha vha yo doba matombo vha tshi ri vha mu kanḓe ngao. 
John10:32 Yesu a vha vhudza a ri, “Ndo ni sumbedza mishumo minzhi mivhuya ye nda shuma nga maanḓa a Khotsi anga; zwino ndi ufhio mushumo une na khou ṱoḓa u mmbulahela wone?”" 
John10:33 Vha fhindula vha ri, “A ri khou ṱoḓa u ni vhulahela mushumo wavhuḓi; ri ṱoḓa u ni vhulahela u tamba haṋu nga Mudzimu! Ni khou ḓiita Mudzimu ni muthu wa ṋama!”" 
John10:34 Yesu a ri, “Hufha kha Mulayo waṋu ho ṅwaliwa maipfi a Mudzimu a u ri, ‘Ni midzimu’!" 
John10:35 Riṋe ri ḓivha uri zwine Maṅwalo a amba zwi ḓi dzula zwi ngoho lini na lini, huno vhenevho vhe Mudzimu a amba navho o ri vha pfi midzimu." 
John10:36 Arali e Nṋe Khotsi o tou nta a nthuma shangoni. Zwino inwi ni nga amba hani na ri ndi tshi ri ndi Murwa wa Mudzimu ndi khou tamba nga Mudzimu? 
John10:37 Arali ndi sa khou ita mishumo ya Khotsi anga ni songo mpfulufhela. 
John10:38 Hone arali ndi tshi khou ita yone, fulufhelani-ha yone mishumo, naho Nṋe ni sa mpfulufheli, ndi hone ni tshi ḓo vhona na mbo ḓi ḓivha tshoṱhe uri Khotsi u kha Nṋe, Nṋe ndi kha Khotsi.”" 
John10:39 Vha dovha vha edzisa u mu fara, hone Ene a sutuka." 
John10:40 Yesu a dovha a wela mulambo wa Jorodani a humela fhaḽa he Johanisi a vha a tshi lovhedza hone, a dzula henefho." 
John10:41 Vhathu vhanzhi vha ḓa khae vha tshi ri, “Johanisi a hu na tshiga tsha maḓembe e a ita; naho zwo ralo zwoṱhe zwe a amba nga uyu munna ndi zwone.”" 
John10:42 Henefho vhathu vhanzhi vha mu fulufhela. 
John11:1 Kuḓini kwa Bethania ho vha hu na muṅwe munna a no pfi Lazaro; o vha a tshi khou lwala. Henefho ndi he ha vha hu tshi dzula Marita na murathu wawe Maria. 
John11:2 (Maria ndi uḽa we a vhuya a shela mapfura kha milenzhe ya Muṋe washu a i phumula nga mavhudzi awe; zwino uyo Lazaro we a vha a tshi khou lwala o vha e khaladzi awe.) 
John11:3 Vhenevho murathu na mukomana vha mbo laedzela Yesu vha ri, “Muṋe washu, khonani yavho i a lwala.”" 
John11:4 Yesu a tshi zwi pfa a ri, “Vhulwadze hovhu a si ha u isa lufuni; ndi ha u sumbedza vhugala ha Mudzimu, hu vhonale na ha Murwa wawe.”" 
John11:5 Zwino Yesu o vha a tshi funa Marita na murathu wawe na Lazaro. 
John11:6 A ri u pfa uri Lazaro u a lwala a dovha a fhedza maṅwe maḓuvha mavhili e henefho he a vha e hone," 
John11:7 a konou amba na vhafunziwa vhawe a ri, “Kha ri vhuelele Judia.”" 
John11:8 Vhone vha fhindula vha ri, “Vhafunzi, hufha Majuda vha kha ḓi tou bva u ṱoḓa u vha kanḓa nga matombo! Zwino vha khou ṱoḓa u vhuelela henengei hafhu?”" 
John11:9 Yesu a ri, “A thi ri ḓuvha nga masiari ḽi na awara dza 12? Muthu a tshimbilaho masiari ha khukhulwi, ngauri fhano shangoni hu vha hu na tshedza." 
John11:10 Hone a tshimbilaho vhusiku u a khukhulwa ngauri ha na tshedza.” 
John11:11 Yesu o no ralo a konou dovha a ri, “Lazaro khonani yashu o eḓela; ndi khou ya henengei uri ndi mu vuse.”" 
John11:12 Vhafunziwa vha tshi fhindula vha ri, “Muṋe washu, arali o eḓela zwi amba uri u ḓo ṱuwa a tshi vha khwiṋe.”" 
John11:13 Yesu a tshi ralo vhone vho vha vha tshi vhona unga u amba u eḓela khofhe, matsina Ene o vha a tshi khou amba uri Lazaro ha tsheeho." 
John11:14 Ndi hone a tshi vho tou vha phulela a ri, “Lazaro o ri sia," 
John11:15 hone ndi tshi humbula inwi ndi a takala nge zwa itea ndi siho, ngauri zwino ndi hone ni tshi ḓo kona u mpfulufhela. Nḓarieni khae.”" 
John11:16 Thomasi (ḽine ḽa amba uri Mawela) a amba na vhafunziwa ngae a ri, “Kha ri ṱuwe navho ri yo fa navho.”" 
John11:17 Yesu a tshi sala a tshi swika a wana uri ho no ḓi fhela maḓuvha maṋa Lazaro o swiṱwa. 
John11:18 Zwino Bethania a hu vhuyi ha swika khilomitha tharu u bva Jerusalema," 
John11:19 ndi zwe ha vha ho ḓa Majuda manzhi ha Marita na Maria u imela lwonolwo lufu lwa khaladzi avho. 
John11:20 Marita a tshi tou pfa uri Yesu u khou ḓa, a mbo ḓi bva a yo mu ṱanganedza; Maria ene a sala hayani." 
John11:21 Marita a amba na Yesu a ri, “Muṋe wanga, ngavhe vho vha vhe fhano, ndi musi khaladzi anga a songo fa!" 
John11:22 Naho zwo no ḓi ralo ndi a ḓivha uri Mudzimu u ḓo vha ṋea tshine vha mu humbela.” 
John11:23 Yesu a amba nae a ri, “Khaladzi aṋu u ḓo vuwa a dovha a tshila.”" 
John11:24 Ene a fhindula a ri, “Ndi a zwi ḓivha uri u ḓo vuwa vhafuni musi vhafu vha tshi vuwa nga ḓuvha ḽa vhufhelo.”" 
John11:25 Yesu a amba nae a ri, “U vuwa ha vhafu ndi Nṋe; vhutshilo ndi Nṋe. Ane a fulufhela Nṋe, naho a fa, u ḓo tshila;" 
John11:26 huno ane a tshila a tshi mpfulufhela ha nga fi. Mafhungo aya ni a a tenda naa?” 
John11:27 Marita a ri, “Muṋe wanga, ndi a tenda uri ndi Vhone Mesia Murwa wa Mudzimu, we a pfi u ḓo ḓa shangoni.”" 
John11:28 Marita o no ralo a huma a yo sevha murathu wawe Maria a ri, “Vhafunzi vho swika, vha khou ni vhidza.”" 
John11:29 Maria a tshi pfa zwenezwo a bva nga u gidima a ya khae. 
John11:30 (Yesu zwenezwo o vha a sa athu dzhena muḓini; o vha a tshi kha ḓi vha henefhaḽa he Marita a mu ṱanganedza.) 
John11:31 Majuda vhe vha vha vhe na Maria nḓuni vha tshi khou mu khuthadza, vha tshi vhona a tshi bva nga u gidima, vha mu tevhela vha tshi ri u khou ya u lila tshaloni." 
John11:32 Maria a swika fhaḽa hu na Yesu. A tshi tou mu vhona a mbo ḓi wela milenzheni yawe a ri, “Muṋe wanga, ngavhe vho vha vhe fhano, ndi musi khaladzi anga a songo fa!”" 
John11:33 Yesu a tshi vhona Maria na vhaḽa Majuda vhe vha ḓa nae vha tshi khou zhamba vha tshi lila, zwa mu vhaisa, zwa tou mu dina." 
John11:34 A vha vhudzisa a ri, “No mu swiṱa ngafhi?” Vhone vha ri, “Muṋe washu, kha vha ḓe vha hu vhone.”" 
John11:35 Yesu a tsengisa miṱodzi. 
John11:36 Majuda vha tshi zwi vhona vha ri, “Edzonu vhona uri o vha a tshi mu funa hani!”" 
John11:37 Hone vhaṅwe vha ri, “Hufha o swingulusa bofu! Zwino u thivhela lufu lwa Lazaro zwo mu kunda ngani?”" 
John11:38 Yesu a tshi pfa vha tshi ralo zwa dovha zwa mu vhaisa, a mbo ḓi ya tshaloni. Tshalo itsho tsho vha tshi bako ḽi valwaho nga tombo," 
John11:39 a vhudza vhathu a ri, “Kunguluselani iḽo tombo kule!” Marita khaladzi a mufu a ri, “Muṋe wanga, u vho nukha, o no ḓi vha na maḓuvha maṋa o vhulungwa.”" 
John11:40 Yesu a mu vhudza a ri, “Nṋa a thi ri ndo ni vhudza nda ri arali ni tshi fulufhela ni ḓo vhona vhugala ha Mudzimu?”" 
John11:41 Vha mbo kungulusa ḽiḽa tombo. Yesu a lilala a ri, “Khotsi, ndi a u livhuha ngauri u khou mpfa." 
John11:42 Ndi a zwi ḓivha uri u ḓi dzula u tshi mpfa, hone ndi tshi rali ndi itela havha vhathu uri vha tende uri ndi Iwe wo nthumaho.”" 
John11:43 A ri u ralo a konou vhidzelela a ri, “Lazaro, bvelani ngeno nnḓa!”" 
John11:44 Mufu a bva o pombiwa milenzhe na zwanḓa nga masila a mbulungo, khofheni o vhofhiwa nga luvhemba. Yesu a ri, “Mu vhofhololeni ni mu litshe a tshimbile.”" 
John11:45 Majuda vhanzhi vhe vha vha vho ḓa u khuthadza Maria vha tshi vhona zwe Yesu a ita vha mu fulufhela. 
John11:46 Hone vhaṅwe vha humela ha Vhafarisei vha vha toololela zwe Yesu a ita. 
John11:47 Ndi hone Vhafarisei na vhotshifhe vhahulwane vha tshi ramba Khoro ya Majuda vha ri, “Nṋa ri nga tou zwi ita hani? Edzonu vhona maḓembe ane munna uyu a khou ita!" 
John11:48 Zwino arali ra ḓi sokou mu litsha vhathu vhoṱhe vha ḓo ṱuwa vha tshi mu fulufhela, Vharoma vha vho ḓo ḓa vha thuthekanya thembele yashu vha lozwa na lushaka lwa hashu lwoṱhe!”" 
John11:49 Muṅwe wavho a no pfi Khayafasi we a vha e ene tshifhe muhulu wonoyo ṅwaha a ri, “Inwi a ni na tshine na ḓivha!" 
John11:50 A ni koni u vhona na zwine zwa nga ni farisa: ndi khwiṋe muthu muthihi a tshi fela lushaka u fhira hu tshi lovha lushaka lwoṱhe.” 
John11:51 Huno a tshi ralo zwo vha zwi sa khou tou bva kha ene muṋe; o vha a tshi khou tou porofita, vhunga o vha e ene tshifhe muhulu wonoyo ṅwaha, hu u amba uri Yesu u ḓo fela lushaka lwoṱhe," 
John11:52 nahone lu si lwa Majuda fhedzi; o vha a tshi ḓo fela na vhana vha Mudzimu vho balanganaho na shango uri a vha kuvhanganye, vha vhe tshithu tshithihi." 
John11:53 U bva ḽeneḽo ḓuvha vhahulwane vha Majuda vha ḓi dzula nga u ita tshimbevha tsha u vhulaha Yesu. 
John11:54 Ndi zwe Yesu a si tsha tshimbila khagala Judia, a vho tou ṱuwa na vhafunziwa vhawe a yo dzula tsini ha soga muḓini u no pfi Efraimi." 
John11:55 Vhuṱambo ha Majuda ha Paseka ho vha ho no vha tsini; vhathu vhanzhi vha gonya Jerusalema vha tshi bva thungo dzoṱhe uri vha yo khunyeledza zwa u ḓikumulula vha sa athu dzhena vhuṱamboni. 
John11:56 Vhathu vhone vho vha vha tshi khou sedza Yesu, vha tshi vhudzisana vhe thembeleni vha ri, “Nṋa ni zwi vhona hani? Ni ri a nga vhuya a ḓa vhuṱamboni?”" 
John11:57 Vhotshifhe vhahulwane na Vhafarisei zwenezwo vho vha vho no bvisa fhungo ḽa uri arali hu na muṅwe ane a ḓivha hune Yesu a vha hone u fanela u vha sevha uri vhone vha kone u mu fara. 
John12:1 Musi hu tshee ho sala maḓuvha maṱanu na ḽithihi i tshi vha Paseka, Yesu a ya Bethania he ha vha hu tshi dzula Lazaro, uḽa we a mu vusa vhafuni." 
John12:2 Henefho vha mu bikela, Marita a vha ene a vha ṋeaho zwiḽiwa. Lazaro ndi muṅwe wa vhe vha vha vha tshi khou ḽa na Yesu." 
John12:3 Ndi hone Maria a tshi dzhia hafulitha yoṱhe ya mapfura a u nukhelela a mutengo muhulu o itwaho nga munadi u songo vangwaho, a a shela kha milenzhe ya Yesu a phumula nga mavhudzi awe, munukho wa u ḓifhelela wa tou ḓadza nnḓu yoṱhe." 
John12:4 Zwino muṅwe mufunziwa wa Yesu we a vho ḓo mu fheṱa, a no pfi Judasi Iskariote a ri," 
John12:5 “Enea mapfura ane a rengwa nga malamba a muthu wa munna a ṅwaha woṱhe! Khezwi a songo rengiswa, tshelede ya ṋewa zwayo vhashai?”" 
John12:6 A tshi ralo ho vha hu si u lilela vhashai, ndi ngauri o vha e fobvu, e ene mufaratshikwama, a tshi ḓi ita a tshi ṱumbulanyana." 
John12:7 Hone Yesu a ri, “Mu litsheni, aya mapfura o a vhulungela ḓuvha ḽine muvhili wanga wa khou lugiselwa u swiṱwa." 
John12:8 Vhashai ni ḓo ḓi vha navho misi yoṱhe; Nṋe a ni nga vhi na Nṋe misi yoṱhe.” 
John12:9 Gogo ḽihuluhulu ḽa Majuda ḽi tshi pfa uri Yesu u Bethania ḽa ya hone. U ya havho ho vha hu si u ela Yesu fhedzi, vho vha vho ya u vhona na Lazaro we Yesu a mu vusa vhafuni." 
John12:10 Ndi zwe vhotshifhe vhahulwane vha vho ita tshimbevha tsha u vhulaha na ene Lazaro," 
John12:11 ngauri Majuda vhanzhi vho vha vha tshi vho ṱutshela vharangaphanḓa vhavho vha fulufhela Yesu nga u vhona zwe zwa itea kha ene Lazaro. 
John12:12 Nga matshelo ḽiḽa gogo ḽihuluhulu ḽe ḽa vha ḽo ḓa vhuṱamboni ha Paseka ḽa zwi pfa uri Yesu u ḓo vha a tshi khou ḓa Jerusalema. 
John12:13 Vha dzhia maṱari a mutshevho vha yo mu ṱanganedza vha tshi khou huvha mihuvho vha tshi ri, “Hosana! Nga hu rendwe a ḓaho nga dzina ḽa Muṋe washu! Nga hu rendwe Khosi ya Israele.”" 
John12:14 Yesu a wana donngi a i namela, vhunga zwo ṅwaliwa kha Maṅwalo ha pfi," 
John12:15 “U songo ofha iwe Tsioni! Khosi yau asiyi i a ḓa, yo namela donngana.”" 
John12:16 Hone vhafunziwa vhawe a vho ngo kona u zwi ṱalukanya nga tshifhinga tshenetsho; vho ḓo tou sala vha tshi elelwa musi o no iswa vhugalani uri Maṅwalo iṱali o ḓi mu amba nga u ralo, ha vha hu hone vha tshi vho zwi vhona uri ndi zwenezwiḽa zwe vha mu itela zwone." 
John12:17 Vhaḽa vhathu vhe vha vha vhe na Yesu zwiḽa a tshi vusa Lazaro vhafuni nga u tou mu vhidza a bva tshaloni, na vhone vho vha vho no ḓi anḓadza zwe zwa itea." 
John12:18 Ndi zwe vhathu vha yo mu ṱanganedza, nge vha pfa hu tshi pfi o ita maḓembe mangafhongafho." 
John12:19 Vhafarisei vha tshi zwi vhona vha amba nga tshavho vha ri, “Ni khou zwi vhona, zwoṱhe zwine ra khou ita a zwi khou vhuya zwa farisa tshithu; shango ḽoṱhe ḽi vho mu tevhela.”" 
John12:20 Zwino kha vhe vha ya u rabela vhuṱamboni ho vha hu na vhaṅwe vhathu vha Magiriki. 
John12:21 Vhenevho vha ḓa ha Filipi wa Betsaida kha ḽa Galelia, vha ri, “Thovhela, ri khou humbela u amba na Yesu.”" 
John12:22 Filipi a ya a vhudza Andrisi, vhuvhili havho vha swikisa iyo khumbelo ha Yesu." 
John12:23 Ene a tshi vha fhindula a ri, “Zwino ndi hone tshifhinga tsho swika tsha uri hu vhonale vhugala ha Mubebwa-nga-muthu." 
John12:24 Zwino ipfani-ha: Arali thoro ya goroi i sa tou thoma u wela mavuni ya fa i ḓo ḓi dzula i nthihi; ya fa ndi hone i tshi ita dziṅwe thoro nnzhi. 
John12:25 Ane a tata u ṅaledza vhutshilo hawe u a ḓilozwa; ane a vhu ṅala e fhano shangoni u ḓo vha o ḓivhulungela vhutshilo vhu sa gumi. 
John12:26 Ane a funa u ntshumela u fanela u vha mufunziwa wanga, uri sa mushumeli wanga, a swike-vho hoṱhe hune Nṋe nda vha hone. Ane a ntshumela u ḓo huliswa nga Khotsi anga." 
John12:27 “Zwino ndi hone-ha ndo tou hanganea; a thi ḓivhi na uri ndi nga tou ri mini. Ndi nga tou ri, ‘Khotsi anga, ntinyise uno musi wa vhuṱungu’ naa? Zwino hufha ndi tshi ḓa ndó ḓela hone uri ndi fhire kha wonoyu musi wa vhuṱungu!" 
John12:28 Khotsi anga, ndi ri dzina ḽau nga ḽi huliswe!” Zwenezwo ha pfala ipfi ḽi bvaho ṱaḓulu ḽi tshi ri, “Ndo no ḓi sumbedza vhugala hanga nahone ndi kha ḓi ḓo dovha nda vhu sumbedza.”" 
John12:29 Gogo ḽo imaho henefho ḽi tshi pfa ipfi ḽa ri, “Mvula yo bvuma!” Vhaṅwe vha ri, “Ndi muruṅwa we a amba nae.”" 
John12:30 Yesu Ene a ri, “Ipfi heḽi ḽi tshi vhuya ḽa pfala a si u itela Nṋe, ndi u itela inwi." 
John12:31 Zwino ndi hone-ha ho swika tshifhinga tsha uri ḽino shango ḽi haṱulwe; ndi hone muvhusi wa ḽino shango a tshi khou bviswa vhuhosini. 
John12:32 Musi ndi tshi ḓo takulelwa nṱha ndi ḓo kokodza vhathu vhoṱhe vha ḓa kha Nṋe.” 
John12:33 A tshi ralo o vha a tshi khou amba lufu lune a ḓo lu fa. 
John12:34 Vhathu vha tshi mu fhindula vha ri, “Hufha riṋe ro pfa kha Mulayo hu tshi pfi Mesia u ḓo dzula e hone lini na lini, zwino vhone vha tshi ri Mubebwa-nga-muthu u ḓo takulelwa nṱha vha amba hani? Mubebwa-nga-muthu onoyo matsina ndi nnyi?”" 
John12:35 Yesu a fhindula a ri, “Tshedza tshi kha ḓi ḓo vha na inwi tshifhinga tshiṱukuṱuku. Tshimbilani zwino tshedza tshi tshee hone uri swiswi ḽi sa ḓo ni fara nḓilani. Hafhu ane a tshimbila swiswini ha ḓivhi hune a ya." 
John12:36 Fulufhelani tshedza zwino ni tshi kha ḓi vha natsho, ndi hone ni tshi ḓo kona u vha vhathu vha tshedza.” Yesu a ri u ralo a ṱuwa a ya a vha dzumbama." 
John12:37 Naho o vha o vha sumbedza zwiga zwa maḓembe mangafho, vha tshi tou zwi vhona nga maṱo, a vho ngo mu fulufhela," 
John12:38 hu uri hu khunyelele zwiḽa zwe muporofita Yesaya a zwi amba a tshi ri, “Muṋe washu, ndi nnyi we a tenda mafhungo ashu? Tshanḓa tshawe tsha maanḓa Muṋe washu o tshi sumbedza nnyi?”" 
John12:39 Ndi zwone zwe vha si kone u fulufhela, ngauri ene Yesaya o dovha a ri," 
John12:40 “Mudzimu o swingisa maṱo avho, mbilu dzavho a rindidza, uri maṱo avho a si vhone, mbilu dzavho dzi si ṱalukanye, vha sa vho ḓo rembuluwa vha vhuelela ha Nṋe, Nṋe nda vho ḓo vha fhodza.”" 
John12:41 Yesaya a tshi ralo o vha o vhona vhugala ha Yesu a ṱanzilela ngae. 
John12:42 Nangwe zwo ralo na vhahulwane vhanzhi vha Majuda vho mu fulufhela, hone vha si kone u tou zwi amba khagala nga u ofha Vhafarisei, uri vha sa vho ḓo vha tumula tshivhidzoni." 
John12:43 Ndi uri vho vha vha tshi funa u huliswa nga vhathu u fhira u huliswa nga Mudzimu. 
John12:44 Yesu Ene a vhidzelela a ri, “Ane a mpfulufhela ha fulufheli Nṋe, u fulufhela we a nthuma." 
John12:45 Hu ḓi nga ane a vhona Nṋe, u vhona o nthumaho." 
John12:46 Nṋe ndo ḓa shangoni ndi tshedza, uri vhoṱhe vhane vha mpfulufhela vha si tsha dzula swiswini." 
John12:47 Ane a pfa maipfi anga a si a tevhedze a si uri ndi Nṋe ane nda mu haṱula. A tho ngo ḓela u haṱula shango, tshe nda ḓela tshone ndi u tshidza shango." 
John12:48 Tshi hone tshi haṱulaho muthu ane a nndandula a si ṱanganedze mafhungo anga: Enea maipfi ane nda amba a ḓo vha one a mu haṱulaho nga ḓuvha ḽa vhufhelo," 
John12:49 ngauri a thi sokou ḓiambela, Ene Khotsi anga o nthumaho o nndaya zwine nda fanela u amba nda zwi vhudza vhathu." 
John12:50 Zwino Nṋe ndi a ḓivha uri zwe a nndaya zwi ḓisa vhutshilo vhu sa gumi. Zwenezwo zwe Khotsi a nndaya ndi zwone zwine nda amba.” 
John13:1 Vhuṱambo ha Paseka vhu tshi sendela Yesu o vha a tshi zwi ḓivha uri tshifhinga tshawe tsho swika tsha uri a ṱuwe fhano shangoni a ye ha Khotsi. O vha a tshi ḓi funa vha re vhawe fhano shangoni, huno ho vha hu hone a tshi vho ḓo sumbedza u vha funa tshoṱhe." 
John13:2 Zwino Yesu na vhafunziwa vhawe vho vha vha tshi khou lalela. Diabolo o vha o no ḓi funzedza Judasi Iskariote ṅwana wa Simoni uri a fheṱe Yesu. 
John13:3 Yesu o vha a tshi zwi ḓivha uri Khotsi o mu kumedza zwoṱhe; a tshi ḓivha na uri o ḓa a tshi bva ha Mudzimu na uri u khou vhuelela ha Ene Mudzimu. 
John13:4 Ndi zwe a takuwa afho zwiḽiwani a bvula zwiambaro zwa nṱha a kanyela thaula khunduni. 
John13:5 Ndi hone a tshi shela maḓi sambeloni a thoma u ṱanzwa milenzhe ya vhafunziwa vhawe a tshi i phumula nga iḽa thaula ye a vha o kanyela. 
John13:6 A tshi swika kha Simoni Pitrosi, ene a amba nae a ri, “Muṋe washu, nṋa Vhone vha ṱoḓa u ṱanzwa nṋe milenzhe?”" 
John13:7 Yesu a fhindula a ri, “Zwine Nṋe nda khou ita zwino inwi a ni zwi ṱalukanyi, hone ni ḓo zwi ṱalukanya ngavhuya.”" 
John13:8 Pitrosi a ri, “Vhone vha nga si ḓo vhuya vha nṱanzwa milenzhe.” Yesu a ri, “Arali nda sa ni ṱanzwa a ni tsha ḓo vha muthihi na Nṋe.”" 
John13:9 Simoni Pitrosi a ri, “Muṋe washu, izwo vha songo tou nṱanzwa milenzhe fhedzi, kha ndi mbo ḓi ṱanzwiwa na zwanḓa na ṱhoho!”" 
John13:10 Yesu a ri, “O ṱambaho ha tshee na tshika; ho ngo tsha fanela u ṱamba arali i si yone milenzhe. Inwi a ni na tshika; hone ndi tshi ralo a thi ambi noṱhe.”" 
John13:11 (Yesu o vha a tshi ḓivha ane a ḓo mu fheṱa, ndi zwone zwe a ri, “A thi ambi noṱhe.”)" 
John13:12 Musi o no fhedza u vha ṱanzwa milenzhe, a dovha a ambara zwiambaro a vhuelela vhudzuloni hawe, a vha vhudzisa a ri, “Nṋa izwi zwe nda ni ita ni a zwi ṱalukanya naa?" 
John13:13 Ni tshi nnyamba ni ri ‘Vhafunzi’ na ‘Muṋe washu’. Ni amba zwone, ngauri iṱali zwi zwone zwine nda vha zwone." 
John13:14 Zwino-ha vhunga Nṋe ndi re Muṋe waṋu na Mufunzi waṋu ndo ni ṱanzwa milenzhe, na inwi ni fanela u ṱanzwana milenzhe." 
John13:15 Zwe nda ita ho tou vha u ni sumbedza uri na inwi ni edzise zwe Nṋe nda ni ita. 
John13:16 Zwino ipfani-ha: A hu na phuli ine ya fhira muṋe wayo; na muḓinḓa ha fhiri we a mu ruma. 
John13:17 Zwino vhunga ni tshi zwi ḓivha ni ḓo vha na mashudu arali ni tshi nga zwi ita. 
John13:18 “Ndi tshi ralo a thi ambi noṱhe, vhe nda nanga ndi a vha ḓivha. Hone hu fanela u khunyelela zwe Maṅwalo a amba a tshi ri, ‘Ane ra ḽa muthathendilo o mmvutshela-vho!’" 
John13:19 Ndi khou ni vhudza zwino zwi sa athu itea uri zwi tshi sala zwi tshi itea ni kone u tenda uri ‘ndi ane nda vha Ene’. 
John13:20 Zwino ipfani-ha: Ane a vhuya a ṱanganedza we nda mu ruma u ṱanganedza Nṋe, huno ane a ṱanganedza Nṋe u ṱanganedza we a nthuma.”" 
John13:21 Yesu o ri u amba zwenezwo a ṱungufhala vhukuma, a tou phula a ri, “Zwino ipfani-ha: muṅwe waṋu hafha u ḓo mpheṱa.”" 
John13:22 Vhafunziwa vha lavhelesana vho hanganea vha sa ḓivhi uri u amba nnyi. 
John13:23 Muṅwe wa vhafunziwa, uḽa we Yesu a vha a tshi mu funa, o vha o ḓisendeka ngae." 
John13:24 Simoni Pitrosi a mbo ḓi mu sinyedza a ri, “Vha vhudziseni uri vha khou amba nnyi.”" 
John13:25 Uyo mufunziwa nangoho a mbo ḓi tshingamela tsini ha Yesu a vhudzisa a ri, “Muṋe washu, ndi nnyi onoyo?”" 
John13:26 Yesu a fhindula a ri, “Ane nda ḓo thotha kugaku muthothoni nda mu ṋea ndi ene.” Ndi hone a tshi dzhia kugaku a ku thotha a ku ṋea Judasi ṅwana wa Simoni Iskariote." 
John13:27 Judasi a tshi tou ḽa ukwo kugaku a mbo ḓi dzhenwa nga Saṱhane. Ndi hone Yesu a tshi mu vhudza a ri, “Zwine na fanela u zwi ita, ṱavhanyani u zwi ita!”" 
John13:28 Kha vhe vha vha vho dzula henefho hu si vhe na muthihi we a kona u pfa uri Yesu u khou ri mini a tshi amba na Judasi. 
John13:29 Vhunga Judasi o vha e ene mufaratshikwama vhaṅwe vhafunziwa vho ri khamusi Yesu o mu ruma u renga zwiṅwe zwithu zwa vhuṱambo, kana uri a yo fha zwifhiwa vhashai." 
John13:30 Judasi a tshi tou ṱanganedza kuḽa kugaku ha mbo ḓi vha u ṱuwa. Zwenezwo ho vha vhu vhusiku. 
John13:31 Judasi ó no bva Yesu a ri, “Zwino ndi hone vhugala ha Mubebwa-nga-muthu ho vhonala, na vhugala ha Mudzimu ndi hone ho vhonala ngae." 
John13:32 Zwino vhunga vhugala ha Mudzimu ho vhonala ngae, Mudzimu Ene muṋe u ḓo vhonadza vhugala ha Mubebwa-nga-muthu, nahone ha nga lengi u zwi ita." 
John13:33 Vhananga, ndi kha ḓi tou vha na inwi tshifhinga tshiṱukuṱuku. Ni ḓo nṱoḓa, hone zwiḽa zwe nda vhudza Majuda ndi vhudza na inwi ndi ri, ‘Hune nda ya hone inwi ni nga si ntevhele.’" 
John13:34 Zwino mulayo muswa une nda ni ṋea asuyu: Funanani. Vhunga Nṋe ndo ni funa, na inwi ni fanela u funana." 
John13:35 Arali ni tshi funana ndi hone vhoṱhe vha tshi ḓo ḓivha uri ni vhafunziwa vhanga.” 
John13:36 Simoni ane ḽiṅwe a pfi Pitrosi a mu vhudzisa a ri, “Muṋe washu, nṋa vha khou ya ngafhi?” Yesu a fhindula a ri, “Hune nda khou ya hone a si hune na nga kona u ntevhela zwino; ni ḓo ntevhela ngavhuya.”" 
John13:37 Pitrosi a tshi fhindula a ri, “Muṋe washu, ndi mini tshine tsha nga nkundisa u vha tevhela zwino? Hufha na u fa ndo ḓiimisela u vha fela!”" 
John13:38 Yesu a ri, “Ni ri no ḓiimisela u mpfela? Thetshelesani ndi ni vhudze: Mukukulume u sa athu lila ni ḓo vha no no landula luraru na ri a ni nnḓivhi.”" 
John14:1 Yesu a vha vhudza a ri, “Ni songo ḽa mbilu; fulufhelani Mudzimu ni fulufhele na Nṋe." 
John14:2 Nḓuni ya Khotsi anga hu na vhudzulo vhunzhi. Arali zwo vha zwi songo ralo ndi musi ndi tshi ḓo vha ndo ni vhudza. Huno zwino ndi khou ya hone u ni lugisela vhudzulo. 
John14:3 Zwino musi ndo no ni lugisela vhudzulo ndi ḓo ḓa nda ni dzhia ra yo dzula roṱhe. 
John14:4 Nḓila ya hune nda khou ya hone ni a i ḓivha.” 
John14:5 Thomasi a mu vhudzisa a ri, “Muṋe washu, hune vha khou ya hone a ri hu ḓivhi; zwino nḓila ri nga i ḓivha hani?”" 
John14:6 Yesu a mu fhindula a ri, “Nḓila ndi Nṋe; ndi Nṋe ngoho; ndi Nṋe vhutshilo; a hu na ane a nga swika ha Mudzimu Khotsi arali a songo dzhena nga Nṋe." 
John14:7 Zwino arali vhukuma Nṋe no vha ni tshi nnḓivha no vha ni tshi ḓo ḓivha na Khotsi anga. Hone u bva zwino ni vho mu ḓivha, no no mu vhona.”" 
John14:8 Filipi a mu vhudza a ri, “Muṋe washu, nga vha ri sumbedze Khotsi, ndi hone ri tshi ḓo rudza mbilu.”" 
John14:9 Yesu a fhindula a ri, “Filipi, nṋa tshee nda dzula na inwi, a ni athu nnḓivha na zwino? O vhonaho Nṋe o vhona na Ene Khotsi. Zwino ndi mini ni tshi ri, ‘Ri sumbedze Khotsi’?" 
John14:10 Kani inwi a ni tendi uri Nṋe ndi kha Khotsi, Khotsi u kha Nṋe? Maipfi ane nda ni vhudza ha bvi kha Nṋe muṋe; ndi a Khotsi ane a dzula kha Nṋe a tshi shuma mishumo yawe."
