John14:11 Tendani zwenezwo zwine nda ri Nṋe ndi kha Khotsi, Khotsi u kha Nṋe. Arali zwa kunda, izwo tendani nga u vhona mishumo ine nda shuma." 
John14:12 Zwino ipfani-ha: Ane a fulufhela Nṋe u ḓo ita-vho mishumo ine Nṋe nda ita; u ḓo ita na i fhiraho yanga, ngauri Nṋe ndi khou ya ha Khotsi." 
John14:13 Zwino tshiṅwe na tshiṅwe tshine na humbela nga dzina ḽanga ndi ḓo ni ṋea, uri Khotsi a rendwe nga zwine Murwa a ita." 
John14:14 Tshine na nkhumbela nga dzina ḽanga ndi ḓo ni ṋea. 
John14:15 “Arali ni tshi mpfuna ni ḓo ita zwine nda ni laya. 
John14:16 Nṋe ndi ḓo humbela Khotsi anga, Ene u ḓo ni ṋea Mutiki muṅwe ane a sa ḓo ni ṱutshela lini na lini." 
John14:17 Ene Muya Muḓivhadzangoho. Shango ḽone a ḽi koni u mu ṱanganedza ngauri a ḽi mu vhoni, na u mu ḓivha a ḽi mu ḓivhi, hone inwi ni a mu ḓivha, ngauri u dzula na inwi, u kha inwi." 
John14:18 “A thi nga ni ṱutsheli nda ni sia ni zwisiwana; ndi ḓo dovha nda ḓa kha inwi. 
John14:19 Hu si kale shango a ḽi tsha ḓo mmbona, hone inwi ni ḓo ḓi mmbona; zwino vhunga Nṋe ndi tshi tshila, na inwi ni ḓo tshila." 
John14:20 Ḓuvha ḽeneḽo ḽi tshi swika ni ḓo ḓivha uri Nṋe ndi kha Khotsi, na inwi ni kha Nṋe, Nṋe ndi kha inwi." 
John14:21 “Ane a ṱanganedza ndaela dzanga a dzi tevhedza ndi ene ane a mpfuna, huno ane a mpfuna, Khotsi anga u ḓo mu funa-vho. Na Nṋe ndi ḓo mu funa nda ḓidzumbululela ene.”" 
John14:22 Judasi (e si Iskariote) a ri, “Muṋe washu, nṋa zwi nga itea hani uri vha ḓidzumbululele riṋe vha litsha u ḓidzumbululela shango?”" 
John14:23 Yesu a mu fhindula a ri, “Ane a mpfuna u ḓo tevhedza pfunzo yanga; onoyo, Khotsi anga u ḓo mu funa, huno Ene Khotsi na Nṋe ri ḓo ḓa khae ra dzula nae." 
John14:24 Ane a sa mpfune, na pfunzo yanga ha i tevhedzi. Mafhungo e na a pfa ha bvi kha Nṋe, a bva ha Khotsi we a nthuma." 
John14:25 “Ndo ni vhudza hezwi zwithu zwino ndi tshee na inwi. 
John14:26 Huno uyo Mutiki, Ene Muya Mukhethwa ane Khotsi anga a ḓo mu ruma dzinani ḽanga u ḓo ni funza zwoṱhe, a ni humbudza zwoṱhe zwe Nṋe nda ni vhudza." 
John14:27 “Ndi ni sia na mulalo; ndi ni ṋea mulalo wanga. Mulalo une Nṋe nda ni ṋea a u fani na wa shango. Ni songo ḽa mbilu; ni songo ofha. 
John14:28 No zwi pfa ndi tshi ri, ‘Ndi khou ṱuwa, hone ndi ḓo dovha nda ḓa kha inwi.’ Arali no vha ni tshi mpfuna ndi musi ni tshi ḓo takala ndi tshi ya ha Khotsi, ngauri Ene Khotsi u fhira Nṋe." 
John14:29 Zwino ndo ni vhudza zwithu izwo zwi sa athu itea uri zwi tshi ḓo itea ni kone u mpfulufhela. 
John14:30 Ndi nga si tsha kona u amba na inwi tshifhinga tshilapfu ngauri muvhusi wa ḽino shango u khou ḓa. Hone Ene ha na tshine a nga nnyita. 
John14:31 Hone shango ḽi fanela u ḓivha uri Nṋe ndi funa Khotsi, ndi ita zwenezwo zwe a nndaya. “Takuwani ri ṱuwe." 
John15:1 “Ndi Nṋe munḓirivhe wavhuḓi, muṋe wa tsimu ndi Khotsi anga." 
John15:2 Lutavhi luṅwe na luṅwe lu re kha Nṋe lu sa aṋwi mitshelo u a lu tumulela kule; lu aṋwaho lwone u tou lu khwathela uri lu anze mitshelo. 
John15:3 Inwi no no ḓi khwathelwa nga maipfi e nda ni vhudza. 
John15:4 Dzulani kha Nṋe, na Nṋe ndi ḓo dzula kha inwi. Vhunga lutavhi lu sa koni u aṋwa mitshelo arali lu songo ṱumekana na mme alwo, na inwi ni nga si aṋwe mitshelo arali na sa dzula kha Nṋe." 
John15:5 “Munḓirivhe ndi Nṋe, inwi ni matavhi. Ane a dzula kha Nṋe, Nṋe nda dzula khae ndi ene ane a aṋwa mitshelo minzhi, ngauri ni si na Nṋe a ni koni u ita tshithu." 
John15:6 A sa dzuli kha Nṋe u a laṱwa kule a oma sa lutavhi lwo tumulwaho; huno thavhi dzo raloho dzi a kuvhanganywa dza kudzwa muliloni dza fhiswa. 
John15:7 Arali ni tshi dzula kha Nṋe, na dzula ni tshi elekanya maipfi anga, ni ḓo humbela tshine na funa na tshi ṋewa." 
John15:8 Vhugala ha Khotsi anga vhu vhonala musi inwi ni tshi aṋwa mitshelo minzhi, nga u ralo na vha vhafunziwa vhanga." 
John15:9 Nṋe ndi ni funa unga Khotsi anga a tshi mpfuna; lusani uri ndi ḓi dzula ndi tshi ni funa. 
John15:10 Arali ni tshi tevhedza ndaela dzanga ndi ḓo ḓi dzula ndi tshi ni funa, zwa nga Nṋe ndo tevhedza ndaela dza Khotsi anga, a ḓi dzula a tshi mpfuna." 
John15:11 “Ndo ni vhudza hezwo uri dakalo ḽine Nṋe nda vha naḽo na inwi ni vhe naḽo uri ni vhe na dakalo ḽo khunyelelaho. 
John15:12 Ndaela yanga khei: funanani unga Nṋe ndo ni funa. 
John15:13 “A hu na lufuno lune lwa fhira lwa muthu ane a fela khonani dzawe. 
John15:14 Khonani dzanga ndi inwi arali ni tshi ita zwine nda ni laya. 
John15:15 A thi tsha tou ri ni dziphuli ngauri phuli a i vhudzwi zwine muṋe wayo a ita. Nṋe-ha ndi vho tou ri ni dzikhonani, ngauri ndo ni vhudza zwoṱhe zwe nda pfa nga Khotsi anga." 
John15:16 A si inwi vhe na nanga Nṋe; ndi Nṋe ndo nangaho inwi nda ni ta uri ni yo aṋwa mitshelo minzhi, mitshelo i sa kuvhi, Khotsi a ḓo konou ni fha tshiṅwe na tshiṅwe tshine na humbela nga dzina ḽanga." 
John15:17 Tshine nda ni laya asitshi: funanani! 
John15:18 “Arali shango ḽi tshi ni vhenga ni ḓivhe uri ḽo thoma nga u vhenga Nṋe. 
John15:19 Arali no vha ni vha shango ndi musi shango ḽi tshi ḓo ni funa, ngauri no vha ni tshi ḓo vha ni vhaḽo. Zwino a ni tshee vha shango ngauri Nṋe ndo ni nanga khaḽo; ndi zwine shango ḽa ni vhenga." 
John15:20 Ni songo hangwa zwiḽa zwe nda ni vhudza nda ri, ‘Phuli a i fhiri muṋe wayo.’ Vhunga Nṋe vho ntovhola, na inwi vha ḓo ni tovhola; arali vho tevhedza pfunzo yanga, na yaṋu vha ḓo i tevhedza." 
John15:21 Huno zwine vha ḓo ni ita, vha ḓo ni ita nge na vha vhanga, ngauri we a nthuma a vha mu ḓivhi." 
John15:22 Arali ndo vha ndi songo ḓa nda amba ndi musi vha si na mulandu; fhedzi zwino a vha tshee na vhutinyelo. 
John15:23 Ane a vhenga Nṋe u vhenga na Khotsi anga. 
John15:24 Vho vha vha tshi ḓo vha vha si na mulandu ngavhe ndi si ḓe khavho nda shuma mishumo i sa athu shuṅwa nga muṅwe muthu; zwino zwe nda shuma vho zwi vhona; naho zwo ralo, hu Nṋe, hu Khotsi anga, vha ḓi ri vhenga." 
John15:25 Hone zwi tshi ralo hu khou khunyelela zwiḽa zwo ṅwaliwaho Mulayoni wavho zwa u ri, ‘Vho sokou mmbenga ndi si na tshe nda tshinya.’" 
John15:26 “Mutiki u ḓo ḓa – ndi amba Muya Muḓivhadzangoho, Ene a bvaho ha Mudzimu Khotsi. Ndi ḓo mu ruma kha inwi a tshi bva ha Khotsi; Ene Muya u ḓo nṱanzilela." 
John15:27 Na inwi ni ḓo nṱanzilela ngauri no ḓi vha na Nṋe u tou bva henengei mathomoni. 
John16:1 “Ndi khou dzula ndo ni vhudza uri musi zwi tshi itea ni sa ḓo tou tshenuwa na vho gunea. 
John16:2 Vha ḓo ni tumula zwivhidzoni. Nahone tshifhinga tshi khou ḓa tshine muthu a ḓo ri a tshi ni vhulaha a vhona unga ndi hone a tshi khou ṋekedza Mudzimu nduvho. 
John16:3 Vha ḓo ni ita zwithu izwo ngauri hu Nṋe, hu Khotsi, a vha ri ḓivhi." 
John16:4 Hone Nṋe ndi dzula ndo ni vhudza uri tshifhinga tshazwo tshi tshi swika ni elelwe uri ndo ni vhudza. “Ndi sa ni vhudzi zwithu izwi mathomoni ndi uri ndo vha ndi tshi kha ḓi vha na inwi. 
John16:5 Hone zwino ndi khou ṱuwa, ndi ya ha o nthumaho; tshi kanukisaho ndi uri a hu na na muthihi waṋu ane a vhudzisa hune nda ya." 
John16:6 Zwino ndó no ni vhudza mbilu dzaṋu dzi vho vhavha. 
John16:7 Naho zwo ralo ndi ni vhudza ngoho ndi ri, u ṱuwa hanga ndi u ni tonda, ngauri nda sa ṱuwa, Mutiki ha nga ḓi kha inwi; fhedzi nda ṱuwa, ndi ḓo mu ruma." 
John16:8 Huno Ene a tshi ḓa u ḓo rovhedza shango a ḽi sumbedza uri vhutshinyi ndi mini, na uri vhuvhuya ndi mini na uri khaṱhulo ya Mudzimu ndi tshithu-ḓe." 
John16:9 U ḓo rovhedza shango vhutshinyi nga u ḽi sumbedza uri a ḽo ngo tenda Nṋe; 
John16:10 u ḓo sumbedza shango uri a re muvhuya ndi Nṋe ngauri ndi khou ya ha Khotsi, a ni tsha ḓo mmbona;" 
John16:11 u ḓo vha rovhedza uri khaṱhulo ya Mudzimu ndi yone-yone nga u vha sumbedza uri muvhusi wa ḽino shango o no ḓi haṱulwa. 
John16:12 “Ndi tshee na zwinzhi zwine nda nga ni vhudza; ndi ro vhona uri a ni athu swika hune na nga zwi ṱalukanya. 
John16:13 Hone hu tshi ḓo ḓa Ene Muya Muḓivhadzangoho u ḓo ni dededza na ḓivha ngoho yoṱhe. Ha nga ambi zwawe; u ḓo amba zwenezwo zwine a ḓo vhudzwa, a ni vhudza na zwine zwa kha ḓi ḓa." 
John16:14 Ene u ḓo ita uri Nṋe ndi rendwe, ngauri zwoṱhe zwine a ḓo ni vhudza zwi ḓo vha zwi tshi bva kha Nṋe." 
John16:15 Zwoṱhe zwe re zwa Khotsi anga ndi zwanga; ndi zwe ndi tshi amba nda ri, ‘Zwoṱhe zwine a ḓo ni vhudza zwi ḓo vha zwi tshi bva kha Nṋe.’" 
John16:16 “Hu si kale a ni tsha ḓo mmbona; hone hu ḓo dovha he hu si kale na mmbona.” 
John16:17 Vhaṅwe vhafunziwa vhawe vha vhudzisana vha ri, “Nṋa u amba mini a tshi ri, ‘Hu si kale a ni tsha ḓo mmbona, hone hu ḓo dovha he hu si kale na mmbona’; nahone a dovha a ri, ‘Ndi khou ya ha Khotsi anga’?" 
John16:18 Zwino a tshi ri, ‘hu si kale’ u amba mini? Riṋe a ri khou vhuya ra pfa na uri u khou amba mini!”" 
John16:19 Yesu o zwi ḓivha uri vha khou ṱoḓa u mu vhudzisa; ndi zwe a vha vhudza a ri, “Ndo ri hu si kale a ni tsha ḓo mmbona, hone hu ḓo dovha he hu si kale na mmbona. A si zwenezwo zwine na khou vhudzisana zwone kani?" 
John16:20 Zwino ipfani-ha: Inwi ni ḓo lila lwa u lila, shango ḽone ḽo ḓitakalela. Inwi ni ḓo ṱungufhala, hone u ṱungufhala haṋu hu ḓo shanduka ha vha dakalo." 
John16:21 Musi musadzi a tshi ṱoḓa u vhofholowa, u wana o tou ṱungufhala, ngauri tshifhinga tshawe tshi vha tsho swika; hone ṅwana o no bebiwa u hangwa u vhavha hazwo, ngauri u vha a tshi vho takadzwa nga muthu muswa o ḓaho shangoni." 
John16:22 Na kha inwi zwo tou ralo; zwino no ṱungufhala, hone musi ndi tshi ḓo dovha u ni vhona ni ḓo takala nahone a hu nga vhi na ane a nga ni dzhiela dakalo ḽaṋu." 
John16:23 “Musi wazwo a ni tsha ḓo vhuya na mmbudzisa na tshithu. Zwino ipfani-ha: Zwoṱhe zwine na humbela Khotsi nga dzina ḽanga u ḓo ni fha. 
John16:24 U swika zwino a ni athu vhuya na humbela tshithu nga dzina ḽanga. Humbelani, ni ḓo fhiwa, uri dakalo ḽaṋu ḽi khunyelele." 
John16:25 “Tshifhinga tshoṱhe ndo vha ndi tshi ḓi amba na inwi nga zwifanyiso; hone hu khou ḓa tshifhinga tshine ndi tshi amba na inwi nga Mudzimu Khotsi nda ḓo tou phula, ndi si tsha amba nga zwifanyiso." 
John16:26 Maḓuvha eneo ni ḓo humbela Khotsi zwithu nga dzina ḽanga; a hu tsha ḓo vha Nṋe a no ni humbelela," 
John16:27 ngauri Khotsi Ene muṋe u a ni funa, vhunga na inwi no mpfuna na tenda na uri ndi bva ha Mudzimu." 
John16:28 Nṋe ndi tshi ḓa fhano shangoni ndo vha ndi tshi bva ha Khotsi; zwino ndi khou ṱuwa shangoni, ndi vhuelela ha Ene Khotsi.”" 
John16:29 Ndi hone vhafunziwa vhawe vha tshi ri, “A vha vhoni-ha Vhafunzi, zwino vha vho tou bula; a vha tsha amba nga zwifanyiso." 
John16:30 Zwino ri vho zwi vhona uri vha ḓivha zwithu zwoṱhe; a vha vhuyi vha thoma u vhudziswa, ndi zwine ra tenda uri vha bva ha Mudzimu.”" 
John16:31 Yesu a tshi vha fhindula a ri, “Ndi hone zwino no tenda?" 
John16:32 Hu khou ḓa tshifhinga – na zwino tsho no ḓi swika – tshine noṱhe na ḓo balanganywa muṅwe na muṅwe a ya hawe, Nṋe na ntsia ndi ndoṱhe. Hone Nṋe a thi ndoṱhe, Khotsi anga u na Nṋe." 
John16:33 Ndi tshi ni vhudza hezwi zwithu ndi u itela uri ni vhe na mulalo nga u vha vhathihi na Nṋe. Shangoni ḽino ni ḓo tambudzwa, hone ni songo fhela mbilu; hufha Nṋe shango ndo ḽi kunda!”" 
John17:1 Yesu o no amba zwenezwo, a lilala a ri, “Khotsi anga, tshiḽa tshifhinga tsho swika. Vhonadza-ha vhugala ha Murwa wau uri na Murwa a vhonadze vhugala hau," 
John17:2 ngauri wo mu kumedza maanḓa a u vhusa vhathu vhoṱhe uri vhoṱhe vhe wa mu kumedza a vha ṋee vhutshilo vhu sa fheli. 
John17:3 Zwino vhutshilo vhu sa fheli ndi u ḓivha Iwe u re Mudzimu wa ngoho u woṱhe, na Yesu Khristo we Iwe wa mu ruma." 
John17:4 Fhano shangoni ndo vhonadza vhugala hau nga u khunyeledza mushumo we wa ri ndi u ite. 
John17:5 Khotsi anga, vhonadza vhugala hanga zwino henefha ndi na Iwe, vhugala honovhuḽa he nda vha ndi naho zwiḽa ndi na Iwe shango ḽi sa athu sikiwa." 
John17:6 “Ndo u ḓivhadza kha vhathu vhe wa nkumedza fhano shangoni. Vho vha vhe vhau, hone Iwe wa vha kumedza Nṋe. Zwe wa amba vho zwi ṱanganedza," 
John17:7 nahone zwino vha vho vhona uri zwoṱhe zwe wa nṋea zwi bva kha Iwe. 
John17:8 Ndo vha vhudza mafhungo e Iwe wa mmbudza, vha a ṱanganedza; vha a zwi ḓivha uri ndi ngoho uri ndi bva ha Iwe nahone vha a tenda uri ndi Iwe wo nthumaho." 
John17:9 “Ndi a vha humbelela. A thi humbeleli shango, ndi humbelela vhe wa nkumedza, ngauri ndi vhau." 
John17:10 Zwoṱhe zwi re zwanga ndi zwau; zwoṱhe zwi re zwau ndi zwanga; ndi zwone zwine vhugala hanga ha vhonala ngavho. 
John17:11 Zwino Nṋe a thi tsheeho fhano shangoni, ndi khou ḓa ha Iwe, ngeno vhone vha tshee fhano shangoni. Khotsi Mukhethwa, vha tsireledze vha dzule vho nambatela dzina ḽau, ḽeneḽi ḽe na Nṋe wa mpha ḽone, uri vha vhe tshithu tshithihi unga Nṋe na Iwe ri tshithu tshithihi." 
John17:12 Musi ndi tshee navho ndo vha ndi tshi vha tsireledza vha dzula vho nambatela dzina ḽau, ḽeneḽi ḽe na Nṋe wa mpha ḽone. Ndo vha tsireledza hu si vhe na muthihi wavho we a xela, arali e si uḽa we a vha o dzula o pfi u ḓo lovha uri Maṅwalo a khunyelele." 
John17:13 Ndi khou ḓa ha Iwe, zwino u amba izwi ndi fhano shangoni ndi khou itela uri vha vhe na dakalo ḽo khunyelelaho unga Nṋe." 
John17:14 Ndo vha vhudza maipfi au, shango ḽa vha vhenga, ngauri a si vha ḽino shango, vhunga na Nṋe ndi si wa ḽino shango." 
John17:15 A thi khou humbela uri u tou vha bvisa fhano shangoni; tshine nda humbela ndi uri u vha tsireledze kha Muvhi. 
John17:16 Vhunga Nṋe ndi si wa ḽino shango, na vhone a si vha ḽino shango." 
John17:17 Ita uri vha ḓikumedze Iwe nga u nambatela ngoho – ipfi ḽau ndi yone ngoho. 
John17:18 Ndo vha ruma shangoni sa zwiḽa Iwe u tshi nthuma shangoni. 
John17:19 Ndi ḓikumedza Iwe ndi tshi itela vhone uri na vhone vha kone u ḓikumedza Iwe vhukuma. 
John17:20 “A thi humbeleli vhone fhedzi; ndi humbelela na vhane vha mpfulufhela vho pfa vhone. 
John17:21 Ndi humbela uri vhoṱhe vha vhe tshithu tshithihi. Khotsi anga, kha vha vhe vhathihi na riṋe u ḓi nga Iwe u kha Nṋe, Nṋe ndi kha Iwe. Kha vha vhe tshithu tshithihi uri shango ḽi kone u tenda uri ndo rumiwa nga Iwe." 
John17:22 Na Nṋe ndo vha ṋea vhugala he Iwe wa nṋea, uri vha vhe tshithu tshithihi unga Nṋe na Iwe ri tshithu tshithihi:" 
John17:23 Nṋe ndi khavho, Iwe ú kha Nṋe, uri vha tou vha tshithu tshithihi tshoṱhe; ndi hone shango ḽi tshi ḓo zwi vhona uri ndo rumiwa nga Iwe, na uri u a vha funa unga u tshi mpfuna." 
John17:24 “Khotsi anga, havha vhathu vhe wa vha kumedza Nṋe ndi funa vha tshi vha na Nṋe hune nda vha hone uri vha vhone vhugala hanga he nda ṋewa nga Iwe vhunga iṱali wo ḓi mpfuna shango ḽi sa athu sikwa." 
John17:25 Khotsi muvhuya, shango a ḽi u ḓivhi, hone Nṋe ndi a u ḓivha, na avha vha a zwi ḓivha uri ndi Iwe wo nthumaho." 
John17:26 Ndo u ḓivhadza khavho nahone ndi kha ḓi ḓo u ḓivhadza khavho uri lufuno lune Nṋe wa mpfuna ngalwo na vhone vha vhe nalwo, na Nṋe ndi vhe khavho.”" 
John18:1 Yesu a ri u fhedza u amba a bva na vhafunziwa vhawe vha wela kudambwana kwa Kidroni. Henefho ho vha hu na tsimu ya mitshelo; vha swika vha dzhena ngomu. 
John18:2 Zwino na Judasi uḽa o mu fheṱaho, fhethu afho o vha a tshi hu ḓivha ngauri lwo vha lu lunzhi Yesu a tshi ḓi ḓa henefho na vhafunziwa vhawe." 
John18:3 Ndi hone Judasi a tshi ya tsimuni yeneyo e na gomane ya maswole na vhalindathembele vho rumiwaho nga vhotshifhe vhahulwane na Vhafarisei, vho fara mbone na maḓenzhe na zwihali." 
John18:4 Vhunga Yesu o vha o dzula a tshi ḓivha zwoṱhe zwine a ḓo itwa, a mbo ḓi takuwa a yo ṱangana navho a ri, “Nṋa ni khou ṱoḓa nnyi?”" 
John18:5 Vhone vha fhindula vha ri, “Ri khou ṱoḓa Yesu wa Nazaretha.” Ene a ri, “Ndi Nṋe.” Na Judasi uḽa o mu fheṱaho o vha o ḓi ima henefho navho." 
John18:6 Yesu a tshi tou ri, “Ndi Nṋe,” vha huma nga tshamurahu vha wela fhasi." 
John18:7 Yesu a dovha a vha vhudzisa a ri, “Ni khou ṱoḓa nnyi naa?” Vhone vha fhindula vha ri, “Ri khou ṱoḓa Yesu wa Nazaretha.”" 
John18:8 Yesu a ri, “Hufha ndo no ḓi ni vhudza nda ri ndi Nṋe! Arali ni tshi khou ṱoḓa Nṋe, litshani avha vhaṅwe vha ṱuwe.”" 
John18:9 (A tshi ralo ho vha hu uri hu khunyelele zwiḽa zwe a amba a tshi ri, “Khotsi, a tho ngo lozwa na muthihi wa vhe wa nkumedza.”)" 
John18:10 Zwino Simoni Pitrosi o vha e na banga; a ḽi ṱomola a rema phuli ya tshifhe muhulu a i tumula nḓevhe ya tshauḽa. Iyo phuli yo vha i tshi pfi Malikhosi. 
John18:11 Yesu a vhudza Pitrosi a ri, “Vhuedzedza banga ḽaṋu vhudzuloni haḽo; nṋa ndi nga hana tshinwelo tsha dambudzo tshe Khotsi anga a mpha?”" 
John18:12 Uyo mulangagomane na maswole awe na vhalindathembele vha Majuda vha fara Yesu vha mu vhofha," 
John18:13 vha thoma u mu isa ha Anasi makhulu wa Khayafasi we a vha e tshifhe muhulu wonoyo ṅwaha. 
John18:14 Khayafasi onoyo ndi uḽa we a vhuya a eletshedza Majuda uri ndi khwiṋe muthu muthihi a tshi fela lushaka lwoṱhe. 
John18:15 Simoni Pitrosi na muṅwe mufunziwa vha tevhela Yesu. Zwino uyo mufunziwa o vha a tshi ḓivhiwa nga tshifhe muhulu. Ndi zwe a kona na u dzhena muṱani wa nnḓu ya tshifhe muhulu na Yesu. 
John18:16 Pitrosi ene a sala nnḓa o ima khoroni. Zwino uḽa muṅwe mufunziwa we a vha a tshi ḓihwa nga tshifhe muhulu a dovha a bva a amba na musidzana we a vha o ima khoroni a dzhenisa Pitrosi. 
John18:17 Uyo musidzana a vhudzisa Pitrosi a ri, “Izwi na inwi a ni mufunziwa wa uyu munna?” Pitrosi a ri, “Hai.”" 
John18:18 Zwino vhunga ho vha hu na phepho, vhashumi na vhalindathembele vho vha vho vhasa mulilo wa masimbe, vha ima vha tshi khou ora. Pitrosi a ya a ima navho a ora-vho mulilo." 
John18:19 Tshifhe muhulu a vhudzisa Yesu nga vhafunziwa vhawe na nga pfunzo yawe. 
John18:20 Yesu a tshi fhindula a ri, “Hufha tshiṅwe na tshiṅwe tshe nda amba ndo ḓi tshi amba khagala vhathu vhoṱhe vha tshi zwi pfa! Ndi amba ngauri zwoṱhe zwe nda funza ndo ḓi funza sinagogoni na thembeleni – hone-ha hune Majuda vhoṱhe vha kuvhangana! A hu na tshe nda amba ndo dzumbama." 
John18:21 Zwino khezwi vha tshi vhudzisa Nṋe? Kha vha vhudzise vhe vha mpfa ndi tshi funza; vhone vha a ḓivha zwe nda amba!” 
John18:22 Yesu a tshi tou ralo muṅwe wa vhalindathembele a mbo ḓi mu rwa nga mpama khofheni, a ri, “Nṋa ni nga tou ralo ni tshi fhindula tshifhe muhulu?”" 
John18:23 Yesu a mu fhindula a ri, “Arali hu na ḽivhi ḽe nda amba, ambani uri ndi ḽifhio. Hone arali ndo amba ngoho ni nthwelani?”" 
John18:24 Ndi hone Anasi a tshi mu fhirisela ha Khayafasi tshifhe muhulu, ó ḓi vhofhiwa." 
John18:25 Pitrosi a tshee o ḓi ima henefhaḽa a tshi khou ora mulilo, vhaṅwe vha mu vhudzisa vha ri, “Izwi na inwi a ni mufunziwa wawe?” Pitrosi a ri, “A thi mufunziwa wawe!”" 
John18:26 Muṅwe mushumi wa tshifhe muhulu we a vha e shaka ḽa uḽa munna we Pitrosi a mu tumula nḓevhe a amba a ri, “Nṋa a si inwi we nda ni vhona ni nae ngei tsimuni?”" 
John18:27 Pitrosi a dovha a ri, “Hai!” A tshi tou ralo mukukulume wa vha u a lila." 
John18:28 Nga matshelonitsheloni vha dzhia Yesu nḓuni ya Khayafasi vha mu isa pfamoni ya muvhusi. Majuda vhone vha si dzhene ngomu pfamoni ngauri vho vha vha tshi ofha u ḓikumadza vha vho ḓo kundwa u ḽa Paseka. 
John18:29 Ndi hone Pilato a tshi vho tou bvela nnḓa khavho a ri, “Nṋa uyu munna ni khou mu hwelela nga ḽifhio?”" 
John18:30 Vhone vha fhindula vha ri, “Arali o vha a songo tshinya ndi musi ri songo mu ḓisa ha thovhele!”" 
John18:31 Pilato a ri, “Izwo inwi vhaṋe mu dzhieni ni mu haṱule nga mulayo wa haṋu.” Majuda vha fhindula vha ri, “Hufha riṋe ri songo tendelwa u haṱulela muthu lufu!”" 
John18:32 (Hezwo zwi tshi itea ho vha hu uri hu khunyelele zwiḽa zwe Yesu a amba a tshi ṱalutshedza uri u ḓo fa hani.) 
John18:33 Pilato a humela nḓuni a vhidza Yesu a mu vhudzisa a ri, “Nṋa inwi ni khosi ya Majuda?”" 
John18:34 Yesu a fhindula a ri, “Iyo mbudziso i tou bva kha vhone kana ndi zwe vha tou pfa vhathu vha tshi nnyamba?”" 
John18:35 Pilato a fhindula a ri, “Kani nṋe ndi Mujuda? Hufha vhe vhathu vha haṋu na vhotshifhe vhahulwane vhe vha ni kumedza nṋe! Nṋa hone no tshinyani?”" 
John18:36 Yesu a ri, “Nṋe vhuhosi hanga a si ha ḽino shango; ngavhe vhu ha ḽino shango ndi musi vhalanda vhanga vha tshi ḓo vha vha tshi khou lwa uri ndi si kumedzwe Majuda. Nṋe vhuhosi hanga a si ha ḽino shango.”" 
John18:37 Pilato ndi hone a tshi mu vhudzisa a ri, “Zwi amba uri u vha khosi ni khosi?” Yesu a fhindula a ri, “Ndi vhone vha no khou ri ndi khosi. Nṋe ndi tshi bebiwa na musi ndi tshi ḓa shangoni ndo ḓela tshithu tshithihi fhedzi: Ndo ḓela u ṱanzilela ngoho. Ane a vha wa ngoho u a mpfa.”" 
John18:38 Pilato a ri, “Ni tshi ri ‘ngoho’ ni amba mini?” Pilato a ri u ralo a bvela nnḓa hu re na Majuda a vha vhudza a ri, “Nṋe a thi vhuyi nda wana na mulandu khae." 
John18:39 Zwino hufha nga Paseka ni na nḓowelo ya uri ndi ḓi ni vhofhololela tshivhotshwa tshithihi – zwino ni a funa ndi tshi ni vhofhololela khosi ya Majuda naa?” 
John18:40 Vhone vha fhindula nga u tou zhamba vha ri, “Hai, e si hoyu lini! Kha ri vhofhololelwe Barabasi.” (Uyo Barabasi o vha e ḽivemu.)" 
John19:1 Ndi hone Pilato a tshi dzhia Yesu a ri a rwiwe nga nnzi. 
John19:2 Maswole vha ita khare ya mipfa vha mu ambadza ṱhohoni; vha mu ambadza na phuraphura tswuku," 
John19:3 Vha ḓi ḓa khae vha ri, “Thovhele Khosi ya Majuda nga a lalame!” Vha tshi ralo vha mu rwa nga mipama khofheni." 
John19:4 Pilato a dovha a bvela nnḓa a amba na vhathu a ri, “Asuyu-ha; ndi khou mu bvisela ngeno nnḓa kha inwi ni zwi vhone uri nṋe a thi wani mulandu khae.”" 
John19:5 Yesu a bvela nnḓa a tshee o ambara iḽa khare ya mipfa na phuraphura tswuku. Pilato a ri, “Vhonani muthu uri o tou ita hani!”" 
John19:6 Vhotshifhe vhahulwane na vhathu vhavho vha tshi mu vhona vha zhamba vha ri, “Kha a vhambiwe kha tshifhambano! Kha a vhambiwe kha tshifhambano!” Pilato a ri, “Mu dzhieni-ha ni mu vhambe kha tshifhambano inwi vhaṋe. A vha nṋe a thi wani mulandu khae.”" 
John19:7 Majuda vha fhindula vha ri, “Ri na mulayo une wa ri u fanela u vhulawa, ngauri o ḓiita Murwa wa Mudzimu.”" 
John19:8 Pilato a tshi pfa zwenezwo a tou ṋaṋa u ofha. 
John19:9 A vhuelela nḓuni a vhudzisa Yesu a ri, “Nṋa hone ni bva ni ngafhi?” Yesu a sokou fhumula." 
John19:10 Pilato a vhuya a dovha a ri, “Nṋa a ni ambi na nṋe? A ni zwi ḓivhi uri ndi na maanḓa a u ni vhofholola na a u ni vhamba kha tshifhambano naa?”" 
John19:11 Yesu a fhindula a ri, “Vho vha vha tshi ḓo vha vha si na maanḓa na maṱukuṱuku kha Nṋe arali vho vha vha songo tou a fhiwa a tshi bva ṱaḓulu. Ndi zwine mulandu muhulwane wa vha wa uyo we a nkumedza vhone.”" 
John19:12 Pilato a tshi tou pfa zwenezwo a thoma u linga nga nḓila dzoṱhe uri a mu vhofholole. Hone Majuda vha tou hana u pfa, vha zhamba vha ri, “Hoyu arali vha mu vhofholola zwi amba uri a vha tsha ima na Khisara! Ane a ḓiita khosi u vhangisa Khisara!”" 
John19:13 Pilato a tshi pfa vha tshi ralo a bvisela Yesu nnḓa, ene muṋe a dzula kha tshidzulo tsha khaṱhulo, muṱani wo itwaho nga matombo, une nga Tshiheberu wa tou pfi “Gabatha”." 
John19:14 Zwenezwo ḓuvha ḽo vha ḽi tshi vho ya vhukati ha ṱhoho, i tshi ḓo vuwa i Paseka. Pilato a vhudza Majuda a ri, “Ngei-ha khosi yaṋu!”" 
John19:15 Vhone vha zhamba vha ri, “Nga a fe! Nga a fe! Nga a vhambiwe kha tshifhambano!” Pilato a ri, “Nṋa ni ri khosi yaṋu ndi i vhambe?” Vhotshifhe vhahulwane vha fhindula vha ri, “Riṋe khosi yashu ndi Khisara; a ri na iṅwe.”" 
John19:16 Ndi hone Pilato a tshi vha kumedza Yesu uri a vhambiwe. Ndi hone vha tshi mbo ḓi mu dzhia vha ṱuwa nae. 
John19:17 A bvela nnḓa o hwala tshifhambano tshawe a ya fhethu hu no pfi Dethele; nga Tshiheberu hu tou pfi “Golgotha”. 
John19:18 Henefho vha mu vhamba kha tshifhambano; vha ita na u vhamba na vhaṅwe vhavhili, muṅwe thungo ya tshauḽa muṅwe thungo ya tshamonde, Yesu a vha vhukati." 
John19:19 Pilato a ṅwala nḓivhadzo ya mulandu wawe uri i ombelwe kha tshifhambano. Nḓivhadzo iyo yo vha i tshi ri, “Yesu wa Nazaretha, Khosi ya Majuda.”" 
John19:20 Nḓivhadzo yeneyo ya vhaliwa nga Majuda manzhi, ngauri afho he Yesu a vha o vhambiwa hone ho vha hu si kule na muḓi. Yone yo vha yo ṅwaliwa nga Tshiheberu na Tshilathini na Tshigiriki." 
John19:21 Vhotshifhe vhahulwane vha Majuda vha vhudza Pilato vha ri, “Vha songo ṅwala uri ‘Khosi ya Majuda’; kha vha ṅwale uri, ‘O ri: ndi Khosi ya Majuda’.”" 
John19:22 Pilato a ri, “Zwe nda ṅwala ndo ṅwala.”" 
John19:23 Musi maswole vho no vhamba Yesu, vha kovhekana zwiambaro zwawe, muṅwe na muṅwe wa maswole ayo maṋa a wana mukovhe. Vha dzhia na khanzu. Yone yo vha yo tou lukiwa i si na murungo." 
John19:24 Maswole vha amba nga tshavho vha ri, “Yone ri songo i kherula; kha ri tou i itela madeṅwa ri vhone ane ya ḓo vha yawe!” Vha tshi ralo ho vha hu uri hu khunyelele zwiḽa zwe Maṅwalo a amba a tshi ri, “Vho kovhekana zwiambaro zwanga, lupila lwanga vha lu itela madeṅwa.” Nangoho zwenezwo ndi zwone zwe maswole a ita." 
John19:25 Mme a Yesu na mmane wawe na Maria musadzi wa Klopasi na Maria Magadalina vho vha vho ima henefho tsini ha tshifhambano. 
John19:26 Yesu a tshi vhona mme awe na uḽa mufunziwa we a vha a tshi funwa vho ima henefho a ri, “Vhomme, ṅwana wavho asuyo.”" 
John19:27 A dovha a vhudza uyo mufunziwa a ri, “Mme aṋu asivho.” Nangoho mufunziwa a ita nga u ralo: u bva zwenezwo Maria a ya a dzula hayani ha onoyo mufunziwa." 
John19:28 Yesu a tshi vhona uri zwoṱhe zwo khunyelela, na u itela uri Maṅwalo a khunyelele a ri, “Ndi na ḓora.”" 
John19:29 Henefho ho vha hu na mvuvhelo i re na waini yo vhiluluwaho. Vha dzhia tshiponnzhi vha tshi lovhea khayo vha tshi ṱoma kha lutavhi lwa muhisopo vha tshi isa mulomoni wawe. 
John19:30 Yesu a swiswina iyo waini a konou ri, “Zwo khunyelela.” A ri u ralo a kotamisa ṱhoho a welela." 
John19:31 Majuda vha humbela Pilato uri vhathu vho vhambiwaho vha vunḓiwe milenzhe uri zwitumbu zwi ḓo kona u tsiswa kha zwifhambano. U vhuya vha ralo ndi uri ḽo vha ḽi tshi ḓo vuwa ḽi Sabatha, zwino vha tshi ofha uri zwitumbu zwi nga ḓo ṱwa zwifhambanoni ngayo, vhunga Sabatha yeneyo yo vha i khulwane." 
John19:32 Nangoho maswole a ya a vunḓa milenzhe ya munna wa u thoma na wa vhuvhili – vhenevhaḽa vhe vha vhambiwa na Yesu. 
John19:33 Hone vha tshi swika kha Yesu vha wana o no dzama, vha si tsha mu vunḓa milenzhe." 
John19:34 Ḽiṅwe ḽiswole ḽa mu runga lurumbu nga pfumo, ha mbo ḓi bva malofha na maḓi." 
John19:35 Ṱhanzi ya zwithu izwi ndi muthu we a tou zwi vhona nga maṱo. Zwino u khou zwi ṱanzilela uri na inwi ni tende. Zwe a amba ndi ngoho, nahone u tou zwi ḓivha uri u amba ngoho." 
John19:36 Zwi tshi ralo ho vha hu uri hu khunyelele zwiḽa zwe zwa ambiwa nga Maṅwalo ha pfi, “Ha nga vunḓiwi na shambo na ḽithihi,”" 
John19:37 na fhaḽa huṅwe hu no pfi, “Vha ḓo vhona we vha mu runga.”" 
John19:38 Zwo no ralo Josefa wa Arimathia a ya a humbela Pilato uri a mu tendele u dzhia tshitumbu tsha Yesu. (Josefa onoyo o vha e mufunziwa wa Yesu we a vha a tshi ḓi tou ḓidzumba nga u ofha Majuda.) Nangoho Pilato a mu tendela, ene a mbo ḓi ya a dzhia tshiḽa tshitumbu." 
John19:39 Zwino na Ṋegodima, uḽa we a vhuya a ḓa ha Yesu vhusiku, a ṱuwa na Josefa e na mushonga wo itwaho nga u vanga tshikhopha na mere. Mushonga wonoyo wo vha u khilogiramu dza 30." 
John19:40 Avho vhanna vhavhili vha dzhia tshitumbu tsha Yesu vha tshi pomba nga masila a na uyo mushonga, vha tshi tevhedza maswiṱele a Tshijuda." 
John19:41 Henefho he Yesu a vhambiwa hone ho vha hu na tsimu i re na tshalo tshiswa tshi sa athu swiṱa muthu. 
John19:42 Zwino vhunga ḽo vha ḽi tshi ḓo vuwa ḽi Sabatha, nahone itsho tshalo tshi tsini, vha mbo ḓi swiṱa Yesu khatsho." 
John20:1 Nga matsheloni a Swondaha hu tshee na luswiswi, Maria Magadalina a fhindutshela tshaloni, a wana tombo ḽo sudzuluswa muṋangoni watsho." 
John20:2 A mbo ḓi gidimela ha Simoni Pitrosi, a mu wana e na uḽa mufunziwa we Yesu a vha a tshi mu funa; a vha vhudza a ri, “Vho bvisa Muṋe washu tshaloni; a ri ḓivhi uri vho mu vhea ngafhi!”" 
John20:3 Ndi hone Pitrosi na uyo muṅwe mufunziwa vha tshi takuwa vha ya henengei tshaloni. 
John20:4 Vhuvhili havho vha tou ṱuwa nga u gidima, uḽa muṅwe mufunziwa a fhirela Pitrosi, a vha ene a thomaho u swika tshaloni." 
John20:5 A kotama a ṱodzimela, a sokou vhona aḽa masila henefho, hone u dzhena a si dzhene." 
John20:6 Pitrosi na ene a vha a tshi ri ndo swika, u swika a mbo ḓi dzhena ngomu tshaloni. A vhona aḽa masila henefho," 
John20:7 khathihi na ḽiḽa ḽe ḽa vha ḽo pomba ṱhoho ya Yesu. Ḽone ḽo vha ḽi songo dzula na maṅwe, ḽo vha ḽo tou petiwa ḽa vhetshelwa thungo." 
John20:8 Ndi hone na uyo muṅwe mufunziwa we a thoma u swika a tshi vho dzhena, a ri u zwi vhona a tenda." 
John20:9 (Vho vha vha sa athu ṱalukanya Maṅwalo a u ri u fanela u vuwa vhafuni.) 
John20:10 Ndi hone avho vhafunziwa vha tshi humela hayani. 
John20:11 Maria ene a sala o ima henefho nnḓa ha tshalo a tshi khou lila. A tshi kha ḓi lila, a kotama a ṱodzimela ngomu tshaloni," 
John20:12 a vhona vharuṅwa vhavhili nga ngomu vho ambara nguvho tshena vho dzula afho he tshitumbu tsha Yesu tsha vha tshi hone, muṅwe o dzula afho he ha vha hu na ṱhoho, muṅwe e milenzheni." 
John20:13 Vha mu vhudzisa vha ri, “Iwe musadzi, u khou lilela mini?” Ene a fhindula a ri, “Vho dzhia Muṋe wanga; a thi ḓivhi uri vho mu vhea ngafhi!”" 
John20:14 A tshi ralo, a rembuluwa a vhona Yesu o ima henefho, hone a si mu ḓivhe." 
John20:15 Yesu a mu vhudzisa a ri, “Iwe musadzi, u khou lilela mini? U ṱoḓa nnyi?” Uyo musadzi a tshi vhona unga Yesu ndi muṋe wa tsimu, a ri, “Muṋe wanga, arali vhe vhone vho mu dzhiaho, a vha mmbudzi zwavho he vha mu vhea ndi yo mu dzhia?”" 
John20:16 Yesu a ri, “Maria!” Ene a rembuluwa a aravha nga Tshiheberu a ri, “Rabuni!” (Zwine zwa amba uri “Mufunzi wanga!”)" 
John20:17 Yesu a ri, “Ni songo nnambatela; a thi athu gonya nda ya ha Khotsi anga. Tshimbilani ni yo vhudza vharathu vhanga uri ndi a gonya ndi ya ha Khotsi anga a re Khotsi aṋu; ndi ya ha Mudzimu wanga a re Mudzimu waṋu.”" 
John20:18 Ndi hone Maria Magadalina a tshi ya kha vhafunziwa a vha vhudza a ri, “Nṋe ndo vhona Muṋe washu,” a ita na u vha vhudza zwe a mu laedza." 
John20:19 Ḽeneḽo ḓuvha ḽa u thoma ḽa vhege nga madekwana vhafunziwa vho vha vho tou ḓihoṋela nga u ofha Majuda. Yesu a ḓa a ima vhukati havho a ri, “Mulalo u vhe na inwi!”" 
John20:20 A ri u ralo a vha sumbedza zwanḓa zwawe na lurumbu lwawe; vhafunziwa vha takala nga maanḓa vha tshi vhona Muṋe washu. 
John20:21 Yesu a dovha a amba navho a ri, “Mulalo u vhe na inwi! Ndi a ni ruma sa zwiḽa Khotsi a tshi nthuma.”" 
John20:22 A tshi ralo a vha vhudzulela muya a ri, “Ṱanganedzani Muya Mukhethwa!" 
John20:23 Vhathu vhane na vha hangwela vhutshinyi vha ḓo vha nangoho vho hangwelwa; vhane na sa vha hangwele, vha ḓo vha nangoho vha songo hangwelwa.”" 
John20:24 Musi Yesu a tshi ḓa ha vhafunziwa vhawe o wana Thomasi (ndi u ri Mawela), muṅwe wa vha 12, a siho." 
John20:25 Vhaṅwe vhafunziwa vha mu vhudza vha ri, “Riṋe ro vhona Muṋe washu.” Thomasi a vha fhindula a ri, “Arali nda sa tou vhona mbonzhe dza zwibigiri kha zwanḓa zwawe, nda ita na u longa munwe wanga khadzo, nda longa na tshanḓa tshanga he a rungwa kha lurumbu, ndi nga si vhuye nda zwi tenda!”" 
John20:26 Ho ri u fhela vhege nthihi vhafunziwa vha dovha vha kuvhangana nḓuni na Thomasi e navho. Mahothi o vha o ḓi hoṋiwa, Yesu a ḓa a ima vhukati havho a ri, “Mulalo u vhe na inwi!”" 
John20:27 A ri u ralo a konou amba na Thomasi a ri, “Ḓisani-ha munwe waṋu kha zwanḓa zwanga ni tou vhona; ni ḓise na tshanḓa tshaṋu ni tshi longe kha lurumbu lwanga. Ni songo tsha vha a sa tendi, tendani!”" 
John20:28 Thomasi a vho ri, “Muṋe wanga, Mudzimu wanga!”" 
John20:29 Yesu a ri, “Ndi hone ni tshi vho tenda zwino nge na mmbona? Vha na mashudu vhane naho vha songo tou vhona vha ḓi tenda!”" 
John20:30 Hu tshee na maḓembe manzhi e Yesu a a ita, zwa vha zwiga zwe vhafunziwa vhawe vha zwi vhona. Ndi zwiga zwi songo ṅwalwaho buguni iyi." 
John20:31 Hezwi zwo ṅwalwaho hafha zwo ṅwalelwa uri inwi ni tende uri Yesu ndi Ene Mesia Murwa wa Mudzimu, na uri nga u tenda honoho ni kone u wana vhutshilo ngae." 
John21:1 Zwó no ralo Yesu a dovha a ḓisumbedza vhafunziwa vhawe vhe Dzivhani ḽa Tiberiasi. Zwo itea nga nḓila hei: 
John21:2 Simoni Pitrosi o vha e na Thomasi (ndi u ri Mawela), na Nathaniele a bvaho Kana vunduni ḽa Galelia na vhana vha Zebedia na vhaṅwe vhafunziwa vha Yesu vhavhili vhe nga tshavho." 
John21:3 Simoni Pitrosi a vhudza avho vhaṅwe a ri, “Nṋe ndi kha ḓi ya u rea khovhe.” Vhone vha ri, “Na riṋe ri a ya.” Ndi hone vha tshi ṱuwa vha dzhena tshikepeni; hone vha si vhuye vha fasha na khovhe na nthihi vhusiku honoho." 
John21:4 Ḓuvha ḽi tshi bvisa mulomo Yesu o vha o ima khunzikhunzini ya dzivha, hone vhafunziwa vha si mu ḓivhe." 
John21:5 Yesu a amba navho a ri, “Vha hashu, ni na tshe na fasha?” Vhone vha fhindula vha ri, “A ri na!”" 
John21:6 Ene a amba navho a ri, “Poselani mambule aṋu thungo ya tshauḽa ya tshikepe, ndi hone ni tshi ḓo fasha.” Nangoho vha ita nga u ralo, hone vha vho kundwa u kokodzela mambule tshikepeni, ngauri vho vha vho no fasha khovhe nnzhisa." 
John21:7 Uḽa mufunziwa we Yesu a vha a tshi mu funa a vhudza Pitrosi a ri, “Ndi Muṋe washu!” Simoni Pitrosi zwenezwo o vha a si na tshiambaro tsha nnḓa, hone a tshi tou pfa uri ndi Muṋe washu, a mbo ḓi fuka a fhufhela maḓini." 
John21:8 Vhaḽa vhafunziwa vhaṅwe vhone vha swika nga tshikepe vha tshi khou kokodza aḽa mambule o ḓala khovhe. Hafhu vho vha vha siho kule-kule na khunzikhunzi, vha tshi tou vha mithara dzine dza nga ita ḓana u bva henefho." 
John21:9 Vha tshi tou swika khunzikhunzini vha vhona mulilo wa masimbe hu tshi khou ṱhaṱhiwa khovhe, na vhurotho vhu hone." 
John21:10 Yesu a vha vhudza a ri, “Edzonu ḓisa khovhenyana kha dzine na kha ḓi tou bva u fasha zwino.”" 
John21:11 Simoni Pitrosi a mbo ḓi dzhena tshikepeni a kokodzela aḽa mambule nnḓa o ḓala nga khovhe khulwane dza 153; hone naho dzo ḓala nga u ralo mambule a si kheruwe. 
John21:12 Yesu a ri, “Iḓani ni ḽe!” Kha vhafunziwa vhawe hu si vhe na we a linga u mu vhudzisa a ri, “Ndi vhone vhonnyi?” Vho vha vha tshi ḓivha uri ndi Muṋe washu." 
John21:13 Ndi hone Yesu a tshi sendela, a dzhia vhurotho na khovhe a vha ṋea." 
John21:14 Lwonolwo lwo vha lu lwa vhararu Yesu a tshi ḓisumbedza vhafunziwa vhawe u bva tshee a vuwa vhafuni. 
John21:15 Musi vho no ḽa, Yesu a vhudzisa Simoni Pitrosi a ri, “Simoni Murwa wa Johanisi, ni mpfuna u fhira avha vhaṅwe vhoṱhe naa?” Ene a fhindula a ri, “Ee Muṋe wanga, na vhone vha a zwi ḓivha uri ndi a vha funa.” Yesu a ri, “Lisani ngwana dzanga.”" 
John21:16 Yesu a dovha a mu vhudzisa lwa vhuvhili a ri, “Simoni murwa wa Johanisi, ni a mpfuna naa?” Ene a ri, “Ee, Muṋe wanga, na vhone vha a zwi ḓivha uri ndi a vha funa!” Yesu a ri, “Lisani nngu dzanga.”" 
John21:17 Yesu a dovha a mu vhudzisa lwa vhuraru a ri, “Simoni murwa wa Johanisi, ni a mpfuna naa?” Zwino Pitrosi a vho tou ṱungufhala nga u pfa Yesu o no mu vhudzisa lwa vhuraru a ri, “Ni a mpfuna naa?” Ndi hone a tshi ri, “Muṋe wanga, vhone vha ḓivha zwithu zwoṱhe; na uri ndi a vha funa vha a zwi ḓivha.” Yesu a ri, “Lisani nngu dzanga." 
John21:18 Zwino ipfani-ha: Musi ni tshee muswa no vha ni tshi ḓivhofha bannda na ya hune na funa, hone ni tshi kalaha ni ḓo ṋekedza zwanḓa zwaṋu, muṅwe a ni vhofha a ni isa hune ni si hu fune.”" 
John21:19 (Yesu a tshi ralo o vha a tshi khou amba uri Pitrosi u ḓo renda Mudzimu nga u fa lufu-ḓe.) Ndi hone Yesu a tshi mu vhudza a ri, “Ntevheleni.”" 
John21:20 Pitrosi a tshi rembuluwa a vhona uḽa mufunziwa we Yesu a vha a tshi mu funa a tshi khou tevhela. (Ndi uḽa we a vha o ḓisendeka nga Yesu zwiḽa vhe zwiḽiwani, uḽa we a vhuya a ita na u vhudzisa a ri, “Muṋe wanga, ndi nnyi onoyo ane a ḓo vha fheṱa?”)" 
John21:21 Pitrosi a tshi mu vhona a vhudzisa Yesu a ri, “Muṋe wanga, uyu ene?”" 
John21:22 Yesu a mu fhindula a ri, “Zwino arali Nṋe ndi tshi ṱoḓa uri a tshile u swika ndi tshi vhuya, inwi zwi ni dina ngani? Inwi ntevheleni.”" 
John21:23 Henefho ndi he ha bva murero kha vhafunziwa vha Yesu wa uri uyo mufunziwa ha nga fi. Matsina Yesu Ene o vha a songo ri ha nga fi; o tou ri, “Arali Nṋe ndi tshi ṱoḓa a tshi tshila u swika ndi tshi vhuya inwi zwi ni dina ngani?”" 
John21:24 Onoyo mufunziwa ndi ene we a ṱanziela aya mafhungo a ita na u tou a ṅwala; huno riṋe ri a zwi ḓivha uri vhuṱanzi hawe ndi ha ngoho. 
John21:25 Hu tshee na zwiṅwe zwithu zwinzhi zwe Yesu a ita. Arali zwoṱhe zwi tshi nga ṅwaliwa zwa tou dodombedzwa ndi vhona unga bugu dzi nga ḓadza shango ḽoṱhe dza vhuya dza sala. 
Acts1:1 Thifilosi wanga: Buguni yanga ya u ranga ndo ṅwala nga mishumo yoṱhe ye Yesu a ita na zwoṱhe zwe a funza u bva ḓuvha ḽe a thoma mushumo wawe 
Acts1:2 u swika ḓuvha ḽe a takulelwa ṱaḓulu. Hone a sa athu takulelwa ṱaḓulu o vhuya a amba na vhaapostola vhe a vha nanga, a vha laya e na maanḓa a Muya Mukhethwa a tshi vha vhudza zwine vha fanela u ita." 
Acts1:3 Musi o no vhulawa, o fhedza maḓuvha a 40 a tshi vha sumbedza nga hunzhi uri ngoho o vuwa vhafuni, u a tshila, a tshi ḓivhonadza khavho a tshi amba navho nga zwa muvhuso wa Mudzimu." 
Acts1:4 Ḽiṅwe ḓuvha a tshi khou ḽa navho a vha laya a ri, “Ni songo ṱuwa fhano Jerusalema; lindelani tshe Khotsi anga a ni fulufhedzisa – tshiḽa tshe nda ni vhudza." 
Acts1:5 Johanisi ene o vha a tshi lovhedza nga maḓi, hone inwi hu ḓo ri hu songo fhela maḓuvha manzhi na lovhedzwa nga Muya Mukhethwa.”" 
Acts1:6 Ḽiṅwe ḓuvha vhaapostola vhó kuvhangana na Yesu vha mu vhudzisa vha ri, “Muṋe washu, nṋa zwino kani ndi hone vha tshi yo vusa muvhuso wa Israele?”" 
Acts1:7 Yesu a fhindula a ri, “A na maanḓa a u vhea zwifhinga ndi Khotsi anga; uri zwi ḓo itea lini a si zwaṋu, ndi zwawe e eṱhe." 
Acts1:8 Inwi ni ḓo ṋewa maanḓa musi Muya Mukhethwa a tshi ḓa kha inwi, uri ni vhe ṱhanzi dzanga fhano Jerusalema na kha ḽoṱhe ḽa Judia na ḽa Samaria u vhuya u swika mugumoni wa ḽifhasi.”" 
Acts1:9 A kha ḓi ralo a mbo ḓi takulelwa ṱaḓulu vho ḓi lavhelesa, a tsirwa nga gole vha si tsha mu vhona." 
Acts1:10 Vha tshee vho lavhelesa, Yesu a tshi khou suvhela a tshi ya, vha vhona vhanna vhavhili vho ambaraho tshena vho ima navho," 
Acts1:11 vhenevho vha ri, “Inwi vhanna vha Galelia, khezwi no sokou ima no lilala? Hoyu Yesu ane na mu vhona a tshi ṱuswa kha inwi a takulelwa ṱaḓulu, u ḓo vhuya sa zwenezwi.”" 
Acts1:12 Ndi hone vhaapostola vha tshi ṱuwa Thavhani ya Miolivi i re tsini na Jerusalema, lwendo lune lwa nga ita khilomitha nthihi, vha dzhena muḓini." 
Acts1:13 Vha tshi swika vha gonya kamarani ya tshitizi ye vha vha vha tshi khou dzula khayo, e Pitrosi na Johanisi, na Jakopo, na Andrisi, na Filipi, na Thomasi, na Batholomio, na Matiosi, na Jakopo ṅwana wa Alifiosi, na Simoni Muhali-wa-Mudzimu, na Judasi ṅwana wa Jakopo." 
Acts1:14 Vhaapostola vhenevho vho vha vha tshi ḓi vha na vhaḽa vhasadzi, khathihi na Maria mme a Yesu na vharathu vhawe, vha tshi khwaṱhela u rabela vhe vha mbilu nthihi." 
Acts1:15 Maḓuvha eneo hó kuvhangana vhatendi, ha kuvhangana vhe vha vha vha tshi nga ita 120, Pitrosi a takuwa a ri," 
Acts1:16 “Vha hashu, zwo fanela uri maṅwalo aḽa a khunyelele a zwe Muya Mukhethwa a vha o no ḓi dzula o amba nga Dafita – ndi amba zwa Judasi, uḽa we a vha e phangami ya vho faraho Yesu." 
Acts1:17 Judasi o vha e muṅwe nga riṋe, ó nangiwa uri ri shume nae.”" 
Acts1:18 (Iḽa tshelede ye Judasi a i wana nga nḓila yo vhifhaho, o renga tsimu ngayo, a wa henefho a fa, a balea thumbu, vhula hoṱhe ha hushuwa." 
Acts1:19 Mafhungo eneo vhathu vhoṱhe vho dzulaho Jerusalema vho a pfa; ndi zwine vha tshi amba iyo tsimu nga lwa havho vha tou ri “Akeldama”, zwine zwa amba uri “Tsimu ya malofha”.)" 
Acts1:20 “Iṱali ho ṅwalwa kha Dziphisalema ha pfi, “ ‘Nnḓu yawe nga i sale i dumba, hu si vhe na a dzulaho khayo!’ “Ha dovha ha ṅwaliwa ha pfi, “ ‘Mushumo wawe kha u dzhiwe nga muṅwe.’" 
Acts1:21 “Ndi zwine ha ṱoḓea muṅwe ane ra ḓo ṱanzilela roṱhe u vuwa ha Muṋe washu Yesu. U fanela u vha e muṅwe wa avho vhe vha vha vhe na riṋe tshifhinga tshoṱhe ri tshi tshimbila na Yesu Muṋe washu u bva tshee a lovhedzwa nga Johanisi u swika ḓuvha ḽe a ṱuswa ngaḽo kha riṋe a ya ṱaḓulu.” 
Acts1:22  
Acts1:23 Ndi hone hu tshi tiwa madzina a vhanna vhavhili, muṅwe a vha Josefa, we ḽiṅwe ḽa pfi Barasabasi (ḽiṅwe ḽa pfi Justosi), wa vhuvhili a vha Mathiasi." 
Acts1:24 Vha mbo rabela vha ri, “Muṋe washu, u ḓivha mbilu dza vhathu vhoṱhe. Asizwi-ha Muṋe washu, ri sumbedze uri kha avha vhavhili ndi ufhio we wa mu nanga" 
Acts1:25 uri a dzhie mushumo uyu a vhe muapostola vhuimoni ha Judasi, we a u ṱutshela a ya ho mu fanelaho.”" 
Acts1:26 Vha konou ita madeṅwa a u nanga kha avho vhavhili; ha mvaṱiwa Mathiasi, a mbo ḓi dzheniswa kha tshigwada tsha vhaḽa vhaapostola vha 11." 
Acts2:1 Musi ḓuvha ḽa Pentekoste ḽi tshi swika vhoṱhe vho vha vho kuvhangana fhethu huthihi. 
Acts2:2 Kathihi fhedzi ha pfala mubvumo u tshi bva ṱaḓulu u tshi tou nga ḓumbu ḽihulu ḽi tshi tita, wa ḓadza nnḓu yoṱhe ye vha vha vho dzula ngomu hayo." 
Acts2:3 Zwenezwo vha vhona ndimi dzi ngaho mulilo dzi tshi fhandekana dza kavha kha muṅwe na muṅwe wavho. 
Acts2:4 Vhoṱhe vha ḓadzwa Muya Mukhethwa, vha thoma u amba nga nyambo dzisili nga he Ene Muya a vha ṋea." 
Acts2:5 Henefho Jerusalema ho vha hu tshi dzula Majuda, vhanna vha ofhaho Mudzimu, vha no bva mashangoni oṱhe a ḽifhasi." 
Acts2:6 Vhenevho vha tshi pfa mubvumo wonoyo, vha kuvhangana vha tou vha vhanzhi-vhanzhi. Vhoṱhe vha akhamala ngauri muṅwe na muṅwe o vha a tshi pfa vha tshi khou amba nga luambo lwa hawe." 
Acts2:7 Vha akhamala vha kanuka vha ri, “Nṋa avha vhanna vhoṱhe vha no khou amba nga u rali a si Vhagalelia naa?" 
Acts2:8 Zwino ndi mini muṅwe na muṅwe washu a tshi pfa vha tshi amba luambo lwa hawe vhukuma lwa ḓamuni? 
Acts2:9 Kha riṋe hu na vha bvaho Pheresia, na Media, na Elamu, na vha dzulaho Misopothamia, na Judia na Kapadokia, na Pontosi na Asia," 
Acts2:10 na Frigia na Phamfilia, na Egipita na mivhunduni ya Libia tsini ha Kirene; vhaṅwe vhashu ndi vhaeni vha bvaho Roma," 
Acts2:11 vha Majuda na vho ṱanganedzaho Tshijuda; vhaṅwe ndi vha bvaho Khrita na Arabia – hone roṱhe ri pfa vha tshi khou amba nga luambo lwa hashu vha tshi khoḓa mishumo mihulwane ye Mudzimu a ita.” 
Acts2:12 Vha akhamala vho tou ḓaḓa, vha vhudzisana vha ri, “Nṋa izwi zwithu zwi amba mini?”" 
Acts2:13 Hone vhaṅwe vha sasaladza vha ri, “Ndi mishumo ya halwa yoṱhe hei!”" 
Acts2:14 Ndi hone Pitrosi a tshi takuwa na vhaḽa vhaṅwe vhaapostola vha 11, a thoma u amba na vhathu a ri, “Majuda vha hashu, na inwi noṱhe ni dzulaho Jerusalema, thetshelesani zwine nda amba." 
Acts2:15 Ni tshi ri havha vhanna vho kambiwa a si zwone; hufha i tshi kha ḓi vha tshikhathi tsha 9 nga matsheloni! 
Acts2:16 Zwi tshi rali hu khou tou khunyelela zwe muporofita Juele a amba a tshi ri," 
Acts2:17 “ ‘Mudzimu u ri: Khezwi zwine nda ḓo ita misi ya vhufhelo: Ndi ḓo shululela vhathu vhoṱhe Muya wanga; vharwa vhaṋu na vhananyana vhaṋu vha ḓo ḓivhadza mafhungo anga; vhaṱhannga vhaṋu vha ḓo vhona mabono; vhakalaha vhaṋu vha ḓo lora miloro. 
Acts2:18 Na dzone phuli dzi mpfulufhelaho, dza vhanna na dza vhasadzi, ndi ḓo dzi shululela Muya wanga misi yeneyo, vha ḓivhadza mafhungo anga." 
Acts2:19 Ndi ḓo ita maṱula ngei nṱha kha lutombo, na maḓembe fhano fhasi; hu ḓo vha na malofha na mulilo na ḓitsi;" 
Acts2:20 ḓuvha ḽi ḓo swifhala, ṅwedzi wa tswuka sa malofha, hu sa athu swika Ḓuvha ḽihulu ḽa Muṋe washu ḽa vhugala." 
Acts2:21 Zwi tshi ralo muṅwe na muṅwe ane a rabela Muṋe washu u ḓo tshidzwa.’ 
Acts2:22 “Vhaisraele vha hashu, edzonu pfa! Yesu wa Nazaretha ndi munna we Mudzimu a sumba nga maḓembe na mishumo i kanukisaho na zwiga zwe a ita ngae uri ni mu ḓivhe; hezwi inwi vhaṋe ni a zwi ḓivha vhunga zwo itwa ni tshi zwi vhona." 
Acts2:23 Mudzimu o dzula o zwi dzudzanya o zwi ḓivha uri u ḓo mu kumedza inwi, na mu vhulahisa nga vhannḓa, vha tou mu vhamba kha tshifhambano." 
Acts2:24 Hone Mudzimu o mu vusa vhafuni, a mu lamukisa kha vhuṱungu ha lufu, zwi sa tsha konadzea uri lufu lu dzule lwo mu fara." 
Acts2:25 Ndi zwe Dafita a tshi mu amba a tou ri, “ ‘Ndo vhona Muṋe wanga phanḓa hanga misi yoṱhe; u a ntika uri ndi si dzinginyee." 
Acts2:26 Ndi zwine mbilu yanga ya takala, na lulimi lwanga lwa fhululedza; nṋe muthu wa ṋama ndi ḓo dzula ndo khuda nga u ṱuvha Mudzimu;" 
Acts2:27 ngauri a u nga nnditshi vhudzulavhafu, nṋe muḓinḓa wau we nda ḓikumedza Iwe a u nga litshi ndi tshi sina." 
Acts2:28 Wo ntsumbedza nḓila dzi isaho vhutshiloni; ndo takala lwa u takala ngauri u na nṋe!’ 
Acts2:29 “Vha hashu, ndi fanela u ni vhudza zwiṅwe zwithu nga makhulukuku washu Dafita ndi sa dzumbi tshithu. O fa a swiṱwa, na tshalo tshawe ri tshee natsho na ṋamusi." 
Acts2:30 Vhunga o vha e muporofita, o vha a tshi zwi ḓivha uri Mudzimu o mu anela uri kha khuluṋoni yawe u ḓo vhea muḓuhulu wawe." 
Acts2:31 Dafita o vha o dzula o zwi vhona uri Mudzimu u ḓo ita mini, ndi zwe a tshi amba nga u vuwa ha Mesia a ri, “ ‘Ho ngo litshwa e vhudzulavhafu, muvhili wawe a wo ngo sina.’" 
Acts2:32 “Onoyo Yesu Mudzimu o mu vusa vhafuni, huno riṋe roṱhe ri ṱhanzi dzazwo." 
Acts2:33 O takulelwa ṱaḓulu a dzula hune a vhusa na Mudzimu, a ṋewa Muya Mukhethwa we Khotsi a fulufhedzisa, a konou mu shululela kha riṋe, ha itea zwine na khou zwi vhona nga maṱo aṋu na zwi pfa nga nḓevhe dzaṋu." 
Acts2:34 Ndi uri Dafita ene muṋe ho ngo vhuya a gonya a ya ṱaḓulu e Mesia; tshe a amba o tou ri, “ ‘Muṋe wa vhoṱhe o vhudza Muṋe wanga a ri: Dzula hafha thungo ya tshauḽa tshanga ri vhuse roṱhe," 
Acts2:35 ndi vhuye ndi ite maswina au vhukando ha milenzhe yau.’ 
Acts2:36 “Zwi ḓivheni-ha inwi noṱhe Vhaisraele uri vhukumakuma onoyo Yesu we na mu vhamba kha tshifhambano Mudzimu o mu ita Muṋe wa zwoṱhe, o mu ita Mesia.”" 
Acts2:37 Vhathu vha tshi pfa zwenezwo zwa vha ṱhavha, vha vhudzisa Pitrosi na vhaḽa vhaṅwe vhaapostola vha ri, “Zwino ri iteni-ha?”" 
Acts2:38 Pitrosi a fhindula a ri, “Rembuluwani, muṅwe na muṅwe a lovhedzwe nga dzina ḽa Yesu Khristo uri a hangwelwe vhutshinyi, ndi hone Mudzimu a tshi ḓo mu ṋea Muya Mukhethwa." 
Acts2:39 Ene Muya, Mudzimu o mu fulufhedzisa inwi na vhana vhaṋu, khathihi na vhoṱhe vha dzulaho mashangoni a kule, vhoṱhe vhane Mudzimu Muṋe washu a ḓo vha vhidza.”" 
Acts2:40 Pitrosi a vha laya nga hunzhi o tou khwaṱhisa a tshi vha ṱuṱuwedza a tshi ri, “Tinyani ṱhamu ine ya khou ḓa u rwa holu lushaka luvhi!”" 
Acts2:41 Vhanzhi vha ṱanganedza mafhungo awe vha lovhedzwa; ḓuvha ḽeneḽo vha engedzwa nga vhathu vhane vha nga vha 3 000. 
Acts2:42 Vha dzula vha tshi funzwa nga vhaapostola, vhe tshithu tshithihi, vha tshi ḽa vhoṱhe Tshilalelo, vha tshi rabela." 
Acts2:43 Mudzimu a ita maḓembe manzhi na mishumo i kanukisaho nga vhaapostola, lwe muṅwe na muṅwe a farwa nga nyofho." 
Acts2:44 Vhatendi vha ḓi dzula vhe tshithu tshithihi, zwe muṅwe na muṅwe a vha e nazwo zwo vha zwi zwa vhoṱhe," 
Acts2:45 vha tshi ita vha tshi rengisa masimu avho na thundu dzavho, vha tshi kovha nga hune vha vhona muthu a tshi lila ngaho." 
Acts2:46 Ḓuvha ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe vho vha vha tshi ḓi kuvhangana thembeleni vhe vha mbilu nthihi, ḽi tshi u tsha vha ḽa fhano ḽa tsha vha ḽa fhano, vho takala vha si tshee na tshiṅwe tshine vha tama," 
Acts2:47 vha tshi renda Mudzimu, na vhathu vhoṱhe vha tshi vha takalela. Ḓuvha ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe Muṋe washu a ḓi vha engedza nga vhe vha vha vha tshi khou tshidzwa." 
Acts3:1 Ḽiṅwe ḓuvha Pitrosi na Johanisi vha ya thembeleni nga tshifhinga tsha thabelo, nga awara ya vhuraru ya masiari." 
Acts3:2 Henefho kha muṅwe muṋango u no pfi Wonakaho vha wana muṅwe munna o bebwaho e tshihole, a tshi ḓi hwalwa ḓuvha ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe a dzudzwa henefho uri a humbele tshelede kha vhathu vha ḓaho thembeleni." 
Acts3:3 A tshi vhona Pitrosi na Johanisi vha tshi dzhena, a vha humbela tshifhiwa," 
Acts3:4 vha mu sedza, Pitrosi a amba nae a ri, “Lavhelesani ngeno.”" 
Acts3:5 Ene a mbo ḓi lavhelesa a tshi ri vha ṱoḓa u mu fha tshithu. 
Acts3:6 Pitrosi a ri, “Ya nga vha i tshelede nṋe a thi na; ndi ḓo ni fha tshine nda vha natsho: Ndi ri nga dzina ḽa Yesu Khristo wa Nazaretha: takuwani zwino ni tshimbile!”" 
Acts3:7 A konou mu fara kha tshanḓa tshauḽa a mu takusa. Kathihi fhedzi ṋayo dzawe na zwiendanungo zwa mbo ḓi khwaṱha," 
Acts3:8 a thamuwa a ima a konou tshimbila-tshimbila! Ndi hone a tshi vho dzhena navho thembeleni a tshi enda a tshi pembela a tshi renda Mudzimu. 
Acts3:9 Vhathu vhoṱhe vha mu vhona a tshi tshimbila a tshi renda Mudzimu. 
Acts3:10 Vha tshi vhona uri ndi uḽa muhumbeli we a vha o dzula fhaḽa thembeleni muṋangoni u no pfi Wonakaho, vha kanuka vho akhamala vha tshi vhona zwo iteaho khae." 
Acts3:11 Uyo munna a si tsha tenda u fhambana na Pitrosi na Johanisi, henefhaḽa Guḓani ḽa Solomoni, vhathu vhoṱhe vha akhamala vha gidimela khavho." 
Acts3:12 Pitrosi a tshi vha vhona a amba navho a ri, “Vhaisraele vha hashu, ni kanukiswa nga mini? Khezwi ni tshi lavhelesa riṋe ha vho nga ndi nga maanḓa ashu kana vhurabeli hashu uyu muthu a tshi vho kona u tshimbila?" 
Acts3:13 Mudzimu wa Abrahamu na Isaka na Jakopo, Ene Mudzimu wa vhomakhulukuku washu, o hulisa Yesu muḓinḓa wawe. Inwi no mu hwelela na vhuya na mu landula khoroni ya Pilato, naho Pilato o vha o no ḓiimisela u mu vhofholola." 
Acts3:14 No landula Ene Mukhethwa muvhuya, na ri ndi khwiṋe Pilato a tshi ni vhofhololela zwaṋu uḽa wa phondi," 
Acts3:15 na vhulaha Ene a ni isaho vhutshiloni. Mudzimu Ene o mu vusa vhafuni, nazwino riṋe ri dziṱhanzi dzazwo." 
Acts3:16 Ndi maanḓa a dzina ḽawe ḽe ra ḽi fulufhela o khwaṱhisaho miraḓo ya hoyu munna wa tshihole ane noṱhe na mu ḓivha; u fulufhela Yesu ndi hone ho fhodzaho uyu muthu ane noṱhe na khou mu vhona o takala. 
Acts3:17 “Zwino-ha vha hashu, nṋe ndi a zwi ḓivha uri inwi na vharangaphanḓa vhaṋu zwe na ita ho vha hu u sa ḓivha." 
Acts3:18 Hezwi zwi tshi itea ho vha hu hone Mudzimu a tshi khunyeledza zwe a dzula o amba nga vhaporofita vhawe vhoṱhe zwauri Mesia a bvaho ha Ene tshawe ndi u fa. 
Acts3:19 Laṱani-ha vhuvhi haṋu ni rembulutshele ha Mudzimu uri a thuthe vhutshinyi haṋu," 
Acts3:20 Muṋe washu a ni awedze, a ni rumele Yesu a re Ene Mesia we a dzula o mu nanga." 
Acts3:21 U ḓo dzula ṱaḓulu u swika tshifhinga tshine zwoṱhe zwa fanela u itwa zwiswa, nga he Mudzimu a dzula o amba nga vhaporofita vhawe tsha kale na kale." 
Acts3:22 Na Mushe o ri, ‘Mudzimu Muṋe waṋu u ḓo ni rumela muporofita ane a ḓo vha wa lushaka lwa haṋu, zwa nga a tshi ruma nṋe. Ni fanela u thetshelesa zwoṱhe zwine a ni vhudza." 
Acts3:23 Onoyo ane a sa ḓo thetshelesa zwine uyo muporofita a amba u ḓo bviswa kha lushaka lwa Mudzimu a lozwiwa.’ 
Acts3:24 Zwino-ha na vhaporofita vhoṱhe vhe vha vhuya vha vha hone, u bva kha Samuele, vho ḓi ḓivhadza-vho zwa tshino tshifhinga." 
Acts3:25 Inwi ni vhaḓuhulu vha vhaporofita, ni maḽaifa a mulanga we Mudzimu a vhofha na vhomakhulukuku waṋu musi a tshi amba na Abrahamu a tshi ri, ‘Tshakha dzoṱhe dza ḽifhasi dzi ḓo wana mashudu nga muḓuhulu wau.’" 
Acts3:26 Zwino-ha Mudzimu o thoma nga u rumela Muḓinḓa wawe ha inwi, uri a ni shudufhadze nga u ita uri muṅwe na muṅwe waṋu a furalele vhuvhi hawe.”" 
Acts4:1 Pitrosi na Johanisi vha tshi kha ḓi amba na vhathu, vha ḓelwa nga vhotshifhe na mulangi wa vhalindathembele, na Vhasadukei." 
Acts4:2 Vhenevha vho vha vho dinalea nge avho vhaapostola vha vha vha tshi khou funza vhathu uri Yesu o vuswa vhafuni, ha vha u funza uri vhafu vha a vuwa." 
Acts4:3 Ndi hone vha tshi vha fara vha vha hoṋela dzhele u swika nga ḽa matshelo ngauri ḽo vha ḽi tshi vho kovhela. 
Acts4:4 Naho zwo ralo, vhanzhi vhe vha pfa iyo pfunzo vha i tenda; tshivhalo tsha vhanna tsho vha tshi tshi nga vha 5 000." 
Acts4:5 Nga matshelo vharangaphanḓa vha Majuda na vhahulwane vha lushaka na vhaḓivhi vha Mulayo vha kuvhangana Jerusalema 
Acts4:6 vhe na tshifhe muhulu Anasi na Khayafasi na Johanisi na Alekzannda na vhaṅwe-vho vha miṱa ya vhotshifhe vhahulu. 
Acts4:7 Vha imisa vhaapostola phanḓa havho vha vha vhudzisa vha ri, “Nṋa ndi nnyi we a ni ruma a ni fha maanḓa a u ita izwi zwithu!”" 
Acts4:8 Pitrosi a vha fhindula o ḓala Muya Mukhethwa a ri, “Inwi vharangaphanḓa vha lushaka na inwi vhahulwane:" 
Acts4:9 Arali ṋamusi ni tshi khou ri sengisela u tonda uyu munna wa tshihole na uri o fhodzwa hani," 
Acts4:10 zwi ḓivheni-ha inwi na vhathu vhoṱhe vha Israele uri hoyu munna a tshi ima phanḓa haṋu ó fhola tshoṱhe, zwo itwa nga maanḓa a dzina ḽa Yesu Khristo wa Nazaretha, onouḽa we inwi na mu vhamba kha tshifhambano, Mudzimu Ene a mu vusa vhafuni." 
Acts4:11 Onoyo Yesu ndi Ene-ha ane Maṅwalo a tshi mu amba a ri, “ ‘Tombo ḽe ḽa nyadzwa nga inwi vhafhaṱi ni tshi ri a ḽi na mushumo, ḽo vho ḓo vha ḽone thikho ya tshifhaṱo.’" 
Acts4:12 “A hu na muṅwe ane a nga ri tshidza; a hu na ḽiṅwe dzina fhasi ha lutombo ḽe Mudzimu a ri ri tshidzwe ngaḽo.” 
Acts4:13 Vha tshi vhona Pitrosi na Johanisi vha tshi tou amba vha sa ofhi, vha kanuka, zwihuluhulu vha tshi vho pfa uri ndi vhathu zwavho vha songo funzwaho. Ndi hone vha tshi vho zwi vhona uri ndi vhathu vhe vha vha vha tshi tshimbila na Yesu." 
Acts4:14 Vha ro kundwa tshine vha nga amba, ngauri uḽa muthu o fhodzwaho o vha o ḓi ima na Pitrosi na Johanisi henefho." 
Acts4:15 Ndi hone vha tshi ri vha vhe vho bvela nnḓa, vhone vha sala vha tshi langana nga tshavho." 
Acts4:16 Vha vhudzisana vha ri, “Nṋa avha vhathu ri nga tou vha ita hani? Muṅwe na muṅwe fhano Jerusalema u ḓivha zwavhuḓi uri haya maḓembe mahulu o itwa ngavho; na riṋe ri nga si kone u hanedza." 
Acts4:17 Hone u itela uri bvumo ḽa hezwi zwithu ḽi si anḓadzee ḽi tshi ya, kha ri vha dzivhise u dovha u amba na muthu nga iḽi dzina.”" 
Acts4:18 Ndi hone vha tshi ri vha dzhene, vha vha vhudza uri vha songo tsha vhuya vha dovha vha amba kana vha funza nga dzina ḽa Yesu." 
Acts4:19 Pitrosi na Johanisi vhone vha fhindula vha ri, “Ambani! Tshi re tshone phanḓa ha Mudzimu ndi tshifhio? Ndi u pfa inwi kana ndi u pfa Mudzimu?" 
Acts4:20 A vha riṋe a ri koni u dzumba zwe ra zwi vhona na zwe ra zwi pfa.” 
Acts4:21 Ndi hone khoro i tshi vha kaidza yo khwaṱhisa uri vha si dovhe; ye u ralo ya vha vhofholola. A yo ngo wana nḓila ya u vha laṱisa, ngauri vhathu vhoṱhe vho vha vha tshi renda Mudzimu nga u vhona zwo iteaho." 
Acts4:22 Nahone muthu uyo we a vha o fhodzwa nga nḓila iyo i kanukisaho o vha o no ḓi fhira miṅwaha ya 40. 
Acts4:23 Pitrosi na Johanisi vha ri u vhofhololwa vha mbo ḓi vhuelela kha vhaḽa vhaṅwe ngavho, vha vha vhudza zwe vhotshifhe vhahulwane na vhahulwane vha lushaka vha amba." 
Acts4:24 Vha tshi pfa zwenezwo vha rabela Mudzimu vhoṱhe vha ri, “Iwe Muṋe wa zwoṱhe wo sikaho ḽiṱaḓulu na ḽifhasi na lwanzhe na zwoṱhe zwi re khazwo!" 
Acts4:25 Wo amba nga Muya Mukhethwa nga mulomo wa makhulukuku washu Dafita muḓinḓa wau, zwiḽa u tshi ri, “ ‘Nṋa vhannḓa vha itani vha tshi sokou sinyukana? Dzitshakha dzi langanelani zwa mahandana?" 
Acts4:26 Mahosi a ḽifhasi o ḓilugisa, vhavhusi vho vhofha ḽa u lwa na Muṋe washu na Muḓodzwa wawe.’" 
Acts4:27 “Nangoho khezwi: Herude na Pontio Pilato vho kuvhangana fhano Jerusalema na vhannḓa na mavhuthu a Israele uri vha lwe na Yesu Muḓinḓa wau mukhethwa, Ene Muḓodzwa wau." 
Acts4:28 Vha tshi kuvhangana vha rali ndi u khunyeledza zwe wa dzula wo dzudzanya nga u funa hau. 
Acts4:29 Zwino-ha Muṋe washu, u khou zwi vhona vha tshi ri halifhela; ri ṋee mbilutshinna riṋe vhaḓinḓa vhau ri kone u amba ipfi ḽau;" 
Acts4:30 imisa tshanḓa tshau hu fhodzwe vhathu; ita uri hu vhe na maḓembe na mishumo i kanukisaho nga maanḓa a Yesu Muḓinḓa wau mukhethwa.” 
Acts4:31 Vha tshi fhedza u rabela, fhethu he vha vha vho kuvhangana hone ha dzinginyea, vhoṱhe vha ḓala Muya Mukhethwa vha vho amba ipfi ḽa Mudzimu vha sa ofhi tshithu." 
Acts4:32 Tshivhidzo tsha vhatendi tsho vha tshi tshi dzula mbilu i nthihi na muhumbulo u muthihi, hu si na uri tshanga ndi tshanga, tsha muṅwe ndi tsha muṅwe, zwoṱhe zwi zwa vhoṱhe." 
Acts4:33 Vhaapostola vha ṱanzilela vhe na maanḓa mahulu uri Yesu Muṋe washu o vuwa, huno vhoṱhe Mudzimu a vha anzela mashudu." 
Acts4:34 Ho vha hu si na na muthihi khavho ane a shaya, ngauri vhe vha vha vhe na masimu na dzinnḓu vho vha vha tshi zwi rengisa" 
Acts4:35 vha ṋea vhaapostola tshelede yazwo, ya konou kovhelwa muṅwe na muṅwe nga hune a shaya." 
Acts4:36 Zwino-ha ho vha hu na muṅwe munna wa Mulivi o bebelwaho Kipirosi we a vha a tshi pfi Josefa; vhaapostola vhone vho vha vho mu ira ḽa Barnabasi, ḽine ḽa amba uri “Mukhuthadzi”." 
Acts4:37 Onoyo a rengisa tsimu yawe, tshelede a ḓa nayo a i ṋea vhaapostola." 
Acts5:1 Ha dovha ha vha na muṅwe munna a no pfi Ananiasi e na musadzi wawe a no pfi Safira. Vhenevho vha rengisa tsimu yavho," 
Acts5:2 Ananiasi a dzumba iṅwe tshelede musadzi wawe a tshi zwi ḓivha, yo salaho a i ṋea vhaapostola." 
Acts5:3 Pitrosi a mu vhudza a ri, “Ananiasi, nṋa no litshelani Saṱhane a tshi dzhena mbiluni yaṋu a ita uri ni zwifhele Muya Mukhethwa nga u dzumba iṅwe tshelede kha ye na i wana ni tshi rengisa tsimu?" 
Acts5:4 Ni sa athu i rengisa yo vha i si tsimu yaṋu naa? Na musi no no i rengisa, iyo tshelede yo vha i si yaṋu na? Nṋa no vha no dzhenwa nga mini ni tshi vhuya na ita zwo raliho? Zwino-ha a no ngo zwifhela muthu no zwifhela Mudzimu!”" 
Acts5:5 Ananiasi u pfa zwenezwo a mbo ḓi wela fhasi a fa. Vhoṱhe vhe vha zwi pfa vha farwa nga nyofho khulu. 
Acts5:6 Ha ḓa vhaṱhannga, vha putela tshitumbu tshawe vha ya vha tshi swiṱa." 
Acts5:7 Hó no fhela awara dzine dza nga swika tharu musadzi wawe a dzhena a sa ḓivhi zwe zwa itea. 
Acts5:8 Pitrosi a mu vhudzisa a ri, “Mmbudzeni! Nṋa tshelede ye inwi na munna waṋu na i wana nga tsimu yaṋu ndi yenei fhedzi?” Ene a fhindula a ri, “Ee, ndi yenei.”" 
Acts5:9 Ndi hone Pitrosi a tshi mu vhudza a ri, “Nṋa ndi zwithu-ḓe ni tshi vhuya na tou langana na munna u linga Muya wa Muṋe washu? Na zwino ndi tshi khou amba vhaṱhannga vhe vha ya u swiṱa munna waṋu khevho afho muṋangoni, na inwi vha ḓo ni hwala!”" 
Acts5:10 Kathihi fhedzi Safira a mbo ḓi wela fhasi henefho milenzheni ya Pitrosi a fa. Vhaṱhannga vha tshi dzhena vha wana o fa, vha mbo ḓi mu hwala vha ya vha mu swiṱa he vha swiṱa munna wawe." 
Acts5:11 Tshivhidzo tshoṱhe na vhoṱhe vhe vha zwi pfa vha farwa nga nyofho khulu. 
Acts5:12 Vhaapostola vho vha vha tshi ita maḓembe manzhi na mishumo i kanukisaho vhathuni. Tshivhidzo tshoṱhe tsho vha tshi tshi kuvhangana Lukumbini lwa Solomoni. 
Acts5:13 Hone a ho ngo vha na muthihi a si muṅwe ngavho we a ḓibaḓekanya navho; naho zwo ralo vha ḓi khoḓwa nga vhathu. 
Acts5:14 Vha ḓi anda vha tshi ya, nga vhanna na vhasadzi vhe vha ṱanganedza Muṋe washu;" 
Acts5:15 ha vhuya ha swika he vhalwadze vha hwalelwa mikotoni vha vhewa kha mimbete na dzithovho uri Pitrosi a tshi fhira vhaṅwe vhavho vha tou welwa nga murunzi wawe zwawo. 
Acts5:16 Ha ḓa mavhuthu manzhi a tshi bva miḓini i re tsini ha Jerusalema vha tshi ḓisa vhalwadze vhavho na vha tambudzwaho nga thuṅwa dza Saṱhane, huno vhoṱhe vha fhodzwa." 
Acts5:17 Huno tshifhe muhulu na vhoṱhe vhe vha vha vhe nae vha tshigwada tsha Vhasadukei tsha henefho, vha dzhenwa nga vivho ḽihulu vha mbo ḓi langana vhaapostola." 
Acts5:18 Vha vha fara vha vha valela dzhele. 
Acts5:19 Hone vhusiku honoho muruṅwa wa Muṋe washu a vula mahothi a dzhele, a bvisela vhaapostola nnḓa a vha vhudza a ri," 
Acts5:20 “Iyani thembeleni ni funze vhathu zwoṱhe zwa vhutshilo hovhu vhuswa.” 
Acts5:21 Vhaapostola vho no pfa zwenezwo vha ita nga u ralo; ḽi tshi tsha vha ya thembeleni vha thoma u funza. Tshifhe muhulu na vhathu vhe vha vha vhe nae vha ramba khoro ya vharangaphanḓa na vhahulwane vhoṱhe vha Israele, vha konou rumela vhaḓinḓa dzhele uri vhaapostola vha ḓiswe khoroni." 
Acts5:22 Vhaḓinḓa vhone vha tshi swika dzhele vha wana vhaapostola vha siho, vha vhuya na ḽa u ri," 
Acts5:23 “Ri tshi swika dzhele ro wana yo ḓi hoṋiwa yo tou ndwa, na vhalindi vho ḓi linda miṋango; hone ro ḓo ri ri tshi dzhena ra wana hu si na muthu!”" 
Acts5:24 Mulangammbi wa maswole a u linda thembele na vhotshifhe vhahulwane vha tshi pfa zwenezwo vha kanuka vha ri, “Izwi zwithu zwi ḓo guma ngani?”" 
Acts5:25 Ndi hone muṅwe munna a tshi ḓa a amba navho a ri, “Edzonu vhona-ha! Vhaḽa vhanna vhe na vha hoṋela dzhele khevhaḽaa thembeleni vha khou funza vhathu!”" 
Acts5:26 Ndi hone mulangammbi na vhanna vhawe vha tshi ya vha dzhia vhaapostola; hone vha sa tou zwi ita nga khani, ngauri vho vha vha tshi ofha uri vhathu vha nga vha kanḓa nga matombo." 
Acts5:27 Vha dzhenisa vhaapostola vha vha imisa phanḓa ha khoro. Tshifhe muhulu a konou vha sengisa a ri," 
Acts5:28 “Hufha ro ni laya ro tou khwaṱhisa ra ri ni songo tsha vhuya na dovha na funza nga uyo muthu; zwino edzonu vhona, no no hashekanya pfunzo yaṋu hoṱhe-hoṱhe Jerusalema! Ni ṱoḓa u ri hwesa mulandu wa malofha a hoyo muthu!”" 
Acts5:29 Pitrosi na vhaḽa vhaṅwe vhaapostola vha fhindula vha ri, “Riṋe tshashu ndi u pfa Mudzimu u fhira u pfa muthu." 
Acts5:30 Mudzimu wa vhomakhulukuku washu o vusa Yesu vhafuni, musi inwi no mu vhulaha nga u mu vhamba kha danda." 
Acts5:31 Mudzimu o mu vusa a mu vhea thungo ya tshauḽa tshawe uri vha vhuse vhoṱhe, e Murangaphanḓa na Mutshidzi, uri vhathu vha Israele vha rembuluwe vha hangwelwe." 
Acts5:32 Riṋe ri ṱhanzi dza hezwi zwithu khathihi na Muya Mukhethwa we Mudzimu a mu ruma kha vhane vha mu thetshelesa.” 
Acts5:33 Vhanna vha khoro vha tshi pfa vha tshi ralo vha tou halifha, vha ri vhaapostola kha vha vhulawe." 
Acts5:34 Hone muṅwe wavho wa Mufarisei a no pfi Gamaliele we a vha e muḓivhi wa Mulayo a huliswaho nga vhathu vhoṱhe a takuwa henefho khoroni a ri vhaapostola vha vhe vho bviselwa nnḓa," 
Acts5:35 a konou amba na khoro a ri, “Inwi vhanna vha Israele, ḓihumbuleni kha zwine na ṱoḓa u ita havha vhanna." 
Acts5:36 Zwiḽa tshiḽa tshifhinga a ho ngo ḓa Theudasi a ḓiita ene-ene a tevhelwa nga vhathu vhane vha nga swika 400? Hone o ḓo vhulawa, vhathu vhawe vha balangana naḽo ha vha u guma hazwo." 
Acts5:37 Ngavhuya nga tshiḽa tshifhinga tsha u vhalwa ha vhathu, ha bvelela Judasi wa Galelia, na ene a ḓi tevhelwa nga vhathu vha re na tshivhalo, hone a ḓi fhedza nga u vhulawa, tshigwada tshawe tshoṱhe tsha balangana." 
Acts5:38 Na henefha zwi nga ḓi ralo. Nṋe ndi tshi ni vhudza, ndi ri havha vhanna vha litsheni. Inwi sokonu vha lavhelesa ngauri arali zwine vha ita i mihumbulo ya muthu zwi ḓo pfuvha;" 
Acts5:39 hone arali zwi tshi bva kha Mudzimu ni nga si vha kone. Ni ḓo tshenuwa ni tshi vho lwa na Mudzimu.” Nyeletshedzo iyo ya Gamaliele khoro ya i ṱanganedza. 
Acts5:40 Ndi hone vha tshi vhidza vhaapostola, vha vha rwa vha vha vhudza uri vha songo tsha amba nga Yesu, vha ralo vha konou vha vhofholola." 
Acts5:41 Vhaapostola vha ṱuwa khoroni vho tou takala nge Mudzimu a vhuya a vhona vho fanelwa-vho nga u rwelwa Yesu. 
Acts5:42 Vha ḓi dzula vha tshi funza na u ḓivhadza mafhungo maḓifha a uri Mesia ndi Yesu, vha tshi funza thembeleni na miḓini ya vhathu misi yoṱhe." 
Acts6:1 Zwino misi yeneyo tshivhalo tsha vhafunziwa tshi tshi khou ḓi anda tshi tshi ya, Majuda vha ambaho Tshigiriki vha thoma u gungulela vha ambaho Tshiheberu, vha ambaho Tshigiriki vha tshi vho ri tshilikadzi dzavho a dzi vhuyi dza humbulwa-vho musi hu tshi kovhelwa vhashai zwa ḓuvha ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe." 
Acts6:2 Ndi hone vha 12 vha tshi kuvhanganya vhafunziwa vhoṱhe vha ri, “A zwo ngo fanela uri riṋe ri litshe u funza ipfi ḽa Mudzimu ri dzhene kha mafhungo a zwiḽiwa." 
Acts6:3 Zwino-ha vha hashu, ḓinangeleni vhanna vhaṱanu na vhavhili kha inwi vha ḓivheaho uri vho ḓala Muya Mukhethwa, vha re na vhuṱali, riṋe ri ḓo vha kumedza hoyo mushumo;" 
Acts6:4 tshashu ha ḓo vha u fungelela kha zwa dzithabelo na u funza ri si na tshine tsha ri thithisa.” 
Acts6:5 Mafhungo ayo avho a takadza vhafunziwa vhoṱhe, vha nanga Stefane, munna wa lutendo lwo khwaṱhaho o ḓalaho Muya Mukhethwa, na Filipi, na Prokorosi, na Nikanoro, na Timoni, na Pharamenasi, na Nikolausi wa Antiokia we a ṱanganedza Tshijuda e wa nnḓa." 
Acts6:6 Vhenevho vha ḓiswa kha vhaapostola, vhaapostola vha vha rabelela vha vha vhea zwanḓa." 
Acts6:7 Zwa ḓi ralo ipfi ḽa Mudzimu ḽa anḓadzea ḽi tshi ya, tshivhalo tsha vhafunziwa Jerusalema tsha ḓi hula tshi tshi ya, na vhotshifhe vhanzhi-vhanzhi vha ṱanganedza Muṋe washu." 
Acts6:8 Stefane o vha o shudufhadzwa vhukuma nga Mudzimu, e na maanḓa mahulu, a tshi ita maḓembe na mishumo i kanukisaho vhathuni." 
Acts6:9 Hone vhaṅwe vhanna vha iṅwe sinagogo i no pfi “Ya vhanna vho vhofhololwaho” vha thoma u mu ṱaṱisa khani. Yeneyo sinagogo yo vha i na Majuda vha Kirene na vha Alekzandria. Vhenevho na vhaṅwe Majuda vha bvaho Kilikia na Asia vha thoma u ṱaṱisa Stefane khani. 
Acts6:10 Hone Muya a ṋea Stefane vhuṱali lwe a ri a tshi amba, vhoṱhe vha kundwa na u mu hanedza." 
Acts6:11 Ndi hone vha tshi vho ṱuṱuwedza vhaṅwe vhanna tshiphirini uri vha mu ambelele vha ri, “Ro pfa a tshi khou sema Mushe na Mudzimu!”" 
Acts6:12 Vha tshi ralo vha tou vhilinganya vhathu na vhahulwane vha lushaka na vhaḓivhi vha Mulayo. Vhenevho vha ḓa vha fara Stefane vha mu isa khoroni ya Majuda. 
Acts6:13 Vha ḓisa ṱhanzi dza u zwifha, dza ri, “Hoyu munna u ṱolou sema hei thembele khethwa na Mulayo wa Mushe." 
Acts6:14 Ro tou mu pfa a tshi ri hoyo Yesu wawe wa Nazaretha u ḓo thutha thembele a shandukisa na maitele oṱhe e ra a wana kha Mushe.” 
Acts6:15 Vhoṱhe vho dzulaho khoroni vha tshi lavhelesa Stefane vha vhona tshifhaṱuwo tshawe tshi tshi nga tsha muruṅwa. 
Acts7:1 Tshifhe muhulu a vhudzisa Stefane a ri, “Nṋa zwine vha khou amba ndi zwone naa?”" 
Acts7:2 Ene a fhindula a ri, “Vha hashu, vhokhotsi anga, nthetsheleseni! Mudzimu wa vhugala o ḓivhonadza kha makhulukuku washu Abrahamu zwiḽa a tshee Misopothamia a sa athu pfulutshela Harani," 
Acts7:3 a amba nae a ri, ‘Ṱutshela vha hau na shango ḽa hau u ye shangoni ḽine nda ḓo u sumbedza.’" 
Acts7:4 Nangoho a ṱuwa shangoni ḽa Vhakhaladia a yo dzula Harani. Musi khotsi a Abrahamu o no fa, Mudzimu a ita uri a pfulutshele shangoni ḽino, ḽeneḽi ḽine na dzula khaḽo na ṋamusi." 
Acts7:5 Hone Mudzimu ho ngo mbo ḓi ṋea Abrahamu muvhundu kha heḽi shango, na vhukando zwaho! Tshi re hone Mudzimu o tou mu fulufhedzisa uri u ḓo mu fha ḽone ḽa vha ḽawe na vhaḓuhulu vhawe musi ene o no fa. Abrahamu o vha a sa athu vha na ṅwana musi Mudzimu a tshi mu fulufhedzisa nga u ralo." 
Acts7:6 Mudzimu a tshi amba nae o ri, ‘Vhaḓuhulu vhau vha ḓo dzula shangoni ḽisili; henengei vha ḓo vha dziphuli vha tambudzwa miṅwaha ya 400.’" 
Acts7:7 Mudzimu a dovha a ri, ‘Hone ndi ḓo rwa avho vhathu vhane vha ḓo vha ita dziphuli, vha ḓo ri ngavhuya vha konou bva shangoni iḽo vha ḓa u nnduvha fhano.’" 
Acts7:8 Zwo no ralo Mudzimu a laya Abrahamu uri vhatuka vha fumbe, tshi vhe tshiga tsha mulanga wawe. Ndi zwe Isaka a ri u fhedza vhege o bebiwa, Abrahamu a mu fumbisa, na Isaka o ḓi fumbisa Jakopo, Jakopo a fumbisa vhomakhulukuku vha 12 vha matsinde a lushaka lwashu." 
Acts7:9 “Vhenevho vhomakhulukuku washu nga vivho vha rengisa Josefa a yo vha phuli Egipita. Naho zwo ralo Mudzimu a vha nae 
Acts7:10 a mu lamukisa khomboni dzoṱhe dze a ṱangana nadzo, a tshi ḓi mu ṋea vhuthu na vhuṱali zwi takadzaho Farao khosi ya Egipita, lwe a vhuya a mu ita gota ḽihulwane ḽa shango ḽoṱhe ḽa Egipita, na muṱani wa musanda." 
Acts7:11 Ha mbo wa nḓala khulu kha ḽoṱhe ḽa Egipita na ḽa Kanana, ha vha na u shengela huhulu, vhomakhulukuku washu vha si tsha kona na u wana zwiḽiwa." 
Acts7:12 Jakopo a tshi pfa uri Egipita hu na mavhele, a ruma vhomakhulukuku washu henengei lwa u thoma." 
Acts7:13 Musi vha tshi ya lwa vhuvhili Josefa a ḓiḓivhadza kha vhakomana vhawe; na khosi Farao ha vha hu hone a tshi ḓivha-vho zwa vha ha Josefa. 
Acts7:14 Ndi hone Josefa a tshi laedzela uri khotsi awe Jakopo na muṱa wawe woṱhe vha ḓe Egipita. Misi iyo muṱa wa Jakopo wo vha u na vhathu vha no swika 75 fhedzi. 
Acts7:15 Ndi hone Jakopo na vhomakhulukuku washu vha tshi tsela Egipita, vha vhuya vha fela henengei." 
Acts7:16 Huno zwitumbu zwavho zwa humiselwa Shikheme zwa swiṱwa tshaloni tshe Abrahamu a tshi renga nga tshelede i si na vhukono kha vhana vha Hamoro. 
Acts7:17 “Musi tshifhinga tshi tshi swika tsha uri Mudzimu a ite zwe a fulufhedzisa Abrahamu, tshivhalo tsha vhathu vha hashu Egipita tsho vha tshi si na vhukono." 
Acts7:18 Vhuhosini ha Egipita ha vhuya ha dzhena muṅwe a sa ḓivhi zwa Josefa. 
Acts7:19 Onoyo a thoma u itela vhathu vha hashu vhukwila, a itela vhomakhulukuku washu tshiṱuhu tshihulu a tshi ita na u vha kombetshedza uri vha ṅaledze vhana vhavho vha fe." 
Acts7:20 Ndi nga tshifhinga tshenetsho hu tshi bebwa Mushe, ṅwana o nakesaho. Onoyo a leliwa hayani miṅwedzi miraru." 
Acts7:21 Ha vha hone a tshi vhewa ḓakani, a dobiwa nga ṅwananyana wa Farao, uyo a mu alusa o mu ita ṅwana wawe." 
Acts7:22 Mushe a funziwa vhuṱali hoṱhe ha Vhaegipita, maipfi awe a vha na tshileme, na mishumo yawe ya vha mihulu." 
Acts7:23 “Musi Mushe e na miṅwaha ya 40, a humbula u yo ṱola Vhaisraele vha hawe." 
Acts7:24 A wana muṅwe a tshi khou shengedzwa nga Muegipita, ene a ya a mu lamulela, a ita na u mu lifhedzela nga u vhulaha uyo Muegipita." 
Acts7:25 O vha a tshi humbula uri vhathu vha hawe vha ḓo pfesesa uri Mudzimu u ḓo vha vhofholola ngae, matsina vhone a vha nga zwi pfesesi." 
Acts7:26 Nga matshelo a wana Vhaisraele vhavhili vha tshi khou lwa a edzisa u vha lamula. A amba navho a ri, ‘Hee vhanna vha hashu, zwino ni ḓo ri ni khou lwelani ni vhathu vhathihi?’" 
Acts7:27 Uyo we a levhela wa hawe a sukumedzela Mushe kule a ri, ‘Nṋa ndi nnyi o ni vheaho u vha murangaphanḓa na muhaṱuli washu?" 
Acts7:28 Ni khou ṱoḓa u mmbulaha sa uḽa Muegipita we na mu vhulaha mulovha?’ 
Acts7:29 Mushe a tshi pfa zwenezwo a mbo ḓi shavha Egipita a yo dzula Midiani. Henengei o ḓo beba vhana vhavhili vha vhatuka. 
Acts7:30 “Ho no fhela miṅwe miṅwaha ya 40 muruṅwa a ḓivhonadza kha Mushe nga khavhu i kha tshiṱaka tsha muunga sogani, tsini ha thavha ya Sinai." 
Acts7:31 Iḽo bono ḽa akhamadza Mushe, hone a tshi sendela tsini uri a tou vhona zwavhuḓi, a pfa ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽi tshi ri," 
Acts7:32 ‘Ndi Nṋe Mudzimu wa vhomakhulukuku wau, Mudzimu wa Abrahamu na Isaka na Jakopo.’ Mushe a tou tetemela nga nyofho a tata na u lavhelesa." 
Acts7:33 Muṋe washu Ene a amba nae a ri, ‘Bvula thovho dzau ngauri hafho he wa ima hone ndi fhethu hukhethwa." 
Acts7:34 Ndo lavhelesa nda vhona u shengela ha vhathu vhanga ngei Egipita. U gomela havho ndo hu pfa; na zwino ndo tsela u vha lamulela. Zwino litsha ndi rume iwe Egipita.’ 
Acts7:35 “Onoyo Mushe ndi ene we vha mu landula vha ri, ‘Ndi nnyi o ni rumaho u vha murangaphanḓa na muhaṱuli washu?’ ngeno e ene we Mudzimu a vho ḓo mu ruma nga muruṅwa fhaḽa tshiṱakani uri a vhe ene murangaphanḓa na mulamuleli wavho." 
Acts7:36 Ndi ene we a pfulusa vhathu Egipita, a ita na maḓembe na zwimangadzo shangoni ḽa Egipita na Lwanzheni Lutswuku, a ḓi ralo miṅwaha ya 40 vhe sogani." 
Acts7:37 U tshee onoyo Mushe we a ri a tshi amba na vhathu vha Israele a ri, ‘Mudzimu o ḓo ni rumela muporofita ane a ḓo vha wa lushaka lwa haṋu, sa zwe a ruma nṋe.’" 
Acts7:38 Ndi onoyo Mushe we a vha e na tshivhidzo tsha Israele sogani a dovha a ri a tshee ene a vhudza vhomakhulukuku washu zwe muruṅwa a amba nae thavhani ya Sinai. Ndi ene we a ṱanganedza ndayo dzi tshidzaho kha Mudzimu uri a dzi swikise kha riṋe. 
Acts7:39 “Vhomakhulukuku washu vhone vho lamba zwine a vha vhudza vha mu sendedza kule, mbilu dzavho dzó no rembulutshela Egipita." 
Acts7:40 Ndi zwe vha vhudza Aroni vha ri, ‘Ri itele midzimu ine ya ḓo ri ranga phanḓa, ngauri uyo Mushe we a sokou ri bvisa Egipita a ri ḓivhi tsho mu welaho.’" 
Acts7:41 Zwenezwo vha ḓivhumbela mboho ya tshitungulo, vha i ṋekedza nduvho, vha ita na munyanya vha tshi pembelela zwe vha ita nga zwanḓa zwavho." 
Acts7:42 Ndi hone Mudzimu a tshi vha furalela a vha litsha, vha rabela ṋaledzi dza ṱaḓulu, vhunga zwo ṅwaliwa kha bugu ya vhaporofita ha pfi, “ ‘Inwi vhathu vha Israele, nṋa ni tshi ṋekedza nduvho na zwiṱhavhelo miṅwaha ya 40 sogani, ho vha hu u luvha Nṋe naa?" 
Acts7:43 Dennde ye na vha no hwala yo vha i si ya Molokho kani? Tshifanyiso tsha ṋaledzi tsho vha tshi si tsha mudzimu waṋu Refani? A si zwone zwifanyiso zwe na tou ita uri ni zwi gwadamele kani? Zwino-ha ndi ḓo ni isa vhuthubwa kule, phanḓa ha Babele.’" 
Acts7:44 “Henengei sogani vhomakhulukuku washu vho vha vhe na Dennde ya Vhuṱanzi, yo tou itwa nga he Mudzimu a laedza Mushe, hu tshi tevhedzwa tshivhumbeo tshe a mu sumbedza." 
Acts7:45 Ngavhuya vhomakhulukuku washu vha sielwa iyo Dennde nga vhokhotsi avho, vha i hwala vho rangwa phanḓa nga Joshua, Mudzimu a konou pandela dzitshakha, vhone vha thuba shango ḽadzo. Vha ḓi sielana yeneyo Dennde nga u ralo u swika tshifhinga tsha Dafita." 
Acts7:46 Onoyo Dafita a takadza Mudzimu, a vhuya a tou ri, ‘Kha ndi tendelwe u fhaṱela Mudzimu wa Jakopo nnḓu.’" 
Acts7:47 Hone we a vho ḓo sala a tshi fhaṱela Mudzimu iyo nnḓu ndi Solomoni. 
Acts7:48 “Naho zwo ralo, Waṱaḓuluṱaḓulu ha dzuli nḓuni yo fhaṱwaho nga vhathu. Ndi zwine muporofita a ri," 
Acts7:49 “ ‘Muṋe washu u ri: Ḽiṱaḓulu ndi khuluṋoni yanga; ḽifhasi ndi vhukando ha milenzhe yanga; zwino ni nga mphaṱela nnḓu-ḓe? Ndi vhuya nda lila hune nda nga awela hone? 
Acts7:50 Nṋa izwi zwithu zwoṱhe a zwo ngo itwa nga Nṋe?’ 
Acts7:51 “Nṋa ni tou vha na tshikhuna-ḓe! Khezwi mbilu dzaṋu na nḓevhe dzaṋu dzi tshi tou nga dza vhannḓa vha songo fumbaho! No tou dzhia zwone zwa vhomakhulukuku waṋu vhukuma. Na inwi tshifhinga tshoṱhe ni ḓi itela Muya Mukhethwa tshipimbi! 
Acts7:52 Ndi ufhio muporofita we vhomakhulukuku waṋu vha si mu tovhole? Hufha vho ḓi vhulaha na vhaḓinḓa vha Mudzimu vhe zwiḽa kale-kale vha ḓa u ḓivhadza u ḓa ha Muḓinḓa wawe muvhuya! Zwino inwi no tou fheṱa Ene muṋe vhukuma na mu vhulaha! 
Acts7:53 Hufha vhe inwi vhe na ṱanganedza Mulayo wa Mudzimu u tshi ḓiswa nga vharuṅwa, na fhedza na si u vhulunge?”" 
Acts7:54 Musi vhanna vha khoro vha tshi pfa Stefane a tshi ralo, vha tou halifha tshoṱhe vha shenganya maṋo nga mbiti." 
Acts7:55 Stefane ene a lilala ṱaḓulu o ḓala Muya Mukhethwa a vhona vhugala ha Mudzimu, na Yesu o ima thungo ya tshanḓa tshauḽa tshawe, a ri," 
Acts7:56 “Ndi khou vhona ḽiṱaḓulu ḽo vulea, na Mubebwa-nga-muthu khouḽaa o ima thungo ya tshanḓa tshauḽa tsha Mudzimu!”" 
Acts7:57 Vhone vha mbo zhamba vho tou thivha na nḓevhe nga minwe, kathihi fhedzi vhoṱhe vha vha vho no mu wela nṱha," 
Acts7:58 vha mbo ḓi mu bvisela nnḓa ha muḓi, vha mu kanḓa nga matombo. Ṱhanzi dza sia nguvho dzadzo na muṅwe muṱhannga a no pfi Saulo." 
Acts7:59 Vhathu vha ḓi mu kanḓa, ene a tshi khou ḓi vhidzelela Muṋe washu a tshi ri, “Yesu Muṋe wanga, ṱanganedza muya wanga!”" 
Acts7:60 A wa nga magona, a ṱavha mukosi a ri, “Muṋe wanga, vha hangwele vhutshinyi uvhu!” A ri u ralo a welela." 
Acts8:1 Saulo na ene a zwi takalela vha tshi vhulaha Stefane. U bva ḽeneḽo ḓuvha tshivhidzo tsha Jerusalema tsha thoma u tovholwa nga tshiṱuhu tshihulu. Vhakhriste vhoṱhe vha balanganywa na mivhundu yoṱhe ya Judia na Samaria. Vhe vha sala Jerusalema ndi vhaapostola fhedzi. 
Acts8:2 Vhaṅwe vhanna vha ofhaho Mudzimu vha swiṱa Stefane tshililo tshi tshihulu. 
Acts8:3 Saulo ene a linga u pwashekanya tshivhidzo; a enda na miḓi ya Vhakhriste a tshi kokodza vhanna na vhasadzi a vha kudza dzhele. 
Acts8:4 Vhaḽa Vhakhriste vhe vha balanganywa vha enda vha tshi ḓivhadza mafhungo maḓifha thungo dzoṱhe. 
Acts8:5 Filipi ene o tsela muḓini muṅwe wa Samaria a ḓivhadza vhathu nga Khristo. 
Acts8:6 Magogo a tshi pfa Filipi na u vhona maḓembe e a ita, ha thetshelesa vhanzhi zwe Filipi a vha a tshi vha vhudza, hu si na a hanedzaho." 
Acts8:7 Thuṅwa dza Saṱhane dza bva kha vhathu vhanzhi dzi tshi tshema, ha fhodzwa na vhanzhi vho omaho miraḓo, na zwihole;" 
Acts8:8 ḽi si vhe ḽone dakalo afho muḓini. 
Acts8:9 Muḓini wonoyo ho vha hu tshi dzula muṅwe munna a no pfi Simoni, we a vha o no fhedza tshifhinga a tshi akhamadza vhathu vha Samaria nga manditi awe, a tshi vho tou ḓiita ene-ene." 
Acts8:10 Vhathu vhoṱhe, vhahulwane na vhaṱuku henefho muḓini vho vha vho no tou vhea mbilu dzavho khae. Vhoṱhe vha tshi mu amba vho vha vha tshi vho ri, “Uḽa Mudzimu ane a pfi ‘Maanḓa Mahulu’ o tou ḓa nga ṋama – ndi Simoni onoyu.”" 
Acts8:11 Ho vha ho no fhela tshifhinga a tshi khou vha akhamadza nga manditi awe, vhoṱhe vha tshi vho fulufhela ene." 
Acts8:12 Hone musi Filipi o vha ḓivhadza mafhungo maḓifha a muvhuso wa Mudzimu na Yesu Khristo, vha a ṱanganedza vha lovhedzwa vhoṱhe, vhanna na vhasadzi." 
Acts8:13 Zwino na ene Simoni a tenda, a ri u lovhedzwa a si tsha vhuya a ṱutshela kule na Filipi, maḓembe na zwimangadzo zwe zwa vha zwi tshi khou itwa nga Filipi zwa tou mu akhamadza." 
Acts8:14 Vhaapostola vha Jerusalema vha tshi pfa uri vhathu vha Samaria na vhone vho ṱanganedza ipfi ḽa Mudzimu, vha rumela Pitrosi na Johanisi khavho." 
Acts8:15 Vha tshi swika vha vha rabelela uri vha ṋewe Muya Mukhethwa; 
Acts8:16 ngauri Muya Mukhethwa o vha a sa athu tsela na kha muthihi wavho, vhó sokou lovhedzwa fhedzi uri vha vhe vha Muṋe washu Yesu." 
Acts8:17 Ndi hone Pitrosi na Johanisi vha tshi vha vhea zwanḓa, vha mbo ḓi ṱanganedza Muya Mukhethwa." 
Acts8:18 Simoni a tshi vhona uri vhaapostola vho ri u vha vhea zwanḓa vha ṱanganedza Muya Mukhethwa, a vha ṋea tshelede," 
Acts8:19 a ri, “Kha ndi fhiwe-vho haya maanḓa, uri na nṋe muthu ane nda mu vhea zwanḓa a ṱanganedze Muya Mukhethwa.”" 
Acts8:20 Pitrosi a tshi fhindula a ri, “Lovhani na tshelede yaṋu! Ni vhona unga ni nga renga tshifhiwa tsha Mudzimu nga tshelede!" 
Acts8:21 Inwi mushumo hoyu a wo ngo vhuya wa ni fanela, ngauri Mudzimu u vhona mbilu yaṋu i si na ngoho." 
Acts8:22 Ḽaṱani-ha vhuvhi hovhu haṋu, ni rabele Mudzimu uri a ni hangwele heyo mihumbulo yaṋu mivhi." 
Acts8:23 Nṋe ndi khou zwi vhona uri ni na mbilu mmbi, vhuvhi ho tou ni vhofha tshoṱhe.”" 
Acts8:24 Simoni a fhindula a ri, “Vhathu vha hashu, nthabeleleni ha Muṋe washu uri ndi si welwe na nga tshithihi tsha zwe na amba!”" 
Acts8:25 Musi vho no ṱanziela Yesu na u amba ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu, vha humela Jerusalema, vha tshi enda vha tshi ḓivhadza mafhungo maḓifha na miḓi ya Vhasamaria." 
Acts8:26 Muṅwe muruṅwa wa Muṋe washu a amba na Filipi a ri, “Takuwa u livhe thungo ya tshipembe nga gondo ḽine ḽa bva Jerusalema ḽi tshi ya Gaza.” (Gondo ḽeneḽo zwino ndi fela)." 
Acts8:27 Nangoho Filipi a mbo ḓi takuwa. Zwino muṅwe munna wa gota ḽa Ethopia o vha e nḓilani a tshi ya hayani. Munna onoyo o vha e muthu muhulwane, e mufaragwama wa khosi ya Ethopia ya musadzi we a vha a tshi pfi Kandatse. O vha o tou luvhedzwa, a si tsha vhalwa na vhanna. Zwino o vha a tshi khou bva Jerusalema u rabela Mudzimu, a tshi khou tshimbila nga gariki yawe, a tshi enda a tshi vhala bugu ya muporofita Yesaya." 
Acts8:28  
Acts8:29 Muya Mukhethwa a amba na Filipi a ri, “Sendela u tshimbile tsini ha gariki heyo.”" 
Acts8:30 Filipi a tshi gidimela khae, a pfa a tshi khou vhala bugu ya muporofita Yesaya. Ndi hone a tshi mu vhudzisa a ri, “Zwine vha khou vhala vha khou zwi pfa naa?”" 
Acts8:31 Uyo munna a tshi fhindula a ri, “Ndi nga zwi pfa hani hu si na ane a nṱalutshedza?” U ralo a mbo ḓi humbela Filipi uri a namele gariki vha tshimbile vhoṱhe." 
Acts8:32 Mafhungo e a vha a tshi khou vhala one Maṅwaloni ndi aḽa a no ri, “O vha a tshi tou nga nngu i tshi ya u ṱhavhiwa; a nga ngwana i sa lili i tshi vheulwa; ho ngo vhuya a amba tshithu." 
Acts8:33 Vho tamba ngae, hu si vhe na we a mu ambela. Ndi nnyi ane a nga sumba vhaḓuhulu vhawe? Hufha vhutshilo hawe fhano shangoni ho tumulwa.”" 
Acts8:34 Gota iḽo ḽa vhudzisa Filipi ḽa ri, “Nga vha dzou mmbudza, muporofita a tshi ralo u khou amba nnyi? Ndi u ḓiamba kana ndi u amba muṅwe?”" 
Acts8:35 Filipi a thoma nga tshipiḓa tshenetsho tsha Maṅwalo tshe tsha vhaliwa, a vhudza iḽo gota mafhungo maḓifha a Yesu Khristo." 
Acts8:36 Ha ri vha tshi khou ḓi tsa na gondo ḽeneḽo, vha swika huṅwe fhethu hu re na maḓi. Gota iḽo ḽa ri: “Maḓi ngea! Tshi nkundisaho u lovhedzwa ndi mini?” [" 
Acts8:37 Filipi a tshi mu fhindula a ri, “Vha nga ḓi lovhedzwa arali vha tshi fulufhela Yesu Khristo nga mbilu yavho yoṱhe.” Uyo a fhindula a ri, “Vhukuma, nṋe ndi a tenda uri Yesu Khristo ndi Murwa wa Mudzimu.”]" 
Acts8:38 Ndi hone uyo munna a tshi imisa gariki, ene na Filipi vha tsela maḓini, Filipi a mu lovhedza." 
Acts8:39 Musi vha tshi bva maḓini, Muya wa Muṋe washu a mbo ḓi hwala Filipi a ṱuwa nae, uyo munna a si tsha mu vhona; a ḓifarela nḓila yawe o takala." 
Acts8:40 Filipi ene a kanuka o no vha Ashidodo; u bva afho a dzhena miḓini yoṱhe a tshi enda a tshi funza mafhungo maḓifha a vhuya a swika Khisaria. 
Acts9:1 Saulo zwi tshi khou ralo o vha a kha ḓi halifhela vhafunziwa vha Muṋe washu, a tshi ri vha vhulawe. A ya ha tshifhe muhulu" 
Acts9:2 a humbela maṅwalo a u ḓiswikisa sinagogoni dzi re Damasko uri arali a tshi wana vhaṅwe vho faraho Nḓila ya Khristo, vhanna kana vhasadzi, a vha fare a vha ḓise Jerusalema." 
Acts9:3 Musi e nḓilani a tshi vho swika Damasko, kathihi fhedzi a mbo ḓi penyelwa nga tshedza tshi tshi bva ṱaḓulu, tsha tou mu putela." 
Acts9:4 A wela fhasi a pfa ipfi ḽi tshi khou amba nae ḽi tshi ri, “Saulo, Saulo, u ntovholelani?”" 
Acts9:5 Ene a vhudzisa a ri, “Muṋe wanga, ndi nga vha ndi khou amba na nnyi?” Ipfi ḽa ri, “Ndi Nṋe Yesu ane wa khou mu tovhola."
