Acts9:6 Zwino takuwa u dzhene afho muḓini, ndi hone hune wa ḓo vhudzwa zwine wa fanela u ita.”" 
Acts9:7 Vhaḽa vhanna vhe vha vha vha tshi khou tshimbila nae vho vha vho no sokou hanganea; ipfi ḽone vho vha vha tshi ḽi pfa, ngeno vha sa vhoni muthu;" 
Acts9:8 Saulo a tshi vuwa, a tshi ri ndi a bonyolola maṱo, a si tsha kona u vhona. Vha mu fara nga tshanḓa vha dzhena nae Damasko." 
Acts9:9 Ha fhela maḓuvha mararu a sa koni u vhona, a sa ḽi, a sa nwi tshithu." 
Acts9:10 Zwino henefho Damasko ho vha hu na muṅwe mufunziwa a no pfi Ananiasi. Onoyo a vhona Muṋe washu kha bono a tshi khou amba nae a tshi ri, “Ananiasi!” Ene a fhindula a ri, “Ndi fhano Muṋe wanga.”" 
Acts9:11 Muṋe washu a amba nae a ri, “Takuwa u ye nḓuni ya Judasi kha Tshiṱaraṱatswititi. Henefho u humbele u amba na muṅwe munna wa Tharasisi a no pfi Saulo. Nga tshifhinga hetshi u khou rabela," 
Acts9:12 nahone o no ḓi vhona bono ḽa muthu ane a pfi Ananiasi a tshi ḓa a mu vhea zwanḓa uri a dovhe a vhone.” 
Acts9:13 Ananiasi a fhindula a ri, “Muṋe wanga, hoyo munna vhathu vhanzhi a vha mu ambesi; vha ri zwe a ita vhathu vhau Jerusalema a si zwiṱuku." 
Acts9:14 Na u ḓa hawe fhano, o ḓa o fhiwa maanḓa nga vhotshifhe vhahulwane uri a fare vhoṱhe vhane vha luvha Iwe.”" 
Acts9:15 Muṋe washu a amba nae a ri, “Iya, muthu uyo ndi muḓinḓa we nda ḓinangela uri a nnḓivhadze kha vhannḓa na mahosi avho, a ralo na kha vhathu vha Israele." 
Acts9:16 Ndi kha ḓi ḓo mu sumbedza uri u ḓo tambudzwa zwingafhani a tshi tambudzelwa Nṋe.” 
Acts9:17 Ndi hone Ananiasi a tshi takuwa a ya nḓuni yeneyo. A ri u swika a vhea Saulo zwanḓa, a ri, “Saulo murathu wanga, Muṋe washu o nthuma, onoyo Yesu we na mu vhona nḓilani ni tshi ḓa. O nthuma uri ni dovhe ni vhone na uri ni ḓadzwe Muya Mukhethwa.”" 
Acts9:18 Zwenezwo ha mbo ḓi bva zwithu zwi no nga makwanda a khovhe maṱoni a Saulo, a dovha a vhona. A takuwa a lovhedzwa;" 
Acts9:19 a konou ḽa, miraḓo yawe ya dovha ya khwaṱha. Saulo o ita maḓuvhanyana a tshi dzula na vhafunziwa henefho Damasko." 
Acts9:20 O ri u lovhedzwa a mbo ḓi ya dzisinagogoni a ḓivhadza Yesu kha vhathu a tshi tou ri, “Yesu ndi Ene Murwa wa Mudzimu.”" 
Acts9:21 Vhoṱhe vhe vha mu pfa vha akhamala vha ri, “Nṋa uyu munna a si ene uḽa we a vha a tshi linga u lozwa vhathu vha luvhaho Yesu ngei Jerusalema? Zwino u vhuya a ḓa fhano ho vha hu si hone u ṱoḓa u fara vhathu vho raloho a vha isa ha vhotshifhe vhahulwane?”" 
Acts9:22 Maanḓa a pfunzo ya Saulo a ḓi hula a tshi ya, na Majuda vha Damasko vha si tsha zwi kona, ngauri o vha a tshi ṱalutshedza zwa vhonala uri Yesu ndi Ene Mesia." 
Acts9:23 Hó no vha maḓuvha Majuda vha langana u vhulaha Saulo," 
Acts9:24 hone ene a pfa zwe vha vha vha tshi ṱoḓa u mu ita. Vha mu lalela khoroni vhusiku na masiari uri vha mu vhulahe. 
Acts9:25 Hone ḽiṅwe ḓuvha vhafunziwa vhawe vha mu dzhia vhusiku vha mu bvisa nga buli ḽa mutsheṱo vha mu tsisela fhasi nga tshirundu. 
Acts9:26 Saulo a tshi swika Jerusalema a linga u ḓibaḓekanya na vhafunziwa. Vhone vha si kone u fulufhela tshoṱhe uri o no vha mufunziwa, vhoṱhe vha tshi ḓi mu ofha." 
Acts9:27 Ndi hone Barnabasi a tshi mu dzhia a mu swikisa kha vhaapostola. A vha anetshela a Saulo a tshi vhona Muṋe washu nḓilani na uri Muṋe washu o ita na u tou amba nae. A vha vhudza uri Saulo o vha a tshi khou funza nga dzina ḽa Yesu Damasko a sa ofhi. 
Acts9:28 Ndi hone Saulo a tshi vho dzula navho vha tshi tshimbila hoṱhe Jerusalema, ene a tshi funza nga dzina ḽa Muṋe washu a sa ofhi tshithu." 
Acts9:29 O vha a tshi ḓi ita a tshi amba na Majuda vha ambaho Tshigiriki, a tshi hanedzana navho, vhone vha vho dzula vha tshi ṱoḓa u mu vhulaha." 
Acts9:30 Vhakhriste ngae vha tshi zwi pfa vha mu dzhia vha tsa nae Khisaria, vha konou mu shavhisela Tharasisi." 
Acts9:31 Tshivhidzo tshone kha ḽoṱhe ḽa Judia na Galelia na Samaria tsha sa tsha diniwa. Tsha ḓi khwaṱha tshi tshi fariswa nga Muya Mukhethwa, tsha aluwa tshi tshi ya, tsha dzula tshi tshi ofha Mudzimu." 
Acts9:32 Pitrosi o vhuya a ri a tshi khou dalela fhano na fhano, a swika na kha vhathu vha Mudzimu vha re Lida." 
Acts9:33 Henefho a wana muṅwe munna a no pfi Eniasi we a vha o oma miraḓo, zwi tshi vho ita miṅwaha miṱanu na miraru e thovhoni." 
Acts9:34 Pitrosi a amba nae a ri, “Eniasi, Yesu u ri fholani. Zwino vuwani ni adzulule thovho yaṋu.” Eniasi a mbo ḓi vuwa na zwenezwo." 
Acts9:35 Vhathu vhoṱhe vha Lida na vha shango ḽa Sharoni vha tshi mu vhona, vha mbo ḓi rembuluwa vha vha vha Muṋe washu." 
Acts9:36 Jopa ho vha hu na muṅwe musadzi wa Mukhriste we a vha a tshi pfi Thabitha (zwine zwa amba uri “Tsephe”). Onoyo o vha a tshi dzula nga u tonda vhashai na u vha vhavhalela tshifhinga tshoṱhe. 
Acts9:37 Nga tshifhinga tshenetsho a lwala a fa. Tshitumbu tshawe tsha ṱanzwiwa tsha vheiwa kamarani ya tshitizi. 
Acts9:38 Zwino vhunga Jopa ho vha hu sa tou vha kulesa na Lida, vhafunziwa vha henefho vha tshi pfa uri Pitrosi u Lida, vha ruma vhanna vhavhili na ipfi ḽi no ri, “Nga vha ṱavhanye vha ḓe ngeno.”" 
Acts9:39 Pitrosi a mbo ḓi takuwa a ṱuwa navho. A tshi swika vha mu isa henengei kamarani ya tshitizi. Dzitshilikadzi dza mu kuvhanganela dzoṱhe dzi tshi khou lila, vha mu sumbedza dzirokho na dzibadzhi dze Dorokasi a dzi rungela a tshi kha ḓi tshila." 
Acts9:40 Pitrosi a vha thathela nnḓa vhoṱhe a gwadama a rabela, a konou rembuluwa a amba na tshitumbu a ri, “Thabitha, vuwani!” Mufu a bonyolola maṱo, musi a tshi vhona Pitrosi a vuwa a dzula." 
Acts9:41 Pitrosi a isa tshanḓa a mu takusa. Ndi hone a tshi vhidza vhathu vha Mudzimu, na dzitshilikadzi, a vha ṋea Thabitha a tshi tshila." 
Acts9:42 Mafhungo enea a tshi pfala muḓini woṱhe wa Jopa, vhathu vhanzhi vha ṱanganedza Muṋe washu." 
Acts9:43 Henefho Jopa Pitrosi a fhedza maḓuvha manzhi a tshi dzula na Simoni musuki wa marevho. 
Acts10:1 Muḓini wa Khisaria ho vha hu na muṅwe munna a no pfi Khorneliasi. Onoyo o vha e mulangagomane wa mmbi ya Vharoma ye ya vha i tshi pfi Mmbi ya Italia. 
Acts10:2 Ene na muṱa wawe woṱhe vho vha vha tshi ofha Mudzimu vha tshi dzula vha tshi rabela. O vha a tshi vhavhalela vhashai vha Majuda nga zwithu zwinzhi, a tshi dzula a tshi rabela tshifhinga tshoṱhe." 
Acts10:3 Ḽiṅwe ḓuvha henefha nga tshifhinga tsha vhuraru tsha masiari a vhona bono, kha bono ḽeneḽo a vhona muruṅwa wa Mudzimu zwavhuḓivhuḓi a tshi dzhena a amba nae a ri, “Khorneliasi!”" 
Acts10:4 Ene a mu lavhelesa o tshenuwa a ri, “Ndi mini muṋe wanga?” Muruṅwa a ri, “Thabelo dzau na mishumo yau ya u vhavhalela vhashai Mudzimu o zwi vhona, a zwi ṱanganedza sa nduvho." 
Acts10:5 Zwino ruma vhanna Jopa uri vha yo vhidza Simoni ane ḽiṅwe a pfi Pitrosi. 
Acts10:6 Onoyo ndi mueni wa Simoni musuki wa marevho ane haya hawe ha vha tsini ha lwanzhe.” 
Acts10:7 Uḽa muruṅwa we a vha a tshi khou amba nae o no ṱuwa, Khorneliasi a vhidza vhashumi vhawe vha nḓuni vhavhili, na muṅwe wa maswole a u mu linda, a ofhaho Mudzimu," 
Acts10:8 a vha toololela zwoṱhe a konou vha ruma Jopa. 
Acts10:9 Nga matshelo vhe nḓilani, vha tshi vho sendela Jopa, ḓuvha ḽi nṱha ha ṱhoho, Pitrosi a vha a tshi khou gonya kha ṱhanga ya nnḓu u yo rabela." 
Acts10:10 A farwa nga nḓala a pfa a tshi tou tama zwiḽiwa. Musi zwi tshi kha ḓi bikwa a pfa e Muyani," 
Acts10:11 a vhona ḽiṱaḓulu ḽo vulea hu tshi khou tsiswa tshithu tshi no tou nga pesa ḽihulu ḽa seila ḽo farwa nga khuḓa dzaḽo nṋa. 
Acts10:12 Nga ngomu ho vha hu na phukha dza tshakha-tshakha khathihi na zwiṋoni na zwi tshimbilaho nga thumbu. 
Acts10:13 A pfa ipfi ḽi tshi amba nae ḽa ri, “Pitrosi takuwa, u shidzhe u ḽe!”" 
Acts10:14 Hone Pitrosi a ri, “Aiwa nandi Muṋe wanga! Hufha ndi sa athu vhuya nda ḽa tshithu tsho iledzwaho kana tsho kumalaho!”" 
Acts10:15 Ipfi ḽa dovha ḽa ri, “Zwe Mudzimu a ri zwo kumululwa, iwe u songo ri zwo kumala.”" 
Acts10:16 Zwa ralo zwa vhuya zwa ita kararu; tshiḽa tshithu tsha konou dovha tsha humiselwa ṱaḓulu. 
Acts10:17 Pitrosi a tshi kha ḓi vha o kanuka a sa ḓivhi uri bono iḽo ḽi nga vha ḽi tshi amba mini, vhaḽa vhanna vho rumiwaho nga Khorneliasi vho vha vho no zwi pfa uri nnḓu ya Simoni ndi yeneyo, vhó no ima muṋangoni." 
Acts10:18 Vha vhidzelela vha tshi vhudzisa arali hu na mueni henefho a no pfi Simoni, ḽiṅwe a pfi Pitrosi." 
Acts10:19 Pitrosi a tshi kha ḓi elekanya uri bono iḽo ḽi nga vha ḽi tshi amba mini, Muya a amba a ri, “Ho ḓa vhanna vhavhili vhane vha khou u ṱoḓa." 
Acts10:20 Zwino ṱavhanya u tse, u ṱuwe navho u sa timatimi; ndi Nṋe ndo vha rumaho.”" 
Acts10:21 Ndi hone Pitrosi a tshi tsa a ya kha vhaḽa vhanna a ri, “Muthu ane na khou ṱoḓa ene ndi nṋe. No ḓelani?”" 
Acts10:22 Vhone vha fhindula vha ri, “Ro ruṅwa nga Khorneliasi wa mulangagomane. Ndi munna muvhuya a ofhaho Mudzimu, ane Majuda vhoṱhe vha mu amba zwavhuḓi. O laiwa nga muruṅwa wa Mudzimu uri a vha vhidze vha ye nḓuni yawe, a pfe zwine vha ḓo mu vhudza.”" 
Acts10:23 Pitrosi a vha swielela vha eḓela. Nga matshelo a ṱuwa navho, na vhaṅwe Vhakhriste ngae vha Jopa." 
Acts10:24 Nga mbamatshelo a swika Khisaria, a wana Khorneliasi o dzula o mu lindela o vhidza na mashaka na khonani dzawe vhukuma." 
Acts10:25 Pitrosi a tshi ṱoḓa u dzhena, Khorneliasi a mu ṱanganedza, a gwadama phanḓa hawe a losha." 
Acts10:26 Hone Pitrosi a mu takusa a ri, “Kha vha takuwe; na nṋe ndi muthu sa vhone.”" 
Acts10:27 Pitrosi a dzhena nḓuni a tshi khou ḓi amba na Khorneliasi, a wana ho kuvhangana vhathu vhanzhi." 
Acts10:28 A amba navho a ri, “Inwi vhaṋe ni a zwi ḓivha zwavhuḓi uri zwi a ila kha Mujuda u konana na wa luṅwe lushaka kana u mu dalela. Hone nṋe Mudzimu o ntsumbedza uri ndi songo vhuya nda ri muṅwe muthu u na tshika kana zwi a ila u konana nae." 
Acts10:29 Ndi zwe ni tshi mmbidza nda mbo ḓi dzhena nḓilani nda si vhuye nda lamba. Zwino ndi vhidzelwani-ha?” 
Acts10:30 Khorneliasi a ri, “Mbamulovhauḽa nga tshifhinga tshenetshino tsha vhuraru tsha masiari, ndo vha ndi tshi khou rabela nḓuni yanga, kathihi fhedzi nda vhona phanḓa hanga ho ima munna wa zwiambaro zwi penyaho," 
Acts10:31 a ri, ‘Khorneliasi, Mudzimu o pfa thabelo yau, na u vhavhalela hau vhashai o hu vhona." 
Acts10:32 Zwino ruma vhathu Jopa vha ye vha u vhidzele muṅwe munna a no pfi Simoni, ḽiṅwe u pfi Pitrosi. Vha ḓo mu wana e mueni wa Simoni musuki wa mikumba a dzulaho tsini ha lwanzhe.’" 
Acts10:33 Nṋe nda mbo ḓi ruma vhathu u vhidza vhone, nazwino vho ita zwone vha ḓa. Zwino ri fhano phanḓa ha Mudzimu, ro lindela u pfa zwoṱhe zwe Muṋe washu a vha laedza.”" 
Acts10:34 Pitrosi a thoma u amba a ri, “Nṋe ndi hone ndo zwi vhona uri Mudzimu ha ṱaluli;" 
Acts10:35 onoyo ane a mu ofha a ita zwine Ene a funa, u a mu ṱanganedza a sa sedzi uri ndi wa lushaka lufhio." 
Acts10:36 Mudzimu o ruma ipfi ḽawe kha Vhaisraele a vha ḓivhadza mulalo nga Yesu Khristo a re Ene Muṋe wa vhoṱhe. 
Acts10:37 Inwi ni a ḓivha zwe zwa itea kha ḽoṱhe ḽa Judia na he zwa thoma ngaho Galelia musi Johanisi a tshi ḓivhadza vhathu uri vha lovhedzwe. 
Acts10:38 Ndi amba zwa Yesu wa Nazaretha we Mudzimu a mu ta a mu ṋea Muya Mukhethwa na maanḓa, a tshimbila hoṱhe a tshi tonda vhathu khathihi na u fhodza vhoṱhe vhe vha vha vho tsikeledzwa nga diabolo, ngauri Mudzimu o vha e nae." 
Acts10:39 Riṋe ri dziṱhanzi dza zwoṱhe zwe a ita shangoni ḽa Majuda na Jerusalema. Vhathu vhone vho mu vhulaha nga u tou mu vhamba kha tshifhambano. 
Acts10:40 Hone Mudzimu a mu vusa vhafuni nga ḓuvha ḽa vhuraru, a ita uri vhathu vha kone u mu vhona –" 
Acts10:41 u ralo ndi sa ambi vhathu vhoṱhe – o vhonwa nga riṋe fhedzi ri re ṱhanzi dze Mudzimu a vha o dzula o dzi nanga, ra ita na u ḽa nae ra nwa nae musi o no vuwa vhafuni." 
Acts10:42 O ri laya uri ri ḓivhadze lushaka lwa Majuda mafhungo maḓifha, na u ṱanzilela uri ndi Ene o vhewaho nga Mudzimu uri a vhe Muhaṱuli wa vha tshilaho na vho faho." 
Acts10:43 Vhaporofita vhoṱhe vha ṱanzilela onoyo vha tshi ri vhoṱhe vhane vha mu fulufhela, Mudzimu u ḓo vha hangwela a tshi itela zwe Yesu a shuma.”" 
Acts10:44 Pitrosi a tshi kha ḓi amba, Muya Mukhethwa a tsela kha vhoṱhe vhe vha vha vha tshi khou thetshelesa mafhungo eneo." 
Acts10:45 Vhaḽa Vhakhriste vha Majuda vhe vha ḓa na Pitrosi vha tshi bva Jopa vha kanuka vha tshi vhona vhannḓa vho shululelwa-vho Muya Mukhethwa, tshifhiwa tsha Mudzimu," 
Acts10:46 ngauri vho pfa vha tshi amba na nga ndimi vha tshi khoḓa Mudzimu. Pitrosi a ri," 
Acts10:47 “Zwino ndi nnyi ane a nga kha ḓi hana vha tshi lovhedzwa nga maḓi? Hufha na vhone vho no ṱanganedza Muya Mukhethwa sa riṋe.” 
Acts10:48 Ndi hone a tshi ri vha lovhedzwe vha vhe vha Yesu Khristo. Vhone vha mu humbela uri a fhedze maḓuvhanyana e navho. 
Acts11:1 Vhaapostola na vhaṅwe Vhakhriste ngavho kha ḽoṱhe ḽa Judia vha zwi pfa uri vhannḓa na vhone vho ṱanganedza ipfi ḽa Mudzimu. 
Acts11:2 Pitrosi a tshi gonya Jerusalema, vho fumbaho vha mu sola" 
Acts11:3 vha ri, “Khezwi vha tshi dalela vhannḓa vha songo fumbaho, vha ita na u ḽa navho!”" 
Acts11:4 Ndi hone Pitrosi a tshi vha hanelela zwoṱhe a sa sii tshithu a ri," 
Acts11:5 “Ndo vha ndi muḓini wa Jopa ndi tshi khou rabela, nda ḓipfa ndi Muyani, nda vhona bono. Nda vhona hu tshi tsiswa tshithu tshi no nga pesa ḽihulu ḽa seila ḽo farwa nga khuḓa dzaḽo nṋa, tsha vhuya tsha swika kha nṋe." 
Acts11:6 Ndi tshi ṱodzimela nda wana ngomu hu tshi ri phukha dza hayani, he dza ḓaka, he dzi tshimbilaho nga thumbu, he zwiṋoni." 
Acts11:7 Zwenezwo nda pfa ipfi ḽi tshi ri, ‘Takuwa Pitrosi, u shidzhe u ḽe!’" 
Acts11:8 Nṋe nda ri, ‘Aiwa nandi Muṋe wanga, tshee nda rano a thi athu vhuya nda dzhenisa zwo iledzwaho mulomoni wanga kana zwo kumalaho.’" 
Acts11:9 Ḽiḽa ipfi ḽa dovha ḽa amba ḽi tshi bva ṱaḓulu ḽa ri, ‘Zwe Mudzimu a ri zwo kumululwa, iwe u songo ri zwo kumala.’" 
Acts11:10 Zwa ralo zwa vhuya zwa ita kararu, zwiḽa zwithu zwoṱhe zwa konou humiselwa ṱaḓulu." 
Acts11:11 Nga tshifhinga tshenetsho vhaṅwe vhanna vhararu vhe vha vha vho ruṅwa ha nṋe vha tshi bva Khisaria vha dzhena henefho nḓuni ye ra vha ri tshi dzula khayo. 
Acts11:12 Muya a mmbudza uri ndi ṱuwe navho ndi sa timatimi. Na avha vhaṱanu na muthihi vha Jopa vha re vhaṅwe nga riṋe vha mphelekedza ra ya ha Khorneliasi. 
Acts11:13 Ene a ri anetshela a musi a tshi vhona ngomu nḓuni yawe ho ima muruṅwa we a amba nae a ri, ‘Ruma vhathu Jopa vha yo u vhidzela muthu ane a pfi Simoni, ḽiṅwe a pfi Pitrosi." 
Acts11:14 Onoyo u ḓo u vhudza zwine zwa ḓo u tshidza, iwe na muṱa wau woṱhe.’" 
Acts11:15 Musi ndi tshi thoma u amba, Muya Mukhethwa a ḓa khavho sa zwe a ḓa kha riṋe mathomoni." 
Acts11:16 Ndi hone ndi tshi elelwa ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽa u ri, ‘Johanisi o vha a tshi lovhedza nga maḓi; inwi ni ḓo lovhedzwa nga Muya Mukhethwa.’" 
Acts11:17 Hufha Muṋe washu o ṋea vhannḓa tshifhiwa tshenetshiḽa tshe a ṋea riṋe zwiḽa ri tshi fulufhela Muṋe washu Yesu Khristo. Zwino ndi nṋe nnyi we nda vha ndi tshi nga dzivhisa Mudzimu u ita zwine a funa?” 
Acts11:18 Vha tshi pfa zwenezwo vha litsha u mu sola, vha renda Mudzimu vha ri, “Izwo Mudzimu vhannḓa na vhone o vha ṋea tshifhinga tsha u rembuluwa vha tshidzwa!”" 
Acts11:19 Mutovholo we wa thoma nga u vhulawa ha Stefane wo balanganya Vhakhriste. Vhaṅwe vho vhuya vha swika Finikia, vhaṅwe Kipirosi, vhaṅwe Antiokia, vha enda vha tshi amba mafhungo maḓifha, hone vha tshi vhudza Majuda fhedzi." 
Acts11:20 Huno vhaṅwe vhavho, vhanna vha bvaho Kipirosi na Kirene, vha swika Antiokia vha amba mafhungo maḓifha a Muṋe washu Yesu vha tshi vhudza na vhannḓa." 
Acts11:21 Muṋe washu a vha farisa, vhathu vha fulufhela Muṋe washu nga vhunzhi, vha rembuluwa vha vha vhawe." 
Acts11:22 Mafhungo aya a ri u pfala tshivhidzoni tsha Jerusalema, tsha ruma Barnabasi Antiokia." 
Acts11:23 A tshi swika a vhona uri Mudzimu o itela vhathu vhuthu vhungafhani, a takala a vha ṱuṱuwedza vhoṱhe uri vha dzule vha tshi fulufhedzea tshoṱhe vha sa ṱutsheli Muṋe washu," 
Acts11:24 nge a vha e muthu muvhuya o ḓalaho Muya Mukhethwa na lutendo. Vhathu vhanzhi vha rembuluwa vha vha vha Muṋe washu. 
Acts11:25 Ndi hone Barnabasi a tshi fhirela Tharasisi u ṱoḓa Saulo. 
Acts11:26 A ri u mu wana a mu ḓisa Antiokia. Vha fhedza ṅwaha woṱhe vha tshi dzula na tshivhidzo vha tshi shumisana, vha funza vhathu vhanzhi-vhanzhi. Antiokia henefho ndi he vhafunziwa vha wana dzina ḽa u pfi Vhakhriste." 
Acts11:27 Misi iyo ha ḓa vhaporofita Antiokia vha tshi bva Jerusalema. 
Acts11:28 Muṅwe wavho a no pfi Agabosi a takuwa o ṋewa maanḓa nga Muya Mukhethwa, a porofita uri nḓala khulu i ḓo ṱuwa i tshi wela shango ḽoṱhe. (Nḓala yeneyo yo ḓo wa musi Klaudiosi e Khisara.)" 
Acts11:29 Vhafunziwa vha vhofha ḽa uri vhoṱhe vha rumele zwa u vhavhalela Vhakhriste ngavho vha dzulaho Judia, muṅwe na muṅwe a tshi rumela nga hune a kona." 
Acts11:30 Nangoho vha ita nga u ralo, vha ruma Barnabasi na Paulo u isa zwifhiwa kha vhalisa vha tshivhidzo." 
Acts12:1 Misi yeneyo khosi Herude a thoma u tovhola tshivhidzo, a fara vhaṅwe vhavho;" 
Acts12:2 a vhuya a ri Jakopo mukomana wa Johanisi a vhulawe nga banga. 
Acts12:3 A tshi vhona uri zwo takadza Majuda, a vho tou ṋaṋa, a farisa na Pitrosi. (Zwenezwo zwo itea tshi tshifhinga tsha vhuṱambo ha Vhurotho vhu si na mbilisa.)" 
Acts12:4 Pitrosi a ri u fariwa a hoṋelwa dzhele, a kumedzwa zwigwada zwiṋa zwa maswole maṋa maṋa uri zwi mu linde; ngauri Herude o vha a tshi ri u ḓo mu sengisa zwavhuḓi phanḓa ha vhathu Paseka yo no fhela." 
Acts12:5 Nangoho Pitrosi a dzula henengei dzhele o lindwa, hone tshivhidzo tsha ḓi mu rabelela ha Mudzimu nga thabelo i sa tumuwi." 
Acts12:6 Vhusiku ha musi Herude a tshi ri ndi ḓo vuwa ndi tshi mu bvisela phanḓa ha vhathu, Pitrosi o vha o lala vhukati ha maswole mavhili, o vhoxwa nga geḓane mbili. Muṋangoni na hone ho vha ho vhewa vhalindi." 
Acts12:7 Kathihi fhedzi ha vha ho no ima muruṅwa wa Muṋe washu henefho, kamara ya tshena nga tshedza! Muruṅwa a phaphatha Pitrosi kha lurumbu a mu karusa, a ri, “Ṱavhanya u vuwe!” Dziḽa geḓane dzi re zwanḓani zwawe dza mbo ḓi wela kule." 
Acts12:8 Ndi hone muruṅwa a tshi ri, “Vhofha bannda u ambare na thovho dzau.” Pitrosi a ita nga u ralo. Muruṅwa a ri, “Ambara khanzu yau u ntevhele.”" 
Acts12:9 Nangoho Pitrosi a mu tevhela ha vha u bva hawe dzhele, a sa ḓivhi uri zwine muruṅwa a khou ita ndi vhukuma, a tshi ḓi ri khamusi u khou tou vhona bono." 
Acts12:10 Vha fhira maswole a u thoma, vha ḓa vha fhira na a vhuvhili, vha vhuya vha swika na hu re na gethe ya tsimbi ine muthu a ri u fhira yone a mbo ḓi dzhena muḓini. Gethe ya vulea nga yoṱhe uri vha fhire, vha mbo ḓi bva, vha tshi swika mafhandeni a u thoma, kathihi fhedzi uyo muruṅwa a si tsha vhonala." 
Acts12:11 Pitrosi ha vha hu hone a tshi dzivhuluwa, a ri, “Zwino ndi hone ndo zwi vhona uri ndi vhukuma! Muṋe wanga o ruma muruṅwa wawe a mponyokisa kha Herude na kha zwoṱhe zwe Majuda vha vha vha tshi ṱoḓa u nnyita!”" 
Acts12:12 A tshi vhona zwo ralo, a ya muṱani wa Maria mme a Johanisi, ane ḽiṅwe a pfi Markosi. Henefho ho vha ho kuvhangana vhathu vhanzhi vha tshi khou rabela." 
Acts12:12 A tshi vhona zwo ralo, a ya muṱani wa Maria mme a Johanisi, ane ḽiṅwe a pfi Markosi. Henefho ho vha ho kuvhangana vhathu vhanzhi vha tshi khou rabela." 
Acts12:13 Pitrosi a tshi khokhonya vothi ḽa nnḓa, ha ḓa muṅwe mushumi wa musidzana a no pfi Roda a tshi ḓa u ṱolela." 
Acts12:14 A tshi pfa uri ipfi ndi ḽa Pitrosi, a takala lwe a humela murahu nga u tou gidima a songo tsha vula na vothi, a vhudza vhathu uri a re muṋangoni ndi Pitrosi." 
Acts12:15 Vhone vha ri, “Riṋe u songo ṱolou ri fhafhaḓela hafha.” Uyo musidzana a ḓi tou ima kha uri zwine a khou amba ndi ngoho, vhone vha vhuya vha ri, “Izwo kha a kundwe a tshi tou vha muruṅwa wawe.”" 
Acts12:16 Ngei muṋangoni Pitrosi o vha a tshi khou ḓi khokhonya. Vha tshi vula vha vhona nangoho e ene, vha akhamala." 
Acts12:17 Ene a vha fhumudza nga tshanḓa, a konou vha toololela nga he Muṋe washu a mu bvisa dzhele. A vha vhudza a ri, “Mafhungo haya ni a vhudze-vho Jakopo na vhaṅwe Vhakhriste nga riṋe.” A ri u ralo a fhirela huṅwe." 
Acts12:18 Ḽi tshi tsha hu si vhe hone u hanganea kha maswole, vha sa ḓivhi uri hu nga vha ho bvelela mini kha Pitrosi." 
Acts12:19 Herude a mbo ri a ṱoḓiwe, hone a si wanale. Ndi hone a tshi sengisa aḽa maswole e a vha o linda Pitrosi, a fhedza nga u ri vha vhulawe. Ngavhuya Herude a ṱuwa Judia, a tsela Khisaria a dzula tshifhinganyana henengei." 
Acts12:20 Herude o vhuya a sinyutshela vhathu vha Tiro na vha Sidoni. Vhone vha tshi vhona zwenezwo vha ḓa khae vhe tshigwada, vha kwengweledza Blastosi gota ḽa u langa pfamo uri a vha swikise vha pfumelelwe, ngauri shango ḽa havho ḽo vha ḽi tshi ṱunḓa shangoni ḽa Herude." 
Acts12:21 Nga ḓuvha ḽe ḽa vha ḽo dzula ḽo tiwa Herude a ambara nguvho dzawe dza vhuhulwane, a dzula kha khuluṋoni a amba navho," 
Acts12:22 vhathu vha tshi khou ḓi ṱavha mukosi vha tshi mu renda vha tshi ri, “A si muthu ane a khou amba hafha, ndi mudzimu!”" 
Acts12:23 Zwenezwo ha mbo ḓa muruṅwa wa Muṋe washu a rwa Herude nga vhulwadze nge a si hulise Mudzimu; a ḽiwa nga mbungu a fa. 
Acts12:24 Ipfi ḽa Mudzimu ḽone ḽa ḓi anḓadzea ḽi tshi ya, ḽa ṱanganya mashango." 
Acts12:25 Barnabasi na Saulo vhone vha ri u fhedza mushumo wavho wa sengosengo Antiokia, vha vhuelela Jerusalema, vho no vha na Johanisi ane ḽiṅwe a pfi Markosi." 
Acts12:25 Barnabasi na Saulo vhone vha ri u fhedza mushumo wavho wa sengosengo Antiokia, vha vhuelela Jerusalema, vho no vha na Johanisi ane ḽiṅwe a pfi Markosi." 
Acts13:1 Tshivhidzoni tsha Antiokia ho vha hu na vhaṅwe vhaporofita na vhafunzi. Vhenevho vho vha vhe Barnabasi, na Simioni we ḽiṅwe a vha a tshi pfi Murema, na Lukiasi wa Kirene, na Manaini we a aluwa na Khosi Herude, na Saulo." 
Acts13:2 Muṅwe musi vha tshi khou luvha Muṋe washu vho ḓidzima, Muya Mukhethwa a amba navho a ri, “Nkhetheleni Barnabasi na Saulo uri vha ite mushumo we nda dzula ndo vha vhidzela wone.”" 
Acts13:3 Vha dovha vha ḓidzima vha rabela, vha vha vhea zwanḓa vha konou ri vha ṱuwe." 
Acts13:4 Barnabasi na Saulo vha takuwa vho ruṅwa nga Muya Mukhethwa, vha tsela Selukia; henefho vha namela tshikepe, vha fhirela tshiṱangadzimeni tsha Kipirosi." 
Acts13:5 Vha tshi swika Salamisi, vha ḓivhadza ipfi ḽa Mudzimu dzisinagogoni, vhe na Johanisi a tshi khou vha farisa." 
Acts13:6 Vha buḓekanya tshiṱangadzime vha vhuya vha swika Phafosi. Henefho vha wana muṅwe munna wa Mujuda a no pfi Bara-Joshua, we a vha e na manditi nahone a tshi ḓiita muporofita." 
Acts13:7 Munna onoyo o vha e khonani ya Seregiosi Paulosi gota ḽa tshiṱangadzime tshenetsho, we a vha e munna wa vhuṱali. Seregiosi a vhidzisa Barnabasi na Saulo a tshi ṱoḓa u pfa ipfi ḽa Mudzimu." 
Acts13:8 Hone uyo munna wa manditi, ane nga Tshigiriki a pfi Elimasi, a vha hanedza, a edzisa na u tshutshudza gota uri ḽi si tende Mudzimu." 
Acts13:9 Zwenezwo Saulo, ane ḽiṅwe a pfi Paulo, a lavhelesa uyo munna wa manditi kha tshifhaṱuwo o ḓala Muya Mukhethwa" 
Acts13:10 a ri, “Ṅwana wa Saṱhane ndiwe! Swina ḽa zwivhuya zwoṱhe ndiwe! Mbilu yau yo ḓala vhukwila na vhumbulu. Nṋa a u litshi u ṱolou kombamisa nḓila ya Mudzimu yó onyolowaho!" 
Acts13:11 Zwino-ha tshanḓa tsha Mudzimu tshi a u rwa: u ḓo vha bofu, wa fhedza tshifhinga u sa vhoni tshedza tsha ḓuvha!” Maṱo a Elimasi a mbo ḓi nzwii kathihi, a vho sokou phuphudzika a tshi ṱoḓa ane a nga tou mu dededza." 
Acts13:12 Seregiosi a tshi vhona zwo iteaho, a fulufhela Muṋe washu, a tou kanuka a tshi pfa zwe vha vha vha tshi khou funza nga Muṋe washu." 
Acts13:13 Paulo na khonani dzawe vha ṱuwa Phafosi nga tshikepe vha wetshela muḓini wa Pherege shangoni ḽa Phamfilia; henefho Johanisi a vha sia a humela Jerusalema. 
Acts13:14 Vhone vha ri u takuwa Pherege vha fhirela muḓini wa Antiokia u re shangoni ḽa Phisidia. Nga Sabatha vha dzhena sinagogoni vha dzula. 
Acts13:15 Musi ho no vhaliwa kha bugu dza Mushe na dza Vhaporofita, vhahulwane vha sinagogo vha ruma muthu uri a yo amba navho a ri, “Vha hashu, arali ni na ḽine na nga amba ḽa u khwaṱhisa vhathu, ambani no vhofholowa.”" 
Acts13:16 Paulo a takuwa a fhumudza vhathu nga tshanḓa, a thoma u amba a ri, “Inwi Vhaisraele vha hashu na inwi noṱhe ni ofhaho Mudzimu, thetshelesani!" 
Acts13:17 Mudzimu wa holu lushaka lwa Israele o nanga vhomakhulukuku washu, a vha ita lushaka luhulu musi vhe vhatsinda shangoni ḽa Egipita, a vha pfulusa Egipita nga maanḓa mahulu," 
Acts13:18 a fhedza miṅwaha ine ya nga ita 40 a tshi konḓelela zwiito zwavho sogani. 
Acts13:19 Tshakha dze a lozwa shangoni ḽa Kanana ndi ṱhanu na mbili, a konou ḽi kumedza vhathu vhawe, ḽa vha ifa ḽavho." 
Acts13:20 Hezwo zwo khunyelela ho no fhela miṅwaha ine ya nga vha 450. “Zwo no ralo a vha fha vharangaphanḓa u vhuya u swika nga tshifhinga tsha muporofita Samuele. 
Acts13:21 Ho ḓo ri vha tshi vho humbela khosi, Mudzimu a vha ṋea Saulo ṅwana wa Kishi wa tsinde ḽa Benyamini, onoyo a vha vhusa miṅwaha ya 40." 
Acts13:22 “Mudzimu o ḓo ri u bvisa Saulo, a vhea Dafita vhuhosini. Dafita ene Mudzimu a tshi mu amba o ri, ‘Ndo zwi vhona uri Dafita murwa wa Isai ndi ene munna ane a ntakadza; ene u ḓo ita zwoṱhe zwine nda funa.’" 
Acts13:23 Zwino Yesu we Mudzimu a mu ita Mutshidzi wa vhathu ndi muḓuhulu wa onoyo Dafita, vhunga o fulufhedzisa nga u ralo." 
Acts13:24 Musi Yesu a sa athu thoma mushumo wawe, ho thoma Johanisi a ḓivhadza vhathu vhoṱhe vha Israele uri vha rembuluwe vha lovhedzwe." 
Acts13:25 Musi Johanisi a tshi vho ṱoḓou fhedzisa mushumo wawe o ri, ‘Matsiko ni ri ndi nṋe nnyi? We na lindela a si nṋe. Aiwa, Ene u kha ḓi ḓa; onoyo u mphira kule nga vhuhulwane lune ndi si vhuye nda fanela na u mu bvula navhula.’" 
Acts13:26 “Vha hashu, ndi amba inwi vhaḓuhulu vha Abrahamu, na inwi noṱhe ni ofhaho Mudzimu, na inwi noṱhe ni ofhaho Mudzimu, haya maipfi a u tshidzwa o swikiswa kha riṋe." 
Acts13:27 Vhathu vha Jerusalema na vhahulwane vhavho a vho ngo ṱalukanya uri ndi Ene Mesia. Naho zwo ralo vha tshi mu haṱulela lufu ho vha hone u khunyeledza maipfi a vhaporofita ane a vhaliwa Sabatha iṅwe na iṅwe. 
Acts13:28 Naho vha songo vhuya vha mu vhona mulandu une a nga vhulahelwa wone, vho ḓi humbela Pilato uri a vhulawe." 
Acts13:29 Musi vho no mu ita zwoṱhe zwe Maṅwalo a dzula o amba, vho mu fhahulula kha danda vha mu swiṱa." 
Acts13:30 Hone Mudzimu o mu vusa vhafuni," 
Acts13:31 zwa ita maḓuvha manzhi vhaḽa vhe a tshimbila navho u bva Galelia u swika Jerusalema vha tshi ḓi ita vha tshi mu vhona. Vhenevho ṋamusi ndi ṱhanzi dzawe kha vhathu vha Israele. 
Acts13:32 Na riṋe ro ni ḓisela mafhungo a takadzaho: Zwiḽa zwe Mudzimu a fulufhedzisa vhomakhulukuku washu," 
Acts13:33 zwenezwo o itela riṋe vhaḓuhulu vhavho nga u vusa Yesu vhafuni, unga zwo ṅwaliwa kha Phisalema ya vhuvhili ha pfi, “ ‘Iwe u Murwa wanga, ndo u beba ṋamusi.’" 
Acts13:34 “Mudzimu a tshi amba uri u ḓo mu vusa vhafuni a si vhuye a sina, o ri, “ ‘Ndi ḓo u ṋea zwe nda fulufhedzisa Dafita ndo khwaṱhisa.’" 
Acts13:35 “Huṅwe u dovha a ri, “ ‘Muḓinḓa wau mukhethwa a u nga litshi a tshi vhuya a sina.’" 
Acts13:36 “Zwino zwe Mudzimu a funa Dafita a tshi ita, Dafita o zwi khunyeledza a tshi kha ḓi tshila, hone o ḓi dzama, a vhulungwa na vhokhotsi awe, a sina." 
Acts13:37 Hone we Mudzimu a mu vusa vhafuni Ene ho ngo vhuya a sina. 
Acts13:38 Zwino-ha vha hashu, khezwi zwine na fanela u zwi ḓivha: Yesu ndi Ene we a ita uri ni kone u hangwelwa vhutshinyi haṋu hoṱhe; ngauri Mulayo wa Mushe wo kundwa u pfumedzanya muthu na Mudzimu, hone Ene Yesu u a kona u pfumelela muṅwe na muṅwe ane a mu fulufhela." 
Acts13:39  
Acts13:40 Thanyani-ha uri ni sa ḓo welwa nga zwe vhaporofita vha amba. Ndi amba fhaḽa hu no pfi," 
Acts13:41 “ ‘Hee inwi vhadzialunyadzo, kanukani ni lovhe, zwine nda khou ita nga tshifhinga tshaṋu, ndi zwine naho muthu a nga tou ni ṱalutshedza na sa ḓo vhuya na zwi tenda!’ ”" 
Acts13:42 Sinagogo i tshi bva, vhathu vha humbela Paulo na Barnabasi uri vha vhuye nga Sabatha i tevhelaho, vha dovhe vha vha vhudze eneo mafhungo." 
Acts13:43 Tshivhidzo tsho no balangana Paulo na Barnabasi vha tevhelwa nga vhathu vhanzhi vha Majuda na vhannḓa vho dzhenaho kha Tshijuda. Vhaapostola vha amba navho vha tshi vha khwaṱhisa uri vha dzule vho fulufhela vhuthu ha Mudzimu. 
Acts13:44 Nga Sabatha i tevhelaho muḓi wa tou bva woṱhe vha tshi ḓa u pfa ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu. 
Acts13:45 Majuda vha tshi vhona u ḓala ha vhathu, vha dzhenwa nga vivho, vha vho hanedza zwe Paulo a vha a tshi khou amba, vha tshi ita na u nyefula Yesu." 
Acts13:46 Paulo na Barnabasi vha ḓi amba vha sa ofhi tshithu, vha ri, “Ho itwa zwo fanelaho, ipfi ḽa Mudzimu ḽi tshi thoma u ḓivhadzwa inwi. Zwino vhunga inwi no ḽi landula na ḓivhona ni songo fanelwa nga vhutshilo vhu sa fheli, ri khou ni ṱutshela ra ya kha vhannḓa;" 
Acts13:47 ngauri Muṋe washu o ri laya a ri, “ ‘Ndo u vhea uri u vhe tshedza kha vhannḓa, uri shango nga he ḽa guma ḽi kone u tshidzwa nga Iwe.’ ”" 
Acts13:48 Vhannḓa vha tshi pfa a tshi ralo, vha takala vha renda ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu; vhe vha vha vho dzula vho nangelwa vhutshilo vhu sa fheli vha vha vhatendi." 
Acts13:49 Ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽa ṱanganya shango ḽeneḽo ḽoṱhe. 
Acts13:50 Hone Majuda vha tshutshudza vhaḓivhalea vha vhasadzi vha ofhaho Mudzimu na vhahulwane vha muḓi, vhenevho vha thoma u tovhola Paulo na Barnabasi, vha ita na u vha pandela shangoni ḽavho." 
Acts13:51 Vhaapostola vha fhufhura buse ḽi re milenzheni yavho u sumbedza uri zwi kha avho vhe vha vha pandela, vha konou fhirela Ikoniamu." 
Acts13:52 Vhafunziwa vha Antiokia vhone vha ḓala dakalo na Muya Mukhethwa. 
Acts14:1 Na Ikoniamu zwa ḓi ralo: Paulo na Barnabasi vha dzhena sinagogoni, vha funza lwe vhathu vhanzhi vha Majuda na vhannḓa vha vha vhatendi." 
Acts14:2 Majuda vhe vha sa fune u tenda, vhone vha vho ita zwa vhuluṱa uri vhannḓa vha vhenge Vhakhriste." 
Acts14:3 Vhaapostola vha dzula henefho tshifhinga tshilapfu. Vha amba nga Muṋe washu vha sa ofhi tshithu, huno na Ene a khwaṱhisa vhuṱanzi havho nga u ḓi vha ṋea maanḓa a u ita maḓembe na zwimangadzo." 
Acts14:4 Vhathu vha muḓi wonoyo vho bva zwigwada zwivhili, vhaṅwe vha tshi ima na Majuda vhaṅwe vha ima na vhaapostola." 
Acts14:5 Ndi hone vhannḓa na Majuda, khathihi na vharangaphanḓa vhavho, vha tshi vho langana u tambudza vhaapostola na u vha kanḓa nga matombo." 
Acts14:6 Musi vhaapostola vha tshi zwi pfa, vha shavhela Likhonia miḓini ya Listara na Derebe na mivhunduni yo i tangaho." 
Acts14:7 Henengei vha isa phanḓa u ḓivhadza mafhungo maḓifha. 
Acts14:8 Listara henefho ho vha hu na muṅwe munna we a vha o holefhala milenzhe, u bva tshee a bebiwa a sa athu vhuya a tshimbila." 
Acts14:9 Onoyo a dzula a thetshelesa Paulo a tshi khou funza. Paulo a mu lavhelesa a vhona uri u na lutendo lune a nga fhodzwa. 
Acts14:10 Ndi hone a tshi vhidzelela a ri, “Takuwani ni ime nga milenzhe yaṋu ni tou dzi!” Uyo munna a mbo ḓi thamuwa a thoma u tshimbila-tshimbila." 
Acts14:11 Mavhuthu a tshi vhona zwe Paulo a ita, vha thoma u zhamba nga Tshilikhonia vha ri, “Midzimu yo tsela kha riṋe nga tshivhumbeo tsha muthu!”" 
Acts14:12 Barnabasi vha ri ndi Ziasi khosi ya midzimu, Paulo ene vha ri ndi Hermesi muḓinḓa wa midzimu, ngauri ho vha hu tshi amba ene." 
Acts14:13 Tshifhe wa Ziasi a ḓisa dzimboho dzo ṱamiwa nga khare dza maluvha a ima khoroni. Ndi uri thembele ya Ziasi yone yo vha i henefho nnḓanyana ha muḓi. Zwino hoyo tshifhe na mavhuthu, vho vha vho no vha na muhumbulo wa u ṋekedza vhaapostola nduvho." 
Acts14:14 Barnabasi na Paulo vha tshi tou pfa zwi no ṱoḓa u itwa, vha kherukanya zwiambaro zwavho vha gidimela vhukati ha gogo vha ṱavha mukosi vha ri," 
Acts14:15 “Vha hashu, mathina zwo no vha zwifhio? Riṋe ri tou vha vhathu vha ṋama unga inwi! Tshe ra ḓela ndi u ni ḓivhadza mafhungo maḓifha uri ni laṱe hezwi zwithu zwi si na mushumo, ni rembulutshele ha Mudzimu a tshilaho we a sika ḽiṱaḓulu na ḽifhasi na lwanzhe na zwoṱhe zwi re khazwo." 
Acts14:16 Kale o litsha tshakha dzoṱhe dzi tshi fara yadzo nḓila. 
Acts14:17 Naho zwo ralo o ḓi sumbedza uri u hone nga zwivhuya zwine a ita. Vhonani u ni nisela mvula i tshi bva ṱaḓulu, a ni fha na zwiliṅwa nga tshifhinga tshazwo; u ni fha zwiḽiwa, a takadza mbilu dzaṋu.”" 
Acts14:18 Naho vhaapostola vho amba vha ralo, ho vha ho tou sala zwiṱukuṱuku gogo ḽo vha ṱhavhela idzo mboho." 
Acts14:19 Ha mbo swika Majuda vha bvaho Antiokia na Ikoniamu. Vhenevho vha tswa mbilu dza gogo ḽa vho ima navho, vha kanḓa Paulo nga matombo vha mu kokodzela nnḓa ha muḓi vha tshi ri o fa." 
Acts14:20 Hone musi vhafunziwa vha tshi ḓa vha mu tanga, a vuwa a humela muḓini. Nga matshelo a ṱuwa na Barnabasi vha ya Derebe." 
Acts14:21 Paulo na Barnabasi vha funza mafhungo maḓifha Derebe, ha rembuluwa vhathu vhanzhi. U bva henefho vha humela Listara, vha konou fhirela Ikoniamu, na Antiokia u re kha ḽa Phisidia." 
Acts14:22 Vha khwaṱhisa vhafunziwa na u vha ṱuṱuwedza uri vha ime kha lutendo. Vha ri, “Ri dzhena muvhusoni wa Mudzimu ró fhira nga maṱhuphoni manzhi.”" 
Acts14:23 Vha tela tshivhidzo tshiṅwe na tshiṅwe vhalisa vhatsho, vha konou vha kumedza Muṋe washu nga thabelo na nga u ḓidzima, vhunga vho vha vho no ḓi mu ṱanganedza." 
Acts14:24 Vha buḓekanya shango ḽa Phisidia vha swika Phamfilia. 
Acts14:25 Henefho vha amba ipfi ḽa Mudzimu muḓini wa Pherege, vha konou tsela Athalia." 
Acts14:26 U bva henefho vha namela tshikepe vha humela Antiokia, fhaḽa he vha kumedzwa kha vhuthu ha Mudzimu uri vha ite mushumo wonoyo une vha kha ḓi bva u u khunyeledza." 
Acts14:27 Vha tshi swika Antiokia vha kuvhanganya tshivhidzo tshoṱhe vha vha hanelela zwoṱhe zwe Mudzimu a shuma ngavho, na he a vulela vhannḓa nḓila uri vha mu ṱanganedze." 
Acts14:28 Henefho vha fhedza tshifhinga vha tshi dzula na vhafunziwa. 
Acts15:1 Vhaṅwe vhanna vha no bva Judia vha ḓa Antiokia vha thoma u funza Vhakhriste vha ri, “Ni nga si tshidzwe ni songo fumba nga maitele a Mushe.”" 
Acts15:2 Paulo na Barnabasi vha tou vha ṱaṱisa vhukuma vha tshi hanedzana navho kha mafhungo eneo. Ndi hone tshivhidzo tshi tshi fhedza nga u ri Paulo na Barnabasi na vhaṅwe vha henefho vha gonye Jerusalema vha yo pfa uri vhaapostola na vhalisa vha henefho Jerusalema vha ri mini nga eneo mafhungo. 
Acts15:3 Tshivhidzo tshó vha ruma nga u ralo, vhone vha buḓekanya Finikia na Samaria vha tshi enda vha tshi anetshela vhathu zwa musi vhannḓa vha tshi rembuluwa; ḽi si vhe ḽone dakalo kha Vhakhriste." 
Acts15:4 Vha tshi swika Jerusalema vha ṱanganedzwa nga tshivhidzo na vhaapostola na vhalisa, vha mbo vha hanelela zwoṱhe zwe Mudzimu a shuma ngavho." 
Acts15:5 Hone vhaṅwe Vhakhriste vhe vha vha vha tshi bva kha tshigwada tsha Vhafarisei vha takuwa vha ri, “Vha fanela u fumba vha vhudzwa na uri vha tevhedze Mulayo wa Mushe.”" 
Acts15:6 Ha vha na dzulo ḽa vhaapostola na vhalisa uri vha suke eneo mafhungo. 
Acts15:7 Musi vho no hanedzana tshifhinga tshilapfu, Pitrosi a takuwa a ri, “Vha hashu, ni tou zwi ḓivha zwavhuḓi uri zwi vho ita miṅwaha Mudzimu o nnanga vhukati haṋu uri ndi ḓivhadze mafhungo maḓifha kha vhannḓa hu u itela uri na vhone vha a pfe vha a tende." 
Acts15:8 Mudzimu Ene ane a ḓivha mbilu dza vhathu, o no ḓi imelela vhannḓa nga u vha ṋea-vho Muya Mukhethwa sa riṋe." 
Acts15:9 Ho ngo vha ṱalula kha riṋe; o vha ṱanzwa dzimbilu nge vha mu ṱanganedza. 
Acts15:10 Zwino ni itwa ngani ni tshi linga Mudzimu nga u funa u hwesa avha vhathu muhwalo we wa kunda riṋe na vhomakhulukuku washu? 
Acts15:11 Hufha roṱhe riṋe na vhannḓa ri tshi tenda uri ri tou tshidzwa nga tshilidzi tsha Muṋe washu Yesu!” 
Acts15:12 Vhathu vhoṱhe vha fhumula vha thetshelesa Paulo na Barnabasi vha tshi vha hanelela a maḓembe na zwimangadzo zwe Mudzimu a shuma ngavho kha vhannḓa. 
Acts15:13 Vha tshi fhedza u amba Jakopo a takuwa a ri, “Vha hashu, edzonu nthetshelesa!" 
Acts15:14 Simioni u kha ḓi bva u ri toololela zwa musi Mudzimu a tshi thoma u londa vhannḓa nga u ḓinangela lushaka khavho. 
Acts15:15 Izwi ndi zwenezwiḽa zwe vhaporofita vha amba, sa fhaḽa he ha ṅwalwa upfi," 
Acts15:16 “ ‘Muṋe washu u ri: Ndi kha ḓi ḓo vhuya, nnḓu ya Dafita yo waho nda dovha nda i fhaṱa. Dumba ḽayo ndi ḓo ḽi vusa, ḽa ima nga huswa." 
Acts15:17 Ndi hone na vhaṅwe vha tshi ḓo ṱoḓa Muṋe wavho, vhoṱhe vhannḓa vhe nda vha vhidza vha vha vhanga. U ralo Muṋe washu, we a ḓivhadza ḽeneḽi fhungo" 
Acts15:18 tsha kale na kale.’ 
Acts15:19 “Ndi zwine nṋe nda ri ri songo ṱolou dina vhannḓa vhane vha rembuluwa vha vha vha Mudzimu. 
Acts15:20 Nga ri tou vha ṅwalela luṅwalo lwa u vha dzivhisa u ḽa ṋama dzo kumalaho nga u sumelwa midzimu ya zwifanyiso, na uri vha sendele kule na vhuṱudzi ha uri vhathu vha muṱa muthihi vha dzeane nga tshavho, na uri vha si ḽe tshithu tshe tsha fa nga u tou tshipiwa, kana u ḽa malofha." 
Acts15:21 Tenda tsha kale na kale Mulayo wa Mushe u tshi khou ḓi vhaliwa sinagogoni Sabatha iṅwe na iṅwe, u tshi funziwa miḓini yoṱhe.”" 
Acts15:22 Ndi hone vhaapostola na vhalisa na tshivhidzo tshoṱhe vha tshi pfana uri hu nangwe vhanna khavho uri vha ṱuwe na Paulo na Barnabasi vha ye Antiokia. Ha nangwa Judasi ane ḽiṅwe a pfi Barasabasi, na Silasi, vhanna vhe vha vha vhe vharangaphanḓa tshivhidzoni." 
Acts15:23 Luṅwalo lwe vha vha ruma nalwo lwo vha lu tshi ri, “Riṋe vhaapostola na vhalisa vhane ra vha vhaṅwe nga inwi ri vusa vhoṱhe vhane vha vha Vhakhriste nga riṋe, vha bvaho kha vhannḓa henengeo Antiokia na kha ḽoṱhe ḽa Siria na Kilikia." 
Acts15:24 Ri pfa hu tshi pfi hu na vhaṅwe vhashu vhe vha ḓa vha vusa dzikhakhathi vha ni ḽisa mbilu nga u sokou amba-amba, ngeno vha songo rumiwa nga riṋe." 
Acts15:25 Zwino ro dzula ra pfana roṱhe uri ri rume vhaḓinḓa kha inwi. Vhenevho vha ḓo ḓa na khonani dzashu Barnabasi na Paulo," 
Acts15:26 vhanna vhe vha vhuya vha tou ḓiṅala vha tshi shumela Muṋe washu Yesu Khristo. 
Acts15:27 Hezwi zwine ra ṅwala hafha ri khou dovha ra laedza Judasi na Silasi vhane vha ḓo tou dovha vha ni vhudza nga mulomo. 
Acts15:28 Riṋe na Muya Mukhethwa ro pfana uri ri si dovhe ra ni inga muṅwe muhwalo arali zwi si hezwi zwi re zwone zwihulwane: 
Acts15:29 u ila ṋama yo sumelwaho midzimu ya zwifanyiso; u ila malofha kana tshithu tshe tsha fa nga u tou tshipiwa; na vhuṱudzi ha uri vhathu vhe vha muṱa muthihi vha dzekane nga tshavho ni vhe kule nazwo. Arali na ila zwenezwo ni ḓo vha no ita zwone-zwone. Ni takale!” 
Acts15:30 Vhaḓinḓa vha ruṅwa Antiokia vha swika vha kuvhanganya tshivhidzo tshoṱhe tsha Vhakhriste vha vha ṋea luḽa luṅwalo. 
Acts15:31 Musi vhathu vho no lu vhala, vha takala vhukuma nahone lwa tou vha ṱuṱuwedza." 
Acts15:32 Judasi na Silasi vhe na vhone vha vha vhe vhaporofita vha amba tshifhinga tshilapfu vha tshi khou ṱuṱuwedza Vhakhriste na u vha khwaṱhisa. 
Acts15:33 Ho no fhela tshifhinga vhe henengei Vhakhriste vha vha vhofholola vha ri vha tshimbile zwavhuḓi vha tshi humela kha vhaḽa vho vha rumaho. 
Acts15:34  
Acts15:35 Paulo na Barnabasi vhone vha fhedza tshifhinga vhe Antiokia vha tshi farisana na vhaṅwe vhanzhi vha tshi funza ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu na u ḓivhadza vhannḓa mafhungo maḓifha. 
Acts15:36 Ngavhuya Paulo a amba na Barnabasi a ri, “A si khwiṋe ri tshi dovha ra dalela miḓi yoṱhe he ra funza ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ri vhone uri Vhakhriste vha khou tou tshila hani?”" 
Acts15:37 Barnabasi o vha e na muhumbulo wa uri vha ṱuwe na Johanisi ane ḽiṅwe a pfi Markosi. 
Acts15:37 Barnabasi o vha e na muhumbulo wa uri vha ṱuwe na Johanisi ane ḽiṅwe a pfi Markosi. 
Acts15:38 Paulo ene a hana vha tshi ṱuwa nae nge a vha o no vha tshenzhedza nga u vha sia vha tshi lwa na mushumo vhe vhoṱhe musi vhe Phamfilia. 
Acts15:39 Ha vuwa khani khulu vha vhuya vha tshi tou fhambana, Barnabasi a dzhia Markosi vha namela tshikepe vha livha Kipirosi." 
Acts15:39 Ha vuwa khani khulu vha vhuya vha tshi tou fhambana, Barnabasi a dzhia Markosi vha namela tshikepe vha livha Kipirosi." 
Acts15:40 Paulo ene a nanga Silasi, tshivhidzo tsha vha kumedza kha vhuthu ha Muṋe washu, vha konou ṱuwa." 
Acts15:41 Vha buḓekanya Siria na Kilikia vha tshi khwaṱhisa zwivhidzo. 
Acts16:1 Paulo a fhirela Derebe, u bva henefho a ya Listara. Henefho ho vha hu tshi dzula muṅwe mufunziwa a no pfi Timoti. Mme awe vho vha vhe Mukhriste wa Mujuda, khotsi vhe Mugiriki." 
Acts16:2 Timoti o vha e na dzina ḽavhuḓi kha Vhakhriste vha Listara na Ikoniamu. 
Acts16:3 Paulo nga u funa u tshimbila na Timoti, a mu fumbisa nge a ḓivha uri Majuda oṱhe vha dzulaho thungo dzenedzo vho vha vha tshi zwi ḓivha uri khotsi awe ndi Mugiriki." 
Acts16:4 Vha tshi khou ralo u tshimbila na miḓi, vha enda vha tshi laya vhatendi u tevhedza milayo ye ya vhoxwa nga vhaapostola na vhalisa Jerusalema." 
Acts16:5 U ralo ha vha u khwaṱhisa zwivhidzo lutendoni. Vhakhriste vha ḓi anda vha tshi ya ḓuvha ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe. 
Acts16:6 Vha buḓekanya mashango a Frigia na Galata, ngauri Muya Mukhethwa o vha a songo vha tendela u funza mafhungo maḓifha Asia." 
Acts16:7 Vha tshi swika masakhani a Misia, vha linga u dzhena shangoni ḽa Bithinia, hone Muya wa Yesu a vha dzivhisa." 
Acts16:8 Ndi hone vha tshi fhirela phanḓa nga u tou buḓekanya ḽa Misia vha tsela Troasi. 
Acts16:9 Vhusiku honoho Paulo a vhona bono ḽa munna wa Makedonia o ima a tshi khou mu humbela a tshi ri, “Kha vha wetshele ngeno Makedonia vha ri farise-vho.”" 
Acts16:10 Paulo a ri u vhona bono ḽeneḽo ra mbo ḓi ṱoḓa tsha u wetshela ngatsho Makedonia nge ra vhona uri Mudzimu u khou ri vhidza uri ri yo funza vhathu vha henengei mafhungo maḓifha. 
Acts16:11 Ra ṱuwa Troasi nga tshikepe ra wetshela Samothirase, nga matshelo ra konou fhirela Niapolisi." 
Acts16:12 U bva henefho ra tshimbila ra ya muḓini wa Filipi u re muvhunduni wa u thoma wa Makedonia. Filipi ndi muḓi wa ṱhunḓu dzi bvaho Roma. Henefho ra fhedza maḓuvhanyana. 
Acts16:13 Nga Sabatha ra bva muḓini ra ya mulamboni, ri tshi ri ri ḓo wana fhethu hune ha rabelwa hone. Ra swika ra dzula fhasi ra amba na vhasadzi vhe vha vha vho kuvhangana henefho." 
Acts16:14 Kha vhe vha vha vha tshi ḓi thetshelesa ri tshi amba, ho vha hu na muṅwe musadzi a ofhaho Mudzimu a no pfi Lidia a bvaho Thiathira. Onoyo o vha e murengisi wa masila matswuku a muridili. Muṋe washu a vula mbilu yawe a ṱanganedza zwe Paulo a amba." 
Acts16:15 Ene na vha muṱa wawe vha lovhedzwa. Ndi hone a tshi ri kombetshedza a ri, “Arali vhukuma ni tshi vhona uri nangoho ndo ṱanganedza Muṋe washu, a ni ḓi ra dzula roṱhe?” A ri kwengweledza ra vhuya ra tenda." 
Acts16:16 Zwino ḽiṅwe ḓuvha ri tshi khou ya fhethu hune ha rabelwa hone, ra ṱangana na muṅwe musidzana wa phuli we a vha e na thuṅwa ya u bvumba. U bvumba hawe honoho ho vha hu tshi wanisa vhaṋe vhawe tshelede i si na vhukono." 
Acts16:17 Onoyo a ri tevhela ri na Paulo, a tshi enda a tshi zhamba a tshi ri, “Havha vhanna ndi vhaḓinḓa vha Mudzimu wa ṱaḓulu-ṱaḓulu. Vha khou ni ḓivhadza nḓila ine na nga tshidzwa ngayo!”" 
Acts16:18 Uyo musidzana a ḓi ralo maḓuvha manzhi, Paulo zwa vhuya zwa tou mu dina, a rembuluwa a mu lavhelesa a kaidza thuṅwa a ri, “Nga dzina ḽa Yesu Khristo ndi ri ibva khae.” Iḽa thuṅwa ya mbo ḓi bva khae na zwenezwo." 
Acts16:19 Vhaṋe vhawe vha tshi vhona uri ndi hone zwa u wana tshelede zwo fhela, vha fara Paulo na Silasi vha vha kokodzela khoroni kha vhahulwane," 
Acts16:20 vha swika vha vha hwelela kha nduna dza Vharoma vha ri, “Havha vhanna ndi Majuda, zwino vha khou vusa mifhirifhiri muḓini washu;" 
Acts16:21 vha khou funza na maitele ane riṋe Vharoma ri si fanele u a ṱanganedza na u a tevhedza.” 
Acts16:22 Ha kuvhangana gogo, na ḽone ḽa thoma u lwa navho; vhahaṱuli vha vha kherukanyela zwiambaro vha fhedza nga u ri vha rwiwe nga nnzi." 
Acts16:23 Musi vho no rwiwa vha zwi pfa, vha kudzwa dzhele, mulindadzhele a vhudzwa uri a tou vha linda vhukuma." 
Acts16:24 Mulindadzhele a ri u wana ndaela yeneyo, a vha dzhenisa dzhele ya bvungwi-bvungwi, a pata milenzhe yavho nga khotho." 
Acts16:25 Vhukati ha vhusiku Paulo na Silasi vha rabela vha tshi imba nyimbo dza u renda Mudzimu, vhaṅwe vho farwaho vha tshi khou thetshelesa." 
Acts16:26 Kathihi fhedzi ha vha na mudzinginyo muhulu, wa dzinginyisa dzhele na muteo wayo. Mahothi oṱhe a mbo ḓi vulea, geḓane dzo vhofhaho vho farwaho vhoṱhe dza mbo ḓi vhofholowa." 
Acts16:27 Mulindadzhele a karuwa a vhona mahothi a dzhele o vulea, a vhona unga vho farwaho vho shavha vhoṱhe. A mbo ḓi ṱomola banga ḽawe a tshi ṱoḓa u ḓivhulaha." 
Acts16:28 Paulo a zhamba a tshi mu kaidza a ri, “Aiwa nandi, ni songo ḓihuvhadza, ri hone roṱhe!”" 
Acts16:29 Mulindadzhele a ri hu ḓiswe luvhone, a dzhena ngomu nga u gidima, a wela milenzheni ya Paulo na Silasi a tshi tou tetemela nga nyofho." 
Acts16:30 A vha bvisela nnḓa, a vha vhudzisa a ri, “Vhaṋe vhanga, ndi ite mini uri ndi tshidzwe?”" 
Acts16:31 Vhone vha tshi fhindula vha ri, “Fulufhelani Muṋe washu Yesu, ndi hone ni tshi ḓo tshidzwa, inwi na muṱa waṋu woṱhe.”" 
Acts16:32 Ndi hone vha tshi thoma u ṱalutshedza ene na muṱa wawe woṱhe ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu. 
Acts16:33 Zwenezwo vhusiku honoho a vha dzhia a yo ṱanzwa mbonzhe dzavho; ene na muṱa wawe woṱhe vha mbo ḓi lovhedzwa. 
Acts16:34 A ṱuwa na Paulo na Silasi a ya navho muṱani wawe a vha ṋea zwiḽiwa. Ḽi si vhe ḽone dakalo kha ene na muṱa wawe woṱhe nge vha vho fulufhela Mudzimu. 
Acts16:35 Ḽi tshi tsha vhahulwane vha ruma vhaḓinḓa vhavho vha maswole na fhungo ḽi no ri, “Vhofhololani avho vhanna vha ḓiṱutshele.”" 
Acts16:36 Uyo mulindadzhele a vhudza Paulo a ri, “Vhahulwane vho swikisa ipfi ḽi no ri vha vhofhololwe. Zwino vhone nga vha ḓiṱutshele zwavho. Vha tshimbile zwavhuḓi.”" 
Acts16:37 Hone Paulo a fhindula ayo maswole o rumiwaho a ri, “Riṋe vhadzulapo vha Roma, ra sokou rwiwa phanḓa ha vhathu ri songo vhuya ra ranga u sengiswa, ra kudzwa dzhele. U bva ra vho tou ṋengiswa? Izwo zwi nga si itee! Vhenevhaḽa vhahulwane kha vha tou ḓa vhone vhaṋe vha ri bvise!”" 
Acts16:38 Vhaḽa maswole vha swikisa yeneyo phindulo kha vhahaṱuli. Vhone vha tshi pfa uri Paulo na Silasi ndi vhadzulapo vha Roma vha tshenuwa. 
Acts16:39 Vha ḓa vha vha kwengweledza, vha vha bvisa dzhele vha konou vha humbela uri vha ṱuwe muḓini uyo." 
Acts16:40 Paulo na Silasi u ṱuwa dzhele vha ya muṱani wa Lidia, vha ṱuṱuwedza Vhakhriste ngavho vhe vha ṱangana navho henefho, vha konou ṱuwa." 
Acts17:1 Paulo na Silasi vha buḓekanya Amfipolisi na Apolonia vha swika Thesalonika; henefho ho vha hu na sinagogo ya Majuda. 
Acts17:2 Paulo a ḓi ya thabeloni navho vhunga yo vha i yone nḓowelo yawe; a ita Sabatha tharu a tshi sumbedzisana na vhathu nga Maṅwalo," 
Acts17:3 a ṱalutshedza uri iṱali zwo vha zwo fanela uri Mesia a vhulawe a konou ḓo tou vuwa vhafuni. A amba a ri, “Onoyu Yesu ane nda ni ḓivhadza ndi Ene Mesia.”" 
Acts17:4 Vhaṅwe vhavho vha ṱanganedza zwe Paulo a amba, vha ima nae na Silasi; na tshigwada tshihulu tsha vhannḓa vha ofhaho Mudzimu, na vhaḓivhalea vha vhasadzi vha re na tshivhalo na vhone vha ima nae." 
Acts17:5 Majuda vhone vha vha na vivho vha kuvhanganya mifhafhara i si na mushumo i no ṱwa zwiṱaraṱani ya tou vha mmbi. Vha vusa vilili muḓini woṱhe, vha ya vha pwasha na nnḓu ya Jasoni vha tshi ri vha wane Paulo na Silasi vha vha bvisele nnḓa vhathuni." 
Acts17:6 Vhe u sa vha wana vha vho khwikhwidza Jasoni na vhaṅwe Vhakhriste vha vha isa ha vhahulwane vha muḓi vha zhamba vha tshi ri, “Havha vhathu vha enda vha tshi vusa mifhirifhiri shangoni ḽoṱhe!" 
Acts17:7 Zwino vho no swika na fhano, hoyu Jasoni a vha swielela. Vhoṱhe a vha londi milayo ya Khisara, vha ri yone khosi khulu i hone ine vhe ndi Yesu.”" 
Acts17:8 Vha tshi ralo ha tou vha u ritha magogo na vhahulwane vha muḓi. 
Acts17:9 Vhahulwane vha bvisisa Jasoni na vhaḽa vhaṅwe pfarela vha konou vha vhofholola. 
Acts17:10 Ḽo no kovhela Vhakhriste vha ruma Paulo na Silasi Beria. Vha tshi swika vha mbo ḓi fhirela sinagogoni ya Majuda. 
Acts17:11 Afho vha wana vhathu vha no pfesesa u fhira vha Thesalonika. Vho vha vha tshi tou thetshelesa nga mbilu yoṱhe nahone ḓuvha ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe vha tshi sedzulusa Maṅwalo uri vha vhone arali zwine Paulo a amba zwi zwone. 
Acts17:12 Vhunzhi havho vha vha vhatendi, na Magiriki vhanzhi vha vhanna, na vhanzhi vha vhaḓivhalea vha vhasadzi." 
Acts17:13 Majuda vha Thesalonika vha tshi tou pfa uri Paulo u khou ḓivhadza ipfi ḽa Mudzimu Beria, vha ḓa vha tshutshudza vhathu vhanzhi, vha vusa mufhirifhiri vha tshi tou vha mmbi." 
Acts17:14 Vhakhriste vha ṱavhanya vha ṱuwisa Paulo a tsela tsini ha lwanzhe, Silasi na Timoti vhone vha sala Beria." 
Acts17:15 Vhanna vhe vha fhelekedza Paulo vha tshimbila nae u swika Athene, vha humela Beria na ndaela ya Paulo ya uri Silasi na Timoti vha linge u mu tevhela nga u ṱavhanya." 
Acts17:16 Musi Paulo a tshee Athene ó lindela Silasi na Timoti a dinalea nga u vhona muḓi woṱhe wo ḓala zwifanyiso zwa midzimu. 
Acts17:17 Ndi zwe a vha a tshi ḓi ya u amba na Majuda na vhannḓa vha ofhaho Mudzimu, vhukati ha vhege a tshi amba na muṅwe na muṅwe ane a tshenuwa o ṱangana nae vanḓani." 
Acts17:18 Vhaṅwe vhaṱali vha pfunzo ya Epikurosi na i no pfi Stoiki vha hanedzana nae. Vhaṅwe vha ri, “Nṋa itshi tshiḓaḓa tshi khou ṱoḓa u ri vhudza mini?” Vhaṅwe nga fhaḽa vha ri, “U tou nga u amba nga midzimu ine ri si i ḓivhe.” Vha ralo nge Paulo a funza nga Yesu na nga u vuwa ha vhafu." 
Acts17:19 Ndi hone vha tshi dzhia Paulo vha mu isa Tshikwarani tsha Ariosi vha ri, “A ni ri ṱalutshedzi-vho iyo pfunzo ntswa ye na ḓa nayo?" 
Acts17:20 Zwithu zwine na amba a ri pfi na hune zwa ela hone, hone ri nga takalela u ḓivha uri zwi nga vha zwi tshi amba mini.”" 
Acts17:21 (Ndi uri vhadzulapo vha Athene na ṱhunḓu dzavho, tshe vha vha vha tshi tshi takalela u fhira zwoṱhe ndi u amba na u pfa pfunzo ntswa.)" 
Acts17:22 Paulo a takuwa a ima phanḓa havho henefho Tshikwarani tsha Ariosi, a ri, “Inwi vhanna vha Athene, ndi vhona ni vhathu vha no funa zwa u rerelela midzimu." 
Acts17:23 Ndo ri ndi tshi khou tshimbila fhano muḓini waṋu ndi tshi enda ndi tshi lavhelesa hune na rabela hone, nda wana na iṅwe aḽiṱari yo ṅwalwaho upfi, ‘Ya mudzimu Thimuḓi’. Onoyo Mudzimu ane na mu rabela ni sa mu ḓivhi ndi Ene ane nda ni ḓivhadza." 
Acts17:24 Mudzimu o sikaho shango na zwoṱhe zwi re khaḽo ndi Ene Muṋe wa ḽiṱaḓulu na ḽifhasi; ha dzuli thembeleni dzo fhaṱwaho nga vhathu. 
Acts17:25 Vhathu vha tshi mu ṋekedza nduvho a si uri u shaya tshithu; hufha e Ene ane vhathu vhoṱhe a vha ṋea vhutshilo na muya wa u fema na zwiṅwe zwoṱhe zwine zwa ṱoḓea. 
Acts17:26 Ndi Ene we a sika vhathu vhoṱhe vha shango vha tshi bva kha muthu muthihi, uri vha ḓadze shango, ó dzula o vha tela zwifhinga na masakha avho." 
Acts17:27 A tshi ralo ho vha u itela uri vha tou mu ṱoḓa vha tshi phuphudzika vha tshi ri khamusi ri ḓo mu wana, hu uri Mudzimu u tsini na muṅwe na muṅwe washu." 
Acts17:28 Hufha ri tshi tshila ngae, ri tshi tshimbila ngae, ri hone ngae. Zwi tshee zwithihi na zwiḽa zwe vharendi vha haṋu vha amba vha ri, “ ‘Na riṋe ri vhana vhawe.’" 
Acts17:29 “Zwino vhunga ri vhana vha Mudzimu ri songo elekanya uri ri nga fanyisa Mudzimu nga tshivhumbeo tsha musuku kana siliva kana tombo, zwo tou vhaḓiwaho nga he zwa humbulwa nga muthu." 
Acts17:30 “Huno zwa musi vhathu vha sa athu ḓivha, Mudzimu o zwi litsha zwa fhira; tshine a khou ita zwino ndi u vhudza vhathu vhoṱhe mashangoni oṱhe uri vha rembuluwe." 
Acts17:31 O vhea ḓuvha ḽine a ḓo haṱula shango ḽoṱhe ngaḽo a sa ṱaluli. Zwenezwo u ḓo zwi ita nga munna we a mu ta, a mu vusa vhafuni uri vhathu vha vhe na vhuṱanzi ha uri ndi Ene ane a ḓo haṱula shango.”" 
Acts17:32 Vhaṅwe vha tshi pfa a tshi ri muthu u a vuwa vhafuni, vha mu sea, hone vhaṅwe vha amba nae vha ri, “Ni ḓi dovha ni ri vhudze enea mafhungo ḽiṅwe ḓuvha.”" 
Acts17:33 Ndi hone Paulo a tshi takuwa a ṱuwa khavho. 
Acts17:34 Vhaṅwe vhanna vha ḓibaḓekanya nae vha vha vhatendi. Kha vhenevho ho vha hu na Dionisiosi a re muraḓo wa khoro ya Tshikwara tsha Ariosi, na muṅwe musadzi a no pfi Damarisi, na vhaṅwe." 
Acts18:1 Zwo no ralo Paulo a ṱuwa Athene a fhirela Korinta. 
Acts18:2 Henefho a wana muṅwe munna wa Mujuda a no pfi Akwila o bebwaho Pontosi, we a vha a tshi kha ḓi bva u swika a tshi bva Italia na musadzi wawe Phrisila. Vhenevho vho vha vho pfulutshela muḓini wonoyo nge Khisara Klaudiosi a vha o pandela Majuda vhoṱhe Roma. Paulo a yo vhonana navho;" 
Acts18:3 zwino nge na ene a vha a tshi wana zwiḽiwa zwawe nga u runga dzidennde sa vhone, a vho tou dzula navho vha tshi shuma vhoṱhe." 
Acts18:4 Nga Sabatha iṅwe na iṅwe o vha a tshi ḓi amba na Majuda na Magiriki sinagogoni, a tshi linga u vha sumbedza nḓila." 
Acts18:5 Huno Silasi na Timoti vha tshi swika vha tshi bva Makedonia, Paulo a vho tou ḓiṋekedza tshoṱhe kha zwa ipfi ḽa Mudzimu, a ṱalutshedza Majuda zwavhuḓi uri Yesu ndi Ene Mesia." 
Acts18:6 Vhone vha tshi ḓi mu hanedza vha tshi ita na u semana, ene a fhufhura zwiambaro zwawe u sumbedza uri zwi kha vhone, a ri, “Arali na lovha u ḓo vha u mulandu waṋu; nṋe ndo bva mulanduni! U ṱuwa ṋamusi ndi ya kha vhannḓa.”" 
Acts18:7 U ralo ha mbo ḓi vha u bva a yo dzula ha muṅwe munna a ofhaho Mudzimu, a no pfi Titiosi Justosi, we nnḓu yawe ya vha yo vhandekana na sinagogo." 
Acts18:8 Murangaphanḓa wa sinagogo a no pfi Khrisposi, na muṱa wawe woṱhe vha ṱanganedza Muṋe washu, na vhaṅwe vhathu vhanzhi vha henefho Korinta vha pfa ipfi ḽa Mudzimu, vha ḽi ṱanganedza, vha lovhedzwa." 
Acts18:9 Ḽiṅwe ḓuvha vhusiku Paulo a vhona Muṋe washu kha bono a tshi khou amba nae a tshi ri, “U songo ofha tshithu; u songo litsha u amba; u songo fhumula;" 
Acts18:10 a re na iwe ndi Nṋe. A hu na ane a ḓo kona u u huvhadza, ngauri hu na vhanzhi vha re vhanga fhano muḓini uno.”" 
Acts18:11 Nangoho Paulo a dzula muḓini wonoyo a fhedza ṅwaha na miṅwedzi miṱanu na muthihi a tshi funza vhathu ipfi ḽa Mudzimu. 
Acts18:12 Hone ho ḓo ri Galio a tshi itwa gota shangoni ḽa Akhaya, Majuda vha kuvhangana vha fara Paulo vha mu isa khoroni," 
Acts18:13 vha mu hwelela vha ri, “Hoyu munna u khou kunga vhathu uri vha rabele Mudzimu nga nḓila ine ya lwa na Mulayo!”" 
Acts18:14 Paulo a tshi kha ḓi tou ri ndi a amba, Galio a vha fhindula a ri, “Inwi Majuda, ngavhe hoyu muthu o vha o tshinya kana o fhura vhathu, ndo vha ndi tshi nga konḓelela u ni thetshelesa." 
Acts18:15 Zwino vhunga hu u fhambana nga maipfi na madzina na mulayo waṋu, zwi fhedzeni nga tshaṋu. A vha nṋe ndi nga si vhe muhaṱuli wa mafhungo o raloho!”" 
Acts18:16 U ralo a mbo ḓi vha pandela afho khoroni. 
Acts18:17 Vhathu vhoṱhe vha fara Sosthenese murangaphanḓa wa sinagogo, vha mu rwela henefho khoroni. Na zwenezwo Galio a si vhuye a zwi londa." 
Acts18:18 Paulo a dzula Korinta na vhaṅwe Vhakhriste tshifhinga tshilapfu, a konou ṱuwa nga tshikepe e na Phrisila na Akwila vha ya Siria. Hone a sa athu takuwa Khengria, o vheulisa mavhudzi awe, ngauri o vha o anela Mudzimu muano." 
Acts18:19 Vha tshi swika Efesa a dzhena sinagogoni a thoma u amba navho vha tshi sumbedzana nḓila. Vha mu humbela uri a dzule navho tshifhinga tshilapfu, hone ene a hana. A tshi vho ṱuwa a vha vhudza a ri, “Arali Mudzimu a tshi funa ndi ḓo dovha nda ḓa nda ni ṱola.” U ralo ha mbo ḓi vha u ṱuwa hawe Efesa, a sia Phrisila na Akwila henefho." 
Acts18:20  
Acts18:21  
Acts18:22 A tshi swika Khisaria a gonya Jerusalema, a reshana na tshivhidzo a konou fhirela Antiokia." 
Acts18:23 O no fhedza maḓuvhanyana henefho, a ṱuwa. A buḓekanya ḽa Galata na ḽa Frigia, a tshi enda a tshi khwaṱhisa Vhakhriste." 
Acts18:24 Muṅwe Mujuda a no pfi Apolosi o bebwaho Alekzandria, a ḓa Efesa. Onoyo o vha e muambi muhulu nahone Maṅwalo a tshi a ḓivha vhukuma." 
Acts18:25 O vha o funziwa a Nḓila ya Muṋe washu, a tshi funza nga Yesu nga u fungelela a sa bvi nḓilani. Hone o vha a tshi tou ḓivha ndovhedzo ya Johanisi fhedzi." 
Acts18:26 A ya sinagogoni a amba a sa ofhi tshithu. Phrisila na Akwila vha tshi mu pfa, vha ya nae hayani vha swika vha mu ṱalutshedza tshoṱhe nḓila ya Mudzimu." 
Acts18:27 Apolosi a ri u ya Akhaya, Vhakhriste vha Efesa vha ṅwalela vhafunziwa vha henengei uri vha mu ṱanganedze zwavhuḓi. A ri u swika a farisa zwihulu avho vhe vha vha vhatendi nga vhuthu ha Mudzimu." 
Acts18:28 Ndi uri o vha a tshi kona u kunda Majuda phanḓa ha vhathu musi vha tshi hanedzana nae, a tshi sumbedza nga Maṅwalo uri Yesu ndi Ene Mesia." 
Acts19:1 Musi Apolosi e Korinta, Paulo a buḓekanya shango nga matavhani, a swika Efesa. Henefho a wana vhaṅwe vhafunziwa." 
Acts19:2 A vha vhudzisa a ri, “Nṋa no vhuya na ṱanganedza Muya Mukhethwa musi ni tshi vha vhatendi naa?” Vhone vha fhindula vha ri, “Zwa Muya Mukhethwa a ri athu vhuya ra zwi pfa.”" 
Acts19:3 Paulo a vhudzisa a ri, “Matsina no lovhedzwa nga ndovhedzo ya nnyi?” Vhone vha fhindula vha ri, “Nga ya Johanisi.”" 
Acts19:4 Paulo a ri, “Johanisi o lovhedza vho rembuluwaho a tshi vhudza Vhaisraele uri vha fulufhele a no ḓo mu tevhela, a tshi amba Yesu.”" 
Acts19:5 Vha tshi pfa Paulo a tshi ralo, vha lovhedzwa uri vha vhe vha Yesu Muṋe washu." 
Acts19:6 Paulo a vha vhea zwanḓa, Muya Mukhethwa a mbo ḓi tsela khavho, vha thoma u amba nga ndimi vha ita na u porofita." 
Acts19:7 Vhoṱhe vhó ṱangana vho vha vha tshi nga vha vhanna vha 12. 
Acts19:8 Paulo a fhedza miṅwedzi miraru a tshi ya sinagogoni a tshi linga u ṱalutshedza vhathu uri vha pfesese zwa muvhuso wa Mudzimu nga u ḓi sumbedzana navho, a sa ofhi tshithu." 
Acts19:9 Vhaṅwe vhavho vha konyolela matanda nḓevheni, vha sasaladza na Nḓila ya Muṋe washu henefho vhukati ha vhathu. Paulo a tshi vhona vha tshi ralo a ṱuwa na vhafunziwa, vhaḽa a vha sia henefho, ḓuvha ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe a ya a tshi amba na vhathu tshikoloni tsha Thiranosi." 
Acts19:10 Zwa ita miṅwaha mivhili, ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽa vhuya ḽa ṱanganya vhathu vhoṱhe vha vundu ḽa Asia, Majuda na vhannḓa." 
Acts19:11 Mudzimu o vha a tshi shuma nga Paulo a ita maḓembe ane a sa sokou anzela u vhonwa," 
Acts19:12 lwe vhathu vha vha vha tshi kona u dzhia dugu kana fasikoṱi dze vha kwama muvhili wawe ngadzo, vha dzi isa kha vhalwadze, vha fhola, vha na thuṅwa dza Saṱhane dza bva khavho." 
Acts19:13 Zwino vhaṅwe Majuda vhe na vhone vha vha vha tshi enda vha tshi pandela thuṅwa vha vho linga u shuma nga dzina ḽa Yesu Muṋe washu vha tshi ri, “Nga dzina ḽa Yesu ane a ḓivhadzwa nga Paulo ndi ri ibvani zwino.”" 
Acts19:14 Vhe vha vha vha tshi ita zwenezwo ndi vhana vhaṱanu na vhavhili vha Sikefa, muṅwe wa vhotshifhe vhahulu vha Majuda." 
Acts19:15 Thuṅwa yone ya amba navho ya ri, “Yesu nṋe ndi a mu ḓivha, na Paulo ndi tou mu fhedza zwavhuḓi, zwino iwe ni vhonnyi-ha?”" 
Acts19:16 Munna we a vha e na thuṅwa a vha vutshela a vha kunda, a vha huvhadza lwe vha bva nḓuni yeneyo vha tshi tou fhufhura dzinḓevhe vhe fhedzi." 
Acts19:17 Majuda na vhannḓa vhoṱhe vha Efesa vha tshi pfa zwenezwo vha dzhenwa nga nyofho, dzina ḽa Yesu Muṋe washu ḽa tou ṋaṋa u huliswa." 
Acts19:18 Vhanzhi vhe vha vha vhatendi vha ḓa vha bula manditi avho vhukati ha vhathu. 
Acts19:19 Vhathu vhanzhi vhe vha vha vha tshi ita zwa manditi vha posa bugu dzavho fhethu huthihi dza tou vha thulwi, vha dzi fhisa muṅwe na muṅwe a tshi zwi vhona. Vha tshi ṱanganya mutengo wa bugu idzo vha wana u tshi swika maseṱha a 50 000." 
Acts19:20 Ipfi ḽa Muṋe washu ḽa ḓi anḓadzea nga u ralo ḽi tshi khwaṱha ḽi tshi ya. 
Acts19:21 Musi ho no itea zwenezwo, Paulo a elekanya u buḓekanya ḽa Makedonia na ḽa Akhaya a fhirele Jerusalema. A ri, “Ndó no vha henengei ndi fanela u ya nda vhona na zwa Roma.”" 
Acts19:22 Ndi hone a tshi dzhia vhaṅwe vhavhili kha vhatikedzi vhawe, Timoti na Erastosi, a vha ruma Makedonia, ene muṋe a sala vunduni ḽa Asia tshifhinganyana." 
Acts19:23 Nga tshifhinga tshenetsho ha vuwa phusuphusu khulu Efesa, tshilwelwa i Nḓila ya Muṋe washu." 
Acts19:24 Muṅwe mufuli wa siliva a no pfi Dimitriosi o vha a tshi fula zwiḓu zwi no fana na thembele ya mudzimu wa tshisadzi u no pfi Arthemisi. Vhutsila hawe honoho vhafuli vho vha vha tshi vhuelwa zwihulu ngaho. 
Acts19:25 Ndi hone a tshi kuvhanganya vhatsila khathihi na vhaṅwe vha shumaho navho, a amba navho a ri, “Vhanna vha hashu, ni tou zwi ḓivha zwavhuḓi uri hoyu mushumo ndi wone u ri ḓiselaho lupfumo." 
Acts19:26 Zwino na inwi vhaṋe ni khou zwi vhona na u zwi pfa zwine hoyu munna Paulo a khou ita. U ri hei midzimu yo itwaho nga vhathu a si midzimu na kathihi, zwino vhanzhi vha fhano Efesa, hone kha ndi tou ri vha vundu ḽoṱhe ḽa Asia, o no ḓi vha fhura nahone vha vho mu fulufhela." 
Acts19:27 Zwino tshi dinaho ndi uri hoyu mushumo washu vhathu a vha tsha ḓo u takalela. Zwi si izwo fhedzi, iṅwe khombo ndi ya uri thembele ya mudzimutshisadzi muhulu Arthemisi i ḓo ṱuwa i si tsha vha tshithu, ha ḓo vha u fa ha dzina ḽawo, wone u re mudzimu u no rerelelwa nga vundu ḽoṱhe ḽa Asia na shango ḽoṱhe!”" 
Acts19:28 Vha tshi pfa a tshi ralo vha tou halifha, vha thoma u zhamba vha ri, “Muhuluhulu ndi Arthemisi wa Vhaefesa!”" 
Acts19:29 Vilili ḽa ṱanganya muḓi woṱhe. Gogo ḽa dzhia Gayosi na Aristhakhosi, vhanna vhavhili vha Makedonia vhe vha vha vha tshi tshimbila na Paulo, vha gidimela navho sitediamu." 
Acts19:30 Paulo a tshi ṱoḓa u dzhena kha gogo vhafunziwa vha mu dzivhisa. 
Acts19:31 Maṅwe magota a vundu ḽeneḽo vhe vha vha vha tshi pfana nae na vhone vha swikisa fhungo ḽa u mu vhudza uri a songo vhuya a kanda sitediamu. 
Acts19:32 Vilili ḽone ho vha hu hone ḽo ṱanganedzana, ho vuwa dzheme-dzheme, muṅwe a tshi amba zwawe, muṅwe a amba zwawe, ngauri vhunzhi havho na uri muṱangano wo vha u wa mini vho vha vha sa ḓivhi." 
Acts19:33 Majuda vha rangisa Alekzannda phanḓa, vhaṅwe vhathu vha konou mu huwelela zwine a fanela u amba. A fhumudza vhathu nga tshanḓa a tshi ri a vha ṱalutshedze." 
Acts19:34 Vhathu vhone vha tshi vhona uri ndi Mujuda vha zhamba mazha vha vhuya vha swikisa awara mbili vha tshi ri, “Muhuluhulu ndi Arthemisi wa Vhaefesa!”" 
Acts19:35 Vho ḓo fhumudzwa nga muṅwaleli wa muḓi. O amba navho a ri, “Inwi vhanna vha Efesa, a hu na a sa zwi ḓivhi uri muḓi uno wa Efesa ndi wone u lindaho thembele ya Arthemisi mudzimu muhulu na tshiḽa tshifanyiso tshe tsha wa tshi tshi bva ṱaḓulu." 
Acts19:36 Zwino vhunga hu si na ane a nga hanedza haya mafhungo, rudzani mbilu uri ni sa ḓo dzhena mafhungo nga vhutsiluni." 
Acts19:37 Zwino vhonani no sokou ḓisa havha vhanna ngeno, hu uri a vha na tshe vha tswa thembeleni, nahone a hu na na samba ḽe vha sema mudzimu washu ngaḽo." 
Acts19:38 Ri na maḓuvha a khoro, na magota a hone; arali Dimitriosi na vhatsila ngae vhe na muthu o vha khakhelaho, nga vha ye vha hwelelane henengei." 
Acts19:39 Zwino arali hu kha ḓi vha na tshiṅwe tshine na lila ngatsho tshi ḓo tou ambiwa tshivhidzoni tsha vhadzulapo tshine tsha ḓo tou rambwa lwa mulayo. 
Acts19:40 Hafhu ni ḓivhe uri zwo iteaho ṋamusi zwi nga kha ḓi ri dzhenisa khakhathini, ra vho pfi ro sokou vusa vilili hu si na tsho khakheaho. Ri tshi sengiswa ra sa tsha ḓo kona u ṱalutshedza, ri si tsha ḓivha uri ri nga ri ḽo vuswa ngani.”" 
Acts19:41 A tshi fhedza u amba a ri vhathu vha balangane. 
Acts20:1 Musi vilili ḽo no fhela Paulo a kuvhanganya vhafunziwa a amba maipfi a u vha khwaṱhisa, a konou onesana navho a takuwa a fhirela Makedonia." 
Acts20:2 A tshimbila na mivhundu ya henefho a tshi enda a tshi vhudza vhathu mafhungo manzhi a u vha khwaṱhisa, a konou fhirela Giriki;" 
Acts20:3 a fhedza miṅwedzi miraru hone. A tshi kha ḓi ḓilugisela u ya Siria, Majuda vha mu langana, a vho huma nga Makedonia." 
Acts20:4 Sophathere ṅwana wa Phirosi wa Beria, na Aristhakhosi na Sekundusi vha Thesalonika, na Gayosi wa Derebe, na Timoti, na Thikhikhosi na Throfimosi vha vundu ḽa Asia, vha mu fhelekedza." 
Acts20:5 Ha ranga vhone u ṱuwa vha yo ri lindela Troasi. 
Acts20:6 Musi vhuṱambo ha Vhurotho vhu si na mbilisa ho no fhela, riṋe ra namela tshikepe Filipi, ho no fhela maḓuvha maṱanu ra dovha ra ṱangana navho Troasi, ra fhedza vhege ri henefho." 
Acts20:7 Nga Swondaha ra kuvhanganela u ḽa Tshilalelo. Paulo nga u ḓivha uri u ḓo vuwa a tshi ṱuwa a amba na vhathu u swika vhusiku vhuhulu. 
Acts20:8 Henefho kamarani ya tshitizi ye ra vha ro kuvhangana khayo ho vha hu na mbone nnzhi. 
Acts20:9 Huno muṅwe muṱhannga a no pfi Yuthikhosi o vha o dzula kha lumeme lwa fasiṱere. Huno Paulo a tshi khou ḓi funza a tshi ya, ene a vha a tshi khou kumedza a tshi ya, a vhuya e nga khofhe mbwandaa! A mbo ḓi wela fhasi a tshi bva kha fuloro ya vhuraru. Vha tshi mu takula vha wana o fa." 
Acts20:10 Paulo ene a tsa a swika a shuvhama nṱha hawe a mu kuvhatedza a ri, “Ni songo zhamba; u khou tshila!”" 
Acts20:11 A dovha a gonya tshitizi, a swika a ṅwata vhurotho ha Tshilalelo a ḽa. A funza vhathu tshifhinga tshilapfu, mapfuvhi a vhuya a tswuka, a konou ṱuwa." 
Acts20:12 Uḽa muṱhanngana vha ṱuwa nae a tshi tshila, vha pfa vho rudza mbilu vhukuma." 
Acts20:13 Riṋe ra fhirela phanḓa ra swika ra namela tshikepe ra ya Asosi, he Paulo a vha o ri ri ḓo mu namedza hone. A tshi ralo ndi nge ene a vha a tshi ḓo tou tshimbila nga milenzhe." 
Acts20:14 A ri u swika kha riṋe Asosi ra mu namedza ra fhirela Mitulini. 
Acts20:15 Nga matshelo ra takuwa henefho nga tshikepe ra swika huṅwe fhethu ho livhanaho na Khiosi. Nga mbamatshelo ra swika Samosi; nga ḽi tevhelaho ḽeneḽo ra dzhena Milithosi – 
Acts20:16 ngauri Paulo o vha o elekanya u fhira á songo dzhena Efesa, uri a si lenge vunduni ḽa Asia. O vha a tshi khou gidimela uri arali zwi tshi itea a vhe o no vha Jerusalema nga ḓuvha ḽa Pentekoste." 
Acts20:17 Naho zwo ralo, Paulo e henefho Milithosi a ruma muthu Efesa u yo mu vhidzela vhalisa vha tshivhidzo." 
Acts20:18 Vha tshi swika a amba navho a ri, “Vhutshilo hanga inwi ni vhu ḓivha zwavhuḓi u ṱuwa tshee nda ḓa Asia lwa u thoma." 
Acts20:19 Naho ndo vha ndi kha zwililo na u tambula nga zwimbevha zwa Majuda ndo ḓi shumela Muṋe washu nga u ḓiṱukufhadza tshoṱhe. 
Acts20:20 Ni a zwi ḓivha na uri musi ndi tshi ḓivhadza ipfi ḽa Mudzimu ndo ni funza vhathuni na mahayani aṋu hu si na tshine nda ni tshivha. 
Acts20:21 Majuda na vhannḓa ndo vha laya ndo tou khwaṱhisa uri vha rembulutshele ha Mudzimu vha ṱanganedze Yesu Muṋe washu. 
Acts20:22 Zwino naho ndi sa ḓivhi zwine zwa ḓo nngwela henengei Jerusalema, ndi a ya; Muya Mukhethwa u khou nkombetshedza uri ndi ye." 
Acts20:23 “Tshine nda ḓivha ndi uri muḓini muṅwe na muṅwe Muya Mukhethwa u ḓi ntsevha uri u farwa na u shengedzwa zwo dzula zwo nndindela. 
Acts20:24 Hone vhutshilo hanga a si tshithu, tshine nda lila ndi u ṱhaphudza mbambe yanga na u fhedzisa mushumo we Yesu Muṋe washu a nṋea, ndi amba wa u ḓivhadza mafhungo maḓifha a vhuthu ha Mudzimu." 
Acts20:25 “Ndi a ḓivha uri inwi vhe nda vha ndi tshi enda ndi tshi ni ḓivhadza a muvhuso wa Mudzimu, a hu na na muthihi waṋu ane a ḓo dovha a mmbona." 
Acts20:26 Ndi zwone zwine nda ni vhudza ṋamusi nda ri: arali muṅwe waṋu a sala a tshi lovha, u ḓo vha u si mulandu wanga," 
Acts20:27 ngauri nṋe a hu na tshe nda ni dzumbela ndi tshi ḓivhadza zwe Mudzimu a dzula o dzudzanya. 
Acts20:28 Ḓilondeni-ha ni londole na sambi ḽoṱhe ḽe Muya Mukhethwa a ni ita vhalisa vhaḽo, uri ni lise tshivhidzo tsha Mudzimu tshe a ḓivhumbela nga malofha a Murwa wawe." 
Acts20:29 Nṋe ndi a zwi ḓivha uri ndi tshi ṱuwa ni ḓo ḓelwa nga maṱalerwa a vhuhali ane a ḓo tou hana u vhona sambi. 
Acts20:30 Na vhukati haṋu hu ḓo vuwa vhadziamazwifhi vha tshi ṱoḓa u ungeledza vhafunziwa uri vha tevhele vhone. 
Acts20:31 Ndi zwine nda ri fhaṱuwani, ni si hangwe zwiḽa zwe nda ni laya noṱhe nga muthihi nga muthihi ndi tshi lila, ndi sa aweli vhusiku na masiari, nda vhuya nda ita miṅwaha miraru." 
Acts20:32 “Zwino ndi ni kumedza zwanḓani zwa Mudzimu na kha ipfi ḽa vhuthu hawe. Ndi Ene ane a kona u ni fhaṱa na u ni ṋea mukovhe une a u ṋea vhoṱhe vha re vhawe. 
Acts20:33 A hu na we nda tama maseṱha awe kana musuku wawe kana zwiambaro zwawe. 
Acts20:34 Inwi vhaṋe ni a zwi ḓivha uri ndo vha ndi tshi tou ḓishumela nga zwanḓa zwanga hezwi, na khonani dzanga dzi tshi ḽa zwa ṋalani dzanga." 
Acts20:35 Nga u shuma nda bva biko ndo ni sumbedza uri ri fanela u farisa vhahoṱa, ri sa hangwi ḽiḽa ḽe Ene Yesu Muṋe washu a amba a ri, ‘Mashudu a muṋei a fhira a muṋeiwa!’ ”" 
Acts20:36 Paulo a ri u fhedza u amba a gwadama navho vhoṱhe, a rabela." 
Acts20:37 Vhoṱhe vha onesana nae nga u mu kuvhatedza, ho vuwa tshililo tshihulu." 
Acts20:38 Vho vha vho vhaiseswa nga ḽiḽa ipfi ḽawe ḽa uri a vha tsha ḓo dovha vha mu vhona. Ndi hone vha tshi mu bvisa vha mu swikisa tshikepeni. 
Acts21:1 Ra onesana navho ra ṱuwa; ra buḓekanya nga tshikepe ra swika Khoso. Nga matshelo ra swika Rodosi, u bva afho ra fhirela Phathara." 
Acts21:2 Henefho ra wana tshikepe tshi no ya Finikia, ra mbo ḓi namela ra ṱuwa." 
Acts21:3 Ri tshi vho tou ri Kipirosi khefhaḽaa, ra hu sia thungo ya devhula, ha vha u fhirela Siria. Ri tshi swika Tiro tshikepe tsha rula muhwalo watsho, ra tsa." 
Acts21:4 Henefho ra wana vhaṅwe vhafunziwa, ra fhedza vhege ri tshi dzula navho. Vhone vha vhudza Paulo vho sevhiwa nga Muya Mukhethwa uri a si fhirele Jerusalema." 
Acts21:5 Ho ḓo ri tshifhinga tshi tshi swika ra dovha ra dzhena nḓilani. Ri tshi ṱuwa afho muḓini vhoṱhe vha ri bvisa, vhó tou bva na vhasadzi na vhana. Khunzikhunzini ya lwanzhe ra gwadama muṱavhani ra rabela." 
Acts21:6 Ra konou onesana navho, vhone vha tshi khou humela mahayani riṋe ra vha ri tshi namela tshikepe." 
Acts21:7 U bva Tiro ra tshimbila nga tshikepe ra swika Tholemai. Henefho ra reshana na vhaṅwe Vhakhriste nga riṋe, ra ṱwa navho ḓuvha ḽithihi." 
Acts21:8 Nga matshelo ra takuwa ra ya ra dzhena Khisaria. Henefho ra swikela muṱani wa muevangeli Filipi ra dzula henefho. Filipi onoyo o vha e muṅwe wa vhaḽa vhaṱanu na vhavhili vhe vha nangiwa Jerusalema. 
Acts21:9 O vha e na vhana vhawe vhaṋa vha vhasidzana vhe vha vha vhe na mpho ya vhuporofita. 
Acts21:10 Ho ḓo ri ro no ita maḓuvha ri henefho, ha swika muṅwe muporofita a no pfi Agabosi a tshi bva Judia." 
Acts21:11 A ḓa kha riṋe a dzhia bannda ya Paulo a ḓivhofha milenzhe na zwanḓa ngayo, a ri, “Muya Mukhethwa u ri, ‘Muṋe wa bannda hei u ḓo vhoxwa sa zwenezwi nga Majuda Jerusalema, vha mu kumedza vhannḓa.’ ”" 
Acts21:12 U pfa zwenezwo riṋe na vhathu vha henefho ra kwengweledza Paulo uri a si fhirele Jerusalema. 
Acts21:13 Ene a fhindula a ri, “Ni itani? Ni lilelani? Ni mpfiselani vhuṱungu? A vha nṋe a tho ngo ḓiimisela u vhoxwa fhedzi, ndo ḓilugisela na u vhulahelwa dzina ḽa Yesu Muṋe washu.”" 
Acts21:14 Ri tshi vhona a sa tendi zwine ra amba ra vho sokou mu litsha ra ri, “Nga hu itwe zwine Muṋe washu a funa.”" 
Acts21:15 Ho ḓo ri tshifhinga tshi tshi swika ra goda zwithu zwashu ra livha Jerusalema. 
Acts21:16 Vhaṅwe vhafunziwa vha Khisaria vha ṱuwa na riṋe vha ri isa muṱani wa muṅwe munna a bvaho Kipirosi a no pfi Munasoni, we ra vha ri tshi khou ya u dzula nae. Munasoni onoyo o vha a tshi ḓi vha mufunziwa u bva mathomoni." 
Acts21:17 Ri tshi swika Jerusalema Vhakhriste vha ri ṱanganedza nga dakalo. 
Acts21:18 Nga matshelo Paulo a ṱuwa na riṋe ra yo vhona Jakopo, ra wana na vhalisa vhoṱhe vha tshivhidzo vhe nae." 
Acts21:19 Paulo a vha resha a konou vha toololela zwoṱhe zwe Mudzimu a zwi shuma ngae kha vhannḓa. 
Acts21:20 Vhone vha tshi pfa mafhungo eneo vha renda Mudzimu. Vha vhudza Paulo vha ri, “Wa hashu, vha khou vhona uri ho no vha na vhatendi vha Majuda vha no vhalwa nga zwigidi, vha ro sa funa u kwatuwa kha Mulayo wa Mushe." 
Acts21:21 Zwino vho pfa vhuṱanzi ha uri inwi ni enda ni tshi funza Majuda vha dzulaho mashangoni a vhannḓa uri vha ṱutshele Mulayo wa Mushe na uri vha songo tsha fumbisa vhana vhavho kana u tevhedza maitele a Tshijuda. 
Acts21:22 Zwino a ri ḓivhi uri ri nga tou zwi ita hani; ngauri zwauri ni fhano vha ḓo zwi pfa; a hu na na nga iṅwe nḓila. 
Acts21:23 Inwi itani nga hune ra ni vhudza. Hu na vhanna vhaṋa hafha vho anelaho Mudzimu muano. 
Acts21:24 Ṱuwani navho ni ḓibaḓekanye navho kha vhuṱambo ha u kumululwa, ni vha bvisele tshelede yoṱhe uri vha kone u vheulwa ṱhoho. Ndi hone muṅwe na muṅwe a tshi ḓo ḓivha uri zwine na ambelwa zwone ndi mazwifhi fhedzi, inwi ni tshila nga u tevhedza Mulayo." 
Acts21:25 Arali vhe vhaḽa vhannḓa vho vhaho vhatendi, tenda ro no ḓi vha ṅwalela luṅwalo, ra vha vhudza uri ro vhofha ḽa uri vha si ḽe ṋama yo sumelwaho midzimu ya zwifanyiso, kana malofha kana phukha ye ya fa nga u tou tshipiwa, na uri vha sendele kule na vhuṱudzi ha u dzekana nga tsha muṱa.”" 
Acts21:26 Ndi hone Paulo a tshi dzhia vhaḽa vhanna, nga matshelo a dzhena navho vhuṱamboni ha u ḓikumulula; a ya thembeleni a ḓivhadza ḓuvha ḽine vhuṱambo ha ḓo fhela ngaḽo – ḽone ḽine muṅwe na muṅwe wavho a ḓo ṋekedzelwa nduvho dzawe ngaḽo." 
Acts21:27 Ayo maḓuvha maṱanu na mavhili a tshi vho ṱoḓou fhela vhaṅwe Majuda vha bvaho vunduni ḽa Asia vha vhona Paulo thembeleni. Vha fhiriṱanya gogo ḽoṱhe vha fara Paulo. 
Acts21:28 Vha zhamba vha ri, “Hee vhanna vha Israele, na ri phalalaa! Uḽa munna a no tshimbila hoṱhe-hoṱhe a tshi funza vhathu vhoṱhe u shandukela lushaka lwa Israele na Mulayo wa Mushe na thembele, khoyu. Zwino o no sokou sia o ḓodza afha fhethu hukhethwa tshika nga u sokou hwala vhannḓa a tshi vha ḓisa thembeleni!”" 
Acts21:29 (Vha tshi ralo ndi uri vho vha vho vhona Paulo e na Throfimosi wa Efesa afho muḓini, zwino vha vho sokou humbulela uri na thembeleni o ḓi dzhena nae.)" 
Acts21:30 Ha vuwa vilinga muḓini woṱhe, vhathu vha ḓa nga u gidima vha tshi bva thungo dzoṱhe, vha mu khwikhwidzela nnḓa, kathihi fhedzi mahothi a thembele a valwa." 
Acts21:31 Gogo ḽi tshi kha ḓi ri ḽi a mu vhulaha, fhungo ḽa vha ḽo no swika kha mulangammbi wa Muroma uri zwi re Jerusalema a si zwiṱuku." 
Acts21:32 Mulangammbi u pfa zwenezwo a mbo ḓi dzhia vhalangagomane na maswole, vha tsela hu na gogo nga u gidima. Vhathu vha tshi vhona mulangammbi na maswole awe vha mbo ḓi litsha u rwa Paulo." 
Acts21:33 Mulangammbi a sendela a fara Paulo a ri a vhoxwe nga tshaini mbili. Ndi hone a tshi vhudzisa a ri, “Nṋa uyu muthu ndi nnyi? O tshinyani?”" 
Acts21:34 Muṅwe a sokou zhamba tshino, muṅwe a zhamba tshiḽa, dzheme-dzheme ḽa hula lwe mulangammbi a si kone na u pfa zwavhuḓi uri hu nga vha ho tshinyalani. Ndi hone a tshi vho sokou ri Paulo a iswe gammbani ya maswole." 
Acts21:35 Vha tshi swika nae zwiṱepisini vha vhuya vha tou mu hwala, ngauri gogo ho vha hu hone ḽo vuwa tshoṱhe." 
Acts21:36 Vhoṱhe vha vho mu sala murahu vha tshi khou zhamba vha tshi ri, “Kha a fe!”" 
Acts21:37 Vha tshi vho ṱoḓou dzhena gammbani ya maswole Paulo a amba na mulangammbi a ri, “Ndi nga amba navho naa?” Mulangammbi a mu fhindula a ri, “Mathina ni amba Tshigiriki?" 
Acts21:38 Zwi amba uri a si inwi uḽa munna wa Muegipita we tshiḽa tshifhinga a vusa mufhirifhiri o ranga phanḓa mmbi ya matherorisi a 4 000 o fara zwihali o livha sogani?” 
Acts21:39 Paulo a fhindula a ri, “Nṋe ndi Mujuda o bebwaho Tharasisi, shangoni ḽa Kilikia; ndi mudzulapo wa muḓi u ḓivheaho. Zwino ndi khou humbela uri ndi tendelwe zwanga u amba na gogo heḽi.”" 
Acts21:40 Mulangammbi a mu tendela. Paulo a ima nṱha ha zwiṱepisi a fhumudza vhathu nga tshanḓa. Vha tshi tou ṅo a thoma u amba navho nga Tshiheberu a ri," 
Acts22:1 “Vhanna vha hashu, vhokhotsi na vhakomana, zwino nthetsheleseni ndi tshi ḓifhindulela!”" 
Acts22:2 Vha tshi pfa a tshi amba nga Tshiheberu, vha mbo ḓi tou fhumula tshoṱhe, Paulo a konou isa phanḓa a ri:" 
Acts22:3 “Nṋe ndi Mujuda o bebwaho Tharasisi kha ḽa Kilikia, hone nda aluswa henefhano Jerusalema ndi mufunziwa wa Gamaliele. Mulayo wa vhomakhulukuku washu nda u funzwa nda si siedze, ndó ḓikumedza Mudzimu sa inwi noṱhe zwino." 
Acts22:4 Vhathu vho faraho hei nḓila ndo vha tovhola uri vha vhuye vha tou vhulawa. Nda fara vhanna na vhasadzi ndi tshi vha hoṋela dzhele. 
Acts22:5 Tshifhe muhulu na khoro yoṱhe ya lushaka ndi ṱhanzi dzanga vhunga vhe vhone vhe vha nṋea maṅwalo o ṅwalelwaho Majuda vha hashu vha re Damasko. Nangoho nṋe nda ya uri ndi fare Vhakhriste ndi vhuye navho Jerusalema vho vhoxwa uri vha wane ṱhamu. 
Acts22:6 “Musi ndi nḓilani, ndi tshi vho hovhelela Damasko, masiari tshivhangalala kathihi fhedzi nda penyelwa nga tshedza tshihulu tshi tshi bva ṱaḓulu, tsha tou mputela." 
Acts22:7 Nda wela fhasi nda pfa ipfi ḽi tshi ri, ‘Saulo! Saulo! U ntovholelani?’" 
Acts22:8 Nṋe nda fhindula nda ri, ‘Muṋe wanga, ndi khou amba na nnyi?’ A mphindula a ri, ‘Ndi Nṋe Yesu wa Nazaretha ane wa mu tovhola.’" 
Acts22:9 Vhanna vhe nda vha ndi navho vha sokou vhona tshedza, hone vha si pfe zwine ipfi ḽa amba." 
Acts22:10 Nṋe nda vhudzisa nda ri, ‘Zwino ndi iteni Muṋe wanga?’ Muṋe washu a fhindula a ri, ‘Vuwa u dzhene Damasko. Ndi hone hune wa ḓo vhudzwa zwoṱhe zwine Mudzimu a ṱoḓa u tshi ita.’" 
Acts22:11 Zwino vhunga tshiḽa tshedza tsho vha tsho mpofudza nga lupenyo lwatsho, nda dzhena Damasko khonani dzanga dzo no tou mpfara nga tshanḓa." 
Acts22:12 “Henefho ho vha hu na muṅwe munna a no pfi Ananiasi, muthu a ofhaho Mudzimu, a tevhedzaho Mulayo, a huliswaho nga Majuda vhoṱhe vha dzulaho henefho." 
Acts22:13 A ḓa a ima tsini hanga a ri, ‘Paulo murathu wanga, dovhani ni vhone!’ Kathihi fhedzi nda mbo ḓi dovha nda vhona, nda mu lavhelesa." 
Acts22:14 A dovha a ri, ‘Mudzimu wa vhomakhulukuku washu o ni nanga uri ni ḓivhe zwauri zwine a funa ndi zwifhio na uri ni vhone Muḓinḓa wawe muvhuya, ni mu pfe a tshi amba nga mulomo wawe." 
Acts22:15 Ni ḓo vha ṱhanzi yawe ine ya ḓo vhudza vhathu vhoṱhe zwe na zwi vhona na zwe na zwi pfa. 
Acts22:16 Zwino ni kha ḓi lengelani? Takuwani ni lovhedzwe, ni ṱanzwiwe vhutshinyi haṋu ni tshi khou mu rabela!’" 
Acts22:17 “Zwino ndó no vhuelela Jerusalema, ndi tshi khou rabela thembeleni nda pfa ndi Muyani, nda vhona Yesu henefho, a tshi khou amba na Nṋe a tshi ri, ‘Ṱavhanya u ṱuwe hafhano Jerusalema ngauri vhathu a vha nga ṱanganedzi zwine wa ḓo ṱanzilela nga Nṋe.’" 
Acts22:18  
Acts22:19 Nṋe nda fhindula nda ri, ‘Muṋe wanga, hufha vhathu vha tshi zwi ḓivha zwavhuḓivhuḓi uri nṋe ndo vha ndi tshi ya sinagogoni nda fara vhane vha u fulufhela nda vha rwa!" 
Acts22:20 Na zwiḽa malofha a ṱhanzi yau Stefane a tshi shululwa nṋe ndo vha ndi hone, ndi tshi zwi takalela! Na zwiambaro zwa vhavhulahi vhawe, mulindi wazwo o ḓi vha nṋe.’" 
Acts22:21 Muṋe washu a fhindula a ri, ‘Nṋe ndi ri ṱuwa! Ndi kha ḓi ḓo u ruma ngei kule-kule kha vhannḓa!’ ”" 
Acts22:22 Paulo a amba u swika henefho vhathu vho ḓi thetshelesa. Huno vha tshi pfa a tshi ralo vha thoma u zhamba vha tshi ri, “A ri tsha funa na u mu vhona, kha a vhulawe! Tshithu tsho raliho ndi khwiṋe tshi tshi fa!”" 
Acts22:23 Vha zhamba vha tshi gidima vha tshi bvula zwiambaro zwavho, vha tshi phusula na mabuse," 
Acts22:24 mulangammbi wa Muroma a vhudza vhathu vhawe uri vha dzhenise Paulo gammbani ya maswole, vha mu rwe nga nnzi uri a vha vhudze uri ndi mini Majuda vha tshi khou mu ṱavhela mukosi." 
Acts22:25 Musi vha tshi khou mu vhamba uri a rwiwe, Paulo a amba na mulangagomane o imaho henefho a ri, “Nṋa mulayo no u wanafhi wa u rwa mudzulapo wa Roma a songo vhuya a thoma u sengiswa ha wanala mulandu wawe?”" 
Acts22:26 Mulangagomane a tshi pfa a tshi ralo, a ya kha mulangammbi a ri, “Nṋa vha ṱoḓa u ri vhonisani vhone? Munna hoyu ndi mudzulapo wa Roma!”" 
Acts22:27 Ndi hone mulangammbi a tshi ya kha Paulo a ri, “Inwi, dzonu mmbudza! Atsina inwi ni mudzulapo wa Roma?” Paulo a fhindula a ri, “Ndi zwone!”" 
Acts22:28 Mulangammbi a ri, “Nṋe uri ndi vhe mudzulapo wa Roma ndo tou thoma nda bvisa tshelede i si na vhukono.” Paulo a ri, “Nṋe-ha ndo tou bebwa ndo ralo.”" 
Acts22:29 Zwenezwo vhaḽa vhanna vhe vha vha vha tshi ṱoḓa u sengulusa Paulo vha mbo ḓi zwi litsha; na uḽa mulangammbi a tshi pfa uri uyo munna we a mu vhofha ndi mudzulapo wa Roma, a thoma u dzhenwa nga nyofho." 
Acts22:30 Mulangammbi nga u funa u ḓivha uri vhukumakuma Majuda vha khou ri Paulo o tshinyani, nga matshelo a bvisa Paulo dzhele, a ri vhotshifhe vhahulwane na Khoro yoṱhe ya Majuda vha kuvhangane. A konou dzhia Paulo a mu imisa phanḓa havho." 
Acts23:1 Paulo a lavhelesa khoro a ri, “Vha hashu, ndi tshi sedza kutshilele kwanga maṱoni a Mudzimu u swika ṋamusi ndi pfa luvalo lwanga lwo ṱamba.”" 
Acts23:2 Ananiasi tshifhe muhulu a amba na vho imaho tsini ha Paulo uri vha mu bomodze. 
Acts23:3 Paulo ene a ri, “Mudzimu u ḓo rwa enewe luvhondo lwo sokou fhomiwaho nga nnḓa! U nga ri wo dzulela u ntsengisa nga Mulayo, wa dovha wa pfuka Mulayo nga u nthwisa!”" 
Acts23:4 Vhathu vho imaho tsini na Paulo vha mu vhudza vha ri, “A ni zwi pfi uri ni tshi ralo ni khou sema tshifhe muhulu wa Mudzimu naa?”" 
Acts23:5 Paulo a fhindula a ri, “Vhanna vha hashu, a tho ngo zwi ḓivha uri ndi ene tshifhe muhulu. Maṅwalo iṱali a tshi ri, ‘U songo sema muvhusi wa lushaka lwau.’ ”" 
Acts23:6 Paulo a tshi tou vhona uri kha vhanna vha khoro vhaṅwe ndi Vhasadukei vhaṅwe ndi Vhafarisei, a vhidzelela henefho khoroni a ri, “Hee vha hashu! Nṋe ndi Mufarisei o bebwaho nga Vhafarisei. Zwino ndi vhona zwenezwi zwa u sengiselwa uri ndi mini ndi tshi lavhelela u vuwa ha vhafu!”" 
Acts23:7 A tshi tou ralo a vha o luṱanya Vhafarisei na Vhasadukei, khoro ya mbo ḓi fhandekana nga vhukati." 
Acts23:8 (Ndi uri Vhasadukei vha ri vhafu a vha nga vuwi, nahone a vha tendi uri hu na vharuṅwa kana mimuya, ngeno Vhafarisei vha tshi zwi tenda zwoṱhe vhuraru hazwo.)"
