Revelation11:14 Khombo ya vhuvhili zwino yo fhira, hu ḓo ṱuwa hu tshi tevhela ya vhuraru." 
Revelation11:15 Ndi hone muruṅwa wa 7 a tshi lidza phalaphala yawe. Ha pfala maipfi mahulu ngei ṱaḓulu a tshi ri, “Zwino ndi hone Muṋe washu na Mesia wawe vha tshi ḓo vhusa shango. U ḓo vhusa lini na lini.”" 
Revelation11:16 Zwenezwo vhala vhahulwane vha 24 vho dzulaho kha khuluṋoni dzavho phanḓa ha Mudzimu vha wa nga zwifhaṱuwo vha luvha Mudzimu 
Revelation11:17 vha tshi ri, “Muṋe washu, Mudzimu Ramaanḓaoṱhe, Iwe u re hone, we wa vha u hone, ri a u livhuha zwe wa sumbedza maanḓa au mahulu wa thoma u vhusa." 
Revelation11:18 Tshakha dza vhannḓa dzo vha dzo halifha, ha swika tshifhinga tsha ndifhedzo yau, tshifhinga tsha u haṱula vhafu, tsha uri vhaḓinḓa vhau vhaporofita na vhakhethwa vhau vhoṱhe, na vhane vha u ofha, vhahulwane na vhaṱuku, vha wane pfufho yavho, tshone tshifhinga tsha u lozwa vhalozwi vha ḽifhasi.”" 
Revelation11:19 Ndi hone nnḓu ya Mudzimu ngei ṱaḓulu i tshi vulwa, henefho nḓuni ha vhonala mbulungelo ya mulanga, ha vha na mavhengevhenge a dziphenyo na ngindi-ngindi ya mibvumo na mudzinginyo wa shango na tshifhango tshihulu." 
Revelation12:1 Ha vhonala tshiga tshihulwane tshi kanukisaho ngei ṱaḓulu. Ho vha hu na mufumakadzi o fukaho ḓuvha o ima nṱha ha ṅwedzi, ṱhohoni yawe o ambara khare ya ṋaledzi dza 12." 
Revelation12:2 O vha e muthu wa thovhela, e tsini na u vhofholowa, a ṱavha mukosi nga u pfa vhuṱungu ha u beba." 
Revelation12:3 Ha dovha ha vhonala tshiṅwe tshiga ngei ṱaḓulu: ho vha hu na ḓiragoni ḽihulu ḽo tswukaho sa mulilo, ḽi na ṱhoho ṱhanu na mbili na ṋanga dza fumi, ḽo ambara khare ṱhanu na mbili ṱhohoni dzaḽo." 
Revelation12:4 Ḽa hovha tshipiḓa tshithihi kha zwiraru tsha ṋaledzi dza lutomboni nga mutshila waḽo ḽa dzi posa fhasi; ḽa ima phanḓa ha uyo mufumakadzi we a vha e tsini na u vhofholowa, uri hezwi a tshi tou vhofholowa ḽi mbo ḓi mu ḽela ṅwana." 
Revelation12:5 Uyo mufumakadzi a beba ṅwana wawe wa mutukana, ane a ḓo ṱuwa a tshi vhusa tshakha dzoṱhe nga luḓo. Ṅwana uyo a mbo ḓi zhuvhulwa a iswa ha Mudzimu kha khuluṋoni yawe." 
Revelation12:6 Mufumakadzi ene a mbo ḓi shavhela phangani he Mudzimu a vha o mu lugisela vhudzulo, uri a londolwe e henengei hu vhuye hu fhele maḓuvha a 1 260." 
Revelation12:7 Zwenezwo ha mbo ḓi vuwa nndwa ngei ṱaḓulu, Mikaele na vharuṅwa vhawe vha tshi khou lwa na ḽiḽa ḓiragoni, na ḽone ḽo ima na vharuṅwa vhaḽo." 
Revelation12:8 Ha kundwa ḓiragoni, ḽone na vharuṅwa vhaḽo vha si tsha tendelwa u dovha vha kanda ngei ṱaḓulu." 
Revelation12:9 Ḽiḽa ḓiragoni ḽihulu ḽa poswa fhasi. Ndi ḽiḽa ḽiṋowa ḽa kale-kale ḽine ḽa pfi “Diabolo” kana “Saṱhane”, we a xedza shango ḽoṱhe. Ḽa mbo ḓi poswa shangoni na vharuṅwa vhaḽo vhoṱhe." 
Revelation12:10 Nda pfa ipfi ḽihulu ḽi tshi huwelela ngei ṱaḓulu ḽi tshi ri, “Zwino ndi hone tshifhinga tsha uri Mudzimu a tshidze vhathu tsho swika; Mudzimu o sumbedza maanḓa awe uri ndi Ene a no vhusa. Zwino ndi hone Mesia wawe o ṋewa maanḓa. Mupomoki wa vha hashu we a vha a tshi ṱolou vha hwelela ha Mudzimu vhusiku na masiari, ndi hone o pandelwa." 
Revelation12:11 Vho mu kunda nga malofha a Ngwana na nga u ṱanzilela ipfi ḽayo. Vha tshi pfi vha fele Ngwana a vho ngo lilela u tshila. 
Revelation12:12 Zwino pembela ḽiṱaḓulu na vhoṱhe vha dzulaho khaḽo. U ḓo zwi vhona iwe shango na lwanzhe; diabolo o tsela kha iwe o halifha; u ḓivha uri tshifhinga tsho mu salelaho ndi tshiṱuku.” 
Revelation12:13 Musi ḓiragoni ḽi tshi vho vhona uri ḽo poswa fhasi, ḽa thoma u tovhola uḽa Mufumakadzi we a beba ṅwana wa Mutukana." 
Revelation12:14 Uyo mufumakadzi a ṋewa phapha mbili dza goni ḽihulu uri a fhufhele hune a ḓo dzula hone kule phangani, a londolwe e hone hu vhuye hu fhele miṅwaha miraru na hafu, uri ḽiṋowa ḽi si mu huvhadze." 
Revelation12:15 Ndi hone mulomoni wa iḽo ḽiṋowa hu tshi shuluwa mulambo wa maḓi wa tevhela uyo mufumakadzi uri u mu kumbe. 
Revelation12:16 Hone ḽifhasi ḽa phalala uyo mufumakadzi nga u aṱama ḽa midza maḓi a bvaho mulomoni wa iḽo ḓiragoni. 
Revelation12:17 Ḓiragoni ḽone ḽa sinyutshela uyo mufumakadzi, ḽa yo lwa na vhana vhawe vhoṱhe vho salaho vhane vha tevhedza ndaela dza Mudzimu vha nambatela zwe Yesu a ṱanzilela." 
Revelation12:18 Ndi hone ḽi tshi yo ima khunzikhunzini ya lwanzhe. 
Revelation13:1 Nda vhona ḽiṅwe ḽivhanda ḽi tshi bva lwanzheni ḽi na ṋanga dza fumi na ṱhoho ṱhanu na mbili, ṋangani dzaḽo ḽo ambara khare dza fumi. Kha idzo ṱhoho ho vha ho ṅwalwa madzina a u nyefula Mudzimu." 
Revelation13:2 Iḽo ḽivhanda ḽo vha ḽi tshi nga nngwe, marimba aḽo a tshi nga a biara, mulomo u tshi nga wa ndau. Ḓiragoni ḽa ṋea iḽo ḽivhanda nungo na khuluṋoni yaḽo, na maanḓa mahulu a u vhusa." 
Revelation13:3 Iṅwe ṱhoho yaḽo yo vha i tshi nga i na mbonzhe ye ya ṱoḓou ḽi vhulaha, hone iyo mbonzhe yó no ḓi fhola. Shango ḽoṱhe ḽa tevhela iḽo ḽivhanda iḽo nga u vhona ḽi tshi kanukisa." 
Revelation13:4 Vhathu vhoṱhe vha luvha ḓiragoni nge ḽa vha ḽo ṋea ḽivhanda maanḓa aḽo a u vhusa. Na ḽivhanda vha ḽi luvha vha tshi ri, “Ndi nnyi ane a nga ḽivhanda? Ndi nnyi ane a nga ḽi kona?”" 
Revelation13:5 Ḽivhanda ḽa tendelwa u zuwa zwihulu na u nyefula Mudzimu, ḽa pfi ḽi vhuse miṅwedzi ya 42." 
Revelation13:6 Ḽa thoma u nyefula Mudzimu, ḽa sasaladza dzina ḽawe na vhudzulo hawe na vhane vha dzula ṱaḓulu." 
Revelation13:7 Ḽa tendelwa na u lwa na vhakhethwa vha Mudzimu ḽa vha kunda, hu tshi pfi ḽi vhuse vhathu vha mitupo yoṱhe na nyambo dzoṱhe na tshakha dzoṱhe na matsinde adzo." 
Revelation13:8 Vhoṱhe vha dzulaho fhano shangoni vha ḓo ḽi luvha; vhane vha sa ḓo ḽi luvha ndi vhenevho fhedzi vhe madzina avho a dzula o ṅwalwa buguni ya vhutshilo shango ḽi sa athu sikwa, buguni ya Ngwana yo ṱhavhiwaho." 
Revelation13:9 A na nḓevhe nga thetshelese! 
Revelation13:10 “We a livhanywa na u thubwa u ḓo thubwa; we a livhanywa na pfumo u ḓo ḓi fa nga pfumo.” Ndi hone-ha hune ha ṱoḓea uri vhathu vha Mudzimu vha konḓelele vha fulufhedzee. 
Revelation13:11 Nda vhona ḽivhanda ḽiṅwe ḽi bvaho fhasi ḽi tshi tutu. Ḽo vha ḽi na ṋanga mbili dzi no nga dza ngwana, hone ḽi tshi amba sa ḓiragoni." 
Revelation13:12 Ḽo shuma nga maanḓa oṱhe a ḽivhanda ḽa u thoma, na ḽone ḽi tshi khou zwi vhona. Ḽa kombetshedza shango ḽoṱhe na vhoṱhe vha re khaḽo uri vha luvhe ḽiḽa ḽivhanda ḽa u thoma ḽe ḽa ṱoḓou fa nga mbonzhe ya vho fhola." 
Revelation13:13 Ḽivhanda heḽo ḽa vhuvhili ḽa ita manditi mahulu, lune ḽa tou tsisa na mulilo u tshi bva ṱaḓulu vhathu vha tshi zwi vhona." 
Revelation13:14 Ḽa tendelwa u ita manditi ḽiḽa ḽivhanda na ḽone ḽi tshi khou zwi vhona, ḽa fhura vhathu vha dzulaho fhano shangoni, ḽa vha vhudza uri vha ite tshifanyiso tsha ḽiḽa ḽivhanda ḽe ḽa ṱoḓou fa nga mbonzhe ya pfumo ya vho fhola." 
Revelation13:15 Ḽa tendelwa u vhudzulela mufemo kha tshifanyiso tsha ḽiḽa ḽa u thoma, uri tshi kone u tou amba, ḽa vhulahisa vhoṱhe vhane vha si gwadamele tshifanyiso hetsho." 
Revelation13:16 Ḽa kombetshedza vhathu vhoṱhe vhahulwane na vhaṱuku, na vhapfumi na vhashai, na vhaḓilangi na dziphuli, uri vha swaiwe kha tshanḓa tshauḽa kana kha phanḓa." 
Revelation13:17 A si na luswayo holwo lwa dzina ḽa heḽo ḽivhanda kana nomboro ya dzina ḽaḽo a dzivhiswa u renga kana u rengisa. 
Revelation13:18 Hezwi zwi ṱoḓa vhuṱali. A na ṱhalukanyo a nga kona u ḓivha zwine nomboro ya ḽivhanda ya amba zwone. Iyo nomboro yo imela muthu. Nomboro yeneyo ndi 666. 
Revelation14:1 Nda vhona Ngwana yo ima Thavhani ya Tsioni, i na vhathu vha 144 000 vho ṅwalwaho dzina ḽawe na ḽa Khotsi awe kha phanḓa dzavho." 
Revelation14:2 Nda pfa mubvumo u bvaho ṱaḓulu u tshi unga sa guvhukuvhu ḽihulu ḽi tshi ngindii sa mubvumo. Wo vha u tshi nga mubvumo wa dziharipa dzi tshi khou lidzwa nga vhalidzi vhadzo. 
Revelation14:3 Vho vha vha tshi khou imba luimbo luswa henefho phanḓa ha khuluṋoni na phanḓa ha zwiḽa zwivhumbwa zwi tshilaho zwiṋa na vhahulwane. Luimbo holwo a hu na we a kona u lu guda arali vhe si vhenevho vha 144 000 fhedzi. Shangoni ḽoṱhe ndi vhenevho fhedzi vho rengululwaho. 
Revelation14:4 Ndi vhenevho vhe vha si ḓishate tshika nga vhasadzi, vha dzula vho kuna. Vha tevhela Ngwana hoṱhe hune ya ya. Kha vhathu vhoṱhe ndi vhone vhe vhoṱhe vho rengululwaho, uri vha nge zwiranzhe zwi ṋekedzwaho Mudzimu na Ngwana." 
Revelation14:5 A vho ngo vhuya vha amba mazwifhi, a hu na he vha solisea." 
Revelation14:6 Nda vhona muruṅwa muṅwe a tshi khou fhufha ngei nṱha tshikhalani e na mafhungo maḓifha a lini na lini ane a fanela u ḓivhadzwa vha dzulaho shangoni, vha mitupo yoṱhe na matsinde oṱhe na nyambo dzoṱhe na tshakha dzoṱhe." 
Revelation14:7 A amba nga ipfi ḽihulu a ri, “Ofhani Mudzimu ni mu rende; tshifhinga tshawe tsha u haṱula vhathu tsho swika! Luvhani Ene o sikaho ḽiṱaḓulu na ḽifhasi na lwanzhe na zwisima zwa maḓi!”" 
Revelation14:8 Muruṅwa wa vhuvhili a tevhela uḽa wa u thoma a ri, “Wo fhalala! Muḓi muhulu wa Babele wo fhalala, wonouḽa we wa kambisa tshakha dzoṱhe nga waini ya vhupombwe hawo!”" 
Revelation14:9 Muruṅwa wa vhuraru a tevhela vhaḽa vhavhili vha u thoma a tshi amba nga ipfi ḽihulu a tshi ri, “Ane a vhuya a luvha ḽivhanda na tshifanyiso tshaḽo, a swaiwa nga luswayo lwaḽo kha phanḓa kana kha tshanḓa tshawe," 
Revelation14:10 onoyo u ḓo nwa waini ya mbiti dza Mudzimu ye a i shela kha tshinwelo tsha ṱhamu dzawe tshi songo tuvhidzwa. U ḓo shengedzwa nga mulilo na tsevhela a tshi vhonwa nga vharuṅwa vhakhethwa na Ngwana. 
Revelation14:11 Ḓitsi ḽa mulilo une wa vha shengedza ḽi duba lini na lini; vhusiku na masiari a vha nga aweli havho vha luvhaho ḽivhanda na tshifanyiso tshaḽo. Zwi ḓo ralo na kha vhoṱhe vho swaiwaho nga dzina ḽaḽo.” 
Revelation14:12 Ndi hone-ha hune ha ṱoḓea uri vhakhethwa vha Mudzimu vha konḓelele. Ndi vhane vha vhulunga ndaela dza Mudzimu vha dzula vha tshi tevhela Yesu nga u fulufhedzea. 
Revelation14:13 Zwenezwo nda pfa ipfi ḽi bvaho ṱaḓulu ḽi tshi ri, “Ṅwala u ri: Vha na mashudu vhane u bva zwino vha fa vhe vha Muṋe washu!” Muya a bvumela a ri, “Ndi zwone! A vha tsha ḓo shuma vha ḓinetisa, vha vho ḓo awela. Na mishumo yavho i a vha fhelekedza.”" 
Revelation14:14 Ndi tshi sedza nda vhona gole ḽitshena, nda vhona na o dzulaho khaḽo ane a nga mubebwa-nga-muthu, o ambare khare ya musuku ṱhohoni yawe, o fara segere ya vhuhali." 
Revelation14:15 Zwino ha mbo ḓi bva muruṅwa muṅwe nḓuni ya Mudzimu a vhidzelela uḽa o dzulaho kha gole nga ipfi ḽihulu a ri, “Dzhia segere yau u kaṋe; tshifhinga tsho swika; shango ḽo vhibva uri ḽi kaṋwe!”" 
Revelation14:16 Ndi hone uḽa o dzulaho kha gole a tshi kotamisela segere yawe fhasi a kaṋa shango. 
Revelation14:17 Nda dovha nda vhona muṅwe muruṅwa a tshi bva nḓuni ya Mudzimu ngei ṱaḓulu; na ene o vha o fara segere ya vhuhali. 
Revelation14:18 Zwino aḽiṱarini ha bva muṅwe muruṅwa ane a langa mulilo, a vhidzelela uḽa muruṅwa o faraho segere ya vhuhali nga ipfi ḽihulu a ri, “Tshea nḓirivhe dza shango nga segere yau ya vhuhali, dzo vhibva!”" 
Revelation14:19 Ndi hone uḽa muruṅwa a tshi kotamisela segere yawe fhasi a tshea nḓirivhe dza ḽifhasi a dzi posa bonḓeloni ḽihulu ḽa mbiti dza Mudzimu. 
Revelation14:20 Dza sukelwa bonḓeloni henefho nnḓa ha muḓi, ha bva malofha a ita muḓalo, a vhuya a guma nga mihala ya dzibere, a ela a swika dzikhilomitha dza 1 600." 
Revelation15:1 Nda vhona tshiṅwe tshiga tshihulu tshi kanukisaho ngei makoleni: ho vha hu na vharuṅwa vhaṱanu na vhavhili vho fara madambudzo maṱanu na mavhili a u fhiledza a u khunyeledza ṱhamu dza Mudzimu. 
Revelation15:2 Ndi hone ndi tshi vhona tshithu tshi ngaho lwanzhe lu penyaho sa ngilasi yo ṱangana na mulilo. Nda vhona vhaḽa vhe vha kunda zwiḽa vha tshi tambudzwa nga ḽiḽa ḽivhanda na tshifanyiso tshaḽo na nomboro ya dzina ḽaḽo. Vho vha vho ima tsini ha lwanzhe luḽa lwa ngilasi vho fara haripa dze vha ṋewa nga Mudzimu 
Revelation15:3 vha tshi khou imba luimbo lwa Mushe muḓinḓa wa Mudzimu na luimbo lwa Ngwana vha tshi ri, “Muṋe washu Mudzimu Ramaanḓaoṱhe, mishumo yau yo hula hani! I kanukisa hani! Iwe Khosi ya dzitshakha, zwine wa ita ndi zwone-zwone. U a fulufhedzea vhukuma." 
Revelation15:4 Muṋe washu, ndi nnyi ane a nga si u ofhe? Ndi nnyi ane a nga lamba u u renda? Mukhethwa e eṱhe ndi Iwe. Tshakha dzoṱhe dzi ḓo ḓa dza u luvha, ngauri khaṱhulo dzau dzi sa khakhi dzo vhonala!”" 
Revelation15:5 Izwo zwo no fhira nda vhona dennde ya vhugala ha Mudzimu ngei ṱaḓulu yo vulea," 
Revelation15:6 ngomu hayo ha bva vhaḽa vharuṅwa vhaṱanu na vhavhili vho fara madambudzo maṱanu na mavhili vho ambara lukhaha lu si na tshika lu penyaho, khanani vho lu vhofha nga bannda dza musuku." 
Revelation15:7 Ndi hone tshiṅwe tsha zwivhumbwa zwiḽa zwi tshilaho zwiṋa tshi tshi ṋea vhaḽa vharuṅwa vhaṱanu na vhavhili madzhomela maṱanu na mavhili a musuku o ḓalaho ṱhamu dza Mudzimu, Ene a tshilaho lini na lini." 
Revelation15:8 Iyo dennde ya ḓala vhutsi ha vhugala na maanḓa a Mudzimu, hu si vhe na ane a kona u dzhena afho denndeni hu sa athu khunyelela aḽa madambudzo maṱanu na mavhili o ḓiswaho nga vhaḽa vharuṅwa na vhavhili." 
Revelation16:1 Nda pfa ipfi ḽihulu ḽi tshi bva denndeni ya Mudzimu ḽi tshi amba na vhaḽa vharuṅwa vhaṱanu na vhavhili ḽi tshi ri, “Ayo madzhomela maṱanu na mavhili o ḓalaho ṱhamu dza Mudzimu iyani u a shululela shangoni!”" 
Revelation16:2 Muruṅwa wa u thoma a ya a shululela dzhomela ḽawe mavuni. Vhaḽa vho swaiwaho nga luswayo lwa ḽiḽa ḽivhanda, vho luvhaho tshifanyiso tshaḽo, vha mbo ḓi bva zwilonda zwi vhavhaho, zwi ofhisaho." 
Revelation16:3 Ndi hone muruṅwa wa vhuvhili a tshi shululela dzhomela ḽawe lwanzheni. Maḓi a shanduka a nga malofha a muthu o faho, zwivhumbwa zwoṱhe zwi tshilaho lwanzheni zwa fa." 
Revelation16:4 Zwino muruṅwa wa vhuraru a shululea dzhomela ḽawe milamboni na zwisimani. Zwa shanduka zwa vha malofha. 
Revelation16:5 Nda pfa muruṅwa a langaho maḓi a tshi ri, “Khaṱhulo dzau a dzi khakhi, Iwe mukhethwa, u re hone, we wa vha u hone. Ndi hone-ha wo haṱula!" 
Revelation16:6 Vho shulula malofha a vhakhethwa vha Mudzimu na a vhaporofita; ndi zwe wa vha fha malofha uri vha a nwe. Vha khou wana zwo vha fanelaho!” 
Revelation16:7 Nda pfa ipfi ḽi bvaho aḽiṱarini ḽi tshi ri, “Ndi zwone Muṋe washu, Mudzimu Ramaanḓaoṱhe! Khaṱhulo dzau ndi dza ngoho vhukuma, a dzi khakhi!”" 
Revelation16:8 Ndi hone muruṅwa wa vhuṋa a tshi shululela dzhomela ḽawe kha ḓuvha, ḽa pfi ḽi fhise vhathu nga biso ḽaḽo ḽi no nga mulilo." 
Revelation16:9 Vha fhiswa nga biso ḽi ofhisaho. Naho zwo ralo vha sema dzina ḽa Mudzimu a langaho ayo madambudzo, vha si rembuluwe, vha si mu rende." 
Revelation16:10 Muruṅwa wa vhuṱanu a shululela dzhomela ḽawe kha khuluṋoni ya ḽiḽa ḽivhanda, muvhuso waḽo woṱhe wa swifhalelwa, vhathu vha ḓishengekanya ndimi nga u pfa vhuṱungu," 
Revelation16:11 vha sema Mudzimu wa ṱaḓulu nga u pfa vhuṱungu na nga u pfa u vhavha ha zwilonda, hone vha si laṱe zwiito zwavho zwivhi." 
Revelation16:12 Ndi hone muruṅwa wa 6 a tshi shululela dzhomela ḽawe mulamboni muhulu wa Yufuratha, wa mbo ḓi xa, uri mahosi a bvaho Vhubvaḓuvha a kone u fhira." 
Revelation16:13 Zwenezwo nda vhona mulomoni wa ḓiragoni na wa ḽivhanda na wa muporofita wa u zwifha hu tshi bva mimuya mivhi miraru i no nga maḓula. 
Revelation16:14 Ndi mimuya ya madimoni a itaho manditi, ya dalela mahosi oṱhe a shango uri vha kuvhanganele nndwa nga ḓuvha ḽihulu ḽa Mudzimu Ramaanḓaoṱhe." 
Revelation16:15 “Vhonani, ndi khou ḓa sa fobvu ni songo vhuya na humbula. U na mashudu ane a dzula o fhaṱuwa, a linda zwiambaro zwawe a sa ḓo tshimbila fhedzi a vho ḓo shona vhukati ha vhathu!”" 
Revelation16:16 Zwenezwo iḽa mimuya ya kuvhanganya mahosi fhethu hune nga Tshiheberu ha pfi Haramagedoni. 
Revelation16:17 Zwo no ralo muruṅwa wa 7 a hasha muyani zwi re dzhomelani ḽawe. Ha pfala ipfi ḽihulu ḽi bvaho kha khuluṋoni i re nḓuni ya Mudzimu ḽi tshi ri, “Ndi hone zwo itea!”" 
Revelation16:18 Ha vhonala mavhengevhenge a dziphenyo, ha pfala mibvumo ya ngindi-ngindi na mudzinginyo muhulu wa shango u sa athu vhuya wa vha hone tshee muthu a sikwa." 
Revelation16:19 Muḓi muhulu wa bva zwipiḓa zwiraru, miḓi ya tshakha dzoṱhe ya phusukanywa: Mudzimu Ene ho ngo hangwa vhuvhi ha uyo muḓi muhulu wa Babele, ndi zwine a u nwisa dzhomela ḽa waini ya ṱhamu dzawe dzi ofhisaho." 
Revelation16:20 Zwiṱangadzime zwoṱhe zwe nyamalali, thavha dzoṱhe dze dzadzádza." 
Revelation16:21 Vhathu vha welwa nga matombo mahulu a tshifhango a tshi bva lutomboni, ane ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe ḽao ḽa lemela khilogiramu dza 50. Vha sema Mudzimu nge vha welwa nga dambulo heḽo ḽa tshifhango, ngauri ḽo vha ḽi tshi ofhisa vhukuma." 
Revelation17:1 Ndi hone muṅwe wa vhaḽa vharuṅwa vhaṱanu na vhavhili vho faraho madzhomela maṱanu na mavhili a tshi ḓa ha nṋe a ri, “Iḓa ndi u sumbedze uri iḽa phombwe khulu i ḓo lifhedzwa hani. Ndi amba heiḽa i dzulaho milamboni minzhi," 
Revelation17:2 ye mahosi a ḽifhasi a ita vhupombwe nayo, na vhathu vha shango vha kambwa nga waini ya vhupombwe hayo.”" 
Revelation17:3 Nda ri ndi Muyani, muruṅwa a nkhwala a nnyisa phangani. Henengei nda vhona musadzi o namela ḽivhanda ḽitswukutswuku, muvhili waḽo woṱhe wo ṅwalekanywa madzina a u nyefula Mudzimu, ḽi na ṱhoho ṱhanu na mbili na ṋanga dza fumi." 
Revelation17:4 Uyo musadzi o vha o ambara zwiambaro zwa muridili na zwitswukutswuku, o ḓiṱama nga madzanga a musuku na matombo a mutengo muhulu na nungu, o fara tshinwelo tsha musuku tsho ḓalaho zwi nengisaho na tshika dza vhupombwe hawe." 
Revelation17:5 Kha muvhombo wawe o ṅwalwa dzina ḽa tshiphiri ḽi no pfi, “Babele muhulu, Mme a dziphombwe, mme a zwi nengisaho zwoṱhe zwi no itwa shangoni”." 
Revelation17:6 Nda vhona uyo musadzi o kambwa nga malofha a vhathu vha Mudzimu na a vhe vha vhulahelwa u ṱanziela Yesu. Ndi tshi mu vhona nda kanuka zwihulu. 
Revelation17:7 Muruṅwa a mmbudzisa a ri, “Ndi mini u tshi kanuka? Ndi ḓo u dzumbululela tshiphiri tsha uyo musadzi na tsha ḽivhanda ḽe a ḽi namela, ḽa ṱhoho ṱhanu na mbili na ṋanga dza fumi." 
Revelation17:8 Iḽo ḽivhanda ḽo vhuya ḽa vha hone, fhedzi zwino a ḽi tsha tshila; ḽi ḓo ṱuwa ḽi tshi bva dindini, ḽa fhedza nga u lozwiwa. Vhathu vha dzulaho fhano fhasi vhe madzina avho a si ṅwalwe buguni ya vha tshilaho tshee shango ḽa sikwa, vha ḓo kanuka vha tshi vhona ḽivhanda iḽo ḽe ḽa vhuya ḽa vha hone, fhedzi zwino ḽi si tsheeho, ḽi tshi ḓo dovha ḽa vhonala.”" 
Revelation17:9 Hezwi zwi ṱoḓa vhuṱali na ṱhalukanyo. Idzo ṱhoho ṱhanu na mbili ndi zwikwara zwiṱanu na zwivhili zwine uyo musadzi a dzula khazwo. Dza dovha dza amba mahosi maṱanu na mavhili. 
Revelation17:10 Vhaṱanu vhavho vho no ḓi tekulwa, zwino ho sala hu tshi vhusa muthihi, ha dovha ha vha na muṅwe a sa athu swika. A tshi swika u ḓo tou vhusa tshifhinganyana." 
Revelation17:11 Iḽo ḽivhanda ḽe ḽa vha ḽi tshi tshila ḽine zwino ḽi si tsha tshila, ndi ḽone khosi ya vhuṱanu na vhuraru. Ndi muthihi na vhaḽa vhaṱanu na vhavhili. Ḽi ḓo ṱuwa ḽi tshi lozwiwa." 
Revelation17:12 “Idzo ṋanga dza fumi dze wa dzi vhona ndi mahosi a fumi a sa athu vhusa, hone a ḓo tendelwa u vhusa na iḽo ḽivhanda awara nthihi fhedzi." 
Revelation17:13 Vha ṱoḓa zwithihi zwi no fana: vha ḓo kumedza iḽo ḽivhanda maanḓa avho na muvhuso wavho. 
Revelation17:14 Vha ḓo lwa na Ngwana, hone Yone i ḓo vha kunda i na vhayo vho vhidzwaho, vhanangiwa vha fulufhedzeaho, ngauri ndi Yone Muṋe wa vhaṋe, Khosi ya mahosi.”" 
Revelation17:15 A dovha a ri, “Iyo milambo ye wa vhona phombwe yo dzula vhukati hayo ndi magogo a vhathu vha mitupo na tshakha na nyambo dzo fhambanaho." 
Revelation17:16 Idzo ṋanga dza fumi dze wa dzi vhona, na iḽo ḽivhanda, zwi ḓo sala zwi tshi vhenga iḽa phombwe zwa i ṱangula ya sala fhedzi. Zwi ḓo ḽa na ṋama yayo zwa i fhisa nga mulilo." 
Revelation17:17 Mudzimu u langa mbilu dzavho vha ita zwine a funa hezwi vha tshi shumisana vha tshi kumedza maanḓa avho iḽo ḽivhanda uri ḽi vhuse, maipfi a Mudzimu a vhuya a khunyelela." 
Revelation17:18 Uyo musadzi we wa mu vhona ndi uḽa muḓi muhulu u vhusaho mahosi a ḽifhasi.” 
Revelation18:1 Izwo zwo no fhira nda vhona muṅwe muruṅwa a tshi tsa a tshi bva makoleni. O vha e na maanḓa mahulu, a tshi penya lwe a vhonetshela ḽifhasi ḽoṱhe." 
Revelation18:2 A vhidzelela nga ipfi ḽihulu a ri, “Wo fhalala! Muḓi muhulu wa Babele wo fhalala! Wo no tou vha tshiṱaha tsha madimoni; hu vho dzula mimuya yoṱhe ya dzitshika. Zwiṋoni zwoṱhe zwo iledzwaho zwi dzula hone, [khathihi na dziphukha dzoṱhe dzo iledzwaho], dzi nengisaho." 
Revelation18:3 Tshakha dzoṱhe dzo nwa waini i kambaho ya vhupombwe hawo. Mahosi a shango o ita vhupombwe nawo; vhashavhi vha shango vho pfuma nga lupfumo lwawo lu si na vhukono!” 
Revelation18:4 Nda dovha nda pfa ḽiṅwe ipfi ḽi bvaho ṱaḓulu ḽi tshi ri, “Ibvani vhathu vhanga! Ibvani khawo! Ni songo ḓibaḓekanya na vhutshinyi hawo, ni sa ḓo welwa-vho nga madambudzo o u livhaho." 
Revelation18:5 Vhutshinyi hawo ho khokhwa u guma makoleni. Mudzimu ho ngo hangwa zwiito zwawo zwivhi. 
Revelation18:6 U lifhedzeni-ha zwe wa ita vhaṅwe, ni u lifhedze ni ite kavhili zwe wa ita. Ḓadzani dzhomela ḽawo kavhili, u nwe waini yeneyo ye wa vha ingela!" 
Revelation18:7 U shengedzeni u gomele, zwi nge vhugala na miḓifho ye wa ḓiitela! U dzula u tshi ḓifhima u tshi ri, ‘Ndo thukha hafhano nṋe mufumakadzi! A thi tshilikadzi; ndi nga si vhuye nda shengela.’" 
Revelation18:8 Nga zwenezwo u ḓo welwa nga mabulayo nga ḓuvha ḽithihi: He dwadze, he u teta, he nḓala, he u swa nga mulilo! Muṋe washu Mudzimu a u haṱulaho u na maanḓa!”" 
Revelation18:9 Mahosi a ḽifhasi e a ita zwa dzinyemulo na vhupombwe nawo, vha tshi vhona u tshi khou swa ho ṱangana buluvhutsi, vha ṱavha mukosi vha lilela uyo muḓi," 
Revelation18:10 vha ima kule nga u ofha u tambula nawo, vha ri, “Yawee! Zwi ofhisa hani! Babele muḓi muhulu wa maanḓa u tshi tou lozwiwa kathihi fhedzi!”" 
Revelation18:11 Na vhoramabindu vha ḽifhasi vha ṱavha mukosi vha u lilela, ngauri a hu tshee na ane a kha ḓi renga thundu dzavho" 
Revelation18:12 dza musuku na siliva na matombo a mutengo muhulu na nungu na lukhaha na malabi a muridili na siliga na malabi matswuku na tshakha dzoṱhe dza basha ḽa madzanga na tshakha dzoṱhe dza zwithu zwa madzanga zwi itwaho nga ṋanga dza nḓou na basha ḽa mutengo muhulu na musina na tsimbi na mmabulu 
Revelation18:13 na sinamoni na zwilungi na zwinukheleli na zwiḓolo zwi nukhelelaho na zwioro na waini na mapfura a muolivi na vhukhopfu na goroi na kholomo na nngu na dzibere na dzigariki na dziphuli, ha vhuya ha tou rengwa na vhathu." 
Revelation18:14 Vha ḓo lila vha ri, “Khaṋo ye wa vha u tshi emula yo ngalangala; na lupfumo lwau na madzanga zwo fhela. A u tsha ḓo dovha wa zwi wana.”" 
Revelation18:15 Vhoramabindu vhe vha pfuma nga u vhambadza hedzo thundu afho muḓini uyo vha ḓo ima kule nga u ofha u shengela nawo, vha ṱavha mukosi vha lila" 
Revelation18:16 vha ri, “Yawee! Zwi ofhisa hani zwa uḽa muḓi muhulu! Wo vha wo ambara lukhaha na muridili na tswuku, wa ḓiṱama nga madzanga a musuku na matombo a mutengo muhulu na nungu." 
Revelation18:17 Zwino asizwo-ha, wo tshinyalelwa nga lupfumo lwawo lwoṱhe kathihi fhedzi!” Vhalangi vha zwikepe vhoṱhe na vhanameli vhazwo na vhatshimbidzi vhazwo na vhaṅwe vhoṱhe vha no tshila nga zwa lwanzheni vha ima kule," 
Revelation18:18 vha tshi vhona u tshi khou swa ho ṱangana buluvhutsi vha lila vha ṱavha mukosi vha ri, “Ndi ufhio muḓi we wa vhuya wa hula sa hoyu?”" 
Revelation18:19 vha ḓishela buse dziṱhohoni vha lila vha ṱavha mukosi vha ri, “Yawee! Zwi ofhisa hani zwa uyu muḓi muhulu! Vhoṱhe vha re na zwikepe zwi tshimbilaho lwanzheni vho pfuma nga lupfumo lwawo, kathihi fhedzi wa ṱangulwa lupfumo lwawo lwoṱhe!”" 
Revelation18:20 “Iwe ḽiṱaḓulu, takalela zwenezwo! Takalani vhakhethwa vha Mudzimu na vhaapostola na vhaporofita! Mudzimu o u lifhedza zwe wa ita.”" 
Revelation18:21 Zwenezwo muṅwe muruṅwa wa maanḓa a doba tombo ḽi linganaho na guyo ḽihulu a ḽi posa lwanzheni a ri, “Muḓi muhulu wa Babele u ḓo lozwiwa lwa tshiṱuhu nga u tou rali u si tsha dovha wa vhonala." 
Revelation18:22 Hafhano kha iwe a hu tsha ḓo dovha ha pfala nyimbo dza haripa na vhaimbi, na dza vhalidzi vha zwiṱiringo na phalaphala! Na mutsila ufhio na ufhio ha tsha ḓo dovha a vhonala hafhano. Naho u mutsindo wa guyoni a u tsha ḓo dovha wa pfala." 
Revelation18:23 A hu tsha ḓo dovha ha duga luvhone. Fhano kha iwe a hu tsha ḓo dovha ha pfala maipfi a muselwa na mukwasha. Vhoramabindu vhau vho vha vhe vhone vhavhusi vha shango ḽoṱhe, wa fhura tshakha dzoṱhe nga malingo au!”" 
Revelation18:24 Henefho Babele ho wanala malofha a vhaporofita na vhakhethwa vha Mudzimu na a vhoṱhe vhe vha vhulawa fhano shangoni. Ndi zwe wa lozwelwa zwone. 
Revelation19:1 Ngavhuya nda pfa mubvumo u no nga wa gogo ḽihulu ngei ṱaḓulu vha tshi imba vha tshi ri, “Haleluya! Mudzimu washu ndi Ene Mutshidzi, vhugala na maanḓa ndi zwawe!" 
Revelation19:2 Khaṱhulo dzawe a dzi khakhi, ndi dza ngoho. O lifhedza phombwe khulu ye ya vha i tshi khou tshinya shango nga vhupombwe hayo. Mudzimu o i lifhedza nge ya vhulaha vhaḓinḓa vhawe.”" 
Revelation19:3 Vha dovha vha imba vha ri, “Haleluya! Buluvhutsi ḽayo ḽi dzula ḽi tshi duba lini na lini.”" 
Revelation19:4 Ndi hone vhaḽa vhahulwane vha 24 khathihi na zwiḽa zwivhumbwa zwi tshilaho zwiṋa vha tshi gwadama fhasi vha luvha Mudzimu, Ene o dzulaho kha khuluṋoni, vha ri, “Amen, Haleluya!”" 
Revelation19:5 Zwenezwo ha pfala ipfi ḽi bvaho kha khuluṋoni ḽi tshi ri, “Rendani Mudzimu washu noṱhe inwi vhalanda vhawe, na vhoṱhe vha mu ofhaho, vhahulwane na vhaṱuku.”" 
Revelation19:6 Nda pfa mubvumo u ngaho wa gogo ḽihulu u tshi unga sa guvhukuvhu ḽihulu, u tshi nga mibvumo ya ngindi-ngindi, nda pfa vha tshi ri, “Haleluya! Muṋe washu Mudzimu Ramaanḓaoṱhe zwino ndi hone o thoma u vhusa-ha!" 
Revelation19:7 Nga ri takale ri pembele ri mu rende. Munyanya wa mbingano ya Ngwana wo swika, na muselwa wayo o no ḓi ḓiṱamela yone." 
Revelation19:8 O ṋewa lukhaha lu penyaho lu si na tshika, uri a ambare.” (Lukhaha ulwo zwi amba mishumo mivhuya ya vhakhethwa vha Mudzimu.)" 
Revelation19:9 Ndi hone muruṅwa a tshi amba na nṋe a ri, “Ṅwala u ri: Vha na mashudu vho vhidzwaho munyanyani wa mbingano ya Ngwana.” A dovha a ri, “Haya ndi maipfi o ambiwaho nga Mudzimu Ene muṋe, ndi a ngoho.”" 
Revelation19:10 Nda wa nga magona milenzheni yawe uri ndi mu luvhe, ene a nkaidza a ri, “Aiwa nandi, a si zwone! Hufha na nṋe ndi mulanda unga iwe na vha hau vha nambatelaho vhuṱanzi ha Yesu. Luvha Mudzimu. Vhaporofita vha bula vhuṱanzi ha Yesu vha tshi ṱuṱuwedzwa nga Muya.”" 
Revelation19:11 Nda vhona ḽiṱaḓulu ḽo vulea, ha bvelela bere tshena. Munameli wayo u pfi Mufulufhedzea-wa-ngoho. A tshi haṱula na musi a tshi lwa nndwa dzawe ha khakhi." 
Revelation19:12 Maṱo awe o vha a tshi duga sa mulilo, ṱhohoni yawe ó ambara khare dzi si na mbalo. O vha o ṅwalwa dzina khae ḽi sa ḓihwi nga muthu, ḽi tshi ḓihwa nga Ene e eṱhe." 
Revelation19:13 O vha o ambara phuraphura yo tswukaho nga malofha. Dzina ḽawe ḽi pfi “Ipfi ḽa Mudzimu”. 
Revelation19:14 Mmbi dza ngei ṱaḓulu dza mu tevhele vho namela-vho bere tshena vho ambara lukhaha lutshena lu si na tshika. 
Revelation19:15 Mulomoni wawe ha ṱoṱomowa banga ḽa vhuhali ḽa u rema dzitshakha. Ndi Ene a no ḓo vha lisa nga luḓo lwa vhuhosi, a kandekanya bonḓelo ḽa waini ya ṱhamu dza Mudzimu Ramaanḓaoṱhe dzi ofhisaho." 
Revelation19:16 Kha phuraphura yawe na kha tshirumbi tshawe ho vha ho ṅwalwa dzina ḽi no pfi “Khosi ya mahosi, Muṋe wa vhaṋe”." 
Revelation19:17 Nda vhona muruṅwa o ima kha ḓuvha, a huwelela nga ipfi ḽihulu a vhidza zwiṋoni zwoṱhe zwi fhufhaho tshikhalani a ri, “Iḓani ni kuvhanganele munyanya muhulu wa Mudzimu!" 
Revelation19:18 Iḓani ni ḽe zwitumbu zwa mahosi na zwa vhalangammbi na zwa vhahali na zwa dzibere na vhanameli vhadzo, na zwa vhathu vhoṱhe, vhaḓilangi na dziphuli, vhahulwane na vhaṱuku.”" 
Revelation19:19 Nda vhona ḽiḽa ḽivhanda khathihi na mahosi a ḽifhasi na mmbi dzavho vho kuvhangana uri vha lwe na uḽa o namelaho bere tshena na mmbi dzawe. 
Revelation19:20 Ḽivhanda ḽa mbo ḓi fariwa khathihi na uḽa muporofita wa u zwifha we a ita manditi ḽi tshi zwi vhona. (Ndi aḽa manditi e a fhura ngao vhaḽa vhe vha vha vhe na luswayo lwa ḽivhanda, vho luvhaho tshifanyiso tshaḽo.) Ḽivhanda na muporofita wa u zwifha vhuvhili havho vha tshi kha ḓi tshila vha mbo ḓi poswa ishani ḽa mulilo wa tsevhela i fhisaho." 
Revelation19:21 Mmbi dzavho dza vhulawa nga banga ḽiḽa ḽe ḽa ṱoṱomowa mulomoni wa uyo o namelaho bere. Zwiṋoni zwoṱhe zwa ḓiphiṋa nga u ḽa zwitumbu zwavho madyelo a tou rwe. 
Revelation20:1 Nda vhona muruṅwa a tshi tsa a tshi bva ṱaḓulu o fara khii ya dindi na geḓane khulu. 
Revelation20:2 A fara ḽiḽa ḓiragoni, heḽiḽa ḽiṋowa ḽa kale-kale, ene diabolo, ene Saṱhane, a mu vhofha, uri a dzule o vhoxwa hu vhuye hu fhele miṅwaha ya 1 000." 
Revelation20:3 Muruṅwa a mu posa dindini a khiela a ita na u shatela uri a si tsha ḓo kona u dovha u fhura dzitshakha hu vhuye hu fhele yeneyo miṅwaha ya 1 000. Ngavhuya u ḓo vhofhololwa tshifhinganyana. 
Revelation20:4 Nda vhona dzikhuluṋoni, vho dzulaho khadzo vhó ṋewa maanḓa a u haṱula. Nda dovha nda vhona mimuya ya vhathu vho vhulawaho nga u tou tumulwa dziṱhoho nge vha nambatela vhuṱanzi ha Yesu na ipfi ḽa Mudzimu. Vhone a vho ngo luvha ḽivhanda kana tshifanyiso tshaḽo; a vho ngo swaiwa nga luswayo lwa ḽivhanda kha phanḓa dzavho na zwanḓa zwavho. Vha dovha vha tshila vha thoma u vhusa na Khristo vhe mahosi miṅwaha yoṱhe heyo ya 1 000." 
Revelation20:5 Ndi hone u vuwa ha u thoma. Vhaṅwe vhafu ho vhuya ha fhela miṅwaha heyo ya 1 000 vha sa athu dovha vha tshila. 
Revelation20:6 Avho vha no ḓo wanala kha u vuwa ha vhafu ha u ranga vha na mashudu, ndi vho ḓikumedzaho Mudzimu; lufu lwa vhuvhili a lu tsha ḓo vha vhusa. Vha ḓo vha vhotshifhe vha Mudzimu na vha Khristo, vha vhusa nae ha vhuya ha fhela miṅwaha ya 1 000." 
Revelation20:7 Hu ḓo ri ho no fhela miṅwaha ya 1 000, Saṱhane a vhofhololwa a bva dzhele," 
Revelation20:8 a tshimbila a tshi fhura dzitshakha hoṱhe-hoṱhe, dza Gogo na Magogo, a vha kuvhanganya uri vha bve pfumo, vhó ḓala sa muṱavha khunzikhunzini ya lwanzhe." 
Revelation20:9 Vha balangana na ḽifhasi vha tanga mishasha ya vhathu vha Mudzimu na muḓi une a u takalela. Hone ha wa mulilo u tshi bva ṱaḓulu wa vha lozwa. 
Revelation20:10 Zwenezwo uḽa diabolo we a vha fhura a poswa ishani ḽa mulilo na tsevhela, fhaḽa he ha poswa ḽivhanda na muporofita wa u zwifha. Henefho vha ḓo tambudzwa vhusiku na masiari lini na lini." 
Revelation20:11 Nda vhona khuluṋoni khulu tshena na o dzulaho khayo. Ḽiṱaḓulu na ḽifhasi zwo vha zwo nyamalala henefho phanḓa hawe zwi si tsha vha na vhudzulo. 
Revelation20:12 Nda vhona vhafu, vhahulwane na vhaṱuku, vho ima henefho phanḓa ha khuluṋoni, bugu dza vulwa. Ha dohwa ha vulwa iṅwe bugu; ndi bugu ya vha tshilaho. Ndi hone vhafu vha tshi haṱulwa hu tshi tevhedzwa mishumo yavho nga he ha ṅwalwa dzibuguni." 
Revelation20:13 Lwanzhe lwa ṱanza vho felaho ngomu halwo. Lufu na vhudzulavhafu zwa humisa vhe vha vha vho iswa hone, vhoṱhe vha haṱulwa hu tshi tevhedzwa mishumu yavho." 
Revelation20:14 Zwenezwo lufu na vhudzulavhafu zwa kudzwa ishani ḽa mulilo. Heḽo isha ḽa mulilo ndi lufu lwa vhuvhili. 
Revelation20:15 Muṅwe na muṅwe we dzina ḽawe ḽa vha ḽi songo ṅwalwa buguni ya vha tshilaho a kudzwa ishani ḽeneḽo ḽa mulilo. 
Revelation21:1 Nda vhona ḽiṱaḓulu ḽiswa na ḽifhasi ḽiswa. Ḽiṱaḓulu ḽa u thoma na ḽifhasi ḽa u thoma zwo vha zwo nyamalala, na lwanzhe lu si tsheeho." 
Revelation21:2 Nda vhona muḓi mukhethwa, wone Jerusalema muswa, u tshi tsela fhasi u tshi bva ha Mudzimu ngei ṱaḓulu, wo ṱamiwa wo fhelela, sa muselwa a tshi yo ṱanganedzwa nga munna wawe." 
Revelation21:3 Nda pfa ipfi ḽihulu ḽi bvaho kha khuluṋoni ḽi tshi ri, “Zwino ndi hone Mudzimu nga dzawe a tshi vho dzula na vhathu. U ḓo dzula navho vha vha tshakha dzawe. Mudzimu nga eṱhe u ḓo dzula navho e Mudzimu wavho." 
Revelation21:4 U ḓo vha fhuluṱa miṱodzi yoṱhe. Lufu a lu tsha ḓo vha hone, a hu tsha ḓo vha na zwililo kana u tshema kana u honḓa; zwa kale zwo fhela.”" 
Revelation21:5 Ndi hone uḽa o dzulaho kha khuluṋoni a tshi ri, “Zwino zwithu zwoṱhe ndi zwi ita zwiswa.” A dovha a amba na nṋe a ri, “Ṅwala, ngauri zwine nda amba ndi ngoho, zwi ḓo itea.”" 
Revelation21:6 A dovha a ri, “Zwo khunyelela! Ndi Nṋe Alfa na Omega, ndi Nṋe mathomo na magumo. A re na ḓora ndi ḓo mu tendela u nwa tshisimani tsha maḓi a ṋeaho vhutshilo, á songo bvisa tshithu." 
Revelation21:7 A kundaho, mukovhe wawe ngoyu: ndi ḓo vha Mudzimu wawe ene a vha ṅwananga." 
Revelation21:8 Magoswi one na vho guneaho na vho kumalaho na dziphondi na dziphombwe na vhaloi na vha no luvha midzimu na vhoṱhe vhadzia-u-zwifha, ho vha fanelaho ndi ishani ḽi dugaho mulilo na tsevhela. Ndi lwone lufu lwa vhuvhili.”" 
Revelation21:9 Muṅwe wa vhaḽa vharuṅwa vhaṱanu na vhavhili vhe vha vha vho fara madzhomela maṱanu na mavhili o ḓalaho madambudzo maṱanu na mavhili a u fhiledza, a ḓa a amba na nṋe a ri, “Iḓa ndi u sumbedze muselwa ane a ḓo vha mufumakadzi wa Ngwana.”" 
Revelation21:10 Nda pfa ndi Muyani, a nkhwala a nnyisa muṱumbani wa thavha ndapfu, a ntsumbedza Jerusalema, muḓi mukhethwa, u tshi khou tsela fhasi u tshi bva ha Mudzimu ṱaḓulu" 
Revelation21:11 u tshi tou penya vhugala ha Mudzimu. Wo vha u tshi penya sa tombo ḽa mutengo muhulu, ḽa jasipere i vhonadzaho." 
Revelation21:12 Wo vha wo tingeledzwa nga mutsheṱo muhulu mulapfu u re na khoro dza 12, iṅwe na iṅwe yo lindwa nga muruṅwa. Henefho dzikhoroni ho vha ho ṅwalwa madzina a matsinde a 12 a Vhaisraele." 
Revelation21:13 Sia ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe ḽo vha ḽi na khoro tharu: Vhubvaḓuvha tharu, Devhula tharu, Tshipembe tharu, Vhukovhela tharu." 
Revelation21:14 Uyo mutsheṱo wo vha wo tewa kha matombo a 12, tombo ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe ḽó ṅwalwa dzina ḽa muapostola muthihi wa Ngwana." 
Revelation21:15 Uḽa muruṅwa we a amba na nṋe o vha o fara luṱanga lwa musuku lwa u ela ngalwo, uri a ele muḓi na dzikhoro na mutsheṱo wawo." 
Revelation21:16 Muḓi uyo wo vha u na masia maṋa a eḓanaho, vhuphara vhu tshi eḓana na vhulapfu. Muruṅwa a ela muḓi nga ulwo luṱanga, vhulapfu ha ita khilomitha dza 12 000, vhuphara na u ya nṱha zwi tshi ḓi eḓana na vhulapfu." 
Revelation21:17 A ela na mutsheṱo, u ya nṱha zwa ita mithara dza 144 nga kuelele kwa vhathu, ngauri uyo muruṅwa o vha a tshi khou ela ngakwo." 
Revelation21:18 Uyo mutsheṱo wo vha wo fhaṱwa nga matombo a jasipere, muḓi wone wó fhaṱwa nga musuku u songo vangwaho u vhonadzaho sa ngilasi." 
Revelation21:19 Matombo a muteo wa mutsheṱo wa muḓi o vha o ṱamiwa nga matombo a mutengo muhulu a tshakha dzoṱhe. Tombo ḽa u thoma ḽa muteo ḽo vha ḽi jasipere, ḽa vhuvhili ḽi safire, ḽa vhuraru agathe, ḽa vhuṋa muroxwe," 
Revelation21:20 ḽa vhuṱanu onikisi, ḽa 6 khanelia, ḽa 7 khwatsi ya tshirulwane, ḽa 8 berili, ḽa 9 thophasi, ḽa fumi krisophasi, ḽa 11 jasinthi, ḽa 12 amethisi." 
Revelation21:21 Idzo khoro dza 12 dzo vha dzi nungu dza 12, iṅwe na iṅwe yo itwa nga nungu nthihi. Mukoto wa muḓi ndi wa musuku u songo vangwaho u vhonadzaho sa ngilasi." 
Revelation21:22 Afho muḓini a tho ngo vhona thembele; thembele yawo ndi Muṋe washu Mudzimu Ramaanḓaoṱhe na Ngwana. 
Revelation21:23 Uyo muḓi a u lili ḓuvha kana ṅwedzi uri u vhonetshelwe; khawo hu penya vhugala ha Mudzimu; luvhone lwawo ndi Ngwana. 
Revelation21:24 Tshakha dzi ḓo dzula dzi tshi vhonetshelwa nga tshedza tshawo; mahosi a ḽifhasi a ḓo ḓisa lupfumo lwao khawo. 
Revelation21:25 Khoro dzawo dzi ḓo dzula dzo vulea ḓuvha ḽoṱhe. A dzi nga vhuyi dza valwa, ngauri hu ḓo vha hu si na vhusiku fhethu afho." 
Revelation21:26 Lupfumo na vhugala ha dzitshakha zwi ḓo ḓiswa muḓini uyo. 
Revelation21:27 Henefho a hu nga dzheni na tshithihi tsho kumalaho; hu ḓi nga ane a ita zwi shonisaho kana ane a zwifha a nga si dzhene; vhane vha ḓo dzhena ndi vhe madzina avho a ṅwalwa buguni ya vha tshilaho, buguni ya Ngwana." 
Revelation22:1 Muruṅwa a dovha a ntsumbedza mulambo wa maḓi a ṋeaho vhutshilo a penyaho sa ngilasi a tshi bva kha khuluṋoni ya Mudzimu na Ngwana. 
Revelation22:2 A ela a tshi tsa e vhukati ha mukoto wa muḓi. Matungo oṱhe a mulambo ho vha hu na miri i ṋeaho vhutshilo i aṋwaho mitshelo ṅwedzi muṅwe na muṅwe, nga ṅwaha lwa ita 12. Maṱari ayo ndi dzilafho ḽa dzitshakha." 
Revelation22:3 Afho muḓini a hu nga wanali na tshithihi tsho teketelwaho nga Mudzimu. Khuluṋoni ya Mudzimu na Ngwana i ḓo vha henefho muḓini; vhalanda vhawe vha ḓo mu luvha. 
Revelation22:4 Vha ḓo vhona tshifhaṱuwo tshawe, dzina ḽawe ḽó ṅwalwa kha phanḓa dzavho." 
Revelation22:5 A hu tsha ḓo vha na vhusiku; a vha tsha ḓo lila luvhone kana tshedza tsha ḓuvha; Mudzimu Muṋe washu u ḓo vha e Ene tshedza tshavho. Vha ḓo vhusa vhe mahosi lini na lini. 
Revelation22:6 Ndi hone muruṅwa a tshi amba na nṋe a ri, “Zwine nda amba ndi ngoho, zwi ḓo itea. Muṋe washu Mudzimu Ene ane a ṋea vhaporofita maipfi ane vha amba, o ruma muruṅwa wawe uri a sumbedze vhalanda vhawe zwine zwa ḓo itea hu si kale.”" 
Revelation22:7 Yesu u ri, “Thetshelesani! A thi nga lengi u vhuya! Mashudu a tevhedzaho maipfi a vhuporofita a re buguni ino.”" 
Revelation22:8 Nṋe Johanisi ndo tou zwi pfa nga dzanga nḓevhe nda vhona zwithu izwo zwoṱhe nga anga maṱo. Musi ndi tshi fhedza u zwi pfa na u zwi vhona, nda wa nga magona milenzheni ya muruṅwa o ntsumbedzaho zwone." 
Revelation22:9 Ene a nkaidza a ri, “Aiwa nandi, a si zwone! Hufha na nṋe ndi mulanda unga iwe na vha haṋu vhaporofita na vhoṱhe vha tevhedzaho maipfi o ṅwalwaho buguni ino. Luvha Mudzimu!”" 
Revelation22:10 A amba na nṋe a ri, “Maipfi aya a vhuporofita a re buguni ino u songo a dzumba; tshifhinga tshazwo tsho no sendela." 
Revelation22:11 Ane a vha muvhi nga a ṱhaphudze vhuvhi hawe; o kumalaho a ṱhaphudze u kumala hawe; muvhuya a ṱhaphudze vhuvhuya hawe; mukhethwa a ṱhaphudze vhukhethwa hawe.” 
Revelation22:12 Yesu a dovha a ri, “Thetshelesani! A thi nga lengi u vhuya! Ndi ḓo vhuya na pfufho dzanga uri ndi pfufhe muṅwe na muṅwe ndi tshi tevhedza zwe a ita." 
Revelation22:13 Ndi Nṋe Alfa na Omega, ndi Nṋe wa u thoma na u fhiledza, mathomo na magumo." 
Revelation22:14 “Mashudu ane a kuvha nguvho dzawe dza sala dzi si na tshika. Onoyo u ḓo vha na pfanelo ya u ḽa muri u ṋeaho vhutshilo na u dzhena muḓini uyo nga khoro. 
Revelation22:15 Ngei nnḓa ha muḓi hone hu wanala dzimmbwa na vhaloi na dziphombwe na dziphondi na vha luvhaho midzimu na vha no funa zwa mazwifhi na zwa vhufhura. 
Revelation22:16 “Nṋe Yesu ndo ruma muruṅwa wanga uri a ḓe a ni ṱanziele zwithu hezwi zwivhidzoni. Ndi Nṋe Mudzi wa Dafita. Ndi Nṋe Masase.” 
Revelation22:17 Muya na muselwa vha ri, “Iḓa!” Ane a zwi pfa nga a ri, “Iḓa!” A no pfa ḓora kha a ḓe! Ane a funa a ṱangandedze maḓi a ṋeaho vhutshilo; a wanala nga fhedzi!" 
Revelation22:18 Nṋe Johanisi ndi laya muṅwe na muṅwe ane a pfa maipfi a vhuporofita kha bugu ino, ndi ri: Arali muthu a vhuya a engedza tshiṅwe kha maipfi haya, Mudzimu u ḓo mu engedzela madambudzo o bulwaho kha bugu yeneino." 
Revelation22:19 Hu ḓi nga arali muthu a fhungudza tshiṅwe kha maipfi a vhuporofita a re buguni ino, onoyo na Mudzimu u ḓo mu dzivhisa u ḽa muri u ṋeaho vhutshilo, a mu dzhiela vhudzulo hawe muḓini mukhethwa, zwine zwa bulwa henefha buguni ino." 
Revelation22:20 Ane a ṱanziela zwoṱhe hezwi u ri, “Ndi ngoho, zwo tou ralo. A thi nga lengi u vhuya.” “Amen, kha zwi ralo! Iḓa Muṋe washu Yesu!”"
